Matthew1:1 Luno lwe lulyo lwa Yesu Kristo, omwana wa Dawudi, omwana wa Ibulayimu." 
Matthew1:2 Ibulayimu yazaala Isaaka; Isaaka n'azaala Yakobo; Yakobo n'azaala Yuda ne baganda be; 
Matthew1:3 Yuda n'azaala Pereezi ne Zeera mu Tamali; Pereezi n'azaala Kezulooni; Kezulooni n'azaala Laamu; 
Matthew1:4 Laamu n'azaala Amminadaabu; Amminadaabu n'azaala Nasoni; Nasoni n'azaala Salumooni; 
Matthew1:5 Salumooni n'azaala Bowaazi mu Lakabu; Bowaazi n'azaala Obedi mu Luusi; Obedi n'azaala Yese; 
Matthew1:6 Yese n'azaala Dawudi kabaka. Dawudi n'azaala Sulemaani mu muka Uliya; 
Matthew1:7 Sulemaani n'azaala Lekobowaamu; Lekobowaamu n'azaala Abiya; Abiya n'azaala Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa n'azaala Yekosafaati; Yekosafaati n'azaala Yolaamu; Yolaamu n'azaala Uzziya; 
Matthew1:9 Uzziya n'azaala Yosamu; Yosamu n'azaala Akazi; Akazi n'azaala Keezeekiya; 
Matthew1:10 Keezeekiya n'azaala Manase; Manase n'azaala Amoni; Amoni n'azaala Yosiya; 
Matthew1:11 Yosiya n'azaala Yekoniya ne baganda be, mu biro abaana ba Isiraeri mwe baatwalirwa e Babbulooni." 
Matthew1:12 Oluvannyuma olw'okutwalibwa e Babbulooni, Yekoniya n'azaala Seyalutyeri; Seyalutyeri n'azaala Zerubbaberi;" 
Matthew1:13 Zerubbaberi n'azaala Abiwuudi; Abiwuudi n'azaala Eriyakimu; Eriyakimu n'azaala Azoli; 
Matthew1:14 Azoli n'azaala Sadoki; Sadoki n'azaala Akimu; Akimu n'azaala Eriwuudi; 
Matthew1:15 Eriwuudi n'azaala Ereyazaali; Ereyazaali n'azaala Mataani; Mataani n'azaala Yakobo; 
Matthew1:16 Yakobo n'azaala Yusufu, eyali bba Malyamu, Malyamu eyazaala Yesu ayitibwa Kristo." 
Matthew1:17 Bwe gityo emirembe gyonna, okuva ku Ibulayimu okutuuka ku Dawudi, emirembe kkumi n'ena (14), nate okuva ku Dawudi okutuuka ku kutwalibwa e Babbulooni, emirembe kkumi n'ena (14), nate okuva ku kutwalibwa e Babbulooni okutuuka ku Kristo, emirembe kkumi n'ena (14)." 
Matthew1:18 N'okuzaalibwa kwa Yesu Kristo kwali bwe kuti; Malyamu nnyina bwe yali ng'akyayogerezebwa Yusufu, baali nga tebannaba kufumbiriganwa, n'alabika ng'ali lubuto olw'Omwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Matthew1:19 Awo Yusufu bba, kubanga yali muntu mutuukirivu, n'atayagala kumukwasa nsonyi, n'alowooza okumulekayo mu kyama." 
Matthew1:20 Laba bwe yali alowooza bw'atyo, malayika wa Mukama n'ajja gy'ali mu kirooto, n'amugamba nti, “Yusufu omwana wa Dawudi, totya kutwala Malyamu mukazi wo, kubanga olubuto lwe lwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Matthew1:21 Naye alizaala omwana wa bulenzi; naawe olimutuuma erinnya lye YESU; kubanga ye y'alirokola abantu be mu bibi byabwe.” 
Matthew1:22 Ebyo byonna byakolebwa bituukirire Mukama bye yayogerera mu nnabbi ng'agamba nti," 
Matthew1:23 “Laba, omuwala atamanyi musajja aliba olubuto,” “ ‘era alizaala omwana wa bulenzi, erinnya lye aliyitibwa Emmanweri; eritegeeza nti Katonda ali naffe.’”" 
Matthew1:24 Yusufu bwe yazuukuka mu tulo, n'akola nga malayika wa Mukama bwe yamulagira, n'atwala mukazi we," 
Matthew1:25 so teyamumanya okutuusa lwe yamala okuzaala omwana; Yusufu n'amutuuma erinnya lye YESU. 
Matthew2:1 Awo Yesu bwe yazaalibwa mu Besirekemu eky'e Buyudaaya ku mirembe gya Kerode kabaka, laba, abasajja abagezigezi abaava ebuvanjuba ne bajja e Yerusaalemi," 
Matthew2:2 ne babuuza nti, “Kabaka w'Abayudaaya azaaliddwa ali ludda wa? Kubanga twalaba emmunyeenye ye mu buvanjuba, ne tujja okumusinza.”" 
Matthew2:3 Kerode kabaka bwe yawulira ne yeeraliikirira, era n'ab'e Yerusaalemi bonna." 
Matthew2:4 N'akuŋŋaanya bakabona abakulu bonna, n'abawandiisi ab'abantu, n'ababuuza Kristo gye yali agenda okuzaalirwa." 
Matthew2:5 Nabo ne bamugamba nti, “Mu Besirekemu eky'e Buyudaaya,” kubanga bwe kyawandiikibwa nnabbi bwe kityo nti," 
Matthew2:6 Naawe Besirekemu, mu nsi ya Yuda, Toli mutono mu balangira ba Yuda; Kubanga afuga aliva mu ggwe, Alirunda abantu bange Isiraeri." 
Matthew2:7 Awo Kerode n'ayita abagezigezi kyama, n'ababuuliriza nnyo ebiro emmunyeenye bye yaakamala okuva lw'eyalabika." 
Matthew2:8 N'abasindika e Besirekemu, n'abagamba nti, “Mugende, munoonye nnyo, mulabe omwana bw'afaanana; naye bwe mumulabanga, ne mujja mumbuulira nange ndyoke ŋŋende mmusinze.”" 
Matthew2:9 Bwe baamala okuwulira ebya kabaka, ne bagenda; laba ne baddamu okulaba emmunyeenye eyo, gye baalabira ebuvanjuba, n'ebakulembera, okutuusa lwe yajja n'eyimirira waggulu w'ekifo awaali omwana." 
Matthew2:10 Bwe baalaba emmunyeenye, ne basanyuka essanyu lingi nnyo nnyini." 
Matthew2:11 Ne bayingira mu nnyumba, ne balaba omwana ng'ali ne Malyamu nnyina; ne bavuunama, ne basinza omwana; ne basumulula ensawo zaabwe, ne bamutonera ebirabo bya zaabu, n'obubaane, n'omugavu." 
Matthew2:12 Katonda bwe yabalabulira mu kirooto baleme okuddayo eri Kerode, ne bakwata ekkubo eddala, ne baddayo ewaabwe." 
Matthew2:13 Laba, bwe baamala okugenda, malayika wa Mukama n'alabikira Yusufu mu kirooto, n'amugamba nti, “Golokoka, otwale omwana ne nnyina, oddukire e Misiri obeere eyo okutuusa nze lwe ndikugamba, kubanga Kerode ajja okunoonya omwana okumutta.”" 
Matthew2:14 Awo Yusufu n'azuukuka, n'atwala omwana ne nnyina ekiro, n'agenda e Misiri;" 
Matthew2:15 n'abeera eyo, okutuusa Kerode bwe yafa; ekigambo kituukirire Mukama kye yayogerera mu nnabbi, ng'agamba nti, “Nnayita omwana wange okuva mu Misiri.”" 
Matthew2:16 Awo Kerode, bwe yalaba ng'abalaguzi baamwefulidde, n'asunguwala nnyo, n'atuma okutta abaana ab'obulenzi bonna abaali e Besirekemu ne ku nsalo zaakyo zonna, abaali bawezezza emyaka ebiri n'abatannagituusa, okusinziira ku biro bwe byali bye yabuulirizaamu ennyo abalaguzi." 
Matthew2:17 Awo ekigambo nnabbi Yeremiya kye yayogera ne kiryoka kituukirira, bwe yagamba nti," 
Matthew2:18 “Eddoboozi lyawulirwa mu Laama, Okukaaba n'okukuba ebiwoobe ebingi, Laakeeri ng'akaabira abaana be; So tayagala kukubagizibwa, kubanga tebakyaliwo.”" 
Matthew2:19 Naye Kerode bwe yamala okufa, laba, malayika wa Mukama n'alabikira Yusufu mu kirooto e Misiri," 
Matthew2:20 n'agamba nti, “Golokoka, otwale omwana ne nnyina, ogende mu nsi ya Isiraeri, kubanga abaali banoonya omwana okumutta bafudde.”" 
Matthew2:21 Awo Yusufu n'agolokoka, n'atwala omwana ne nnyina, n'agenda mu nsi ya Isiraeri." 
Matthew2:22 Naye bwe yawulira nti Alukerawo ye kabaka w'e Buyudaaya ng'asikidde kitaawe Kerode, n'atya okuddayo. Awo Katonda bwe yamulabulira mu kirooto, ne yeekooloobya, n'agenda mu kitundu ky'e Ggaliraaya." 
Matthew2:23 N'ajja n'abeera mu kyalo erinnya lyakyo Nazaaleesi, ekigambo bannabbi kye baayogera kituukirire nti, “Aliyitibwa Munazaalaayo.”" 
Matthew3:1 Mu nnaku ezo, Yokaana Omubatiza n'ajja mu ddungu ery'e Buyudaaya, nga abuulira," 
Matthew3:2 ng'agamba nti, “Mwenenye; kubanga obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bunaatera okutuuka.”" 
Matthew3:3 Kubanga Yokaana oyo nnabbi Isaaya gwe yayogerako, ng'agamba nti, “Eddoboozi ly'oyo ayogerera waggulu mu ddungu nti, Mulongoose oluguudo lwa Mukama, Muluŋŋamye amakubo ge.”" 
Matthew3:4 Naye Yokaana oyo yayambalanga engoye ez'ebyoya by'eŋŋamira, nga yeesiba olukoba olw'eddiba mu kiwato; n'emmere ye yalyanga nzige n'omubisi gw'enjuki ez'omu nsiko." 
Matthew3:5 Awo abantu baavanga e Yerusaalemi ne mu Buyudaaya bwonna, n'ensi yonna eriraanye Yoludaani, ne bajja gy'ali;" 
Matthew3:6 n'ababatiza mu mugga Yoludaani, nga baatula ebibi byabwe." 
Matthew3:7 Naye bwe yalaba Abafalisaayo abangi n'Abasaddukaayo abangi nga bajja gy'ali okubatizibwa, n'abagamba nti, “Mmwe abaana b'emisota, ani eyabalabula okudduka obusungu obugenda okujja?”" 
Matthew3:8 Mubale ebibala ebisaanidde okwenenya; 
Matthew3:9 muleme kulowooza n'okwogera mu mitima nti, “Tulina Ibulayimu ye jjajjaffe; kubanga mbagamba nti Katonda ayinza mu mayinja gano okufuuliramu Ibulayimu abaana." 
Matthew3:10 Naye kaakano embazzi eteekeddwa ku kikolo ky'emiti; buli muti ogutabala bibala birungi gunaatemebwa, gunaasuulibwa mu muliro." 
Matthew3:11 Nze mbabatiza n'amazzi olw'okwenenya; naye oyo ajja emabega wange ye ansinga amaanyi, sisaanira na kukwata ngatto ze; oyo alibabatiza n'Omwoyo Omutukuvu n'omuliro." 
Matthew3:12 Olugali lwe luli mu mukono gwe, naye alirongoosa nnyo egguuliro lye; alikuŋŋaanyiza eŋŋaano mu ggwanika, naye ebisusunku alibyokya n'omuliro ogutazikira.”" 
Matthew3:13 Awo Yesu n'ava e Ggaliraaya, n'atuuka ku mugga Yoludaani eri Yokaana, amubatize." 
Matthew3:14 Naye Yokaana yali ayagala okumugaana, ng'agamba nti, “Nze nneetaaga ggwe okumbatiza, naye ate ggwe ojja gye ndi?”" 
Matthew3:15 Naye Yesu n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Kkiriza kaakano; kubanga kitugwanira bwe tutyo okutuukiriza obutuukirivu bwonna.” Awo Yokaana n'alyoka amukkiriza." 
Matthew3:16 Awo Yesu, bwe yamala okubatizibwa, amangu ago n'ava mu mazzi; laba, eggulu ne libikkuka, n'alaba Omwoyo gwa Katonda nga gukka ng'ejjiba, nga gujja ku ye;" 
Matthew3:17 laba, eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu, nga ligamba nti, “Oyo ye Mwana wange, gwe njagala, gwe nsanyukira ennyo.”" 
Matthew4:1 Awo Yesu n'atwalibwa Omwoyo mu ddungu okukemebwa Setaani. 
Matthew4:2 Bwe yamala okusiiba ennaku ana (40), emisana n'ekiro, enjala n'eryoka emuluma." 
Matthew4:3 Omukemi n'ajja n'amugamba nti, “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, gamba amayinja gano gafuuke emmere.”" 
Matthew4:4 Naye Yesu n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘Omuntu tabanga mulamu na mmere yokka, wabula na buli kigambo ekiva mu kamwa ka Katonda.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Awo Setaani n'atwala Yesu mu kibuga ekitukuvu; n'amuteeka ku kitikkiro kya Yeekaalu," 
Matthew4:6 n'amugamba nti, “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, buuka ogwe wansi; kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti,” “ ‘Alikulagiririza bamalayika be, Balikuwanirira mu mikono gyabwe, Oleme okwesittala ekigere kyo ku jjinja.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Kyawandiikibwa nate nti, ‘tokemanga Mukama Katonda wo.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Ate Setaani n'amutwala ku lusozi oluwanvu ennyo, n'amulaga ensi za bakabaka bonna abali mu nsi, n'ekitiibwa kyazo;" 
Matthew4:9 n'amugamba nti, “Ebyo byonna nnaabikuwa bw'onoovuunama n'onsinza.”" 
Matthew4:10 Awo Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Vaawo genda, Setaani! kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘Osinzanga Mukama Katonda wo, era gw'oweerezanga yekka.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Awo Setaani n'amuleka; laba, bamalayika ne bajja, ne bamuweereza." 
Matthew4:12 Awo Yesu bwe yawulira nga Yokaana akwatiddwa n'addayo e Ggaliraaya; 
Matthew4:13 ng'avudde e Nazaaleesi, n'ajja, n'abeera e Kaperunawumu, ekiri ku nnyanja, mu nsi ya Zebbulooni ne Nafutaali," 
Matthew4:14 bw'ekityo ekigambo kituukirire nnabbi Isaaya kye yayogera, ng'agamba nti," 
Matthew4:15 “Ensi ya Zebbulooni n'ensi ya Nafutaali, Eyoolekedde ennyanja, emitala wa Yoludaani, Ggaliraaya ey'abamawanga amalala," 
Matthew4:16 Abantu abaali batuula mu kizikiza, Balabye omusana mungi, N'abo abaali batuula mu nsi y'okufa ne mu kisiikirize kyakwo, Omusana gubaakidde.”" 
Matthew4:17 Yesu n'asookera awo okubuulira n'okugamba abantu nti, “Mwenenye; kubanga obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bunaatera okutuuka.”" 
Matthew4:18 Awo Yesu bwe yali ng'atambula ku lubalama lw'ennyanja y'e Ggaliraaya, n'alaba ab'oluganda babiri, Simooni gwe bayita Peetero, ne Andereya muganda we, nga basuula obutimba mu nnyanja, kubanga baali bavubi." 
Matthew4:19 N'abagamba nti, “Mujje, muyite nange, nange ndibafuula abavubi b'abantu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Amangwago ne baleka awo obutimba bwabwe, ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew4:21 N'atambulako katono mu maaso n'alaba ab'oluganda babiri abalala, Yakobo omwana wa Zebbedaayo, ne Yokaana muganda we, nga bali mu lyato wamu ne kitaabwe Zebbedaayo, nga bayunga obutimba bwabwe; n'abo Yesu n'abayita." 
Matthew4:22 Amangwago ne baleka awo eryato ne kitaabwe, ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew4:23 Yesu n'abuna Ggaliraaya yonna, ng'ayigiririza mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe, era ng'abuulira enjiri ey'obwakabaka, era ng'awonya endwadde zonna n'obunafu bwonna mu bantu." 
Matthew4:24 Ebigambo bye ne bibuna Obusuuli bwonna, ne bamuleetera bonna abaali balwadde, abaali bakwatidwa endwadde ezitali zimu, n'ebibonyoobonyo, n'ab'emizimu, n'ab'ensimbu, n'abaali bakoozimbye; bonna n'abawonya." 
Matthew4:25 Ebibiina by'abantu bangi, ne bamugoberera nga bava e Ggaliraaya n'e Dekapoli n'e Yerusaalemi n'e Buyudaaya n'emitala wa Yoludaani." 
Matthew5:1 Awo Yesu bwe yalaba ebibiina by'abantu, n'alinnya ku lusozi: n'atuula wansi, abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali;" 
Matthew5:2 n'ayasamya akamwa ke, n'abayigiriza ng'agamba nti:" 
Matthew5:3 “Balina omukisa abaavu mu mwoyo, kubanga abo obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bwe bwabwe.”" 
Matthew5:4 “Balina omukisa abali mu nnaku, kubanga abo balisanyusibwa.”" 
Matthew5:5 “Balina omukisa abateefu, kubanga abo balisikira ensi.”" 
Matthew5:6 “Balina omukisa abalumwa enjala n'ennyonta olw'obutuukirivu, kubanga abo balikkusibwa.”" 
Matthew5:7 “Balina omukisa ab'ekisa, kubanga abo balikwatirwa ekisa.”" 
Matthew5:8 “Balina omukisa abalina omutima omulongoofu, kubanga abo baliraba Katonda.”" 
Matthew5:9 “Balina omukisa abakolerera emirembe, kubanga abo baliyitibwa baana ba Katonda.”" 
Matthew5:10 “Balina omukisa abayigganyizibwa olw'obutuukirivu, kubanga abo obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bwe bwabwe." 
Matthew5:11 Mmwe mulina omukisa bwe banaabavumanga, bwe banaabayigganyanga, bwe banaabawaayirizanga buli kigambo kibi, nga babalanga nze." 
Matthew5:12 Musanyuke, mujaguze nnyo: kubanga empeera yammwe nnene mu ggulu, kubanga bwe batyo bwe baayigganyanga bannabbi abaasooka mmwe.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Mmwe muli munnyo gwa nsi; naye omunnyo bwe guggwaamu ensa, balirungamu munnyo nnabaki? Guba tegukyagasa nate, wabula okusuulibwa ebweru, abantu ne bagulinnyirira." 
Matthew5:14 Mmwe muli musana gwa nsi. Ekibuga bwe kizimbibwa ku lusozi, tekiyinzika kukisibwa." 
Matthew5:15 So tebakoleeza ttabaaza okugivuunikira mu kibbo; wabula okugiteeka waggulu ku kikondo kyayo; nayo ebaakira bonna abali mu nju. 
Matthew5:16 Kale omusana gwammwe gwakenga bwe gutyo mu maaso g'abantu, balabenga ebigambo ebirungi bye mukola, balyoke bagulumizenga Kitammwe ali mu ggulu.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Temulowoozanga nti najja okudibya amateeka oba ebya bannabbi; sajja kubidibya, wabula okubituukiriza." 
Matthew5:18 Kubanga mazima mbagamba nti, eggulu n'ensi okutuusa lwe biriggwaawo, ennukuta emu newakubadde akatonnyeze akamu ak'omu Mateeka tekaliggwaawo, okutuusa byonna lwe birimala okutuukirira." 
Matthew5:19 Kale buli anaadibyanga erimu ku mateeka ago wadde erisinga obutono era anaayigirizanga abantu bw'atyo, aliyitibwa mutono mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu; naye buli anaagakwatanga era anaagayigirizanga, oyo aliyitibwa mukulu mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu." 
Matthew5:20 Kubanga mbagamba nti obutuukirivu bwammwe bwe butaasingenga butukiruvu bwa bawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, temuliyingira n'akatono mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu.”" 
Matthew5:21 “Mwawulira ab'edda bwe baagambibwa nti, ‘Tottanga; naye omuntu bw'anattanga, anazzanga omusango.’" 
Matthew5:22 naye nange mbagamba nti buli muntu asunguwalira muganda we, aba azizza omusango; n'oyo anaagambanga muganda we nti Laka, asaanidde okutwalibwa mu lukiiko, ate anaagambanga muganda nti, ‘Musirusiru,’ asaanidde okusuulibwa mu muliro gwa Ggeyeena." 
Matthew5:23 Kale, bw'obanga oleese ssaddaaka yo ku kyoto, bw'osinzira eyo n'omala ojjukira nga muganda wo akuliko ekigambo ky'akwemulugunyiza," 
Matthew5:24 leka awo ssaddaaka yo mu maaso g'ekyoto, oddeyo, osooke omale okutagabana ne muganda wo, olyoke okomewo oweeyo ssaddaaka yo." 
Matthew5:25 Tabagananga mangu n'oyo akuwawaabira ng'okyali naye mu kkubo; akuwawaabira alemenga okukutwala eri katikkiro, so ne katikkiro alemenga okukuwa omumbowa, era olemenga okuteekebwa mu kkomera." 
Matthew5:26 Mazima nkugamba nti Tolivaamu, okutuusa lw'olimala okukomekkereza okusasula n'eppeesa erisembayo.”" 
Matthew5:27 “Mwawulira bwe baagambibwa nti, ‘Toyendanga,’" 
Matthew5:28 naye nange mbagamba mmwe nti buli muntu atunuulira omukazi n'amwegomba, mu mutima gwe ng'amaze okumwendako." 
Matthew5:29 Singa eriiso lyo erya ddyo likwesittaza, liggyeemu, olisuule wala; kubanga kye kisinga obulungi ekitundu kyo ekimu kizikirire, okusinga omubiri gwo gwonna lwe gulisuulibwa mu muliro gwa Ggeyeena." 
Matthew5:30 Era singa omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gukwesittaza, gutemeko, ogusuule wala; kubanga kye kisinga obulungi ekitundu kyo ekimu kizikirire, okusinga omubiri gwo gwonna lwe gulisuulibwa mu muliro gwa Ggeyeena.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Baagambibwa nate nti Omuntu bw'agobanga mukazi we, amuwanga ebbaluwa ey'okumugoba;" 
Matthew5:32 naye nange mbagamba nti buli muntu anaagobanga mukazi we, wabula ng'amugobye lwa bwenzi, ng'amwenzezza, n'oyo anaawasanga gwe baagoba, ng'ayenze.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Era mwawulira ab'edda bwe baagambibwa nti, ‘Tolayiranga bya bulimba, naye otuukirizanga eri Mukama ebyo byolayidde;’" 
Matthew5:34 naye nange mbagamba nti Tolayiranga n'akatono, newakubadde eggulu, kubanga ye ntebe ya Katonda;" 
Matthew5:35 newakubadde ensi, kubanga ye gy'ateekako ebigere bye; newakubadde Yerusaalemi, kubanga kye kibuga kya Kabaka omukulu." 
Matthew5:36 So tolayiranga mutwe gwo, kubanga toyinza kufuula luviiri lumu oba lweru oba luddugavu." 
Matthew5:37 Naye ebigambo byammwe bibeerenga nti Weewaawo, weewaawo; si weewaawo, si weewaawo; naye ebisinga ebyo biva mu mubi.”" 
Matthew5:38 “Mwawulira bwe baagambibwa nti ‘Eriiso ligattibwenga liiso, n'erinnyo ligattibwenga linnyo,’" 
Matthew5:39 naye nange mbagamba mmwe nti Temuziyizanga mubi; naye omuntu bw'akukubanga ku luba olwa ddyo, omukyusizanga n'olwa kkono." 
Matthew5:40 Omuntu bw'ayagalanga okuwoza naawe okutwala ekkanzu yo, omulekeranga n'ekizibaawo kyo." 
Matthew5:41 Omuntu bw'akuwalirizanga okutambula naye mairo emu, tambulanga naye n'ey'okubiri." 
Matthew5:42 Akusabanga omuwanga; omuntu bw'ayagalanga okumuwola, tomwegobangako.”" 
Matthew5:43 “Mwawulira bwe baagambibwa nti, ‘Oyagalanga munno, okyawanga omulabe wo;’" 
Matthew5:44 naye nange mbagamba mmwe nti Mwagalenga abalabe bammwe, musabirenga ababayigganya;" 
Matthew5:45 mulyoke mubeerenga abaana bakitammwe ali mu ggulu; kubanga enjuba ye agyakiza ababi n'abalungi, era atonnyeseza enkuba abatuukirivu n'abatali batuukirivu." 
Matthew5:46 Kubanga bwe munaayagalanga abo ababaagala, mulina mpeera ki? N'abawooza tebakola bwe batyo?" 
Matthew5:47 Bwe munaalamusanga baganda bammwe bokka, olwo kye mukoze okusinga abalala ki? N'ab'amawanga tebakola bwe batyo?" 
Matthew5:48 Kale mmwe mubeerenga batuukirivu, nga Kitammwe ali mu ggulu bw'ali omutuukirivu.”" 
Matthew6:1 “Mwekuume obutakoleranga bikolwa byammwe eby'obutuukirivu mu maaso g'abantu balyoke babalabe; kubanga bwe munaakolanga bwe mutyo temuuweebwenga mpeera okuva eri Kitammwe ali mu ggulu.” 
Matthew6:2 Kale, bw'ogabiranga abaavu, teweefuuyiranga ŋŋombe mu maaso go, ng'abannanfuusi bwe bakola mu makuŋŋaaniro ne mu nguudo, abantu babawe ekitiibwa. Mazima mbagamba nti baba bamaze okuweebwa empeera yaabwe." 
Matthew6:3 Naye ggwe bw'ogabiranga abaavu, omukono gwo ogwa kkono gulemenga okumanya ogwa ddyo kye gukola," 
Matthew6:4 okugaba kwo kubeerenga kwa kyama; kale Kitaawo alaba mu kyama alikuwa empeera. 
Matthew6:5 Era bwe musabanga, temubanga nga bannanfuusi; kubanga baagala okusaba nga bayimiridde mu makuŋŋaaniro ne ku mabbali g'enguudo, era abantu babalabe. Mazima mbagamba nti Bamaze abo okuweebwa empeera yaabwe." 
Matthew6:6 Naye ggwe bw'osabanga, yingiranga mu kisenge kyo munda, omalenga okuggalawo oluggi, olyoke osabe Kitaawo ali mu kyama, kale Kitaawo alaba mu kyama, alikuwa empeera." 
Matthew6:7 Nammwe bwe musabanga, temudiŋŋananga mu bigambo, ng'ab'amawanga bwe bakola; kubanga balowooza nga banaawulirwa olw'ebigambo byabwe ebingi." 
Matthew6:8 Kale, temufaanananga nga bo, kubanga Kitammwe amanyi bye mwetaaga nga temunnaba kumusaba." 
Matthew6:9 Kale, musabenga bwe muti, nti, “Kitaffe ali mu ggulu, Erinnya lyo litukuzibwe." 
Matthew6:10 Obwakabaka bwo bujje. By'oyagala bikolebwe mu nsi, nga bwe bikolebwa mu ggulu." 
Matthew6:11 Otuwe leero emmere yaffe eya leero. 
Matthew6:12 Otusonyiwe amabanja gaffe, nga naffe bwe tusonyiwa abatwewolako." 
Matthew6:13 Totutwala mu kukemebwa, naye otulokole mu bibi. [Kubanga obwakabaka, n'obuyinza, n'ekitiibwa, bibyo, emirembe n'emirembe, Amiina.”]" 
Matthew6:14 “Kubanga bwe munaasonyiwanga abantu ebyonoono byabwe, nammwe Kitammwe ali mu ggulu anaabasonyiwanga." 
Matthew6:15 Naye bwe mutaasonyiwenga bantu byonoono byabwe, ne Kitammwe taasonyiwenga byonoono byammwe.”" 
Matthew6:16 Nate bwe musiibanga, temubeeranga nga bannanfuusi, abalina amaaso ag'ennaku; kubanga beeyonoona mu ndabika yaabwe, abantu balyoke babalabe nga basiiba. Mazima mbagamba nti Bamaze okuweebwa empeera yaabwe." 
Matthew6:17 Naye ggwe bw'osiibanga, osaabanga amafuta ku mutwe, onaabanga ne mu maaso;" 
Matthew6:18 abantu balemenga okulaba ng'osiiba, wabula Kitaawo ali mu kyama: kale Kitaawo alaba mu kyama alikuwa empeera." 
Matthew6:19 Temweterekeranga bintu ku nsi, kwe byonoonekera n'ennyenje n'obutalagge, n'ababbi kwe basimira ne babba," 
Matthew6:20 naye mweterekeranga ebintu mu ggulu, gye bitayonoonekera n'ennyenje newakubadde obutalagge, so n'ababbi gye batasimira, so gye batabbira." 
Matthew6:21 Kubanga ebintu byo gye bibeera, omutima gwo nagwo gye gubeera." 
Matthew6:22 “Ettabaaza y'omubiri lye liiso, eriiso lyo bwe liba eddamu, omubiri gwo gwonna gunaabanga n'okutangaala." 
Matthew6:23 Naye eriiso lyo bwe litaba ddamu, omubiri gwo gwonna gunaabanga n'ekizikiza. Kale okutangaala okuli munda mu ggwe bwe kubeera ekizikiza, ekizikiza ekyo kiryenkana wa obunene!”" 
Matthew6:24 Tewali muntu ayinza kuweereza baami babiri; kuba oba anaakyawanga omu, n'ayagalanga omulala; oba anaanywereranga ku omu, n'anyoomanga omulala. Temuyinza kuweereza Katonda ne mamona." 
Matthew6:25 Kyenva mbagamba nti Temweraliikiriranga bulamu bwammwe, nti mulirya ki, mulinywa ki; newakubadde omubiri gwammwe, nti mulyambala ki. Obulamu tebusinga mmere, n'omubiri tegusinga byakwambala?" 
Matthew6:26 Mulabe ennyonyi ez'omu bbanga, nga tezisiga, so tezikungula, tezikuŋŋaanyiza mu mawanika; era Kitammwe ali mu ggulu aziriisa ezo. Mmwe temusinga nnyo ezo?" 
Matthew6:27 Ani mu mmwe bwe yeeraliikirira, ayinza okweyongerako ku bukulu bwe n'akaseera akamu?" 
Matthew6:28 Naye ekibeeraliikiriza ki eby'okwambala? Mutunuulire amalanga ag'omu ttale, bwe gamera; tegakola mulimu, so tegalanga lugoye;" 
Matthew6:29 naye mbagamba nti ne Sulemaani mu kitiibwa kye kyonna, teyayambalanga ng'erimu ku go." 
Matthew6:30 Naye Katonda bw'ayambaza bw'atyo omuddo ogw'omu ttale, oguliwo leero, ne jjo bagusuula mu kyoto, talisinga nnyo okwambaza mmwe, abalina okukkiriza okutono?" 
Matthew6:31 Kale temweraliikiriranga nga mwogera nti Tulirya ki? Oba tulinywa ki? Oba tulyambala ki? 
Matthew6:32 Kubanga ebyo byonna amawanga bye ganoonya; kubanga Kitammwe ali mu ggulu amanyi nga mwetaaga ebyo byonna. 
Matthew6:33 Naye musooke munoonye obwakabaka bwe n'obutuukirivu bwe; era ebyo byonna mulibyongerwako. 
Matthew6:34 Kale temweraliikiriranga bya jjo, kubanga olunaku olwa jjo lulyeraliikirira ebyalwo. Olunaku olumu ekibi kyalwo kirumala." 
Matthew7:1 “Temusalanga musango, nammwe muleme okusalirwa." 
Matthew7:2 Kubanga omusango nga bwemugusalira abalala, nammwe bwe gulibasalirwa, era ekigera kye mugereramu, ekyo nammwe kye muligererwamu." 
Matthew7:3 Ekikutunuuliza ki akantu akali ku liiso lya muganda wo, naye n'otofaayo ku njaliiro eri ku liiso lyo ggwe?" 
Matthew7:4 Oba oligamba otya muganda wo nti Leka nkuggyeeko akantu akali ku liiso lyo; sso nga ku liiso lyo kuliko enjaliiro? 
Matthew7:5 Munnanfuusi ggwe, sooka oggyeko enjaliiro ku liiso lyo ggwe; olyoke olabe bulungi okuggyako akantu ku liiso lya muganda wo." 
Matthew7:6 “Ekintu ekitukuvu temukiwanga mbwa, era temusuulanga luulu zammwe mu maaso ga mbizzi, zireme okuzirinnyirira n'ebigere byazo, ne zikyuka okubaluma.”" 
Matthew7:7 Musabe, muliweebwa; munoonye, muliraba; mweyanjule, muliggulirwawo;" 
Matthew7:8 kubanga buli muntu asaba aweebwa; anoonya alaba; n'eyeeyanjula aliggulirwawo. 
Matthew7:9 Muntu ki mu mmwe, omwana we bw'alimusaba emmere, alimuwa ejjinja;" 
Matthew7:10 oba bw'alisaba ekyennyanja, alimuwa omusota?" 
Matthew7:11 Kale mmwe, ababi, nga bwe mumanyi okuwa abaana bammwe ebintu ebirungi, Kitammwe ali mu ggulu talisinga nnyo okubawa ebirungi abo abamusaba?" 
Matthew7:12 Kale byonna bye mwagala abantu okubakolanga mmwe, nammwe bwe mutyo mubibakolenga; kubanga ekyo ge mateeka ne bannabbi." 
Matthew7:13 Muyingire mu mulyango omufunda; kubanga omulyango mugazi, n'ekkubo lyangu eridda mu kuzikirira, n'abo abaliyitamu bangi." 
Matthew7:14 Kubanga omulyango mufunda n'ekkubo zibu eridda mu bulamu, n'abo abaliraba batono." 
Matthew7:15 Mwekuume bannabbi ab'obulimba, abajjira mu byambalo by'endiga gye muli, naye nga munda gy'emisege egisikula." 
Matthew7:16 Mulibategeerera ku bibala byabwe. Abantu banoga batya ezabbibu ku busaana, oba ettiini ku mwennyango?" 
Matthew7:17 Bwe kityo buli muti omulungi gubala ebibala birungi; naye omuti omubi gubala ebibala bibi. 
Matthew7:18 Omuti omulungi teguyinza kubala bibala bibi, so n'omuti omubi teguyinza kubala bibala birungi." 
Matthew7:19 Buli muti ogutabala kibala kirungi bagutema bagusuula mu muliro. 
Matthew7:20 Kale mulibategeerera ku bibala byabwe. 
Matthew7:21 “Si buli muntu aŋŋamba nti, ‘Mukama wange, Mukama wange,’ si ye aliyingira mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, wabula akola Kitange ali mu ggulu by'ayagala." 
Matthew7:22 Bangi abaliŋŋamba ku lunaku luli nti Mukama waffe, Mukama waffe, tetwalagulanga mu linnya lyo, tetwagobanga dayimooni mu linnya lyo, tetwakolanga bya magero bingi mu linnya lyo?" 
Matthew7:23 Ne ndyoka mbaatulira nti Sibamanyangako mmwe; muve we ndi mmwe mwenna abaakola eby'obujeemu.” 
Matthew7:24 Buli muntu awulira ebigambo byange ebyo, n'amala abikola, kyaliva afaananyizibwa n'omusajja ow'amagezi eyazimba enju ye ku lwazi:" 
Matthew7:25 enkuba n'etonnya, mukoka n'akulukuta, kibuyaga n'akunta, ne bikuba enju eyo; so n'etegwa; kubanga yazimbibwa ku lwazi." 
Matthew7:26 Na buli muntu awulira ebigambo byange ebyo n'atabikola, alifaananyizibwa n'omusajja atalina magezi, eyazimba enju ye ku musenyu;" 
Matthew7:27 enkuba n'etonnya, mukoka n'akulukuta, kibuyaga n'akunta, ne bikuba enju eyo; n'egwa, n'okugwa kwayo kwali kunene." 
Matthew7:28 Awo olwatuuka Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo, ebibiina ne byewuunya okuyigiriza kwe," 
Matthew7:29 kubanga yabayigiriza nga nannyini buyinza, so si ng'abawandiisi baabwe." 
Matthew8:1 Yesu bwe yava ku lusozi, ebibiina by'abantu ne bimugoberera." 
Matthew8:2 Kale, laba, omugenge n'amusemberera n'amusinza, n'agamba nti. “Mukama wange, bw'oyagala, oyinza okunnongoosa.”" 
Matthew8:3 Yesu n'agolola omukono, n'amukwatako, ng'agamba nti, “Njagala; longooka.” Amangu ago ebigenge bye ne birongooka." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Laba tobuulirako muntu n'omu; naye genda weerage eri kabona, omutwalire ekitone Musa kye yalagira, kibeere omujulirwa gyebali.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yesu bwe yayingira mu Kaperunawumu, omwami w'ekitongole Omuruumi n'ajja gy'ali, n'amwegayirira," 
Matthew8:6 ng'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, mulenzi wange agalamidde mu nnyumba akoozimbye, abonaabona kitalo.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Najja ne mmuwonya.”" 
Matthew8:8 Omwami w'ekitongole Omuruumi n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, sisaanira ggwe okuyingira wansi w'akasolya kange: naye yogera kigambo bugambo, mulenzi wange anaawona." 
Matthew8:9 Kubanga nange ndi muntu mutwalibwa, nga nnina basserikale be ntwala; bwe ŋŋamba oyo nti, ‘Genda,’ agenda, n'omulala nti, ‘Jjangu,’ ajja; n'omuddu wange nti, ‘Kola bwoti,’ bw'akola.”" 
Matthew8:10 Naye Yesu bwe yawulira, ne yeewuunya, n'agamba abaayita naye nti, “Ddala mbagamba nti Sinnalaba kukkiriza kunene nga kuno, newakubadde mu Isiraeri." 
Matthew8:11 Nange mbagamba nti Bangi abaliva ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba, abalituula awamu ne Ibulayimu, ne Isaaka ne Yakobo, mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu," 
Matthew8:12 naye abaana b'obwakabaka baligoberwa mu kizikiza eky'ebweru; ye eriba okukaaba n'okulumwa obujiji.” 
Matthew8:13 Yesu n'agamba omwami w'ekitongole Omuruumi nti, “Kale genda; nga bw'okkirizza, kibeere gy'oli bwe kityo.” Omulenzi n'awonerawo mu kiseera ekyo." 
Matthew8:14 Yesu bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Peetero, n'alaba nnyazaala wa Peetero ng'agalamidde alwadde omusujja." 
Matthew8:15 N'amukwata ku mukono, omusujja ne gumuwonako; n'agolokoka, n'amuweereza." 
Matthew8:16 Obudde bwali buwungedde, ne bamuleetera bangi abakwatiddwa dayimooni; n'agoba dayimooni n'ekigambo n'awonya bonna abaali balwadde." 
Matthew8:17 Ekigambo kituukirire ekyayogerwa nnabbi Isaaya, ng'agamba nti, “Ye yennyini yatwala obunafu bwaffe, ne yeetikka endwadde zaffe.”" 
Matthew8:18 Awo Yesu bwe yalaba nga ebibiina bingi nga bimwetoolodde, n'alagira bagende emitala w'eri." 
Matthew8:19 Omuwandiisi omu n'ajja, n'amugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, nnaayitanga naawe buli gy'onoogendanga yonna.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Ebibe birina obunnya, n'ennyonyi ez'omu bbanga zirina ebisu; naye Omwana w'omuntu talina w'assa mutwe gwe.”" 
Matthew8:21 Omuyigirizwa we omulala n'amugamba nti, “ Mukama wange, sooka ondeke ŋŋende nziike kitange.”" 
Matthew8:22 Naye Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Yita nange; leka abafu baziike abafu baabwe.”" 
Matthew8:23 Awo Yesu n'asaabala mu lyato, abayigirizwa be ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew8:24 Omuyaga ogw'amaanyi ne gukunta ku nnyanja, amayengo ne gakuba eryato; naye Yesu yali yeebase." 
Matthew8:25 Abayigirizwa be ne bajja gy'ali ne bamuzuukusa, nga bagamba nti, “ Mukama waffe, tulokole; tufa.”" 
Matthew8:26 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Kiki ekibatiisa, mmwe abalina okukkiriza okutono?” N'alyoka agolokoka, n'alagira omuyaga n'amayengo okukkakkana, ennyanja n'eteeka nnyo." 
Matthew8:27 Abantu ne beewuunya, ne bagamba nti, “Muntu ki ono, empewo n'ennyanja okumuwulira?”" 
Matthew8:28 Awo Yesu bwe yatuuka emitala w'ennyanja mu nsi y'Abagadaleni, abantu babiri abaaliko dayimooni, ne bamusisinkana nga bava mu ntaana, baali bakambwe nnyo, nga tewali na muntu ayinza okuyita mu kkubo eryo." 
Matthew8:29 Laba, ne boogerera waggulu ne bagamba nti, “Otuvunaana ki, ggwe Omwana wa Katonda? Ozze wano kutubonyaabonya ng'entuuko zaffe tezinnaba kutuuka?”" 
Matthew8:30 Waaliwo walako okuva ne we baali ekisibo ky'embizzi nnyingi nga zirya. 
Matthew8:31 Dayimooni ne gimwegayirira ne gigamba nti, “Bw'oba otugoba, ku bantu bano tusindike mu kisibo ky'embizzi.”" 
Matthew8:32 N'agigamba nti, “Mugende.” Ne gibavaako, ne gigenda mu mbizzi; kale, laba ekisibo kyonna ne kifubutuka ne kiserengetera ku bbangabanga, ne kyesuula mu nnyanja, ne zifiira mu mazzi." 
Matthew8:33 N'abaali balunda embizzi ne badduka, ne bagenda mu kibuga, ne bababuulira byonna, n'ebikwata ku bali ababaddeko dayimooni." 
Matthew8:34 Laba, ekyalo kyonna ne kijja okusisinkana Yesu; bwe baamulaba, ne bamwegayirira okuva mu kitundu kyabwe." 
Matthew9:1 Awo Yesu n'asaabala mu lyato, n'awunguka, n'atuuka mu kibuga ky'ewaabwe." 
Matthew9:2 Awo ne bamuleetera omulwadde eyali akoozimbye, ng'agalamizibbwa ku kitanda; naye Yesu bwe yalaba okukkiriza kwabwe, n'agamba oyo eyali akoozimbye nti, “Mwana wange, guma omwoyo, ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Kale, laba, abawandiisi abalala ne boogera mu myoyo gyabwe nti, “Ono avvoola Katonda.”" 
Matthew9:4 Naye Yesu bwe yamanya ebirowoozo byabwe, n'agamba nti, “Kiki ekibalowoozesa obubi mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Matthew9:5 Kubanga ekyangu kiruwa, okugamba nti, ‘Ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa,’ oba okugamba nti, ‘Golokoka otambule?’" 
Matthew9:6 Naye mutegeere ng'Omwana w'omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi okuggyako ebibi,” n'agamba oyo eyali akoozimbye nti, “Yimirira, ositule ekitanda kyo, oddeyo mu nnyumba yo.”" 
Matthew9:7 N'ayimirira, n'addayo ewuwe." 
Matthew9:8 Naye ebibiina bwe byalaba ne bitya, ne bigulumiza Katonda, eyawa abantu obuyinza obwenkanidde awo." 
Matthew9:9 Yesu bwe yavaayo n'alaba omuntu, ayitibwa Matayo, ng'atudde mu ggwoolezo; n'amugamba nti, “Yita nange.” N'asituka, n'amugoberera." 
Matthew9:10 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yali ng'atudde mu nju ng'alya, laba, abawooza bangi ne bajja, n'abantu ababi bangi, ne batuula wamu ne Yesu n'abayigirizwa." 
Matthew9:11 Abafalisaayo bwe baalaba ekyo, ne bagamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Omuyigiriza wammwe kiki ekimuliisa n'abawooza n'abantu ababi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Naye Yesu bwe yawulira, n'agamba nti, “Abalamu tebeetaaga musawo, wabula abalwadde." 
Matthew9:13 Naye mugende muyige amakulu g'ekigambo kino nti, ‘Njagala kisa, so si ssaddaaka,’ kubanga sajja kuyita batuukirivu, wabula abantu ababi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Awo abayigirizwa ba Yokaana, ne bajja eri Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti, “Kiki ekitusiibya ffe n'Abafalisaayo emirundi emingi, naye abayigirizwa bo nga tebasiiba?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Abaana ab'omu mbaga ey'obugole bayinza batya okunakuwala awasizza omugole ng'akyali nabo? Naye ennaku zigenda okujja awasizza omugole lw'alibaggibwako, ne balyoka basiiba." 
Matthew9:16 Tewali muntu atunga kiwero ekiggya mu kyambalo ekikadde; kubanga ekyo ekitungibwamu kiyuza ekyambalo, n'ekituli kyeyongera okugaziwa." 
Matthew9:17 So tebateeka mwenge musu mu nsawo za maliba enkadde; kubanga bwe bakola bwe batyo, ensawo ez'amaliba ziyulika, n'omwenge guyiika, n'ensawo ez'amaliba zifaafaagana; naye bateeka omwenge omusu mu nsawo ez'amaliba empya, byombi birama.”" 
Matthew9:18 Bwe yali ng'akyabagamba ebigambo ebyo, ne wajja omwami omu, n'amusinza n'agamba nti, “Muwala wange kaakano afudde; naye jjangu omuteekeko emikono, anaalamuka.”" 
Matthew9:19 Yesu n'asituka n'amugoberera, wamu n'abayigirizwa be." 
Matthew9:20 Awo omukazi eyali alwalidde ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi emyaka kkumi n'ebiri (12), n'ajja emabega wa Yesu, n'akoma ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye;" 
Matthew9:21 kubanga yayogera mu mwoyo gwe nti, “Bwe nnaakoma obukomi ku kyambalo kye nnaawona.”" 
Matthew9:22 Naye Yesu bwe yakyuka n'amulaba, n'agamba nti, “Mwana wange, guma omwoyo; okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza.” Omukazi n'awona okuva mu kiseera ekyo." 
Matthew9:23 Yesu bwe yatuuka mu nju y'omwami oyo, n'alaba abafuuwa endere, n'ekibiina nga bakuba ebiwoobe," 
Matthew9:24 n'agamba nti, “Muveewo, kubanga omuwala tafudde, wabula yeebase bwe basi.” Ne bamusekerera nnyo." 
Matthew9:25 Naye ekibiina bwe kyamala okugobebwawo, n'ayingira, n'amukwata ku mukono; omuwala n'agolokoka." 
Matthew9:26 Ebigambo ebyo ne bibuna mu nsi eyo yonna. 
Matthew9:27 Naye Yesu bwe yavaayo, abazibe b'amaaso babiri ne bamugoberera, nga boogerera waggulu nga bagamba nti, “Tusaasire, ggwe omwana wa Dawudi.”" 
Matthew9:28 Bwe yatuuka mu nju, abazibe b'amaaso ne bajja gy'ali; Yesu n'ababuuza nti, “Mukkirizza nga nnyinza okukola kino?” Ne bamuddamu nti. “Weewaawo, Mukama waffe.”" 
Matthew9:29 N'alyoka akwata ku maaso gaabwe ng'agamba nti, “Nga bwe mukkirizza kibeere gye muli bwe kityo.”" 
Matthew9:30 Amaaso gaabwe ne gazibuka. Yesu n'abakuutira ng'agamba nti, “Mulabe tewaba muntu n'omu amanya.”" 
Matthew9:31 Naye bo ne bafuluma, ne babunya ebigambo bya Yesu mu nsi eyo yonna." 
Matthew9:32 Awo bwe baali bafuluma ne bamuleetera kasiru, ng'aliko dayimooni." 
Matthew9:33 Yesu n'amugobako dayimooni, kasiru n'ayogera; ebibiina ne byewuunya, ne bigamba nti, “Edda n'edda tewalabikanga ekiri nga kino mu Isiraeri.”" 
Matthew9:34 Naye Abafalisaayo ne bagamba nti, “Agoba dayimooni nga akozesa buyinza bwa mukulu wa dayimooni.”" 
Matthew9:35 Yesu n'ayitayita mu bibuga byonna, n'embuga zonna, ng'ayigiriza mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe, ng'abuulira enjiri ey'obwakabaka, ng'awonya endwadde zonna n'obunafu bwonna." 
Matthew9:36 Naye bwe yalaba ebibiina, n'abisaasira, kubanga baali bakooye nnyo nga basaasaanye, ng'endiga ezitalina musumba." 
Matthew9:37 N'alyoka agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Eby'okukungula bye bingi, naye abakozi be batono." 
Matthew9:38 Kale musabe Omwami w'eby'okukungula, asindike abakozi mu by'okukungula bye.”" 
Matthew10:1 Awo Yesu n'ayita abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri (12), n'abawa obuyinza ku myoyo emibi, n'okuwonyanga endwadde zonna n'obunafu bwonna." 
Matthew10:2 Abatume abo ekkumi n'ababiri (12), amannya gaabwe ge gano: eyasooka ye Simooni, ayitibwa Peetero, ne Andereya muganda we; Yakobo omwana wa Zebbedaayo, ne Yokaana muganda we;" 
Matthew10:3 Firipo, ne Battolomaayo; Tomasi, ne Matayo omuwooza; Yakobo omwana wa Alufaayo, ne Saddayo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simooni Omukananaayo, ne Yuda Isukalyoti, ye yamulyamu olukwe." 
Matthew10:5 Yesu n'abatuma abo ekkumi n'ababiri (12) n'ababuulirira, ng'agamba nti, “Temugenda mu b'amawanga, so temuyingiranga mu bibuga by'Abasamaliya;" 
Matthew10:6 naye waakiri mugende eri endiga ezaabula ez'omu nnyumba ya Isiraeri. 
Matthew10:7 Bwe mubanga mutambula mubuulirenga nga mugamba nti, ‘Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bunaatera okutuuka.’" 
Matthew10:8 Muwonyenga abalwadde, muzuukizenga abafu, mulongoosenga abagenge, mugobenga dayimooni; mwaweebwa buwa, nammwe muwenga buwa." 
Matthew10:9 Temutwala zaabu, newakubadde effeeza, newakubadde ebikomo mu nkoba zammwe;" 
Matthew10:10 newakubadde ensawo ey'olugendo, newakubadde ekkanzu ebbiri, newakubadde engatto, newakubadde omuggo; kubanga akola emirimu asaanira okuweebwa bye yeetaaga." 
Matthew10:11 Naye buli kibuga kye munaayingirangamu, oba mbuga, munoonyeengamu omuntu bw'ali asaana; musulanga omwo okutuusa lwe mulivaayo." 
Matthew10:12 Bwe munaayingiranga mu nju, mulamusenga abali mu nju omwo." 
Matthew10:13 Abali mu nju eyo bw'ebanaasaananga, emirembe gyammwe gijjenga ku bo; naye bw'ebataasaanenga, emirembe gyammwe giddenga gye muli." 
Matthew10:14 Era omuntu bw'atabasembezanga newakubadde okuwulira ebigambo byammwe, bwe muvanga mu nju eyo oba mu kibuga ekyo, mukunkumulanga enfuufu ey'omu bigere byammwe." 
Matthew10:15 Ddala mbagamba nti ensi ya Sodomu ne Ggomola eriba n'okubonyaabonyezebwa okuligumiikirizika ku lunaku olw'omusango, okusinga ekibuga ekyo.”" 
Matthew10:16 “Laba, nze mbatuma nga muli ng'endiga wakati mu misege; kale mubanga n'amagezi ng'emisota, era mubanga ng'amayiba obutaba na bukuusa." 
Matthew10:17 Naye mwekuumanga abantu; kubanga balibawaayo mu nkiiko, ne mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe balibakubiramu;" 
Matthew10:18 era mulitwalibwa eri abaamasaza n'eri bakabaka okubalanga nze, n'okuba obujulirwa eri bo; era n'ab'amawanga." 
Matthew10:19 Naye bwe banaabawangayo, temweraliikiranga nti Tunaayogera tutya? Oba nti Tunaayogera ki? Kubanga muliweebwa mu kiseera ekyo bye mulyogera." 
Matthew10:20 Kubanga si mmwe mulyogera, wabula Omwoyo gwa Kitammwe ye alyogerera mu mmwe." 
Matthew10:21 Ow'oluganda anaawangayo muganda we okuttibwa, ne kitaawe w'omwana aliwaayo omwana we; n'abaana banaajeemeranga ababazaala, ne babawaayo okuttibwa." 
Matthew10:22 Munnaakyayibwanga abantu bonna okubalanga erinnya lyange; naye alinyiikira okutuuka ku nkomerero, ye alirokoka." 
Matthew10:23 Bwe babagobanga mu kibuga ekimu, muddukiranga mu ky'okubiri; kubanga ddala mbagamba nti, Temulibunya bibuga bya Isiraeri byonna, nga Omwana w'omuntu tannajja.”" 
Matthew10:24 “Omuyigirizwa tasinga amuyigiriza, so n'omuddu tasinga mukama we." 
Matthew10:25 Ayigirizibwa kimumala okuba ng'amuyigiriza, n'omuddu okuba nga mukama we. Oba nga bayise nannyini nju Beeruzebuli, tebalisinzaawo okuyita abo abali mu nju ye?”" 
Matthew10:26 “Kale temubatyanga; kubanga tewali kigambo ekyabikkibwa, ekitalibikkulwa; newakubadde ekyakwekebwa, ekitalimanyibwa." 
Matthew10:27 Kye mbagambiranga mu kizikiza, mukyogereranga mu musana; kye muwuliriranga mu kutu, mukibuuliriranga waggulu ku nnyumba." 
Matthew10:28 So temubatyanga abatta omubiri, naye nga tebayinza kutta mwoyo; naye mumutyenga oyo ayinza okuzikiriza omwoyo n'omubiri mu Ggeyeena." 
Matthew10:29 Enkazaluggya ebbiri tebazitundamu ppeesa limu? Naye tewaliba n'emu ku zo erigwa wansi Kitammwe nga tayagadde; 
Matthew10:30 era n'enviiri zammwe ez'oku mutwe zaabalibwa zonna. 
Matthew10:31 Kale temutyanga; mmwe musinga enkazaluggya ennyingi. 
Matthew10:32 “Kale buli muntu yenna alinjatulira mu maaso g'abantu, nange ndimwatulira mu maaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew10:33 Naye yenna alinneegaanira mu maaso g'abantu, nange ndimwegaanira mu maaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu.”" 
Matthew10:34 “Temulowooza nti najja kuleeta mirembe ku nsi; sajja kuleeta mirembe, wabula ekitala." 
Matthew10:35 Kubanga najja kwawukanya omwana ne kitaawe, omuwala ne nnyina, omugole ne nnyazaala we;" 
Matthew10:36 abalabe b'omuntu banaabanga ba mu nnyumba ye. 
Matthew10:37 Ayagala kitaawe oba nnyina okubasinza nze, tansaanira; ayagala mutabani oba muwala we okubasinza nze, tansaanira." 
Matthew10:38 N'oyo atakwata musalaba gwe n'angoberera tansaanira. 
Matthew10:39 Alaba obulamu bwe alibubuza; n'oyo abuza obulamu bwe ku lwange alibulaba.” 
Matthew10:40 “Akkiriza mmwe ng'akkirizza nze, n'akkiriza nze ng'akkirizza eyantuma." 
Matthew10:41 Akkiriza nnabbi olw'okuba nga nnabbi aliweebwa empeera ng'eya nnabbi; naye akkiriza omutuukirivu olw'okuba mutuukirivu aliweebwa empeera y'omutuukirivu. 
Matthew10:42 Era buli awa omu ku bano abato ekikompe ky'amazzi amannyogovu okunywa, olw'okuba nga muyigirizwa wange, mazima mbagamba nti empeera ye terimubula n'akatono.”" 
Matthew11:1 Awo olwatuuka Yesu bwe yamaliriza okulagira abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri (12), n'avaayo n'agenda okuyigiriza n'okubuulira mu bibuga byabwe." 
Matthew11:2 Naye Yokaana bwe yawulirira mu kkomera, Kristo by'akola, n'atuma abayigirizwa be," 
Matthew11:3 okumubuuza nti, “Ggwe wuuyo ajja oba tulindirire mulala?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Muddeyo mutegeeze Yokaana bye muwulira ne bye mulaba;" 
Matthew11:5 abazibye amaaso balaba, abalema batambula, abagenge balongoosebwa, abaggavu b'amatu bawulira, abafu bazuukizibwa, n'abanaku babuulirwa enjiri." 
Matthew11:6 Naye alina omukisa oyo yenna atalinneesittalako.” 
Matthew11:7 Nabo bwe baagenda, Yesu n'atandika okwogera n'ebibiina ku Yokaana nti, “Kiki kye mwagenderera mu ddungu okutunuulira? Olumuli olunyeenyezebwa n'empewo?" 
Matthew11:8 Naye kiki kye mwagenderera okulaba? Omuntu ayambadde ezinekaaneka? Laba, abambala ezinekaaneka baba mu nnyumba za bakabaka." 
Matthew11:9 Naye kiki kye mwagenderera? Kulaba nnabbi? Weewaawo, mbagamba, era asingira ddala nnabbi.”" 
Matthew11:10 “ Oyo ye yawandiikibwako nti,” “ ‘Laba, ntuma omubaka wange mu maaso go. ’ ” “ ‘Alikukulembera alirongoosa ekkubo lyo.’ ”" 
Matthew11:11 “‘Ddala mbagamba nti Tevanga mu abo abazaalibwa abakazi omuntu asinga Yokaana Omubatiza; naye omuto mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu amusinga ye. 
Matthew11:12 Okuva ku biro bya Yokaana Omubatiza okutuusa leero obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu buwaguzibwa, n'ababuwaguza babunyaga lwa maanyi." 
Matthew11:13 Kubanga bannabbi bonna n'amateeka baayogeranga ebya Katonda okutuusa ku Yokaana, ebifa ku bwakabaka." 
Matthew11:14 Era oba nga mwagala okukkiriza, oyo ye Eriya agenda okujja.’" 
Matthew11:15 Alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire." 
Matthew11:16 Naye emirembe gino nnaagifaananya ki? Gifaanana n'abaana abato abatuula mu butale abayita bannaabwe," 
Matthew11:17 nga bagamba nti, ‘Twabafuuyira emirere, so nammwe temwazina; twabakubira ebiwoobe, so temwakaaba.’" 
Matthew11:18 Kubanga Yokaana yajja nga talya so nga tanywa, ne boogera nti, ‘Aliko dayimooni.’" 
Matthew11:19 Omwana w'omuntu yajja ng'alya ng'anywa, ne boogera nti, ‘Laba, omuluvu oyo, era omutamiivu, mukwano gw'abawooza era ogw'abalina ebibi!’ Era amagezi gaweebwa obutuukirivu olw'ebikolwa byago.”" 
Matthew11:20 Awo Yesu n'atandika okubuulirira ebibuga mwe yakolera eby'amagero eby'amaanyi, kubanga tebyenenya n'agamba nti," 
Matthew11:21 “Zirikusanga ggwe Kolaziini! Zirikusanga ggwe Besusayida! Kubanga eby'amaanyi ebyakolerwa mu mmwe, singa byakolerwa mu Ttuulo ne Sidoni, singa byenenya dda, singa bali mu bibukutu ne mu vvu." 
Matthew11:22 Naye mbagamba nti Ku lunaku olw'omusango Ttuulo ne Sidoni baliba n'okubonyaabonyezebwa okuligumiikirizika okusinga mmwe. 
Matthew11:23 Naawe, Kaperunawumu, oligulumizibwa okutuuka ku ggulu? Olikka emagombe; kubanga eby'amaanyi ebyakolerwa mu ggwe singa byakolerwa mu Sodomu, singa weekiri ne kaakano." 
Matthew11:24 Naye mbagamba nti Ku lunaku olw'omusango ensi y'e Sodomu eriba n'okubonyaabonyezebwa okuligumiikirizika okusinga ggwe.” 
Matthew11:25 Mu kiseera ekyo, Yesu yaddamu n'agamba nti, “Nkwebaza, Kitange, Mukama w'eggulu n'ensi, kubanga wakisa ebigambo bino ab'amagezi n'abakalabakalaba n'obibikkulira abaana abato;" 
Matthew11:26 weewaawo, Kitange, kubanga bwe kityo bwe kyasiimibwa mu maaso go." 
Matthew11:27 Ebintu byonna byankwasibwa Kitange; so tewali muntu amanyi Omwana wabula Kitaawe; so tewali muntu amanyi Kitaawe wabula Omwana, na buli muntu Omwana gw'ayagala okumumubikkulira." 
Matthew11:28 Mujje gye ndi, mmwe mwenna abakooye era abazitoowereddwa, nange nnaabawummuza." 
Matthew11:29 Mwetikke ekikoligo kyange, muyigire ku nze; kubanga ndi muteefu era omuwombeefu mu mutima, nammwe muliraba ekiwummulo eky'omu myoyo gyammwe." 
Matthew11:30 Kubanga ekikoligo kyange si kizibu, n'omugugu gwange mwangu.”" 
Matthew12:1 Awo mu biro ebyo Yesu n'ayita mu nnimiro y'eŋŋaano ku ssabbiiti; abayigirizwa be ne balumwa enjala, ne batandika okunoga ebirimba by'eŋŋaano, ne balya." 
Matthew12:2 Naye Abafalisaayo bwe baalaba, ne bamugamba nti, “Laba, abayigirizwa bo bakola eky'omuzizo ekitakkirizibwa kukolerwa ku ssabbiiti.”" 
Matthew12:3 Naye Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Temusomangako Dawudi kye yakola, bwe yalumwa enjala, ne be yali nabo;" 
Matthew12:4 bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda, n'alya emigaati egy'okulaga egyali egy'omuzizo ye okugirya, newakubadde be yali nabo, wabula bakabona bokka?" 
Matthew12:5 Nantiki temusomanga mu mateeka nti, ku Ssabbiiti, mu Yeekaalu, bakabona baasobya ssabbiiti, so ne batazza musango?" 
Matthew12:6 Naye mbagamba nti ali wano asinga Yeekaalu obukulu. 
Matthew12:7 Naye singa mumanyi amakulu ga kino nti Njagala ekisa, so si ssaddaaka, temwandinenyezza abatazzizza musango." 
Matthew12:8 Kubanga Omwana w'omuntu ye mukama wa ssabbiiti.” 
Matthew12:9 Awo Yesu n'avaayo, n'ajja mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyabwe;" 
Matthew12:10 era, laba, mwalimu omuntu eyalina omukono ogukaze, ne bamubuuza, nga bagamba nti, Kirungi okuwonyeza omuntu ku ssabbiiti?" 
Matthew12:11 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Ani mu mmwe, bw'aliba n'endiga ye emu, n'emala egwa mu bunnya ku ssabbiiti, ataligikwata n'agiggyamu?" 
Matthew12:12 Omuntu tasinga nnyo ndiga? Kale kirungi okukola obulungi ku ssabbiiti.” 
Matthew12:13 N'alyoka agamba omuntu oyo nti, “Golola omukono gwo.” N'agugolola; ne guwona, ne guba ng'ogwokubiri." 
Matthew12:14 Naye Abafalisaayo ne bafuluma, ne bamwekobaana bwe banaamuzikiriza." 
Matthew12:15 Yesu bwe yategeera n'avaayo, abantu bangi ne bagenda naye; n'abawonya bonna," 
Matthew12:16 n'abakomako baleme okumwatuukiriza. 
Matthew12:17 Kino kituukirize ekyayogererwa mu Isaaya nnabbi nti," 
Matthew12:18 “Laba omuweereza wange gwe nnalondamu; Gwe njagala, asanyusa emmeeme yange. Ndimuteekako Omwoyo gwange, Alibuulira amawanga eby'obwenkanya." 
Matthew12:19 Taliyomba, so talireekaana; So tewaliba muntu aliwulira eddoboozi lye mu nguudo." 
Matthew12:20 Olumuli olwatifu talirumenya, So n'enfuuzi ezinyooka talizizikiza, Okutuusa lw'alireetera obwenkanya okuwangula;" 
Matthew12:21 era mu linnya lye amawanga gonna mwe galisuubirira.” 
Matthew12:22 Awo ne baleetera Yesu omuntu aliko dayimooni, ng'azibye amaaso n'omumwa, n'amuwonya, oyo eyali azibye omumwa n'ayogera, era n'alaba." 
Matthew12:23 Ebibiina byonna ne bisamaalirira, ne byogera nti, “Ono ayinza okuba nga ye mwana wa Dawudi?”" 
Matthew12:24 Naye Abafalisaayo bwe baawulira, ne boogera nti, “Oyo tagoba dayimooni, nga akozesa obuyinza obulala bwonna wabula obwa Beeruzebuli omukulu wa dayimooni.”" 
Matthew12:25 Yesu bwe yamanya okulowooza kwabwe n'abagamba nti, “Buli bwakabaka bwe bwawukanamu bwokka na bwokka buzikirira; na buli kibuga oba nnyumba bw'eyawukana yokka na yokka erisasika;" 
Matthew12:26 ne Setaani bw'agoba Setaani aba ayawukanye yekka na yekka; n'obwakabaka bwe bulisigalawo butya? 
Matthew12:27 Oba nga nze ngoba dayimooni ku bwa Beeruzebuli, abaana bammwe bagigoba ku bw'ani? Kale abo be balibasalira omusango." 
Matthew12:28 Naye oba nga nze ngoba dayimooni ku bw'Omwoyo gwa Katonda, kale obwakabaka bwa Katonda bubajjidde." 
Matthew12:29 Oba omuntu ayinza atya okuyingira mu nju y'omuntu ow'amaanyi, n'anyaga ebintu bye, wabula ng'asoose kusiba ow'amaanyi oli? N'alyoka anyaga enju ye." 
Matthew12:30 Omuntu atabeera nange mulabe wange; era omuntu atakuŋŋaanyiza wamu nange asaasaanya. 
Matthew12:31 Kyenva mbagamba nti Abantu balisonyiyibwa buli kibi n'eky'okuvvoola, naye okuvvoola Omwoyo tekulisonyiyika." 
Matthew12:32 Buli muntu alivvoola Omwana w'omuntu alisonyiyibwa; naye buli muntu alivvoola Omwoyo Omutukuvu talisonyiyibwa, newakubadde mu mirembe egya kaakano, newakubadde mu mirembe egigenda okujja.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Mufuule omuti okuba omulungi, n'ebibala byagwo bibe birungi; oba mufuule omuti omubi, n'ebibala byagwo bibe bibi; kubanga omuti gutegeererwa ku bibala byagwo." 
Matthew12:34 Mmwe abaana b'emisota, muyinza mutya okwogera ebigambo ebirungi nga muli babi? Kubanga ku ebyo ebijjula mu mutima, akamwa bye koogera." 
Matthew12:35 Omuntu omulungi ebirungi abiggya mu tterekero lye eddungi, n'omuntu omubi ebibi abiggya mu tterekero lye ebbi." 
Matthew12:36 Era mbagamba nti Buli kigambo ekitaliimu abantu kye boogera, balikiwoleza ku lunaku olw'omusango." 
Matthew12:37 Kubanga ebigambo byo bye birikuweesa obutuukirivu, n'ebigambo byo bye birikusinzisa omusango.”" 
Matthew12:38 Awo abawandiisi abalala n'Abafalisaayo ne bamuddamu ne bagamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, twagala tulabe akabonero akava gyoli.”" 
Matthew12:39 Naye Yesu, n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Ab'emirembe gino emibi era egy'obwenzi banoonya akabonero; so tebaliweebwa kabonero wabula akabonero ka nnabbi Yona." 
Matthew12:40 Kuba nga Yona bwe yamala ennaku essatu (3), emisana n'ekiro, mu lubuto lwa lukwata; bw'atyo n'Omwana w'omuntu bw'alimala ennaku essatu, emisana n'ekiro, mu mutima gw'ettaka." 
Matthew12:41 Abantu ab'e Nineeve baliyimirira mu musango wamu n'abantu ab'emirembe gino, era balibasinzisa omusango; kubanga Yona bwe yababuulira ne beenenya; era, laba, asinga Yona ali wano." 
Matthew12:42 Kabaka omukazi ow'omu bukiikaddyo aliyimirira mu musango wamu n'abantu ab'emirembe gino, era alibasinzisa omusango; kubanga yava ku nkomerero y'ensi okuwulira amagezi ga Sulemaani; era, laba, asinga Sulemaani ali wano.”" 
Matthew12:43 “Naye omwoyo omubi bwava ku muntu, atambula mu nsenyi enkalu, nga anoonya aw'okuwummulira, naye n'abulwa." 
Matthew12:44 Kale agamba nti, ‘N'addayo mu nnyumba yange mwe nnava;’ bw'atuukamu, agiraba nga njereere, enyiridde, era ng'erongoosebbwa." 
Matthew12:45 Awo agenda, n'aleeterako dayimooni abalala musanvu abamusinga obubi, nabo bwe bayingira babeera omwo; n'eby'oluvannyuma eby'omuntu oyo birisinga obubi eby'olubereberye. Bwe kiriba bwe kityo eri abantu ab'emirembe gino emibi.”" 
Matthew12:46 Yesu bwe yali ng'akyayogera n'ebibiina, laba, nnyina ne baganda be baali bayimiridde ebweru, nga baagala kwogera naye." 
Matthew12:47 Omuntu omu n'amugamba nti, “Laba, nnyoko ne baganda bo bayimiridde ebweru, baagala kwogera naawe.”" 
Matthew12:48 Naye Yesu n'addamu n'agamba oyo amubuulidde nti, “Ani mmange? Era be baani baganda bange?”" 
Matthew12:49 N'agolola omukono ggwe eri abayigirizwa be, n'agamba nti, “Laba, mmange ne baganda bange!" 
Matthew12:50 Kubanga buli akola Kitange ali mu ggulu by'ayagala, ye muganda wange, ye mwannyinaze, ye mmange.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ku lunaku olwo Yesu n'afuluma mu nju, n'atuula ku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Matthew13:2 Ebibiina bingi ne bimukuŋŋaanirako, n'okusaabala n'asaabala mu lyato, n'atuula mu lyo; ekibiina kyonna ne kiyimirira ku lubalama." 
Matthew13:3 N'ayogera nabo bingi mu ngero, ng'agamba nti, “Laba, omusizi yafuluma okusiga;" 
Matthew13:4 bwe yali ng'asiga, ensigo ezimu ne zigwa ku mabbali g'ekkubo, ennyonyi ne zijja ne zizirya." 
Matthew13:5 Ensigo endala ne zigwa awali enjazi, awatali ttaka lingi; amangu ago ne zimera, kubanga tezaalina ttaka ggwanvu," 
Matthew13:6 enjuba bwe yavaayo, ne ziwotookerera; kubanga tezaalina mmizi, ne zikala." 
Matthew13:7 Ensigo endala ne zigwa mu maggwa; amaggwa ne gamera, ne gazizisa." 
Matthew13:8 Ensigo endala ne zigwa ku ttaka eddungi, ne zibala emmere, endala kikumi (100), endala nkaaga (60), endala asatu (30)." 
Matthew13:9 Alina amatu, awulire.”" 
Matthew13:10 Awo abayigirizwa ne bajja awali Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti, “Kiki ekikwogeza nabo mu ngero?”" 
Matthew13:11 N'abaddamu n'abagamba nti, “Mmwe muweereddwa okumanya ebigambo eby'ekyama eby'obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, naye bo tebaweereddwa." 
Matthew13:12 Kubanga buli alina, aliweebwa, era alisukkirirawo; naye buli atalina, aliggibwako ne kyali nakyo." 
Matthew13:13 Kyenva njogera nabo mu ngero; kubanga batunula, naye tebalaba, bawuliriza, naye tebawulira, era tebategeera." 
Matthew13:14 Naye Isaaya bye yalagula bibatuukiriridde, ebyayogera nti,” “ ‘Muliwulira buwulizi, naye temulitegeera;’” “ ‘Muliraba bulabi, naye temulyetegereza.’ ”" 
Matthew13:15 “‘Kuba omutima gw'abantu bano gusavuwadde,’” “ ‘N'amatu gaabwe gawulira bubi,’” “ ‘N'amaaso gaabwe bagazibye;’” “ ‘Baleme okulaba n'amaaso, n'okuwulira n'amatu,’” “‘N'okutegeera n'omutima,’” “‘N'okukyuka,’” “‘Ne mbawonya.’”" 
Matthew13:16 “‘Naye amaaso gammwe galina omukisa, kubanga galaba; n'amatu gammwe, kubanga gawulira.’”" 
Matthew13:17 “‘Kubanga mazima mbagamba nti Bannabbi bangi n'abantu abatuukirivu abeegombanga okulaba bye mutunuulira, so tebaabiraba; n'okuwulira bye muwulira, so tebaabiwulira.’”" 
Matthew13:18 “Kale nno mmwe muwulire amakulu g'olugero lw'omusizi. 
Matthew13:19 Buli awulira ekigambo eky'obwakabaka, nga takitegedde, omubi oyo ajja, n'akwakula ekisigiddwa mu mutima gwe. Oyo ye yasigibwa ku mabbali g'ekkubo." 
Matthew13:20 N'oyo eyasigibwa awali enjazi, ye oyo awulira ekigambo, amangu ago n'akikkiriza n'essanyu;" 
Matthew13:21 naye olw'okuba talina mmizi munda mu ye, bw'alwawo akaseera katono; bwe wabaawo ennaku n'okuyigganyizibwa olw'ekigambo, amangu ago yeesittala." 
Matthew13:22 N'oyo eyasigibwa mu maggwa, ye oyo awulira ekigambo; naye okweraliikirira ebintu eby'ensi, n'okulimbibwa eby'obugagga bizisa ekigambo, n'ekitabala." 
Matthew13:23 N'oyo eyasigibwa ku ttaka eddungi, ye oyo awulira ekigambo, n'akitegeera; oyo abalira ddala ebibala, omulala aleeta kikumi (100), omulala nkaaga (60), n'omulala asatu (30).”" 
Matthew13:24 Awo Yesu n'abaleetera olugero olulala n'ayogera nti, “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufanaanyizibwa n'omuntu eyasiga ensigo ennungi mu nnimiro ye;" 
Matthew13:25 naye abantu bwe baali beebase omulabe we n'ajja n'asigamu eŋŋaano ey'omu nsiko mu ŋŋaano ennungi, n'agenda." 
Matthew13:26 Naye bwe yameruka, bwe yayanya, n'erabika n'eŋŋaano ey'omu nsiko." 
Matthew13:27 Abaddu be ne bajja ne bagamba omwami nti, ‘Ssebo, tewasiga nsigo nnungi mu nnimiro yo? Kale yali etya okubaamu eŋŋaano ey'omu nsiko?’" 
Matthew13:28 N'abagamba nti, ‘Omulabe ye yakola atyo.’ Abaddu ne bamugamba nti, ‘Kale oyagala tugende tugikoolemu?’" 
Matthew13:29 Naye n'agamba nti, ‘Nedda; mpozzi bwe munaaba mukoolamu eŋŋaano ey'omu nsiko, munaggiramu n'eŋŋaano yennyini." 
Matthew13:30 Muleke bikule byombi bituuse amakungula; mu biro eby'amakungula ndigamba abakunguzi nti Musooke mukuŋŋaanye eŋŋaano ey'omu nsiko, mugisibe emiganda eyokebwe, naye eŋŋaano yennyini mugikuŋŋaanyize mu ggwanika lyange.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Yesu n'abaleetera olugero olulala, ng'agamba nti, “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana n'akaweke ka kaladaali, omuntu ke yaddira, n'akasiga mu nnimiro ye;" 
Matthew13:32 akasigo kano ke katono okusinga ensigo zonna; naye bwe kakula, kaba kanene okusinga ebimera byonna, ne kavaamu omuti, n'ennyonyi ez'omu bbanga ne zijja, ne zibeera ku matabi gaagwo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Yesu n'abagamba olugero olulala nti, “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana n'ekizimbulukusa, omukazi kye yaddira, n'akissa mu bubbo busatu obw'obutta, n'okuzimbulukuka ne buzimbulukuka bwonna.”" 
Matthew13:34 Ebigambo ebyo byonna Yesu yabigamba ebibiina mu ngero; naye awatali lugero teyabagamba kigambo kyonna; 
Matthew13:35 kituukirire ekyayogererwa mu nnabbi, ng'agamba nti, Ndyasamya akamwa kange mu ngero; Ndireeta ebigambo ebyakwekebwa okuva ku kutondebwa kw'ensi." 
Matthew13:36 Awo Yesu n'asiibula ebibiina, n'ayingira mu nju, abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali, ne bamugamba nti, “Tutegeeze olugero olw'eŋŋaano ey'omunsiko eyali mu nnimiro.”" 
Matthew13:37 Yesu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Asiga ensigo ennungi ye Mwana w'omuntu;" 
Matthew13:38 ennimiro ye nsi; ensigo ennungi, abo be baana b'obwakabaka; n'eŋŋaano ey'omu nsiko be baana b'omubi;" 
Matthew13:39 omulabe eyagisiga ye Setaani; amakungula ye nkomerero y'ensi; n'abakunguzi be bamalayika. 
Matthew13:40 Kale ng'eŋŋaano ey'omu nsiko bw'ekuŋŋaanyizibwa n'eyokebwa mu muliro; bwe kityo bwe kiriba ku nkomerero y'ensi. 
Matthew13:41 Omwana w'omuntu alituma bamalayika be, nabo baliggyamu mu bwakabaka bwe ebintu byonna ebisittaza, n'abo abakola obubi," 
Matthew13:42 balibasuula mu kikoomi eky'omuliro; mwe muliba okukaaba amaziga n'okulumwa obujiji. 
Matthew13:43 Kale abantu abatuukirivu balimasamasa ng'enjuba mu bwakabaka bwa Kitaabwe. Alina amatu, awulire.”" 
Matthew13:44 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana n'eky'obugagga ekyakisibwa mu lusuku; omuntu kyeyalaba, n'akikweka; era olw'essanyu n'agenda n'atunda by'ali nabyo byonna, n'agula olusuku olwo.”" 
Matthew13:45 “Nate, obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana omuntu omusuubuzi anoonya eruulu ennungi," 
Matthew13:46 bwe yalaba eruulu emu ey'omuwendo omungi, n'agenda n'atunda by'ali nabyo byonna, n'agigula.”" 
Matthew13:47 “Nate, obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana ekiragala, kye basuula mu nnyanja, ne kikuŋŋaanya ebyennyanja ebya buli ngeri;" 
Matthew13:48 bwe kyajjula, ne bakiwalulira ku ttale; ne batuula, ne bakuŋŋaanyiza ebirungi mu nkanga, ebibi ne babisuula." 
Matthew13:49 Bwe kityo bwe kiriba ku nkomerero y'ensi, bamalayika balijja, balyawulamu abantu ababi mu batuukirivu," 
Matthew13:50 balibasuula mu kikoomi eky'omuliro; mwe muliba okukaaba amaziga n'okulumwa obujiji.” 
Matthew13:51 “Mubitegedde ebigambo bino byonna?” Ne bamugamba nti, “Weewaawo.”" 
Matthew13:52 N'abagamba nti, “Buli muwandiisi eyayigirizibwa eby'obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, kyava afaanana n'omuntu alina ennyumba ye, aggya mu tterekero lye ebintu ebiggya n'ebikadde.”" 
Matthew13:53 Awo olwatuuka Yesu bwe yamala engero zino, n'avaayo." 
Matthew13:54 Bwe yatuuka mu nsi y'ewaabwe n'abayigiriza mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyabwe, n'okuwuniikirira ne bawuniikirira, ne bagamba nti, “Ono yaggya wa amagezi gano, n'eby'amaanyi bino?" 
Matthew13:55 Ono si ye mwana w'omubazzi? Nnyina si gwe bayita Malyamu? Ne baganda be Yakobo, ne Yusufu, ne Simooni, ne Yuda?" 
Matthew13:56 Ne bannyina bonna tebali waffe? Kale ono yaggya wa ebigambo bino byonna?” 
Matthew13:57 Ne bamunyiigira. Naye Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Nnabbi tabulwa kitiibwa, wabula mu nsi y'ewaabwe, ne mu nnyumba y'ewaabwe.”" 
Matthew13:58 Era teyakolerayo bya magero bingi olw'obutakkiriza bwabwe. 
Matthew14:1 Mu biro ebyo Kerode owessaza n'awulira ettutumu lya Yesu," 
Matthew14:2 n'agamba abaddu be nti, “Oyo ye Yokaana Omubatiza; azuukidde mu bafu; era eby'amaanyi bino kyebiva bikolera mu ye.”" 
Matthew14:3 Kubanga Kerode yali akutte Yokaana, n'amusiba, n'amuteeka mu kkomera olwa Kerodiya, mukazi wa Firipo muganda we." 
Matthew14:4 Kubanga Yokaana yagamba Kerode nti, “Kya muzizo ggwe okufuula Kerodiya mukazi wo.”" 
Matthew14:5 Kerode bwe yali ayagala okumutta, naye n'atya abantu, kubanga baamulowooza nga ye nnabbi." 
Matthew14:6 Bwe lwatuuka olunaku olw'okujjukirirako amazaalibwa ga Kerode, muwala wa Kerodiya n'azina mu maaso gaabwe, n'asanyusa Kerode." 
Matthew14:7 Awo Kerode n'asuubiza n'ekirayiro okumuwa kyonna kyonna ky'anaasaba. 
Matthew14:8 Ng'apikirizibwa nnyina, omuwala, n'agamba nti, “Mpeera wano ku lutiba omutwe gwa Yokaana Omubatiza.”" 
Matthew14:9 Kabaka n'anakuwala nnyo; naye olw'ebirayiro bye, n'olw'abo abaali batudde nga balya naye, n'alagira okugumuwa;" 
Matthew14:10 n'atuma, mu kkomera ne batemako Yokaana omutwe." 
Matthew14:11 Ne baleeta omutwe gwa Yokaana ku lutiba, ne baguwa omuwala; naye n'agutwalira nnyina." 
Matthew14:12 Abayigirizwa ba Yokaana ne bajja, ne batwala omulambo gwe, ne bamuziika; ne bagenda ne babuulira Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Awo, Yesu bwe yawulira ebyo, n'aviirayo mu lyato, n'agenda kyama mu kifo eky'eddungu; ebibiina by'abantu bwe byawulira, ne biva mu bibuga ne bimugoberera nga biyita ku lukalu." 
Matthew14:14 Yesu bwe yava mu lyato, n'alaba ekibiina kinene eky'abantu, n'abasaasira, n'awonya abalwadde baabwe." 
Matthew14:15 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, abayigirizwa ne bajja w'ali, ne bamugamba nti, “Wano ddungu, ate n'obudde buyise nnyo; siibula abantu, bagende mu bibuga, beegulire emmere.”" 
Matthew14:16 Naye Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Tewali kubeetaagisa kugenda; mmwe mubawe eby'okulya.”" 
Matthew14:17 Ne bamugamba nti, “Tetulina kintu wano okuggyako emigaati etaano, n'ebyennyanja bibiri.”" 
Matthew14:18 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Mubindeetere wano.”" 
Matthew14:19 N'alagira ebibiina okutuula ku muddo; n'atoola emigaati etaano n'ebyennyanja bibiri, n'atunula waggulu mu ggulu, ne yeebaza, n'amenyamu emigaati n'agiwa abayigirizwa be, abayigirizwa ne bagigabira ebibiina." 
Matthew14:20 Bonna ne balya, ne bakkuta, ne bakuŋŋaanya obukunkumuka obwasigalawo, ne bajjuza ebibbo kkumi na bibiri." 
Matthew14:21 N'abo abaalya baali abasajja ng'enkumi ttaano (5,000), nga tossizako bakazi n'abaana." 
Matthew14:22 Amangwago Yesu n'awaliriza abayigirizwa be okusaabala, bamukulembere okugenda emitala w'eri, ye amale okusiibula ebibiina." 
Matthew14:23 Bwe yamala okusiibula ebibiina, n'alinnya ku lusozi yekka okusaba; obudde ne buwungeera, nga Yesu aliyo bw'omu." 
Matthew14:24 Naye eryato lyali limaze okutuuka mu buziba, nga lyesunda n'amayengo, kubanga omuyaga gwali gubafuluma mu maaso." 
Matthew14:25 Awo ekiro mu kisisimuka ekyokuna Yesu n'ajja gyebali, ng'atambulira ku nnyanja." 
Matthew14:26 Abayigirizwa bwe baamulaba ng'atambulira ku nnyanja, ne bakwatibwa ensisi, ne bagamba nti, “Dayimooni!” Ne baleekaana olw'okutya." 
Matthew14:27 Amangwago Yesu n'ayogera nabo, n'agamba nti, “Muddemu omwoyo, nze nzuuno; temutya.”" 
Matthew14:28 Peetero n'amuddamu n'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, oba nga ggwe wuuyo, ndagira nzije gy'oli nga ntambulira ku mazzi.”" 
Matthew14:29 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Jjangu.” Peetero n'ava mu lyato, n'atambulira ku mazzi, okugenda eri Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Naye, bwe yalaba omuyaga, n'atya, n'atandika okukka mu mazzi nga asaanawo, n'akaaba, n'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, ndokola.”" 
Matthew14:31 Amangwago Yesu n'agolola omukono, n'amukwata, n'amugamba nti, “Ggwe alina okukkiriza okutono, kiki ekikubuusizzabuusizza?”" 
Matthew14:32 Bombi bwe baalinnya mu lyato, omuyaga ne guggwaawo." 
Matthew14:33 N'abo abaali mu lyato ne bamusinza, nga bagamba nti, “Mazima oli Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew14:34 Bwe baamala okuwunguka, ne batuuka ku lukalu olw'e Genesaleeti." 
Matthew14:35 Abantu baayo bwe baamumanya, ne batuma mu nsi eyo yonna eriraanyeewo, ne bamuleetera bonna abalwadde;" 
Matthew14:36 ne bamwegayirira bakomeko bukomi ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye; bonna abaakomako ne bawonyezebwa ddala. 
Matthew15:1 Awo Abafalisaayo n'abawandiisi abaava mu Yerusaalemi, ne bajja eri Yesu ne bagamba nti," 
Matthew15:2 “Abayigirizwa bo kiki ekiboonoonyesa obulombolombo bwe twaweebwa abakadde? Kubanga tebanaaba mu ngalo nga bagenda okulya emmere.” 
Matthew15:3 Yesu n'abaddamu n'abagamba nti, “Nammwe kiki ekiboonoonyesa etteeka lya Katonda olw'obulombolombo bwe mwaweebwa?" 
Matthew15:4 Kubanga Katonda yagamba nti, ‘Ossangamu ekitiibwa kitaawo ne nnyoko,’ nate nti, ‘Avumanga kitaawe oba nnyina, bamuttanga bussi.’" 
Matthew15:5 Naye mmwe mugamba nti, ‘Buli aligamba kitaawe oba nnyina nti Kyonna kye nnandikuwadde okukugasa, nkiwadde Katonda," 
Matthew15:6 alireka okusaamu ekitiibwa kitaawe.’ Bw'emutyo mwadibya ekigambo kya Katonda olw'obulombolombo bwammwe bwe mwaweebwa.” 
Matthew15:7 “Bannanfuusi mmwe, Isaaya yayogera bulungi ebya Katonda ebibakwatako ng'agamba nti,”" 
Matthew15:8 “‘Abantu bano banzisaamu ekitiibwa kya ku mimwa;’” “‘Naye omutima gwabwe gundi wala.’ ” 
Matthew15:9 “‘Naye bansinziza bwereere,’” “Bayigiriza amateeka g'abantu obuntu nga bye by'okukwata.”" 
Matthew15:10 Awo Yesu n'ayita ekibiina ky'abantu, n'abagamba nti, “Muwulire, era mutegeere;" 
Matthew15:11 ekiyingira mu kamwa si kye kyonoona omuntu; naye ekiva mu kamwa, ekyo kye kyonoona omuntu.”" 
Matthew15:12 Awo abayigirizwa ne bajja w'ali, ne bamugamba nti, “Omanyi ng'Abafalisaayo baanyiize, bwe baawulidde ekigambo ekyo?”" 
Matthew15:13 Naye Yesu n'abaddamu n'abagamba nti, “Buli kisimbe Kitange ow'omu ggulu ky'ataasimba, kirisimbulwa." 
Matthew15:14 Mubaleke; be basaale abatalaba. Naye omuzibe w'amaaso bw'akulembera muzibe munne, bombi baligwa mu bunnya.”" 
Matthew15:15 Peetero n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Tunnyonnyole amakulu g'olugero olwo.”" 
Matthew15:16 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Era nammwe temunnaba kuba na magezi?" 
Matthew15:17 Temutegeera nti buli ekiyingira mu kamwa kigenda mu lubuto, mwe kiva ne kisuulibwa mu kiyigo?" 
Matthew15:18 Naye ebifuluma mu kamwa, biva mu mutima; n'ebyo bye byonoona omuntu." 
Matthew15:19 Kubanga mu mutima mwe muva ebirowoozo ebibi, obussi, obwenzi, obukaba, obubbi, okuwaayiriza, n'okuvuma." 
Matthew15:20 Ebyo bye byonoona omuntu; naye okulya nga tanaabye mu ngalo tekwonoona muntu.” 
Matthew15:21 Yesu n'avaayo, n'agenda ku njuyi z'e Ttuulo n'e Sidoni." 
Matthew15:22 Kale, laba, omukazi Omukanani n'ava mu kitundu ekyo, n'ajja gy'ali n'ayogerera waggulu ng'agamba nti, “Onsaasire, Mukama wange, omwana wa Dawudi; muwala wange alwadde nnyo dayimooni.”" 
Matthew15:23 Naye Yesu n'atamuddamu kigambo. Abayigirizwa be ne bajja ne bamwegayirira, nga bagamba nti, “Musiibule; kubanga ajja atuleekaanira.”" 
Matthew15:24 Yesu n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Saatumibwa walala wonna okuggyako eri endiga ezaabula ez'omu nnyumba ya Isiraeri.”" 
Matthew15:25 Naye omukazi n'ajja, n'amusinza, ng'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, nnyamba.”" 
Matthew15:26 Yesu n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Si kirungi okuddira emmere y'abaana n'ogisuulira obubwa.”" 
Matthew15:27 Naye omukazi n'agamba nti, “Weewaawo, Mukama wange, naye n'obubwa bulya ku bukunkumuka obugwa okuva ku mmeeza ya bakama baabwo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Yesu n'alyoka addamu n'amugamba nti, “Ggwe omukazi, okukkiriza kwo kunene! Kibeere gy'oli nga bw'oyagala.” Muwala we n'awona okuva mu kiseera ekyo." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu n'avaayo, n'ajja ku lubalama lw'ennyanja y'e Ggaliraaya; n'alinnya ku lusozi, n'atuula okwo." 
Matthew15:30 Ebibiina bingi ne bijja gy'ali, nga birina abawenyera, n'abazibe b'amaaso, ne bakasiru, n'abalema, n'abalala bangi, ne babassa awali ebigere bye; n'abawonya," 
Matthew15:31 ekibiina n'okwewuunya ne beewuunya, bwe baalaba bakasiru nga boogera, abalema nga balamu, abawenyera nga batambula, n'abazibe b'amaaso nga balaba; ne bagulumiza Katonda wa Isiraeri." 
Matthew15:32 Yesu n'ayita abayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti, “Nsaasira abantu, kubanga leero baakamala nange ennaku ssatu nga tebalina kya kulya, n'okubasiibula nga balina enjala sikyagala, mpozzi banaazirikira mu kkubo.”" 
Matthew15:33 Abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti, “Tunaggya wa emigaati emingi bwe giti mu ddungu, egiyinza okukkusa ekibiina ekinene ekyenkana wano?”" 
Matthew15:34 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mulina emigaati emeka?” Ne bamuddamu nti, “Musanvu, n'ebyennyanja bitono si bingi.”" 
Matthew15:35 Awo Yesu n'alagira ekibiina okutuula wansi; 
Matthew15:36 n'atoola emigaati omusanvu n'ebyennyanja; ne yeebaza n'abimenyamu n'awa abayigirizwa, n'abayigirizwa ne bagabira ebibiina." 
Matthew15:37 Bonna ne balya, ne bakkuta: ne bakuŋŋaanya obukunkumuka obwasigalawo, ne bujjuza ebisero musanvu." 
Matthew15:38 N'abo abaalya baali abasajja enkumi nnya (4,000), nga tossizaako bakazi n'abaana." 
Matthew15:39 N'asiibula ebibiina, n'asaabala mu lyato, n'ajja mu kitundu ky'e Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Abafalisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo ne bajja eri Yesu, ne bamukema nga bamusaba okubalaga akabonero akava mu ggulu." 
Matthew16:2 Naye Yesu n'abaddamu n'abagamba nti, “ Bwe buba akawungeezi, mugamba nti [‘Bunaaba bulungi, kubanga eggulu limyuse.’" 
Matthew16:3 Ku makya mugamba nti, ‘Wanaabayo omuyaga leero, kubanga eggulu limyuse era libindabinda.’ Mumanyi okunnyonnyola endabika y'eggulu; naye temuyinza kwawula bubonero bwa biro?]" 
Matthew16:4 Ab'emirembe gino emibi era egy'obwenzi banoonya akabonero; naye tebaliweebwa kabonero, wabula akabonero ka Yona.” Awo n'abaleka, n'agenda." 
Matthew16:5 Abayigirizwa bwe batuuka emitala w'eri, baali beerabidde okutwala emigaati." 
Matthew16:6 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mulabuke mwekuume ekizimbulukusa eky'Abafalisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo.”" 
Matthew16:7 Bo ne bawakana bokka na bokka, nga bagamba nti, “Kubanga tetuleese migaati.”" 
Matthew16:8 Yesu bwe yamanya kye bagamba, n'ababuuza nti, “Mmwe abalina okukkiriza okutono, kiki ekibawakanya mwekka na mwekka olw'okuba temulina migaati?" 
Matthew16:9 Temunnaba kutegeera, so temujjukira migaati etaano, egyakkusa abantu enkumi ettaano (5,000), n'ebibbo bwe byali bye mwakuŋŋaanya?" 
Matthew16:10 Era emigaati omusanvu, egyakkusa abantu enkumi ennya (4,000), n'ebisero bwe byali bye mwakuŋŋaanya?" 
Matthew16:11 Ekibalobedde ki okutegeera nti sibagambye lwa migaati? Naye mwekuume ekizimbulukusa eky'Abafalisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo.” 
Matthew16:12 Ne balyoka bategeera nti tagambye kwekuuma kizimbulukusa kya migaati, wabula okwekuuma okuyigiriza kw'Abafalisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo." 
Matthew16:13 Awo, Yesu bwe yajja ku njuyi z'e Kayisaliya ekya Firipo, n'abuuza abayigirizwa be, ng'agamba nti, “Omwana w'omuntu abantu bamuyita batya?”" 
Matthew16:14 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Abalala bamuyita Yokaana Omubatiza; abalala nti Eriya, abalala nti Yeremiya, oba omu ku bannabbi.”" 
Matthew16:15 Awo ye n'ababuuza nti, “Naye mmwe mumpita mutya?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simooni Peetero n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda omulamu.”" 
Matthew16:17 Yesu n'amuddamu n'amugamba nti, “Olina omukisa, Simooni Ba-Yona! Kubanga omubiri n'omusaayi tebyakubikkulira ekyo, wabula Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew16:18 Nange nkugamba nti Ggwe Peetero, nze ndizimba ekkanisa yange ku lwazi luno, so n'emiryango egy'Emagombe tegirigiyinza." 
Matthew16:19 Ndikuwa ebisumuluzo by'okwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, kyonna kyonna ky'olisiba ku nsi kirisibibwa ne mu ggulu, kyonna kyonna ky'olisumulula ku nsi kirisumululwa ne mu ggulu.”" 
Matthew16:20 Awo n'akuutira abayigirizwa baleme okubuulirako omuntu nti ye Kristo. 
Matthew16:21 Okuva olwo, Yesu n'asookera awo okubuulira abayigirizwa be nti kimugwanira okugenda e Yerusaalemi, okubonyaabonyezebwa ennyo abakadde ne bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi, n'okuttibwa, ne ku lunaku olwokusatu okuzuukizibwa." 
Matthew16:22 Awo Peetero n'atwala Yesu ku bbali, n'atanula okumunenya, ng'agamba nti, “Nedda, Mukama wange! Ekyo tekirikubaako n'akatono.”" 
Matthew16:23 Yesu n'akyuka, n'agamba Peetero nti, “Dda emabega wange, Setaani! Oli nkonge gye ndi; kubanga tolowooza bya Katonda, wabula eby'abantu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Awo Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Omuntu bw'ayagala okujja emabega wange, yeefiirize yekka, yeetikke omusalaba gwe, angoberere." 
Matthew16:25 Kubanga buli ayagala okulokola obulamu bwe alibubuza; na buli alibuza obulamu bwe ku lwange alibulaba. 
Matthew16:26 Kubanga omuntu kulimugasa kutya okulya ensi yonna, naye ng'afiiriddwa obulamu bwe? Oba omuntu aliwaayo ki okununula obulamu bwe?" 
Matthew16:27 Kubanga Omwana w'omuntu agenda kujjira mu kitiibwa kya Kitaawe ne bamalayika be; n'alyoka asasula buli muntu nga bwe yakola. 
Matthew16:28 Ddala mbagamba nti Waliwo ku bano abayimiridde wano, abatalirega ku kufa n'akatono, okutuusa lwe baliraba Omwana w'omuntu ng'ajja mu bwakabaka bwe.”" 
Matthew17:1 Ennaku omukaaga (6) bwe zaayitawo Yesu n'atwala Peetero, n'ab'oluganda Yakobo ne Yokaana, n'abakulembera ne balinnya ku lusozi oluwanvu bokka." 
Matthew17:2 Awo n'afuusibwa mu maaso gaabwe, amaaso ge ne gamasamasa ng'enjuba, ebyambalo bye ne bitukula ng'omuzira." 
Matthew17:3 Laba, Musa ne Eriya ne babalabikira nga boogera naye." 
Matthew17:4 Peetero n'agamba Yesu nti, “Mukama wange, kirungi ffe okubeera wano; bw'oyagala, nnaazimba wano ensiisira ssatu (3), emu yiyo, n'endala ya Musa, n'endala ya Eriya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Bwe yali ng'akyayogera, laba, ekire ekimasamasa ne kibasiikiriza, era, eddoboozi ne liva mu kire, nga ligamba nti, “Ono ye Mwana wange gwe njagala, gwe nsanyukira ennyo; mumuwulire.”" 
Matthew17:6 Abayigirizwa bwe baaliwulira, ne batya nnyo, ne bagwa wansi nga beevuunise." 
Matthew17:7 Awo Yesu n'ajja we bali, n'abakwatako, n'agamba nti, “Muyimuke, temutya.”" 
Matthew17:8 Bwe bayimusa amaaso gaabwe, ne batalaba muntu mulala, wabula Yesu yekka." 
Matthew17:9 Bwe baali nga bakka okuva ku lusozi, Yesu n'abalagira ng'agamba nti, “Temubuulirako muntu yenna bye mwolesebbwa, okutuusa Omwana w'omuntu lw'alimala okuzuukira mu bafu.”" 
Matthew17:10 Abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza, nti, “Kale kiki ekigambya abawandiisi nti Eriya kimugwanidde okusooka okujja?”" 
Matthew17:11 Yesu n'abaddamu n'abagamba nti, “Kituufu Eriya ajja ddala, era alirongoosa byonna;" 
Matthew17:12 naye mbagamba nti Eriya amaze okujja, nabo tebaamumanya, naye baamukola nga bwe baayagala. Bw'atyo n'Omwana w'omuntu naye balimubonyaabonya.”" 
Matthew17:13 Awo abayigirizwa ne bategeera nti yali ayogera nabo ku Yokaana Omubatiza. 
Matthew17:14 Bwe baatuuka awali ekibiina ky'abantu, omuntu n'ajja awali Yesu, n'amufukaamirira, ng'agamba nti," 
Matthew17:15 “Mukama wange, saasira omwana wange, kubanga agwa ensimbu, zimubonyabonya nnyo; emirundi mingi ng'agwa mu muliro, era emirundi mingi agwa mu mazzi." 
Matthew17:16 N'amuleetedde abayigirizwa bo, ne batayinza kumuwonya.”" 
Matthew17:17 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Mmwe ab'emirembe egitakkiriza emikyamu, ndituusa wa okubeera nammwe? Ndituusa wa okubagumiikiriza? Mumundeetere wano.”" 
Matthew17:18 Awo Yesu n'amuboggolera; dayimooni n'amuvaako, omulenzi n'awona okuva mu kiseera ekyo." 
Matthew17:19 Awo abayigirizwa ne bajja eri Yesu kyama, ne bamubuuza nti, “Kiki ffe ekyatulobedde okumugoba?”" 
Matthew17:20 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Olw'okukkiriza kwammwe okuba okutono; kubanga ddala mbagamba nti Singa mulina okukkiriza okwenkana ng'akaweke ka kaladaali, bwe muligamba olusozi luno nti Vaawo wano genda wali; kale luligenda; era tewali kigambo kye mutaliyinza." 
Matthew17:21 Naye kyokka eky'engeri eno tekiyinza kuvaawo awatali kusaba na kusiiba.” 
Matthew17:22 Bwe baali nga bakyatudde e Ggaliraaya, Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Omwana w'omuntu agenda kuweebwayo mu mikono gy'abantu;" 
Matthew17:23 balimutta, ne ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukizibwa.” Abayigirizwa ne banakuwala nnyo." 
Matthew17:24 Bwe baatuuka e Kaperunawumu, abantu abasolooza ediderakima ne bajja eri Peetero, ne bamubuuza nti, “Mukama wammwe tawa diderakima?”" 
Matthew17:25 N'abaddamu nti, “Awa.” Bwe yayingira mu nju, Yesu n'amwesooka ng'agamba nti, “Olowooza otya, Simooni? Bakabaka b'ensi bawooza oba basolooza ku bantu ki? Ku baana baabwe nantiki ku bannamawanga?”" 
Matthew17:26 Peetero n'addamu nti, “Ku bannamawanga.” Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Kale abaana ba ddembe.”" 
Matthew17:27 “Naye, tuleme okubesittaza, genda mu nnyanja, osuule eddobo, onnyulule ekyennyanja ekinaasooka okubbulukuka; bw'onooyasamya akamwa kaakyo, onoolabamu esutateri; otwale eyo, ogibawe ku lwange ne ku lulwo.”" 
Matthew18:1 Mu kiseera ekyo abayigirizwa ne bajja eri Yesu ne bamubuuza nti, “Kale ani omukulu mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu?”" 
Matthew18:2 Awo Yesu n'ayita omwana omuto, n'amuyimiriza wakati waabwe," 
Matthew18:3 n'agamba nti, “Mazima mbagamba nti Bwe mutakyuka ne mufuuka ng'abaana abato, temuliyingira n'akatono mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu." 
Matthew18:4 Kale buli eyeewombeeka ng'omwana ono omuto, ye mukulu mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu." 
Matthew18:5 Na buli alisembeza omwana omuto omu ng'ono mu linnya lyange ng'asembezezza nze.” 
Matthew18:6 “Naye alyesitazza ku abo abato bano abanzikiriza, waakiri asibibwe mu bulago olubengo olunene, balyoke bamusuule mu buziba bw'ennyanja." 
Matthew18:7 Zirisanga ensi olw'ebigambo ebisittaza! Kubanga ebisittaza tebirirema kujja; naye zirisanga omuntu oyo aleeta ekisittaza! 
Matthew18:8 Oba ng'omukono gwo oba kugulu kwo nga kukwesittaza, kutemeko, okusuule wala; kye kirungi oyingire mu bulamu ng'obuzeeko omukono oba kugulu, okusinga okusuulibwa mu muliro ogw'emirembe n'emirembe, ng'olina emikono gyombi oba amagulu gombi." 
Matthew18:9 Era oba ng'eriiso lyo nga likwesittaza, liggyeemu, olisuule wala; kye kirungi oyingire mu bulamu ng'oli wa ttulu, okusinga okusuulibwa mu Ggeyeena ey'omuliro, ng'olina amaaso gombi." 
Matthew18:10 Mulabe nga temunyoomanga omu ku abo abato bano; kubanga mbagamba nti mu ggulu bamalayika baabwe batunuulira ennaku zonna amaaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu. 
Matthew18:11 Kubanga Omwana w'omuntu yajja okulokola ekyabula.” 
Matthew18:12 “Mulowooza mutya? Omuntu bw'aba n'endiga ze ekikumi (100), emu ku zo bw'ebula, taleka ziri ekyenda mu omwenda (99), n'agenda ku nsozi, n'anoonya eyo ebuzeeko?" 
Matthew18:13 Era bw'aba ng'agirabye, mazima mbagamba nti agisanyukira eyo okusinga ziri ekyenda mu omwenda (99) ezitaabuze." 
Matthew18:14 Bwe kityo, si kigendererwa kya Kitange ali mu ggulu, omu ku abo abato bano okuzikirira.”" 
Matthew18:15 Muganda wo bw'akukola obubi, genda omubuulirire ggwe naye mwekka; bw'akuwulira, ng'ofunye muganda wo." 
Matthew18:16 Naye bw'atakuwulira, twala omuntu omu omulala oba babiri, era mu kamwa k'abajulirwa ababiri oba abasatu buli kigambo kikakasibwa." 
Matthew18:17 Era bw'agaana okuwulira abo, buulira ekkanisa: era bw'agaana okuwulira n'ekkanisa, abeere gy'oli nga munnaggwanga era omuwooza." 
Matthew18:18 Mazima mbagamba nti Byonna bye mulisiba ku nsi birisibwa mu ggulu, era byonna bye mulisumulula ku nsi birisumululibwa mu ggulu." 
Matthew18:19 Nate mbagamba nti Oba bannammwe babiri bwe beetabanga ku nsi buli kigambo kyonna kye balisaba, kiribakolerwa Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew18:20 Kubanga we baba ababiri oba basatu nga bakuŋŋaanye mu linnya lyange, nange ndi awo wakati waabwe." 
Matthew18:21 Awo Peetero n'ajja awali Yesu, n'amubuuza nti, “Mukama wange, muganda wange bw'annyonoonanga, nnaamusonyiwanga emirundi emeka? Okutuusa emirundi musanvu?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Sikugamba nti Okutuusa emirundi musanvu, naye nti Okutuusa emirundi ensanvu (70) emirundi omusanvu (7)." 
Matthew18:23 Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu kyebuva bufaananyizibwa n'omuntu eyali kabaka, eyayagala okubala omuwendo gw'ebintu bye, n'abaddu be." 
Matthew18:24 Bwe yasooka okubala, ne bamuleetera omu, gw'abanja ettalanta omutwalo gumu (10,000)." 
Matthew18:25 Naye kubanga teyalina kya kusasula, mukama we n'alagira okumutunda, ne mukazi we, n'abaana be, n'ebintu byonna by'ali nabyo, ebbanja lisasulwe." 
Matthew18:26 Awo omuddu n'agwa wansi n'amusinza, ng'agamba nti, ‘Mukama wange, mmanja mpola, nange ndikusasula byonna.’" 
Matthew18:27 Mukama w'omuddu oyo n'amusaasira, n'amuta, n'amusonyiwa ebbanja." 
Matthew18:28 Naye omuddu oyo n'afuluma, n'asanga muddu munne, gwe yali abanja eddinaali ekikumi (100), n'amukwata, n'amugwa mu bulago, ng'agamba nti, ‘Sasula ebbanja lyange.’" 
Matthew18:29 Awo muddu munne n'agwa wansi n'amwegayirira, ng'agamba, nti, ‘Mmanja mpola, nange ndikusasula.’" 
Matthew18:30 N'atakkiriza naye n'agenda n'amuteeka mu kkomera, amale okusasula ebbanja." 
Matthew18:31 Awo baddu banne bwe baalaba bwe bibadde, ne banakuwala nnyo, ne bagenda ne babuulira mukama waabwe ebigambo byonna ebibaddewo." 
Matthew18:32 Awo mukama we n'amuyita n'amugamba nti, ‘Ggwe omuddu omubi, nakusonyiwa ebbanja liri lyonna, kubanga wanneegayirira;" 
Matthew18:33 naawe tekikugwanidde kusaasira muddu munno, nga nze bwe nnakusaasira ggwe?’" 
Matthew18:34 Mukama we n'asunguwala, n'amukwasa abambowa, amale okusasula ebbanja lyonna." 
Matthew18:35 Bw'atyo ne Kitange ali mu ggulu bw'alibakola mmwe, singa buli muntu tasonyiwa muganda we mu mutima gwe.”" 
Matthew19:1 Awo olwatuuka Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo, n'ava e Ggaliraaya, n'agenda mu kitundu ky'e Buyudaaya, emitala wa Yoludaani;" 
Matthew19:2 ebibiina ebinene ne bimugoberera; n'abawonyeza eyo. 
Matthew19:3 Abafalisaayo ne bajja gy'ali, ne bamukema, nga bagamba nti, “Omuntu ayinza okugoba mukazi we ng'amulanga buli kigambo?”" 
Matthew19:4 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Temusomangako nti oyo eyabatonda olubereberye nga yatonda omusajja n'omukazi," 
Matthew19:5 n'agamba nti, ‘Omuntu kyanaavanga aleka kitaawe ne nnyina, ne yeetaba ne mukazi we; nabo bombi banaabanga omubiri gumu?’"
