Matthew19:6 Olwo nga tebakyali babiri nate, naye omubiri gumu. Kale Katonda kye yagatta awamu, omuntu yenna takyawukanyanga.”" 
Matthew19:7 Abafalisaayo ne bamubuuza nti, “Kale, lwaki Musa yalagira nti omusajja awe mukazi we ebbaluwa ey'okwawukana, alyoke amugobe?”" 
Matthew19:8 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Olw'obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyammwe Musa kyeyava akkiriza mugobenga bakazi bammwe, naye okuva ku lubereberye tekyali bwe kityo." 
Matthew19:9 Era mbagamba nti Buli anaagobanga mukazi we, wabula nga amulanga ogw'obwenzi, n'awasa omulala, ng'ayenze, n'oyo awasa eyagobebwa ng'ayenze.”" 
Matthew19:10 Abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti, “Ebigambo eby'omusajja ne mukazi we bwe biba bwe bityo, si kirungi kuwasa.”" 
Matthew19:11 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Abantu bonna tebayinza kukkiriza kigambo ekyo, wabula abo abakiweebwa Katonda." 
Matthew19:12 Kubanga waliwo abalaawe abazaalibwa bwe batyo okuva mu mbuto za bannyaabwe; waliwo n'abalaawe abalaayibwa abantu, waliwo n'abalaawe, abeeraawa bokka olw'obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu. Ayinza okukikkiriza, akikkirize.”" 
Matthew19:13 Awo Yesu ne bamuleetera abaana abato, abasseeko emikono gye, abasabire: naye abayigirizwa ne babajunga ababaleeta." 
Matthew19:14 Naye Yesu n'agamba nti, “Mubaleke abaana abato, temubagaana kujja gye ndi; kubanga abali ng'abo obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bwe bwabwe.”" 
Matthew19:15 N'abassaako emikono, n'avaayo." 
Matthew19:16 Laba, omuntu omu n'ajja eri Yesu, n'amubuuza nti, “Mukama wange, ndikola kigambo ki ekirungi, mbeere n'obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Kiki ekikumbuuzisa eby'ekigambo ekirungi? Omulungi ali Omu, naye bw'oyagala okuyingira mu bulamu, wuliranga amateeka.”" 
Matthew19:18 N'amubuuza nti, “Galuwa?” Yesu n'addamu nti, “Tottanga, Toyendanga, Tobbanga, Towaayirizanga," 
Matthew19:19 Ossangamu ekitiibwa kitaawo ne nnyoko, era, Yagalanga muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka.”" 
Matthew19:20 Omulenzi n'agamba Yesu nti, “Ebyo byonna nnabikwata, ekimpeebuuseeko ki ate?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Bw'oyagala okuba eyatuukirira, genda otunde ebibyo byonna, ogabire abaavu, oliba n'obugagga mu ggulu, olyoke ojje, ongoberere.”" 
Matthew19:22 Omulenzi bwe yawulira ekigambo ekyo, n'agenda ng'anakuwadde; kubanga yali alina obugagga bungi." 
Matthew19:23 Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Mazima mbagamba nti Kizibu omuntu omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu." 
Matthew19:24 Era nate mbagamba nti Kyangu eŋŋamira okuyita mu nnyindo y'empiso, okusinga omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Matthew19:25 Abayigirizwa bwe baawulira ne beewuunya nnyo, ne bagamba nti, “Kale ani ayinza okulokolebwa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu n'abatunuulira n'abagamba nti, “Mu bantu ekyo tekiyinzika; naye Katonda ayinza byonna.”" 
Matthew19:27 Awo Peetero n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Laba, ffe twaleka byonna, ne tukugoberera; kale tulifuna ki?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mazima mbagamba nti Mmwe abangoberera, mu mazaalibwa ag'okubiri Omwana w'omuntu bw'alituula ku ntebe ey'ekitiibwa kye, nammwe mulituula ku ntebe ekkumi n'ebbiri (12), nga musalira omusango ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri (12) ebya Isiraeri." 
Matthew19:29 Na buli muntu yenna eyaleka ennyumba, oba ba luganda, oba bannyina, oba kitaawe, oba nnyina, oba baana, oba byalo, olw'erinnya lyange, aliweebwa emirundi kikumi (100), era alisikira n'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Matthew19:30 Naye bangi ab'olubereberye abaliba ab'oluvannyuma; n'ab'oluvannyuma abaliba ab'olubereberye.” 
Matthew20:1 “Kubanga obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana omuntu alina ennyumba ye, eyakeera enkya okupakasa abalimi balime mu lusuku lwe olw'emizabbibu." 
Matthew20:2 Bwe yamala okulagaana n'abalimi okubasasula eddinaali emu olunaku, n'abasindika mu lusuku lwe olw'emizabbibu." 
Matthew20:3 N'afuluma ku ssaawa nga ssatu, n'alaba abalala nga bayimiridde mu katale nga tebaliiko kye bakola;" 
Matthew20:4 nabo n'abagamba nti, Nammwe mugende mukole mu lusuku olw'emizabbibu, nange nnaabasasula ekinaabasanira.” Ne bagenda." 
Matthew20:5 N'afuluma nate essaawa nga ziri mukaaga, era ne ku ssaawa mwenda, n'akola bw'atyo." 
Matthew20:6 Era n'afuluma ku ssaawa nga ziri kkumi n'emu, n'asanga abalala nga bayimiridde; n'abagamba nti, “Kiki ekibayimiriza wano obudde okuziba nga temuliiko kye mukola?”" 
Matthew20:7 “Ne bamuddamu nti, ‘Kubanga tewali muntu eyatupakasizza.’ N'abagamba nti, ‘Nammwe mugende mukole mu lusuku olw'emizabbibu.’" 
Matthew20:8 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, nnannyini lusuku olw'emizabbibu n'agamba omusajja we alabirira abakozi nti, ‘Bayite abalimi, obawe empeera, ng'osookera ku b'oluvannyuma, okutuusa ku b'olubereberye.’" 
Matthew20:9 Abo abaapangisibwa ku ssaawa ekkumi n'emu bwe bajja, ne baweebwa buli muntu eddinaali emu." 
Matthew20:10 Abo abaasooka okupangisibwa bwe bajja, ne balowooza nti banaaweebwa okusingawo; naye nabo ne baweebwa buli muntu eddinaali emu." 
Matthew20:11 Bwe baagiweebwa, ne beemulugunyiza nnannyini lusuku," 
Matthew20:12 nga bagamba nti, ‘Bano ab'oluvannyuma bakoledde essaawa emu yokka, naye n'obenkanya naffe, abaateganye okuva enkya nga n'essana litwokya?’" 
Matthew20:13 Naye ye n'addamu n'agamba omu ku abo nti, ‘Munnange, sikukoze bubi; tewalagaanye nange eddinaali emu?" 
Matthew20:14 Twala eyiyo, ogende; njagala okuwa ono eyazze oluvannyuma nga bwe mpadde ggwe." 
Matthew20:15 Siyinza kukola byange nga bwe njagala? Oba okwatiddwa obuggya olw'obugabi bwange?’ 
Matthew20:16 Bwe batyo ab'oluvannyuma baliba ab'olubereberye, n'ab'olubereberye baliba ab'oluvannyuma.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yesu bwe yali ng'ayambuka okugenda e Yerusaalemi, n'atwala abayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri kyama (12), n'abagambira mu kkubo nti," 
Matthew20:18 “Laba, twambuka tugenda e Yerusaalemi; n'Omwana w'omuntu aliweebwayo mu bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi; nabo balimusalira omusango okumutta," 
Matthew20:19 era balimuwaayo mu b'amawanga okumuduulira, n'okumukuba, n'okumukomerera, kyokka alizuukizibwa ku lunaku olwokusatu.”" 
Matthew20:20 Awo nnyina w'abaana ba Zebbedaayo n'ajja gy'ali, n'abaana be, n'amusinza, n'abaako ky'amusaba." 
Matthew20:21 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Oyagala ki?” N'amuddamu nti, “Lagira abaana bange bano bombi batuule, omu ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo, n'omulala ku mukono gwo ogwa kkono, mu bwakabaka bwo.”" 
Matthew20:22 Naye Yesu n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Temumanyi kye musaba. Muyinza okunywa ku kikompe nze kye ŋŋenda okunywako?” Ne bamugamba nti, “Tuyinza.”" 
Matthew20:23 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Ku kikompe kyange mulinywerako ddala; naye eky'okutuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, ne ku mukono ogwa kkono, si nze nkugaba, wabula kiweebwa abo Kitange be yakuterekera.”" 
Matthew20:24 Na bali ekkumi (10) bwe baawulira, ne banyiigira ab'oluganda ababiri." 
Matthew20:25 Naye Yesu n'abayita bonna gy'ali, n'agamba nti, “Mumanyi ng'abafuzi b'amawanga babafuga, era abakulu baabwe babatwala n'amaanyi." 
Matthew20:26 Naye tekiibenga bwe kityo mu mmwe; naye buli ayagala okuba omukulu mu mmwe anaabanga muweereza wammwe; 
Matthew20:27 na buli ayagala okuba ow'olubereberye mu mmwe anaabanga muddu wammwe; 
Matthew20:28 nga Omwana w'omuntu bw'atajja kuweerezebwa, wabula okuweereza, n'okuwaayo obulamu bwe okuba ekinunulo eky'abangi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe baali nga bafuluma mu Yeriko, ekibiina ekinene ne kimugoberera." 
Matthew20:30 Laba, abazibe b'amaaso babiri abaali batudde ku mabbali g'ekkubo, bwe baawulira nti Yesu ayitawo, ne boogerera waggulu, nga bagamba nti, “Mukama waffe, omwana wa Dawudi, tusaasire.”" 
Matthew20:31 Ekibiina ne kibaboggolera, nga kibagamba okusirika; naye bo ne beeyongera okwogerera waggulu, nga bagamba nti, “Mukama waffe, omwana wa Dawudi, tusaasire.”" 
Matthew20:32 Awo Yesu n'ayimirira, n'abayita, n'agamba nti, “Mwagala mbakolere ki?”" 
Matthew20:33 Ne bamugamba nti, “Mukama waffe, amaaso gaffe gazibuke.”" 
Matthew20:34 Yesu n'abakwatirwa ekisa, n'akwata ku maaso gaabwe, amangwago ne balaba, ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew21:1 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe baasembera okumpi ne Yerusaalemi, ne batuuka e Besufaage, ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni, Yesu n'atuma abayigirizwa babiri (2)," 
Matthew21:2 n'abagamba nti, “Mugende mu mbuga ebali mu maaso, amangu ago munaalaba endogoyi esibiddwa, nga eri n'omwana gwayo; muzisumulule, muzindeetere." 
Matthew21:3 Naye omuntu bw'anaabagamba ekigambo, munaagamba nti, ‘Mukama waffe ye azaagala;’ naye anaaziweereza mangu ago.”" 
Matthew21:4 Kino kyabaawo, ekigambo kituukirire nnabbi kye yayogera, ng'agamba nti," 
Matthew21:5 “Mubuulire muwala wa Sayuuni nti, Laba, Kabaka wo ajja gy'oli. Omuteefu, nga yeebagadde endogoyi, Era yeebagadde n'akayana omwana gw'endogoyi.”" 
Matthew21:6 Abayigirizwa ne bagenda, ne bakola nga Yesu bwe yabalagira," 
Matthew21:7 ne baleeta endogoyi, n'omwana gwayo, ne bazissaako engoye zaabwe; Yesu n'azituulako." 
Matthew21:8 Abantu bangi ab'omu kibiina ne baaliira engoye zaabwe mu kkubo; abalala ne batema amatabi ku miti, ne bagaaliira mu kkubo." 
Matthew21:9 Ebibiina ebyamukulembera, n'ebyo ebyava emabega, ne byogerera waggulu, ne bigamba nti, “Ozaana eri omwana wa Dawudi! Aweereddwa omukisa ajja mu linnya lya Mukama! Ozaana waggulu mu ggulu!”" 
Matthew21:10 Awo bwe yayingira mu Yerusaalemi, ekibuga kyonna ne kikankanyizibwa nga abakirimu babuuza nti, “Ani ono?”" 
Matthew21:11 Ebibiina ne bigamba nti, “Ono ye nnabbi, Yesu ava mu Nazaaleesi eky'e Ggaliraaya.”" 
Matthew21:12 Yesu n'ayingira mu Yeekaalu ya Katonda, n'agobera ebweru bonna abaali batundira mu Yeekaalu, n'avuunika embaawo ez'abaali bawaanyisa effeeza, n'entebe ez'abaali batunda enjiibwa;" 
Matthew21:13 n'abagamba nti, “Kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘Ennyumba yange eneeyitibwanga nnyumba ya kusabirangamu;’ naye mmwe mugifuula mpuku ya banyazi.”" 
Matthew21:14 Awo abazibe b'amaaso n'abalema ne bajja gy'ali mu Yeekaalu, n'abawonya." 
Matthew21:15 Naye bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi bwe baalaba eby'amagero bye yakola, n'abaana abaayogerera waggulu mu Yeekaalu nga bagamba nti, “Ozaana eri omwana wa Dawudi;” ne banyiiga," 
Matthew21:16 ne bamugamba nti, “Owulira bano bye bagamba?” Yesu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Mpulira; temusomangako nti, ‘Mu kamwa k'abaana abato n'abawere otuukirizza ettendo?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 N'abaleka, n'afuluma mu kibuga, n'agenda e Bessaniya, n'asula eyo." 
Matthew21:18 Awo enkeera ku makya, Yesu bwe yali ng'addayo mu kibuga, enjala n'emuluma." 
Matthew21:19 N'alaba omutiini gumu ku mabbali g'ekkubo, n'agutuukako, n'asanga nga tekuli kintu, wabula amalagala ameereere; n'agugamba nti, “Toddangayo okubala ebibala emirembe n'emirembe.” Amangwago omutiini ne guwotoka." 
Matthew21:20 Abayigirizwa bwe baalaba, ne beewuunya, ne bagamba nti, “Omutiini guwotose gutya amangu?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Mazima mbagamba nti Bwe munaabanga n'okukkiriza, nga temubuusabuusa, temuukolenga kino kyokka eky'omutiini, naye bwe muligamba olusozi luno nti Situlibwa osuulibwe mu nnyanja, kirikolebwa." 
Matthew21:22 Ne byonna byonna bye munaayagalanga, bwe munaasabanga nga mukkirizza, munaabiweebwanga.”" 
Matthew21:23 Yesu n'ayingira mu Yeekaalu, bakabona abakulu n'abakadde b'abantu ne bajja gy'ali ng'ayigiriza, ne bamubuuza nti, “Buyinza ki obukukoza bino? Era ani eyakuwa obuyinza buno?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Nange ka mbabuuze ekigambo kimu, bwe munaakinzivuunula, era nange n'ababuulira obuyinza bwe buli obunkoza bino." 
Matthew21:25 Okubatiza kwa Yokaana kwava wa? Mu ggulu nantiki mu bantu?” Ne beebuuzaganya bokka na bokka, ne bagamba nti, “Bwe tunaagamba nti, ‘Mu ggulu,’ anaatugamba nti, ‘Kale kiki ekyabalobera okumukkiriza?’" 
Matthew21:26 Naye bwe tunaagamba nti, ‘Mu bantu;’ tutya abantu; kubanga bonna bamulowooza Yokaana nga nnabbi.”" 
Matthew21:27 Ne baddamu Yesu ne bamugamba nti, “Tetumanyi.” Ne Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Era nange siibabuulire obuyinza bwe buli obunkoza bino.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Naye mulowooza mutya? Waaliwo omuntu eyalina abaana be babiri; n'ajja eri ow'olubereberye, n'amugamba nti Omwana, genda okole emirimu leero mu lusuku olw'emizabbibu." 
Matthew21:29 N'addamu n'agamba nti, ‘ŋŋaanyi,’ naye oluvannyuma ne yeenenya, n'agenda." 
Matthew21:30 N'ajja eri ow'okubiri, n'amugamba bw'atyo. Naye n'addamu n'agamba nti, ‘Ka ŋŋende, ssebo,’ naye n'atagenda." 
Matthew21:31 Ku abo bombi ani eyakola kitaawe kyayagala Ne bamuddamu nti, ‘Ow'olubereberye.’ Yesu n'abagamba nti, ‘Mazima mbagamba nti abawooza n'abenzi babasooka mmwe okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Matthew21:32 Kubanga Yokaana yajja gye muli mu kkubo ery'obutuukirivu, nammwe temwamukkiriza, naye abawooza n'abenzi baamukkiriza; nammwe, bwe mwalaba bwe mutyo, era n'oluvannyuma temwenenya mulyoke mumukkirize.’" 
Matthew21:33 “Muwulire olugero olulala. Waaliwo omuntu eyalina ennyumba ye, n'asimba olusuku olw'emizabbibu, n'alukomerako olukomera, n'alusimamu essogolero, n'azimbamu omunaala, n'alusigira abalimi, n'atambula olugendo n'agenda mu nsi ey'ewala." 
Matthew21:34 Awo omwaka bwe gwali gunaatera okutuuka ebibala okwengera, n'atuma abaddu be eri abalimi, babawe ebibala bye." 
Matthew21:35 Naye abalimi ne bakwata abaddu be, omu ne bamukuba, omulala ne bamutta, omulala ne bamukasuukirira amayinja." 
Matthew21:36 N'atuma nate abaddu abalala bangi okusinga ab'olubereberye; ne baabakola nabo bwe batyo. 
Matthew21:37 Oluvannyuma n'abatumira omwana we, ng'agamba nti, ‘Banaawulira omwana wange.’" 
Matthew21:38 Naye abalimi bwe baalaba omwana ne bagamba bokka na bokka nti, ‘Ono ye musika; mujje, tumutte, tulye obusika bwe.’" 
Matthew21:39 Ne bamukwata, ne bamusindiikiriza mu lusuku olw'emizabbibu, ne bamutta." 
Matthew21:40 Kale, mukama w'olusuku olw'emizabbibu bw'alijja, alibakola atya abalimi abo?”" 
Matthew21:41 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Abo ababi alibazikiriza bubi, naye olusuku olw'emizabbibu alirusigira abalimi abalala, abanaamuweerezanga ebibala byamu mu mwaka gwabyo.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Temusomangako mu byawandiikibwa nti,” “‘Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana’” “ ‘Lye lyafuuka omutwe gw'ensonda;’” “‘Kino kyava eri Mukama,’” “‘Era kya kitalo mu maaso gaffe?’”" 
Matthew21:43 “Kyenva mbagamba nti Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bulibaggibwako mmwe, buliweebwa eggwanga eribala ebibala byabwo.”" 
Matthew21:44 Era agwa ku jjinja lino alimenyekamenyeka; n'oyo gwe lirigwako, lirimubetenta." 
Matthew21:45 Awo bakabona abakulu n'Abafalisaayo bwe baawulira engero ze, ne bategeera nti ayogedde ku bo." 
Matthew21:46 Nabo bwe baali baagala okukwata Yesu, ne batya ebibiina, kubanga byamulowooza okuba nnabbi." 
Matthew22:1 Awo Yesu n'addamu n'ayogera n'abo mu engero, n'agamba nti," 
Matthew22:2 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaananyizibwa omuntu eyali kabaka, eyafumbira omwana we embaga ey'obugole," 
Matthew22:3 n'atuma abaddu be okuyita abaayitibwa ku mbaga ey'obugole; naye ne batayagala kujja. 
Matthew22:4 N'atuma nate abaddu abalala, ng'agamba nti Mubuulire abantu abaayitibwa nti Laba, nfumbye embaga yange; ente zange n'eza ssava zittiddwa, ne byonna biteegekeddwa; mujje ku mbaga ey'obugole." 
Matthew22:5 Naye abo abaayitibwa ne batassaayo mwoyo ne bagenda, omu n'agenda mu kyalo kye, omulala mu by'obuguzi bwe," 
Matthew22:6 abaasigalawo ne bakwata abaddu be, ne babaswaza, ne babatta." 
Matthew22:7 Kabaka n'akwatibwa obusungu; n'asindika eggye lye, n'azikiriza abassi abo, n'ayokya ekibuga kyabwe." 
Matthew22:8 Awo n'agamba abaddu be nti ‘Embaga ey'obugole ewedde okuteekateeka, naye abo abaayitibwa tebasaanira." 
Matthew22:9 Kale mugende mu masaŋŋanzira g'enguudo, bonna be munaalabayo mubayite bajje ku mbaga ey'obugole.’" 
Matthew22:10 Abaddu bali ne bagenda mu nguudo, ne bakuŋŋaanya bonna be baalaba, ababi n'abalungi; ekisenge eky'embaga ey'obugole ne kijjula abagenyi." 
Matthew22:11 Naye kabaka bwe yayingira okulaba abagenyi, n'alabamu omuntu atayambadde kyambalo kya bugole." 
Matthew22:12 Kabaka n'amugamba nti, ‘Munnange, oyingidde otya wano nga tolina kyambalo kya bugole? N'abunira.’ ”" 
Matthew22:13 Awo kabaka n'agamba abaweereza be nti, “Mumusibe emikono n'amagulu, mumusuule mu kizikiza eky'ebweru; mwe muliba okukaaba n'okulumwa obujiji." 
Matthew22:14 Kubanga bangi abayitibwa, naye abalondemu batono.”" 
Matthew22:15 Awo Abafalisaayo ne bagenda, ne bateeseeza wamu nga bwe banaatega Yesu mu bigambo." 
Matthew22:16 Ne bamutumira abayigirizwa baabwe, wamu n'Abakerodiyaani, ne bagamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, tumanyi ng'oli wa mazima, era ng'oyigiriza mu mazima ekkubo lya Katonda, so tokolerera kusiimibwa muntu yenna; kubanga tososola mu bantu." 
Matthew22:17 Kale tubuulire, olowooza otya? Kirungi okuwa Kayisaali omusolo, oba si weewaawo?”" 
Matthew22:18 Naye Yesu n'ategeera obubi bwabwe, n'agamba nti, “Munkemera ki, mmwe abannanfuusi?" 
Matthew22:19 Mundage effeeza ey'omusolo.” Ne bamuleetera eddinaali. 
Matthew22:20 N'abagamba nti, “Ekifaananyi n'amannya ebiwandiikiddwako by'ani?”" 
Matthew22:21 Ne bamugamba nti, “Bya Kayisaali.” Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Kale musasule Kayisaali ebya Kayisaali; ne Katonda ebya Katonda.”" 
Matthew22:22 Bwe baawulira, ne beewuunya, ne bamuleka, ne bagenda." 
Matthew22:23 Ku lunaku olwo, Abasaddukaayo, abagamba nti tewali kuzuukira; ne bajja eri Yesu ne bamubuuza," 
Matthew22:24 nti, “Omuyigiriza, Musa yagamba nti, ‘Omuntu bw'afanga, nga talina baana, muganda we addengawo awase mukazi we, azaalire muganda we abaana.’" 
Matthew22:25 Awo ewaffe yaliyo ab'oluganda musanvu (7), ow'olubereberye n'awasa, n'afa naye nga tazadde mwana, mukazi we n'amulekera muganda we;" 
Matthew22:26 bw'atyo n'owo kubiri, n'owo kusatu, okutuusa ku w'omusanvu." 
Matthew22:27 Oluvannyuma, bonna nga baweddewo, n'omukazi n'afa." 
Matthew22:28 Kale mu kuzuukira aliba muka ani ku abo omusanvu? Kubanga bonna baamuwasa.” 
Matthew22:29 Naye Yesu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Mukyama olw'obutamanya ebyawandiikibwa, newakubadde amaanyi ga Katonda." 
Matthew22:30 Kubanga mu kuzuukira tebawasa, so tebafumbirwa, naye bali nga bamalayika mu ggulu." 
Matthew22:31 Naye eby'okuzuukira kw'abafu, temwasoma Katonda kye yabagamba nti," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Nze ndi Katonda wa Ibulayimu, era Katonda wa Isaaka, era Katonda wa Yakobo.’ Si Katonda wa bafu, naye wa balamu.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ebibiina bwe byawulira ebyo, ne byewuunya okuyigiriza kwe." 
Matthew22:34 Naye Abafalisaayo bwe baawulira nti abunizza Abasaddukaayo, n'abo ne bakuŋŋaanira wamu." 
Matthew22:35 Omu ku bo, ow'amateeka, n'amubuuza ng'amukema nti," 
Matthew22:36 “Omuyigiriza, ekiragiro ekikulu mu mateeka kye kiruwa?”" 
Matthew22:37 Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Yagalanga Mukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'obulamu bwo bwonna, n'amagezi go gonna." 
Matthew22:38 Kino kye kiragiro ekikulu eky'olubereberye. 
Matthew22:39 N'eky'okubiri ekikifaanana kye kino nti Yagalanga muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka. 
Matthew22:40 Mu biragiro bino byombi amateeka gonna mwe gasinziira, era ne bannabbi.”" 
Matthew22:41 Abafalisaayo bwe baakuŋŋaana, Yesu n'ababuuza," 
Matthew22:42 ng'agamba nti, “Kristo mumulowooza mutya? Ye mwana w'ani?” Ne bamugamba nti, “Mutabani wa Dawudi.”" 
Matthew22:43 N'abagamba nti, “Kale, Dawudi mu Mwoyo lwaki amuyita Mukama we, ng'agamba nti,”" 
Matthew22:44 “‘Mukama yagamba Mukama wange nti’” “‘Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo,’” “‘Okutuusa lwe ndissa abalabe bo wansi w'ebigere byo.’”" 
Matthew22:45 “Kale oba nga Dawudi amuyita Mukama we, abeera atya omwana we?”" 
Matthew22:46 Ne wataba muntu eyayinza okumuddamu ekigambo, era okuva ku lunaku olwo tewali muntu eyayaŋŋanga okumubuuza ekigambo nate." 
Matthew23:1 Awo Yesu n'ayogera n'ebibiina awamu n'abayigirizwa be," 
Matthew23:2 n'agamba nti, “Abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo batudde ku ntebe ya Musa;" 
Matthew23:3 kale ebigambo byonna bye babagamba, mubikwate mubikole, naye temukola nga bo bwe bakola; kubanga boogera naye tebakola." 
Matthew23:4 Era basiba emigugu egizitowa egiteetikkika, bagitikka abantu ku kibegabega; sso nga bo bennyini tebaagala wadde okuginyenyako n'engalo yaabwe." 
Matthew23:5 Naye ebikolwa byabwe byonna babikola, era abantu babirabe, kubanga bagaziya fulakuteri zaabwe, era bongerako n'amatanvuuwa gaabwe," 
Matthew23:6 era baagala ebifo eby'oku mwanjo ku mbaga, n'entebe ez'ekitiibwa mu makuŋŋaaniro," 
Matthew23:7 era baagala n'okulamusibwa mu butale, n'abantu okubayita nti Labbi." 
Matthew23:8 Naye mmwe temuyitibwanga Labbi, kubanga, Omuyigiriza wammwe ali omu, nammwe mwenna muli ba luganda." 
Matthew23:9 Era temuyitanga muntu ku nsi kitammwe, kubanga Kitammwe ali omu, ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew23:10 So temuyitibwanga balagirizi, kubanga omulagirizi wammwe ali omu, ye Kristo." 
Matthew23:11 Naye mu mmwe abasinga obukulu anaabanga muweereza wammwe. 
Matthew23:12 Na buli aneegulumizanga alitoowazibwa; na buli eyeetoowaza anaagulumizibwanga.” 
Matthew23:13 “Naye ziribasanga mmwe, abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, bannanfuusi! kubanga muggalira obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu mu maaso g'abantu; kubanga mmwe temuyingira, n'abo ababa bayingira temubaganya kuyingira.”" 
Matthew23:14 “Ziribasanga mmwe, abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, bannanfuusi! Kubanga munyaga ennyumba za bannamwandu, era ne mwefuula abasaba ennyo; n'olwekyo mulibaako omusango ogusinga obunene.”" 
Matthew23:15 “Ziribasanga mmwe, abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, bannanfuusi! kubanga mwetooloola mu nnyanja ne ku lukalu okukyusa omuntu omu, abe omugoberezi wammwe naye bwe mumala okumukyusa, mumufuula mwana wa Ggeyeena emirundi ebiri okusinga mmwe.”" 
Matthew23:16 “Ziribasanga mmwe, abasaale abazibe b'amaaso, abagamba nti Buli anaalayiranga Yeekaalu, taba na musango; naye buli anaalayiranga ezaabu ey'omu Yeekaalu, ng'azzizza omusango." 
Matthew23:17 Mmwe abasiru era abazibe b'amaaso; kubanga ekisinga obukulu kiruwa, ezaabu, oba Yeekaalu efuula zaabu eyo okuba entukuvu?" 
Matthew23:18 Era mugamba nti Omuntu bw'anaalayiranga ekyoto, nga talina musango; naye buli anaalayiranga ekitone ekikiriko, ng'azzizza omusango." 
Matthew23:19 Mmwe abazibe b'amaaso! kubanga ekisinga obukulu kiruwa, ekitone, oba ekyoto ekitukuza ekitone?" 
Matthew23:20 Naye alayira ekyoto, alayira kyo ne byonna ebikiriko." 
Matthew23:21 Naye alayira Yeekaalu, alayira yo, era n'oyo agituulamu." 
Matthew23:22 N'oyo alayira eggulu, aba alayidde ntebe ya Katonda, ne Katonda agituulako.”" 
Matthew23:23 “Ziribasanga mmwe, abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, bannanfuusi! kubanga muwa ekitundu eky'ekkumi ekya nnabbugira ne aneta ne kkumino, ne mulekayo ebigambo ebikulu eby'amateeka, okubeera abenkanya, ekisa, n'okukkiriza; naye bino kyabagwanira okubikola, era na biri obutabirekaayo." 
Matthew23:24 Mmwe abasaale abazibe b'amaaso abasengejja ensiri, naye ne mumira eŋŋamira.”" 
Matthew23:25 “Ziribasanga mmwe abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, bannanfuusi! kubanga munaaza kungulu ku kikompe n'ekibya, naye munda mujjudde obunyazi n'obuteegendereza." 
Matthew23:26 Ggwe Omufalisaayo omuzibe w'amaaso, sooka onaaze munda mu kikompe ne mu kibya, ne kungulu kwabyo kulyoke kube kulungi.”" 
Matthew23:27 “Ziribasanga mmwe, abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, bannanfuusi! kubanga mufaanana amalaalo agasiigibwa langi enjeru ne gatukula, agalabika kungulu nga ganyiridde, naye munda mujjudde amagumba g'abafu, n'empitambi yonna." 
Matthew23:28 Bwe mutyo nammwe kungulu mulabika mu bantu nga muli batuukirivu, naye munda mujjudde obunnanfuusi n'obujeemu.”" 
Matthew23:29 “Ziribasanga mmwe, abawandiisi n'Abafalisaayo, bannanfuusi! kubanga muzimba amalaalo ga bannabbi, era munyiriza ebiggya by'abatuukirivu," 
Matthew23:30 ne mugamba nti Singa twaliwo mu biro bya bajjajjaffe, tetwandissizza kimu nabo mu kuyiwa omusaayi gwa bannabbi." 
Matthew23:31 Bwe mutyo ne mukakasa mwekka nti muli baana b'abo abatta bannabbi. 
Matthew23:32 Kale mumalirize bajjajjammwe kye baatandika. 
Matthew23:33 Mmwe emisota, abaana b'embalasaasa, mulidduka mutya omusango ogwa Ggeyeena?" 
Matthew23:34 Laba, kyenva mbatumira bannabbi, n'ab'amagezi, n'abawandiisi, n'abamu ku bo mulibatta mulibakomerera; n'abalala mulibakubira emiggo mu makuŋŋaaniro gammwe, mulibayigganya okubaggya mu kibuga ekimu okubazza mu kirala;" 
Matthew23:35 mulyoke mubuuzibwe omusaayi gwonna ogw'abatuukirivu ogwayiika ku nsi, okusookera ku musaayi gwa Abiri oyo omutuukirivu okutuusa ku musaayi gwa Zaakaliya omwana wa Balakiya, gwe mwattira wakati wa Yeekaalu n'ekyoto." 
Matthew23:36 Mazima mbagamba nti Ebigambo bino byonna birituukirira eri abantu ab'emirembe gino.” 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusaalemi, Yerusaalemi, atta bannabbi, akasuukirira amayinja abantu abatumibwa gy'ali! emirundi emeka gye nnayagalira ddala okukuŋŋaanya abaana bo, ng'enkoko bw'ekuŋŋaanya obwana bwayo munda w'ebiwaawaatiro byayo, naye ne mutayagala!" 
Matthew23:38 Laba, ennyumba yammwe ebalekeddwa kifulukwa." 
Matthew23:39 Kubanga mbagamba nti Okusooka leero temulindabako n'akatono, okutuusa lwe mulyogera nti Aweebwe omukisa oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama.”" 
Matthew24:1 Yesu n'afuluma mu Yeekaalu; awo bwe yali ng'atambula, abayigirizwa be ne bajja okumulaga amazimba ga Yeekaalu." 
Matthew24:2 Naye n'abaddamu n'abagamba nti, “Temulaba bino byonna? Mazima mbagamba nti Tewalisigala wano jjinja eriri kungulu ku jjinja linnaalyo, eritalisuulibwa wansi.”" 
Matthew24:3 Yesu bwe yali ng'atudde ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni, abayigirizwa ne bajja gy'ali kyama, ne bagamba nti, “Tubuulire bino we biribeererawo n'akabonero akaliraga okujja kwo bwe kaliba, era n'ak'emirembe gino okuggwaawo?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Mulabe omuntu yenna tabakyamyanga." 
Matthew24:5 Kubanga bangi abalijja mu linnya lyange, nga bagamba nti, ‘Nze Kristo;’ balikyamya bangi." 
Matthew24:6 Muliwulira entalo n'ettutumu ly'entalo; mulabe temweraliikiriranga; kubanga tebirirema kubaawo; naye enkomerero ng'ekyali. 
Matthew24:7 Kubanga eggwanga liritabaala eggwanga ne kabaka alitabaala kabaka, walibaawo enjala n'ebikankano mu bifo ebitali bimu." 
Matthew24:8 Naye ebyo byonna okubaawo ye ntandikwa y'okulumwa ng'okw'omukazi agenda okuzaala. 
Matthew24:9 Mmwe balibakwata ne babawaayo mubonyebonyezebwe, balibatta; nammwe mulikyayibwa amawanga gonna okubalanga erinnya lyange." 
Matthew24:10 Mu biro ebyo bangi abalyesittala, baliwaŋŋanayo, balikyawagana." 
Matthew24:11 Ne bannabbi bangi ab'obulimba balijja, balikyamya bangi." 
Matthew24:12 Era kubanga obujeemu buliyinga obungi, okwagala kw'abasinga obungi kuliwola." 
Matthew24:13 Naye agumiikiriza okutuuka ku nkomerero, ye alirokolebwa." 
Matthew24:14 n'Enjiri eno ey'obwakabaka eribuulirwa mu nsi zonna, okuba obujulirwa mu mawanga gonna; awo enkomerero n'eryoka etuuka.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Kale bwe muliraba eky'omuzizo ekizikiriza, Danyeri nnabbi kye yayogerako, nga kiyimiridde mu kifo ekitukuvu, oyo asoma bino ategeere," 
Matthew24:16 olwo abaliba mu Buyudaaya baddukiranga ku nsozi; 
Matthew24:17 aliba waggulu ku nju takkanga kuggyamu bintu ebiri mu nju ye; 
Matthew24:18 aliba mu lusuku taddanga nate kutwala kyambalo kye. 
Matthew24:19 Naye ziribasanga abali embuto n'abayonsa mu nnaku ezo! 
Matthew24:20 Nammwe musabe Katonda ekiseera kyammwe eky'okuddukiramu kireme okuba mu biro eby'obutiti, newakubadde ku ssabbiiti." 
Matthew24:21 Kubanga mu biro ebyo waliba ekibonyoobonyo ekinene, era tekibangawo kasookedde ensi ebaawo okutuusa leero, era tekiribaawo nate." 
Matthew24:22 Ennaku ezo singa tezaasalibwako, tewandirokose buli alina omubiri; naye olw'abalonde ennaku ezo zirisalibwako." 
Matthew24:23 Mu biro ebyo omuntu bw'abagambanga nti, ‘Laba, Kristo ali wano!’ oba nti, ‘Wano!’ temukkirizanga." 
Matthew24:24 Kubanga walijja bakristo ab'obulimba, ne bannabbi ab'obulimba, n'abo balikola obubonero obukulu n'eby'amagero; n'okukyamya bakyamye n'abalonde, oba nga kiyinzika." 
Matthew24:25 Laba, mbalabudde." 
Matthew24:26 Kale bwe babagambanga nti, ‘Laba, ali mu ddungu;’ temufulumanga, ‘laba, ali mu bisenge munda;’ temukkirizanga." 
Matthew24:27 Kubanga ng'okumyansa bwe kuva ebuvanjuba, ne kulabikira ebugwanjuba; bwe kutyo bwe kuliba okujja kw'Omwana w'omuntu." 
Matthew24:28 Awaba omulambo wonna, awo ensega we zikuŋŋaanira.”" 
Matthew24:29 Naye amangu ago, oluvannyuma lw'ekibonyoobonyo eky'omu nnaku ezo enjuba erikwata ekizikiza, n'omwezi gulirekerawo okwaka, n'emmunyeenye zirigwa okuva mu ggulu, n'amaanyi ag'omu ggulu galinyeenyezebwa;" 
Matthew24:30 olwo akabonero ak'Omwana w'omuntu kalirabika ku ggulu, n'ebika byonna eby'ensi birikuba ebiwoobe, biriraba Omwana w'omuntu ng'ajjira ku bire eby'oku ggulu n'amaanyi n'ekitiibwa ekinene." 
Matthew24:31 Era alituma bamalayika be n'eddoboozi ddene ery'ekkondeere, nabo balikuŋŋaanya abalonde be okuva mu mpewo ennya, era n'okuva ku nkomerero y'eggulu emu n'okutuusa ku nkomerero yaalyo endala." 
Matthew24:32 Okuva ku muti omutiini muguyigireko bino; ettabi lyagwo bwe ligejja, amalagala ne gatojjera, mutegeera ng'obudde bw'ekyeya bunaatera okutuuka;" 
Matthew24:33 bwe mutyo nammwe, mu ngeri y'emu bwe mulabanga ebigambo ebyo byonna, mutegeere nti ali kumpi, ali awo ku luggi." 
Matthew24:34 Mazima mbagamba nti emirembe gino tegiriggwaawo, okutuusa ebyo byonna lwe biribeerawo." 
Matthew24:35 Eggulu n'ensi biriggwaawo, naye ebigambo byange tebiriggweerawo ddala." 
Matthew24:36 Naye eby'olunaku luli n'ekiseera, tewali abimanyi, newakubadde bamalayika ab'omu ggulu, newakubadde Omwana, wabula Kitange yekka." 
Matthew24:37 Naye nga bwe kyali mu nnaku za Nuuwa, bwe kityo bwe kiriba mu kujja kw'Omwana w'omuntu." 
Matthew24:38 Kuba nga bwe baali ku nnaku ezo ezaasooka nga amataba tegannabaawo, baali nga balya nga banywa, nga bawasa era nga bawayiza, okutuuka ku lunaku Nuuwa lwe yayingira mu lyato," 
Matthew24:39 ne batamanya okutuusa amataba lwe gajja, ne gabasaanyaawo bonna; bwe kutyo bwe kuliba okujja kw'Omwana w'omuntu." 
Matthew24:40 Mu biro ebyo abasajja babiri (2), baliba mu kyalo; omu alitwalibwa, n'omulala alirekebwa." 
Matthew24:41 Abakazi babiri (2) baliba nga basa ku lubengo; omu alitwalibwa, n'omulala alirekebwa." 
Matthew24:42 Kale mutunule; kubanga temumanyi lunaku bwe luli Mukama wammwe lw'alijjirako. 
Matthew24:43 Naye kino mukitegeere nti Alina enju ye singa amanya ekisisimuka bwe kiri omubbi ky'anajjiramu, yanditunudde, teyandirese nnyumba ye kusimibwa." 
Matthew24:44 Mukale nammwe mweteeketeeke; kubanga Omwana w'omuntu alijjira mu kiseera kye mutamusuubiriramu. 
Matthew24:45 “Kale aluwa nate omuddu oyo omwesigwa ow'amagezi, mukama we gwe yasigira ab'omu nju ye, okubawanga emmere yaabwe mu kiseera kyayo?" 
Matthew24:46 Omuddu oyo alina omukisa, mukama we bw'alijja gw'alisanga ng'akola bw'atyo." 
Matthew24:47 Mazima mbagamba nti alimusigira ebintu bye byonna. 
Matthew24:48 Naye omuddu oyo omubi bw'aligamba mu mutima gwe nti Mukama wange aludde; 
Matthew24:49 era bw'alisooka okukuba baddu banne, n'okulya n'okunywera awamu n'abatamiivu;" 
Matthew24:50 mukama w'omuddu oyo alijjira ku lunaku lw'atamusuubirirako, ne mu kiseera ky'atamanyi," 
Matthew24:51 alimutemamu ebitundu bibiri, alimuwa omugabo gwe awamu ne bannanfuusi, omwo mwe muliba okukaaba n'okulumwa obujiji.”" 
Matthew25:1 “Mu biro ebyo obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bulifaananyizibwa n'abawala ekkumi (10), abaakwata ettabaaza zaabwe, ne bagenda okwaniriza awasa omugole." 
Matthew25:2 Naye bannaabwe abataano (5) baali basirusiru, n'abataano (5) be baalina amagezi." 
Matthew25:3 Kubanga abasirusiru, bwe baatwala ettabaaza zaabwe, ne bateetwalira mafuta;" 
Matthew25:4 naye abalina amagezi ne batwala amafuta mu macupa gaabwe wamu n'ettabaaza zaabwe. 
Matthew25:5 Awasa omugole bwe yalwayo, bonna ne babongoota ne beebaka." 
Matthew25:6 Naye ekiro mu ttumbi ne waba oluyoogaano nti, ‘Laba, awasa omugole ajja! Mufulume okumusisinkana.’" 
Matthew25:7 Abawala bonna ekkumi (10) ne balyoka bagolokoka, ne balongoosa ettabaaza zaabwe." 
Matthew25:8 Abasirusiru ne bagamba abalina amagezi nti, ‘Mutuwe ku mafuta gammwe; kubanga ettabaaza zaffe ziggweerera.’" 
Matthew25:9 Naye abaalina amagezi ne baddamu, ne babagamba nti, ‘mpozzi tegaatumale fenna nammwe: waakiri mugende eri abatunda, mwegulireyo.’" 
Matthew25:10 Abawala abasirusiru bwe baali bagenda okugula amafuta, awasa omugole n'atuuka; abo abaali beeteeseteese ne bayingira naye mu mbaga ey'obugole; oluggi ne luggalwawo." 
Matthew25:11 Oluvannyuma abawala bali abasirusiru nabo ne bajja, ne bagamba nti, ‘Mukama waffe, mukama waffe, tuggulirewo.’" 
Matthew25:12 Naye Ye n'addamu n'agamba nti, ‘Mazima mbagamba nti sibamanyi.’" 
Matthew25:13 Kale mutunule, kubanga temumanyi lunaku newakubadde ekiseera.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Obwakabaka obw'omuggulu bufaananako ng'omuntu eyali agenda okutambula mu nsi endala, n'ayita abaddu be, n'abalekera ebintu bye." 
Matthew25:15 N'awa omu ettalanta ttaano, omulala bbiri, omulala emu buli muntu ng'obusobozi bwe bwe bwali; n'agenda." 
Matthew25:16 Amangwago oli eyaweebwa ettalanta ettaano n'agenda n'azisuubuzisa n'aviisaamu ettalanta ttaano endala. 
Matthew25:17 Bw'atyo n'oli eyaweebwa ettalanta ebbiri, n'aviisaamu bbiri endala." 
Matthew25:18 Naye oli eyaweebwa emu n'agenda n'asima ekinnya mu ttaka, n'akwekamu effeeza ya mukama we." 
Matthew25:19 Awo nga wayiseewo ebbanga ggwanvu, mukama w'abaddu abo n'akomawo, n'abala nabo omuwendo." 
Matthew25:20 Omuddu eyaweebwa ettalanta ettaano n'ajja n'aleeta ettalanta ettaano endala, n'agamba nti, ‘Mukama wange, wandekera ettalanta ttaano; laba, n'aviisaamu ettalanta ttaano endala.’" 
Matthew25:21 Mukama we n'amugamba nti, ‘Weebale, oli muddu mulungi mwesigwa; wali mwesigwa mu bitono, ndikusigira ebingi, yingira mu ssanyu lya mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:22 N'oli eyaweebwa ettalanta ebbiri n'ajja n'agamba nti, ‘Mukama wange, wandekera ettalanta bbiri; laba, n'aviisaamu ettalanta bbiri endala.’" 
Matthew25:23 Mukama we n'amugamba nti, ‘Weebale, oli muddu mulungi mwesigwa; wali mwesigwa mu bitono, ndikusigira ebingi, yingira mu ssanyu lya mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:24 N'oli eyaweebwa ettalanta emu n'ajja n'agamba nti, ‘Mukama wange, nakumanya ng'oli muntu mukakanyavu ng'okungulira gy'otaasigira, ng'okuŋŋaanyiza gy'otaayiyira;" 
Matthew25:25 ne ntya, ne ŋŋenda, ne ngikweka mu ttaka ettalanta yo, laba, eyiyo yino.’" 
Matthew25:26 Naye mukama we n'addamu n'amugamba nti, ‘Oli muddu mubi mugayaavu! wamanya nti nkungulira gye ssaasigira, nkuŋŋaanyiza gye ssaayiyira;" 
Matthew25:27 kale kyakugwanira okugiwa abasuubuzi effeeza yange, nange bwe nnandizze nandiweereddwa eyange n'amagoba gaamu." 
Matthew25:28 Kale mumuggyeeko ettalanta, mugiwe oli alina ettalanta ekkumi (10)." 
Matthew25:29 Kubanga buli muntu alina aliweebwa, era aliba na bingi; naye atalina, aliggibwako na kiri kyali nakyo." 
Matthew25:30 N'omuddu oyo ataliiko ky'agasa mumusuule mu kizikiza eky'ebweru; mwe muliba okukaaba n'okulumwa obujiji.’ ” 
Matthew25:31 “Naye Omwana w'omuntu bw'alijjira mu kitiibwa kye, ne bamalayika bonna nga bali naye, awo alituula ku ntebe ey'ekitiibwa kye." 
Matthew25:32 Amawanga gonna galikuŋŋaanyizibwa mu maaso ge; naye alibaawulamu ng'omusumba bw'ayawula endiga n'embuzi," 
Matthew25:33 endiga aliziteeka ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, naye embuzi ku mukono ogwa kkono." 
Matthew25:34 Awo Kabaka aligamba abali ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo nti, ‘Mujje, mmwe Kitange be yawa omukisa, musikire obwakabaka obwabateekerwateekerwa okuva ku kutonda ensi;" 
Matthew25:35 kubanga nnalina enjala ne mumpa eky'okulya, nnalina ennyonta ne munnywesa, nnali mugenyi ne munsuza;" 
Matthew25:36 nnali bwereere ne munnyambaza, nnali mulwadde ne munnambula, nnali musibe mu kkomera, ne mujja mundaba.’" 
Matthew25:37 Awo abatuukirivu balimuddamu nga bagamba nti, ‘Mukama waffe, twakulaba ddi ng'olina enjala ne tukuliisa? Oba ng'olina ennyonta ne tukunywesa?" 
Matthew25:38 Era twakulaba ddi ng'oli mugenyi ne tukusuza? Oba ng'oli bwereere ne tukwambaza? 
Matthew25:39 Era twakulaba ddi ng'oli mulwadde, oba ng'oli mu kkomera, ne tujja tukulaba?’" 
Matthew25:40 Ne Kabaka aliddamu alibagamba nti, ‘Mazima mbagamba nti Nga bwe mwakola omu ku abo baganda bange abasinga obuto, mwakikola nze.’" 
Matthew25:41 Awo alibagamba n'abo abali ku mukono gwe ogwa kkono nti, ‘Muveewo we ndi, mmwe abaakolimirwa, mugende mu muliro ogutaggwaawo ogwateekerwateekerwa Setaani ne bamalayika be;" 
Matthew25:42 kubanga nnalina enjala, temwampa kya kulya; nnalina ennyonta, temwannywesa," 
Matthew25:43 nnali mugenyi, temwansuza, nnali bwereere, temwannyambaza, mulwadde, ne mu kkomera, temwannambula.’" 
Matthew25:44 Awo nabo baliddamu, nga bagamba nti, ‘Mukama waffe, twakulaba ddi ng'olina enjala, oba ng'olina ennyonta, oba mugenyi, oba bwereere, oba mulwadde, oba mu kkomera, ne tutakuyamba?’" 
Matthew25:45 Awo alibaddamu, ng'agamba nti, ‘Mazima mbagamba nti Nga bwe mutaakikolera omu ku abo abasinga obuto, temwakikolera nze.’" 
Matthew25:46 Olwo abo baligenda ne baweebwa ekibonerezo ekitaggwaawo; naye abatuukirivu baligenda mu bulamu obutaggwaawo.” 
Matthew26:1 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo byonna, n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti," 
Matthew26:2 “Mumanyi nti oluvannyuma lw'ennaku bbiri walibaawo Okuyitako, n'Omwana w'omuntu aliweebwayo okukomererwa.”" 
Matthew26:3 Awo bakabona abakulu n'abakadde b'abantu ne bakuŋŋaanira mu kigango kya kabona asinga obukulu, eyayitibwanga Kayaafa;" 
Matthew26:4 ne bateeseeza wamu okukwata Yesu mu magezi; bamutte. 
Matthew26:5 Naye ne bagamba nti, “Tuleme okumukwatira ku lunaku olukulu, abantu baleme okwegugunga.”" 
Matthew26:6 Awo Yesu bwe yali mu Bessaniya, mu nju ya Simooni omugenge," 
Matthew26:7 omukazi n'ajja gy'ali, eyalina eccupa ey'amafuta ag'omugavu ag'omuwendo omungi ennyo, n'agamufuka ku mutwe, ng'atudde alya." 
Matthew26:8 Naye abayigirizwa bwe baalaba, ne banyiiga ne bagamba nti, “Gafudde ki gano?" 
Matthew26:9 Kubanga gano singa gatundiddwa gandivuddemu ensimbi nnyingi, ne zigabirwa abaavu.”" 
Matthew26:10 Naye Yesu bwe yategeera n'abagamba nti, “Mumunakuwaliza ki omukazi? Kubanga ankoze ekigambo ekirungi." 
Matthew26:11 Kubanga abaavu be muli nabo bulijjo; naye nze temuli nange bulijjo. 
Matthew26:12 Kubanga bw'afuse amafuta gano ku mubiri gwange, anziraze okunziika." 
Matthew26:13 Mazima mbagamba nti Enjiri eno buli gy'eneebuulirwanga mu nsi zonna, n'ekyo omukazi ono ky'akoze kinaayogerwangako okumujjukira.”" 
Matthew26:14 Awo omu ku bayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri (12), eyayitibwanga Yuda Isukalyoti, n'agenda eri bakabona abakulu," 
Matthew26:15 n'abagamba nti, “Mukkiriza kumpa ki, nange ndimuwaayo gye muli?” Ne bamusasula ebitundu bya ffeeza asatu (30)." 
Matthew26:16 Okuva mu kiseera ekyo Yuda n'asookera awo okunoonya ebbanga bw'anaamuwaayo. 
Matthew26:17 Awo ku lunaku olusooka olw'Embaga eriirwako emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, abayigirizwa ne bajja eri Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti, “Oyagala tuteekereteekere wa Okuyitako gy'on'okuliira?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mugende mu kibuga ewa gundi, mumugambe nti, ‘Omuyigiriza agambye nti Ekiseera kyange kinaatera okutuuka; ewuwo gye nnaaliira Okuyitako n'abayigirizwa bange.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Abayigirizwa be ne bakola nga Yesu bw'abalagidde; ne bateekateeka Okuyitako. 
Matthew26:20 Awo obudde bwe bwawungeera, Yesu n'atuula okulya n'abayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri (12)." 
Matthew26:21 Baali balya, Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mazima mbagamba nti omu ku mmwe anandyamu olukwe.”" 
Matthew26:22 Abayigirizwa ne banakuwala nnyo, ne batanula kinnoomu okumubuuza nti, “Mukama wange, ye nze?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yesu n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Oyo akozezza awamu nange mu kibya, ye anandyamu olukwe.”" 
Matthew26:24 “Omwana w'omuntu agenda, nga bwe kyamuwandiikibwako; naye zisanze omuntu oyo anaalyamu olukwe Omwana w'omuntu! kyandibadde kirungi singa omuntu oyo teyazaalibwa.”" 
Matthew26:25 Yuda, eyamulyamu olukwe, n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Labbi, ye nze?” Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Ggwe oyogedde.”" 
Matthew26:26 Era baali bakyalya, Yesu n'atoola omugaati, ne yeebaza, n'agumenyamu; n'awa abayigirizwa, n'agamba nti, “Mutoole, mulye; guno gwe mubiri gwange.”" 
Matthew26:27 Ate n'atoola ekikompe, ne yeebaza, n'abawa ng'agamba nti, “Munywe ku kino mwenna;" 
Matthew26:28 kubanga kino gwe musaayi gwange ogw'endagaano, oguyiika ku lw'abangi olw'okuggyawo ebibi." 
Matthew26:29 Naye mbagamba nti Sirinywa n'akatono okusooka leero ku guno ogubala ku muzabbibu, okutuusa ku lunaku luli lwe ndigunywa omuggya awamu nammwe mu bwakabaka bwa Kitange.”" 
Matthew26:30 Bwe baamala okuyimba ne bafuluma okugenda ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni. 
Matthew26:31 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mmwe mwenna muneesittala ku lwange ekiro kino; kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘Ndikuba omusumba, n'endiga ez'omu kisibo zirisaasaanyizibwa.’" 
Matthew26:32 Naye bwe ndimala okuzuukizibwa, ndibakulembera okugenda e Ggaliraaya.”" 
Matthew26:33 Naye Peetero n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Abalala bonna bwe baneesittala ku lulwo, nze seesittale n'akatono.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Mazima nkugamba nti Mu kiro kino, enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, ononneegaana emirundi esatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Peetero n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Newakubadde nga kiŋŋwanira okufiira awamu naawe, siikwegaane n'akatono.” N'abayigirizwa abalala bonna ne boogera bwe batyo." 
Matthew26:36 Awo Yesu n'agenda n'abayigirizwa be mu kifo ekiyitibwa Gesusemane, Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Mutuule wano, nze ŋŋende eri nsabe.”" 
Matthew26:37 N'atwala Peetero n'abaana ba Zebbedaayo bombi, n'atandika okunakuwala n'okweraliikirira ennyo." 
Matthew26:38 Awo n'abagamba nti, “Omwoyo gwange guliko ennaku ya kitalo, egenda kunzita; mubeere wano, mutunule wamu nange.”" 
Matthew26:39 N'atambulako katono, n'avuunama, n'asaba, n'agamba nti, “Ayi Kitange, oba kiyinzika ekikompe kino kinveeko; naye si nga nze bwe njagala, wabula nga ggwe bw'oyagala.”" 
Matthew26:40 N'adda eri abayigirizwa, n'abasanga nga beebase, n'agamba Peetero nti, “Kazzi temuyinzizza kutunula nange n'essaawa emu?" 
Matthew26:41 Mutunule musabe, muleme okuyingira mu kukemebwa; omwoyo gwo gwagala naye omubiri gwe munafu.”" 
Matthew26:42 Era n'agenda omulundi ogwokubiri, n'asaba, ng'agamba nti, “Ayi Kitange, oba nga kino tekiyinza kunvaako, wabula nze okukinywa, ky'oyagala kikolebwe.”" 
Matthew26:43 Awo n'ajja nate n'abasanga nga beebase, kubanga amaaso gaabwe gaali gakambira." 
Matthew26:44 Yesu n'abaleka nate, n'agenda, n'asaba omulundi ogwokusatu, n'ayogera nate ebigambo bimu na biri ebyasooka." 
Matthew26:45 Awo n'ajja eri abayigirizwa, n'abagamba nti, “Era mukyebase n'okuwumulira ddala? Mulabe ekiseera kituuse, n'Omwana w'omuntu aweereddwayo mu mikono gy'abalina ebibi." 
Matthew26:46 Muyimuke tugende; laba, andyamu olukwe anaatera okutuuka.”" 
Matthew26:47 Awo Yesu yali akyayogera, laba, Yuda, omu ku bayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri (12), n'ajja ng'alina ekibiina ekinene ekirina ebitala n'emiggo, nga bava eri bakabona abakulu n'abakadde b'abantu." 
Matthew26:48 Naye oyo eyalya mu Yesu olukwe yabawa akabonero, ng'agamba nti, “Omuntu gwe nnaanywegera, nga ye wuuyo; mumukwate.”" 
Matthew26:49 Amangwago Yuda n'ajja awali Yesu, n'agamba nti, “Mirembe, Labbi!” N'amunywegera nnyo." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Munnange, kola ky'ojjiridde.” Awo ne bajja, ne bavumbagira Yesu ne bamukwata ne bamunyweza." 
Matthew26:51 Laba, omu ku abo abaali ne Yesu, n'agolola omukono, n'asowola ekitala kye, n'atema omuddu wa kabona asinga obukulu, n'amusalako okutu." 
Matthew26:52 Awo Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Ekitala kyo kizze mu kifo kyakyo; kubanga abo bonna abakwata ekitala balifa kitala." 
Matthew26:53 Olowooza nti ssiyinza kwegayirira Kitange, naye n'ampeereza kaakano bamalayika abasoba mu liigyoni ekkumi n'ebbiri (12)?" 
Matthew26:54 Kale binaatuukirira bitya ebyawandiikibwa nti kigwanira okuba bwe bityo?” 
Matthew26:55 Mu kiseera ekyo Yesu n'agamba ebibiina nti, “Muzze okunkwata nga mulina ebitala n'emiggo ng'abajjiridde omunyazi? Nnatuulanga buli lunaku mu Yeekaalu nga njigiriza, ne mutankwata." 
Matthew26:56 Naye bino byonna bikoleddwa, bannabbi bye baawandiika bituukirizibwe.” Awo abayigirizwa be bonna ne bamwabulira, ne badduka." 
Matthew26:57 Awo bali abaakwata Yesu, ne bamutwala ewa Kayaafa kabona asinga obukulu, abawandiisi n'abakadde gye baali bakuŋŋaanidde." 
Matthew26:58 Naye Peetero yagoberera Yesu ng'amuvaako emabega wala, okutuuka mu kigango kya kabona asinga obukulu, n'ayingira munda, n'atuula n'abaweereza, alabe we binakkira." 
Matthew26:59 Naye bakabona abakulu n'ab'omu lukiiko bonna ne banoonya obujulirwa obw'obulimba ku Yesu, balyoke bamutte;" 
Matthew26:60 ne batabulaba, newakubadde ng'abajulirwa ab'obulimba bangi abajja. Naye oluvannyuma ne wajjawo babiri (2)," 
Matthew26:61 ne bagamba nti, “Ono yagamba nti, ‘Nnyinza okumenya Yeekaalu ya Katonda, n'okugizimbira ennaku ssatu (3).’”" 
Matthew26:62 Awo Kabona asinga obukulu n'ayimirira, n'amubuuza nti, “Toyanukula n'akatono? Kigambo ki bano kye bakulumiriza?”" 
Matthew26:63 Naye Yesu n'asirika. Kabona asinga obukulu n'amugamba nti, “Nkulayiza Katonda omulamu, tubuulire oba nga ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Oyogedde, naye mbagamba nti Okusooka leero muliraba Omwana w'omuntu ng'atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'amaanyi, era ng'ajjira ku bire eby'eggulu.”" 
Matthew26:65 Awo kabona asinga obukulu n'ayuza ebyambalo bye, n'agamba nti, “Avvodde Katonda, twagalira ki nate abajulirwa? Laba, muwulidde kaakano obuvvoozi bwe." 
Matthew26:66 Mulowooza mutya?” Ne baddamu ne bagamba nti, “Agwanidde kufa.”" 
Matthew26:67 Awo ne bamuwandira amalusu mu maaso ge, ne bamukuba ebikonde; abalala ne bamukuba empi," 
Matthew26:68 nga bagamba nti, “Tulagule, Kristo, ani akukubye?”" 
Matthew26:69 Naye Peetero yali atudde bweru mu kigango, omuwala n'ajja gy'ali, n'amugamba nti, “Naawe wali wamu ne Yesu Omugaliraaya.”" 
Matthew26:70 Naye Peetero ne yeegaanira mu maaso ga bonna, ng'agamba nti, “Ky'ogamba sikimanyi.”" 
Matthew26:71 Naye bwe yafuluma okutuuka mu kisasi, omuwala omulala n'amulaba n'agamba abantu abaali awo nti, “N'ono yali wamu ne Yesu Omunazaaleesi.”" 
Matthew26:72 Peetero ne yeegaana nate, n'alayira nti, “Omuntu oyo simumanyi.”" 
Matthew26:73 Ne wayitawo ebbanga ttono, abaali bayimiridde awo ne bajja ne bagamba Peetero nti, “Mazima naawe oli munnaabwe; kubanga enjogera yo ekuloopa.”" 
Matthew26:74 Awo Peetero n'atandika okukolima n'okulayira nti, “Omuntu oyo simumanyi.” Amangwago enkoko n'ekookolima." 
Matthew26:75 Peetero n'ajjukira ekigambo Yesu kye yagamba nti, “Enkoko eneeba tennaba kukookolima ononneegaana emirundi esatu (3).” Awo Peetero n'afuluma ebweru, n'akaaba nnyo amaziga." 
Matthew27:1 Awo obudde bwe bwakya, bakabona abakulu bonna n'abakadde b'abantu ne bateeseeza wamu ku by'okutta Yesu;" 
Matthew27:2 ne bamusiba, ne bamutwala, ne bamuwaayo eri Piraato owessaza." 
Matthew27:3 Awo Yuda, eyalya mu Yesu olukwe, bwe yalaba nga Yesu omusango gumusinze, ne yejjusa, n'addiza bakabona abakulu n'abakadde ebitundu ebyo asatu (30) ebya ffeeza," 
Matthew27:4 nga bw'agamba nti, “Nnayonoona okulyamu olukwe omusaayi ogutalina kabi.” Naye bo ne bamugamba nti, “Guno guli ku ffe? Musango gwo.”" 
Matthew27:5 Effeeza n'azisuula mu Yeekaalu, n'afuluma, n'agenda yeetuga." 
Matthew27:6 Naye bakabona abakulu ne batwala ebitundu biri ebya ffeeza, ne bagamba nti, “Kya muzizo okubiteeka mu ggwanika lya Katonda, kubanga muwendo gwa musaayi.”" 
Matthew27:7 Ne bateesa, ne bazigulamu olusuku lw'omubumbi, okuziikangamu abagenyi." 
Matthew27:8 Olusuku luli kyeruva luyitibwa olusuku lw'omusaayi, ne kaakano." 
Matthew27:9 Awo n'ekituukirira ekyayogerwa nnabbi Yeremiya ng'agamba nti, “Ne batwala ebitundu ebya ffeeza asatu (30), omuwendo abantu abamu ku baana ba Isiraeri gwe baamulamulamu;" 
Matthew27:10 ne babigulamu olusuku lw'omubumbi, nga Mukama bwe yandagira.”" 
Matthew27:11 Awo Yesu n'ayimirira mu maaso g'owessaza; owessaza n'amubuuza ng'agamba nti, “Ggwe Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?” Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Oyogedde.”" 
Matthew27:12 Wadde Bakabona abakulu n'abakadde baamuloopa, naye ye n'ataddamu n'akatono." 
Matthew27:13 Awo Piraato n'amugamba nti, “Towulira bigambo bino byonna bye bakulumiriza bwe biri?”" 
Matthew27:14 Naye Yesu teyamuddamu na kigambo na kimu; owessaza n'okwewuunya ne yeewuunya nnyo. 
Matthew27:15 Naye ku mbaga ejjukirirwako Okuyitako, ow'essaza yalina empisa okusumululiranga ekibiina omusibe omu, gwe baayagalanga." 
Matthew27:16 Era mu biro ebyo baalina omusibe eyali amanyiddwa ennyo ayitibwa Balaba. 
Matthew27:17 Awo bwe baakuŋŋaana, Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Aluwa gwe mwagala mbasumululire? Balaba, oba Yesu ayitibwa Kristo?”" 
Matthew27:18 Kubanga yamanya nga bamuweesezzaayo buggya. 
Matthew27:19 Naye bwe yatuula ku ntebe esaalirwako emisango, mukazi we n'amutumira, ng'agamba nti, “Omuntu oyo omutuukirivu tomukolako kabi n'akatono, kubanga olwaleero nnalumiddwa bingi mu kirooto ku lulwe.”" 
Matthew27:20 Naye bakabona abakulu n'abakadde ne bafukuutirira ebibiina okusaba Balaba, bazikirize Yesu." 
Matthew27:21 Naye owessaza n'addamu n'ababuuza nti, “Ku abo bombi aluwa gwe mwagala mbasumululire?” Ne baddamu nti, “Balaba.”" 
Matthew27:22 Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Kale nnaakola ntya Yesu ayitibwa Kristo?” Bonna ne baddamu nti, “Akomererwe.”" 
Matthew27:23 Piraato n'ababuuza nti, “Lwaki? Ekibi ky'akoze kiruwa?” Naye ne bakaayana nnyo, ne bagamba nti, “Akomererwe.”" 
Matthew27:24 Naye Piraato bwe yalaba nga taasobole n'akatono, era nga bayinze okukaayana, n'addira amazzi, n'anaaba mu ngalo mu maaso g'ekibiina ng'agamba nti, “Nze siriiko kabi olw'omusaayi gw'omuntu ono omutuukirivu; musango gwammwe.”" 
Matthew27:25 Abantu bonna ne baddamu ne bagamba nti, “Omusaayi gwe gubeere ku ffe, ne ku baana baffe.”" 
Matthew27:26 Awo Piraato n'abasumululira Balaba, naye Yesu n'amukuba enkoba n'alyoka amuwaayo okukomererwa." 
Matthew27:27 Awo basserikale b'owessaza ne batwala Yesu mu kigango eky'emisango, ne bamukuŋŋaanyizaako ekitongole kyonna." 
Matthew27:28 Ne bamwambulamu engoye ze, ne bamwambaza olugoye olumyufu." 
Matthew27:29 Ne baluka engule ey'amaggwa, ne bagissa ku mutwe gwe, ne bamukwasa n'olumuli mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo; ne bafukamira mu maaso ge, ne bamuduulira, nga bagamba nti, “Mirembe, Kabaka w'Abayudaaya!”" 
Matthew27:30 Ne bamuwandira amalusu, ne batoola olumuli luli ne bamukuba mu mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Awo bwe baamala okumuduulira, ne bamwambulamu olugoye luli olumyufu, ne bamwambaza ebyambalo bye, ne bamutwala okumukomerera." 
Matthew27:32 Awo bwe baali bafuluma, ne basisinkana omusajja Omukuleene, erinnya lye Simooni; ne bamuwaliriza oyo yeetikke omusalaba gwa Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Gologoosa, amakulu gaakyo kifo kya kiwanga," 
Matthew27:34 ne bawa Yesu omwenge okunywa ogutabuddwamu omususa; naye bwe yalegako, n'atayagala kunywa." 
Matthew27:35 Bwe baamala okumukomerera, ne bagabana ebyambalo bye, nga bakuba akalulu;" 
Matthew27:36 ne batuula awo ne bamukuuma. 
Matthew27:37 Ne bassa waggulu ku mutwe gwe omusango ogumuvunaanibwa, nga guwandiikiddwa nti, “ONO YE YESU KABAKA W'ABAYUDAAYA.”" 
Matthew27:38 Awo abanyazi babiri (2) ne bakomererwa naye, omu ku mukono ogwa ddyo, n'omulala ku gwa kkono." 
Matthew27:39 N'abantu abaali bayitawo ne bamuvuma, nga banyeenya emitwe gyabwe," 
Matthew27:40 nga bagamba nti, “Ggwe amenya Yeekaalu, n'ogizimbira ennaku essatu (3), weerokole! oba nga oli Mwana wa Katonda, va ku musalaba okke.”" 
Matthew27:41 Bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi n'abakadde ne baduula bwe batyo, nga bagamba nti," 
Matthew27:42 “ Yalokolanga balala; tayinza kwerokola yekka. Ye Kabaka wa Isiraeri; ave kaakano ku musalaba, naffe tunaamukkiriza.”" 
Matthew27:43 “Yeesiga Katonda; amulokole kaakano, oba amwagala, kubanga yagamba nti, ‘Ndi Mwana wa Katonda.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Abanyazi abaakomererwa naye era nabo ne bamuvuma bwe batyo. 
Matthew27:45 Awo okuva ku ssaawa ey'omukaaga kyali kizikiza ku nsi yonna okutuuka ku ssaawa ey'omwenda. 
Matthew27:46 Obudde bwe bwatuuka ng'essaawa ey'omwenda Yesu n'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene, ng'agamba nti, “Eri, Eri, lama sabakusaani?” Amakulu gaakyo nti, “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, kiki ekikundesezza?”" 
Matthew27:47 Abamu ku baali bayimiridde awo, bwe baawulira, ne bagamba nti, “Omusajja ono ayita Eriya.”" 
Matthew27:48 Amangwago munnaabwe omu n'adduka, n'atoola ekisuumwa, n'akijjuza omwenge omukaatuufu, n'akissa ku lumuli, n'amunywesa." 
Matthew27:49 Naye abalala ne bagamba nti, “Leka tulabe oba nga Eriya anajja okumulokola.”" 
Matthew27:50 Naye Yesu n'ayogerera nate waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene, n'ata omwoyo gwe." 
Matthew27:51 Laba, olutimbe olwali mu Yeekaalu ne luyulikamu wabiri okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi; ensi n'ekankana; enjazi ne zaatika;" 
Matthew27:52 entaana ne zibikkuka; emirambo mingi egy'abatukuvu abaali beebase ne gizuukizibwa; 
Matthew27:53 ne bava mu ntaana. Yesu bwe yamala okuzuukira, ne bayingira mu kibuga ekitukuvu, abantu bangi ne ba balaba." 
Matthew27:54 Naye omwami w'ekitongole, na bali abaali naye nga bakuuma Yesu, bwe baalaba ekikankano, n'ebigambo ebibaddewo, ne batya nnyo, ne bagamba nti, “Mazima ono abadde Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Matthew27:55 Waaliwo n'abakazi bangi abaayitanga ne Yesu okuva e Ggaliraaya, era abaamuweerezanga abaayimirira ewalako nga balengera;" 
Matthew27:56 mu abo mwalimu Malyamu Magudaleene, ne Malyamu nnyina Yakobo ne Yose, ne nnyina w'abaana ba Zebbedaayo." 
Matthew27:57 Naye obudde bwali buwungeera, omusajja omugagga, eyava Alimasaya, erinnya lye Yusufu najja, era naye yali muyigirizwa wa Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 Oyo n'agenda eri Piraato, n'asaba omulambo gwa Yesu. Awo Piraato n'alagira okugumuwa." 
Matthew27:59 Yusufu n'atwala omulambo, n'aguzinga mu bafuta enjeru," 
Matthew27:60 n'aguteeka mu ntaana ye empya, gye yasima mu lwazi; n'ayiringisa ejjinja ddene n'alissa ku mulyango gw'entaana, n'agenda." 
Matthew27:61 Malyamu Magudaleene, ne Malyamu omulala, baali nga batudde awo mu maaso g'entaana." 
Matthew27:62 Naye enkeera, lwe lunaku olwaddirira olw'okuteekateeka, bakabona abakulu n'Abafalisaayo ne bakuŋŋaanira ewa Piraato," 
Matthew27:63 ne bagamba nti, “Omwami, tujjukidde omulimba oyo ng'akyali mulamu, yagamba nti, ‘Ennaku bwe ziriyitawo essatu ndizuukira.’" 
Matthew27:64 Kale nno lagira bakuumire ddala entaana okutuusa ku lunaku olwokusatu, abayigirizwa be baleme kujja kumubbamu, bagambe abantu nti, ‘Azuukidde mu bafu,’ era okukyama okw'oluvannyuma kulisinga kuli okwasooka.”" 
Matthew27:65 Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Mulina abakuumi; mugende, mugakuumire ddala nga bwe muyinza.”" 
Matthew27:66 Nabo ne bagenda, ne bagakuumira ddala entaana, ejjinja ne balissaako akabonero, ne balekawo abakuumi." 
Matthew28:1 Awo olunaku olwa ssabbiiti bwe lwali lugenda okuggwaako, ng'olunaku olwolubereberye mu nnaku omusanvu lunaatera okukya, Malyamu Magudaleene ne Malyamu omulala ne bagenda okulaba entaana." 
Matthew28:2 Laba, ne wabaawo ekikankano ekinene ku nsi; kubanga malayika wa Mukama yava mu ggulu, n'ajja n'ayiringisa ejjinja n'aliggyawo, era n'alituulako." 
Matthew28:3 Naye ekifaananyi kye kyali nga kumyansa, n'engoye ze zaali zitukula ng'omuzira." 
Matthew28:4 era entiisa ye n'ekankanya abakuumi, ne baba ng'abafudde." 
Matthew28:5 Naye malayika n'agamba abakazi nti, “Mmwe temutya; kubanga mmanyi nga munoonya Yesu eyakomererwa." 
Matthew28:6 Tali wano; kubanga azuukidde, nga bwe yagamba. Mujje, mulabe ekifo we yagalamizibwa." 
Matthew28:7 Mugende mangu, mubuulire abayigirizwa be nti Azuukidde mu bafu; laba, abakulembera okugenda e Ggaliraaya; eyo gye mulimulabira, laba, mbabuulidde.”" 
Matthew28:8 Ne bava mangu ku ntaana, n'entiisa naye nga balina essanyu lingi, ne badduka okubuulira abayigirizwa be." 
Matthew28:9 Laba, Yesu n'abasisinkana, n'agamba nti, “Mirembe.” Ne bajja ne bakwata ku bigere bye, ne bamusinza." 
Matthew28:10 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Temutya, mugende mubuulire baganda bange bagende e Ggaliraaya, gye balindabira.”" 
Matthew28:11 Abakazi bwe baali bagenda, laba abakuumi abamu ne bajja mu kibuga, ne babuulira bakabona abakulu byonna ebibaddewo." 
Matthew28:12 Bakabona abakulu ne bakuŋŋaana wamu n'abakadde, ne bateesa wamu, ne bawa abasserikale effeeza nnyingi," 
Matthew28:13 ne babagamba nti, “Mugambanga nti, ‘Abayigirizwa be bajja ekiro, ne bamubba ffe nga twebase.’" 
Matthew28:14 Naye ekigambo kino bwe kiribuulirwa owessaza, ffe tulimuwooyawooya, nammwe tulibaggyako omusango.”" 
Matthew28:15 Abakuumi ne batwala ensimbi, ne bakola nga bwe baabagamba; ekigambo kino ne kibuna mu Bayudaaya, n'okutuusa leero." 
Matthew28:16 Awo abayigirizwa ekkumi n'omu (11) ne bagenda e Ggaliraaya ku lusozi Yesu gye yabalagira. 
Matthew28:17 Bwe baamulaba ne bamusinza; naye abalala ne babuusabuusa. 
Matthew28:18 Yesu n'ajja n'ayogera nabo, n'agamba nti, “Mpeereddwa obuyinza bwonna mu ggulu ne ku nsi." 
Matthew28:19 Kale mugende, mufuule abantu b'amawanga gonna abayigirizwa, nga mubabatiza okuyingira mu linnya lya Kitaffe n'Omwana n'Omwoyo Omutukuvu;" 
Matthew28:20 nga mubayigiriza okukwata byonna bye nnabalagira mmwe. Era, laba, nze ndi wamu nammwe ennaku zonna, okutuusa emirembe gino lwe giriggwaawo.”" 
Mark1:1 Okusooka kw'Enjiri ya Yesu Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda." 
Mark1:2 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nnabbi Isaaya nti, “Laba, nze ntuma omubaka wange mu maaso go, Alirongoosa oluguudo lwo;" 
Mark1:3 Eddoboozi lye ayogerera waggulu mu ddungu nti Mulongoose oluguudo lwa Mukama, Muluŋŋamye amakubo ge;”" 
Mark1:4 Yokaana Omubatiza yajja mu ddungu, n'abuulira okubatizibwa okw'okwenenya olw'okuggyibwako ebibi." 
Mark1:5 N'ensi yonna ey'e Buyudaaya n'ab'e Yerusaalemi bonna ne bavaayo ne bajja gy'ali n'ababatiza mu mugga Yoludaani nga baatula ebibi byabwe. 
Mark1:6 Ne Yokaana yayambalanga byoya bya ŋŋamira, ne yeesibanga olukoba lw'eddiba mu kiwato kye, ng'alya nzige n'omubisi gw'enjuki ez'omu nsiko." 
Mark1:7 N'abuulira ng'agamba nti, “Oluvannyuma lwange waliwo ajja, ye ansinga amaanyi, so sisaanira kukutama kutuggulula bukoba bwa ngatto ze." 
Mark1:8 Nze mbabatiza n'amazzi, naye oyo alibabatiza n'Omwoyo Omutukuvu.”" 
Mark1:9 Awo olwatuuka mu nnaku ezo Yesu n'ava e Nazaaleesi eky'e Ggaliraaya n'ajja n'abatizibwa Yokaana mu mugga Yoludaani. 
Mark1:10 Bwe yali yakava mu mazzi, amangwago Yesu n'alaba eggulu nga libikkuse n'Omwoyo ng'amukkako ng'ejjiba;" 
Mark1:11 n'eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti, “Ggwe Mwana wange gwe njagala, gwe nsanyukira ennyo.”" 
Mark1:12 Amangwago Omwoyo n'asindika Yesu mu ddungu. 
Mark1:13 N'abeera mu ddungu ennaku ana (40) ng'akemebwa Setaani; n'aba wamu n'ensolo; ne bamalayika nga bamuweereza. 
Mark1:14 Awo oluvannyuma Yokaana ng'amaze okusibwa mu kkomera, Yesu n'ajja e Ggaliraaya, ng'abuulira Enjiri ya Katonda," 
Mark1:15 ng'agamba nti, “Ekiseera kituuse, obwakabaka bwa Katonda busembedde, mwenenye, mukkirize Enjiri.”" 
Mark1:16 Bwe yali ng'ayita ku lubalama lw'ennyanja ey'e Ggaliraaya, Yesu n'alaba Simooni ne Andereya muganda we nga basuula obutimba mu nnyanja, kubanga baali bavubi." 
Mark1:17 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mujje muyite nange, ndibafuula abavubi b'abantu.”" 
Mark1:18 Amangwago ne baleka awo obutimba ne bamugoberera. 
Mark1:19 Bwe yasemberayo mu maaso katono, n'alaba Yakobo omwana wa Zebbedaayo ne Yokaana muganda we, abo bombi baali mu lyato nga baddaabiriza obutimba bwabwe." 
Mark1:20 Amangwago n'abayita: ne baleka awo kitaabwe Zebbedaayo mu lyato ng'ali n'abo abakolera empeera, ne bamugoberera." 
Mark1:21 Ne bayingira mu Kaperunawumu; amangwago ku lunaku lwa ssabbiiti n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro n'ayigiriza. 
Mark1:22 Ne bawuniikirira olw'okuyigiriza kwe: kubanga yabayigiriza nga nannyini buyinza, so si ng'abawandiisi." 
Mark1:23 Amangwago mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyabwe mwalimu omuntu aliko omwoyo omubi; 
Mark1:24 n'akaaba nga agamba nti, “ Otwagaza ki Yesu ow'e Nazaaleesi? Ozze kutuzikiriza? Nkumanyi ggwe, ggwe oli Mutukuvu wa Katonda.”" 
Mark1:25 Yesu n'amuboggolera ng'agamba nti, “Bunira, muveeko.”" 
Mark1:26 Awo omwoyo omubi ne gumusikambula ne gukaaba n'eddoboozi ddene ne gumuvaako. 
Mark1:27 Ne beewuunya bonna, ne beebuuzaganya nga bagamba nti, “Kiki kino? Kuyigiriza kuggya, alagira n'obuyinza n'emyoyo emibi ne gimuwulira!”" 
Mark1:28 Amangwago ettutumu lye ne libuna ensi yonna eriraanye Ggaliraaya. 
Mark1:29 Amangwago bwe baava mu kkuŋŋaaniro ne bagenda wamu ne Yakobo ne Yokaana mu nnyumba ya Simooni ne Andereya. 
Mark1:30 Awo nnyazaala wa Simooni yali ng'agalamidde ng'alwadde omusujja. Amangwago ne bamubuulira bw'ali. 
Mark1:31 N'ajja n'amukwata ku mukono n'amugolokosa, omusujja ne gumuwonako, n'abaweereza." 
Mark1:32 Awo olweggulo, enjuba ng'egudde, ne bamuleetera abalwadde bonna, n'abo abaaliko dayimooni." 
Mark1:33 Ekibuga kyonna ne kikuŋŋaanira ku wankaaki. 
Mark1:34 N'awonya bangi abaali balwadde endwadde nnyingi, n'agoba baddayimooni bangi, n'atabaganya kwogera kubanga baamumanya." 
Mark1:35 Awo mu makya ennyo, ng'obudde tebunnalaba, Yesu n'agolokoka n'afuluma, n'agenda mu kifo eteri bantu n'asabira eyo." 
Mark1:36 Simooni n'abo abaali naye ne bamugoberera," 
Mark1:37 ne bamulaba ne bamugamba nti, “Bonna bakunoonya.”" 
Mark1:38 N'abagamba nti, “Tugende awalala mu bibuga ebituliraanye, mbuulire n'eyo; kubanga ekyo kye nnajjirira.”" 
Mark1:39 N'ayingira mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe mu Ggaliraaya yonna, ng'abuulira ng'agoba baddayimooni." 
Mark1:40 Omugenge n'ajja gy'ali, ng'amwegayirira ng'amufukaamiridde, ng'amugamba nti, “Bw'oyagala, oyinza okunnongoosa.”" 
Mark1:41 N'amusaasira n'agolola omukono gwe n'amukwatako n'amugamba nti, “Njagala, longooka.”" 
Mark1:42 amangwago ebigenge bye ne bimuwonako n'alongooka. 
Mark1:43 N'amukuutira nnyo, amangwago n'amusiibula" 
Mark1:44 ng'amugamba nti, “Laba tobuulirako muntu; naye genda weeyanjule eri kabona, era oweeyo olw'okulongooka kwo ekyo Musa kye yalagira okukakasa abantu nti olongoose.”" 
Mark1:45 Naye n'afuluma, n'agenda nga akyogerako, ng'asaasaanya amawulire ago, ne Yesu n'atayinza kuyingira nate mu kibuga mu lwatu, naye n'abeera mu bifo ebyekusifu; n'abantu ne bajja gy'ali nga bava wonna wonna." 
Mark2:1 Awo ennaku bwe zaayitawo n'ayingira nate mu Kaperunawumu, ne kiwulirwa ng'ali mu nju." 
Mark2:2 Ne bakuŋŋaana bangi, ne wataba na kifo we bagya newakubadde mu mulyango: n'ababuulira ekigambo." 
Mark2:3 Ne bajja abaaleeta omulwadde akoozimbye nga bamwetisse abasajja bana. 
Mark2:4 Naye bwe baalemwa okumuyingiza olw'ekibiina, ne babikkula waggulu ku nnyumba we yali; ne bawummulawo ekituli ne bassa ekitanda akoozimbye kwe yali agalamidde." 
Mark2:5 Yesu bwe yalaba okukkiriza kwabwe n'agamba akoozimbye nti, “Mwana wange, ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Naye waaliwo abawandiisi abamu nga batudde ne balowooza mu mitima gyabwe 
Mark2:7 nti, “Ono kiki ekimwogeza bw'atyo? Avvoola! Ani ayinza okusonyiwa ebibi okuggyako Katonda?”" 
Mark2:8 Amangwago Yesu bwe yategeera mu mwoyo gwe nga be buuzaganya bwe batyo munda yaabwe n'abagamba nti, “Lwaki mwebuuzaganya bwe mutyo mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Mark2:9 Ekyangu kye kiruwa, okugamba akoozimbye nti, Ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa oba okugamba nti, Golokoka, weetikke ekitanda kyo, otambule?" 
Mark2:10 Naye mumanye nga Omwana w'omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi okusonyiwa ebibi,” n'agamba eyali akoozimbye nti," 
Mark2:11 “Nkugamba, Golokoka, weetikke ekitanda kyo, oddeyo mu nnyumba yo.”" 
Mark2:12 N'agolokoka, amangwago ne yeetikka ekitanda kye, n'afuluma nga bonna balaba. Awo bonna ne beewuunya ne bagulumiza Katonda nga bagamba nti, “Tetulabangako kintu bwe kiti.”" 
Mark2:13 Awo Yesu n'agenda nate ku lubalama lw'ennyanja; ekibiina ky'abantu ne kijja w'ali, n'abayigiriza." 
Mark2:14 Awo bwe yali ng'atambula ku lubalama, n'alaba Leevi omwana wa Alufaayo ng'atudde we yasoloolezanga omusolo, n'amugamba nti, “ Ngoberera.” N'agolokoka n'amugoberera." 
Mark2:15 Awo bwe yali ng'atudde mu nnyumba ya Leevi ng'alya, abawooza bangi n'abalina ebibi baali batudde ne Yesu n'abayigirizwa be: kubanga bangi abaali bamugoberedde." 
Mark2:16 Abawandiisi ab'omu Bafalisaayo bwe baamulaba Yesu ng'aliira wamu n'abalina ebibi n'abawooza, ne bagamba abayigirizwa be nti, “ Lwaki aliira wamu n'abawooza n'abalina ebibi?”" 
Mark2:17 Awo Yesu bwe yakiwulira n'abagamba nti, “Abalamu tebeetaaga musawo, wabula abalwadde. Sajja kuyita batuukirivu wabula abalina ebibi.”" 
Mark2:18 Awo abayigirizwa ba Yokaana n'ab'Abafalisaayo baali nga basiiba; ne bajja ne bamubuuza nti, “ Lwaki abayigirizwa ba Yokaana n'abayigirizwa b'Abafalisaayo basiiba, naye nga abayigirizwa bo tebasiiba?”" 
Mark2:19 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Abagenyi ba wasizza omugole bayinza batya akusiiba awasizza omugole ng'ali nabo? Bwe baba nga bakyali n'awasizza omugole, tebayinza kusiiba." 
Mark2:20 Naye ennaku zirituuka, awasizza omugole lw'alibaggibwako, ne balyoka basiiba ku lunaku olwo." 
Mark2:21 Tewali muntu atunga ekiwero eky'olugoye oluggya ku kyambalo ekikadde; bw'akola bwatyo ekiwero ekiggya kikutula ekikadde, ekituli ne kyeyongera." 
Mark2:22 Era tewali muntu afuka omwenge omusu mu nsawo ez'amaliba enkadde: bwe kiba kityo omwenge gwabya ensawo ez'amaliba, omwenge guyiika n'ensawo ez'amaliba zoonooneka; naye omwenge omusu gufukibwa mu nsawo ez'amaliba empya.”" 
Mark2:23 Awo lumu ku lunaku lwa Ssabbiiti Yesu yali ayita mu nnimiro, abayigirizwa be ne batandika okugenda nga banoga ebirimba." 
Mark2:24 Abafalisaayo ne bamugamba nti, “Laba, Lwaki bakola ekyo ekitakkirizibwa ku lunaku lwa ssabbiiti?”" 
Mark2:25 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Temusomangako Dawudi kye yakola, bwe yali nga yeetaaga, n'alumwa enjala ye n'abo be yali nabo?" 
Mark2:26 Bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda, Abiyasaali bwe yali nga ye kabona asinga obukulu, n'alya emigaati egy'okulaga, egy'omuzizo okuliibwako wabula bakabona, n'agiwa ne be yali nabo?”" 
Mark2:27 N'abagamba nti, “Ssabbiiti yabaawo ku lwa muntu, so omuntu si ku lwa ssabbiiti." 
Mark2:28 Bwe kityo Omwana w'omuntu ye mukama wa ssabbiiti.” 
Mark3:1 N'ayingira nate mu kkuŋŋaaniro, nga mulimu omusajja eyalina omukono ogukaze." 
Mark3:2 Ne bamutunulira nnyo okulaba oba anaamuwonyeza ku lunaku lwa ssabbiiti, balyoke bamuwawaabire." 
Mark3:3 Awo Yesu n'agamba omusajja eyalina omukono ogukaze nti, “Yimirira wakati awo.”" 
Mark3:4 Awo n'abagamba nti, “Kikkirizibwa okukola ekirungi ku Ssabbiiti oba okukola obubi? kuwonya bulamu oba kutta?” Naye ne basirika busirisi." 
Mark3:5 Bwe yabeetoolooza amaaso n'obusungu, ng'anakuwadde olw'obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyabwe, n'agamba omusajja nti, “Golola omukono gwo.” N'agugolola: omukono gwe ne guwona." 
Mark3:6 Amangwago Abafalisaayo ne bafuluma ne bateesa n'Abakerodiyaani ku ye, nga bwe banaamuzikiriza." 
Mark3:7 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be ne bagenda ku nnyanja, ekibiina kinene ekyava e Ggaliraaya ne kimugoberera; era n'abalala ne bava mu Buyudaaya" 
Mark3:8 n'e Yerusaalemi ne Idumaya n'emitala wa Yoludaani, n'okwetooloola Ttuulo n'e Sidoni, ekibiina kinene, bwe baawulira bye yakola, ne bajja gy'ali." 
Mark3:9 N'agamba abayigirizwa be bamusembereze eryato limubeerenga kumpi ekibiina kireme okumunyigiriza; 
Mark3:10 kubanga yawonya bangi, ne bonna abalina endwadde bali benyigiriza bamukwateko bawonyezebwe." 
Mark3:11 Era emyoyo emibi buli lwe gyamulabanga ne gigwa mu maaso ge ne gikaaba nga gigamba nti, “Ggwe Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Mark3:12 Naye n'agikomako gireme okumwatuukiriza. 
Mark3:13 Awo n'alinnya ku lusozi n'ayita abo be yayagala, ne bajja gy'ali." 
Mark3:14 N'alondamu kkumi n'ababiri okubeeranga awamu naye, era abatumenga okubuulira" 
Mark3:15 n'okuba n'obuyinza okugobanga emizimu. 
Mark3:16 Yalonda Simooni n'amutuuma erinnya Peetero; 
Mark3:17 ne Yakobo omwana wa Zebbedaayo, ne Yokaana, muganda wa Yakobo: bano n'abatuuma amannya Bowanerege, amakulu gaalyo nti, “Baana ba kubwatuka.”" 
Mark3:18 ne Andereya ne Firipo, ne Battolomaayo, ne Matayo, ne Tomasi, ne Yakobo omwana wa Alufaayo, ne Saddayo, ne Simooni Omukananaayo," 
Mark3:19 ne Yuda Isukalyoti, ye yamulyamu olukwe. N'ajja mu nnyumba," 
Mark3:20 ekibiina ne kikuŋŋaana nate, n'okuyinza ne batayinza na kulya mmere." 
Mark3:21 Awo ababe bwe baawulira ne bafuluma okumukwata, kubanga abantu baali bagamba nti, “Alaluse.”" 
Mark3:22 Naye abawandiisi abaaserengeta okuva e Yerusaalemi ne bagamba nti, “Aliko Beeruzebuli, era agoba dayimooni ku lwo mukulu wa badayimooni oyo.”" 
Mark3:23 N'abayita gy'ali, n'abagambira mu ngero nti, “Setaani ayinza atya okugoba Setaani?" 
Mark3:24 Obwakabaka bwe bwawukanamu bwo bwokka, obwakabaka obwo tebuyinza kuyimirira." 
Mark3:25 N'ennyumba bw'eyawukanamu yo yokka, ennyumba eyo teriyinza kuyimirira." 
Mark3:26 Era oba Setaani yeegolokokeddeko ye yekka, n'ayawukanamu, tayinza kuyimirira, wabula aba yeezikiriza yekka." 
Mark3:27 Naye tewali muntu ayinza okuyingira mu nnyumba y'omuntu ow'amaanyi okunyaga ebintu bye, nga tasoose kusiba oyo ow'amaanyi, n'alyoka anyaga ennyumba ye." 
Mark3:28 Mazima, mbagamba nti, Abaana b'abantu balisonyiyibwa ebibi byabwe byonna, n'obuvvoozi bwabwe bwe balivvoola bwonna;" 
Mark3:29 naye oyo yenna anavvoolanga Omwoyo Omutukuvu talina kusonyiyibwa emirembe n'emirembe, naye aba azzizza omusango ogw'ekibi eky'emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Mark3:30 Yesu yayogera bwati kubanga baayogera nti, “Aliko omwoyo omubi.”" 
Mark3:31 Awo nnyina ne baganda be ne bajja, ne bamutumira ne bamuyita nga bayimiridde wabweru." 
Mark3:32 N'ekibiina kyali kitudde nga bamwetoolodde; ne bamugamba nti, “Nnyoko ne baganda bo bali wabweru bagala okukulaba.”" 
Mark3:33 N'abaddamu ng'agamba nti, “Ani mmange ne baganda bange be baani?”" 
Mark3:34 Awo ne yeetoolooza amaaso ku baali batudde enjuyi zonna nga bamwetoolodde n'agamba nti, “ Laba mmange ne baganda bange!" 
Mark3:35 Kubanga buli muntu yenna akola Katonda by'ayagala, oyo ye muganda wange, ye mwannyinaze, ye mmange.”" 
Mark4:1 Ate n'atandika okuyigiriza ku lubalama lw'ennyanja. Ekibiina kinene nnyo ne kikuŋŋaanira w'ali, kyeyava alinnya mu lyato, n'atuula mu lyo ku nnyanja, kyo ekibiina ne kibeera ku lubalama lwe nnyanja." 
Mark4:2 N'abayigiriza bingi mu ngero, n'abagamba mu kuyigiriza kwe nti," 
Mark4:3 “Muwulire; omusizi yafuluma okusiga: 
Mark4:4 awo olwatuuka bwe yali ng'asiga, ensigo ezimu ne zigwa ku mabbali g'ekkubo, ennyonyi ne zijja ne zizirya." 
Mark4:5 N'endala ne zigwa ku lwazi okutali ttaka lingi; amangwago ne zimera, kubanga ettaka teryali ggwanvu:" 
Mark4:6 enjuba bwe yayaka, ne ziwotookerera; era kubanga tezaalina mmizi, ne zikala." 
Mark4:7 Endala ne zigwa mu maggwa, amaggwa ne galoka, ne gazizisa ne zitabala bibala." 
Mark4:8 Endala ne zigwa ku ttaka eddungi, ne zibala ebibala ne bikula ne byeyongera; ne zizaala okutuusa asatu, era okutuusa enkaaga, era okutuusa ekikumi.”" 
Mark4:9 N'agamba nti, “Alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Mark4:10 Awo bwe yali yekka, abo abaali bamwetoolodde n'ekkumi n'ababiri ne bamubuuza ku ngero ezo." 
Mark4:11 N'abagamba nti, “Mmwe muweereddwa ekyama ky'obwakabaka bwa Katonda, naye bali ab'ebweru byonna bibabeerera mu ngero:" 
Mark4:12 Babe nga balaba naye nga tebeteegereza, babe nga bawulira naye nga tebategeera; sikulwa nga bakyuka ne basonyiyibwa.”" 
Mark4:13 N'abagamba nti, “Temutegeera lugero luno? Kale mulitegeera mutya engero zonna?" 
Mark4:14 Omusizi asiga kigambo. 
Mark4:15 Bano be b'oku mabbali g'ekkubo, ekigambo we kisigibwa; awo bwe bawulira, amangwago Setaani n'ajja n'aggyamu ekigambo ekyasigibwa mu bo." 
Mark4:16 Ne bano bwe batyo be bali abasigibwa awali olwazi, abo, bwe bawulira ekigambo, amangwago bakikkiriza n'essanyu;" 
Mark4:17 ne bataba na mmizi mu bo, naye bamala ekiseera kitono; awo bwe wabaawo okulaba ennaku oba kuyigganyizibwa olw'ekigambo, amangwago nga bagwa." 
Mark4:18 N'abalala be bali abasigibwa mu amaggwa; abo, bwe bawulira ekigambo," 
Mark4:19 awo emitawaana gy'ensi n'obulimba bw'obugagga, n'okwegomba kw'ebirala byonna bwe biyingira bizisa ekigambo, ne kitabala." 
Mark4:20 N'abo be bali abasigibwa awali ettaka eddungi; abawulira ekigambo, abakikkiriza, ababala ebibala asatu (30), n'enkaaga (60), n'ekikumi (100).”" 
Mark4:21 N'abagamba nti, “Ettaala ereetebwa okuteekebwa munda mu kibbo, nantiki munda w'ekitanda, n'eteteekebwa waggulu ku kikondo?" 
Mark4:22 Kubanga tewali ekikwekebwa, ekitalimanyibwa, oba ekikisibwa, ekitalirabika mu lwatu." 
Mark4:23 Buli alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Mark4:24 N'abagamba nti, “Mwekuume kye muwulira: mu kigera mwe mugera nammwe mwe muligererwa: era mulyongerwako." 
Mark4:25 Kubanga alina aliweebwa: n'atalina aliggibwako n'ekyo kyali nakyo.” 
Mark4:26 N'agamba nti, “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda buli ng'omuntu bw'amansa ensigo ku ttaka;" 
Mark4:27 ne yeebaka n'agolokoka ekiro n'emisana, n'ensigo n'emeruka n'ekula, ye nga tamanyi bw'emeruse." 
Mark4:28 Ensi ebala yokka, okusooka kalagala, ate kirimba, ate ŋŋaano enkulu mu kirimba." 
Mark4:29 Naye emmere bw'eyengera, amangwago assaako ekiwabyo, kubanga okukungula kutuuse.”" 
Mark4:30 N'agamba nti, “Kiki kye tunaageraageranya n'obwakabaka bwa Katonda? Oba tukozesa lugero ki okubunnyonnyola?" 
Mark4:31 Bufaanana ng'akaweke aka kaladaali, ako, bwe kasigibwa mu ttaka, newakubadde nga ke katono okukira ensigo zonna eziri mu nsi," 
Mark4:32 naye bwe kasigibwa kakula, kaba kanene okukira enva zonna, kasuula amatabi amanene; ennyonyi ez'omu bbanga mwe ziyinza okuzimba ebisu byazo.”" 
Mark4:33 N'abagamba ekigambo mu ngero nnyingi ng'ezo, nga bwe bayinza okukiwulira;" 
Mark4:34 teyayogera nabo awatali lugero, naye bwe yaba nga yekka n'abayigirizwa be n'abannyonnyola byonna." 
Mark4:35 Awo ku lunaku olwo bwe bwali buwungedde, n'abagamba nti, “Tuwunguke tutuuke emitala eri.”" 
Mark4:36 Abayigirizwa ne baleka ekibiina, ne balinnya mu lyato Yesu mwe yali ne bagenda naye nga bwe yali. Era n'amaato amalala gaali naye." 
Mark4:37 Awo omuyaga mungi ne gujja, amayengo ne gayiika mu lyato, n'eryato ne litandika okujjula amazzi." 
Mark4:38 Yesu ye yali mabega mu lyato nga yeebase ku mutto, ne bamuzuukusa, ne bamugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, tofaayo nga tufa?”" 
Mark4:39 N'azuukuka, n'aboggolera omuyaga, n'agamba ennyanja nti, “Sirika, teeka.” Omuyaga ne gukkakkana, n'eba nteefu nnyo." 
Mark4:40 N'abagamba nti, “Kiki ekibatiisa? Temunnaba kuba na kukkiriza?”" 
Mark4:41 Ne batya nnyo, ne bagambagana nti, “Kale ono ye ani, omuyaga n'ennyanja gwe bigondera?”" 
Mark5:1 Ne batuuka emitala w'ennyanja mu nsi y'Abagerasene. 
Mark5:2 Bwe yava mu lyato, amangwago omuntu eyaliko omwoyo omubi naava mu malaalo najja n'amusisinkana." 
Mark5:3 Omusajja ono yasulanga mu malaalo, nga tewakyali muntu ayinza kumusiba, newakubadde mu lujegere," 
Mark5:4 kubanga emirundi mingi baagezangako okumussa mu masamba, n'okumusiba mu njegere, enjegere n'azikutula, n'amasamba n'agamenyaamenya. Ne wataba muntu wa maanyi asobola okumunyweza." 
Mark5:5 Naye bulijjo, ekiro n'emisana, yakaabiranga mu malaalo ne ku nsozi, era nga bwe yeesalaasala n'amayinja." 
Mark5:6 Awo bwe yalengera Yesu ng'akyali wala ko n'adduka n'atuuka awali Yesu n'amusinza; n'akaaba n'eddoboozi ddene 
Mark5:7 ng'agamba nti, “Onvunaana ki, Yesu Omwana wa Katonda, Ali waggulu ennyo? Nkulayiza Katonda, tombonereza.”" 
Mark5:8 Kubanga Yesu yali amaze okugamba nti, “Va ku muntu ono, ggwe omwoyo omubi.”" 
Mark5:9 Awo Yesu n'amubuuza nti, “Erinnya lyo ggwe ani?” N'addamu nti, “Erinnya lyange nze Liigyoni; kubanga tuli bangi.”" 
Mark5:10 N'amwegayirira nnyo aleme okubagoba mu nsi eyo. 
Mark5:11 Awo ku lusozi waaliwo eggana ly'embizzi nnyingi nnyo nga zirya. 
Mark5:12 N'amwegayirira, ng'amugamba nti, “tusindike mu mbizzi tuziyingiremu.”" 
Mark5:13 Yesu n'akkiriza. Awo emyoyo emibi ne giva mu musajja ne giyingira mu mbizzi. Awo eggana ly'embizzi lyonna ne lifubutuka ne liserengetera ku bbanga ne lyeyiwa mu nnyanja. Embizzi zonna ezaali nga enkumi bbiri (2,000), ne zifiira mu nnyanja." 
Mark5:14 Awo abaali bazirunda ne badduka, ne babuulira ab'omu kibuga, n'ab'omu byalo ebiriraanyeewo. Abantu bangi ne bajja okulaba ebibaddeyo bwe biri." 
Mark5:15 Ne batuuka awali Yesu, ne balaba eyaliko baddayimooni abangi ng'atudde, ng'ayambadde era ng'ategeera bulungi, ne batya nnyo." 
Mark5:16 Abo abaalaba ebyaliwo ne babannyonnyola ebyali bituuse ku musajja oyo eyaliko dayimooni, era ne ku mbizzi." 
Mark5:17 Awo abantu ne batandika okwegayirira Yesu ave mu kitundu kyabwe. 
Mark5:18 Awo bwe yali ng'alinnya mu lyato okugenda, omusajja eyaliko baddayimooni n'amwegayirira agende naye." 
Mark5:19 Naye Yesu n'agaana, n'amugamba nti, “Genda eka mu babo, obabuulire bwe biri ebikulu Katonda by'akukoledde, ne bw'akusaasidde.”" 
Mark5:20 Awo omusajja n'agenda, n'atandika okutegeeza abantu mu Dekapoli bwe biri ebikulu Yesu bye yamukolera. Abantu bonna ne beewuunya." 
Mark5:21 Awo Yesu bwe yawunguka nate mu lyato n'atuuka emitala, ebibiina bingi ne bikuŋŋaanira w'ali ku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Mark5:22 Awo omu ku bakulu b'ekkuŋŋaaniro, erinnya lye Yayiro, bwe yalaba Yesu n'ajja n'avuunama ku bigere bye," 
Mark5:23 n'amwegayirira nnyo ng'agamba nti, “ Muwala wange omuto abulako katono okufa, nkwegayirira jjangu omusseeko emikono gyo, adde mu mbeera ye, alamuke.”" 
Mark5:24 Awo Yesu n'agenda naye; ekibiina ekinene ne kimugoberera nga kigenda kimunyigiriza. 
Mark5:25 Awo mu kibiina ekyo mwalimu omukazi eyali alwalidde ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi emyaka kkumi n'ebiri (12). 
Mark5:26 Yali yeewubye ennyo mu basawo bangi, n'awangayo bye yali nabyo byonna, so n'atabaako kimugasa, naye ne yeeyongeranga bweyongezi okulwala." 
Mark5:27 Bwe yawulira ebigambo bya Yesu, bw'atyo n'ajja nga yeenyigiriza mu kibiina n'atuuka emabega wa Yesu n'akoma ku kyambalo kye." 
Mark5:28 Kubanga yagamba mu mutima gwe nti, “Bwe nkomako obukomi ku byambalo bye, nnaawona.”" 
Mark5:29 Amangwago ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi n'ekikalira, n'awulira mu mubiri gwe ng'awonyezebbwa obulwadde bwe." 
Mark5:30 Amangwago Yesu bwe yategeera munda mu ye amaanyi agamuvuddemu, n'akyuka mu kibiina n'abuuza nti, “Ani akomye ku byambalo byange?”" 
Mark5:31 Abayigirizwa be ne bamuddamu nti, “Olaba ekibiina bwe bakunyigiriza, oyinza otya okubuuza nti, ‘Ani ankomyeko?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Naye Yesu ne yeetoolooza amaaso okulaba oyo amukutteko. 
Mark5:33 Naye omukazi bwe yamanya ekimutuseeko, n'ajja eri Yesu ng'atidde nnyo era ng'akankana, n'agwa mu maaso ge, n'amubuulira amazima gonna." 
Mark5:34 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Omuwala, okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza, genda mirembe, owonere ddala obulwadde bwo.”" 
Mark5:35 Awo bwe yali akyayogera, abaava mu maka ga Yayiro ne bajja, ne bagamba Yayiro nti, “Omuwala wo afudde. Oteganyiza ki nate Omuyigiriza?”" 
Mark5:36 Naye Yesu n'atassaako mwoyo ku bigambo ebyogeddwa wabula n'agamba omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro nti, “Totya, kkiriza bukkiriza.”" 
Mark5:37 Awo Yesu n'agaana abalala bonna okugenda naye okuggyako Peetero ne Yakobo, ne Yokaana, muganda wa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Ne batuuka ku nnyumba y'omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro, n'alaba okwaziirana, n'abakaaba, n'abakuba ebiwoobe ebingi." 
Mark5:39 Awo bwe yayingira n'abagamba nti, “Kiki ekibaaziiranya n'ekibakaabya? Omuwala tafudde, naye yeebase bwe basi!”" 
Mark5:40 Awo abantu bonna ne bamusekerera nnyo. Naye n'abagamba bonna bafulume mu nju. N'atwala kitaawe w'omuwala ne nnyina n'abayigirizwa abaali naye, n'ayingira nabo mu kisenge omuwala mwe yali." 
Mark5:41 Awo n'akwata omukono gw'omuwala, n'amugamba nti, “Talisa kkumi;” ekitegeeza nti, “Omuwala, nkugamba nti Golokoka.”" 
Mark5:42 Amangwago omuwala n'agolokoka, n'atambula. Omuwala oyo yali aweza emyaka kkumi n'ebiri (12). Amangwago abaaliwo ne bawuniikirira nnyo." 
Mark5:43 Yesu n'abakuutira nnyo baleme okubuulirako omuntu yenna. Awo n'alagira okuwa omuwala eky'okulya. 
Mark6:1 Yesu n'ava mu kitundu ekyo, n'ajja mu nsi y'ewaabwe, ng'ali n'abayigirizwa be." 
Mark6:2 Awo ku ssabbiiti n'agenda mu kkuŋŋaaniro n'atandika okuyigiriza. Abantu bangi bwe baamuwulira ne bawuniikirira, ne bagamba nti, “Omusajja ono bino byonna yabiyigira wa? Magezi ki ono ge yaweebwa n'eby'amagero eby'enkanidde wano by'akola?" 
Mark6:3 Si y'ono omubazzi, omwana wa Malyamu, muganda wa Yakobo, ne Yose, ne Yuda ne Simooni? era ne bannyina tetubeera nabo kuno okwaffe?” Ne bamwesittalako." 
Mark6:4 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Nnabbi tabulwa kitiibwa wabula mu nsi ye waabwe, ne mu kika kye, ne mu nnyumba ye.”" 
Mark6:5 Era teyakolerayo ky'amagero kyonna, okuggyako okussa emikono gye ku balwadde batono, n'abawonya." 
Mark6:6 Ne yeewuunya olw'obutakkiriza bwabwe. Awo n'agenda nga ayigiriza mu byalo ebiriraanyeewo. 
Mark6:7 Awo Yesu n'ayita gy'ali ekkumi n'ababiri, n'atandika okubatuma kinnababirye; n'abawa obuyinza ku mwoyo emibi." 
Mark6:8 N'abalagira obutatwala kintu kyonna gye bagenda okuggyako omuggo gwokka, si mmere, newakubadde ensawo, newakubadde ensimbi mu lukoba." 
Mark6:9 Bambale engatto naye tebatwala kkanzu bbiri. 
Mark6:10 N'abagamba nti, “Buli nju yonna mwe muyingiranga mubeeranga omwo okutuusa lwe mulivaayo."
