Mark6:11 Na buli kifo kyonna ekitalibakkiriza, ekitalibawulira, bwe muvangayo, mukunkumulanga enfuufu eri mu bigere byammwe okuba omujulirwa gyebali.”" 
Mark6:12 Ne bagenda ne babuulira okwenenya. 
Mark6:13 Ne bagoba baddayimooni bangi, ne basiiga amafuta ku balwadde bangi ne babawonya." 
Mark6:14 Awo Kerode kabaka n'awulira, kubanga erinnya lya Yesu lyali lyatiikiridde; n'agamba nti, “Yokaana Omubatiza azuukidde mu bafu, amaanyi gano kyegava gakolera mu ye.”" 
Mark6:15 Naye abalala ne bagamba nti, “Ye Eriya.” Abalala ne bagamba nti, “Nnabbi ng'omu ku bannabbi.”" 
Mark6:16 Naye Kerode, bwe yawulira n'agamba nti, “ Yokaana gwe nnatemako omutwe nze, ye azuukidde.”" 
Mark6:17 Kubanga Kerode yennyini yatuma, n'akwata Yokaana, n'amusiba mu kkomera olwa Kerodiya, mukazi wa muganda we Firipo gwe yawasa." 
Mark6:18 Kubanga Yokaana yagamba Kerode nti, “ Si kituufu ggwe okutwala mukazi wa muganda wo.”" 
Mark6:19 Kerodiya n'ayagala okutta Yokaana yeesasuze, naye nga tayinza," 
Mark6:20 kubanga Kerode yatya Yokaana, ng'amumanyi nga omuntu omutuukirivu era omutukuvu, n'amwekuuma. Kerode yayagalanga nnyo okuwulira Yokaana by'ayogera; naye ate byamulekanga nga tamanyi kya kukola." 
Mark6:21 Naye olunaku lwali lumu Kerodiya n'afuna oluwenda okutuukiriza kye yali yayagala edda okukola. Olwali olwo Kerode n'afumbira abakungu be embaga ku lunaku olw'amazaalibwa ge, n'ayita abakungu be n'abakulu b'abaserikale n'abaami bonna abakulu mu Ggaliraaya." 
Mark6:22 Awo muwala wa Kerodiya yennyini bwe yajja n'azina, Kerode n'abo abaali batudde naye nga balya ne bamusiima; awo kabaka n'agamba omuwala nti, “Nsaba ky'oyagala kyonna, nnaakikuwa.”" 
Mark6:23 N'amulayirira nti, “Kyonna kyonna ky'ononsaba, nnaakikuwa, newakubadde ekitundu eky'obwakabaka bwange.”" 
Mark6:24 Awo omuwala n'afuluma, n'agamba nnyina nti, “ Nsabe ki?” N'agamba nti, “Saba omutwe gwa Yokaana Omubatiza.”" 
Mark6:25 Awo omuwala amangwago n'addayo eri kabaka, n'amusaba ng'agamba nti, “Njagala ompe kaakano omutwe gwa Yokaana Omubatiza ku lutiba.”" 
Mark6:26 Awo kabaka n'anakuwala nnyo; naye olw'ebirayiro bye, n'abo abaali batudde naye nga balya nga baawulira, n'atayagala kumenyawo kigambo kye yali agambye omuwala." 
Mark6:27 Kale amangwago kabaka n'atuma sserikale omumbowa, n'alagira okuleeta omutwe gwa Yokaana. N'agenda n'amutemerako omutwe mu kkomera," 
Mark6:28 n'aleetera omutwe gwe mu lutiba, n'aguwa omuwala, n'omuwala n'aguwa nnyina." 
Mark6:29 Awo abayigirizwa be bwe baawulira, ne bajja ne batwala omulambo gwe, ne baguziika mu ntaana." 
Mark6:30 Awo abatume ne bakomawo awali Yesu ne bamubuulira ebigambo byonna, bye baakola, ne bye baayigiriza." 
Mark6:31 N'abagamba nti, “ Mujje mmwe mwekka kyama mu kifo eteri bantu muwummuleko katono.” Kubanga waaliwo abantu bangi abali bajja gyebali nga n'abalala bagenda, ne babulwa n'akaseera ak'okuliiramu ku mmere." 
Mark6:32 Nebalinnya mu lyato bokka ne bagenda mu kifo eteri bantu. 
Mark6:33 Naye abantu bangi ne ba balaba nga bagenda, ne babategeera, n'abo abaava mu bibuga byonna ne badduka okwetooloola ku lukalu, ne babasookayo." 
Mark6:34 Awo Yesu bwe yava mu lyato n'alaba ebibiina bingi, n'abasaasira, kubanga baali ng'endiga ezitalina musumba, n'atandika okubayigiriza ebintu bingi." 
Mark6:35 Awo obudde bwe bwali buyise, abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali, ne bamugamba nti, “Ekifo kino kya ddungu, ne kaakano obudde buyise:" 
Mark6:36 basiibule, bagende mu byalo ne mu bibuga ebiriraanye wano bagende beegulire emmere.”" 
Mark6:37 Naye n'addamu, n'abagamba nti, “Mmwe mubawe emmere.” Ne bamugamba nti, “ Tugende tugule emigaati egy'eddinaali ebibiri (200) tugibawe balye?”" 
Mark6:38 N'abagamba nti, “ Mulina emigaati emeka?” Mugende mulabe. Bwe baategeera ne bagamba nti, “Etaano, n'ebyennyanja bibiri.”" 
Mark6:39 N'abalagira batuule bonna bibiina bibiina ku muddo. 
Mark6:40 Ne batuula nnyiriri nnyiriri, ekikumi (100), n'ataano (50)." 
Mark6:41 N'akwata emigaati etaano n'ebyennyanja ebibiri, n'atunula waggulu, ne yeebaza, n'amenyamu emigaati, n'awa abayigirizwa be bagisse mu maaso ga bali; n'ebyennyanja bibiri n'abigabira bonna." 
Mark6:42 Ne balya bonna ne bakkuta. 
Mark6:43 Ne bakuŋŋaanya obukunkumuka bw'emigaati n'obw'ebyennyanja ne bujjuza ebibbo kkumi na bibiri (12). 
Mark6:44 Abo abaalya emigaati baali abasajja enkumi ttaano (5,000)." 
Mark6:45 Amangwago Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be basaabale mu lyato, bawunguke bagende emitala w'ennyanja e Besusayida, ye amale okusiibula ebibiina." 
Mark6:46 Awo bwe yamala okubasiibula, n'agenda ku lusozi okusaba." 
Mark6:47 Awo bwe bwali buwungedde, eryato lyali mu nnyanja mu buziba, ye yali yekka ku lukalu." 
Mark6:48 Awo bwe yalaba nga bategana okuvuga, kubanga omuyaga gwali gubafulumye mu maaso, mu kisisimuka ekyokuna eky'ekiro n'ajja gye baali ng'atambulira ku nnyanja; yali ng'agenda kubayisa:" 
Mark6:49 naye bo, bwe baamulaba ng'atambulira ku nnyanja, ne balowooza nti kifaananyi, ne bakaaba;" 
Mark6:50 kubanga bonna baamulaba, ne beeraliikirira. Naye amangwago n'ayogera nabo, n'abagamba nti, “ Mugume omwoyo, nze nzuuno, temutya.”" 
Mark6:51 N'alinnya mu lyato mwe baali, omuyaga ne gulekeraawo okukunta! abayigirizwa ne bawuniikirira nnyo." 
Mark6:52 Tebategeera eby'emigaati kubanga emitima gyabwe gyali mikakanyavu. 
Mark6:53 Awo bwe baawunguka, ne batuuka mu nsi ey'e Genesaleeti, ne bagoba ettale." 
Mark6:54 Awo bwe baava mu lyato, amangwago abantu ne bamutegeera," 
Mark6:55 ne badduka ne beetooloola mu nsi eyo yonna, ne batandika okusitulira ku bitanda abalwadde okubaleeta we baawulira nga wali." 
Mark6:56 Ne buli gye yagendanga, mu mbuga, oba mu bibuga, oba mu byalo, bassanga abalwadde mu butale, ne bamwegayirira bakomeko bukomi ku lukugiro lw'olugoye lwe: n'abo abaamukomangako ne bawona." 
Mark7:1 Awo Abafalisaayo n'abawandiisi abamu, abaava e Yerusaalemi ne bakuŋŋaanira awali Yesu." 
Mark7:2 Ne balaba abamu ku bayigirizwa be nga balya emmere n'engalo embi, okugamba, ze zitanaabiddwa." 
Mark7:3 Kubanga Abafalisaayo, n'Abayudaaya bonna, tebaalyanga mmere nga tebamaze kunaaba nnyo ngalo zaabwe, nga obulombolombo obw'abakadde bwe bulagira." 
Mark7:4 Era bwe bavanga mu katale, nga tabasobola kulya nga tebannaba kwetukuza; era waliwo n'ebirala bingi bye baaweebwa okukwata, okunaazanga ebikompe, n'ebibya, n'entamu ez'ebikomo." 
Mark7:5 Awo Abafalisaayo n'abawandiisi ne bamubuuza nti, “ Lwaki abayigirizwa bo tebagoberera bulombolombo obw'abakadde, naye ne balya emmere n'engalo embi? ”" 
Mark7:6 N'abagamba nti, Isaaya yalagula bulungi ku mmwe bannanfuusi, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Abantu bano banzisaamu ekitiibwa kya ku mimwa, Naye emitima gyabwe gindi wala." 
Mark7:7 Naye bansinziza bwereere, Nga bayigiriza amateeka g'abantu nga bye by'okukwata.”" 
Mark7:8 Muleka etteeka lya Katonda, ne mukwata obulombolombo bw'abantu." 
Mark7:9 N'abagamba nti, “Mugaanira ddala bulungi etteeka lya Katonda, ne mukwata obulombolombo bwammwe." 
Mark7:10 Kubanga Musa yayogera nti, ‘Ossangamu ekitiibwa kitaawo ne nnyoko; era nti Avumanga kitaawe oba nnyina, bamuttanga bussi,’" 
Mark7:11 naye mmwe mwogera nti, ‘Omuntu bw'agamba kitaawe oba nnyina nti Kyonna kye nnandikuwadde okukugasa ye Kolubaani’ (ekitegeezebwa nti Kitone kya Katonda)," 
Mark7:12 temukyamuganya okukolera ekintu kitaawe oba nnyina; 
Mark7:13 mudibya ekigambo kya Katonda olw'obulombolombo bwammwe, bwe mwayigiriza: era mukola ebigambo ebirala bingi ng'ebyo.”" 
Mark7:14 Awo Yesu n'ayita ebibiina, n'abagamba nti, “Mumpulire mwenna, mutegeere;" 
Mark7:15 tewali kintu ekiri ebweru w'omuntu bwe kiyingira mu ye, ekiyinza okumwonoona, naye ebintu ebiva mu muntu, ebyo bye byonoona omuntu." 
Mark7:16 Buli alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Mark7:17 Awo bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ng'avudde mu bibiina, abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza olugero olwo." 
Mark7:18 N'abagamba nti, “Bwe mutyo nammwe temutegedde? Temutegeera nti, kyonna ekiri ebweru bwe kiyingira mu muntu, tekiyinza kumwonoona;" 
Mark7:19 kubanga tekiyingira mu mutima gwe, naye mu lubuto lwe, ne kiyita ne kigenda mu kabuyonjo?” Yayogera bw'atyo ng'alongoosa ebiriibwa byonna." 
Mark7:20 N'agamba nti, “Ekiva mu muntu, kye kyonoona omuntu." 
Mark7:21 Kubanga munda, mu mitima gy'abantu, muvaamu ebirowoozo ebibi, obukaba," 
Mark7:22 okubba, okutta, obwenzi, okwegomba, obubi, obukuusa, obuluvu, eriiso ebbi, obuvvoozi, amalala, obusiru:" 
Mark7:23 ebibi ebyo byonna biva munda, ne byonoona omuntu.”" 
Mark7:24 Awo Yesu n'avaayo n'agenda mu bitundu bye Ttuulo n'e Sidoni. N'ayingira mu nnyumba, n'atayagala muntu kutegeera, naye ne kitasoboka." 
Mark7:25 Naye amangwago omukazi eyalina muwala we eyaliko dayimooni, bwe yamuwulira n'ajja n'afukamira ku bigere bye." 
Mark7:26 Omukazi yali Muyonaani, eggwanga lye Musulofoyiniiki. N'amwegayirira okugoba dayimooni ku muwala we." 
Mark7:27 Yesu n'agamba omukazi nti, “Leka abaana bamale okukkuta; kubanga si kirungi okuddira emmere y'abaana okugisuulira embwa.”" 
Mark7:28 Naye omukazi n'amuddamu nti, “Weewaawo, Mukama wange: n'embwa ziriira wansi w'emmeeza obukunkumuka bw'abaana.”" 
Mark7:29 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Olw'ekigambo ekyo, weddireyo; dayimooni avudde ku muwala wo.”" 
Mark7:30 N'addayo mu nnyumba ye, n'asanga omuwala ng'agalamizibbwa ku kitanda, ne dayimooni ng'amuvuddeko." 
Mark7:31 Ate n'ava mu bitundu bye Ttuulo, n'agenda e Sidoni, eyo gye yava n'addayo ku nnyanja ey'e Ggaliraaya nga ayitira mu kitundu ky'e Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Ne bamuleetera omuggavu w'amatu, atayogera bulungi; ne bamwegayirira okumussaako omukono gwe." 
Mark7:33 N'amuggya mu kibiina kyama, n'amussa engalo mu matu ge, n'awanda amalusu, n'amukoma ku lulimi;" 
Mark7:34 n'atunula waggulu mu ggulu, n'assa ekikkowe, n'alyoka amugamba nti, “Efasa,” ekitegeeza nti, “ Gguka.”" 
Mark7:35 Amatu ge ne gagguka n'enkolo y'olulimi lwe n'esumulukuka n'ayogera bulungi. 
Mark7:36 N'abakuutira baleme okubuulirako muntu; naye nga bwe yeeyongera okubakuutira, bwe beeyongera ennyo nnyini okukibunya." 
Mark7:37 Ne bawuniikirira nnyo nnyini kitalo nga bagamba nti, “ Ebintu byonna abikoze bulungi, olaba aggula abaggavu b'amatu, era n'ayogeza ne bakasiru!”" 
Mark8:1 Awo mu nnaku ezo, ekibiina ne bwe kyakuŋŋaana, ne bataba na mmere ya kulya, n'ayita abayigirizwa be n'abagamba nti," 
Mark8:2 “Nsaasira ekibiina, kubanga baakamala nange ennaku ssatu, era tebalina kya kulya;" 
Mark8:3 bwe mbasiibula okuddayo ewaabwe nga tebalidde, bajja kuzirikira mu kkubo, ate ng'abamu ku bo baava wala.”" 
Mark8:4 Abayigirizwa be ne bamuddamu nti, “Omuntu anaayinza atya okukkusa abantu bano emigaati wano mu ddungu?”" 
Mark8:5 N'ababuuza nti, “ Mulina emigaati emeka?” Ne baddamu nti, “Musanvu.”" 
Mark8:6 Awo Yesu n'alagira ekibiina okutuula wansi. N'addira emigaati omusanvu, ne yeebaza, n'agimenyaamenyaamu, n'awa abayigirizwa be, okugissa mu maaso gaabwe; ne bagissa mu maaso g'ekibiina." 
Mark8:7 Era baali balina obw'ennyanja butono, nabwo n'abwebaza, n'alagira n'abwo okubussa mu maaso gaabwe." 
Mark8:8 Ne balya ne bakkuta, ne bakuŋŋaanya obukunkumuka obwasigalawo ebisero musanvu." 
Mark8:9 Baali ng'enkumi nnya (4,000) n'abasiibula." 
Mark8:10 Amangwago n'asaabala mu lyato n'abayigirizwa be, n'ajja mu kitundu ky'e Dalumanusa." 
Mark8:11 Abafalisaayo ne bajja gy'ali ne batandika okuwakana naye nga banoonya gy'ali akabonero akava mu ggulu, nga bamukema." 
Mark8:12 Yesu n'assa ekikkowe, n'agamba nti, “Ab'Emirembe gino banoonyeza ki akabonero? Mazima mbagamba nti, ab'Emirembe gino tebaliweebwa kabonero.”" 
Mark8:13 N'abaleka, n'asaabala nate n'agenda ku ludda olulala olw'ennyanja." 
Mark8:14 Awo abayigirizwa ne beerabira okutwala emigaati; baalina omugaati gumu gwokka mu lyato. 
Mark8:15 N'abakuutira ng'agamba nti, “ Munywere, mwekuume ekizimbulukusa eky'Abafalisaayo n'ekizimbulukusa kya Kerode.”" 
Mark8:16 Ne beebuuzaganya bokka na bokka, ne bagamba nti, “Tetulina migaati.”" 
Mark8:17 Yesu bwe yategeera n'abagamba nti, “Kiki ekibeebuuzaganyisa olw'obutaba na migaati? Temunnalaba, so temutegeera? Emitima gyammwe mikakanyavu?" 
Mark8:18 Mulina amaaso, temulaba? Mulina amatu, temuwulira? So temujjukira?" 
Mark8:19 Bwe nnamenyera enkumi ettaano (5,000) emigaati etaano, ebibbo bimeka ebyajjula obukunkumuka bwe mwakuŋŋaanya?” Ne bamugamba nti, “Kkumi na bibiri (12).”" 
Mark8:20 “Era bwe nnamenyera omusanvu enkumi ennya (4,000), mwakuŋŋaanya ebisero bimeka ebyajjula obukunkumuka?” Ne bamugamba nti, “Musanvu.”" 
Mark8:21 N'abagamba nti, “Temunnategeera?”" 
Mark8:22 Awo ne bajja e Besusayida. Ne wabaawo abantu abaamuleetera omusajja omuzibe w'amaaso, ne bamwegayirira amukwateko." 
Mark8:23 N'akwata omuzibe w'amaaso ku mukono, n'amufulumya ebweru we kibuga. Awo bwe yawanda amalusu ku maaso ge, n'amussaako engalo, n'amubuuza nti, “Oliko ky'olaba?”" 
Mark8:24 N'atunula waggulu n'agamba nti, “Ndaba abantu, kyokka bafaanana ng'emiti, nga batambula.”" 
Mark8:25 Era nate Yesu n'ayongera okukwata ku maaso g'omusajja, omusajja n'akanula okulaba, n'awona, n'alaba byonna bulungi." 
Mark8:26 Yesu n'amusindika ewuwe, ng'amugamba nti, “Togezaako kuyingira mu kyalo.”" 
Mark8:27 Awo Yesu n'asitula n'agenda n'abayigirizwa be mu bubuga bw'e Kayisaliya ekya Firipo. Naye bwe baali batambula, n'abuuza abayigirizwa be nti, “Abantu bampita ani?”" 
Mark8:28 Ne bamugamba nti, “Yokaana Omubatiza: n'abalala nti Eriya: naye abalala nti Omu ku bannabbi.”" 
Mark8:29 Ye n'ababuuza nti, “Naye mmwe mumpita ani?” Peetero n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Ggwe Kristo.”" 
Mark8:30 Yesu n'abakuutira baleme okukibuulirako omuntu yenna. 
Mark8:31 Awo Yesu n'atandika okubabuulira nti, kimugwanira Omwana w'omuntu okubonyaabonyezebwa ebingi, n'okugaanibwa abakadde, ne bakabona abakulu, n'abawandiisi, n'okuttibwa, n'okuyitawo ennaku essatu okuzuukira." 
Mark8:32 N'ayogera ekigambo ekyo mu lwatu. Peetero n'amuzza wabbali n'atandika okumunneya. 
Mark8:33 Yesu bwe yakyuka n'alaba abayigirizwa be, n'anenya Peetero, ng'agamba nti, “Dda emabega wange, Setaani: kubanga tolowooza bya Katonda, wabula eby'abantu.”" 
Mark8:34 N'ayita ebibiina n'abayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti, “Omuntu bw'ayagala okungoberera, yeefiirize yekka, yeetikke omusalaba gwe, angoberere." 
Mark8:35 Kubanga buli ayagala okulokola obulamu bwe alibubuza; na buli alibuza obulamu bwe ku lwange n'olw'Enjiri alibulokola. 
Mark8:36 Kubanga kimugasa ki omuntu okulya ensi zonna, n'okufiirwa obulamu bwe?" 
Mark8:37 Kubanga omuntu yandiwaddeyo ki okununula obulamu bwe? 
Mark8:38 Kubanga buli ankwatirwa ensonyi nze n'ebigambo byange mu mirembe gino egy'obwenzi era emibi, n'Omwana w'omuntu alimukwatirwa ensonyi oyo lw'alijjira mu kitiibwa kya Kitaawe ne bamalayika abatukuvu.”" 
Mark9:1 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mazima mbagamba nti, Ku bano abayimiridde wano waliwo abamu abatalirega ku kufa n'akatono, okutuusa lwe baliraba obwakabaka bwa Katonda nga bujja n'amaanyi.”" 
Mark9:2 Awo ennaku omukaaga bwe zaayitawo Yesu n'atwala Peetero ne Yakobo ne Yokaana, n'agenda nabo ku lusozi oluwanvu bokka mu kyama: n'afuusibwa mu maaso gaabwe." 
Mark9:3 Engoye ze ne zaakaayakana ne zitukula nnyo; so nga tewali mwozi ku nsi ayinza okuzitukuza bw'atyo. 
Mark9:4 Awo Eriya ne Musa ne babalabikira; era baali boogera ne Yesu. 
Mark9:5 Peetero n'addamu, n'agamba Yesu nti, “Labbi, kye kirungi ffe okubeera wano; kale tusiisire ensiisira ssatu; emu yiyo, n'emu ya Musa, n'emu ya Eriya.”" 
Mark9:6 Kubanga yali tamanyi ky'anaddamu; kubanga baali battidde nnyo. 
Mark9:7 Awo ekire ne kijja ne kibasiikiriza; eddoboozi ne lifuluma mu kire nti, “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa: mumuwulire.”" 
Mark9:8 Amangwago okugenda okukyusa amaaso gaabwe nga tebalaba muntu mulala wabula Yesu yekka nabo. 
Mark9:9 Awo bwe baali bakka ku lusozi, n'abakuutira baleme okubuulirako omuntu bye balabye, okutuusa Omwana w'omuntu lw'alizuukira mu bafu." 
Mark9:10 Ne bakyekuuma ekigambo ekyo nga beebuuzaganya bokka nti, “Okuzuukira mu bafu kuliba kutya?”" 
Mark9:11 Ne bamubuuza nga bagamba nti, “Abawandiisi boogera nti, kigwana Eriya okusooka okujja.”" 
Mark9:12 N'abagamba nti, “ Eriya y'asooka okujja, n'alongoosa byonna: era kyawandiikirwa kitya Omwana w'omuntu okubonyaabonyezebwa ebingi n'okunyoomebwa?" 
Mark9:13 Naye mbagamba nti Eriya yamala okujja, era baamukola buli kye baayagala, nga bwe kyamuwandiikirwa.”" 
Mark9:14 Awo bwe baatuuka eri abayigirizwa be, ne balaba ekibiina kinene nga kibeetoolodde, n'abawandiisi nga babasokaasoka." 
Mark9:15 Amangwago ekibiina kyonna bwe kyamulaba, ne beewuunya nnyo, ne badduka ne bajja gy'ali ne bamulamusa." 
Mark9:16 N'ababuuza nti, “Mubasokaasoka lwaki?”" 
Mark9:17 Omu mu kibiina n'amuddamu nti, “Omuyigiriza, nkuleetedde omwana wange, aliko dayimooni atayogera;" 
Mark9:18 buli gy'amutwala, amukuba ebigwo; abimba ejjovu, aluma amannyo, akonvuba: ŋŋambye abayigirizwa bo bamugobe; ne batayinza.”" 
Mark9:19 N'abaddamu, n'agamba nti, “ Mmwe ab'emirembe egitakkiriza, ndituusa wa okubeera nammwe? Ndituusa wa okubagumiikiriza? Mumundeetere.”" 
Mark9:20 Ne bamuleeta gy'ali: awo bwe yamulaba, amangwago dayimooni n'amutaagulataagula nnyo; n'agwa wansi, ne yeekulungula, ng'abimba ejjovu." 
Mark9:21 N'abuuza kitaawe nti, “ Obulwadde buno kasookedde bumukwata bbanga ki?” N'agamba nti, “ Okuviira ddala mu buto." 
Mark9:22 Emirundi mingi ng'amusuula mu muliro ne mu mazzi okumutta: naye oba ng'oyinza, tusaasire, otubeere.”" 
Mark9:23 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Oba ng'oyinza! byonna biyinzika eri akkiriza.”" 
Mark9:24 Amangwago kitaawe w'omwana n'ayogerera waggulu, n'agamba nti, “ Nzikirizza saasira obutakkiriza bwange.”" 
Mark9:25 Awo Yesu bwe yalaba ng'ekibiina kijja kidduka, n'aboggolera dayimooni, n'amugamba nti, “ Ggwe dayimooni atayogera, era omuggavu w'amatu, nze nkulagira, muveeko, tomuddiranga nate n'akatono.”" 
Mark9:26 Awo n'akaaba, n'amutaagula nnyo, n'amuvaako; n'afaanana ng'afudde; n'okugamba abalala bangi ne bagamba nti, “ Afudde.”" 
Mark9:27 Naye Yesu n'amukwata ku mukono, n'amuyimusa; n'ayimirira." 
Mark9:28 Awo bwe yayingira mu nnyumba, abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza mu kyama nti, “ Lwaki ffe tetwayinzizza kumugoba?”" 
Mark9:29 N'abagamba nti, “Engeri eno teyinzika kugenda nakirala awatali kusaba na kusiiba.”" 
Mark9:30 Ne bavaayo, ne bayita mu Ggaliraaya, n'atayagala muntu yenna kutegeera." 
Mark9:31 Kubanga yali ayigiriza abayigirizwa be nga abagamba nti, “ Omwana w'omuntu aliweebwayo mu mikono gy'abantu, balimutta; kale bw'alimala okuttibwa, era waliyita ennaku ssatu n'azuukira.”" 
Mark9:32 Naye tebaategeera kigambo ekyo, ne batya okumubuuza." 
Mark9:33 Ne batuuka e Kaperunawumu: awo bwe yali ng'ali mu nnyumba n'ababuuza nti, “Mubadde muwakana ki mu kkubo?”" 
Mark9:34 Naye ne basirika: kubanga baali bawakana bokka na bokka mu kkubo nti, “ani omukulu.”" 
Mark9:35 N'atuula, n'ayita ekkumi n'ababiri, n'abagamba nti, “Omuntu bw'ayagala okuba ow'olubereberye, anaabanga ku nkomerero ya bonna, era muweereza wa bonna.”" 
Mark9:36 N'addira omwana omuto, n'amuyimiriza wakati mu bo: awo n'amuwambaatira n'abagamba nti," 
Mark9:37 “Buli anakkirizanga omu ku baana abato abaliŋŋanga ono, mu linnya lyange, ng'akkirizza nze: na buli muntu yenna anzikiriza nze, takkiriza nze, wabula oli eyantuma.”" 
Mark9:38 Awo Yokaana n'amugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, twalaba omuntu ng'agoba dayimooni mu linnya lyo ne tumugaana, kubanga yali tayita naffe.”" 
Mark9:39 Naye Yesu n'agamba nti, “ temumugaananga: kubanga tewali muntu anaakolanga eky'amagero mu linnya lyange ate amangwago n'anvuma." 
Mark9:40 Kubanga atali mulabe waffe ng'ali ku lwaffe. 
Mark9:41 Kubanga buli muntu anaabanywesanga mmwe ekikompe ky'amazzi kubanga muli ba Kristo, mazima mbagamba nti talibulwa mpeera ye n'akatono." 
Mark9:42 Na buli muntu aneesittazanga omu ku abo abato abanzikiriza, waakiri oyo okusibibwa olubengo olunene mu bulago bwe asuulibwe mu nnyanja." 
Mark9:43 Omukono gwo bwe gukwesittazanga, ogutemangako; waakiri ggwe okuyingira mu bulamu, ng'obuliddwako ekitundu, okusinga okugenda mu Ggeyeena ng'olina emikono gyombi, mu muliro ogutazikira;" 
Mark9:44 envunyu yaabwe gye tefiira so n'omuliro teguzikira. 
Mark9:45 N'okugulu kwo bwe kukwesittazanga, okutemangako: waakiri ggwe okuyingira mu bulamu ng'obuliddwako okugulu, okusinga okusuulibwa mu Ggeyeena, ng'olina amagulu gombi;" 
Mark9:46 envunyu yaabwe gye tefiira so n'omuliro teguzikira. 
Mark9:47 N'eriiso lyo bwe likwesittazanga, oliggyangamu; waakiri ggwe okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda ng'oli wa ttulu, okusinga okusuulibwa mu Ggeyeena, ng'olina amaaso gombi;" 
Mark9:48 envunyu yaabwe gye tefiira, so n'omuliro teguzikira." 
Mark9:49 Kubanga buli muntu alirungibwamu omuliro. 
Mark9:50 Omunnyo mulungi: naye omunnyo bwe guggwaamu ensa mulizzaamu ki? Mmwe mubeere n'omunnyo munda wammwe, mutabagane mwekka na mwekka.”" 
Mark10:1 Awo n'agolokoka n'avaayo, n'ajja mu kitundu kye Buyudaaya n'emitala wa Yoludaani: ebibiina bingi ne bikuŋŋaanira w'ali nate; nga empisa ye bwe yali n'abayigiriza." 
Mark10:2 Awo Abafalisaayo olw'okwagala okumugezesa, ne bajja gy'ali, ne bamubuuza nti, “Kirungi omuntu okugobanga mukazi we?”" 
Mark10:3 Naye n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Musa yabalagira atya?”" 
Mark10:4 Ne bagamba nti, “Musa yakkiriza okuwandiikanga ebbaluwa ey'okugoba, alyoke agobebwenga.”" 
Mark10:5 Naye Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Olw'obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyammwe kyeyava abawandiikira etteeka lino." 
Mark10:6 Naye okuva ku lubereberye lw'okutonda, yabatonda omusajja n'omukazi." 
Mark10:7 Omuntu kyanaavanga aleka kitaawe ne nnyina, ne yeegatta ne mukazi we;" 
Mark10:8 nabo bombi banaabanga omubiri gumu: kale nga tebakyali babiri nate, wabula omubiri gumu." 
Mark10:9 Kale Katonda kye yagatta awamu, omuntu takyawukanyanga.”" 
Mark10:10 Awo ate mu nnyumba abayigirizwa ne bamubuuza ekigambo ekyo. 
Mark10:11 N'abagamba nti, “Buli muntu yenna anaagobanga mukazi we, n'awasa omulala, nga azizza omusango ogw'obwenzi ku mukyala we;" 
Mark10:12 naye yennyini bw'anaanobanga ewa bba, n'afumbirwa omulala, ng'ayenze.”" 
Mark10:13 Awo ne bamuleetera abaana abato, abakwateko; naye abayigirizwa be ne bajunga abaabaleeta." 
Mark10:14 Naye Yesu bwe yalaba n'asunguwala, n'abagamba nti, “Mukkirize abaana abato bajje gye ndi; so temubagaana; kubanga abafaanana nga bano obwakabaka bwa Katonda bwe bwabwe." 
Mark10:15 Mazima mbagamba nti Buli atakkirizenga bwakabaka bwa Katonda ng'omwana omuto, talibuyingiramu n'akatono.”" 
Mark10:16 N'abawambaatira, n'abawa omukisa, ng'abassaako emikono." 
Mark10:17 Awo bwe yali anaatera okugenda, omusajja najja ng'adduka, n'afukamira wali, n'amubuuza nti, “Omuyigiriza omulungi, n'akola ntya okusikira obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Mark10:18 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Ompitira ki omulungi? tewali mulungi wabula omu, ye Katonda." 
Mark10:19 Omanyi amateeka, ‘Tottanga, Toyendanga, Tobbanga, Towaayirizanga, Tolyazaamaanyanga, Ossangamu ekitiibwa kitaawo ne nnyoko.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 N'amugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, ebyo byonna nnabikwata okuva mu buto bwange.”" 
Mark10:21 Yesu bwe yamutunuulira n'amwagala, n'amugamba nti, “oweebuuseeko ekigambo kimu: genda otunde byonna by'oli nabyo, ogabire abaavu, naawe oliba n'obugagga mu ggulu: olyoke ojje ongoberere.”" 
Mark10:22 Naye n'atokooterera olw'ekigambo ekyo, n'agenda ng'anakuwadde; kubanga yali alina ebintu bingi." 
Mark10:23 Awo Yesu ne yeetoolooza amaaso, n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “ Nga kizibu abagagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!”" 
Mark10:24 Abayigirizwa ne beewuunya ebigambo bye. Naye Yesu n'addamu nate, n'abagamba nti, “Abaana, nga kizibu abo abeesiga obugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!" 
Mark10:25 Kye kyangu eŋŋamira okuyita mu nnyindo y'empiso, okukira omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Mark10:26 Ne bawuniikirira nnyo, ne bamugamba nti, “Kale ani ayinza okulokoka?”" 
Mark10:27 Awo Yesu n'abatunuulira n'agamba nti, “ Mu bantu tekiyinzika, naye si bwe kityo eri Katonda; kubanga byonna biyinzika eri Katonda.”" 
Mark10:28 Awo Peetero n'atandika okumugamba nti, “Laba, ffe twaleka byonna, ne tukugoberera.”" 
Mark10:29 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Mazima mbagamba nti, Tewali eyaleka ennyumba, oba ab'oluganda, oba bannyina, oba nnyina, oba kitaawe, oba abaana, oba ebyalo, ku lwange n'olw'Enjiri," 
Mark10:30 ataliweebwa emirundi kikumi (100) mu biro bino ebya kaakano, ennyumba, n'ab'oluganda, ne bannyina ne bannyaabwe, n'abaana, n'ebyalo, n'okuyigganyizibwa; ne mu mirembe egigenda okujja obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Mark10:31 Naye bangi ab'olubereberye abaliba ab'oluvannyuma; n'ab'oluvannyuma abaliba ab'olubereberye.” 
Mark10:32 Baali mu kkubo nga bambuka e Yerusaalemi; ne Yesu yali ng'abakulembedde, ne beewuunya, na bali abaagoberera ne batya. Awo nate n'atwala ekkumi n'ababiri (12), n'atandika okubabuulira ebigambo ebigenda okumubaako," 
Mark10:33 nti, “Laba, twambuka e Yerusaalemi; Omwana w'omuntu aliweebwayo eri bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi; balimusalira omusango okumutta, balimuwaayo eri ab'amawanga," 
Mark10:34 balimuduulira, balimuwandira amalusu, balimukuba, balimutta, bwe waliyitawo ennaku essatu alizuukira.”" 
Mark10:35 Awo Yakobo ne Yokaana, abaana ba Zebbedaayo, ne basembera w'ali, ne bamugamba nti, “ Omuyigiriza, twagala otukolere kyonna kyonna kye tunaakusaba.”" 
Mark10:36 N'abagamba nti, “ Mwagala mbakolere ki?”" 
Mark10:37 Ne bamugamba nti, “Tuwe tutuule, omu ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo, n'omulala ku mukono gwo ogwa kkono, mu kitiibwa kyo.”" 
Mark10:38 Naye Yesu n'abagamba nti, “ Temumanyi kye musaba. Muyinza okunywa ku kikompe kye nnywako nze? Oba okubatizibwa n'okubatiza kwe mbatizibwamu nze?”" 
Mark10:39 Ne bamugamba nti, “ Tuyinza.” Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Ekikompe nze kye nnywako mulinywako; n'okubatiza kwe mbatizibwamu nze mulibatizibwa;" 
Mark10:40 naye okutuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo oba ku gwa kkono, si nze nkugaba, naye kw'abo be kwategekerwa.”" 
Mark10:41 Awo ekkumi (10) bwe baawulira, ne batandika okusunguwalira Yakobo ne Yokaana." 
Mark10:42 Yesu n'abayita, n'abagamba nti, “ Mumanyi ng'abo abalowoozebwa okufuga ab'amawanga babafuza amaanyi; n'abakulu baabwe babatwala lwa mpaka." 
Mark10:43 Naye mu mmwe tekiri bwe kityo: naye buli ayagala okubeera omukulu mu mmwe anaabanga muweereza wammwe; 
Mark10:44 na buli ayagala okuba ow'olubereberye mu mmwe anaabanga muddu wa bonna. 
Mark10:45 Kubanga mazima Omwana w'omuntu teyajja kuweerezebwa, wabula okuweereza, n'okuwaayo obulamu bwe okununula abangi.”" 
Mark10:46 Awo ne batuuka e Yeriko bwe yava mu Yeriko n'abayigirizwa be, n'ekibiina kinene, omwana wa Timaayo, Battimaayo, omusabi omuzibe w'amaaso, yali atudde ku mabbali g'ekkubo." 
Mark10:47 Awo bwe yawulira nga Yesu Omunazaaleesi ye wuuyo, n'atandika okwogerera waggulu n'okugamba nti, “Yesu, Omwana wa Dawudi, onsaasire.”" 
Mark10:48 Bangi ne bamuboggolera okusirika: naye ne yeeyongera nnyo okwogerera waggulu nti, “ Omwana wa Dawudi, onsaasire.”" 
Mark10:49 Awo Yesu n'ayimirira n'agamba nti, “ Mumuyite.” Ne bayita omuzibe w'amaaso, ne bamugamba nti, “ Guma omwoyo; golokoka, akuyita.”" 
Mark10:50 Naye n'asuula olugoye lwe, n'asituka, n'ajja eri Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Yesu n'amuddamu, n'agamba nti, “ Oyagala nkukole ntya?” Omuzibe w'amaaso n'amugamba nti, “Labooni, njagala nzibule.”" 
Mark10:52 Awo Yesu n'amugamba nti, “ Genda; okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza.” amangwago n'azibula, n'amugoberera mu kkubo." 
Mark11:1 Awo bwe baali banaatera okutuuka e Yerusaalemi nga batuuse e Besufaage n'e Bessaniya, ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni, n'atuma ku bayigirizwa be babiri," 
Mark11:2 n'abagamba nti, “Mugende mu mbuga ebali mu maaso: amangwago bwe munaayingira omwo, munaalaba omwana gw'endogoyi ogusibiddwa, oguteebagalwangako muntu n'akatono; muguyimbule, muguleete." 
Mark11:3 Omuntu bw'abagamba nti, ‘Mukola ki ekyo?’ mugamba nti, ‘Mukama waffe ye agwetaaga;’ amangwago anaaguweereza eno.”" 
Mark11:4 Ne bagenda, ne basanga omwana gw'endogoyi nga gusibiddwa ku mulyango ebweru mu luguudo; ne baguyimbula." 
Mark11:5 Abamu ku abo abaali bayimiridde awo ne babagamba nti, “ Mukola ki okuyimbula omwana gw'endogoyi?”" 
Mark11:6 Ne babagamba nga Yesu bwe yabagamba: ne babaleka. 
Mark11:7 Ne baleeta omwana gw'endogoyi eri Yesu, ne bagusuulako engoye zaabwe; n'agwebagala." 
Mark11:8 Bangi ne baaliira engoye zaabwe mu kkubo; abalala ne baaliira amalagala g'emiti, ge baatema mu nnimiro." 
Mark11:9 Abaali bakulembedde n'abaali bava emabega ne boogerera waggulu nti, “ Ozaana; Aweereddwa omukisa ajja mu linnya lya Mukama:" 
Mark11:10 Buweereddwa omukisa obwakabaka obujja, obwa jjajjaffe Dawudi: Ozaana waggulu ennyo.”" 
Mark11:11 N'atuuka mu Yerusaalemi n'ayingira mu Yeekaalu; bwe yamala okwetoolooza amaaso okulaba byonna, obudde bwali nga buwungeera, n'afuluma n'agenda e Bessaniya n'ekkumi n'ababiri (12)." 
Mark11:12 Awo enkeera, bwe baali bavudde e Bessaniya n'alumwa enjala." 
Mark11:13 Awo bwe yalengera omutiini oguliko amalagala, n'agutuukako, alabe oba nga anaasangako ekibala kyonna, awo bwe yagutuukako, n'atalabako bibala wabula amalagala; kubanga si bye byali ebiro by'ettiini." 
Mark11:14 N'addamu n'agugamba nti, “Okusooka leero okutuusa emirembe n'emirembe omuntu talyanga ku bibala byo.” Abayigirizwa be ne bawulira." 
Mark11:15 Awo ne batuuka e Yerusaalemi, n'ayingira mu Yeekaalu, n'atandika okugobamu abaali batunda n'abagulira mu Yeekaalu, n'avuunika emmeeza ez'abawaanyisa effeeza, n'entebe z'abo abaali batunda amayiba;" 
Mark11:16 n'ataganya muntu okuyisa ekintu kyonna mu Yeekaalu. 
Mark11:17 N'ayigiriza, n'abagamba nti, “ Tekyawandiikibwa nti, ‘ Ennyumba yange eneeyitibwanga nnyumba ya kusabirangamu amawanga gonna?’ Naye mmwe mugifudde mpuku ya banyazi.”" 
Mark11:18 Bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi bwe baakiwulira, ne basala amagezi bwe banaamutta: kubanga baamutya, kubanga ebibiina byonna baawuniikirira olw'okuyigiriza kwe." 
Mark11:19 Awo buli kawungeezi yafulumanga mu kibuga. 
Mark11:20 Awo enkeera ku makya, bwe baali nga bayita, ne balaba omutiini nga guvudde ku kikolo okukala." 
Mark11:21 Peetero bwe yajjukira n'amugamba nti, “Labbi, laba, omutiini gwe wakolimira gukaze.”" 
Mark11:22 Yesu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “ Mube n'okukkiriza mu Katonda." 
Mark11:23 Mazima mbagamba nti Buli aligamba olusozi luno nti, ‘ Sigulibwa, osuulibwe mu nnyanja;’ nga tabuusabuusa mu mutima gwe naye ng'akkiriza nga ky'ayogera kikolebwa, alikiweebwa." 
Mark11:24 Kyenva mbagamba nti Ebigambo byonna byonna bye musaba n'okwegayirira, mukkirize nga mubiweereddwa, era mulibifuna" 
Mark11:25 Awo bwe munaayimiriranga nga musaba, musonyiwenga, bwe mubanga n'ekigambo ku muntu; ne Kitammwe ali mu ggulu abasonyiwe ebyonoono byammwe." 
Mark11:26 Naye bwe mutasonyiwa, era ne Kitammwe ali mu ggulu talisonyiwa byonoono byammwe.”" 
Mark11:27 Ate ne batuuka e Yerusaalemi; awo bwe yali ng'atambula mu Yeekaalu, ne bajja w'ali bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi n'abakadde;" 
Mark11:28 ne bamugamba nti, “ Buyinza ki obukukoza bino? Oba ani eyakuwa obuyinza buno okukola bino?”" 
Mark11:29 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “ Nange ka mbabuuze mmwe ekigambo kimu, munziremu, nange nnaababuulira mmwe obuyinza bwe buli obunkoza bino." 
Mark11:30 Okubatiza kwa Yokaana kwava mu ggulu, nantiki mu bantu? Munziremu.”" 
Mark11:31 Ne beebuuzaganya bokka na bokka nga bagamba nti, “ Bwe tunaagamba nti, ‘Kwava mu ggulu;’ anaagamba nti, ‘ Kale kiki ekyabalobera okumukkiriza?’" 
Mark11:32 Naye tugambe nti, ‘Kwava mu bantu? ’ ” Baatya abantu; kubanga bonna baalowooza mazima Yokaana okuba nnabbi." 
Mark11:33 Ne baddamu Yesu, ne bamugamba nti, “ Tetumanyi.” Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Era nange siibabuulire obuyinza bwe buli obunkoza bino.”" 
Mark12:1 Awo Yesu n'atandika okwogerera nabo mu ngero ng'agamba nti, “ Omuntu yasimba olusuku lw'emizabbibu, n'alwetooloozako olukomera, n'asimamu essogolero, n'azimbamu ekigo, n'alupangisa abalimi, n'agenda mu nsi endala." 
Mark12:2 Awo omwaka bwe gwatuuka n'atuma omuddu eri abalimi, abalimi bamuwe ebibala by'emizabbibu gye." 
Mark12:3 Ne bamukwata, ne bamukuba, n'addayo ngalo nsa." 
Mark12:4 Ate n'abatumira omuddu omulala, oyo ne bamukuba olubale, ne bamuswaza." 
Mark12:5 N'atuma omulala; oyo ne bamutta: n'abalala bangi; abamu nga babakuba, abalala nga babatta." 
Mark12:6 Yali asigazzaawo omu yekka ow'okutuma, ye mutabani we omwagalwa, bw'atyo n'amutuma gyebali, ng'agamba nti, ‘Bajja kussaamu mutabani wange ekitiibwa.’" 
Mark12:7 Naye abalimi bali ne bateesa bokka na bokka nti, ‘Ono ye musika, kale tumutte, n'obusika buliba bwaffe.’" 
Mark12:8 Ne bamukwata, ne bamutta, ne bamusuula ebweru w'olusuku lw'emizabbibu." 
Mark12:9 Kiki nannyini lusuku lw'emizabbibu kyalikola? Alijja, alizikiriza abalimi, n'olusuku lw'emizabbibu aliruwa balala.”" 
Mark12:10 Temusomanga n'akatono ekyo ekyawandiikibwa nti, “Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, Eryo lyafuulibwa omutwe ogw'oku nsonda:" 
Mark12:11 Ekyo kyava eri Mukama, Era kya kitalo mu maaso gaffe?”" 
Mark12:12 Ne basala amagezi okumukwata; ne batya ebibiina: kubanga baategeera ng'ageredde ku bo olugero olwo: ne bamuleka, ne bagenda." 
Mark12:13 Ne batuma gy'ali ab'omu Bafalisaayo n'Abakerodiyaani okumutega mu bigambo. 
Mark12:14 Awo bwe bajja, ne bamugamba nti, “ Omuyigiriza, tumanyi ggwe ng'oli wa mazima, so ebigambo by'omuntu yenna tobissaako mwoyo: kubanga tososola mu bantu, naye oyigiriza ekkubo lya Katonda mu mazima: kale kirungi okuwanga Kayisaali omusolo, nantiki si weewaawo?" 
Mark12:15 Tuwengayo, oba tetuwangayo?” Naye bwe yategeera bunnanfuusi bwabwe, n'abagamba nti, “ Munkemera ki? Mundeetere eddinaali, ngirabe.”" 
Mark12:16 Ne bagireeta. N'abagamba nti, “Ekifaananyi kino n'obuwandiikeko buno by'ani?” Ne bamugamba nti, “ Bya Kayisaali.”" 
Mark12:17 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “ Ebya Kayisaali mumuwenga Kayisaali, n'ebya Katonda mumuwenga Katonda.” Ne bamwewuunya nnyo." 
Mark12:18 Awo Abasaddukaayo, abagamba nti tewali kuzuukira, ne bajja w'ali; ne bamubuuza nti," 
Mark12:19 “Omuyigiriza, Musa yatuwandiikira nti Muganda w'omuntu bw'afanga, n'aleka mukazi we, nga tazadde mwana, muganda we atwalanga mukazi we, n'azaalira muganda we abaana." 
Mark12:20 Kale waaliwo ab'oluganda musanvu: ow'olubereberye n'awasa omukazi, n'afa, nga talese baana;" 
Mark12:21 ow'okubiri n'amuwasa, n'afa, era naye nga talese baana; n'ow'okusatu bw'atyo:" 
Mark12:22 bonna omusanvu ne bafa nga tebalesewo baana. Oluvannyuma bonna nga baweddewo n'omukazi n'afa. 
Mark12:23 Kale bwe balizuukira aliba muka ani ku bo? Kubanga bonna omusanvu baamuwasa.” 
Mark12:24 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Si kyemuva mukyama nga temumanyi ebyawandiikibwa newakubadde amaanyi ga Katonda?" 
Mark12:25 Kubanga bwe balizuukira mu bafu tebaliwasa, so tebaliwayira; naye baliba nga bamalayika ab'omu ggulu." 
Mark12:26 Naye eby'abafu okuzuukizibwa; temusomanga mu kitabo kya Musa ku Kisaka, Katonda bwe yamubuulira ng'agamba nti, ‘ Nze ndi Katonda wa Ibulayimu, era Katonda wa Isaaka, era Katonda wa Yakobo?" 
Mark12:27 Si Katonda wa bafu, naye wa balamu,’ mukyama nnyo.”" 
Mark12:28 Awo omu ku bawandiisi n'ajja n'awulira nga beebuuzaganya bokka na bokka, n'amanya ng'abazzeemu bulungi, n'amubuuza nti, “ Tteeka ki ery'olubereberye ku gonna?”" 
Mark12:29 Yesu n'addamu nti, “ Ery'olubereberye lye lino nti, ‘Wulira Isiraeri; Mukama Katonda waffe, Mukama ye omu;" 
Mark12:30 era yagalanga Mukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'obulamu bwo bwonna, n'amagezi go gonna, n'amaanyi go gonna.’" 
Mark12:31 Eryokubiri lye lino nti, ‘ Yagalanga muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka.’ Tewali tteeka ddala erisinga ago obukulu.”" 
Mark12:32 Omuwandiisi n'amugamba nti, “Mazima, Omuyigiriza, oyogedde bulungi nga Katonda ali omu. So tewali mulala wabula ye:" 
Mark12:33 n'okumwagala n'omutima gwonna, n'okutegeera kwonna, n'amaanyi gonna, n'okwagala muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka kusinga nnyo ebiweebwayo byonna ebiramba ebyokebwa ne ssaddaaka.”" 
Mark12:34 Awo Yesu bwe yalaba ng'amuzzeemu ng'omutegeevu, n'amugamba nti, “ Toli wala obwakabaka bwa Katonda.” Awo ne wataba muntu ayaŋŋaanga okumubuuza nate." 
Mark12:35 Yesu bwe yali ng'ayigiriza mu Yeekaalu n'abuuza nti, “Lwaki abawandiisi bagamba nti, Kristo mwana wa Dawudi?”" 
Mark12:36 Dawudi yennyini yagamba mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu nti, “Mukama yagamba Mukama wange nti Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, Okutuusa lwe ndifuula abalabe bo entebe y'ebigere byo.”" 
Mark12:37 Dawudi yennyini amuyita Mukama we, abeera atya omwana we? Ab'omu kibiina ne bamuwulira n'essanyu." 
Mark12:38 Awo mu kuyigiriza kwe n'abagamba nti, “Mwekuume abawandiisi abaagala okutambula nga bambadde engoye empanvu, n'okulamusibwa mu butale," 
Mark12:39 n'entebe ez'oku mwanjo mu makuŋŋaaniro n'ebifo eby'ekitiibwa mu mbaga; 
Mark12:40 abalya ennyumba za bannamwandu, era abasaba ennyo mu bunnanfuusi; abo balizza omusango ogusinga obunene.”" 
Mark12:41 Awo Yesu n'atuula okwolekera eggwanika, n'alaba ebibiina bwe bisuula ensimbi mu ggwanika: bangi abaali abagagga abaasuulamu ebingi." 
Mark12:42 Awo nnamwandu omu omwavu n'ajja, n'asuulamu ebitundu bibiri, ye kodulante." 
Mark12:43 N'ayita abayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti, “ Mazima mbagamba nti Nnamwandu ono omwavu asuddemu bingi okusinga bonna abasuula mu ggwanika:" 
Mark12:44 kubanga bonna basuddemu ku bibafikkiridde; naye oyo mu kwetaaga kwe asuddemu byonna by'ali nabyo, bwe bulamu bwe bwonna.”" 
Mark13:1 Awo bwe yafuluma mu Yeekaalu, omu ku bayigirizwa be n'amugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, laba, amayinja gano bwe gali, n'enzimba eno bw'eri.”" 
Mark13:2 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “ Olaba ebizimbe bino eby'ekitalo? Tewalisigala wano jjinja na limu ku linnaalyo eritalisuulibwa wansi.”" 
Mark13:3 Bwe yali atudde ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni ng'ayolekedde Yeekaalu, Peetero ne Yakobo ne Yokaana ne Andereya ne bamubuuza mu kyama nti," 
Mark13:4 “Tubuulire, ebyo biribaawo ddi? Era akabonero ki akalibaawo ng'ebyo byonna bigenda okutuukirira?”" 
Mark13:5 Yesu n'atandika okubagamba nti, Mwekuume, omuntu yenna tabakyamyanga." 
Mark13:6 Bangi abalijja mu linnya lyange nga boogera nti, Nze nzuuyo; era balikyamya bangi." 
Mark13:7 Awo bwe muwuliranga entalo n'ettutumo ly'entalo, temweraliikiriranga: kibigwanira okubaawo; naye enkomerero ng'ekyali." 
Mark13:8 Kubanga eggwanga lirirumba ggwanga linnaalyo, n'obwakabaka obwakabaka bunnaabwo: walibaawo ebikankano mu bifo bingi; walibaawo enjala: ebyo lwe lubereberye lw'okulumwa." 
Mark13:9 Naye mwekuume mwekka: kubanga balibawaayo mu nkiiko: mulikubirwa ne mu makuŋŋaaniro; era muliyimirira mu maaso g'abaamasaza ne bakabaka ku lwange, okubeera abajulirwa mu bo." 
Mark13:10 Enjiri kigigwanira okumala okubuulirwa amawanga gonna. 
Mark13:11 Era bwe babatwalanga okubawaayo, temusookanga kweraliikirira bwe munaayogera: naye kyonna kyonna kye muweebwanga mu kiseera ekyo, ekyo kye mwogeranga, kubanga si mmwe mwogera, wabula Omwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Mark13:12 Ow'oluganda anaawangayo muganda we okumutta, ne kitaawe w'omwana anaamuwangayo; abaana banaajeemeranga abaabazaala, banaabassissanga." 
Mark13:13 Munnaakyayibwanga bonna olw'erinnya lyange: naye agumiikiriza okutuusa enkomerero oyo ye alirokoka. 
Mark13:14 Naye bwe muliraba eky'omuzizo ekizikiriza nnabbi Danyeri kye yayogerako nga kiyimiridde awatakisaanira (asoma ategeere) kale abali mu Buyudaaya baddukiranga ku nsozi; 
Mark13:15 ali waggulu ku nju takkanga, so tayingiranga kuggyamu kintu mu nju ye:" 
Mark13:16 n'ali mu nnimiro taddanga kutwala lugoye lwe. 
Mark13:17 Naye ziribasanga abaliba embuto, n'abaliba bayonsa mu nnaku ezo." 
Mark13:18 Musabe bireme okutuukira mu kiseera eky'obutiti. 
Mark13:19 Kubanga ennaku ezo ziriba za kulabiramu nnaku, nga tezibangawo bwe zityo kasookedde Katonda atonda ebyatondebwa okutuusa kaakano, era teziriddamu nate." 
Mark13:20 Era singa Mukama teyasala ku nnaku ezo, tewandirokose muntu yenna, naye olw'abalonde be yalonda yazisalako." 
Mark13:21 Mu biro ebyo omuntu bw'abagambanga nti Laba, Kristo ali wano; oba ali wali; temukkirizanga:" 
Mark13:22 kubanga bakristo ab'obulimba ne bannabbi ab'obulimba balijja, balikola obubonero n'ebyewuunyo, okukyamya, oba nga kiyinzika n'abalonde." 
Mark13:23 Naye mwekuume mmwe: laba, mbabuulidde byonna nga tebinnabaawo." 
Mark13:24 Naye mu nnaku ezo, okulaba ennaku okwo nga kuwedde, enjuba erikwata ekizikiza, n'omwezi teguliwa kitangaala kyagwo," 
Mark13:25 n'emmunyeenye zirigwa okuva mu ggulu, n'amaanyi ag'omu ggulu galikankanyizibwa." 
Mark13:26 Kale ne balyoka balaba Omwana w'omuntu ng'ajjira mu bire n'amaanyi amangi n'ekitiibwa. 
Mark13:27 Awo n'alyoka atuma bamalayika be, alikuŋŋaanya abalonde be okuva mu mpewo ennya, okuva ku nkomerero y'ensi okutuusa ku nkomerero y'eggulu." 
Mark13:28 Era muyigire ku mutiini, ettabi lyagwo bwe ligejja n'amalagala ne gatojjera, mutegeera ng'omwaka guli kumpi;" 
Mark13:29 era nammwe bwe mutyo, bwe mulabanga ebyo nga bituuse, mutegeere ng'ali kumpi, ku luggi." 
Mark13:30 Mazima mbagamba nti, Emirembe gino tegiriggwaawo n'akatono, okutuusa ebyo byonna lwe birituukirira." 
Mark13:31 Eggulu n'ensi biriggwaawo, naye ebigambo byange tebiriggwaawo n'akatono." 
Mark13:32 Naye eby'olunaku olwo oba ekiseera ekyo tewali amanyi, newakubadde bamalayika abali mu ggulu, newakubadde Omwana, wabula Kitange." 
Mark13:33 Mwekuumenga, mutunulenga, musabenga: kubanga temumanyi biro we birituukira." 
Mark13:34 Ng'omuntu eyaleka ennyumba ye n'atambula mu nsi endala ng'awadde abaddu be obuyinza, buli muntu omulimu gwe, n'alagira omuggazi okutunula." 
Mark13:35 Kale mutunule: kubanga temumanyi mukama w'ennyumba w'alijjira, oba kawungeezi, oba ttumbi, oba ng'enkoko ekookolima, oba nkya;" 
Mark13:36 si kulwa ng'akomawo amangwago n'abasanga nga mwebase. 
Mark13:37 Era kye mbagamba mmwe mbagamba bonna nti, Mutunule." 
Mark14:1 Awo bwe waali wakyabulayo ennaku bbiri, embaga y'Okuyitako ne y'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa okutuuka, bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi ne basala amagezi bwe banaamukwata bamutte;" 
Mark14:2 kubanga baagamba nti, “Si ku lunaku lwa mbaga, kubanga abantu bayinza okuleetawo akegugungo.”" 
Mark14:3 Awo bwe yali mu Bessaniya mu nnyumba ya Simooni omugenge, ng'atudde ku mmere, omukazi eyalina eccupa ey'amafuta ag'omugavu ogw'omuwendo omungi ennyo n'ajja, n'ayasa eccupa, amafuta n'agafuka ku mutwe gwa Yesu." 
Mark14:4 Naye waaliwo mu bo abamu abaasunguwala ne beebuuza nti, “ Amafuta gafudde ki bwe gatyo?" 
Mark14:5 Kubanga amafuta gano ganditundiddwa eddinaali bisatu (300) n'okusingawo ne ziweebwa abaavu.” Ne bamwemulugunyiza. 
Mark14:6 Naye Yesu n'agamba nti, “Mumuleke; mumunakuwaliza ki? Ankoledde ekikolwa ekirungi." 
Mark14:7 Kubanga abaavu be muli nabo bulijjo; na buli lwe mwagala muyinza okubakola obulungi: naye nze temuli nange bulijjo. 
Mark14:8 Akoze nga bw'ayinzizza: asoose okufuka amafuta ku mubiri gwange nga bukyali okunziika. 
Mark14:9 Mazima mbagamba nti Enjiri buli gy'eneebuulirwanga mu nsi zonna, kino omukazi ono ky'akoze kinaayogerwangako okumujjukira.”" 
Mark14:10 Awo Yuda Isukalyoti, eyali omu ku kkumi n'ababiri (12), n'agenda eri bakabona abakulu alabe bw'anaalyamu Yesu olukwe abamuwe." 
Mark14:11 Awo bwe baawulira ne basanyuka, ne basuubiza okumuwa effeeza. N'anoonya ebbanga wanaamuliramu olukwe." 
Mark14:12 Awo ku lunaku olwasooka olw'embaga ey'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa kwe battira omwana gw'endiga ogw'Okuyitako, abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza nti, “Oyagala tugende wa tutegeke gy'onooliira Okuyitako?”" 
Mark14:13 N'atuma ab'oku bayigirizwa be babiri, n'abagamba nti, “Mugende mu kibuga, anaasisinkana nammwe omusajja nga yeetisse ensuwa y'amazzi: mumugoberere;" 
Mark14:14 muyingire mu nnyumba mw'anaayingira, mugambe nnannyini nnyumba nti, ‘Omuyigiriza agambye nti, Ekisenge kiri ludda wa mwe nnaaliira Okuyitako n'abayigirizwa bange?’" 
Mark14:15 Anaabalaga ye yennyini ekisenge ekinene ekya waggulu ekitegeke era ekirongooseddwa, mututegekere omwo.”" 
Mark14:16 Awo abayigirizwa ne bagenda ne bajja ku kibuga, ne balaba nga bwe yabagambye: ne bategeka Okuyitako." 
Mark14:17 Awo bwe bwawungeera n'ajja n'ekkumi n'ababiri (12). 
Mark14:18 Awo bwe baali batudde ku mmere, Yesu n'agamba nti, “ Mazima mbagamba nti Omu ku mmwe alya nange anandyamu olukwe.”" 
Mark14:19 ne batandika okunakuwala, n'okumubuuza kinnoomu nti, “Ye nze?”" 
Mark14:20 N'abagamba nti, “Omu ku kkumi n'ababiri (12) akoza nange mu kibya ye wuuyo." 
Mark14:21 Kubanga Omwana w'omuntu agenda nga bwe kyamuwandiikwako: naye zirimusanga omuntu oyo alyamu olukwe Omwana w'omuntu! kyandibadde kirungi singa omuntu oyo teyazaalibwa.” 
Mark14:22 Awo bwe baali balya, n'atoola omugaati, awo bwe yamala okwebaza n'agumenyamu, n'abawa, n'agamba nti, “Mutoole; guno gwe mubiri gwange.”" 
Mark14:23 Ate n'addira ekikompe, awo bwe yamala okwebaza, n'akibawa; ne bakinywako bonna." 
Mark14:24 N'abagamba nti, “Guno gwe musaayi gwange ogw'endagaano, oguyiika olw'abangi." 
Mark14:25 Mazima mbagamba nti Sirinywa nate ku kibala ku muzabbibu, okutuusa ku lunaku luli lwe ndikinywa nga kiggya mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Mark14:26 Awo bwe baamala okuyimba oluyimba, ne bafuluma ne bagenda ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni." 
Mark14:27 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Muneesittala mwenna: kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘Ndikuba omusumba, n'endiga zirisaasaana.’" 
Mark14:28 Naye bwe ndimala okuzuukizibwa, ndibakulembera okugenda mu Ggaliraaya.”" 
Mark14:29 Naye Peetero n'amugamba nti, “Newakubadde nga bonna baneesittala, naye si nze.”" 
Mark14:30 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “ Mazima nkugamba nti ggwe leero, ekiro kino, enkoko eneeba tennakookolima emirundi ebiri, ononneegaana emirundi esatu.”" 
Mark14:31 Naye ne yeeyongera nnyo okwogera nti, “Newakubadde nga kiŋŋwanira okufiira awamu naawe, siikwegaane n'akatono.” Era bonna ne bagamba bwe batyo." 
Mark14:32 Awo ne bajja mu kifo erinnya lyakyo Gesusemane: n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Mutuule wano mmale okusaba.”" 
Mark14:33 N'atwala Peetero ne Yakobo ne Yokaana wamu naye, n'atandika okuwuniikirira n'okweraliikirira ennyo." 
Mark14:34 N'abagamba nti, “ emmeeme yange eriko ennaku nnyingi, zigenda kunzita: mubeere wano, mutunule.”" 
Mark14:35 N'atambulako katono, n'avuunama n'asaba, oba nga kiyinzika, ekiseera kimuyiteko." 
Mark14:36 N'agamba nti, “Aba, Kitange, byonna biyinzika gy'oli; nzigyako ekikompe kino; naye si nga nze bwe njagala, wabula nga ggwe bw'oyagala.”" 
Mark14:37 Awo n'ajja, n'abasanga nga beebase, n'agamba Peetero nti, “Simooni, weebase? Tosobodde kutunula wadde essaawa emu bw'eti?" 
Mark14:38 Mutunule, musabe, muleme okuyingira mu kukemebwa: omwoyo gwagala, naye omubiri munafu.”" 
Mark14:39 Nate n'addayo, n'asaba, n'ayogera ebigambo bye bimu na biri." 
Mark14:40 N'akomawo nate, n'abasanga nga beebase, kubanga amaaso gaabwe gaali gakambira. Ne batamanya kya kumuddamu." 
Mark14:41 N'ajja omulundi ogwokusatu, n'abagamba nti, “ Mwebakire ddala kaakano, muwummule: kinaamala; ekiseera kituuse; laba, Omwana w'omuntu aweebwayo mu mikono gy'abalina ebibi." 
Mark14:42 Muyimuke, tugende; laba, andyamu olukwe anaatera okutuuka.”" 
Mark14:43 Awo amangwago, bwe yali akyayogera, Yuda, omu ku kkumi n'ababiri (12), n'ajja n'ekibiina wamu naye abaalina ebitala n'emiggo, nga bava eri bakabona abakulu, n'abawandiisi n'abakadde." 
Mark14:44 Yuda eyamulyamu olukwe yali abawadde akabonero nti, “Gwe nnaanywegera, nga ye wuuyo; mumukwate, mumutwale nga mumunywezezza.”" 
Mark14:45 Awo bwe yatuuka, amangwago n'ajja gy'ali n'agamba nti, “Labbi;” n'amunywegera nnyo." 
Mark14:46 Ne bamussaako emikono gyabwe, ne bamukwata." 
Mark14:47 Naye omu ku abo abaali bayimiridde awo n'asowola ekitala, n'atema omuddu wa kabona asinga obukulu n'amusalako okutu." 
Mark14:48 Awo Yesu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Munjijiridde nga bwe mujjira omunyazi, n'ebitala n'emiggo okunkwata?" 
Mark14:49 Buli lunaku nnabeeranga nammwe mu Yeekaalu nga njigiriza, nga temwankwata: naye kino kikoleddwa, ebyawandiikibwa bituukirire.”" 
Mark14:50 Awo bonna ne bamwabulira ne badduka. 
Mark14:51 Awo omulenzi omu n'amugoberera, eyali yeebikkiridde olugoye olw'ekitaani lwokka ku mubiri: ne bamukwata;" 
Mark14:52 naye n'abalekera olugoye olw'ekitaani, n'adduka bwereere." 
Mark14:53 Awo ne batwala Yesu eri kabona asinga obukulu. Bakabona abakulu bonna n'abakadde n'abawandiisi ne bakuŋŋaana. 
Mark14:54 Awo Peetero n'agoberera Yesu ng'ali walako, n'atuuka munda mu luggya lwa kabona asinga obukulu, n'atuula n'abakuumi ng'ayota omuliro." 
Mark14:55 Awo bakabona abakulu n'ab'omu lukiiko bonna ne banoonya obujulizi kwe banaasinziira okutta Yesu, naye ne bubula." 
Mark14:56 Kubanga bangi abaaleeta obujulizi obw'obulimba ku ye, era obujulizi bwabwe bwali bukoonagana." 
Mark14:57 Awo abamu ne bayimuka ne bamuwaayiriza, nga bagamba nti," 
Mark14:58 “Ffe twamuwulira ng'agamba nti, ‘Ndimenya Yeekaalu eno eyakolebwa n'emikono, ne mu nnaku ssatu ndizimba endala etalikolebwa na mikono.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Era n'obujulizi obwo tebwakwatagana. 
Mark14:60 Awo kabona asinga obukulu n'ayimirira wakati, n'abuuza Yesu, nti, “Ggwe toyanukula n'akatono? Kiki kye bakulumiriza bano?”" 
Mark14:61 Naye n'asirika busirisi, n'atayanukula n'akatono. Nate kabona asinga obukulu n'amubuuza nti, “Ggwe Kristo, Omwana w'oyo eyeebazibwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Ye Nze, nammwe muliraba Omwana w'omuntu ng'atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'amaanyi, ng'ajja n'ebire eby'eggulu.”" 
Mark14:63 Awo kabona asinga obukulu n'ayuza engoye ze, n'agamba nti, “Twetaagira ki nate abajulirwa?" 
Mark14:64 Muwulidde obuvvoozi bwe: mulowooza mutya?” Bonna ne bamusalira omusango ng'asaanira okufa. 
Mark14:65 Awo abamu ne batandika okumuwandira amalusu, n'okumubikka mu maaso, n'okumukuba ebikonde n'okumugamba nti, “Lagula.” Abakuumi nabo ne bamutwala nga bamukuba empi." 
Mark14:66 Awo Peetero bwe yali wansi mu luggya, omu ku bazaana bakabona asinga obukulu n'ajja;" 
Mark14:67 awo bwe yalaba Peetero ng'ayota omuliro, n'amutunuulira, n'amugamba nti, “Naawe wali n'Omunazaaleesi, Yesu.”" 
Mark14:68 Naye ye ne yeegaana ng'agamba nti, “ Simanyi, so sitegeera ky'oyogera.” N'agenda ebweru mu kisasi; enkoko n'ekookolima." 
Mark14:69 Awo omuzaana n'amulaba, n'atandika era okubagamba abaali bayimiridde awo nti, “ Omusajja oyo omu ku bo.”" 
Mark14:70 Peetero n'ayongera okwegaana. Awo bwe waayitawo ekiseera kitono, abaali bayimiridde awo ne bagamba Peetero nate nti, “Mazima oli omu ku bo, kubanga oli Mugaliraaya.”" 
Mark14:71 Peetero n'atandika okukolima n'okulayira nti, “Simanyi muntu ono gwe mwogerako.”" 
Mark14:72 Amangwago enkoko n'ekookolima omulundi ogwokubiri. Awo Peetero n'ajjukira ekigambo Yesu bwe yamugambye nti, “Enkoko eneeba tennakookolima mirundi ebiri, ononneegaana emirundi esatu.” Awo Peetero n'atulika n'akaaba amaziga." 
Mark15:1 Awo amangwago bwe bwakya enkya, bakabona abakulu n'abakadde n'abawandiisi n'ab'omu lukiiko bonna ne bateesa, ne basiba Yesu, ne bamutwala, ne bamuwaayo eri Piraato." 
Mark15:2 Awo Piraato n'amubuuza nti, “ Ggwe Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?” Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “ Kyoyogedde kye kyo.”" 
Mark15:3 Awo bakabona abakulu ne bamuloopa ebigambo bingi. 
Mark15:4 Awo Piraato n'amubuuza nate, ng'agamba nti, “ Toyanukula n'akatono? Laba ebigambo bingi bye bakuloopa.”" 
Mark15:5 Naye Yesu n'ataddamu nate kigambo; Piraato n'okwewuunya ne yeewuunya. 
Mark15:6 Awo ku mbaga yabateeranga omusibe omu gwe baamusaba. 
Mark15:7 Awo waaliwo omu ayitibwa Balaba, eyasibibwa n'abo abaajeema, abatta abantu mu kegugungo." 
Mark15:8 Awo ekibiina ne kijja ne kitandika okusaba Piraato okubakola nga bwe yabakolanga. 
Mark15:9 Awo Piraato n'abaddamu, nti, “Mwagala mbateere Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
Mark15:10 Kubanga yategeera nga bakabona abakulu baamuweesezzaayo buggya. 
Mark15:11 Naye bakabona abakulu ne bafukuutirira ekibiina babateere Balaba mu kifo kya Yesu. 
Mark15:12 Awo Piraato n'addamu nate n'ababuuza nti, “ Kale nnaamukola ntya gwe muyita Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
Mark15:13 Awo ne boogerera waggulu nate nti, “ Mukomerere.”" 
Mark15:14 Awo Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Kazzi kibi ki ky'akoze?” Naye ne beeyongera nnyo okwogerera waggulu nti, “Mukomerere.”" 
Mark15:15 Awo Piraato bwe yali ayagala okusanyusa ekibiina, n'abateera Balaba, n'awaayo Yesu okukomererwa ng'amaze okumukuba." 
Mark15:16 Awo abasserikale ne bamutwala munda mu luggya oluyitibwa Pulayitoliyo; ne bayita ekitongole kyonna okukuŋŋaana. 
Mark15:17 Ne bamwambaza olugoye olw'effulungu ne baluka engule ey'amaggwa ne bagimutikkira; 
Mark15:18 ne batandika okumulamusa nti, “Mirembe, Kabaka w'Abayudaaya!”" 
Mark15:19 Ne bamukuba olumuli mu mutwe, ne bamuwandira amalusu, ne bafukamira, ne bamusinza." 
Mark15:20 Awo bwe baamala okumuduulira, ne bamwambulamu olugoye olw'effulungu, ne bamwambaza engoye ze, ne bamutwala ne bamufulumya okumukomerera." 
Mark15:21 Ne bawaliriza omuntu eyali ayita, Simooni ow'e Kuleene, ng'ava mu kyalo, kitaawe wa Alegezanda ne Luufo, okugenda nabo okwetikka omusalaba gwe." 
Mark15:22 Ne bamuleeta mu kifo Gologoosa, amakulu gaakyo, “Kifo kya kiwanga.”" 
Mark15:23 Ne bamuwa omwenge ogutabuddwamu envumbo: naye ye n'atagukkiriza. 
Mark15:24 Awo ne bamukomerera, ne bagabana ebyambalo bye, nga babikubirako obululu, buli muntu ky'anaatwala." 
Mark15:25 Awo essaawa zaali ziri ssatu, ne bamukomerera." 
Mark15:26 Awo ebbaluwa ey'omusango gwe n'ewandiikibwa waggulu nti, “KABAKA w'Abayudaaya.”" 
Mark15:27 Era n'abanyazi babiri ne babakomerera wamu naye; omu ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, n'omulala ku gwa kkono." 
Mark15:28 Olwo ekyawandiikibwa ne kituukirira, ekigamba nti, “N'abalirwa awamu n'abasobya.”" 
Mark15:29 Awo abaali bayita ne bamuvuma nga banyeenya emitwe gyabwe, nga bagamba nti, “So, ggwe amenya Yeekaalu n'ogizimbira ennaku essatu," 
Mark15:30 weerokole, ove ku musalaba.”" 
Mark15:31 Era bakabona abakulu ne baduula bwe batyo n'abawandiisi nabo ne bagamba nti, “ Yalokola balala; tayinza kwerokola yekka." 
Mark15:32 Kristo Kabaka wa Isiraeri ave kaakano ku musalaba, tulyoke tulabe tukkirize.” Ne bali abaakomererwa naye ne bamuvuma." 
Mark15:33 Awo essaawa bwe zaali ziri mukaaga ne waba ekizikiza ku nsi yonna okutuusa ku ssaawa ey'omwenda. 
Mark15:34 Awo mu ssaawa ey'omwenda Yesu n'akaaba n'eddoboozi ddene nti, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakusaani?” Amakulu gaakyo nti, “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, kiki ekikundesezza?”" 
Mark15:35 Awo abamu ku abo abaali bayimiridde awo bwe baawulira ne bagamba nti, “Laba, ayita Eriya.”" 
Mark15:36 Awo ne wabaawo omu n'adduka, n'annyika ekyangwe mu nvinnyo enkaatuufu, n'akissa ku lumuli, n'amuwa okunywa, ng'agamba nti, “ Leka tulabe nga Eriya anajja okumuwanula.”" 
Mark15:37 Awo Yesu n'akaaba n'eddoboozi ddene n'awaayo obulamu. 
Mark15:38 Awo n'eggigi ly'omu Yeekaalu ne liyulikamu wabiri, okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi." 
Mark15:39 Awo omwami w'ekitongole eyali ayimiridde awo ng'amwolekedde bwe yalaba ng'awaddeyo obulamu bw'atyo, n'agamba nti, “ Mazima omuntu ono abadde Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Mark15:40 Era waaliwo walako abakazi nga balengera: mu abo mwalimu ne Malyamu Magudaleene, ne Malyamu nnyina Yakobo omuto ne Yose, ne Saalome;" 
Mark15:41 abo bwe yali mu Ggaliraaya be baayitanga naye nga bamuweereza; n'abakazi abalala bangi abajja naye e Yerusaalemi. 
Mark15:42 Awo bwe bwawungeera, kubanga lwali lunaku lwa Kuteekateeka, lwe lunaku olusooka ssabbiiti," 
Mark15:43 Yusufu ow'e Alimasaya, omukulu asibwamu ekitiibwa mu lukiiko olukulu, era eyasuubiranga yennyini obwakabaka bwa Katonda; n'aguma n'ayingira eri Piraato nga tatya, n'asaba omulambo gwa Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Awo Piraato ne yeewuunya bw'afudde amangu, n'ayita omwami w'ekitongole n'amubuuza oba ng'ekiseera kiyiseewo yaakafiira." 
Mark15:45 Awo bwe yakiwulira okuva eri omwami, n'awa Yusufu omulambo." 
Mark15:46 Ye n'agula olugoye olw'ekitaani, n'amuwanula, n'amuzinga mu lugoye olw'ekitaani olwo, n'amussa mu ntaana eyasimwa mu lwazi, n'ayiringisiza ejjinja ku mulyango gw'entaana." 
Mark15:47 Malyamu Magudaleene ne Malyamu nnyina Yose ne balaba we yateekebwa. 
Mark16:1 Awo Ssabbiiti bwe yaggwaako, Malyamu Magudaleene ne Malyamu nnyina Yakobo, ne Saalome ne bagula eby'akaloosa, eby'okusiiga omulambo gwa Yesu." 
Mark16:2 Awo bwe bwakya enkya ku lunaku olusooka mu wiiki, enjuba bwe yali yaakavaayo ne bajja ku ntaana." 
Mark16:3 Awo baali beebuuzaganya bokka nti, “ Ani anaatuyiringisiza ejjinja okuliggya ku mulyango gw'entaana?”" 
Mark16:4 Awo bwe baatunuulira, ne balaba ejjinja nga liyiringisibbwa ku bbali ate nga lyali ddene nnyo." 
Mark16:5 Awo bwe baayingira mu ntaana, ne balaba omulenzi ng'atudde ku luuyi olwa ddyo, ng'ayambadde olugoye olweru, ne bawuniikirira." 
Mark16:6 N'abagamba nti, “Temuwuniikirira: munoonya Yesu, Omunazaaleesi, eyakomererwa: azuukidde; tali wano: laba, ekifo we baamussa." 
Mark16:7 Naye mugende, mubuulire abayigirizwa be ne Peetero nti, Abakulembedde okugenda e Ggaliraaya. Eyo gye mulimulabira nga bwe yabagamba.”" 
Mark16:8 Awo ne bafuluma ne bava ku ntaana nga badduka, kubanga okukankana n'okusamaalirira byali bibakutte: so ne batabuulirako muntu kigambo, kubanga baatya." 
Mark16:9 Awo bwe yamala okuzuukira ku makya ku lunaku olusooka mu nnaku omusanvu, n'asooka okulabikira Malyamu Magudaleene gwe yagobako dayimooni omusanvu." 
Mark16:10 Oyo n'agenda n'abuulira abaayitanga naye, n'abasanga nga bakungubaga era nga bakaaba." 
Mark16:11 Awo bo, bwe baawulira nga mulamu, ng'alabiddwa ye, ne batakkiriza." 
Mark16:12 Ebyo bwe byaggwa n'alabikira bannaabwe babiri mu kifaananyi kirala, nga batambula nga bagenda mu kyalo." 
Mark16:13 Awo abo ne bagenda ne babuulira bali abalala, naye nabo ne batabakkiriza." 
Mark16:14 Oluvannyuma n'alabikira ekkumi n'omu (11) nga batudde ku mmere; n'abanenya olw'obutakkiriza n'obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyabwe, kubanga tebakkiriza abaamulaba ng'amaze okuzuukira." 
Mark16:15 N'abagamba nti, “ Mugende mu nsi zonna, mubuulire Enjiri eri ebitonde byonna." 
Mark16:16 Akkiriza n'abatizibwa, alirokoka, naye atakkiriza omusango gulimusinga." 
Mark16:17 Era obubonero buno bunaagendanga n'abo abakkiriza: banaagobanga emizimu mu linnya lyange; banaayogeranga ennimi empya; 
Mark16:18 banaakwatanga ku misota, bwe banaanywanga ekintu ekitta, tekiibakolenga kabi n'akatono; banassangako emikono abalwadde, nabo banaawonanga.”" 
Mark16:19 Awo Mukama waffe Yesu bwe yamala okwogera nabo, n'atwalibwa mu ggulu, n'atuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda." 
Mark16:20 Bali ne bafuluma, ne babuulira wonna wonna, Mukama waffe ng'akoleranga wamu nabo era ng'anyweza ekigambo mu bubonero obwakiddiriranga. Amiina." 
Luke1:1 Bangi abaatandika okuwandiika amakulu g'ebigambo ebyatuukirizibwa mu ffe," 
Luke1:2 nga bwe baabitubuulira, abo abaasooka okuva ku lubereberye okuba abajulirwa era abaweereza b'ekigambo," 
Luke1:3 awo nange bwe nnaliraanyiza ddala byonna okuva ku lubereberye, ndabye nga kirungi okukuwandiikira ggwe Teefiro omulungi ennyo, byonna nga bwe byaliraana;" 
Luke1:4 olyoke omanye amazima g'ebigambo bye wayigirizibwa. 
Luke1:5 Awo mu mirembe gya Kerode, kabaka w'e Buyudaaya, waaliwo kabona, erinnya lye Zaakaliya, wa mu lulyo lwa Abiya: era yalina omukazi ow'omu bawala ba Alooni, erinnya lye Erisabesi." 
Luke1:6 N'abo bombi baali batuukirivu mu maaso ga Katonda, nga batambulira mu biragiro byonna ne mu by'obutuukirivu ebya Mukama nga tebaliiko kabi." 
Luke1:7 So tebaalina mwana, kubanga Erisabesi yali mugumba, ate nga bombi baali bakaddiye nnyo." 
Luke1:8 Awo olwatuuka, Zaakaliya bwe yali ng'akola omulimu ogw'obwakabona mu maaso ga Katonda ng'oluwalo lwe bwe lwaliraana," 
Luke1:9 awo akalulu ne kamugwako ng'empisa ez'obwa kabona bwe zaali okuyingira mu Yeekaalu ya Mukama okwoteza obubaane. 
Luke1:10 Awo ekibiina kyonna eky'abantu kyali nga kisabira bweru mu kiseera eky'okwoterezaamu. 
Luke1:11 Awo malayika wa Mukama n'amulabikira ng'ayimiridde ku luuyi olwa ddyo olw'ekyoto eky'okwotereezaako. 
Luke1:12 Awo Zaakaliya bwe yamulaba ne yeeraliikirira, n'atya." 
Luke1:13 Naye malayika n'amugamba nti, “ Totya, Zaakaliya; kubanga okwegayirira kwo kuwuliddwa, mukazi wo Erisabesi alikuzaalira omwana ow'obulenzi, olimutuuma erinnya Yokaana.”" 
Luke1:14 “Olisanyuka, era olijaguza, era bangi abalisanyukira okuzaalibwa kwe." 
Luke1:15 Kubanga aliba mukulu mu maaso ga Mukama, so talinywa mwenge newakubadde ekitamiiza; era alijjuzibwa Omwoyo Omutukuvu, okuva mu lubuto lwa nnyina." 
Luke1:16 Era abaana ba Isiraeri bangi alibakomyawo eri Mukama Katonda waabwe. 
Luke1:17 Mukama mu Mwoyo n'amaanyi nga Eriya okukomyawo emitima gya bajjajja eri abaana, n'abatawulira okutambuliranga mu magezi g'abatuukirivu; okutegekera Mukama abantu okumulindirira.”" 
Luke1:18 Awo Zaakaliya n'agamba malayika nti, “ Nnaakimanya ntya ekyo? Kubanga nze ndi mukadde ne mukazi wange naye akaddiye.”" 
Luke1:19 Awo malayika n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “ Nze Gabulyeri, ayimirira mu maaso ga Katonda; era nnatumibwa okwogera naawe n'okukubuulira ebigambo ebyo ebirungi." 
Luke1:20 Kale, laba, olisirika era nga toyinza kwogera, okutuusa ku lunaku bye nkugambye lwe biribaawo, kubanga tokkirizza bigambo byange, ebirituukirizibwa mu ntuuko zaabyo.”" 
Luke1:21 Awo abantu baali balindirira Zaakaliya, era nga beewuunya bw'aludde mu Yeekaalu." 
Luke1:22 Awo bwe yafuluma n'atayinza kwogera nabo: ne bategeera nti alabye okwolesebwa mu Yeekaalu: n'alwawo ng'abawenya n'omukono kubanga yali azibye omumwa. 
Luke1:23 Awo olwatuuka, ennaku ez'okuweereza kwe bwe zaggwaayo, n'addayo eka ewuwe." 
Luke1:24 Awo ennaku ezo bwe zaayitawo mukazi we Erisabesi n'aba olubuto: ne yeekwekera emyezi etaano, ng'agamba nti," 
Luke1:25 “Bw'atyo Mukama bw'ankoze mu nnaku ze yantunuuliriramu n'anzijako ensonyi mu bantu.” 
Luke1:26 Awo mu mwezi ogw'omukaaga Katonda n'atuma malayika Gabulyeri mu kibuga eky'e Ggaliraaya erinnya lyakyo Nazaaleesi," 
Luke1:27 eri omuwala atamanyi musajja, erinnya lye Malyamu, eyali ayogerezebwa omusajja, erinnya lye Yusufu ow'omu nnyumba ya Dawudi." 
Luke1:28 Awo Malayika najja gyali, n'amugamba nti, “ Mirembe ggwe aweereddwa ennyo ekisa, Mukama ali naawe.”" 
Luke1:29 Naye Malyamu ne yeeraliikirira ekigambo ekyo, n'alowooza okulamusa okwo bwe kuli." 
Luke1:30 Awo malayika n'amugamba nti, “ Totya, Malyamu; kubanga olabye ekisa eri Katonda." 
Luke1:31 Era, laba, oliba olubuto, olizaala omwana ow'obulenzi, olimutuuma erinnya Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Oyo aliba mukulu, aliyitibwa Mwana w'Oyo Ali waggulu ennyo. Era Mukama Katonda alimuwa entebe ya Dawudi jjajjaawe," 
Luke1:33 era anaafuganga ennyumba ya Yakobo emirembe n'emirembe, so obwakabaka bwe tebuliggwaawo.”" 
Luke1:34 Awo Malyamu n'agamba malayika nti, “ Kiriba kitya ekyo, kubanga simanyi musajja?”" 
Luke1:35 Ne malayika n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Omwoyo Omutukuvu alikujjira, n'amaanyi g'Oyo Ali waggulu ennyo galikusiikiriza: era ekyo ekirizaalibwa kyekiriva kiyitibwa ekitukuvu, Omwana wa Katonda." 
Luke1:36 Laba, Erisabesi muganda wo, era naye ali lubuto lwa mwana wa bulenzi mu bukadde bwe, guno gwe mwezi gwe ogw'omukaaga eyayitibwanga omugumba." 
Luke1:37 Kubanga tewali kigambo ekiva eri Katonda kiribulwa maanyi.” 
Luke1:38 Malyamu n'agamba nti, “ Laba, nze ndi muzaana wa Mukama; kibe ku nze nga bw'ogambye.” Awo malayika n'ava gy'ali." 
Luke1:39 Awo mu nnaku ezo Malyamu n'asituka n'agenda mangu mu nsi ey'ensozi, mu kibuga kya Yuda;" 
Luke1:40 n'ayingira mu nnyumba ya Zaakaliya n'alamusa Erisabesi. 
Luke1:41 Awo olwatuuka Erisabesi bwe yawulira okulamusa kwa Malyamu, omwana n'abuukabuuka mu lubuto lwe; Erisabesi n'ajjuzibwa Omwoyo Omutukuvu;" 
Luke1:42 n'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene n'agamba nti, “Oweereddwa omukisa ggwe mu bakazi, n'ekibala eky'omu lubuto lwo kiweereddwa omukisa." 
Luke1:43 Nange nno, ekigambo kino kivudde wa, nnyina Mukama wange okujja gye ndi?" 
Luke1:44 Kubanga laba, eddoboozi ly'okulamusa kwo bwe liyingidde mu matu gange, omwana n'abuukabuuka mu lubuto lwange, olw'essanyu." 
Luke1:45 Aweereddwa omukisa eyakkiriza; kubanga ebyo bye wagambibwa Mukama, birituukirizibwa.”" 
Luke1:46 Awo Malyamu n'agamba nti, “Emmeeme yange etendereza Mukama," 
Luke1:47 N'omwoyo gwange gusanyukidde Katonda Omulokozi wange. 
Luke1:48 Kubanga alabye obunaku bw'omuzaana we: Kubanga, laba, okusooka leero abantu ab'emirembe gyonna banaampitanga aweereddwa omukisa." 
Luke1:49 Kubanga Oyo Omuyinza ankoledde ebikulu; N'erinnya lye ttukuvu. 
Luke1:50 N'ekisa kye kiri eri abo abamutya; Emirembe n'emirembe. 
Luke1:51 Alaze amaanyi n'omukono gwe; Asaasaanyizza abalina amalala mu kulowooza kw'omu mitima gyabwe. 
Luke1:52 Agobye abafuzi abeekulumbaza ku ntebe zaabwe, Agulumizizza abeetoowaze" 
Luke1:53 Abalina enjala abakkusizza ebirungi; N'abagagga abagobye nga tebalina kintu. 
Luke1:54 Abedde Isiraeri omuddu we Ajjukire ekisa kye 
Luke1:55 Nga bwe yagamba bajjajjaffe Eri Ibulayimu n'ezzadde lye, emirembe gyonna.”" 
Luke1:56 Awo Malyamu n'amalayo emyezi ng'esatu, n'addayo ewuwe." 
Luke1:57 Awo ebiro bya Erisabesi ne bituuka eby'okuzaala: n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi. 
Luke1:58 Baliraanwa be n'ab'ekika kye ne bawulira nga Mukama amukwatiddwa ekisa kye, ne basanyukira wamu naye." 
Luke1:59 Awo olwatuuka ku lunaku olw'omunaana, ne bajja okukomola omwana; era baali baagala okumutuuma erinnya lya kitaawe Zaakaliya." 
Luke1:60 Nnyina n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “ Nedda, naye anaatuumibwa Yokaana.”" 
Luke1:61 Ne bamugamba nti, “ Tewali wa mu kika kyo ayitibwa linnya eryo.”" 
Luke1:62 Ne bawenya ku kitaawe, bw'ayagala okumutuuma." 
Luke1:63 N'ayagala ekipande eky'okuwandiikako, n'awandiika, nti Erinnya lye ye Yokaana. Ne beewuunya bonna." 
Luke1:64 Amangwago akamwa ke ne kazibuka, n'olulimi lwe ne lusumulukuka, n'ayogera nga yeebaza Katonda." 
Luke1:65 Bonna abaali baliraanyeewo ne batya. N'ebigambo ebyo byonna ne bibuna mu nsi yonna ey'ensozi ey'e Buyudaaya. 
Luke1:66 Ne bonna abaabiwulira ne babissa mu mitima gyabwe, ne bagamba nti, “ Kale omwana oyo aliba ki?” Kubanga omukono gwa Mukama gwali wamu naye." 
Luke1:67 Kitaawe Zaakaliya n'ajjuzibwa Omwoyo Omutukuvu, n'ayogera, ng'agamba nti," 
Luke1:68 “Atenderezebwe Mukama, Katonda wa Isiraeri; Kubanga akyalidde abantu be, era abanunudde," 
Luke1:69 Era atuyimusirizza ejjembe ery'obulokozi Mu nnyumba y'omuddu we Dawudi. 
Luke1:70 Nga bwe yayogerera mu kamwa ka bannabbi be abatukuvu, abaaliwo kasookedde ensi ebaawo," 
Luke1:71 Okulokolebwa mu balabe baffe, ne mu mikono gy'abo bonna abatukyawa;" 
Luke1:72 Okutuukiriza ekisa kye yasuubiza bajjajjaffe, N'okujjukira endagaano ye entukuvu;" 
Luke1:73 Okutuukiriza ekirayiro kye yalayirira jjajjaffe Ibulayimu," 
Luke1:74 Okukituwa ffe; ffe bwe tulokolebwa mu mikono gy'abalabe baffe, Tulyoke tumuweereze nga tetuliiko kye tutya," 
Luke1:75 Mu butukuvu ne mu butuukirivu mu maaso ge ennaku zaffe zonna. 
Luke1:76 Naawe, omwana, oliyitibwa nnabbi w'Oyo Ali waggulu ennyo: Kubanga olikulembera Mukama okulongoosa amakubo ge;" 
Luke1:77 Okumanyisa abantu be obulokozi, Ebibi byabwe bibaggibweko," 
Luke1:78 Olw'ekisa kya Katonda waffe ekirungi, Emmambya kyevudde etusalira eva mu ggulu," 
Luke1:79 Okwakira abatuula mu nzikiza, ne mu kisiikirize ky'olumbe, Okuluŋŋamya ebigere byaffe mu kkubo ery'emirembe.”" 
Luke1:80 Omwana n'akula, n'ayongerwako amaanyi mu mwoyo, n'abeeranga mu malungu okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yayolesebwa eri Isiraeri." 
Luke2:1 Awo olwatuuka mu nnaku ezo etteeka ne liva eri Kayisaali Augusito abantu ab'ensi zonna okwewandiisa. 
Luke2:2 Okwo kwe kwewandiisa okwasooka okubaawo Kuleniyo bwe yali nga y'afuga Obusuuli. 
Luke2:3 Bonna ne bagenda okwewandiisa, buli muntu mu kibuga gy'asibuka." 
Luke2:4 Ne Yusufu n'ava e Nazaaleesi mu kibuga eky'e Ggaliraaya, n'agenda e Buyudaaya, mu kibuga kya Dawudi, ekiyitibwa Besirekemu kubanga yali wa mu nnyumba era wa mu kika kya Dawudi," 
Luke2:5 ye wandiise ne Malyamu, gwe yali ayogereza, era ng'ali lubuto." 
Luke2:6 Awo olwatuuka baali bali eyo, ennaku ze ez'okuzaala ne zituuka." 
Luke2:7 N'azaala omwana we omubereberye; n'amubikka mu ngoye ez'obwana obuwere n'amuzazika mu kisibo, kubanga tebaafuna kifo mu kisulo ky'abagenyi." 
Luke2:8 Waaliwo abasumba mu nsi eyo abaasulanga ku ttale, nga bakuuma ekisibo kyabwe ekiro mu mpalo." 
Luke2:9 Awo malayika wa Mukama n'ayimirira we baali, n'ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kibeetooloola nga kimasamasa, ne batya nnyo." 
Luke2:10 Malayika n'abagamba nti, “ Temutya; kubanga, laba, mbaleetera ebigambo ebirungi eby'essanyu eringi eririba eri abantu bonna:" 
Luke2:11 kubanga leero azaaliddwa gye muli Omulokozi mu kibuga kya Dawudi, ye Kristo Mukama waffe." 
Luke2:12 Kano ke kabonero ke munaamutegeererako: munaalaba omwana omuwere ng'abikkiddwa mu ngoye ez'obwana obuwere ng'azazikiddwa mu kisibo.” 
Luke2:13 Awo amangwago waaliwo ne malayika oyo bangi ab'omu ggye ery'omu ggulu nga batendereza Katonda, nga bagamba nti," 
Luke2:14 “Ekitiibwa kibe eri Katonda waggulu ennyo; Ne mu nsi emirembe gibe mu bantu abasiimibwa.” 
Luke2:15 Awo olwatuuka, bamalayika bwe baava gye baali okugenda mu ggulu, abasumba ne bagambagana nti, “ Kale tugende e Besirekemu tulabe ekintu kino ekibaddewo, Mukama ky'atutegeezezza.”" 
Luke2:16 Ne bagenda mangu, ne balaba Malyamu ne Yusufu n'omwana omuwere ng'azazikiddwa mu kisibo." 
Luke2:17 Awo bwe baalaba, ne bategeeza ekigambo kye baabuulirwa ku mwana oyo." 
Luke2:18 Bonna abaawulira ne beewuunya ebyo abasumba bye baababuulira. 
Luke2:19 Naye Malyamu ne yeekuumanga ebigambo ebyo byonna, ng'abirowooza mu mutima gwe." 
Luke2:20 Awo abasumba ne baddayo, nga bagulumiza nga batendereza Katonda olw'ebigambo byonna bye baawulira, ne bye baalaba, nga bwe byabaabuulirwa." 
Luke2:21 Awo ennaku omunaana bwe zaatuuka ez'okumukomoleramu, n'atuumibwa erinnya lye Yesu, liri eryayogerwa malayika nga tannaba kuba mu lubuto." 
Luke2:22 Awo ennaku ez'okulongooka kwabwe bwe zaatuuka ng'amateeka ga Musa bwe gali, ne batwala Yesu ne bamwambusa e Yerusaalemi, okumwanjulira Mukama" 
Luke2:23 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu mateeka ga Mukama nti, “ Buli kisajja ekiggulanda kinaayitibwanga kitukuvu eri Mukama.”" 
Luke2:24 n'okuwaayo ssaddaaka nga bwe kyayogerwa mu mateeka ga Mukama, bukaamukuukulu bubiri, oba obuyiba obuto bubiri." 
Luke2:25 Era, laba, waaliwo omuntu mu Yerusaalemi erinnya lye Simyoni, omuntu oyo yali mutuukirivu, era atya Katonda, ng'alindirira okununulibwa kwa Isiraeri: era Omwoyo Omutukuvu yali ku ye." 
Luke2:26 Oyo Omwoyo Omutukuvu yali amubikkulidde nti tagenda kufa nga tannalaba ku Kristo wa Mukama. 
Luke2:27 Awo Simyoni n'ajjira mu Mwoyo mu Yeekaalu: abakadde bwe baayingiza omwana Yesu mu Yeekaalu okumukola nga bw'eri empisa y'amateeka. 
Luke2:28 Awo Simyoni n'asitula omwana mu mikono gye, ne yeebaza Katonda n'agamba nti," 
Luke2:29 “Mukama wange, kaakano siibula omuddu wo Emirembe, ng'ekigambo kyo bwe kyali;" 
Luke2:30 Kubanga amaaso gange galabye obulokozi bwo," 
Luke2:31 Bwe wateekateeka mu maaso g'abantu bonna: 
Luke2:32 Okuba omusana ogw'okumulisa amawanga N'okuba ekitiibwa ky'abantu bo Isiraeri.” 
Luke2:33 Kitaawe ne nnyina ne beewuunyanga ebigambo ebyo ebyamwogerwako; 
Luke2:34 awo Simyoni n'abasabira omukisa, n'agamba Malyamu nnyina nti, “ Laba, ono ateekeddwawo bangi mu Isiraeri bagwenga n'abalala bayimirirenga, n'okuba akabonero akavumibwa;" 
Luke2:35 era ggwe ekitala kirikufumita mu mmeeme; ebirowoozo eby'emitima emingi biryoke bibikkulwe.” 
Luke2:36 Awo waaliwo Ana, nnabbi omukazi, omuwala wa Fanweri, ow'omu kika kya Aseri era yali mukazi mukadde, yafumbirwa nga muwala muto, n'abeera ne bba emyaka musanvu," 
Luke2:37 naye yali nnamwandu nga yaakamala emyaka kinaana mu ena (84), era teyavanga mu Yeekaalu, ng'asinza n'okusiibanga n'okwegayiriranga ekiro n'emisana." 
Luke2:38 Oyo bwe yajja mu kiseera ekyo ne yeebaza Katonda, n'abuulira ebigambo bye eri bonna abaali balindirira okununulibwa kwa Yerusaalemi." 
Luke2:39 Awo bwe baamala okutuukiriza byonna ebiri mu mateeka ga Mukama, ne baddayo e Ggaliraaya, mu kibuga ky'ewaabwe e Nazaaleesi." 
Luke2:40 Awo omwana n'akula, n'ayongerwako amaanyi, n'ajjuzibwa amagezi: ekisa kya Katonda ne kibanga ku ye." 
Luke2:41 Awo bakadde be baagendanga e Yerusaalemi buli mwaka ku mbaga ey'Okuyitako. 
Luke2:42 Awo Yesu bwe yaweza emyaka kkumi n'ebiri, ne bambuka e Yerusaalemi nga empisa y'embaga bwe yali:" 
Luke2:43 awo bwe baali baddayo ewaabwe, ng'ennaku ez'Embaga ziweddeko, omwana oyo Yesu n'asigala mu Yerusaalemi, naye bakadde be ne batamanya:" 
Luke2:44 naye bwe baamala okutambula olugendo lwa lunaku lulamba, nga balowooza ng'ali mu kisinde kyabwe, olwo ne bamunoonya mu baganda baabwe ne mu mikwano gyabwe:" 
Luke2:45 bwe bataamulaba ne baddayo e Yerusaalemi, nga bamunoonya." 
Luke2:46 Awo olwatuuka bwe waayitawo ennaku ssatu ne bamusanga mu Yeekaalu, ng'atudde wakati mu bayigiriza, ng'abawuliriza, era ng'ababuuza:" 
Luke2:47 bonna abaamuwulira ne bawuniikirira olw'amagezi ge n'okuddamu kwe. 
Luke2:48 Awo bwe baamulaba ne basamaalirira: nnyina n'amugamba nti, “ Mwana wange, lwaki otukoze bw'otyo? laba, kitaawo nange twakunoonya nga tunakuwadde.”" 
Luke2:49 N'abagamba nti, “ Mwannoonyeza ki? Temwamanya nga kiŋŋwanidde okubeera mu bigambo bya Kitange?”" 
Luke2:50 Ne batategeera kigambo ekyo kye yabagamba. 
Luke2:51 N'aserengeta nabo n'ajja e Nazaaleesi, n'abagonderanga: nnyina ne yeekuumanga ebigambo ebyo byonna mu mutima gwe." 
Luke2:52 Awo Yesu ne yeeyongerangako amagezi n'okukula, n'okuganja eri Katonda n'eri abantu." 
Luke3:1 Awo mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'etaano (15) ogw'obufuzi bwa Kayisaali Tiberiyo, nga Pontiyo Piraato ye w'essaza ly'e Buyudaaya, ne Kerode bwe yali nga y'afuga e Ggaliraaya, ne Firipo muganda we bwe yali nga y'afuga Ituliya n'ensi ey'e Tirakoniti, ne Lusaniya bwe yali nga y'afuga Abireene;" 
Luke3:2 ne Ana ne Kayaafa bwe baali nga be bakabona abasinga obukulu, ekigambo kya Katonda ne kijjira Yokaana omwana wa Zaakaliya, mu ddungu." 
Luke3:3 N'ajja mu nsi yonna eriraanye Yoludaani, ng'abuulira okubatizibwa okw'okwenenya olw'okuggyibwako ebibi;" 
Luke3:4 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo eky'ebigambo bya nnabbi Isaaya nti, “Eddoboozi ly'oyo ayogerera waggulu mu ddungu nti Mulongoose oluguudo lwa Mukama, Muluŋŋamye amakubo ge." 
Luke3:5 Buli kiwonvu kirijjuzibwa, Na buli lusozi n'akasozi biritereezebwa: N'ekikyamye kirigololwa, N'amakubo agatali masende galitereezebwa;" 
Luke3:6 N'abalina omubiri bonna baliraba obulokozi bwa Katonda.” 
Luke3:7 Awo Yokaana n'agamba ebibiina ebyafulumanga okujja gyali okubatizibwa nti, “ Mmwe abaana b'emisota, ani eyabalabula okudduka obusungu obugenda okujja?" 
Luke3:8 Kale mubale ebibala ebisaanira okwenenya, so temusooka kwogera munda zammwe nti Tulina jjajjaffe ye Ibulayimu: kubanga mbagamba nti Katonda ayinza amayinja gano okugafuuliramu Ibulayimu abaana." 
Luke3:9 Ne kaakano embazzi eteekeddwa ku kikolo ky'emiti; kale buli muti ogutabala bibala birungi gutemebwa, gusuulibwa mu muliro.”" 
Luke3:10 Ebibiina ne bamubuuza nga bagamba nti, “ Kale tukole ki?”" 
Luke3:11 N'addamu n'abagamba nti, “ Alina ekkanzu ebbiri, amuweeko emu atalina, n'alina emmere naye akole bw'atyo.”" 
Luke3:12 N'abawooza ne bajja okubatizibwa, ne bamubuuza nti, “Omuyigiriza tukole ki?”" 
Luke3:13 N'abagamba nti, “Temusoloozanga kusukkiriza okusinga ekyo kye mwalagirwa.”" 
Luke3:14 Era n'abasserikale nabo ne bamubuuza, nga bagamba nti, “Naffe tukole ki?” N'abagamba nti, “Abantu temubanyagangako byabwe, era temubawayirizanga misango gye batazziza. Empeera yammwe ebamalenga.”" 
Luke3:15 Awo abantu bwe baali nga basuubira, era bonna nga balowooza mu mitima gyabwe nti oba oli awo Yokaana ye Kristo." 
Luke3:16 Yokaana n'addamu n'agamba bonna nti, “ Mazima nze mbabatiza n'amazzi; naye ajja y'ansinga amaanyi, so nange sisaanira kusumulula buguwa bwa ngatto ze: ye alibabatiza n'Omwoyo Omutukuvu n'omuliro." 
Luke3:17 Olugali lwe luli mu mukono gwe, okulongoosa ennyo egguuliro lye, n'okukuŋŋaanyiza eŋŋaano mu ggwanika lye; naye ebisusunku alibyokya n'omuliro ogutazikira.”" 
Luke3:18 Era n'ababuulirira n'ebirala bingi ng'abuulira abantu ebigambo ebirungi. 
Luke3:19 Era Yokaana yanenya Kerode owessaza, olwa Kerodiya muka muganda we, n'olw'ebigambo ebibi byonna Kerode bye yakola." 
Luke3:20 Ate ku ebyo byonna Kerode n'ayongerako kino, n'akwata Yokaana n'amussa mu kkomera." 
Luke3:21 Awo olwatuuka, abantu bonna bwe baali nga babatizibwa, ne Yesu bwe yamala okubatizibwa, bwe yasaba, eggulu ne libikkuka," 
Luke3:22 Omwoyo Omutukuvu n'akka ku ye mu kifaananyi eky'omubiri ng'ejjiba, n'eddoboozi ne lifuluma mu ggulu nga ligamba nti, “ Ggwe mwana wange omwagalwa; nkusanyukira nnyo.”" 
Luke3:23 Era Yesu yennyini, yatandika okuyigiriza, ng'aweza emyaka ng'asatu (30), era nga bwe yalowoozebwa nga ye mwana wa Yusufu, mwana wa Eri," 
Luke3:24 mwana wa Mattati, mwana wa Leevi, mwana wa Mereki, mwana wa Yanayi, mwana wa Yusufu," 
Luke3:25 mwana wa Mattasiya, mwana wa Amosi, mwana wa Nakkumu, mwana wa Esuli, mwana wa Naggayi," 
Luke3:26 mwana wa Maasi, mwana wa Mattasiya mwana wa Semeyini, mwana wa Yoseki, mwana wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 mwana wa Yokanaani, mwana wa Lesa, mwana wa Zerubbaberi, mwana wa Seyalutiyeeri, mwana wa Neeri," 
Luke3:28 mwana wa Mereki, mwana wa Addi, mwana wa Kosamu, mwana wa Erumadamu, mwana wa Eri," 
Luke3:29 mwana wa Yoswa, mwana wa Eryeza, mwana wa Yolimu, mwana wa Mattati, mwana wa Leevi," 
Luke3:30 mwana wa Simyoni, mwana wa Yuda, mwana wa Yusufu, mwana wa Yonamu, mwana wa Eriyakimu," 
Luke3:31 mwana wa Mereya, mwana wa Menna, mwana wa Mattasa, mwana wa Nasani, mwana wa Dawudi," 
Luke3:32 mwana wa Yese, mwana wa Obedi, mwana wa Bowaazi, mwana wa Salumooni, mwana wa Nakusoni," 
Luke3:33 mwana wa Amminadaabu, mwana wa Aluni, mwana wa Kezulooni, mwana wa Pereezi, mwana wa Yuda," 
Luke3:34 mwana wa Yakobo, mwana wa Isaaka, mwana wa Ibulayimu, mwana wa Teera, mwana wa Nakoli," 
Luke3:35 mwana wa Serugi, mwana wa Lewu, mwana wa Peregi, mwana wa Eberi, mwana wa Sera," 
Luke3:36 mwana wa Kayinaani, mwana wa Alupakusaadi, mwana wa Seemu, mwana wa Nuuwa, mwana wa Lameka," 
Luke3:37 mwana wa Mesuseera, mwana wa Enoki, mwana wa Yaledi, mwana wa Makalaleri, mwana wa Kayinaani," 
Luke3:38 mwana wa Enosi, mwana wa Seezi, mwana wa Adamu, mwana wa Katonda." 
Luke4:1 Awo Yesu bwe yajjula Omwoyo Omutukuvu n'akomawo ng'ava ku mugga Yoludaani, Omwoyo n'amutwala mu ddungu," 
Luke4:2 n'amalayo ennaku ana (40), ng'akemebwa Setaani. So teyalyanga kintu mu nnaku ezo; awo bwe zaggwaako, enjala n'emuluma." 
Luke4:3 Setaani n'amugamba nti, “ Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, gamba ejjinja lino lifuuke emmere.”" 
Luke4:4 Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “ Kyawandiikibwa nti Omuntu tabanga mulamu na mmere yokka.”" 
Luke4:5 Awo n'amulinnyisa, n'amulaga obwakabaka bwonna obw'omu nsi mu kaseera katono." 
Luke4:6 Setaani n'amugamba nti, “ Nnaakuwa ggwe obuyinza buno bwonna, n'ekitiibwa kyamu; kubanga nnaweebwa nze: era ngabira buli gwe njagala." 
Luke4:7 Kale nno bw'onoonsinza, buno bwonna bunaaba bubwo.”" 
Luke4:8 Yesu n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Kyawandiikibwa nti Osinzanga Mukama Katonda wo, era gw'oweerezanga yekka.”" 
Luke4:9 N'amutwala e Yerusaalemi, n'amuteeka ku kitikkiro kya Yeekaalu, n'amugamba nti, “ Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, sinziira wano, weesuule wansi;" 
Luke4:10 kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Alikulagiririza bamalayika be bakukuumire ddala;" 
Luke4:11 Era nti Balikuwanirira mu mikono gyabwe, Oleme okwesittala ekigere kyo ku jjinja.”" 
Luke4:12 Yesu n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “ Kyawandiikibwa nti Tokemanga Mukama Katonda wo.”" 
Luke4:13 Setaani bwe yamala buli kikemo n'amulekako ekiseera. 
Luke4:14 Awo Yesu n'akomawo e Ggaliraaya mu maanyi ag'Omwoyo: ettutumu lye ne ligenda nga libuna mu nsi zonna eziriraanyeewo. 
Luke4:15 N'ayigirizanga mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe bonna nga bamutendereza. 
Luke4:16 Yesu n'ajja e Nazaaleesi gye yakulira; ku lunaku olwa ssabbiiti n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro nga bwe yali empisa ye, n'ayimirira okusoma." 
Luke4:17 Ne bamuwa ekitabo kya nnabbi Isaaya, n'abikkula ekitabo, n'alaba ekitundu awaawandiikibwa nti," 
Luke4:18 “Omwoyo gwa Mukama guli ku nze, Kubanga yanfukako amafuta okubuulira abaavu ebigambo ebirungi: Antumye okutegeeza abanyage okuteebwa, N'okuzibula abazibe b'amaaso, Okuta abanyigirizibwa," 
Luke4:19 Okulangirira omwaka gwa Mukama ogwakkirizibwa.” 
Luke4:20 N'abikkako ekitabo, n'akiddiza omuweereza n'atuula; abantu bonna abaali mu kkuŋŋaaniro ne bamusimbako amaaso." 
Luke4:21 N'atandika okubagamba nti, “Olwaleero ebyawandiikibwa bino bituukiridde mu matu gammwe.”" 
Luke4:22 Bonna ne bamwogerako bulungi, era ne beewuunya olw'ebigambo eby'ekisa ebivudde mu kamwa ke: ne bagamba nti, “ Ono si ye Mwana wa Yusufu?”" 
Luke4:23 N'abagamba nti, “Ddala temulirema kuŋŋamba lugero luno nti Omusawo, weewonye wekka: byonna bye twawulira nga bikolerwa e Kaperunawumu, bikolere na wano mu kyalo ky'ewammwe.”" 
Luke4:24 Era n'abagamba nti, “ Mazima mbagamba nti Tewali nnabbi akkirizibwa mu kyalo ky'ewaabwe."
