John8:24 Kyennava mbagamba nti Mulifiira mu bibi byammwe. Kubanga bwe mutakkiriza nga nze wuuyo, mulifiira mu bibi byammwe.”" 
John8:25 Awo ne bamugamba nti, “Ggwe ani?” Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Nga bwe nnabagambanga okuva ku lubereberye." 
John8:26 Nnina bingi eby'okuboogerako n'okubasalira omusango; naye oli eyantuma ye wa mazima; nange bye nnawulira gy'ali bye biibyo bye njogera eri ensi.” 
John8:27 Tebaategeera ng'abagambye ku Kitaffe. 
John8:28 Awo Yesu n'agamba nti, “Bwe mulimala okuwanika Omwana w'omuntu ne mulyoka mutegeera nga nze wuuyo, so nze siriiko kye nkola ku bwange, naye nga Kitange bwe yanjigiriza, bwe njogera bwe ntyo." 
John8:29 N'oli eyantuma ali nange; Kitange tandekanga nzekka; kubanga nkola bulijjo by'asiima.” 
John8:30 Bwe yayogera ebigambo ebyo, abantu bangi ne bamukkiriza." 
John8:31 Awo Yesu n'agamba Abayudaaya bali abaamukkiriza nti, “Bwe munywerera mu kigambo kyange, nga muli bayigirizwa bange ddala;" 
John8:32 era mulitegeera amazima, n'amazima galibafuula ba ddembe.”" 
John8:33 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Ffe tuli zzadde lya Ibulayimu, so tetufugibwanga muntu yenna; oyogera otya ggwe nti, Mulifuuka ba ddembe?”" 
John8:34 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Buli muntu yenna akola ebibi, ye muddu w'ekibi." 
John8:35 Omuddu tabeerera mu nnyumba mirembe na mirembe: omwana abeerera emirembe n'emirembe. 
John8:36 Kale Omwana bw'alibafuula ab'eddembe, muliba ba ddembe ddala." 
John8:37 Mmanyi nti muli zzadde lya Ibulayimu: naye musala amagezi okunzita, kubanga ekigambo kyange tekyeyabya mu mmwe." 
John8:38 Nze njogera bye nnalaba eri Kitange: kale nammwe mukola bye mwawulira eri kitammwe.” 
John8:39 Ne baddamu ne bamugamba nti, “Ibulayimu ye kitaffe.” Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Singa mubadde baana ba Ibulayimu, mwandikoze ebikolwa bya Ibulayimu." 
John8:40 Naye kaakano musala amagezi okunzita omuntu ababuulidde eby'amazima, bye nnawulira eri Katonda: Ibulayimu teyakola bw'atyo." 
John8:41 Mmwe mukola emirimu gya kitammwe.” Ne bamugamba nti, “Ffe tetuli baana beebolereze; tulina Kitaffe omu, ye Katonda.”" 
John8:42 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Singa Katonda ye Kitammwe, mwandinjagadde nze: kubanga nnava eri Katonda, ne njija, so sajja ku lwange nzekka, naye oyo ye yantuma." 
John8:43 Kiki ekibalobedde okutegeera enjogera yange? Kubanga temuyinza kuwulira kigambo kyange. 
John8:44 Mmwe muli bakitammwe Setaani, era mwagala okukola okwegomba kwa kitammwe. Oyo okuva ku lubereberye ye mussi, so teyanywerera mu mazima, kubanga amazima tegaali mu ye. Bw'ayogera obulimba, ayogera ekiva mu bibye; kubanga ye mulimba era kitaawe w'obulimba." 
John8:45 Naye kubanga njogera amazima, temunzikiriza." 
John8:46 Ani ku mmwe annumiriza ekibi? Bwe njogera amazima kiki ekibalobedde okunzikiriza? 
John8:47 Owa Katonda awulira ebigambo bya Katonda: mmwe kyemuva mulema okuwulira, kubanga temuli ba Katonda.”" 
John8:48 Abayudaaya ne baddamu ne bamugamba nti, “Tetwogera bulungi ffe nti Ggwe oli Musamaliya, era oliko dayimooni?”" 
John8:49 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Siriiko dayimooni; naye nze nzisaamu ekitiibwa Kitange, nammwe temunzisaamu kitiibwa." 
John8:50 Naye nze sinoonya kitiibwa kyange; w'ali anoonya era asala omusango.” 
John8:51 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Omuntu bw'akwata ekigambo kyange taliraba kufa emirembe n'emirembe 
John8:52 Abayudaaya ne bamugamba nti, “Kaakano tutegedde ng'oliko dayimooni. Ibulayimu yafa ne bannabbi; naawe ogamba nti, Omuntu bw'akwata ekigambo kyange, talirega ku kufa emirembe n'emirembe." 
John8:53 Ggwe mukulu okukira jjajjaffe Ibulayimu eyafa? Ne bannabbi baafa: weeyita ani?” 
John8:54 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Bwe nneegulumiza nzekka, okugulumira kwange kuba kwa busa: angulumiza ye Kitange: mmwe gwe mwogerako nti ye Katonda wammwe:" 
John8:55 so temumutegeeranga, naye nze mmumanyi; bwe nnaagamba nti Simumanyi, nnaaba mulimba nga mmwe, era nkwata ekigambo kye." 
John8:56 Ibulayimu jjajjammwe yasanyuka okulaba olunaku lwange; n'alulaba n'asanyuka.” 
John8:57 Awo Abayudaaya ne bamugamba nti, “Tonnaba kuweza myaka ataano (50), naye Ibulayimu wamulaba?”" 
John8:58 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “ Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Ibulayimu nga tannaba kuzaalibwa, nze nga wendi.”" 
John8:59 Awo ne baddira amayinja okumukuba: naye Yesu ne yeekweka, n'afuluma mu Yeekaalu." 
John9:1 Yesu bwe yali ng'ayitawo, n'alaba omuntu eyazaalibwa nga muzibe wa maaso." 
John9:2 Abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza, nga bagamba nti, “Labbi, ani eyayonoona, ono oba abazadde be, kye kyamuzaaza nga muzibe wa maaso?”" 
John9:3 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Ono teyayonoona, newakubadde abazadde be, naye emirimu gya Katonda girabikire ku ye." 
John9:4 Ffe kitugwanira okukola emirimu gy'oyo eyantuma, obudde nga misana. Ekiro kijja omuntu mw'atayinziza kukolera." 
John9:5 Bwe mba mu nsi, ndi musana gwa nsi.”" 
John9:6 Bwe yamala okwogera bw'atyo, n'awanda amalusu ku ttaka, n'atabula ettaka n'amalusu, n'amusiiga ettaka ku maaso," 
John9:7 n'amugamba nti, “Genda, onaabe mu kidiba kya Sirowamu” (ekitegeeza nti Eyatumibwa). Awo n'agenda, n'anaaba, n'akomawo ng'alaba." 
John9:8 Awo baliraanwa be n'abaamulabanga edda ng'atudde ng'asabiriza, ne bagamba nti, “Si ye wuuno eyatuulanga ng'asabiriza?”" 
John9:9 Abalala ne bagamba nti, “Ye wuuyo,” abalala ne bagamba nti, “Nedda, naye afaanana naye.” Ye n'agamba nti, “Nze nzuuno.”" 
John9:10 Awo ne bamugamba nti, “Kale amaaso go gaazibuka gatya?”" 
John9:11 Ye n'addamu nti, “Omuntu ayitibwa Yesu yatabula ettaka, n'ansiiga ku maaso, n'aŋŋamba nti, Genda ku Sirowamu, onaabe: awo ne ŋŋenda, ne nnaaba, ne nzibula.”" 
John9:12 Ne bamugamba nti, “Ali ludda wa oyo?” N'agamba nti, “Simanyi.”" 
John9:13 Ne bamutwala eri Abafalisaayo oli edda eyali omuzibe w'amaaso. 
John9:14 Naye lwali lwa ssabbiiti olunaku olwo Yesu lwe yatabulirako ettaka, n'amuzibula amaaso." 
John9:15 Awo Abafalisaayo ate ne bamubuuza bwe yazibula. N'abagamba nti, “Yansiiga ttaka ku maaso, ne nnaaba, ne nzibula.”" 
John9:16 Awo Abafalisaayo abamu ne bagamba nti, “Omuntu oyo si wa Katonda, kubanga takwata ssabbiiti.” Naye abalala ne bagamba nti, “Omuntu alina ebibi ayinza atya okukola obubonero obwenkanidde wano?” Ne wabaawo okwawukana mu bo." 
John9:17 Awo ne bamugamba nate omuzibe w'amaaso nti, “Ggwe omuyita otya, kubanga yakuzibula amaaso?” Naye n'agamba nti, “Ye nnabbi.”" 
John9:18 Kale Abayudaaya tebakkiriza bigambo bye, nga yali muzibe w'amaaso n'azibula, okutuusa lwe baamala okuyita abazadde b'eyazibula" 
John9:19 ne bababuuza nga bagamba nti, “Ono ye mwana wammwe mmwe gwe mugamba nti yazaalibwa nga muzibe w'amaaso? kale kaakano alaba atya? ”" 
John9:20 Abazadde be ne baddamu ne bagamba nti, “Tumanyi ng'ono ye mwana waffe, era nga yazaalibwa nga muzibe wa maaso:" 
John9:21 naye bw'alaba kaakano tetumanyi: so n'eyamuzibula amaaso ffe tetumanyi bw'ali: mumubuuze; musajja mukulu; aneeyogerera yekka.” 
John9:22 Abazadde ekyaboogeza bwe batyo kubanga baali batya Abayudaaya; kubanga Abayudaaya baali nga bamaze okukkaanya nti buli muntu anaamwatulanga okuba Kristo, agobebwenga mu kkuŋŋaaniro." 
John9:23 Abazadde be kyebaava boogera nti Musajja mukulu; mumubuuze ye. 
John9:24 Awo ne bayita omulundi ogwokubiri omuntu oli eyali omuzibe w'amaaso, ne bamugamba nti, “Gulumiza Katonda: ffe tumanyi ng'omuntu oyo alina ebibi.”" 
John9:25 Ye n'addamu nti, “Oba ng'alina ebibi simanyi; ekigambo kimu kye mmanyi nti Nnali muzibe wa maaso, naye kaakano ndaba.”" 
John9:26 Awo ne bamugamba nti, “Yakukola atya? yakuzibula atya amaaso go?”" 
John9:27 N'abaddamu nti, “Mmaze okubabuulira naye temuwulidde: ekibaagaza okuwulira omulundi ogwokubiri kiki? era nammwe mwagala okufuuka abayigirizwa be?”" 
John9:28 Ne bamuvuma, ne bagamba nti, “Ggwe oli muyigirizwa we: naye ffe tuli bayigirizwa ba Musa." 
John9:29 Ffe tumanyi nga Katonda yayogera ne Musa: naye omuntu oyo tetumumanyi gy'ava.” 
John9:30 Omuntu n'addamu n'abagamba nti, “Kino kitalo! mmwe obutamanya gy'ava, omuntu eyasobola okunzibula amaaso!" 
John9:31 Tumanyi nga Katonda tawulira balina bibi; naye buli muntu atya Katonda, ng'akola ky'ayagala, oyo amuwulira." 
John9:32 Okuva edda n'edda tewawulirwanga nga waaliwo omuntu eyazibula amaaso g'omuntu eyazaalibwa nga muzibe wa maaso. 
John9:33 Omuntu oyo singa teyava wa Katonda, teyandiyinzizza kukola kigambo.”" 
John9:34 Ne baddamu ne bamugamba nti, “Ggwe wazaalibwa mu bibi byereere, naawe otuyigiriza ffe?” Ne bamusindikira ebweru." 
John9:35 Yesu n'awulira nga bamusindikidde ebweru; n'amulaba n'agamba nti, “Ggwe okkiriza Omwana wa Katonda?”" 
John9:36 Ye n'addamu, n'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, ye ani, mmukkirize?”" 
John9:37 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Omulabye, era ayogera naawe ye wuuyo.”" 
John9:38 Ye n'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, nzikirizza.” N'amusinza." 
John9:39 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Omusango gwe gwandeeta mu nsi muno, abatalaba balabe, n'abo abalaba babe bazibe b'amaaso.”" 
John9:40 Abafalisaayo abalala abaali naye ne bawulira bwe batyo, ne bamugamba nti, “Naffe tuli bazibe b'amaaso?”" 
John9:41 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Singa mubadde bazibe b'amaaso, temwandibadde na kibi; naye kaakano mugamba nti Tulaba: ekibi kyammwe kibeerera awo.”" 
John10:1 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Atayita mu mulyango ng'ayingira mu kisibo ky'endiga, naye n'alinnyira awalala, oyo ye mubbi era omunyazi." 
John10:2 Naye ayita mu mulyango, ye musumba w'endiga." 
John10:3 Oyo omuggazi amuggulirawo; n'endiga zimuwulira eddoboozi: endiga ze aziyita amannya era azifulumya ebweru. 
John10:4 Bw'amala okufulumya ezize zonna, azikulembera, n'endiga zimugoberera: kubanga zimumanyi eddoboozi." 
John10:5 Omulala tezirimugoberera, naye zirimudduka buddusi: kubanga tezimanyi ddoboozi lya balala.”" 
John10:6 Yesu n'abagerera olugero luno, naye bo tebaategeera bigambo bwe biri bye yabagamba." 
John10:7 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nate nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Nze mulyango gw'endiga." 
John10:8 Bonna abansooka baali babbi era abanyazi: naye endiga tezaabawulira. 
John10:9 Nze mulyango: omuntu bw'ayingirira mu nze alirokoka, aliyingira, alifuluma, aliraba eddundiro." 
John10:10 Omubbi tajja wabula okubba, n'okutta, n'okuzikiriza. Nze najja zibe n'obulamu, era zibe nabwo obungi." 
John10:11 Nze musumba omulungi: omusumba omulungi awaayo obulamu bwe olw'endiga. 
John10:12 Alundirira empeera, atali musumba, endiga nga si zize ye, bw'alaba omusege nga gujja, aleka endiga n'adduka, n'omusege guzisikula guzisaasaanya." 
John10:13 Adduka kubanga wa mpeera, so endiga tazissaako mwoyo." 
John10:14 Nze musumba omulungi: era ntegeera ezange, n'ezange zintegeera," 
John10:15 nga Kitange bw'antegeera, nange bwe ntegeera Kitange; nange mpaayo obulamu bwange olw'endiga." 
John10:16 Era nnina n'endiga endala ezitali za mu kisibo kino: nazo kiŋŋwanira okuzireeta, ziriwulira eddoboozi lyange; era ziriba ekisibo kimu, omusumba omu." 
John10:17 Kitange kyava anjagala, kubanga nze mpaayo obulamu bwange, ndyoke mbutwale ate." 
John10:18 Tewali abunziggyako, naye nze nzekka mbuwaayo. Nnina obuyinza obw'okubuwaayo, era nnina obuyinza obw'okubutwala nate. Ekiragiro ekyo nnakiweebwa Kitange.”" 
John10:19 Ne wabaawo nate okwawukana mu Bayudaaya olw'ebigambo ebyo. 
John10:20 Abamu ku bo bangi ne bagamba nti, “Aliko dayimooni era alaluse; mumuwulirira ki?”" 
John10:21 Abalala ne bagamba nti, “Ebigambo bino si bya muntu aliko dayimooni. Dayimooni ayinza okuzibula amaaso ga bamuzibe?”" 
John10:22 Yali mbaga ey'okutukuza mu Yerusaalemi; byali biro bya mpewo; 
John10:23 Yesu n'atambulira mu Yeekaalu mu kisasi kya Sulemaani. 
John10:24 Awo Abayudaaya ne bamwetooloola, ne bamugamba nti, “Olituusa wa okutubuusisabuusisa? Oba nga ggwe Kristo, tubuulirire ddala.”" 
John10:25 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Nnabagamba, naye temukkiriza: emirimu gye nkola mu linnya lya Kitange, gye gintegeeza nze." 
John10:26 Naye mmwe temukkiriza kubanga temuli ba mu ndiga zange. 
John10:27 Endiga zange ziwulira eddoboozi lyange, nange nzitegeera, era zingoberera;" 
John10:28 nange nziwa obulamu obutaggwaawo; so teziribula emirembe n'emirembe, so tewali alizisikula mu mukono gwange." 
John10:29 Kitange eyazimpa ye mukulu okusinga bonna, so tewali ayinza okuzisikula mu mukono gwa Kitange." 
John10:30 Nze ne Kitange tuli omu.” 
John10:31 Abayudaaya ne baddira nate amayinja okumukuba. 
John10:32 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Emirimu mingi emirungi egyava eri Kitange nnagibalaga mmwe; mulimu guluwa mu egyo ogubankubya amayinja?”" 
John10:33 Abayudaaya ne bamuddamu nti, “Olw'omulimu omulungi tetukukuba mayinja, naye olw'okuvvoola; era kubanga ggwe oli muntu ne weefuula Katonda.”" 
John10:34 Yesu n'abaddamu nti, “Tekyawandiikibwa mu mateeka gammwe nti Nze nnagamba nti Muli bakatonda?" 
John10:35 Oba nga yabayita abo bakatonda, abajjirwa ekigambo kya Katonda, (so n'ebyawandiikibwa tebiyinza kudiba)," 
John10:36 mwe mumugambira ki ye, Kitaawe gwe yatukuza, n'amutuma mu nsi, nti Ovvodde; kubanga ŋŋambye nti Ndi Mwana wa Katonda?" 
John10:37 Bwe sikola mirimu gya Kitange, temunzikiriza." 
John10:38 Naye bwe ngikola, newakubadde nga temunzikiriza nze, naye mukkirize emirimu: mumanye mutegeere nga Kitange ali mu nze nange mu Kitange.”" 
John10:39 Ne basala amagezi nate okumukwata: n'ava mu mikono gyabwe. 
John10:40 N'agenda nate emitala wa Yoludaani mu kifo Yokaana gye yali olubereberye ng'abatiza; n'abeera eyo. 
John10:41 Abantu bangi ne bajja gy'ali; ne bagamba nti, “Yokaana teyakola kabonero: naye byonna Yokaana bwe yayogera ku ono byali bya mazima.”" 
John10:42 Bangi abaali eyo ne bamukkiriza. 
John11:1 Awo waaliwo omuntu eyali omulwadde, Lazaalo ow'e Bessaniya, mu mbuga Malyamu ne Maliza muganda we mwe baali;" 
John11:2 Malyamu oyo ye yasiiga Mukama waffe amafuta n'amuttaanya ebigere n'enviiri ze; ye yalina mwannyina Lazaalo eyali alwadde. 
John11:3 Awo bannyina abo ne bamutumira, nga bagamba nti, “Mukama waffe, laba, gw'oyagala alwadde.”" 
John11:4 Naye Yesu bwe yawulira, n'agamba nti, “Obulwadde buno si bwa kufa wabula olw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda, Omwana wa Katonda abe n'ekitiibwa olw'obwo.”" 
John11:5 Naye Yesu yayagala Maliza ne muganda we ne Lazaalo. 
John11:6 Awo bwe yawulira ng'alwadde, n'ayosaawo ate ennaku bbiri mu kifo kye yalimu." 
John11:7 Ate n'alyoka agamba abayigirizwa nti, “Tuddeyo e Buyudaaya.”" 
John11:8 Abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti, “Labbi, kaakano Abayudaaya baali basala amagezi okukukuba amayinja, ate gy'oba odda?”" 
John11:9 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Essaawa ez'emisana si kkumi na bbiri (12)? Omuntu bw'atambula emisana teyeesittala, kubanga alaba omusana ogw'ensi eno." 
John11:10 Naye omuntu bw'atambula ekiro, yeesittala, kubanga omusana teguli mu ye.”" 
John11:11 Yayogera bw'ati, n'alyoka abagamba nti, “Mukwano gwaffe Lazaalo yeebase; naye ŋŋenda okumuzuukusa.”" 
John11:12 Awo abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti, “Mukama waffe, oba yeebase, anaazuukuka.”" 
John11:13 Naye Yesu yayogera ku kufa kwe: naye bo ne balowooza nti ayogera ku kwebaka kwa tulo. 
John11:14 Awo Yesu n'alyoka ababuulira lwatu nti, “Lazaalo afudde." 
John11:15 Nange nneesiimye ku lwammwe kubanga saaliyo, mulyoke mukkirize; naye tugende gy'ali.”" 
John11:16 Awo Tomasi ayitibwa Didumo n'agamba bayigirizwa banne nti, “Naffe tugende tufiire wamu naye.”" 
John11:17 Awo Yesu bwe yatuuka, n'asanga nga yaakamala ennaku nnya mu ntaana." 
John11:18 Naye Bessaniya yali kumpi ne Yerusaalemi nga sutadyo kkumi na ttaano (15); 
John11:19 Abayudaaya bangi baali bazze eri Maliza ne Malyamu okubakubagiza olwa mwannyinaabwe. 
John11:20 Awo Maliza bwe yawulira nga Yesu ajja, n'agenda okumusisinkana: naye Malyamu n'asigala mu nju." 
John11:21 Awo Maliza n'agamba Yesu nti, “Mukama wange, singa wali wano, mwannyinaze teyandifudde." 
John11:22 Era kaakano mmanyi nga byonna by'onoosaba Katonda, Katonda anaabikuwa.”" 
John11:23 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Mwannyoko ajja kuzuukira”" 
John11:24 Maliza n'amugamba nti, “Mmanyi nti alizuukirira ku kuzuukira kw'olunaku olw'enkomerero.”" 
John11:25 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Nze kuzuukira, n'obulamu: akkiriza nze, newakubadde ng'afudde, aliba mulamu:" 
John11:26 na buli muntu mulamu akkiriza nze talifa emirembe n'emirembe. Okkiriza ekyo?” 
John11:27 Maliza n'amugamba nti, “Weewaawo, Mukama wange: nze nzikiriza nga ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda, ajja mu nsi.”" 
John11:28 Bwe yamala okwogera bw'ati, n'agenda, n'ayita muganda we Malyamu kyama, ng'agamba nti, “Omuyigiriza azze, akuyita.”" 
John11:29 Naye bwe yawulira, n'agolokoka mangu, n'ajja gy'ali." 
John11:30 Yesu yali tannatuuka mu mbuga, naye ng'akyali mu kifo Maliza kye yamusangamu." 
John11:31 Awo Abayudaaya abaali naye mu nnyumba, nga bamukubagiza, bwe baalaba Malyamu ng'ayimiridde mangu okufuluma, ne bamugoberera, nga balowooza nti agenda ku ntaana okukaabira eyo." 
John11:32 Awo Malyamu bwe yatuuka Yesu gy'ali n'amulaba, n'agwa ku bigere bye, n'amugamba nti, “Mukama wange, singa wali wano, mwannyinaze teyandifudde.”" 
John11:33 Awo Yesu bwe yamulaba ng'akaaba, n'Abayudaaya abazze naye nga bakaaba, n'asinda mu mwoyo, ne yeeraliikirira," 
John11:34 n'agamba nti, “Mwamuteeka wa?” Ne bamugamba nti, “Mukama waffe, jjangu olabe.”" 
John11:35 Yesu n'akaaba amaziga. 
John11:36 Awo Abayudaaya ne boogera nti, “Laba bw'abadde amwagala.”" 
John11:37 Naye abamu ku bo ne boogera nti, “Omuntu ono, eyazibula amaaso ga muzibe w'amaaso teyayinza kulobera ono okufa?”" 
John11:38 Awo Yesu bwe yasinda ate mu nda ye, n'atuuka ku ntaana. Yali mpuku, ng'eteekeddwako ejjinja kungulu." 
John11:39 Yesu n'agamba nti, “Muggyeewo ejjinja.” Maliza, mwannyina w'oli eyafa, n'amugamba nti, “Mukama wange, kaakano awunya: kubanga yaakamala ennaku nnya.”" 
John11:40 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Sikugambye nti Bw'onokkiriza, onoolaba ekitiibwa kya Katonda?”" 
John11:41 Awo ne baggyawo ejjinja. Yesu n'ayimusa amaaso waggulu, n'ayogera nti, “Kitange, nkwebaza kubanga wampulira." 
John11:42 Nange nnamanya ng'ompulira bulijjo: naye njogedde ku lw'ekibiina ekinneetoolodde, bakkirize nga ggwe wantuma.”" 
John11:43 Bwe yamala okwogera bw'ati, n'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene nti, “Lazaalo, fuluma ojje.”" 
John11:44 Eyali afudde n'afuluma, ng'azingiddwa mu mbugo amagulu n'emikono; n'ekiremba nga kisibiddwa mu maaso ge. Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mumusumulule, mumuleke agende.”" 
John11:45 Awo bangi ku Bayudaaya, abajja ewa Malyamu, bwe baalaba Yesu ky'akoze, ne bamukkiriza." 
John11:46 Naye abamu ku bo ne bagenda eri Abafalisaayo, ne bababuulira Yesu by'akoze." 
John11:47 Awo bakabona abakulu n'Abafalisaayo ne batuuza olukiiko, ne bagamba nti, “Tukole tutya? Kubanga omuntu oyo akola obubonero bungi." 
John11:48 Bwe tunaamuleka bwe tutyo, bonna banaamukkiriza: n'Abaruumi balijja, balitunyagako ensi yaffe n'eggwanga lyaffe.”" 
John11:49 Naye omu ku bo, Kayaafa, eyali kabona asinga obukulu mu mwaka ogwo, n'abagamba nti, “Mmwe temuliiko kye mumanyi," 
John11:50 so temulowooza nga kibagwanidde omuntu omu afiirire abantu, n'eggwanga lyonna lireme okubula.”" 
John11:51 Ekyo teyakyogera mu magezi ge yekka; naye kubanga yali kabona asinga obukulu mu mwaka ogwo, yalagula nti Yesu agenda okufiirira eggwanga eryo;" 
John11:52 so si lwa ggwanga eryo lyokka, naye akuŋŋaanyize wamu abaana ba Katonda abaasaasaana." 
John11:53 Awo okuva ku lunaku olwo ne bateesa okumutta. 
John11:54 Awo Yesu n'atatambula nate mu Buyudaaya mu lwatu, naye n'avaayo n'agenda mu kifo ekiri okumpi n'eddungu, mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Efulayimu; n'abeera eyo n'abayigirizwa." 
John11:55 Naye Okuyitako okw'Abayudaaya kwali kunaatera okutuuka: bangi abaava mu byalo ne balinnya e Yerusaalemi okwetukuza ng'Okuyitako tekunnatuuka. 
John11:56 Awo Yesu ne bamunoonya, ne boogera bokka na bokka, nga bayimiridde mu Yeekaalu, nti, “Mulowooza mutya? Tajje ku mbaga?”" 
John11:57 Naye bakabona abakulu n'Abafalisaayo baali balagidde nti Omuntu bw'ategeera w'ali, ababuulire balyoke bamukwate." 
John12:1 Awo bwe zaali nga zisigaddeyo ennaku omukaaga okutuuka ku Kuyitako, Yesu n'ajja e Bessaniya, eyali Lazaalo, Yesu gwe yazuukiza mu bafu." 
John12:2 Awo ne bamufumbirayo emmere ey'ekyeggulo: ne Maliza n'aweereza; naye Lazaalo n'aba omu ku bo abaali batudde naye ku mmere. 
John12:3 Awo Malyamu n'addira laatiri ey'amafuta ag'omugavu, ag'omuwendo omungi ennyo, n'agisiiga ku bigere bya Yesu, n'attaanya ebigere bye n'enviiri ze: ennyumba n'ejjula akaloosa ak'amafuta." 
John12:4 Naye Yuda Isukalyoti, omu ku bayigirizwa be, eyali agenda okumulyamu olukwe, n'agamba nti," 
John12:5 “Kiki ekirobedde okutunda amafuta gano okugaggyamu eddinaali bisatu (300), ne zigabirwa abaavu?”" 
John12:6 Kale yayogera bw'atyo, si lwa kulumirwa baavu; naye kubanga yali mubbi, ye yakwatanga ensawo, n'atwalanga bye baateekangamu." 
John12:7 Awo Yesu n'agamba nti, “Mumuleke agaterekere olunaku lw'okuziikibwa kwange." 
John12:8 Kubanga abaavu be muli nabo ennaku zonna; naye nze temuli nange ennaku zonna.” 
John12:9 Awo ekibiina kinene eky'Abayudaaya ne bategeera nti Yesu ali Bessaniya, ne bajja si ku lwa Yesu yekka, era naye balabe ne Lazaalo, gwe yazuukiza mu bafu." 
John12:10 Naye bakabona abakulu ne basala amagezi okutta ne Lazaalo; 
John12:11 kubanga ku lulwe bangi ku Bayudaaya abaabavangako ne bakkiriza Yesu. 
John12:12 Olunaku olwokubiri ekibiina kinene abaali bazze ku mbaga, bwe baawulira nga Yesu ajja e Yerusaalemi," 
John12:13 ne batwala ensansa ez'enkindu ne bagenda okumusisinkana, ne boogerera waggulu nti, “Ozaana: aweereddwa omukisa ajja mu linnya lya Mukama, ye Kabaka wa Isiraeri.”" 
John12:14 Naye Yesu bwe yalaba ennyana y'endogoyi, n'agyebagala; nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti," 
John12:15 “Totya, muwala wa Sayuuni: laba, Kabaka wo ajja, nga yeeberese omwana gw'endogoyi.”" 
John12:16 Ebyo abayigirizwa be tebaabitegeera olubereberye: naye Yesu bwe yamala okugulumizibwa, ne balyoka bajjukira ng'ebyo byamuwandiikwako, era nga baamukola bwe batyo." 
John12:17 Awo ekibiina ekyali naye bwe yayita Lazaalo okuva mu ntaana n'amuzuukiza mu bafu, ne babeera abajulirwa bebyo bye yakola." 
John12:18 Era ekibiina kyekyava kigenda okumusisinkana, kubanga baawulira nti yakola akabonero ako." 
John12:19 Awo Abafalisaayo ne boogeragana nti, “Mulabe bwe mutalina kye mugasizza; laba, ensi zonna zimusenze.”" 
John12:20 Naye mu abo abagenda ku mbaga okusinza mwalimu Abayonaani: 
John12:21 awo abo ne bajja eri Firipo, eyava e Besusayida eky'omu Ggaliraaya, ne bamugamba nti, “Ssebo, twagala okulaba Yesu.”" 
John12:22 Firipo n'ajja n'abuulira Andereya; Andereya n'ajja, ne Firipo, ne babuulira Yesu." 
John12:23 Yesu n'abaddamu, n'agamba nti, “Obudde butuuse, Omwana w'omuntu agulumizibwe." 
John12:24 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Empeke y'eŋŋaano bw'etegwa mu ttaka n'efa, ebeerera awo yokka; naye bw'efa, ebala emmere nnyingi." 
John12:25 Ayagala obulamu bwe bumubula; naye akyawa obulamu bwe mu nsi eno alibusigaza okutuuka ku bulamu obutaggwaawo. 
John12:26 Omuntu bw'ampeereza, angobererenga; nange gye ndi, eyo omuweereza wange naye gy'anaabeeranga: omuntu bw'ampeereza, Kitange alimussaamu ekitiibwa.”" 
John12:27 “Kaakano omwoyo gwange gweraliikiridde; era njogere ntya? Kitange, ndokola okunzigya mu kiseera kino. Naye kyennava ntuuka mu kiseera kino." 
John12:28 Kitange, gulumiza erinnya lyo.” Awo eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu, nti, “Nnaligulumiza, era ndirigulumiza nate.”" 
John12:29 Awo ekibiina ekyali kiyimiridewo, bwe kyaliwulira, ne kigamba nti, “Kubadde kubwatuka,” abalala ne bagamba nti, “Malayika ayogedde.”" 
John12:30 Yesu n'addamu n'agamba nti, “Eddoboozi lino terizze ku bwange, naye ku bwammwe." 
John12:31 Kaakano ensi eno esalirwa omusango; kaakano omukulu w'ensi eno anaagoberwa ebweru. 
John12:32 Nange bwe ndiwanikibwa ku nsi ndiwalulira abantu bonna gye ndi.” 
John12:33 Naye yayogera atyo, ng'alaga okufa bwe kuli kw'agenda okufa." 
John12:34 Awo ekibiina ne kimuddamu nti, “Ffe twawulira mu mateeka nti Kristo abeereraawo emirembe n'emirembe: naawe kiki ekikugambya nti, Omwana w'omuntu kimugwanira okuwanikibwa? Oyo Omwana w'omuntu ye ani?”" 
John12:35 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Esigaddeyo ebiro bitono ng'omusana gukyali gye muli. Mutambule nga mukyalina omusana, ekizikiza kireme okubakwatira mu kkubo: atambulira mu kizikiza tamanya gy'agenda." 
John12:36 Bwe mukyalina omusana mukkirize omusana, mufuuke abaana b'omusana.” Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo n'agenda n'abeekweka." 
John12:37 Naye newakubadde nga yakola obubonero bungi obwenkanidde awo mu maaso gaabwe, tebaamukkiriza:" 
John12:38 ekigambo kya nnabbi Isaaya kituukirire, kye yayogera nti, “Mukama, ani eyakkiriza ebigambo byaffe?” Era omukono gwa Mukama gubikkuliddwa ani?" 
John12:39 Kyebaava balema okuyinza okukkiriza, kubanga Isaaya yayogera nate nti" 
John12:40 Yabaziba amaaso, n'abakakanyaza omutima; Baleme okulaba n'amaaso n'okutegeera n'omutima, Bakyuke, Ndyoke mbawonye." 
John12:41 Ebyo Isaaya yabyogera, kubanga yalaba ekitiibwa kya Yesu; era n'amwogerako." 
John12:42 Naye bangi ne mu bakulu abaamukkiriza, naye olw'okutya Abafalisaayo tebaayatula, baleme okugobebwa mu kkuŋŋaaniro:" 
John12:43 kubanga baayagala ekitiibwa ky'abantu okusinga ekitiibwa kya Katonda. 
John12:44 Yesu n'ayogerera waggulu n'agamba nti, “Anzikiriza, takkiriza nze, wabula oli eyantuma." 
John12:45 Era alaba nze ng'alabye oli eyantuma. 
John12:46 Nze nzize kuba musana mu nsi, buli muntu anzikiriza aleme okutuulanga mu kizikiza." 
John12:47 Naye awulira ebigambo byange, n'atabikwata, nze simusalira musango: kubanga sajja kusalira nsi musango, wabula okulokola ensi." 
John12:48 Agaana nze, n'atakkiriza bigambo byange, alina amusalira omusango: ekigambo kye nnayogera kye kirimusalira omusango ku lunaku olw'enkomerero." 
John12:49 Kubanga saayogeranga nze ku bwange; naye Kitange eyantuma, ye yandagira bye nteekwa okugamba era n'okwogera." 
John12:50 Nange mmanyi ng'ekiragiro kye bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo: kale nze bye njogera, nga Kitange bwe y'abiŋŋamba, bwe ntyo bwe njogera.”" 
John13:1 Naye embaga ey'Okuyitako yali nga tennatuuka, Yesu bwe yamanya ng'ekiseera kye kituuse okuva mu nsi muno okugenda eri Kitaawe, bwe yayagala ababe abali mu nsi, yabaagala okutuusa enkomerero." 
John13:2 Bwe baali balya emmere ey'ekyeggulo Setaani nga yamaze dda okuweerera Yuda Isukalyoti omwana wa Simooni mu mutima gwe okumulyamu olukwe," 
John13:3 Yesu bwe yamanya nga Kitaawe amuwadde byonna mu mukono gwe, era nga yava wa Katonda, ate ng'adda wa Katonda," 
John13:4 n'ava ku mmere, ne yeeggyako omunagiro gwe, n'addira ekiremba, ne yeesiba ekimyu." 
John13:5 N'alyoka addira amazzi nagateeka mu kibya, n'atandika okunaaza abayigirizwa ebigere n'okubisiimuuza ekiremba kye yali yeesibye." 
John13:6 Awo n'ajja eri Simooni Peetero. Naye n'amugamba nti, “Mukama wange, ggwe onnaaza ebigere?”" 
John13:7 Yesu n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Kye nkola nze tokimanyi ggwe kaakano, naye olikitegeera luvannyuma.”" 
John13:8 Peetero n'amugamba nti, “tonnaazenga bigere byange emirembe gyonna.” Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Bwe ssiikunaaze nga tossa kimu nange.”" 
John13:9 Simooni Peetero n'amugamba nti, “Mukama wange, si bigere byange byokka, naye n'emikono n'omutwe.”" 
John13:10 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Anaazibwa omubiri taliiko kye yeetaaga wabula okunaaba ebigere byokka, naye yenna nga mulongoofu: nammwe muli balongoofu naye si mwenna.”" 
John13:11 Kubanga yamumanya anaamulyamu olukwe; kyeyava ayogera nti Mwenna temuli balongoofu. 
John13:12 Awo bwe yamala okubanaaza ebigere, n'ayambala engoye ze, n'atuula nate, n'abagamba nti, “Mutegedde kye mbakoze?" 
John13:13 Mmwe mumpita Muyigiriza era Mukama wammwe: era mwogera bulungi; kubanga bwe ndi. 
John13:14 Kale oba nga nze Mukama wammwe era Omuyigiriza mbanaazizza ebigere, era nammwe kibagwanira okunaazagananga ebigere." 
John13:15 Kubanga mbawadde ekyokulabirako, era nga bwe mbakoze nze, nammwe mukolenga bwe mutyo." 
John13:16 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Omuddu tasinga bukulu mukama we; so omutume tasinga bukulu oli eyamutuma. 
John13:17 Bwe mubimanya ebyo, mulina omukisa bwe mubikola." 
John13:18 Soogedde ku mmwe mwenna: nze mmanyi be nnalondamu: naye ekyawandiikibwa kituukirire nti Alya ku mmere yange ye annyimusiza ekisinziiro kye. 
John13:19 Okusooka leero mbabuulira nga tekinnaba kubaawo, era ne bwe kiriba, mulyoke mukkirize nga nze nzuuyo." 
John13:20 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Asembeza buli gwe ntuma, ng'asembezza nze: era asembeza nze ng'asembezezza oli eyantuma.”" 
John13:21 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera bw'atyo, ne yeeraliikirira mu mwoyo, n'ayatula, n'agamba nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti omu ku mmwe anandyamu olukwe.”" 
John13:22 Abayigirizwa ne batunulaganako, nga babuusabuusa gw'ayogeddeko bw'ali." 
John13:23 Waaliwo omu ku bayigirizwa be eyali agalamidde mu kifuba kya Yesu ku mmere, Yesu gwe yayagalanga." 
John13:24 Awo Simooni Peetero n'awenya oyo, n'amugamba nti, “Tubuulire gw'ayogeddeko bw'ali.”" 
John13:25 Ye bwe yagalamira mu kifuba kya Yesu, nga bwe yali, n'amugamba nti, “Mukama wange, ye ani?”" 
John13:26 Awo Yesu n'addamu nti, “Gwe nnaakoleza ekitole ne nkimuwa ye wuuyo.” Awo bwe yakoza ekitole, n'akitwala, n'akiwa Yuda omwana wa Simooni Isukalyoti." 
John13:27 Bwe yamala okuweebwa ekitole, Setaani n'alyoka amuyingiramu. Awo Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Ky'okola, kola mangu.”" 
John13:28 Naye ekigambo ekyo tewali muntu ku bo abaali batudde ku mmere eyakitegeera ekikimwogezza. 
John13:29 Abamu baalowooza nti kubanga Yuda ye yali akwata ensawo, Yesu kyeyava amugamba nti gula bye twetaaga eby'oku mbaga; oba awe abaavu ekintu." 
John13:30 Awo bwe yamala okuweebwa ekitole, amangu ago n'afuluma ebweru; obudde bwali kiro." 
John13:31 Awo bwe yamala okufuluma, Yesu n'agamba nti, “Kaakano Omwana w'omuntu agulumizibwa, ne Katonda agulumizibwa mu ye;" 
John13:32 era Katonda alimugulumiza mu ye yennyini, era amangu ago anaamugulumiza." 
John13:33 Baana bange, ekiseera kitono nga nkyali nammwe. Mulinnoonya: era nga bwe nnagamba Abayudaaya nti Gye ŋŋenda nze mmwe temuyinza kujja, era nammwe bwe mbagamba kaakano." 
John13:34 Etteeka eriggya mbawa nti Mwagalanenga; nga bwe nnabaagalanga mmwe, era nammwe mwagalanenga." 
John13:35 Bonna kwe banaategeereranga nga muli bayigirizwa bange, bwe munaabanga n'okwagalana mwekka na mwekka.”" 
John13:36 Simooni Peetero n'amubuuza nti, “Mukama wange, ogenda wa?” Yesu n'addamu nti, “Gye ŋŋenda, toyinza kungoberera kaakano; naye olingoberera gye bujja.”" 
John13:37 Peetero n'amugamba nti, “Mukama wange, kiki ekindobera okukugoberera kaakano? Nnaawaayo obulamu bwange ku lulwo.”" 
John13:38 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Onoowaayo obulamu bwo ku lwange? Ddala ddala nkugamba nti Enkoko teekookolime okutuusa lw'onoonneegaana emirundi esatu." 
John14:1 “Omutima gwammwe tegweraliikiriranga: mukkirize Katonda, era nange munzikirize." 
John14:2 Mu nnyumba ya Kitange mulimu ebifo bingi eby'okubeeramu. Singa tekiri bwe kityo, nandibagambye; kubanga ŋŋenda okubateekerateekera ekifo." 
John14:3 Era oba nga ŋŋenda okubateekerateekera ekifo, ndikomawo nate ne mbatwala gye ndi; nze gye ndi, nammwe mubeere eyo." 
John14:4 Era gye ŋŋenda, ekkubo mulimanyi.”" 
John14:5 Tomasi n'amugamba nti, “Mukama waffe, tetumanyi gy'ogenda; ekkubo tulimanyi tutya?”" 
John14:6 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Nze kkubo, n'amazima n'obulamu: tewali ajja eri Kitange, wabula ng'ayita mu nze." 
John14:7 Singa muntegedde, ne Kitange mwandimumanye: okusooka kaakano mumutegeera era mumulabye.”" 
John14:8 Firipo n'amugamba nti, “Mukama waffe, tulage Kitaffe, kale kinaatumala.”" 
John14:9 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Kasookedde mbeera nammwe, ebiro ebingi bwe bityo, era tontegeeranga, Firipo? Alabye ku nze, ng'alabye ku Kitange; kiki ekikwogeza ggwe nti tulage Kitaffe?" 
John14:10 Tokkiriza nga nze ndi mu Kitange, ne Kitange ali mu nze? Ebigambo bye mbagamba nze, sibyogera ku bwange nzekka; naye Kitange bw'abeera mu nze akola emirimu gye." 
John14:11 Munzikirize nga nze ndi mu Kitange, ne Kitange mu nze: oba munzikirize olw'emirimu gyokka." 
John14:12 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Akkiriza nze emirimu gye nkola nze, naye aligikola; era alikola egisinga egyo obunene; kubanga nze ŋŋenda eri Kitange." 
John14:13 Na buli kye munaasabanga mu linnya lyange, ekyo nnaakikolanga, Kitange agulumirizibwenga mu Mwana." 
John14:14 Bwe munaasabanga ekigambo mu linnya lyange, ekyo nnaakikolanga.”" 
John14:15 “Oba nga munjagala, munaakwatanga ebiragiro byange." 
John14:16 Nange ndisaba Kitange, naye alibawa Omubeezi omulala, abeerenga nammwe emirembe n'emirembe." 
John14:17 Omwoyo ow'amazima: ensi gw'eteyinza kukkiriza; kubanga temulaba, so temutegeera: mmwe mumutegeera; kubanga abeera gye muli, era anaabanga mu mmwe." 
John14:18 Siribaleka bamulekwa; nkomawo gye muli. 
John14:19 Esigadde ekiseera kitono, ensi obutandaba nate; naye mmwe mundaba: kubanga nze ndi mulamu nammwe muliba balamu." 
John14:20 Ku lunaku olwo mulitegeera mmwe nga nze ndi mu Kitange, era nga nammwe muli mu nze, ate nga nange ndi mu mmwe." 
John14:21 Alina ebiragiro byange, n'abikwata, oyo nga ye anjagala: anjagala anaayagalibwanga Kitange, nange nnaamwagalanga, nnaamulabikiranga.”" 
John14:22 Yuda (atali Isukalyoti) n'amugamba nti, “Mukama waffe, kibadde kitya ggwe okugenda okutulabikira ffe, so si eri ensi?”" 
John14:23 Yesu n'amuddamu n'amugamba nti, “Omuntu bw'anjagala, anaakwatanga ekigambo kyange: ne Kitange anaamwagalanga, era tunajjanga gy'ali, tunaatuulanga gy'ali." 
John14:24 Atanjagala takwata bigambo byange: n'ekigambo kye muwulira si kyange, naye kya Kitange eyantuma.”" 
John14:25 “Ebigambo ebyo mbibabuulidde nga nkyali nammwe. 
John14:26 Naye Omubeezi, Omwoyo Omutukuvu, Kitange gw'alituma mu linnya lyange, oyo alibayigiriza byonna, alibajjukiza byonna bye nnabagamba." 
John14:27 Emirembe mbalekera; emirembe gyange ngibawa: si ng'ensi bw'ewa, nze bwe mbawa. Omutima gwammwe tegweraliikiriranga so tegutyanga." 
John14:28 Muwulidde bwe mbagambye nti ŋŋenda, era nkomawo gye muli. Singa munjagala, mwandisanyuse kubanga ŋŋenda eri Kitange: kubanga Kitange ansinga obukulu." 
John14:29 Kaakano mbagambye nga tekinnaba kubaawo, lwe kiribaawo mulyoke mukkirize." 
John14:30 Sikyayogera nnyo nate nammwe; kubanga afuga ensi ajja: naye tandiiko kigambo; 
John14:31 naye ensi etegeerenga njagala Kitange, era Kitange bwe yandagira, bwe ntyo bwe nkola. Mugolokoke, tuve wano.”" 
John15:1 “Nze muzabbibu ogw'amazima, ne Kitange ye mulimi." 
John15:2 Buli ttabi eriri mu nze eritabala bibala, aliggyawo, na buli eribala ebibala alirongoosa, lyeyongerenga okubala." 
John15:3 Mmwe kaakano mumaze okuba abalongoofu olw'ekigambo kye mbagambye. 
John15:4 Mubeere mu nze, nange mu mmwe. Ng'ettabi bwe litayinza kubala bibala lyokka, bwe litabeera ku muzabbibu, bwe kityo nammwe temuyinza, bwe mutabeera mu nze." 
John15:5 Nze muzabbibu, mmwe matabi: abeera mu nze, nange mu ye, oyo abala ebibala bingi: kubanga awatali nze temuliiko kye muyinza kukola." 
John15:6 Omuntu bw'atabeera mu nze, asuulibwa ebweru ng'ettabi, akala; bagakuŋŋaanya, bagasuula mu muliro, ne gaggya." 
John15:7 Bwe mubeera mu nze, n'ebigambo byange bwe bibeera mu mmwe, musabenga kye mwagala kyonna, munaakikolerwanga." 
John15:8 Mu kino Kitange agulumizibwa, mubalenga ebibala bingi; era munaabanga abayigirizwa bange." 
John15:9 Nga Kitange bwe yanjagala, nange mbagadde mmwe: mubeerenga mu kwagala kwange." 
John15:10 Bwe mukwata ebiragiro byange, munaabeeranga mu kwagala kwange; nga nze bwe nnakwata ebiragiro bya Kitange, ne mbeera mu kwagala kwe." 
John15:11 Ebyo mbibagambye, essanyu lyange libeerenga mu mmwe, era essanyu lyammwe lituukirire." 
John15:12 Kino kye kiragiro kyange, mwagalanenga, nga bwe nnabaagala mmwe." 
John15:13 Tewali alina kwagala kunene okusinga kuno omuntu okuwaayo obulamu bwe olwa mikwano gye. 
John15:14 Mmwe muli mikwano gyange, bwe mukola bye mbalagira." 
John15:15 Sikyabayita baddu; kubanga omuddu tamanya mukama we by'akola; naye mbayise ba mukwano; kubanga byonna bye nnawulira eri Kitange mbibabuulidde mmwe. 
John15:16 Si mmwe mwannonda nze, naye nze nnabalonda mmwe, ne mbateekawo, mugende mubalenga ebibala, n'ebibala byammwe bibeerengawo: kyonna kye munaasabanga Kitange mu linnya lyange, anaakibawanga." 
John15:17 Mbalagidde bino, mwagalanenga.”" 
John15:18 “Ensi bw'ebakyawanga mumanye nga yasooka kukyawa nze nga tennaba kukyawa mmwe. 
John15:19 Singa mubadde ba nsi, ensi yandyagadde ekyayo; naye kubanga temuli ba nsi, naye nze nnabalonda mu nsi, ensi kyeva ebakyawa." 
John15:20 Mujjukire ekigambo kye nnabagamba nti Omuddu tasinga mukama we. Oba nga banjiggannya nze, nammwe banaabayigganyanga; oba nga baakwata ekigambo kyange, n'ekyammwe banaakikwatanga." 
John15:21 Naye ebyo byonna banaabibakolanga olw'erinnya lyange, kubanga tebamumanyi eyantuma." 
John15:22 Singa sajja ne njogera nabo, tebandibadde na kibi; naye kaakano tebalina kya kuwoza olw'ekibi kyabwe." 
John15:23 Ankyawa nze akyawa ne Kitange. 
John15:24 Singa saakolera mu bo mirimu egitakolebwanga mulala, tebandibadde na kibi; naye kaakano balabye ne bankyawa ne Kitange." 
John15:25 Naye ekigambo kituukirire ekyawandiikibwa mu mateeka gaabwe nti Bankyayira bwereere. 
John15:26 Naye Omubeezi bw'alijja, gwe ndibatumira ava eri Kitange, Omwoyo ow'amazima, ava eri Kitange, oyo alitegeeza ebyange:" 
John15:27 era nammwe mutegeeza ebyange kubanga okuva ku lubereberye mwali nange.” 
John16:1 “Ebyo mbibabuulidde muleme okusittazibwanga. 
John16:2 Banaabagobanga mu makuŋŋaaniro; weewaawo, ekiseera kijja, buli anaabattanga anaalowoozanga ng'aweerezza Katonda." 
John16:3 N'ebyo banaabikolanga, kubanga Kitange tebamutegeera newakubadde nze." 
John16:4 Naye ebyo mbibabuulidde, era ekiseera kyabyo bwe kituukanga mujjukire nga nze nnababuulira. N'ebyo okuva ku lubereberye saabibabuulira, kubanga nnali wamu nammwe.”" 
John16:5 “Naye kaakano ŋŋenda eri oli eyantuma; era tewali ku mmwe ambuuza nti Ogenda wa? 
John16:6 Naye kubanga mbabuulidde ebyo, emitima gyammwe gijjudde ennaku." 
John16:7 Naye nze mbagamba amazima; kibasaanira mmwe nze okugenda; kubanga nze bwe sirigenda, Omubeezi talibajjira; naye bwe ndigenda ndimutuma gye muli." 
John16:8 Ye bw'alijja, alirumiriza ensi olw'ekibi, n'olw'obutuukirivu, n'olw'omusango;" 
John16:9 olw'ekibi, kubanga tebanzikiriza nze;" 
John16:10 olw'obutuukirivu, kubanga ŋŋenda eri Kitange, so nammwe temukyandaba nate;" 
John16:11 olw'omusango, kubanga omukulu w'ensi eno asaliddwa omusango." 
John16:12 Nkyalina bingi okubabuulira, naye temuyinza kubigumiikiriza kaakano." 
John16:13 Naye bw'alijja oyo Omwoyo ow'amazima, anaabaluŋŋamyanga mu mazima gonna: kubanga taayogerenga ku bubwe yekka; naye byonna by'anaawuliranga by'anaayogeranga: ye anaababuuliranga ebigenda okujja." 
John16:14 Oyo anangulumizanga nze: kubanga anaatoolanga ku byange n'ababuulira mmwe. 
John16:15 Byonna byonna Kitange by'ali nabyo bye byange: kyenvudde ŋŋamba nti Anaatoolanga ku byange n'abuulira mmwe. 
John16:16 Esigadde ekiseera kitono, ne mutandaba nate; era nate walibaawo ekiseera kitono, ne mundaba.”" 
John16:17 Abayigirizwa be abamu kyebaava boogera bokka na bokka nti, “Kiki kino ky'atugamba nti Esigadde ekiseera kitono, ne mutandaba; nate walibaawo ekiseera kitono, ne mundaba; era nti Kubanga ŋŋenda eri Kitange?”" 
John16:18 Kyebaava bagamba nti, “Kiki kino ky'agamba nti Ekiseera kitono? Tetumanyi ky'agamba.”" 
John16:19 Yesu n'ategeera nga baagala okumubuuza, n'abagamba nti, “Mwebuuzaganya mwekka olw'ekyo kye mbagambye nti Esigadde ekiseera kitono, ne mutandaba, era nate walibaawo ekiseera kitono ne mundaba?" 
John16:20 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti mmwe mulikaaba mulikuba ebiwoobe, naye ensi erisanyuka: mmwe mulinakuwala, naye ennaku yammwe erifuuka ssanyu." 
John16:21 Omukazi bw'azaala alaba ennaku, kubanga ekiseera kye kituuse: naye omwana bw'amala okuzaalibwa nga takyajjukira kulumwa, olw'essanyu ery'okuzaala omuntu mu nsi." 
John16:22 Kale nammwe kaakano munakuwala: naye ndibalaba nate, n'emitima gyammwe girisanyuka, n'essanyu lyammwe tewali muntu aliribaggyako." 
John16:23 Ne ku lunaku luli temulibaako kye munsaba. Ddala ddala mbagamba nti Buli kye mulisaba Kitange, alikibawa mu linnya lyange." 
John16:24 Okutuusa leero temusabanga kigambo mu linnya lyange: musabe, muliweebwa, essanyu lyammwe lituukirire.”" 
John16:25 “ Ebyo mbibabuuliridde mu ngero: naye obudde bugenda okujja, mwe siryogerera nammwe mu ngero, naye ndibabuulira ebya Kitange mu lwatu." 
John16:26 Ku lunaku luli mulisaba mu linnya lyange: so sibagamba nti ndibasabira eri Kitange; 
John16:27 kubanga Kitange yennyini abaagala, kubanga munjagadde nze, mukkirizza nga nnava eri Kitange." 
John16:28 Nnava eri Kitange, ne njija mu nsi: nate ensi ngireka, ŋŋenda eri Kitange.”" 
John16:29 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti Laba, kaakano oyogera lwatu, toyogera lugero." 
John16:30 Kaakano tumanyi ng'omanyi byonna, so teweetaaga muntu yenna okukubuuza; kyetuva tukkiriza nga wava eri Katonda." 
John16:31 Yesu n'abaddamu nti “ Kaakano mukkirizza? 
John16:32 Laba, ekiseera kijja, era kituuse, mwe munaasaasaanira buli muntu mu bibye, munandeka nze nzekka: so si nzekka, kubanga Kitange ali wamu nange." 
John16:33 Ebyo mbibabuulidde, mube n'emirembe mu nze. Mu nsi mulina ennaku: naye mugume; nze mpangudde ensi.”" 
John17:1 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo; n'ayimusa amaaso ge mu ggulu n'agamba nti, “Kitange, ekiseera kituuse; gulumiza Omwana wo, Omwana wo akugulumize," 
John17:2 nga bwe wamuwa obuyinza ku balina omubiri bonna, era bonna be wamuwa, abawe obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
John17:3 Buno bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo, okutegeera ggwe Katonda omu ow'amazima, n'oyo gwe watuma, Yesu Kristo." 
John17:4 Nze nkugulumizizza ku nsi kubanga omulimu gwe wampa okukola ngukomekkerezza. 
John17:5 Ai Kitange, ne kaakano ngulumiza ggwe wamu naawe mu kitiibwa kiri kye nnali nakyo awamu naawe ng'ensi tennabaawo." 
John17:6 Njolesezza erinnya lyo mu bantu be wampa okubaggya mu nsi: baali babo, n'obampa nze; nabo bakutte ekigambo kyo." 
John17:7 Kaakano bategedde nga byonna bye wampa biva mu ggwe," 
John17:8 kubanga ebigambo bye wampa mbibawadde; ne babikkiriza, ne bategeera mazima nga nnava gy'oli, ne bakkiriza nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:9 Nze mbasabira abo; sisabira nsi, wabula abo be wampa; kubanga babo;" 
John17:10 era ebyange byonna bibyo, n'ebibyo byange: nange ngulumizibwa mu bo." 
John17:11 Siri mu nsi nate, naye bano bali mu nsi, nange njija gy'oli. Kitange Omutukuvu, obakuumenga mu linnya lyo be wampa, babeerenga bumu, nga ffe." 
John17:12 Bwe nnali nabo be wampa nnabakuumanga mu linnya lyo; era ne mbazibira, tekubulanga muntu ku bo, wabula omwana w'okubula; ebyawandiikibwa bituukirire." 
John17:13 Naye kaakano njija gy'oli; na bino mbyogera mu nsi babe n'essanyu lyange nga lituukiridde mu bo. 
John17:14 Mbawadde ekigambo kyo; era ensi yabakyawa, kubanga si ba nsi nga nze bwe siri wa nsi." 
John17:15 Sisaba ggwe kubaggya mu nsi, naye obakuumenga mu bubi." 
John17:16 Si ba nsi, nga nze bwe siri wa nsi." 
John17:17 Obatukuze mu mazima: ekigambo kyo ge mazima," 
John17:18 Nga bwe wantuma mu nsi, nange bwe nnabatuma mu nsi." 
John17:19 Era nze nneetukuza ku bwabwe, nabo bennyini batukuzibwe mu mazima." 
John17:20 So sibasabira bano bokka, naye n'abo abanzikiriza olw'ekigambo kyabwe;" 
John17:21 bonna babeerenga bumu; nga ggwe, Kitange, bw'oli mu nze, nange mu ggwe, era nabo babeerenga mu ffe: ensi ekkirize nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:22 Nange ekitiibwa kye wampa nkibawadde; babeerenga bumu, nga ffe bwe tuli obumu;" 
John17:23 nze mu bo, naawe mu nze, batuukiririre okuba obumu; ensi etegeerenga nga ggwe wantuma, n'obaagala bo, nga bwe wanjagala nze." 
John17:24 Kitange, be wampa, njagala, we ndi nze, nabo we baba babeeranga nange; balabe ekitiibwa kyange kye wampa: kubanga wanjagala nze ng'ensi tennatondebwa." 
John17:25 Kitange Omutuukirivu, ensi teyakutegeera, naye nze nnakutegeera; na bano baategeera nga ggwe wantuma;" 
John17:26 era nnabategeeza erinnya lyo era nditegeeza; okwagala kwe wanjagala kubeerenga mu bo, nange mu bo.”" 
John18:1 Awo Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo n'afuluma n'abayigirizwa be ne basomoka akagga Kidulooni, eyali olusuku, n'agenda omwo ye n'abayigirizwa be." 
John18:2 Era ne Yuda amulyamu olukwe, yali amanyi ekifo ekyo: kubanga Yesu yagendangayo emirundi mingi n'abayigirizwa be." 
John18:3 Awo Yuda, bwe yamala okuweebwa ekitongole ky'abaserikale n'abaami okuva eri bakabona abakulu n'Abafalisaayo, n'ajja mu lusuku ng'alina ettabaaza, n'emimuli, n'amafumu." 
John18:4 Awo Yesu bwe yamanya ebigambo byonna ebinaamujjira, n'avaayo n'abagamba nti, “Munoonya ani?”" 
John18:5 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Yesu Omunazaaleesi.” Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Nze nzuuno.” Era ne Yuda, amulyamu olukwe, yali ayimiridde nabo." 
John18:6 Awo bwe yabagamba nti, “Nze nzuuno,” ne badda emabega ne bagwa wansi." 
John18:7 Ate n'ababuuza omulundi ogwokubiri nti, “Munoonya ani?” Ne bagamba nti, “Yesu Omunazaaleesi.”" 
John18:8 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Mbabuulidde nti nze nzuuno; kale oba nga munoonya nze, muleke bano bagende.”" 
John18:9 Ekigambo kino kyali kituukiriza kye yayogera nti, “Ku abo be wampa saabuzaako n'omu.”" 
John18:10 Awo Simooni Peetero eyalina ekitala n'akisowola n'atema omuddu wa kabona asinga obukulu, n'amusalako okutu okwa ddyo. N'erinnya ly'omuddu Maluko." 
John18:11 Awo Yesu n'agamba Peetero nti, “Zzaamu ekitala mu kiraato kyakyo; ekikompe Kitange ky'ampadde, siikinywe?”" 
John18:12 Awo ekitongole ky'abaserikale, n'omwami waabwe omukulu, n'abaweereza b'Abayudaaya ne bakwata Yesu ne bamusiba," 
John18:13 ne basooka okumutwala eri Ana; kubanga yali mukoddomi wa Kayaafa, eyali kabona asinga obukulu mu mwaka guli." 
John18:14 Era Kayaafa oyo ye yawa Abayudaaya amagezi nti kisaana omuntu omu okufiirira abantu. 
John18:15 Simooni Peetero n'omuyigirizwa omulala ne bagoberera Yesu. Awo omuyigirizwa oli yali amanyiddwa kabona asinga obukulu, n'ayingira ne Yesu mu luggya lwa kabona asinga obukulu;" 
John18:16 naye Peetero n'asigala ng'ayimiridde ebweru ku luggi. Awo omuyigirizwa oyo omulala eyali amanyiddwa kabona asinga obukulu n'afuluma n'ayogera n'omuwala omuggazi w'oluggi, n'ayingiza Peetero." 
John18:17 Awo omuwala oyo omuggazi w'oluggi n'agamba Peetero nti, “Naawe oli wa mu bayigirizwa ba muntu ono?” Peetero n'addamu nti, “Nedda siri.”" 
John18:18 Abaddu n'abaweereza baali bayimiridde awo nga bakumye omuliro gw'amanda; kubanga yali mpewo; ne boota omuliro: ne Peetero naye yali nabo ng'ayimiridde ng'ayota omuliro. 
John18:19 Awo kabona asinga obukulu n'abuuza Yesu ku by'abayigirizwa be, n'eby'okuyigiriza kwe." 
John18:20 Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Nze nnabuuliranga lwatu ensi; bulijjo nnayigirizanga mu makuŋŋaaniro ne mu Yeekaalu, mwe bakuŋŋaanira Abayudaaya bonna; soogeranga mu kyama kigambo na kimu." 
John18:21 Ombuuliza ki? Buuza abampuliranga, bye nnabagamba: laba, abo bamanyi nze bye nnayogera.”" 
John18:22 Bwe yayogera ebyo omu ku baweereza eyali amuyimiridde okumpi n'akuba Yesu oluyi n'agamba nti, “Oddamu otyo kabona asinga obukulu?”" 
John18:23 Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Oba njogedde bubi, kinnumirize ekibi: naye oba kirungi, onkubira ki?”" 
John18:24 Awo Ana n'amuweereza nga musibe eri Kayaafa kabona asinga obukulu. 
John18:25 Ne Simooni Peetero yali ayimiridde ng'ayota omuliro. Awo ne bamugamba nti, “Naawe oli wa mu bayigirizwa be?” Ye ne yeegaana n'agamba nti, “Siri waamu.”" 
John18:26 Omu ku baddu bakabona asinga obukulu ow'ekika ky'oyo Peetero gwe yasalako okutu, n'agamba nti, “Nze saakulabye naye mu lusuku muli?”" 
John18:27 Peetero ne yeegaana nate; amangu ago enkoko n'ekookolima. 
John18:28 Ne baggya Yesu eri Kayaafa, ne bamutwala mu kigango: era bwali bukya; bo bennyini ne batayingira mu kigango, baleme okweyonoona, naye bamale okulya Okuyitako." 
John18:29 Awo Piraato n'afuluma n'agenda gye baali, n'agamba nti, “Musango ki gwe mulanze omuntu ono?”" 
John18:30 Ne baddamu ne bamugamba nti, “Omuntu ono singa abadde takoze bubi, tetwandimuleese gy'oli.”" 
John18:31 Awo Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Kale mumutwale mmwe mumusalire omusango ng'amateeka gammwe bwe gali.” Abayudaaya ne bamugamba nti, “Tekyatulagirwa kutta muntu yenna;”" 
John18:32 ekigambo kya Yesu kituukirizibwe, kye yayogera, ng'alaga okufa kw'agenda okufa bwe kuli." 
John18:33 Awo Piraato n'ayingira nate mu kigango, n'ayita Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Ggwe Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
John18:34 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Kino okyogedde ku bubwo nantiki balala be bakubuulidde ebigambo byange?”" 
John18:35 Piraato n'addamu nti, “Nze ndi Muyudaaya? Ab'eggwanga lyammwe ne bakabona abakulu be bakundeetedde: okoze ki?”" 
John18:36 Yesu n'addamu nti, “Obwakabaka bwange si bwa mu nsi muno: singa obwakabaka bwange bubadde bwa mu nsi muno, basajja bange bandirwanye, ne ssiweebwayo mu Bayudaaya: naye kaakano obwakabaka bwange si bwa wano.”" 
John18:37 Awo Piraato n'amugamba nti, “Kale ggwe kabaka?” Yesu n'addamu nti, “Oyogedde, kubanga nze kabaka. Nze nnazaalirwa ekyo, n'ekyo kye kyandeeta mu nsi, ntegeeze amazima. Buli ow'amazima awulira eddoboozi lyange.”" 
John18:38 Piraato n'amugamba nti, “Amazima kye ki?” Piraato bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'afuluma nate n'agenda awali Abayudaaya, n'abagamba nti, “Siraba musango ku ye." 
John18:39 Naye mulina empisa, nze okubateeranga omu ku Kuyitako: kale mwagala mbateere Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
John18:40 Awo ne bakaayana, ne bagamba nti, “Si ono, wabula Balaba.” N'oyo Balaba yali munyazi." 
John19:1 Awo Piraato n'alyoka atwala Yesu n'amukuba emiggo. 
John19:2 Basserikale ne baluka engule y'amaggwa, ne bagimutikkira ku mutwe, ne bamwambaza olugoye olw'effulungu;" 
John19:3 ne bajja w'ali ne bagamba nti, “Mirembe, Kabaka w'Abayudaaya!” Ne bamukuba empi." 
John19:4 Piraato n'afuluma nate ebweru, n'abagamba nti, “Laba mmufulumya ebweru we muli, mutegeere nga siraba musango ku ye.”" 
John19:5 Awo Yesu n'afuluma, ng'atikkiddwa engule ey'amaggwa, era ng'ayambadde n'olugoye olw'effulungu. Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Laba omuntu oyo!”" 
John19:6 Awo bakabona abakulu n'abaweereza bwe baamulaba, ne boogerera waggulu nga bagamba nti, “Komerera, komerera.” Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Mumutwale mmwe mumukomerere, kubanga nze siraba musango ku ye.”" 
John19:7 Abayudaaya ne bamuddamu nti, “Ffe tulina etteeka n'olw'etteeka eryo agwanidde okufa, kubanga yeefuula Omwana wa Katonda.”" 
John19:8 Awo Piraato bwe yawulira ekigambo ekyo, ne yeeyongera okutya;" 
John19:9 n'ayingira nate mu kigango, n'agamba Yesu nti, “Oli wa wa?” Naye Yesu n'atamuddamu." 
John19:10 Awo Piraato n'amugamba nti, “Toyogera nange? Tomanyi nga nnina obuyinza obw'okukuta, era nnina obuyinza obw'okukukomerera?”" 
John19:11 Yesu n'amuddamu nti, “Tewandibadde na buyinza bwonna ku nze, singa tebwakuweebwa okuva waggulu; ampaddeyo gy'oli kyavudde abeera n'ekibi ekisinga.”" 
John19:12 Okusookera awo Piraato n'asala amagezi okumuta: naye Abayudaaya ne boogerera waggulu nga bagamba nti, “Bw'onoomuta oyo nga toli mukwano gwa Kayisaali: buli muntu yenna eyeefuula kabaka awakanya Kayisaali.”" 
John19:13 Awo Piraato bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo n'afulumya Yesu ebweru, n'atuula ku ntebe ey'emisango mu kifo ekiyitibwa Amayinja Amaaliire, naye mu Lwebbulaniya Gabbasa." 
John19:14 Lwali lunaku lwa kuteekateeka Okuyitako: zaali nga ziri essaawa mukaaga. N'agamba Abayudaaya nti, “Laba Kabaka wammwe!”" 
John19:15 Awo bo ne boogerera waggulu nti, “Muggyeewo, muggyeewo mukomerere.” Piraato n'abagamba nti, “Nnaakomerera Kabaka wammwe?” Bakabona abakulu ne baddamu nti, “Tetulina kabaka wabula Kayisaali.”" 
John19:16 Awo Piraato n'alyoka abawa Yesu okumukomerera. Awo ne batwala Yesu: 
John19:17 n'afuluma, nga yeetisse yekka omusaalaba gwe, n'atuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Ekyekiwanga, ekiyitibwa mu Lwebbulaniya Gologoosa." 
John19:18 Ne bamukomererera ku musaalaba mu kifo ekyo, era ne bakomerera n'abalala babiri wamu naye, eruuyi n'eruuyi, nga Yesu ali wakati." 
John19:19 Ne Piraato n'awandiika ebbaluwa n'agissa ku musalaba, ng'ewandiikiddwa nti, “YESU Omunazaaleesi KABAKA w'Abayudaaya.”" 
John19:20 Awo ebbaluwa eyo bangi ku Bayudaaya ne bagisoma: kubanga ekifo kye baakomereramu Yesu kyali kumpi n'ekibuga: era yawandiikibwa mu Lwebbulaniya, ne mu Luyonaani, ne mu Luruumi." 
John19:21 Awo bakabona abakulu b'Abayudaaya ne bagamba Piraato nti, “Towandiika nti Kabaka w'Abayudaaya; naye nti oyo eyayogera nti Nze Kabaka w'Abayudaaya.”" 
John19:22 Piraato n'addamu nti, “Kye mpandiise kye mpandiise.”" 
John19:23 Awo basserikale bwe baamala okukomerera Yesu, ne batwala ebyambalo bye, ne bateeka emiteeko ena, buli sserikale muteeko; n'ekkanzu ye: n'ekkanzu ye teyatungwa, yalukibwa bulukibwa yonna okuva waggulu." 
John19:24 Ne bagamba bokka na bokka nti, “Tuleme okugiyuzaamu, naye tugikubire akalulu, tulabe anaaba nnyiniyo,” ekyawandiikibwa kituukirire, ekyogera nti, “Bagabana ebyambalo byange, Era bakubira akalulu eky'okwambala kyange.” Awo basserikale ne bakola ebyo." 
John19:25 Naye awo awali omusaalaba gwa Yesu waali wayimiridde nnyina, ne muganda wa nnyina, Malyamu muka Kuloopa, ne Malyamu Magudaleene." 
John19:26 Awo Yesu bwe yalaba nnyina, n'omuyigirizwa gwe yali ayagala ng'ayimiridde kumpi, n'agamba nnyina nti, “Omukyala, laba, omwana wo!”" 
John19:27 Oluvannyuma n'agamba omuyigirizwa nti, “Laba nnyoko.” Awo okuva mu ssaawa eyo omuyigirizwa oyo n'atwala nnyina eka ewuwe." 
John19:28 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo, Yesu bwe yamanya nti kaakano ebigambo byonna bimaze okutuukirira, olw'okwagala okutuukiriza ebyawandiikibwa, n'agamba nti, “Nnina ennyonta.”" 
John19:29 Waali wateekeddwawo ekibya ekijjudde omwenge omukaatuufu: awo ne bassa ku ezobu ekisuumwa ekijjudde omwenge omukaatuufu, ne bakitwala ku mumwa gwe." 
John19:30 Awo Yesu bwe yamala okuweebwa omwenge, n'agamba nti, “Kiwedde,” n'akutamya omutwe gwe, n'awaayo omwoyo gwe." 
John19:31 Awo Abayudaaya, kubanga lwali lunaku lwa Kuteekateeka, emirambo gireme okubeera ku musaalaba ku lunaku lwa Ssabbiiti (kubanga olunaku lwa ssabbiiti eyo lwali lukulu) ne basaba Piraato okubamenya amagulu gaabwe, balyoke baggibweko." 
John19:32 Awo basserikale ne bajja, ne basookera ku omu ne bamumenya amagulu, n'omulala eyakomererwa naye:" 
John19:33 naye bwe bajja eri Yesu, ne balaba ng'amaze okufa, ne batamumenya magulu:" 
John19:34 naye sserikale omu n'amufumita mu mbiriizi ze n'effumu, amangu ago ne muvaamu omusaayi n'amazzi." 
John19:35 Naye eyalaba n'ategeeza n'okutegeeza kwe kwa mazima: era oyo amanyi ng'ayogera amazima, nammwe mulyoke mukkirize." 
John19:36 Kubanga ebyo byabaawo, ekyawandiikibwa kituukirire nti, “Talimenyebwa ggumba.”" 
John19:37 Era nate ekyawandiikibwa ekirala kigamba nti, “Balimulaba gwe baafumita.”" 
John19:38 Awo oluvannyuma lw'ebyo Yusufu ow'e Alimasaya, eyali omuyigirizwa wa Yesu, naye mu kyama olw'okutya Abayudaaya, ne yeegayirira Piraato okuggya omulambo gwa Yesu ku musaalaba: awo Piraato n'akkiriza. Yusufu n'ajja, n'aggyako omulambo gwa Yesu." 
John19:39 Ne Nikoodemo n'ajja (eyasooka okujja gy'ali ekiro), ng'aleese ebitabule eby'envumbo ne akaloosi, obuzito bwabyo laateri nga kikumi (100)." 
John19:40 Awo ne batwala omulambo gwa Yesu, ne baguzinga mu ngoye z'ekitaani wamu n'eby'akaloosa ebyo, ng'empisa y'Abayudaaya ey'okuziika bwe yali." 
John19:41 Awo mu kifo we yakomererwa waaliwo olusuku ne mu lusuku mwalimu entaana empya etannaba kuteekebwamu muntu. 
John19:42 Awo kubanga lwali lunaku lwa Kuteekateeka okw'Abayudaaya (era kubanga entaana yali kumpi) ne bassa omwo Yesu. 
John20:1 Awo ku lunaku olusooka mu nnaku omusanvu, Malyamu Magudaleene n'ajja mu matulutulu, nga tebunnalaba, eri entaana, n'alaba ng'ejjinja liggiddwa ku ntaana." 
John20:2 Awo n'adduka n'agenda eri Simooni Peetero, n'eri omuyigirizwa oli omulala Yesu gwe yayagalanga, n'abagamba nti, “Baggyeemu Mukama waffe mu ntaana, so tetumanyi gye bamutadde.”" 
John20:3 Awo Peetero n'afuluma, n'omuyigirizwa oyo omulala, ne bagenda ku ntaana." 
John20:4 Ne badduka bombi, naye omuyigirizwa oyo omulala n'ayisa Peetero, n'asooka okutuuka ku ntaana:" 
John20:5 n'akutama n'alingizaamu, n'alaba engoye z'ekitaani nga ziteekeddwa awo; naye n'atayingira." 
John20:6 Awo ne Simooni Peetero n'ajja ng'amugoberera, n'ayingira mu ntaana; n'alaba engoye z'ekitaani nga ziteekeddwa awo," 
John20:7 n'ekiremba ekyali ku mutwe gwe nga tekiteekeddwa wamu na ngoye z'ekitaani, naye nga kizingiddwa nga kiri kyokka ku bbali." 
John20:8 Awo n'omuyigirizwa oyo omulala eyasooka okujja ku ntaana, n'ayingira, n'alaba n'akkiriza." 
John20:9 Kubanga baali tebannategeera ekyawandiikibwa nti, “kimugwanira okuzuukira mu bafu.”" 
John20:10 Awo nate abayigirizwa ne baddayo ewaabwe eka. 
John20:11 Naye Malyamu yali ayimiridde ebweru awaali entaana ng'akaaba: awo bwe yali ng'akaaba, n'akutama n'alingiza mu ntaana;" 
John20:12 n'alaba bamalayika babiri nga bambadde enjeru, nga batudde, omu emitwetwe n'omulala emirannamiro w'ekifo, omulambo gwa Yesu we gwali guteekeddwa." 
John20:13 Abo ne bamugamba nti, “Omukyala, okaabira ki?” N'abagamba nti, “Kubanga baggyeemu Mukama wange, nange simanyi gye bamutadde.”" 
John20:14 Bwe yamala okwogera bw'atyo, n'akyuka emabega, n'alaba Yesu ng'ayimiridde, n'atamanya nga ye Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Omukyala, okaabira ki? Onoonya ani?” Ye ng'alowooza nti ye mukuumi w'olusuku, n'amugamba nti, “Ssebo, oba nga ggwe omututte awalala, mbuulira gy'omutadde, nange nnaamuggyayo.”" 
John20:16 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Malyamu.” N'akyuka n'amugamba mu Lwebbulaniya nti, “Labooni;” amakulu gaakyo Muyigiriza." 
John20:17 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Tonkwatako; kubanga sinnaba kulinnya mu ggulu eri Kitange: naye genda eri baganda bange, obabuulire nti Nninnya mu ggulu eri Kitange, era Kitammwe, eri Katonda wange, era Katonda wammwe.”" 
John20:18 Malyamu Magudaleene n'ajja n'abuulira abayigirizwa nti, “Ndabye Mukama waffe;” era n'abategeeza Mukama by'amugambye." 
John20:19 Awo ku lunaku luli akawungeezi ku lunaku olusooka mu nnaku omusanvu, enzigi bwe zaali nga ziggaddwawo mu kifo abayigirizwa mwe baali, olw'okutya Abayudaaya, Yesu n'ajja, n'ayimirira wakati mu bo, n'abagamba nti, “Emirembe gibe mu mmwe.”" 
John20:20 Awo bwe yamala okwogera bw'atyo, n'abalaga engalo ze n'embiriizi ze. Abayigirizwa ne basanyuka, bwe baalaba Mukama waabwe." 
John20:21 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nate nti, “Emirembe gibe mu mmwe: nga Kitange bwe yantuma nze, nange bwe ntyo mbasindika mmwe.”" 
John20:22 Bwe yamala okwogera ekyo, n'abassiza omukka, n'abagamba nti, “Mutoole Omwoyo Omutukuvu:" 
John20:23 ebibi byabo bonna bye munaasonyiwanga, binaabasonyiyibwanga; ne by'abo be munaasibiranga, nga bibasibiriddwa ddala.”" 
John20:24 Naye Tomasi omu ku kkumi n'ababiri (12), eyayitibwanga Didumo, teyali nabo Yesu bwe yajja." 
John20:25 Awo abayigirizwa abalala ne bamubuulira nti, “Tulabye Mukama waffe.” Naye n'abagamba nti, “Bwe ssiriraba mu bibatu bye enkovu z'enninga, ne nzisa olunwe lwange ku nkovu z'enninga, ne nsonseka omukono gwange mu mbiriizi ze, sirikkiriza n'akatono.”" 
John20:26 Oluvannyuma nga wayiseewo ennaku munaana, ate abayigirizwa be baali munda, ne Tomasi ng'ali nabo, Yesu n'ajja, enzigi nga ziggaddwawo, n'ayimirira wakati mu bo n'agamba nti, “Emirembe gibe mu mmwe.”" 
John20:27 Awo n'agamba Tomasi nti, “Leeta wano olunwe lwo olabe ebibatu byange; era oleete n'omukono gwo, ogusse mu mbiriizi zange; oleme okuba atakkiriza naye akkiriza.”" 
John20:28 Tomasi n'addamu n'amugamba nti, “Ggwe Mukama wange, era Katonda wange.”" 
John20:29 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Kubanga ondabye, kyovudde okkiriza; balina omukisa abakkiriza nga tebaliiko kye balabye.”" 
John20:30 Waliwo obubonero obulala bungi Yesu bwe yakolera mu maaso g'abayigirizwa be, obutawandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino;" 
John20:31 naye buno bwawandiikibwa, mulyoke mukkirize nti Yesu ye Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda; era bwe mukkiriza mube n'obulamu mu linnya lye." 
John21:1 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo Yesu ne yeeraga nate mu bayigirizwa be ku nnyanja ey'e Tiberiya; yabeeraga bw'ati: 
John21:2 Simooni Peetero, ne Tomasi ayitibwa Didumo, ne Nassanayiri ow'e Kaana eky'e Ggaliraaya, n'abaana ba Zebbedaayo, n'abayigirizwa ba Yesu abalala babiri bonna baali wamu." 
John21:3 Simooni Peetero n'abagamba nti, “Ŋŋenda kuvuba.” Ne bamugamba nti, “Naffe tugenda naawe.” Ne bagenda, ne basaabala mu lyato; ekiro ekyo ne batakwasa kintu." 
John21:4 Naye bwali bukya Yesu n'ayimirira ku ttale: naye abayigirizwa ne batamanya nga ye Yesu. 
John21:5 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Abaana, mulina eky'okuliira?” Ne bamuddamu nti, “Tetulina.”" 
John21:6 N'abagamba nti, “Musuule obutimba ku luuyi olwa ddyo olw'eryato, munaakwasa.” Awo ne basuula, kale nga tebakyayinza kubuwalula olw'ebyennyanja ebingi." 
John21:7 Awo omuyigirizwa oyo Yesu gwe yayagalanga n'agamba Peetero nti, “ Ye Mukama waffe.” Awo Simooni Peetero bwe yawulira nga ye Mukama waffe ne yeesiba olugoye (kubanga yali bwereere) ne yeesuula mu nnyanja." 
John21:8 Naye abayigirizwa abalala ne bajjira mu lyato ettono (kubanga baali tebali wala n'ettale, naye emikono nga bikumi bibiri 200) nga bawalula obutimba obulimu ebyennyanja." 
John21:9 Awo bwe baavaamu ne batuuka ku ttale, ne balaba omuliro ogw'amanda nga guli awo n'ebyennyanja nga biteekeddwako, n'omugaati." 
John21:10 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Muleete ku byennyanja bye mukwasizza kaakano.”" 
John21:11 Awo Simooni Peetero n'asaabala, n'awalulira obutimba ku ttale, nga bujjudde ebyennyanja ebinene, kikumi mu ataano mu bisatu (153) naye newakubadde nga byali bingi bwe bityo, obutimba tebwakutuka." 
John21:12 Yesu n'abagamba nti, “Mujje mulye ekyenkya.” So mu bayigirizwa ne mutaba muntu eyayaŋŋanga okumubuuza nti, “Ggwe ani,” kubanga baamanya nti ye Mukama waffe." 
John21:13 Yesu n'ajja, n'addira omugaati, n'abawa, n'ebyennyanja bw'atyo." 
John21:14 Guno gwe mulundi ogwokusatu Yesu gwe yalabikira abayigirizwa be, ng'amaze okuzuukira mu bafu." 
John21:15 Awo bwe baamala okulya, Yesu n'agamba Simooni Peetero nti, “Simooni, omwana wa Yokaana, onjagala okukira bano?” N'amugamba nti, “Weewaawo, Mukama wange; ggwe omanyi nga nkwagala.” N'amugamba nti, “Liisanga abaana b'endiga bange.”" 
John21:16 N'amugamba nate omulundi ogwokubiri nti, “Simooni, omwana wa Yokaana, onjagala?” N'amugamba nti, “Weewaawo, Mukama wange; ggwe omanyi nga nkwagala.” N'amugamba nti, “Lundanga endiga zange.”" 
John21:17 N'amugamba omulundi ogwokusatu nti, “Simooni, omwana wa Yokaana, onjagala?” Peetero n'anakuwala kubanga amugambye omulundi ogwokusatu nti, “Onjagala?” N'amugamba nti, “Mukama wange ggwe omanyi byonna; ggwe otegeera nga nkwagala.” Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Liisanga endiga zange." 
John21:18 Ddala ddala nkugamba nti Bwe wali omuvubuka, weesibanga n'ogenda gy'oyagala yonna: naye bw'olikaddiwa, oligolola emikono gyo, omulala alikusiba, alikutwala gy'otoyagala.”" 
John21:19 Yayogera bw'atyo, ng'alaga okufa kw'alifa okugulumiza Katonda. Bwe yamala okwogera bw'atyo, n'amugamba nti, “Ngoberera.”" 
John21:20 Peetero bwe yakyuka, n'alaba omuyigirizwa Yesu gwe yayagalanga ng'agoberera; era oyo ye yagalamira mu kifuba kye ku mmere ey'ekyeggulo, n'agamba nti, “Mukama wange, ani anaakulyamu olukwe?”" 
John21:21 Awo Peetero bwe yalaba oyo n'agamba Yesu nti, “Mukama wange, ate ono aliba ki?”" 
John21:22 Yesu n'amugamba nti, “Bwe njagala abeerewo okutuusa we ndijjira, ofaayo ki? Ggwe goberera nze.”" 
John21:23 Awo ekigambo ekyo ne kibuna mu b'oluganda nti omuyigirizwa oyo talifa: so nga Yesu teyamugamba nga talifa; naye nti, “Bwe njagala abeerewo okutuusa we ndijjira, ofaayo ki?”" 
John21:24 Oyo ye muyigirizwa eyategeeza bino, n'awandiika bino; naffe tumanyi ng'okutegeeza kwe kwa mazima." 
John21:25 Nate waliwo ebirala bingi Yesu bye yakola, nabyo bwe biwandiikibwa kinnakimu ndowooza nti n'ensi zonna tezandigiddemu bitabo ebyandiwandiikiddwa." 
Acts1:1 Mu kitabo ekyasooka, munnange Teefiro, n'awandiika ku ebyo byonna Yesu bye yasooka okukola n'okuyigiriza," 
Acts1:2 okutuuka ku lunaku luli lwe yatwalibwa mu ggulu, ng'amaze okuwa ebiragiro abatume be, be yalonda ku bw'Omwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Acts1:3 Bwe yamala okubonyaabonyezebwa ne yeeraga mu bo nga mulamu, mu bubonero bungi, ng'abalabikira mu bbanga ery'ennaku ana (40), ng'ayogera nabo eby'obwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Acts1:4 Awo bwe yakuŋŋaana nabo n'abalagira baleme okuva mu Yerusaalemi, naye balindirire okusuubiza kwa Kitaawe kwe baawulira okuva gy'ali:" 
Acts1:5 “ kubanga Yokaana yabatiza n'amazzi; naye mmwe mulibatizibwa n'Omwoyo Omutukuvu mu nnaku si nnyingi.” 
Acts1:6 Awo bwe baakuŋŋaana ne bamubuuza nga bagamba nti, “ Mukama waffe, mu biro bino mw'onookomezaawo obwakabaka eri Isiraeri?”" 
Acts1:7 N'abagamba nti, “ Si kwammwe okumanya entuuko newakubadde ebiro, Kitaffe bye yateeka mu buyinza bwe ye." 
Acts1:8 Naye mulifuna amaanyi, Omwoyo Omutukuvu bw'alimala okujja ku mmwe, nammwe munaabanga bajulirwa bange mu Yerusaalemi ne mu Buyudaaya bwonna ne mu Samaliya, n'okutuusa ku nkomerero y'ensi.”" 
Acts1:9 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, nga batunula n'asitulibwa, ekire ne kimutoola okumuggya mu maaso gaabwe." 
Acts1:10 Bwe baali beekaliriza amaaso mu ggulu bw'agenda, laba, abantu babiri ne bayimirira kumpi nabo nga bambadde engoye ezitukula;" 
Acts1:11 abaayogera nti, “ Abantu b'e Ggaliraaya kiki ekibayimiriza nga mutunuula mu ggulu? Oyo Yesu abaggiddwako okutwalibwa mu ggulu alijja bw'atyo nga bwe mumulabye ng'agenda mu ggulu.”" 
Acts1:12 Ne bakomawo e Yerusaalemi okuva ku lusozi oluyitibwa olwa Zeyituuni, oluli okumpi ne Yerusaalemi ng'olugendo olw'oku ssabbiiti." 
Acts1:13 Awo bwe baayingira ne balinnya mu kisenge ekya waggulu, we baakuŋŋaaniranga, baali: Peetero, Yokaana, Yakobo ne Andereya, Firipo ne Tomasi, Battolomaayo ne Matayo, Yakobo omwana wa Alufaayo, Simooni omuzerote, ne Yuda omwana wa Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Abo bonna baali nga banyiikira n'omwoyo gumu mu kusaba, wamu n'abakazi ne Malyamu nnyina Yesu, ne baganda be." 
Acts1:15 Mu nnaku ezo Peetero n'ayimirira wakati mu b'oluganda abaali bakuŋŋaanye ng'abantu kikumi mu abiri (120), n'agamba nti," 
Acts1:16 “Ab'oluganda, kyagwana ekyawandiikibwa kituukiririzibwe, Omwoyo Omutukuvu kye yayogera edda ng'ayita mu kamwa ka Dawudi, ku Yuda, eyali omusaale waabwe abaakwata Yesu;" 
Acts1:17 kubanga yabalirwa wamu naffe, n'aweebwa omugabo gw'okuweereza kuno." 
Acts1:18 Oyo n'agula ennimiro n'empeera ey'obubi bwe; n'agwa nga yeevuunise, n'ayabikamu wakati, ebyenda byonna ne biyiika." 
Acts1:19 Ne kitegeerekeka eri abo bonna abaali mu Yerusaalemi: ennimiro eyo mu lulimi lwabwe n'okuyitibwa n'eyitibwa Akerudama, amakulu nti, Ennimiro ey'omusaayi." 
Acts1:20 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Zabbuli nti,” “ ‘Ekibanja kye kizike, So kireme okubeerangamu omuntu: era nti Obukulu bwe buweebwe omulala.’”" 
Acts1:21 “N'olw'ekyo omu ku bantu abaayitanga naffe mu kiseera kyonna Mukama waffe Yesu mweyayingiranga era n'avanga gyetuli," 
Acts1:22 okuva ku kubatiza kwa Yokaana okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yatuggibwako, omu ku abo abeere omujulirwa w'okuzuukira kwe awamu naffe.”" 
Acts1:23 Ne balonda babiri, Yusufu ayitibwa Balusaba, n'atuumibwa erinnya Yusito, ne Matiya." 
Acts1:24 Ne basaba, ne bagamba nti, “Mukama waffe, ggwe amanyi emitima gy'abantu bonna, lagako omu gw'olonze ku bano bombi," 
Acts1:25 aweebwe ekifo ky'okuweereza okwo n'obutume, Yuda bwe yasuula n'agenda mu kifo kye ye.”" 
Acts1:26 Ne babakubira akalulu; akalulu ne kagwa ku Matiya, n'abalirwa wamu n'abatume ekkumi n'omu (11)." 
Acts2:1 Awo olunaku lwa Pentekoote bwe lwatuuka, bonna baali wamu mu kifo kimu." 
Acts2:2 Amangwago okuwuuma ne kuva mu ggulu ng'empewo ewuuma n'amaanyi, ne kujjuza ennyumba yonna mwe baali batudde." 
Acts2:3 Ne kulabika ku bo ennimi ng'ez'omuliro nga zeeyawuddemu: buli lulimi ne lutuula ku muntu. 
Acts2:4 Bonna ne bajjula Omwoyo Omutukuvu, ne batandika okwogera ennimi endala, nga Omwoyo bwe yabawa okuzoogera." 
Acts2:5 Awo waaliwo Abayudaaya abaali babeera mu Yerusaalemi, abantu abatya Katonda, abaava mu buli ggwanga ly'abantu wansi w'eggulu." 
Acts2:6 Okuwuuma okwo bwe kwabaawo, ekibiina ne kikuŋŋaana ne kisamaalirira, kubanga buli muntu yawulira nga boogera mu lulimi lw'ewaabwe." 
Acts2:7 Ne bawuniikirira bonna, ne beewuunya, nga bagamba nti, “Laba, bano bonna aboogera si Bagaliraaya?" 
Acts2:8 Era kiki ffe buli muntu okuwulira olulimi lw'ewaffe gye twazaalibwa? 
Acts2:9 Abapaazi n'Abameedi, n'Abeeramiti, n'abali mu Mesopotamiya, mu Buyudaaya ne Kapadokiya, mu Ponto ne mu Asiya," 
Acts2:10 mu Fulugiya ne mu Panfuliya, mu Misiri ne mu nsi ez'e Libiya eziriraanye Kuleene, n'Abaruumi abagenyi, Abayudaaya n'abakyufu," 
Acts2:11 Abakuleete n'Abawalabu, tuwulira bano nga boogera mu nnimi zaffe eby'ekitalo ebya Katonda.”" 
Acts2:12 Bonna ne beewuunya ne babuusabuusa ne bagambagana nti, “Kino kitegeeza ki?”" 
Acts2:13 Naye abalala ne babasekerera ne bagamba nti, “ Batamidde omwenge omusu.”" 
Acts2:14 Naye Peetero bwe yayimirira ne bali ekkumi n'omu (11), n'ayogerera waggulu n'abagamba nti, “ Abasajja Abayudaaya n'abatuula mu Yerusaalemi mwenna, mutegeere kino era muwulirize ebigambo byange." 
Acts2:15 Abantu bano tebatamidde, nga mmwe bwe mulowooza; kubanga ye ssaawa ey'okusatu ey'emisana." 
Acts2:16 Naye bino bye byayogerwa nnabbi Yoweeri nti,”" 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Olulituuka mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma, bw'ayogera Katonda, Ndifuka Omwoyo gwange ku balina omubiri bonna: Batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe balyogera obunnabbi, N'abalenzi bammwe baliraba okwolesebwa, N'abakadde bammwe baliroota ebirooto:" 
Acts2:18 Weewaawo, ne ku baddu bange n'abazaana bange mu nnaku ziri Ndibafukira Omwoyo gwange, balyogera obunnabbi." 
Acts2:19 Ndireeta eby'ekitalo mu ggulu waggulu N'obubonero mu nsi wansi, Omusaayi n'omuliro n'okunyooka kw'omukka." 
Acts2:20 Enjuba erifuuka ekizikiza, N'omwezi okuba omusaayi, Olunaku lwa Mukama Olukulu olulitenderezebwa nga terunnaba kujja." 
Acts2:21 Olulituuka buli alisaba erinnya lya Mukama alirokoka.’” 
Acts2:22 “Abasajja Abaisiraeri, muwulire ebigambo bino. Yesu Omunazaaleesi, omuntu eyabalagibwa Katonda mu bigambo eby'amaanyi n'eby'amagero n'obubonero, Katonda bye yamukozezanga wakati mu mmwe, nga mmwe bwe mumanyi;" 
Acts2:23 oyo bwe yaweebwayo nga Katonda bwe yasooka okuteesa n'okumanya, mwamutwala ne mumukomerera n'emikono gy'abantu ababi, ne mu mutta." 
Acts2:24 Naye oyo Katonda yamuzuukiza, bwe yasumulula okulumwa kw'okufa: kubanga tekwayinza kumunyweza." 
Acts2:25 Kubanga Dawudi amwogerako nti,” “ ‘Nnalaba Mukama ennaku zonna mu maaso gange, Kubanga ali ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, nneme okusagaasagana." 
Acts2:26 Omutima gwange kyegwava gwesiima, olulimi lwange ne lusanyuka; Era n'omubiri gwange gunaabeeranga mu ssuubi:" 
Acts2:27 Kubanga tolireka bulamu bwange mu Magombe, So toliwaayo Mutukuvu wo kuvunda." 
Acts2:28 Wanjigiriza amakubo g'obulamu; Olinjijuza essanyu n'amaaso go.’” 
Acts2:29 “Abasajja ab'oluganda, nnyinza okwogera n'obuvumu mu maaso gammwe ebya jjajjaffe omukulu Dawudi nti yafa n'aziikibwa, n'amalaalo ge gali waffe ne kaakano." 
Acts2:30 Kale, nga bwe yali nnabbi, bwe yamanya nga Katonda yamulayirira ekirayiro, nti mu bazzukulu ab'omu ntumbwe ze alituuzaako omuntu ku ntebe ye;" 
Acts2:31 bwe yalaba olubereberye, n'ayogera ku kuzuukira kwa Kristo nga teyalekebwa mu Magombe so nga n'omubiri gwe tegwavunda." 
Acts2:32 Yesu oyo Katonda yamuzuukiza, ffe fenna tuli bajulirwa." 
Acts2:33 Awo bwe yalinnyisibwa ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda, n'aweebwa okusuubiza kw'Omwoyo Omutukuvu eri Kitaawe, afuse kino kye mulabye kaakano era kye muwulidde." 
Acts2:34 Kubanga Dawudi teyalinnya mu ggulu, naye yayogera yennyini nti,” “ ‘Mukama yagamba Mukama wange nti Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo," 
Acts2:35 Okutuusa lwe nditeeka abalabe bo okuba entebe y'ebigere byo. ’ ” 
Acts2:36 “Kale mazima bamanye ennyumba yonna eya Isiraeri nti Katonda yamufuula Mukama era Kristo, Yesu oyo gwe mwakomerera.”" 
Acts2:37 Awo bwe baawulira ebyo emitima gyabwe ne gibaluma, ne bagamba Peetero n'abatume abalala nti, “Abasajja ab'oluganda, tunaakola tutya?”" 
Acts2:38 Peetero n'abagamba nti, “ Mwenenye, mubatizibwe buli muntu mu mmwe okuyingira mu linnya lya Yesu Kristo okuggyibwako ebibi byammwe, munaaweebwa ekirabo gwe Mwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Acts2:39 Kubanga okusuubizibwa kwammwe era kw'abaana bammwe n'abo bonna abali ewala, bonna abaliyitibwa Mukama Katonda waffe.”" 
Acts2:40 Era n'abategeeza mu bigambo ebirala bingi n'ababuulirira ng'agamba nti, “ Mulokolebwe okuva mu mirembe gino egyakyama.”" 
Acts2:41 Awo abakkiriza ekigambo kye ne babatizibwa: ne bongerwako ku lunaku olwo abantu ng'enkumi ssatu (3,000)." 
Acts2:42 Awo abakkiriza ne baba nga banyiikiriranga okuyigirizibwa kw'abatume, ne mu kusseekimu, ne mu kumenya emigaati ne mu kusaba." 
Acts2:43 Buli muntu n'atya, eby'amagero bingi n'obubonero ne bikolebwanga abatume." 
Acts2:44 Bonna abakkiriza baali wamu, ne baba nga bassakimu mu byonna," 
Acts2:45 eby'obugagga byabwe n'ebintu bye baali nabyo ne babitunda ne bagabiranga bonna nga buli muntu bwe yali nga yeetaaga. 
Acts2:46 Nabo nga banyiikiranga bulijjo n'omwoyo gumu okukuŋŋaana mu Yeekaalu, ne bamenyanga emigaati mu nnyumba zaabwe, ne balyanga emmere n'essanyu n'omutima ogutalina bukuusa," 
Acts2:47 nga batenderezanga Katonda, nga basiimibwanga abantu bonna. Mukama n'abongerangako bulijjo abaalokokanga." 
Acts3:1 Awo Peetero ne Yokaana ne bagenda mu Yeekaalu mu ssaawa ey'okusabiramu, essaawa ey'omwenda." 
Acts3:2 Waaliwo omuntu omulema okuva mu lubuto lwa nnyina eyasitulibwanga, gwe baateekanga bulijjo ku luggi lwa Yeekaalu olwayitibwanga Olulungi, okusabanga effeeza abaayingiranga mu Yeekaalu." 
Acts3:3 Oyo bwe yalaba Peetero ne Yokaana nga bagenda okuyingira mu Yeekaalu n'asaba okuweebwa effeeza. 
Acts3:4 Peetero awamu ne Yokaana ne bamwekaliriza amaaso, Peetero n'agamba nti, “Tutunuulire.”" 
Acts3:5 N'abatunuulira, ng'alowooza nti banaamuwa ekintu." 
Acts3:6 Naye Peetero n'agamba nti, “ Effeeza ne zaabu sibirina; naye kye nnina kye nkuwa: mu linnya lya Yesu Kristo Omunazaaleesi, tambula.”" 
Acts3:7 N'amukwata ku mukono ogwa ddyo n'amuyimusa. Amangwago ebigere bye n'obukongovvule ne bifuna amaanyi," 
Acts3:8 n'agolokoka mangu n'ayimirira n'atambula, n'ayingira nabo mu Yeekaalu ng'atambula ng'abuuka ng'atendereza Katonda." 
Acts3:9 Abantu bonna ne bamulaba ng'atambula ng'atendereza Katonda," 
Acts3:10 ne bamutegeera nga ye wuuyo eyatuulanga ku luggi Olulungi olwa Yeekaalu okusabirizanga effeeza, ne bawuniikirira nnyo n'okwewuunya olw'ekyo ekimukoleddwa." 
Acts3:11 Bwe yali ng'akyekutte ku Peetero ne Yokaana, ekibiina kyonna ne kijja gye baali ne bakuŋŋaanira mu kisasi ekiyitibwa ekya Sulemaani nga beewuunya nnyo." 
Acts3:12 Awo Peetero bwe yabalaba n'abagamba nti, “ Abasajja Abaisiraeri, Lwaki mwewuunya olwa kino? Mutwekaliririza ki amaaso? Mulowooza nti amaanyi gaffe ffe oba kutya kwaffe Katonda bye bimutambuzizza oyo?" 
Acts3:13 Katonda wa Ibulayimu era owa Isaaka era owa Yakobo, Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, yagulumiza omuweereza we Yesu, gwe mwawaayo ne mumwegaanira mu maaso ga Piraato, bwe yamalirira okumuta." 
Acts3:14 Naye mmwe ne mwegaana Omutukuvu era Omutuukirivu, ne mwagala okuweebwa omussi," 
Acts3:15 ne mutta Omukulu w'obulamu; oyo Katonda yamuzuukiza mu bafu: ffe bajulirwa baakyo. 
Acts3:16 Era olw'okukkiriza erinnya lye; oyo gwe mulaba gwe mumanyi erinnya lye limuwadde amaanyi, n'okukkiriza okuli mu oyo kumuwadde obulamu buno obutuukiridde mu maaso gammwe mwenna." 
Acts3:17 Kale kaakano, ab'oluganda, mmanyi nga mwakolera mu butamanya era nga n'abafuzi bammwe." 
Acts3:18 Naye Katonda bye yabuulira edda mu kamwa ka bannabbi bonna nga Kristo we alibonyaabonyezebwa, yabituukiriza bw'atyo." 
Acts3:19 Kale mwenenye, mukyuke, ebibi byammwe bisangulibwe, ebiro eby'okuwummuzibwa mu maaso ga Mukama bituuke;" 
Acts3:20 naye atume Kristo eyabaawulirwa edda, ye Yesu," 
Acts3:21 eyagwanyizibwa okutwalibwa mu ggulu okutuusa mu biro eby'okulongoosezaamu byonna, Katonda bye yayogereranga mu kamwa ka bannabbi be abatukuvu abaaliwo okuva ku lubereberye." 
Acts3:22 Musa yagamba nti, ‘Mukama Katonda alibayimiririza nnabbi aliva mu baganda bammwe nga nze; oyo mumuwuliranga byonna by'alibagamba." 
Acts3:23 Olulituuka buli mwoyo ogutawulira nnabbi oli gulizikirizibwa mu ggwanga.’ 
Acts3:24 Weewaawo ne bannabbi bonna n'abo okuva ku Samwiri n'abo abaamuddirira, bonna abaayogeranga, baabuuliranga eby'ennaku zino." 
Acts3:25 Mmwe muli baana ba bannabbi, era ab'endagaano Katonda gye yalagaana ne bajjajjammwe, ng'agamba Ibulayimu nti, ‘Ne mu zzadde lyo ebika byonna eby'ensi mwe biriweerwa omukisa.’" 
Acts3:26 Okusooka gye muli Katonda, bwe yamala okuzuukiza omuweereza we n'amutuma gye muli abawe omukisa, ng'akyusa buli muntu mu bibi byammwe.”" 
Acts4:1 Awo Peetero ne Yokaana bwe baali nga boogera n'ekibiina, bakabona n'omukulu wa Yeekaalu n'Abasaddukaayo ne bajja gye baali," 
Acts4:2 nga bansunguwadde nnyo kubanga baayigiriza abantu era baabuulira mu Yesu okuzuukira mu bafu. 
Acts4:3 Ne babakwata ne babaggalira mu kkomera okutuusa enkeera: kubanga bwali buwungedde. 
Acts4:4 Kyokka abantu bangi ku abo abaali bawuliriza ekigambo ne bakkiriza, omuwendo gw'abasajja ne baba ng'enkumi ttaano (5,000)." 
Acts4:5 Awo enkeera, abakulu n'abakadde n'abawandiisi ne bakuŋŋaanira mu Yerusaalemi," 
Acts4:6 ne Ana kabona asinga obukulu, ne Kayaafa ne Yokaana ne Alegezanda, ne bonna ab'ekika kya kabona asinga obukulu:" 
Acts4:7 ne babateeka wakati, ne bababuuza nti, “Maanyi ki oba linnya ki mmwe musinzidde okukola kino?”" 
Acts4:8 Awo Peetero nga ajjudde Omwoyo Omutukuvu, n'abagamba nti, “ Abakulu b'abantu n'abakadde," 
Acts4:9 bwe tuba tubuuzibwa leero olw'ekyo ekirungi ekikoleddwa kw'ono eyagongobala, ekimuwonyezza;" 
Acts4:10 kisaanye kitegeerekeke eri mwenna n'eri abantu bonna mu Isiraeri nti, mu linnya lya Yesu Kristo Omunazaaleesi, gwe mwakomerera mmwe, Katonda gwe yazuukiza mu bafu, ku bw'oyo ono ayimiridde nga mulamu mu maaso gammwe." 
Acts4:11 Oyo lye jjinja eryanyoomebwa mmwe abazimbi, erifuuse ekkulu ery'oku nsonda." 
Acts4:12 So tewali mu mulala bulokozi, kubanga tewali na linnya ddala wansi w'eggulu eryaweebwa abantu eritugwanira okutulokola.”" 
Acts4:13 Awo bwe baalaba obuvumu bwa Peetero ne Yokaana, ate n'okutegeera ne bategeera nga si bayigirize, bantu ba bulijjo, ne beewuunya, ne bategeera nga baali wamu ne Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Era bwe baalaba omuntu eyawonyezebwa ng'ayimiridde nabo, nga tebaalina kya kuddamu." 
Acts4:15 Naye ne babagamba okugira nga bava mu lukiiko, bamale bo bokka okusalawo eky'okubakola." 
Acts4:16 Ne beebuuza nti, “ Abasajja bano tubakole tutya? Kubanga bakoze akabonero akayatiikiridde, ekigambo ekyo kimanyiddwa abantu bonna abatuula mu Yerusaalemi, so tetuyinza kukyegaana." 
Acts4:17 Naye kireme okweyongeranga okubuna mu bantu, tubakange balemenga okwogera mu linnya eryo n'omuntu yenna yenna.”" 
Acts4:18 Ne babayita ne babalagira balemenga okwogera n'akatono newakubadde okuyigirizanga mu linnya lya Yesu. 
Acts4:19 Naye Peetero ne Yokaana ne baddamu ne babagamba nti, “Oba nga kirungi mu maaso ga Katonda okuwulira mmwe okusinga Katonda, mwogere;" 
Acts4:20 kubanga ffe tetuyinza kulema kwogeranga bye twalaba bye twawulira.” 
Acts4:21 Nabo, oluvannyuma lw'okwongera okubakanga, baabata, nga tebalaba kye banaabalanga okubabonereza, olw'ekibiina; kubanga bonna baali batendereza Katonda olw'ekyo ekikoleddwa." 
Acts4:22 Kubanga omuntu eyakolerwa akabonero kano ak'okuwonyezebwa yali asusizza emyaka ana egy'obukulu. 
Acts4:23 Bwe baateebwa ne bagenda mu kibiina kyabwe, ne bategeeza byonna bye bagambiddwa bakabona abakulu n'abakadde." 
Acts4:24 Nabo bwe baawulira ne bayimusa eddoboozi lyabwe n'omwoyo gumu eri Katonda, ne bagamba nti, “Mukama, ggwe eyakola eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja n'ebirimu byonna," 
Acts4:25 ggwe eyayogerera ku bw'Omwoyo Omutukuvu mu kamwa ka jjajjaffe Dawudi omuweereza wo nti,” “ ‘Ab'amawanga kiki ekibeesazizza akajegere, N'ebika birowoozezza ebitaliimu?" 
Acts4:26 Bakabaka b'ensi baasimba ennyiriri, N'abakulu baakuŋŋaanira wamu Ku Mukama ne ku Kristo we. ’ ”" 
Acts4:27 “Kubanga mazima baakuŋŋaanira mu kibuga muno ku muweereza wo omutukuvu Yesu, gwe wafukako amafuta, Kerode ne Pontio Piraato wamu n'ab'amawanga n'ebika bya Isiraeri," 
Acts4:28 bakole byonna omukono gwo n'okuteesa kwo bye byalagira edda okubaawo. 
Acts4:29 Kale kaakano, Mukama, laba okukanga kwabwe, owe abaddu bo bagume nnyo okwogeranga ekigambo kyo," 
Acts4:30 bw'ogolola omukono gwo owonye, n'obubonero n'amagero bikolebwenga mu linnya ly'omuweereza wo omutukuvu Yesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Bwe baamala okusaba, mu kifo we baakuŋŋaanira ne wakankana; bonna ne bajjula Omwoyo Omutukuvu, ne boogera ekigambo kya Katonda n'obuvumu." 
Acts4:32 N'ekibiina kyabwe abakkiriza baalina omutima gumu n'emmeeme emu; so tewaali n'omu eyayogeranga nti ekintu kyalina kye kikye yekka, naye byonna baabanga nabyo mu bumu."
