Acts21:5 Awo bwe twamalayo ennaku ezo ne tuvaayo ne tugenda; bonna ne batuwerekerako wamu n'abakyala baabwe n'abaana baabwe, okutuuka ebweru w'ekibuga: ne tufukamira ku lubalama lw'ennyanja, ne tusaba;" 
Acts21:6 ne tusiibulagana, ne tusaabala mu kyombo, naye bo ne baddayo ewaabwe." 
Acts21:7 Naffe bwe twava e Ttuulo ne tutuuka e Potolemaayi; ne tulamusa ab'oluganda ne tumala nabo olunaku lumu. 
Acts21:8 Enkeera ne tuvaayo ne tutuuka e Kayisaliya: ne tuyingira mu nnyumba ya Firipo, omubuulizi w'Enjiri, omu ku bali omusanvu, ne tubeera naye." 
Acts21:9 Yalina abaana be abawala bana abaali batannafumbirwa nga boogera eby'obunnabbi. 
Acts21:10 Bwe twalwayo ennaku nnyingi, e Buyudaaya n'evaayo omuntu nnabbi erinnya lye Agabo." 
Acts21:11 N'ajja gyetuli n'addira olukoba lwa Pawulo ne yeesiba amagulu ge n'emikono gye n'agamba nti, “Bw'atyo bw'ayogera Omwoyo Omutukuvu nti Abayudaaya bwe balisiba bwe batyo mu Yerusaalemi omuntu nannyini lukoba luno, balimuwaayo mu mikono gy'ab'amawanga.”" 
Acts21:12 Bwe twawulira ebyo, ffe era n'abantu ab'omu kitundu ekyo ne tumwegayirira aleme okulinnya mu Yerusaalemi." 
Acts21:13 Awo Pawulo n'alyoka addamu nti, “Mukola ki ekyo? Okukaaba n'okumenya omutima gwange? Kubanga nze seetegese kusibibwa busibibwa era naye n'okufiira mu Yerusaalemi olw'erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Bwe twalemwa okumukkirizisa ne tumuleka, ne tugamba nti, “Mukama waffe ky'ayagala kikolebwe.”" 
Acts21:15 Awo oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ezo ne tusitula emigugu gyaffe ne tulinnya e Yerusaalemi. 
Acts21:16 Abamu ku bayigirizwa abaava e Kayisaliya ne bagenda naffe, bwe twatuuka ne tubeera mu maka ga Munasoni ow'e Kupulo omu ku bayigirizwa abaasooka." 
Acts21:17 Bwe twatuuka mu Yerusaalemi ab'oluganda ne batwaniriza n'essanyu lingi nnyo. 
Acts21:18 Ku lunaku olwokubiri Pawulo wamu naffe ne tugenda ewa Yakobo; era n'abakadde bonna baaliwo. 
Acts21:19 Bwe yamala okubalamusa n'ababuulira kinnakimu byonna Katonda bye yakola mu baamawanga mu kuweereza kwe. 
Acts21:20 Nabo bwe baawulira ne bagulumiza Katonda; ne bamugamba nti, “ Olaba, ow'oluganda, abantu nkumi na nkumi abakkiriza mu Bayudaaya, nabo bonna bagala okukwata obutiribiri amateeka," 
Acts21:21 abo babuulirwa ebigambo byo nti ggwe oyigiriza Abayudaaya bonna abali mu b'amawanga okuleka amateeka ga Musa, baleme okukomolanga abaana baabwe newakubadde okutambuliranga mu mpisa z'Ekiyudaaya." 
Acts21:22 Kale kiki ekiba kikolebwa? Awatali kubuusabuusa bajja kutegeera nti ozze. 
Acts21:23 Kale kola nga bwe tukugamba: tulina abasajja bana abali ku kirayiro; 
Acts21:24 genda nabo otukuzibwe wamu nabo, obasasulire ensimbi ez'okumwa emitwe gyabwe. Kale bonna banaategeera ng'ebigambo bye baabuulirwa ku ggwe tebiriimu; naye nga naawe wennyini weegendereza ng'okwata amateeka." 
Acts21:25 Naye ku nsonga z'Abamawanga abakkiriza, twabawandiikira nga tubagamba nti beekuumenga ebintu ebiweebwa eri ebifaananyi n'omusaayi n'ebitugiddwa n'obwenzi.”" 
Acts21:26 Awo Pawulo n'atwala abasajja abo, ku lunaku olwaddirira n'atukuzibwa wamu nabo. N'ayingira mu Yeekaalu okutegeeza ennaku ez'okutukuza we ziriggweerako, olwo buli omu atwaleyo ekiweebwayo kye." 
Acts21:27 Awo ennaku omusanvu bwe zaali zinaatera okugwako, ne wabaawo Abayudaaya abaava mu Asiya abalaba Pawulo mu Yeekaalu ne basasamaza ekibiina kyonna ne bamukwata," 
Acts21:28 nga boogerera waggulu nti, “Abasajja Abaisiraeri, mutuyambe: ono ye musajja agenda ayigiriza obubi mu buli kifo ku bantu ne ku mateeka ne ku kifo kino: era nate aleese Abayonaani mu Yeekaalu, ayonoonye ekifo ekitukuvu.”" 
Acts21:29 Kubanga baali bamaze okulaba Tulofiimo Omwefeso ng'ali naye mu kibuga: ne bategeera nti Pawulo amuleese mu Yeekaalu. 
Acts21:30 Ekibuga kyonna ne kyegugumula, abantu ne bakuŋŋaana mangu, ne bakwata Pawulo ne bamuwalula okumufulumya ebweru wa Yeekaalu, amangwago ne baggalawo enzigi." 
Acts21:31 Bwe baali basala amagezi okumutta, ebigambo ne bituuka ku mwami omukulu w'ekitongole ekya basserikale nti Yerusaalemi kyonna kyefuukudde." 
Acts21:32 Amangwago n'atwala basserikale n'abaami n'aserengeta mangu gye baali. Awo bwe baalaba omwami omukulu n'abasserikale ne balekerawo okukuba Pawulo. 
Acts21:33 Awo omukulu w'abaserikale n'alyoka asembera n'akwata Pawulo, n'alagira okumusibya enjegere bbiri; n'abuuza nti ye ani, ne ky'akoze ki." 
Acts21:34 Abamu mu kibiina ne bamuddamu nga boogerera waggulu ng'abamu bagamba kino n'abalala nga bagamba kiri, n'atayinza kutegeera mazima olw'okuleekaana, n'alagira okumutwala mu nkambi." 
Acts21:35 Bwe yatuuka ku madaala, n'alyoka asitulibwa abasserikale kubanga abantu baali bayitiridde obukambwe;" 
Acts21:36 kubanga ekibiina ky'abantu kyali kibagoberera nga boogerera waggulu nti, “Mumutte! Mumutte.”" 
Acts21:37 Awo Pawulo bwe yali anaatera okuyingizibwa mu nkambi n'agamba omukulu w'abasserikale nti, “ Okkiriza mbeeko kye nkubuulira?” N'amuddamu nti, “ Omanyi Oluyonaani?”" 
Acts21:38 Si ggwe Mumisiri, mu nnaku eziyise eyajeemesa abantu, n'otwala abatemu enkumi ennya (4,000) mu ddungu?" 
Acts21:39 Naye Pawulo n'addamu nti, Nze ndi Muyudaaya, ow'omu kibuga Taluso eky'omu Kirukiya, omutuuze mu kibuga ekitannyoomebwa. Nkwegayiridde, nzikiriza njogere eri abantu." 
Acts21:40 Bwe yamukkiriza, Pawulo n'ayimirira ku madaala n'awenya ku bantu, bwe baamala okusiriikira ddala, n'ayogera mu lulimi Olwebbulaniya ng'agamba nti:" 
Acts22:1 “Ab'oluganda n'abakadde, muwulirize ensonga gyembawoleza kaakano.”" 
Acts22:2 Bwe baawulira ng'abagambye mu lulimi Olwebbulaniya ne beeyongera okusirika: n'agamba nti: 
Acts22:3 “Ndi Muyudaaya, nnazaalibwa mu kibuga Taluso eky'omu Kirukiya, naye ne nkulira mu kibuga kino Yerusaalemi, ne mbeera ne Gamalyeri, eyanjigiririza ddala empisa z'amateeka ga bajjajjaffe, ne nfubanga nnyo okuweereza Katonda nga nammwe bwe mukola leero." 
Acts22:4 Ne njigganyanga abantu b'Ekkubo n'okubatta, nga mbasibanga era nga mbateekanga mu makomera abasajja n'abakazi;" 
Acts22:5 era ne kabona asinga obukulu ye mujulirwa wange ow'ebyo n'abakadde bonna: era nabo ne bampa ebbaluwa eri ab'oluganda, ne ntambula okugenda e Ddamasiko abo abaali eyo baleetebwe mu Yerusaalemi nga basibe babonerezebwe.”" 
Acts22:6 “Awo olwatuuka bwe nnali nga ntambula nga nnaatera okutuuka e Ddamasiko, nga mu ttuntu, amangwago omusana mungi ogwava mu ggulu ne gwaka ne gunneetooloola;" 
Acts22:7 ne ngwa wansi, ne mpulira eddoboozi nga liŋŋamba nti, ‘Sawulo, Sawulo, onjigganyiza ki?’" 
Acts22:8 Nze ne nziramu nti, Ggwe ani, Mukama wange? N'aŋŋamba nti, ‘Nze Yesu Omunazaaleesi gw'oyigganya ggwe.’" 
Acts22:9 Abaali awamu nange ne balaba omusana, naye ne batawulira ddoboozi ly'oyo eyayogera nange." 
Acts22:10 Ne ŋŋamba nti, Nnaakola ntya, Mukama wange? Mukama waffe n'aŋŋamba nti, ‘Golokoka, ogende e Ddamasiko, onoobuulirirwa eyo ebigambo ebyo byonna by'olagiddwa okukola.’" 
Acts22:11 Bwe ssaayinza kulaba olw'ekitangaala eky'amaanyi eky'omusana guli, ne nkwatibwa ku mukono abo abaali nange ne ntuuka mu Ddamasiko.”" 
Acts22:12 “Omuntu omu erinnya lye Ananiya atya Katonda mu mateeka, eyasiimibwa Abayudaaya bonna abatuula eyo," 
Acts22:13 n'ajja gye ndi n'ayimirira we ndi n'aŋŋamba nti, ‘Ow'oluganda Sawulo, zibula.’ Mu kiseera ekyo ne nzibula ne mulaba." 
Acts22:14 N'agamba nti, ‘Katonda wa bajjajjaffe yakulonda dda otegeere ebyo by'ayagala, era olabe Omutuukirivu oli, era owulire eddoboozi eriva mu kamwa ke." 
Acts22:15 Kubanga onoobeeranga mujulirwa we eri abantu bonna ow'ebigambo by'olabye ne by'owulidde. 
Acts22:16 Kale kaakano ekikulwisa ki? Golokoka, obatizibwe onaazibweko ebibi byo, nga weegayirira erinnya lye.’ ”" 
Acts22:17 “Awo olwatuuka bwe nnakomawo e Yerusaalemi, bwe nnali nga nsaba mu Yeekaalu, omwoyo gwange ne guwaanyisibwa" 
Acts22:18 ne mmulaba ng'aŋŋamba nti, ‘Yanguwa ove mangu mu Yerusaalemi; kubanga tebalikkiriza kutegeeza kwo ku nze.’" 
Acts22:19 Nange ne ŋŋamba nti, ‘Mukama wange, bo bennyini bamanyi nti nze nnabateekanga mu makomera era nga nnabakubiranga mu buli kkuŋŋaaniro abakukkiriza:" 
Acts22:20 era n'omusaayi ogw'omujulirwa wo Suteefano bwe gwayiibwa, nange kennyini nnali nga nnyimiridde awo, nga nsiimye, nga nkuuma ebyambalo byabwe abaamutta.’" 
Acts22:21 N'aŋŋamba nti, ‘Genda: kubanga nze ŋŋenda kukutuma wala mu b'amawanga.’”" 
Acts22:22 Ne bamuwuliriza okutuusa ku kigambo kino, ne bayimusa amaloboozi gaabwe nga bagamba nti, “Aggibwe mu nsi afaanana bw'atyo: kubanga si kirungi abeere mulamu.”" 
Acts22:23 Bwe baali nga boogerera waggulu era nga bakasuka engoye zaabwe, era nga bafuumuulira waggulu enfuufu," 
Acts22:24 omwami omukulu n'alagira okumuleeta mu nkambi, n'alagira okumukemereza nga bwakubibwa embooko, okutegeera ensonga gye bamulanze, ekireetedde ekibiina kyonna okwogerera waggulu ku ye bwe batyo." 
Acts22:25 Bwe baali nga bamaze okumusibya enkoba, Pawulo n'agamba omuserikale eyali amuyimiridde okumpi nti, “Kikkirizibwa mu mateeka okukuba omuntu Omuruumi nga tannaba kusalirwa musango?”" 
Acts22:26 Omusserikale bwe yawulira n'agenda eri omukulu waabwe n'amubuulira ng'agamba nti, “Ogenda kukola ki? Omusajja ono Muruumi.”" 
Acts22:27 Omukulu w'abasserikale n'agenda gy'ali, n'amugamba nti, “Mbuulira, ggwe oli Muruumi?” N'amuddamu nti, “ Yee, bwe ndi.”" 
Acts22:28 Omukulu w'abasserikale n'addamu nti, “Nze nnafuna Oburuumi nga mbusasulidde ensimbi nnyingi nnyo.” Pawulo n'amuddamu nti, “ Nze mmwe nnazaalirwa.”" 
Acts22:29 Awo amangwago abaali bagenda okumukemereza ne bamuleka, era n'omukulu w'abasserikale n'atya nnyo bwe yamala okutegeera nga Muruumi, kubanga yali alagidde okumusiba n'okumukuba embooko." 
Acts22:30 Enkeera omukulu w'abasserikale bwe yayagala okumanya amazima ensonga Abayudaaya gye bamulanze okumuloopa, n'amusumulula n'alagira bakabona abakulu n'olukiiko lwonna okukuŋŋaana, n'aleeta Pawulo n'amuteeka mu maaso gaabwe." 
Acts23:1 Pawulo n'atunuulira ab'olukiiko enkaliriza, n'agamba nti, “ Ab'oluganda, nze ntambulidde mu maaso ga Katonda n'obwegendereza okutuusiza ddala ku lunaku luno.”" 
Acts23:2 Ananiya, kabona asinga obukulu, n'alagira abo abamuyimiridde okumpi okumukuba oluyi ku ttama" 
Acts23:3 Pawulo n'alyoka amugamba nti, “Katonda alikukuba, ggwe ekisenge ekyasiigibwa okutukula; era otudde okunsalira omusango ng'amateeka bwe gali, n'olagira okunkuba ng'amateeka bwe gatalagira?”" 
Acts23:4 Abaali bamuyimiridde okumpi ne bagamba nti, “Ovuma kabona asinga obukulu owa Katonda?”" 
Acts23:5 Pawulo n'agamba nti, “Mbadde simumanyi, ab'oluganda, nga ye kabona asinga obukulu: kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘ toyogeranga bubi ku mukulu w'abantu bo.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Naye Pawulo bwe yategeera ng'ekitundu ekimu ky'Abasaddukaayo n'eky'okubiri ky'Abafalisaayo, n'ayogerera waggulu mu lukiiko nti, “ Ab'oluganda, nze ndi Mufalisaayo, mwana w'Abafalisaayo: nsalirwa omusango olw'essuubi n'okuzuukira kw'abafu.”" 
Acts23:7 Bwe yayogera bw'atyo ne wabaawo okuyomba wakati w'Abafalisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo, ekibiina ne kyawukanamu." 
Acts23:8 Kubanga Abasaddukaayo bagamba nti tewali kuzuukira, newakubadde bamalayika, newakubadde omwoyo, naye Abafalisaayo ebyo byonna babikkirizza." 
Acts23:9 Ne wabaawo okukaayana kungi: abawandiisi abamu ab'omu kitundu eky'Abafalisaayo ne bayimirira ne bawakana nga bagamba nti, “Tetulaba kibi ku muntu ono: era kinaaba kitya oba omwoyo oba nga malayika yayogera naye?”" 
Acts23:10 Bwe waabaawo okuyomba okungi, omukulu w'abasserikale n'atya ng'alaba Pawulo baagala kumuyuzayuzamu, n'alagira ekitongole okukka wansi okumuggya wakati mu bo n'amaanyi bamutwale mu nkambi." 
Acts23:11 Awo mu kiro eky'okubiri, Mukama waffe n'ayimirira w'ali n'agamba nti, “Guma omwoyo: kubanga nga bw'onjulidde wano mu Yerusaalemi, era kikugwanidde n'okunjulira bw'otyo ne Ruumi.”" 
Acts23:12 Bwe bwakya enkya, Abayudaaya ne balagaana ne beeyama obweyamo nga bagamba nti, tebajja kulya newakubadde okunywa wabula nga bamaze kutta Pawulo." 
Acts23:13 Abeekobaana bwe batyo ne basukka ana (40). 
Acts23:14 Abo ne bajja eri bakabona abakulu n'abakadde ne bagamba nti, “ Twerayiridde obutakomba ku kantu konna wabula nga tumaze kutta Pawulo." 
Acts23:15 Kale kaakano mmwe n'olukiiko mugambe omukulu w'abasserikale amuleete wansi gye muli ng'abaagala okwongera okumanya amazima g'ebigambo bye, naffe, tunnamutta nga tanatuusibwa eyo.”" 
Acts23:16 Naye mutabani wa mwannyina wa Pawulo n'awulira olukwe luno, n'ajja n'ayingira mu nkambi, n'abuulira Pawulo." 
Acts23:17 Pawulo n'ayita omu ku basserikale n'amugamba nti, “Twala omulenzi ono eri omuserikale omukulu, kubanga alina ekigambo kyayagala okumubuulira.”" 
Acts23:18 Awo oli n'amutwala n'amuleeta eri omukulu w'abaserikale n'agamba nti Pawulo omusibe yampise n'anneegayirira okukuleetera omulenzi ono, ng'alina ky'agenda okukubuulira." 
Acts23:19 Omukulu w'abaserikale n'amukwata ku mukono ne yeeyawula mu kyama n'amubuuza nti, “Bigambo ki by'olina okumbuulira?”" 
Acts23:20 N'amugamba nti, “Abayudaaya bateesezza okukwegayirira okuleeta Pawulo enkya wansi mu lukiiko ng'agenda okwongera okumubuuza amazima g'ebigambo bye." 
Acts23:21 Kale ggwe tobakkiriza: kubanga abantu baabwe nga ana (40) bamuteeze nga berayiridde obutalya newakubadde okunywa ekintu kyonna wabula nga bamaze okumutta; nabo kaakano beeteeseteese nga balindirira ggwe okukkiriza.” 
Acts23:22 Awo omukulu w'abaserikale n'asiibula omulenzi, bwe yamala okumukuutira nti, “ Tobuulirako omuntu nti ombuulidde ebigambo bino.”" 
Acts23:23 Awo n'ayita babiri ku basserikale abaduumizi n'abagamba nti, Mutegeke abasserikale bibiri (200), n'abeebagala embalaasi nsanvu (70), n'ab'amafumu bibiri (200) bagende e Kayisaliya, mu ssaawa ey'okusatu ey'ekiro;" 
Acts23:24 era mutegekewo n'embalaasi Pawulo gyanagenderako bamutwale mirembe okumutuusa eri Ferikisi owessaza. 
Acts23:25 N'awandiika ebbaluwa ku nsonga eno nti: 
Acts23:26 “Kulawudiyo Lusiya eri Ow'ekitiibwa owessaza Ferikisi, nkulamusizza." 
Acts23:27 Omusajja ono yakwatibwa Abayudaaya, bwe baali bagenda okumutta, ne ŋŋenda n'abasserikale gye baali ne mbamuggyako, kubanga nnali ntegedde nga Muruumi." 
Acts23:28 Era bwe nnayagala okutegeera ensonga gye bamulanze okumuloopa, ne mmutwala mu lukiiko lwabwe." 
Acts23:29 Ne ndaba ng'aloopeddwa bya kubuuzibwa eby'omu mateeka gaabwe, naye nga tewali nsonga ya kumussa newakubadde okusibibwa." 
Acts23:30 Bwe bambuulira nti waliwo olukwe olw'okumutta, kwe kusalawo amangwago okumuweereza gy'oli; era ne ndagira abamuloopa okuleeta ensonga zaabwe gy'oli.”" 
Acts23:31 Awo basserikale nga bwe baalagirwa ne batwala Pawulo mu kiro ne batuuka mu Antipatuli. 
Acts23:32 Enkeera ne baleka ab'oku mbalaasi okugenda ne Pawulo okutuuka e Kayisaliya, abalala ne baddayo mu nkambi." 
Acts23:33 Abo bwe baatuuka e Kayisaliya ne bawa ebbaluwa owessaza era ne bamwanjulira Pawulo. 
Acts23:34 Bwe yamala okugisoma, n'abuuza essaza gye yava; bwe yabuulirwa nti yava mu Kirukiya," 
Acts23:35 n'agamba nti, “ Ndikuwuliriza abakuloopa bwe baliba bazze.” N'alagira okumukuumira mu lubiri lwa Kerode." 
Acts24:1 Awo nga wayiseewo ennaku ttaano, Ananiya, kabona asinga obukulu n'atuuka e Kayisaliya ng'ali wamu n'abakadde abamu n'omuntu omwogezi erinnya lye Terutuulo: abo ne babuulira owessaza ebigambo ebivunaanibwa Pawulo." 
Acts24:2 Pawulo bwe yaleetebwa, Terutuulo n'atandika okumuloopa ng'agamba nti: “Oweekitibwa Ferikisi, tufunye emirembe mingi eri ggwe, n'ebintu bingi ebirongooseddwa mu ggwanga lino olw'obufuzi bwo obulungi." 
Acts24:3 Mu ngeri zonna era ne mu bifo byonna tubikkiriza n'okwebaza kwonna. 
Acts24:4 Naye saagala kwongera kukukooya, nkwegayiridde mu kisa kyo, otuweeyo akaseera katono owulirize ensonga zaffe." 
Acts24:5 Tulabye omusajja ono nga wamutawaana nnyo, ajeemesa Abayudaaya bonna abali mu nsi zonna, ate era ye mukulu w'ekibiina ky'Abanazaaleesi." 
Acts24:6 Yagezaako okwonoona Yeekaalu: ne tumukwata, era twali tugenda omusalira omusango ng'amateeka gaffe bwe gali:" 
Acts24:7 naye Lusiya, omukulu w'abaserikale n'ajja n'atumuggyako n'amaanyi mangi," 
Acts24:8 n'alagira abamuvunaana okujja gy'oli. Bw'onoomwebuuliza wekka onooyinza okutegeera bino byonna bye tumuvunaana.” 
Acts24:9 Era n'Abayudaaya abalala ne bongereza kw'ebyo, nga bagamba nti bwe bityo bwe biri." 
Acts24:10 Awo owessaza bwe yawenya ku Pawulo okwogera, Pawulo n'addamu nti: “Kubanga mmanyi ng'osaze emisango gye ggwanga lino okumala emyaka mingi, ŋŋenda okuwoza n'omwoyo omugumu." 
Acts24:11 kubanga oyinza okutegeera ng'ennaku tezinnayita kkumi na bbiri kasookedde nzijja mu Yerusaalemi okusinza," 
Acts24:12 abo tebansanganga mu Yeekaalu nga mpakana n'omuntu oba nga njeemesa ekibiina newakubadde mu kkuŋŋaaniro newakubadde mu kibuga. 
Acts24:13 So tebayinza kukakasa w'oli ebigambo bye banvunaana kaakano. 
Acts24:14 Naye kino nkyatula w'oli nti Ekkubo nga bwe liri lye bayita Enzikiriza, bwe ntyo bwe mpeereza Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, nga nzikiriza byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu mateeka ne mu bya bannabbi;" 
Acts24:15 nga nnina essuubi eri Katonda, era nabo bennyini lye basuubira, nti walibaawo okuzuukira kw'abatuukirivu era n'abatali batuukirivu." 
Acts24:16 Era nnyiikira mu kigambo ekyo okubeeranga n'omwoyo ogutalina musango eri Katonda n'eri abantu ennaku zonna. 
Acts24:17 Awo emyaka mingi bwe gyayitawo ne njija okuleeta eby'abaavu eri eggwanga lyaffe n'ebiweebwayo: 
Acts24:18 bwe nnali mu ebyo Abayudaaya abamu abaava mu Asiya ne bansanga mu Yeekaalu nga ntukuzibwa, nga sirina kibiina newakubadde oluyoogaano," 
Acts24:19 abo basaanye babeere wano mu maaso go bannumirize oba nga balina ekigambo ku nze. 
Acts24:20 Oba bano boogere bennyini ekibi kye baalaba bwe nnayimirira mu lukiiko 
Acts24:21 mpozzi kino kyokka kye n'ayogera nti, ‘ Olw'okubanga nzikiririza mu kuzuukira kw'abafu nsalirwa omusango mu maaso gammwe ku lunaku luno.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Naye Ferikisi, kubanga ye yali abasinga okumanya ebigambo eby'Ekkubo, n'abalwisaawo ng'agamba nti, “Lusiya, omukulu w'abasserikale bwalijja ne ndyoka nsala omusango gwammwe.”" 
Acts24:23 N'alagira omwami n'okumuzaayo mu kkomera naye ng'amulekedde eddembe, n'obutaziyiza muntu yenna ku mikwano gye okumuweereza." 
Acts24:24 Awo nga wayiseewo ennaku ntonotono, Ferikisi n'ajja ne mukazi we Dulusira, Omuyudaaya, n'atumya Pawulo ne bamuwuliriza ku bigambo eby'okukkiriza Kristo Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Bwe yali ng'ategeeza eby'obutuukirivu, n'eby'okwegendereza, n'eby'omusango ogugenda okujja, Ferikisi n'atya n'addamu nti Genda kaakano; bwe ndiba n'ebbanga, ndikuyita." 
Acts24:26 Era yali asuubira Pawulo okumuwa sente, kyeyavanga amutumyanga emirundi mingi naanyumyanga naye." 
Acts24:27 Naye bwe waayitawo emyaka ebiri, Ferikisi n'asikirwa Polukiyo Fesuto. Ferikisi olw'okwagala okusiimibwa Abayudaaya, n'aleka Pawulo nga musibe mu kkomera." 
Acts25:1 Awo Fesuto bwe yatuuka mu ssaza, bwe waayitawo ennaku ssatu, n'ava mu Kayisaliya n'agenda e Yerusaalemi." 
Acts25:2 Bakabona abakulu n'abakungu b'Abayudaaya ne bamubuulira bye bavunaana Pawulo; ne bamwegayirira," 
Acts25:3 abayambe atumye Pawulo aleetebwe e Yerusaalemi, nga bateekateeka okumuteegera mu kkubo okumutta." 
Acts25:4 Naye Fesuto n'addamu nti Pawulo akuumirwa mu Kayisaliya, nga naye ye yennyini yali ateekateeka okugendayo amangu ddala." 
Acts25:5 N'agamba nti, “Kale abakulu mu mmwe bagende nange, bamuvunaane oyo oba ng'aliko ekibi kyonna kyonna.”" 
Acts25:6 Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku nga munaana oba kkumi, n'aserengeta e Kayisaliya; ku lunaku olwokubiri n'atuula ku ntebe esalirwako emisango, n'alagira okuleeta Pawulo." 
Acts25:7 Bwe yatuuka Abayudaaya abaava e Yerusaalemi ne baleeta emisango mingi egy'amaanyi okumuvunaana, kyokka nga tebayinza kulaga bukakafu ku gyo." 
Acts25:8 Pawulo n'awoza nti, “Siyonoonanga mu mateeka g'Abayudaaya newakubadde ku Yeekaalu newakubadde eri Kayisaali.”" 
Acts25:9 Naye Fesuto, olw'okwagala okusanyusa Abayudaaya, n'abuuza Pawulo nti, “Oyagala okugenda e Yerusaalemi osalirwe eyo omusango gw'ebigambo bino mu maaso gange?”" 
Acts25:10 Naye Pawulo n'agamba nti, “Nnyimiridde awali entebe esalirwako emisango eya Kayisaali, we ŋŋwanidde okusalirwa omusango: siyonoonanga eri Abayudaaya, era nga naawe bw'otegeerera ddala obulungi." 
Acts25:11 Kale oba nga nnayonoona era nga nnakola ekigambo ekisaanidde okunzisa, sigaana kufa: naye oba nga bano ebigambo bye banvunaana nga tebiriiwo na kimu, tewali muntu ayinza okumpaayo mu bo. Njulidde eri Kayisaali.”" 
Acts25:12 Fesuto bwe yamala okuteesa nabo mu lukiiko n'alyoka addamu nti, “ Nga bw'ojulidde ewa Kayisaali, kale oligenda ewa Kayisaali.”" 
Acts25:13 Awo bwe waayitawo ennaku, kabaka Agulipa ne Berenike ne batuuka e Kayisaliya, okwaniriza Fesuto." 
Acts25:14 Bwe baamalayo ennaku nnyingi, Fesuto n'abuulira kabaka ebigambo bya Pawulo ng'agamba nti, “Waliwo omuntu Ferikisi gwe yaleka nga musibe:" 
Acts25:15 bwe nnali mu Yerusaalemi bakabona abakulu n'abakadde b'Abayudaaya ne bambuulira ebigambo bye, nga baagala okumusalira omusango." 
Acts25:16 Ne mbaddamu nti, ‘Si mpisa ya Baruumi okuwaayo omuntu abamuvunaana nga tebannaba kubaawo mu maaso ge, era nga tannaweebwa bbanga lya kuwoza bye bamuvunaana.’" 
Acts25:17 Awo bwe baakuŋŋaanira wano, saalwa n'akatono, naye ku lunaku olwokubiri ne ntuula ku ntebe esalirwako emisango ne ndagira okuleeta omusajja oyo." 
Acts25:18 Bwe baayimirira abamuvunaana ne bataleeta nsonga ya bigambo bibi nga bwe nnali ndowooza; 
Acts25:19 naye baalina ku ye ebibuuzibwa mu ddiini yaabwe n'eby'omuntu Yesu eyafa, Pawulo gwe yayogerako okuba omulamu." 
Acts25:20 Nange bwe nnabulwa bwe nnaakebera ebyo, ne mmubuuza ng'ayagala okugenda e Yerusaalemi okusalirwayo omusango ogwa bino." 
Acts25:21 Naye Pawulo bwe yajulira okukuumibwa okusalirwa omusango eri Augusito, ne ndagira okumukuuma okutuusa lwe ndimuweereza eri Kayisaali.”" 
Acts25:22 Agulipa n'agamba Fesuto nti, “Nnandyagadde nange okuwulira omuntu oyo.” N'agamba nti, “Enkya onoomuwulira.”" 
Acts25:23 Awo ku lunaku olwokubiri Agulipa ne Berenike bwe bajja n'ekitiibwa ekinene era bwe baayingira mu kifo awawulirirwa emisango wamu n'abaami abakulu n'abakungu ab'omu kibuga, Fesuto n'alagira Pawulo n'aleetebwa." 
Acts25:24 Fesuto n'agamba nti, “ Agulipa kabaka nammwe mwenna abali wano naffe, mumulaba ono, ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayudaaya gwe banneegayiririra mu Yerusaalemi ne wano nga boogerera waggulu nti tekimugwanidde kuba mulamu nate." 
Acts25:25 Naye nze ne ntegeera nga takoze kigambo ekisaanidde okumussa: naye ye bwe yajulira Augusito ne nsalawo okumuweerezaayo. 
Acts25:26 Sirina kigambo ku ye eky'amazima okuwandiikira mukama wange. Kyenvudde mmuleeta we muli, era okusinga w'oli, ggwe kabaka Agulipa, bwe tunaamala okumukemereza ndyoke mbeere n'ekigambo eky'okuwandiika." 
Acts25:27 Kubanga ndaba nga tekisaana kuweereza omusibe nga tolaze nsonga zimuvunaanibwa.” 
Acts26:1 Agulipa n'agamba Pawulo nti, “ Okkirizibwa okuwoza ensonga zo.” Awo Pawulo n'alyoka agolola omukono n'awoza nti:" 
Acts26:2 “Bye nnavunaanibwa Abayudaaya byonna, kabaka Agulipa, nneesiimye kubanga ŋŋenda okubiwoza leero w'oli;" 
Acts26:3 era okusinga kubanga omanyi empisa n'ebibuuzibwa byonna ebiri mu Bayudaaya: kyenva nkwegayirira ogumiikirize okumpuliriza. 
Acts26:4 Kale empisa zange okuva mu buto ezaasooka okubeeranga mu ggwanga lyaffe ne mu Yerusaalemi, Abayudaaya bonna bazimanyi;" 
Acts26:5 abantegeera okusooka edda, singa baagala okutegeeza, bwe nneegenderezanga mu kitundu ekisinga obuzibu eky'eddiini yaffe, ne mbeera Mufalisaayo." 
Acts26:6 Kaakano nnyimiridde okusalirwa omusango olw'essuubi Katonda lye yasuubiza bajjajjaffe; 
Acts26:7 lye basuubira okutuukako ebika byaffe ekkumi n'ebibiri, nga banyiikira okuweerezanga Katonda emisana n'ekiro: olw'essuubi eryo, kabaka, Abayudaaya kyebavudde bampawaabira." 
Acts26:8 Kiki ekibalowoozesa nti tekiyinzika Katonda okuzuukiza abafu? 
Acts26:9 Mazima nze nalowoozanga nzekka nga kiŋŋwanidde okukolanga obubi ebigambo bingi ku linnya lya Yesu Omunazaaleesi. 
Acts26:10 N'okukola ne nkolanga bwe ntyo e Yerusaalemi: nze ne nsibanga mu makomera abatukuvu baamu bangi, bwe nnaweebwa obuyinza okuva eri bakabona abakulu, era bwe battibwa, ne nzikiriza okubatta." 
Acts26:11 Era bwe nnababonerezanga emirundi mingi mu makuŋŋaaniro gonna ne mbawalirizanga okuvvoola; ne mbasunguwaliranga nnyo ne mbayigganyanga okutuuka mu bibuga eby'ebweru. 
Acts26:12 Awo bwe nnali nga ŋŋenda e Ddamasiko nga nnina obuyinza n'okulagirwa okwava eri bakabona abakulu," 
Acts26:13 mu ttuntu, kabaka, ne ndaba mu kkubo omusana ogwava mu ggulu ogusinga okwaka kw'enjuba ne gumasamasa ne gunneetooloola n'abaali batambula nange." 
Acts26:14 Ne tugwa fenna wansi ne mpulira eddoboozi nga lyogera nange mu lulimi Olwebbulaniya nti, ‘Sawulo, Sawulo, onjigganyiza ki? kye kizibu ggwe okusamba ku miwunda.’" 
Acts26:15 Nze ne ŋŋamba nti,‘ Ggwe ani, Mukama wange?’ Mukama waffe n'agamba nti, ‘ Nze Yesu, gw'oyigganya ggwe." 
Acts26:16 Naye golokoka, oyimirire ku bigere byo: kyenvudde nkulabikira, nkulonde obeerenga omuweereza era omujulirwa w'ebyo mw'ondabidde era ow'ebyo mwe nnaakulabikiranga," 
Acts26:17 nga nkuwonya mu bantu ne mu b'amawanga, nze gye nkutuma okuzibula amaaso gaabwe," 
Acts26:18 bakyuke okuva mu kizikiza badde eri omusana n'okuva mu buyinza bwa Setaani badde eri Katonda, balyoke baweebwe okuggyibwako ebibi n'obusika mu abo abaatukuzibwa olw'okukkiriza nze.’" 
Acts26:19 Kale, kabaka Agulipa, saalema kugondera okwolesebwa okw'omu ggulu:" 
Acts26:20 naye nnasooka okubuulira ab'omu Ddamasiko ne mu Yerusaalemi, era n'ensi yonna ey'e Buyudaaya n'ab'amawanga okwenenya n'okukyukira Katonda, nga bakolanga ebikolwa ebisaanidde okwenenya." 
Acts26:21 Abayudaaya kyebaava bankwata mu Yeekaalu ne bagezaako okunzita. 
Acts26:22 Kale bwe nnafuna okubeerwa okwava eri Katonda, okutuusa ku lunaku luno nnyimiridde nga ntegeeza abato n'abakulu, nga soogera kigambo wabula bannabbi ne Musa bye baayogera nga bigenda okujja;" 
Acts26:23 bwe kigwanira Kristo okubonyaabonyezebwa; era ye bw'alisooka mu kuzuukira kw'abafu okubuulira omusana abantu n'ab'amawanga.” 
Acts26:24 Bwe yawoza bw'atyo Fesuto n'agamba n'eddoboozi ddene nti, “Olaluse, Pawulo: okusoma okwo okungi kukufudde omulalu!”" 
Acts26:25 Naye Pawulo n'agamba nti, “ Siraluse, Fesuto omulungi ennyo, naye njogera ebigambo eby'amazima n'eby'obuntu bulamu." 
Acts26:26 Kubanga kabaka amanyi ebigambo bino, gwe njogerera mu maaso ge n'obugumu. Kubanga mmanyi ebigambo bino tebyekwese eri kabaka n'ekimu; kubanga ekyo tekyakolebwa mu bubba." 
Acts26:27 Okkiriza bannabbi, kabaka Agulipa? Mmanyi ng'okkiriza.”" 
Acts26:28 Agulipa n'agamba Pawulo nti, “ Mu kaseera kano akatono olowooza kunfuula Omukristaayo!" 
Acts26:29 Pawulo n'addamu nti, Nsaba Katonda, mu kaseera katono, oba mu kiseera kinene, si ggwe wekka era naye ne bonna abampulira leero okufuuka nga nze, okuggyako enjegere zino ezinsibiddwa.”" 
Acts26:30 Awo Kabaka n'owessaza ne Berenike n'abaali batudde awamu nabo ne basituka ne bafuluma. 
Acts26:31 Bwe baddayo eka, ne boogera bokka na bokka nga bagamba nti, “Omuntu ono takoze ekisaanidde okumussa oba okumusibya.”" 
Acts26:32 Agulipa n'agamba Fesuto nti, “Omuntu ono yanditeereddwa singa teyajulira Kayisaali.”" 
Acts27:1 Awo bwe kyasalibwawo ffe tusaabale ku nnyanja okugenda e Italiya, Pawulo n'abasibe abalala ne bakwasibwa omuserikale omukulu, ow'ekitongole kya Augusito, erinnya lye Yuliyo." 
Acts27:2 Ne tusaabala mu kyombo eky'e Adulamutiyo ekyali kigenda ku njuyi z'e Asiya, ne tuvaayo, nga ne Alisutaluuko Omukedoni ow'e Ssessaloniika ali naffe." 
Acts27:3 Ku lunaku olwokubiri ne tugoba e Sidoni: Yuliyo n'akola bulungi Pawulo n'amukkiriza okugenda eri mikwano gye okumulabirira. 
Acts27:4 Ne tuvaayo ne tusaabala nga tuyita ku mabbali ga Kupulo kubanga omuyaga gwali gutuli bubi. 
Acts27:5 Bwe twayita mu nnyanja ey'e Kirukiya n'e Panfuliya; ne tutuuka e Mula eky'e Lukiya. 
Acts27:6 Eyo omukulu w'ekitongole n'alabayo ekyombo ekyali kiva mu Alegezanderiya nga kigenda Italiya, n'atusaabaza mu ekyo." 
Acts27:7 Twasaabala mpola olw'omuyaga omungi okumala ennaku nnyingi ne tutuuka lwa mpaka ku Kunido, omuyaga bwe gwatulobera, ne tuyita ku mabbali ga Kuleete mu maaso ga Salumone;" 
Acts27:8 ne tukiyitako lwa mpaka ne tutuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Emyalo Emirungi; awaliraanye ekibuga Lasaya. 
Acts27:9 Bwe waayitawo ebbanga ddene, nga n'obudde bweyongera kwonoonekera ddala, nga okusaabala ku nnyanja kyakabi, nga ne nnaku ez'Okusiiba zaali ziyise, Pawulo n'abalabula" 
Acts27:10 ng'abagamba nti, “Abasajja, ndaba nti olugendo luno lulibaamu okwonoonekerwa n'okufiirwa kungi si kwa bintu byokka n'ekyombo, era naye n'obulamu bwaffe.”" 
Acts27:11 Naye omukulu w'ekitongole n'agendera ku magezi g'omugoba w'ekyombo ne nnannyini kyo okusinga Pawulo bye yayogera. 
Acts27:12 Kubanga omwalo tegwali mulungi okwewogomamu omuyaga, abasinga obungi kyebaava basemba eky'okweyongerayo, oba nga kisoboka tutuuke e Foyiniiki okwewogoma omuyaga; gwe mwalo ogw'e Kuleete ogutunuulira wakati w'obukiika n'ebuvanjuba, ne wakati w'obukiika obulala n'ebuvanjuba." 
Acts27:13 Empewo ez'omuggundu bwe zaakunta empola, ne balowooza nti bafunye kye babadde baagala, ne basimbula essika ne bayita kumpi nnyo ne Kuleete." 
Acts27:14 Naye waali tewanayita bbanga ddene, omuyaga ogw'amaanyi ennyo oguyitibwa Ewulakulo ne gukunta," 
Acts27:15 ekyombo bwe kyakwatibwa ne kitayinza kwolekera muyaga, ne tukireka ne tutwalibwa omuyaga." 
Acts27:16 Ne tweyuna mu mabbali g'akazinga akayitibwa Kawuda, ne tutegana okukwata eryato:" 
Acts27:17 bwe baamala okulirinnyisa, ne baddira emigwa egy'okunyweza ekyombo ne bakisiba wansi. Bwe baatya okusuulibwa mu Suluti, ne bassa ebyali waggulu, ne batwalibwa omuyaga." 
Acts27:18 Bwe twategana ennyo n'omuyaga, ku lunaku olwokubiri ne batandika okusuula mu nnyanja ebintu ebyali mu kyombo." 
Acts27:19 Ne ku lunaku olwokusatu ne bakwata ebintu ebikola ku kyombo ne babisuula mu nnyanja. 
Acts27:20 Ne tumala ennaku nnyingi nga tetulabye ku njuba newakubadde emmunyeenye, gwo omuyaga nga gweyongera maanyi, era essuubi lyonna ery'okulokoka ne lituggwaamu." 
Acts27:21 Bwe baamala ekiseera ekiwanvu nga tebalidde, awo Pawulo n'alyoka ayimirira wakati waabwe n'agamba nti, “ Kyabagwanira, abasajja, okumpuliriza obutava mu Kuleete, kubanga temwandifiiriddwa byammwe bwe muti awamu n'okulumizibwa!" 
Acts27:22 Era kaakano mbabuulirira okuguma emyoyo; kubanga tewaabe mu mmwe anaafiirwa obulamu n'akatono wabula ekyombo. 
Acts27:23 Kubanga mu kiro, malayika wa Katonda wange gw'empeereza, yayimiridde we ndi," 
Acts27:24 ng'agamba nti, ‘Totya, Pawulo; kikugwanidde okuyimirira mu maaso ga Kayisaali; era, laba, Katonda akuwadde bonna abagenda awamu naawe.’" 
Acts27:25 Kale mugume emyoyo, abasajja; kubanga nzikiriza Katonda nga kiriba nga bwe yaŋŋambye." 
Acts27:26 Naye kitugwanidde okusuulibwa ku kizinga.” 
Acts27:27 Naye ekiro eky'ekkumi n'ebina (14) bwe kyatuuka, nga tusuukundirwa eruuyi n'eruuyi mu Aduliya, mu ttumbi abalunnyanja ne bateebereza nti banaatera okusemberera olukalu;" 
Acts27:28 ne bagera ne balaba ebifuba abiri (20) bwe twagendako katono, ne bagera nate, ne balaba ebifuba kkumi na bitaano (15)." 
Acts27:29 Bwe baatya okuseerera awali amayinja, ne basuula amasika ana (4) ku kiwenda ne balindirira bukye." 
Acts27:30 Abalunnyanja bwe baali baagala okudduka mu kyombo ne bamala okussa akaato ku nnyanja nga beefuula ng'abagenda okusuula ennanga mu maaso g'ekyombo. 
Acts27:31 Pawulo n'agamba omukulu w'abasserikale n'abasserikale be nti, “Abasajja bano bwe batasigala mu kyombo, mmwe temuuyinze kulokoka.”" 
Acts27:32 Awo abasserikale ne basala emigwa gy'akaato ne bakaleka ne kagenda. 
Acts27:33 Awo bwe bwali bunaatera okukya, Pawulo n'abeegayirira bonna okulya ku mmere, ng'agamba nti, “Leero lunaku lwa kkumi na nnya (14) nga mulindirira nga temulya kantu konna," 
Acts27:34 Kyenva mbeegayirira okulya ku mmere: kubanga okwo kunaabalokola: kubanga tewaabule luviiri ku mitwe gyammwe n'omu.” 
Acts27:35 Bwe yamala okwogera bwatyo n'addira omugaati, ne yeebaliza Katonda mu maaso ga bonna n'agumenyamu n'atandika okulya." 
Acts27:36 Bonna ne baguma emyoyo, ne balya ku mmere." 
Acts27:37 Fenna abaali mu kyombo twali abantu bibiri mu nsanvu mu mukaaga (276). 
Acts27:38 Bwe baamala okulya nga bakkuse, ne basuula eŋŋaano mu nnyanja okwongera okuwewula ku kyombo." 
Acts27:39 Bwe bwakya enkya, nga tebamanyi gyebali: naye ne balaba ekikono ekiriko omusenyu; ne bateesa, oba nga kiyinzika, okuseeza omwo ekyombo." 
Acts27:40 Ne bakutula amasika, ne bagaleka mu nnyanja, mu kiseera ekyo bwe baasumulula emigwa egy'enkasi egoba, ne bawanika ettanga eri mu maaso eri empewo ne boolekera ku ttale." 
Acts27:41 Naye bwe baatuuka mu kifo amayengo abiri (2) we gaasisinkana, ne baseeza ekyombo; ensanda n'eseera n'enywera n'etanyeenya, naye ekiwenda ne kizibukuka n'amaanyi g'amayengo." 
Acts27:42 Abasserikale ne bateesa abasibe battibwe baleme okuwugirira okudduka. 
Acts27:43 Naye kubanga omukulu w'abasserikale yayagala okuwonya Pawulo, n'abaziyiza okukola kye baali bateesezza. Awo n'alagira abasobola okuwuga bawuge batuuke ku lukalu." 
Acts27:44 Abo abaali tebasobola kuwuga ne bagezaako okweyambisa ebitundutundu by'embaawo ebyali bimenyese ku kyombo. Awo bwe batyo bonna ne batuuka ku lukalu bulungi. 
Acts28:1 Bwe twamala okutuuka obulungi ku lukalu ne tulyoka tutegeera ng'ekizinga kiyitibwa Merita. 
Acts28:2 Abantu b'okukizinga ekyo baatulaga ekisa ekitali kya bulijjo, kubanga baakuma omuliro, ne batusembeza fenna, nga ne mpewo nnyingi ate nga n'enkuba yali etandise okutonnya." 
Acts28:3 Naye Pawulo bwe yakuŋŋaanya omuganda gw'obuku, n'agussa mu muliro, embalasaasa n'evaamu olw'ebbugumu n'emwerippa ku mukono." 
Acts28:4 Abantu b'okukizinga bwe baalaba ekyekulula nga kireebeetera ku mukono, ne bagamba bokka na bokka nti, “ Mazima omuntu ono mussi; newakubadde awonye okufiira mu nnyanja, omusango tegumuganya kubeera mulamu.”" 
Acts28:5 Naye n'akunkumulira mu muliro ekyekulula n'atabaako kabi. 
Acts28:6 Naye bali ne balowooza nti anaazimba oba anaasinduka, okugwa eri nga mufu: naye bwe baalwawo ennyo nga bamutunuulira ne batalaba kibi ky'abaddeko, ne bakyuka ne bagamba nti, “ katonda.”" 
Acts28:7 Waaliwo kumpi n'ekifo ekyo ensuku z'omuntu omukulu w'ekizinga, erinnya lye Pubuliyo; oyo n'atusembeza n'atujjanjaba n'ekisa ennaku ssatu." 
Acts28:8 Awo kitaawe wa Pubuliyo yali agalamidde, ng'alwadde omusujja n'ekiddukano ky'omusaayi: Pawulo n'ayingira mw'ali, n'asaba n'amussaako emikono n'amuwonya." 
Acts28:9 Ekyo bwe kyakolebwa, abalala nabo abaali ku kizinga abaalina endwadde ne bajja ne bawonyezebwa:" 
Acts28:10 era abo ne batuwa ekitiibwa kinene; bwe twali tuvaayo ne baleeta ku kyombo ebintu bye twetaaga. 
Acts28:11 Oluvannyuma lw'emyezi esatu ne tusitula, twaviirayo mu kyombo eky'e Alegezanderiya, ekyali ku kizinga mu biro eby'omuyaga, akabonero kaakyo Ab'oluganda abalongo." 
Acts28:12 Ne tugoba mu Sulakusa ne tumalayo ennaku ssatu: 
Acts28:13 ne tuvaayo ne twetooloola ne tutuuka e Regio: bwe waayitawo olunaku lumu, empewo ez'omuggundu ne zikunta, ku lunaku olwokubiri ne tutuuka e Putiyooli;" 
Acts28:14 gye twasanga ab'oluganda ne batuyita okumala wamu nabo ennaku musanvu: awo bwe tutyo ne tutuuka e Ruumi 
Acts28:15 Ab'oluganda bwe baawulira ebigambo byaffe ne bavaayo okutusisinkana mu Katale ka Apiyo ne mu Bisulo Ebisatu: Pawulo bwe yabalabako ne yeebaza Katonda n'aguma omwoyo. 
Acts28:16 Bwe twayingira mu Ruumi, Pawulo n'akkirizibwa okubeera yekka, kyokka ng'alina omusserikale amukuuma." 
Acts28:17 Awo bwe waayitawo ennaku ssatu, n'ayita abakulu b'Abayudaaya: bwe baamala okukuŋŋaana n'abagamba nti, “Ab'oluganda, newakubadde nga saakola kibi ku bantu newakubadde ku mpisa za bajjajjaffe, naye nnasibibwa ne mpeebwayo mu mikono gy'Abaruumi mu Yerusaalemi:" 
Acts28:18 abo bwe baamala okunkemereza ne baagala okunsumulula, kubanga tewaali nsonga gye ndi ya kunzisa." 
Acts28:19 Naye Abayudaaya bwe baagaana, ne mpalirizibwa okujulira Kayisaali, si ng'alina ekigambo okuloopa eggwanga lyaffe." 
Acts28:20 Kale olw'ensonga eyo mbayise okundaba n'okwogera nange: kubanga olw'essuubi lya Isiraeri nsibiddwa n'olujegere luno.” 
Acts28:21 Bo ne bamugamba nti, “ Ffe so tetuweebwanga bbaluwa za bigambo byo okuva mu Buyudaaya, so tewali ku b'oluganda eyali azze n'atubuulira oba n'ayogera ekigambo ekibi ku ggwe." 
Acts28:22 Naye twagala okuwulira okuva gy'oli by'olowooza: kubanga enzikiriza eno, tumanyi nti bagiwakanya wonna wonna.”" 
Acts28:23 Ne bamulaga olunaku ne bajja bangi gy'ali mu kisulo; n'abannyonnyola ng'ategeeza obwakabaka bwa Katonda, era ng'abakkirizisa ebigambo bya Yesu mu mateeka ga Musa ne mu bya bannabbi okuva ku makya okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Acts28:24 Abamu ne bakkiriza bye yayogera, naye abalala ne batakkiriza." 
Acts28:25 Awo bwe balemwa okukwatagana ne bagenda, nga Pawulo amaze okwogera ekigambo kino nti, “ Omwoyo Omutukuvu yagamba bulungi bajjajjammwe mu kitabo kya nnabbi Isaaya" 
Acts28:26 ng'agamba nti,” “ ‘Genda eri abantu bano, oyogere nti Okuwulira muliwulira, ne mutategeera; Okulaba muliraba, ne muteetegeereza" 
Acts28:27 Kubanga omutima gw'abantu bano gusavuwadde, N'amatu gaabwe bawulira bubi, N'amaaso gaabwe bagazibye; Baleme okulaba n'amaaso, N'okuwulira n'amatu, N'okutegeera n'omutima gwabwe, N'okukyuka, Nze okubawonya. ’ ”" 
Acts28:28 “Kale mutegeere nti obulokozi bwa Katonda buno buweerezeddwa ab'amawanga, nabo balibuwulira.”" 
Acts28:29 Bwe yayogera ebigambo ebyo, Abayudaaya ne bagenda nga bawakana nnyo bokka na bokka." 
Acts28:30 Awo Pawulo n'amalayo emyaka ebiri miramba ng'asula mu nnyumba gye yeepangisiza, n'asembezanga bonna abajjanga gy'ali," 
Acts28:31 ng'abuuliranga obwakabaka bwa Katonda, era ng'ayigirizanga mu lwatu ebigambo bya Mukama Yesu Kristo, nga tewali amuziyiza." 
Romans1:1 Pawulo, omuddu wa Yesu Kristo, eyayitibwa okuba omutume, ne njawulibwa okubunyisa Enjiri ya Katonda," 
Romans1:2 gye yasuubiriza edda mu bannabbi be, ne mu byawandiikibwa ebitukuvu." 
Romans1:3 Enjiri ekwata ku Mwana we, eyazaalibwa mu zzadde lya Dawudi mu mubiri," 
Romans1:4 eyalagibwa okuba Omwana wa Katonda mu maanyi, ne mu mwoyo gw'obutukuvu, n'olw'okuzuukira kwe mu bafu; Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe," 
Romans1:5 okuyita mu ye mwe twafunira ekisa n'obutume, tuleete obugonvu bw'okukkiriza olw'erinnya lye mu mawanga gonna," 
Romans1:6 era nammwe muli mu bo, abayitibwa okuba aba Yesu Kristo;" 
Romans1:7 eri bonna abali mu Ruumi, abaagalwa Katonda, abayitibwa okuba abatukuvu, ekisa kibe nammwe n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Romans1:8 Okusooka, nneebaza Katonda wange ku bwa Yesu Kristo ku lwammwe mwenna, kubanga okukkiriza kwammwe kwogerwako mu nsi zonna." 
Romans1:9 Kubanga Katonda ye mujulirwa, gw'empeereza mu mwoyo gwange, mu njiri y'Omwana we, bw'entyo buli kiseera mboogerako bulijjo mu ssaala zange," 
Romans1:10 nga nneegayirira bulijjo mu kusaba kwange, Katonda bw'ayagala, ndyoke ntambuzibwe bulungi okujja gye muli." 
Romans1:11 Kubanga neegomba okubalabako, ndyoke mbawe ku kirabo eky'Omwoyo, mulyoke munywezebwe," 
Romans1:12 olwo fenna tuzibwemu amaanyi olw'okukkiriza kwaffe, okwammwe n'okwange." 
Romans1:13 Era, ab'oluganda, njagala mumanye ng'emirundi mingi nalowoozanga okujja gye muli, naye ne nziyizibwa okutuusa kaakano, ndyoke mbeereko n'ebibibala by'enfuna mu mmwe, era nga ne mu b'amawanga amalala." 
Romans1:14 Nnina obuvunanyizibwa okuyamba Abayonaani era ne bannamawanga, ab'amagezi era n'abasirusiru." 
Romans1:15 Era kyenva njagala okubabuulira Enjiri nammwe abali mu Ruumi. 
Romans1:16 Kubanga Enjiri tenkwasa nsonyi; kubanga ge maanyi ga Katonda agalokola buli akkiriza, okusookera ku Muyudaaya era n'Omuyonaani." 
Romans1:17 Kubanga mu Njiri Obutuukirivu bwa Katonda bubikkulibwa obuva mu kukkiriza okutuuka mu kukkiriza; nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Naye omutuukirivu anaabanga mulamu lwa kukkiriza.”" 
Romans1:18 Kubanga obusungu bwa Katonda bubikkulibwa okuva mu ggulu ku butatya Katonda bwonna, n'obutaba na butuukirivu bwonna obw'abantu abaziyiza amazima mu butaba na butuukirivu;" 
Romans1:19 kubanga ebiyinza okumanyika ebya Katonda bimanyika birabika gyebali; kubanga Katonda yabibalaga. 
Romans1:20 Kubanga okuviira ddala ku kutonda ensi, embeera ye eterabika, kwe kugamba obuyinza bwe obutaggwaawo n'obwakatonda bwe; birabikira ddala bulungi, nga bitegeererwa mu ebyo bye yatonda, bwe batyo babeere nga tebalina kya kuwoza;" 
Romans1:21 kubanga newakubadde nga Katonda baamumanya, naye tebamugulumizanga nga Katonda newakubadde okumwebazanga, wabula ne bagobereranga ebitaliimu mu mpaka zaabwe, omutima gwabwe omusirusiru ne gujjuzibwa ekizikiza." 
Romans1:22 Bwe beeyita ab'amagezi, so nga baasiruwala," 
Romans1:23 ne bawaanyisa ekitiibwa kya Katonda ataggwaawo okufaanana ekifaananyi ky'omuntu aggwaawo, n'eky'ebinyonyi, n'eky'ebisolo, n'eky'ebyewalula." 
Romans1:24 Katonda kyeyava abawaayo eri obugwagwa mu kwegomba kw'emitima gyabwe, okwonoonanga ekitiibwa ky'emibiri gyabwe bokka na bokka," 
Romans1:25 kubanga amazima ga Katonda baagawaanyisaamu obulimba, ne basinzanga era ne baweerezanga ekitonde okusinga Omutonzi, eyeebazibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Romans1:26 Katonda kyeyava abawaayo eri okukwatibwa okw'ensonyi; kubanga abakazi baabwe baawaanyisa ekikolwa kyabwe eky'obuzaaliranwa ne bakifuula ekitali kya buzaaliranwa," 
Romans1:27 era n'abasajja bwe batyo, bwe baaleka ekikolwa eky'omukazi eky'obuzaaliranwa, ne baakanga mu kwegomba kwabwe bokka na bokka, abasajja n'abasajja nga bakolagananga ebitasaana, era bwe batyo ne beereetera ekibonerezo ekigwanira okwonoona kwabwe." 
Romans1:28 Era nga bwe batakkiriza kubeera ne Katonda mu magezi gaabwe, Katonda yabawaayo eri omwoyo ogutakkirizibwa, okukolanga ebitasaana;" 
Romans1:29 nga bajjudde obutaba na butuukirivu bwonna, obubi, okwegomba, ettima; nga bajjudde obuggya, obussi, okuyomba, obukuusa, enge; abageya," 
Romans1:30 abalyolyoma, abakyawa Katonda, ab'ekyejo, ab'amalala, abeenyumiriza, abayiiya ebigambo ebibi, abatawulira bazadde baabwe," 
Romans1:31 abatalina magezi, abaleka endagaano, abataagalana, abatalina kusaasira:" 
Romans1:32 era newakubadde bamanyi nga Katonda asala omusango, era nti abakola ebyo basaanidde kufa, tebabikola bukozi, era naye basiima ababikola." 
Romans2:1 Kyova olema okubeera n'eky'okuwoza, ggwe omuntu, kyonna kyoli, bw'osalira omulala omusango; kubanga mu kusalira abalala omusango, naawe oba ogwesalidde okukusinga; kuba bo bye bakola, naawe agusala by'okolera ddala." 
Romans2:2 Tumanyi nga ensala ya Katonda mu mazima etuukira ddala ku abo abakola bwe batyo. 
Romans2:3 Olowooza ggwe omuntu, asalira abakola ebyo omusango okubasinga, so nga naawe by'okola, olowooza nti oliwona omusango Katonda gw'alisala?" 
Romans2:4 Oba ekisa kya Katonda ekingi n'obuwombeefu n'okugumiikiriza, byonyoomye? Tomanyi nga ekisa kya Katonda weekiri olw'okukuleetera okwenenya?" 
Romans2:5 Naye olw'obukakanyavu n'omutima oguteenenya, weeterekera obusungu obuliba ku lunaku olw'obusungu, obutuukirivu bwa Katonda obw'okusala omusango kwe bulibikkulirwa;" 
Romans2:6 alisasula buli muntu ng'ebikolwa bye bwe byali; 
Romans2:7 abo mu kugumiikiriza abanyiikira okukola ebirungi nga baluubirira okufuna ekitiibwa n'ettendo n'obutafa, alibasasula obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Romans2:8 Naye abo abayomba, n'abatagondera mazima, naye bagoberera obutali butuukirivu, Katonda alibasunguwalira, n'abakambuwalira." 
Romans2:9 Walibaawo okubonyaabonyezebwa n'okulumizibwa, ku buli muntu akola ebibi, okusookera ku Muyudaaya era ne ku Muyonaani," 
Romans2:10 naye ekitiibwa n'ettendo n'emirembe, biribeera ku buli akola obulungi, okusookera ku Muyudaaya era ne ku Muyonaani," 
Romans2:11 kubanga Katonda tasosola mu bantu. 
Romans2:12 Kubanga bonna abaayonoonanga awatali mateeka, era balizikirizibwa nga tebavunaanibwa mateeka, ate bonna abaayonoonanga nga balina amateeka, balisalirwa omusango okusinziira mu mateeka;" 
Romans2:13 kubanga abawulira obuwulizi amateeka si be batuukirivu eri Katonda, wabula abo abakola amateeka bye galagira be baliweebwa obutuukirivu." 
Romans2:14 Kubanga ab'amawanga abatalina mateeka bwe bakolera mu kutegeera okw'obuzaaliranwa bwabwe, ne batuukiriza ebyo amateeka bye galagira, abo, be baba bafuuse amateeka aga bafuga, newakubadde nga tebalina amateeka gali." 
Romans2:15 Balaga nti amateeka kye galagira kiwandiikiddwa mu mitima gyabwe, omwoyo gwabwe gukikakasa, kubanga ebirowoozo byabwe emirundi egimu bibalumiriza omusango, ate emirundi emirala bibawolereza;" 
Romans2:16 ku lunaku olwo, okusinziira ku njiri yange, Katonda asala omusango gw'ebyama by'abantu ku bwa Yesu Kristo." 
Romans2:17 Naye ggwe bw'oyitibwa Omuyudaaya, ne weesigama ku mateeka, ne weenyumiririza mu Katonda," 
Romans2:18 n'omanya Katonda by'ayagala, n'osiima ebisinga obulungi, kubanga wayigirizibwa mu mateeka," 
Romans2:19 era bw'oba weekakasa ggwe okubeera omusaale w'abazibe b'amaaso, omusana gw'abali mu kizikiza," 
Romans2:20 omulagirizi w'abatalina magezi, Omuyigiriza w'abaana abato, kubanga tulina mu mateeka, ebisibiddwamu eby'amagezi n'eby'amazima;" 
Romans2:21 kale ggwe ayigiriza abalala, lwaki teweeyigiriza wekka? Abuulira obutabbanga, obba?" 
Romans2:22 Agamba abalala obutayendanga, oyenda? Akyawa ebifaananyi, obba eby'omu biggwa?" 
Romans2:23 Eyeenyumiririza mu mateeka, onyooma Katonda ng'osobya amateeka?" 
Romans2:24 Kubanga erinnya lya Katonda livvoolebwa mu b'amawanga ku lwammwe, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa." 
Romans2:25 Kubanga okukomolebwa kugasa, bw'okwata amateeka; naye bw'oba omusobya w'amateeka okukomolebwa kwo kuba kufuuse obutakomolebwa." 
Romans2:26 Kale atali mukomole bw'akwata ebiragiro ebiri mu mateeka, obutakomolebwa bwe tebulibalibwa kuba kukomolebwa?" 
Romans2:27 Era atali mukomole mu buzaaliranwa, bw'atuukiriza amateeka, talikusalira musango ggwe, asobya amateeka, newakubadde ng'olina ebyawandiikibwa mu mateeka era nga wakomolebwa?" 
Romans2:28 Kubanga Omuyudaaya ow'okungulu si ye Muyudaaya; so n'okukomolebwa kw'omubiri okw'okungulu si kwe kukomolebwa," 
Romans2:29 naye Omuyudaaya ow'omunda ye Muyudaaya; n'okukomolebwa kwe okw'omu mutima, mu mwoyo, si mu nnukuta; atatenderezebwa bantu, wabula Katonda." 
Romans3:1 Kale Omuyudaaya kiki ky'asinza abalala? Oba okukomolebwa kugasa ki? 
Romans3:2 Kugasa nnyo mu bigambo byonna, eky'olubereberye kubanga Abayudaaya baateresebwa ebyo Katonda bye yayogera." 
Romans3:3 Kubanga kiba ki abamu bwe bataba na kukkiriza, obutakkiriza bwabwe buliggyawo obwesigwa bwa Katonda?" 
Romans3:4 Nedda, tekisoboka. Katonda aba wa mazima, buli muntu ne bw'aba omulimba; nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Obeere mutuukirivu mu bigambo byo, Osinge bw'osalirwa omusango.”" 
Romans3:5 Naye obutali butuukirivu bwaffe bwe butenderezesa obutuukirivu bwa Katonda, tunaayogera tutya? Katonda si mutuukirivu bw'atubonereza n'obusungu? Njogera ng'abantu bwe boogera." 
Romans3:6 Nedda n'akatono! Kubanga, bwe kiba bwe kityo, Katonda alisalira atya ensi omusango?" 
Romans3:7 Naye amazima ga Katonda bwe geeyongera okulabika olw'obulimba bwange ye n'aweebwa ekitiibwa, nze kiki ekinsaliza omusango nate ng'omwonoonyi?" 
Romans3:8 Era kiki ekitulobera okwogera (nga bwe tuwaayirizibwa, era ng'abamu bwe boogera nti tugamba) nti, “Tukolenga ebibi, ebirungi biryoke bijje?” Abo okusalirwa kwabwe omusango kwa nsonga." 
Romans3:9 Kale kiki? Ffe Abayudaaya tulina kyetusinza abalala? Nedda, n'akatono. Kubanga tusoose okulaga nti Abayudaaya era n'Abayonaani bonna bafugibwa kibi," 
Romans3:10 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Tewali mutuukirivu n'omu;" 
Romans3:11 Tewali ategeera, Tewali anoonya Katonda;" 
Romans3:12 Bonna baakyama, baafuuka batasaana wamu; Tewali akola obulungi, tewali n'omu;" 
Romans3:13 Omumiro gwabwe ye ntaana eyasaamiridde; Balimba n'ennimi zaabwe; Obusagwa bw'embalasaasa buli wansi w'emimwa gyabwe: 
Romans3:14 Akamwa kaabwe kajjudde okukolima n'okukaawa: 
Romans3:15 Ebigere byabwe byanguwa okuyiwa omusaayi; 
Romans3:16 Okuzikirira n'obunaku biri mu makubo gaabwe; 
Romans3:17 So tebamanyanga kkubo lya mirembe. 
Romans3:18 Tewali kutya Katonda mu maaso gaabwe.” 
Romans3:19 Naye tumanyi nga byonna amateeka bye googera, gagamba abo abalina amateeka; buli kamwa konna kazibibwe, n'ensi zonna zibeereko omusango eri Katonda." 
Romans3:20 Kubanga olw'ebikolwa by'amateeka alina omubiri yenna taliweebwa butuukirivu mu maaso ge, kubanga amateeka ge gamanyisa ekibi." 
Romans3:21 Naye kaakano awatali mateeka obutuukirivu bwa Katonda, obutegeezebwa amateeka ne bannabbi, bulabisibwa;" 
Romans3:22 bwe butuukirivu bwa Katonda olw'okukkiriza Yesu Kristo eri bonna abakkiriza; kubanga tewali njawulo; 
Romans3:23 kubanga bonna baayonoona, ne batatuuka ku kitiibwa kya Katonda;" 
Romans3:24 naye baweebwa obutuukirivu bwa buwa lwa kisa kye olw'okununulibwa okuli mu Kristo Yesu. 
Romans3:25 Katonda gwe yassaawo okuba omutango, olw'okukkiriza omusaayi gwe, okulaga obutuukirivu bwe, olw'okuleka ebibi ebyakolebwanga edda, Katonda ng'agumiikiriza;" 
Romans3:26 okulaga obutuukirivu bwe mu biro bino, alyoke abeere omutuukirivu era ng'awa obutuukirivu buli akkiriza Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Kale okwenyumiriza kuli luuyi wa? Tekuuliwo. Lwaki tekuuliwo? Tekuuliwo olw'ebikolwa? Nedda, naye lwa kukkiriza." 
Romans3:28 Kyetuva tukakasa ng'omuntu aweebwa obutuukirivu lwa kukkiriza sso si lwa kutuukiriza bikolwa bya mu mateeka. 
Romans3:29 Oba Katonda, Katonda wa Bayudaaya bokka? Si Katonda wa b'amawanga n'abo? Weewaawo, era n'aba mawanga n'abo waabwe." 
Romans3:30 Olw'okuba Katonda ali omu, aliwa obutuukirivu abakomole olw'okukkiriza, n'abatali bakomole olw'okukkiriza." 
Romans3:31 Kale amateeka tugaggyawo olw'okukkiriza? Nedda, nakatono. Naye tuganyweza bunyweza." 
Romans4:1 Kale kiki kye tunaayogera ku Ibulayimu jjajjaffe kye yalaba mu mubiri? 
Romans4:2 Kubanga Ibulayimu singa yaweebwa obutuukirivu olw'ebikolwa, singa alina ekimwenyumirizisa; naye talina mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Romans4:3 Kubanga ebyawandiikibwa byogera bitya? Ibulayimu n'akkiriza Katonda, ne kumubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu." 
Romans4:4 Kale, omukozi empeera ye temuweebwa ng'ekirabo, naye ng'ekyo kyateekwa okuweebwa." 
Romans4:5 Naye atakola, kyokka n'akkiriza oyo awa obutuukirivu abatatya Katonda, okukkiriza kwe kumubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu." 
Romans4:6 Era ne Dawudi alangirira omukisa ku muntu, Katonda gw'abalira obutuukirivu awatali bikolwa, nti," 
Romans4:7 “Baweereddwa omukisa abaggibwako ebyonoono byabwe, Ebibi byabwe byabikkibwako." 
Romans4:8 Aweereddwa omukisa omuntu Mukama gw'atalibalira kibi.” 
Romans4:9 Kale omukisa ogwo guli ku bakomole bokka, oba nantiki ne ku abo abatali bakomole? Kubanga tugambye nti okukkiriza kwe kwabalirwa Ibulayimu okuba obutuukirivu." 
Romans4:10 Kale kwabalwa kutya? bwe yali ng'akomoleddwa, nantiki bwe yali nga tannakomolebwa? Si bwe yali ng'akomoleddwa, naye nga tannakomolebwa:" 
Romans4:11 n'aweebwa ekyokulabirako eky'okukomolebwa, akabonero k'obutuukirivu obw'okukkiriza kwe yalina nga tannakomolebwa: alyoke abeerenga jjajjaabwe bonna abakkiriza nga si bakomole, babalirwenga obutuukirivu." 
Romans4:12 Era ye jjajja w'abakomole, so si w'abo abakomole obukomozi, naye abatambulira mu bigere by'okukkiriza kwa jjajjaffe Ibulayimu kwe yalina nga tannakomolebwa." 
Romans4:13 Kubanga okusuubiza tekwaweerwa Ibulayimu newakubadde ezzadde lye mu mateeka, nti alibeera musika wa nsi zonna, wabula mu butuukirivu obw'okukkiriza." 
Romans4:14 Kubanga ab'omu mateeka singa be basika, okukkiriza singa kudibye, era n'okusuubiza singa kuggiddwawo." 
Romans4:15 Kubanga amateeka galeeta obusungu; naye awatali mateeka, era tewabaawo kwonoona." 
Romans4:16 Kale ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza bisinzira mu kukkiriza, okusuubiza kulyoke kubeerenga kwa kisa, era kunywere eri ezzadde lyonna, si eri ab'omu mateeka bokka, naye era n'eri ab'omu kukkiriza kwa Ibulayimu, ye jjajjaffe fenna." 
Romans4:17 Kyawandiikibwa nti, “Nkufudde jjajja w'amawanga amangi,” mu maaso g'oyo gwe yakkiriza, ye Katonda, azuukiza abafu, era ayita ebitaliiwo ng'ebiriwo." 
Romans4:18 Ibulayimu yakkiriza n'asuubira awatasuubirikika, alyoke abeerenga jjajja w'amawanga amangi, nga bwe kyayogerwa nti, “Ezzadde lyo liriba bwe lityo.”" 
Romans4:19 N'atanafuwa mu kukkiriza bwe yalowooza omubiri gwe nga gulinga ogufudde, kubanga yali awezezza emyaka nga kikumi (100), era nga ne Saala mugumba." 
Romans4:20 Teyalekayo kukkiriza, era teyabuusabuusa mu ebyo Katonda bye yamusuubiza, naye n'afuna amaanyi olw'okukkiriza, ng'agulumiza Katonda," 
Romans4:21 era ng'ategeerera ddala nga bye yasuubiza era ayinza n'okubikola. 
Romans4:22 Era kyekwava kumubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu. 
Romans4:23 Naye tekyawandiikibwa ku lulwe yekka nti, “kwamubalirwa;”" 
Romans4:24 naye era ne ku lwaffe, abagenda okubalirwa, abakkiriza mu oyo eyazuukiza Yesu Mukama waffe mu bafu," 
Romans4:25 eyaweebwayo olw'ebyonoono byaffe n'azuukira olw'okutuweesa obutuukirivu. 
Romans5:1 Kale bwe twaweebwa obutuukirivu olw'okukkiriza, tulina emirembe ne Katonda mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Romans5:2 Mu ye mwe twayita okufuna ekisa kino kye tuyimiriddemu; era tusanyuka mu kusuubira kwe tulina okw'okugabana ku kitiibwa kya Katonda. 
Romans5:3 So si ekyo kyokka, era naye twenyumirizenga mu kubonaabona kwaffe, nga tumanyi ng'okubonaabona kuleeta okugumiikiriza;" 
Romans5:4 nate okugumiikiriza kuleeta empisa ennungi; n'empisa ennungi zireeta okusuubira: 
Romans5:5 n'okusuubira tekukwasa nsonyi, kubanga okwagala kwa Katonda kufukiddwa ddala mu mitima gyaffe, mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu gwe twaweebwa." 
Romans5:6 Bwe twali nga tukyali banafu, mu kiseera ekituufu Kristo naafiirira abatatya Katonda." 
Romans5:7 Kizibu omuntu okufiirira omuntu omutuukirivu; oboolyawo mpozzi omuntu aguma okufiirira omuntu omulungi. 
Romans5:8 Naye Katonda alaga okwagala kwe ye gyetuli, kubanga bwe twali nga tukyalina ebibi Kristo n'atufiirira." 
Romans5:9 Kale okusinga ennyo kaakano bwe twaweebwa obutuukirivu olw'omusaayi gwe, okusinga ennyo alitulokola okutuggya mu busungu bwa Katonda." 
Romans5:10 Kuba oba nga bwe twali tukyali balabe, twatabaganyizibwa ne Katonda olw'okufa kw'Omwana we, kaakano nga bwe tutabaganyiziddwa tulirokoka olw'obulamu bwe." 
Romans5:11 Era si ekyo kyokka, era naye tusanyukira mu Katonda mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, atuweesezza kaakano okutabagana okwo." 
Romans5:12 N'olwekyo ng'ekibi bwe kyajja mu nsi olw'omuntu omu, era n'okufa ne kuyingira olw'okwonoona, bwe kityo okufa ne kubuna ku bantu bonna, kubanga bonna baayonoona." 
Romans5:13 Kituufu ekibi kyaliwo mu nsi nga amateeka teganaweebwa, naye ekibi tekibalibwa, awatali mateeka." 
Romans5:14 Kyokka okufa kwafuga okuva ku Adamu okutuusa ku Musa, era ne ku abo abataasobya ng'engeri ey'okwonoona kwa Adamu, ye kye kifaananyi ky'oyo agenda okujja." 
Romans5:15 Naye ekirabo eky'obuwa tekifaanana kwonoona. Kuba oba nga olw'okwonoona kw'omu abaafa bangi, kisinga ennyo ekisa kya Katonda n'ekirabo eky'obuwa mu kisa ky'omuntu omu Yesu Kristo kyasukkirira okubuna mu bangi." 
Romans5:16 Era ekirabo eky'obuwa tekifaanana n'ekyava mu kwonoona kw'omuntu omu, kubanga omusango ogwava mu kibi ekimu kwaleeta okusingibwa omusango, naye ekirabo eky'obuwa ekiva mu kwonoona okungi kireeta okuggyibwako omusango." 
Romans5:17 Kuba oba nga olw'okwonoona kw'omu okufa kwafuga ku bw'omu, okusinga ennyo abo abaweebwa ekisa ekisukkirivu n'ekirabo eky'obuwa eky'obutuukirivu balifugira mu bulamu ku bw'oyo omu Yesu Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Kale bwe kityo ng'olw'okwonoona kw'omu omusango bwe gwasinga abantu bonna, bwe kityo n'olw'obutuukirivu bw'omu ekirabo kyali ku bantu bonna okuweesa obutuukirivu bw'obulamu." 
Romans5:19 Kuba ng'olw'obutawulira bw'omuntu omu oli abangi bwe baafuuka ababi, bwe kityo n'olw'okuwulira kw'oyo omu abangi balifuuka abatuukirivu." 
Romans5:20 Amateeka gajja, okwonoona kusukkirire; naye ekibi bwe kyasukkirira, ekisa ne kisinga okusukkirira." 
Romans5:21 Era ng'ekibi bwe kyafugira mu kufa, era n'ekisa kya Katonda bwe kityo bwe kifugira mu butuukirivu ne kituweesa obulamu obutaggwaawo, mu Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe." 
Romans6:1 Kale tunaayogera tutya? Tunyiikirenga okukola ekibi ekisa kyeyongerenga? 
Romans6:2 Nedda n'akatono! Abaafa ku kibi, tunaabeeranga tutya abalamu mu kyo nate?" 
Romans6:3 Temumanyi nti ffe fenna, abaabatizibwa okuyingira mu Kristo Yesu, era twabatizibwa kuyingira mu kufa kwe?" 
Romans6:4 Bwe twabatizibwa, twaziikibwa wamu naye, nga Kristo bwe yazuukizibwa mu bafu olw'ekitiibwa kya Kitaawe, bwe tutyo naffe tutambulirenga mu bulamu obuggya." 
Romans6:5 Kuba oba nga twagattibwa wamu naye mu kufa kwe, era tuligattibwa wamu naye ne mu kuzuukira kwe." 
Romans6:6 Tumanyi nti omuntu waffe ow'edda yakomererwa wamu naye, omubiri gw'ekibi gulyoke guzikirizibwe, tuleme okubeeranga nate abaddu b'ekibi." 
Romans6:7 Kubanga afudde aba takyafugibwa kibi. 
Romans6:8 Naye oba nga twafiira wamu ne Kristo, era tukkiriza nga tulibeera balamu wamu naye." 
Romans6:9 Tumanyi nti nga Kristo bwe yamala okuzuukizibwa mu bafu takyafa nate; okufa tekukyamufuga. 
Romans6:10 Kubanga okufa kwe yafa yafa ku kibi omulundi gumu, naye obulamu bw'alina, ali nabwo eri Katonda." 
Romans6:11 Bwe mutyo nammwe mwerowoozenga okubeera abafa ku kibi, naye abalamu eri Katonda mu Kristo Yesu." 
Romans6:12 Kale ekibi kiremenga okufuga mu mubiri gwammwe ogufa, ne mugondera okwegomba kwagwo." 
Romans6:13 Temuwangayo bitundu byammwe eri ekibi okubikozesa obutali butuukirivu; naye mwewengayo eri Katonda, ng'abalamu abaava mu bafu, n'ebitundu byammwe okubeeranga eby'okukozesa obutuukirivu eri Katonda." 
Romans6:14 Kubanga ekibi tekiibenga mukama wammwe; kubanga amateeka si ge gabafuga, wabula ekisa." 
Romans6:15 Kale tukole tutya? Tukolenga ekibi, kubanga amateeka si ge gatufuga, wabula ekisa? Nedda n'akatono!" 
Romans6:16 Temumanyi nga gwe mwewa okuba abaddu, muba baddu b'oyo gwe muwulira, oba ab'ekibi okuleeta okufa, oba ob'okuwulira okuleeta obutuukirivu?" 
Romans6:17 Naye Katonda yeebazibwe, kubanga mmwe abali abaddu b'ekibi, mwawulira n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, ebyo ebiri mu njigiriza gye mwaweebwa." 
Romans6:18 Kale bwe mwaweebwa eddembe okuva mu kibi, mwafuuka baddu b'obutuukirivu." 
Romans6:19 Njogera mu buntu olw'obunafu bw'omubiri gwammwe, kuba nga bwe mwawangayo ebitundu byammwe okuba abaddu eri obugwagwa n'eri obujeemu okujeemanga, bwe mutyo kaakano muwengayo ebitundu byammwe okubanga abaddu eri obutuukirivu okutukuzibwa." 
Romans6:20 Kubanga bwe mwabanga abaddu b'ekibi, mwabanga ba ddembe eri obutuukirivu." 
Romans6:21 Kale bibala ki bye mwalina mu biro biri eby'ebigambo ebibakwasa ensonyi kaakano? Kubanga enkomerero yaabyo kufa. 
Romans6:22 Naye kaakano bwe mwaweebwa eddembe okuva mu kibi, ne mufuuka abaddu ba Katonda, mulina ebibala byammwe olw'okutukuzibwa, n'enkomerero bulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Romans6:23 Kubanga empeera y'ekibi kwe kufa; naye ekirabo eky'obuwa ekya Katonda bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe. 
Romans7:1 Oba temumanyi, ab'oluganda kubanga ŋŋamba abategeera amateeka, ng'amateeka gafuga omuntu ng'akyali mulamu?" 
Romans7:2 Kubanga omukazi afugibwa bba ng'akyali mulamu; naye bba bw'afa, ng'asumuluddwa mu mateeka ga bba." 
Romans7:3 Kale bwe kityo bba bw'aba ng'akyali mulamu bw'anaabanga n'omusajja omulala, anaayitibwanga mwenzi, naye bba bw'afa, nga asumuluddwa eri amateeka, era bw'afumbirwa omusajja omulala olwo aba si mwenzi." 
Romans7:4 Bwe kityo, ab'oluganda, era nammwe mwafa ku mateeka olw'omubiri gwa Kristo, mubeere n'omulala, ye oyo eyazuukizibwa mu bafu, tulyoke tubalirenga Katonda ebibala." 
Romans7:5 Kubanga bwe twabanga mu mubiri, okwegomba okubi, okuliwo olw'amateeka, kwakolanga mu bitundu byaffe ne kubaliranga okufa ebibala." 
Romans7:6 Naye kaakano twasumululwa mu mateeka, bwe twafa ku ekyo ekyabanga kitufuga, tuleme okuweerereza mu nnukuta ez'edda, naye tuweerereze mu bulamu obuggya obw'Omwoyo." 
Romans7:7 Kale tunaayogera tutya? Amateeka kye kibi? Nedda, n'akatono. Naye ssanditegedde kibi, wabula mu mateeka, kubanga ssandimanye kwegomba, singa amateeka tegaayogera nti Teweegombanga:" 
Romans7:8 naye ekibi bwe kyalaba omukisa mu mateeka, kyaleeta mu nze okwegomba okwengeri zonna. Kubanga awataba mateeka ekibi nga kifudde." 
Romans7:9 Nange edda nnabanga mulamu awatali mateeka, naye ekiragiro bwe kyajja, okwonoona ne kuzuukira, nange ne nfa;" 
Romans7:10 n'ekiragiro ekyali eky'okuleeta obulamu, ekyo ne kirabika gye ndi nga eky'okuleeta okufa:" 
Romans7:11 kubanga ekibi, bwe kyalaba we kisinziira olw'ekiragiro, ne kinnimba, era olw'ekiragiro ne kinzita." 
Romans7:12 Bwe kityo amateeka matukuvu, n'ekiragiro kitukuvu, kya mazima era kirungi." 
Romans7:13 Kale ekirungi kyaleeta okufa gye ndi? Nedda n'akatono! Kyali kibi ekyaleeta okufa mu nze nga kuyita mu kirungi, mu ngeri nti ekibi ekyo kirabisibwe okuba ekibi, era okuyita mu kiragiro nfuuke omwonoonyi ddala." 
Romans7:14 Kubanga tumanyi ng'amateeka ga mwoyo; naye nze ndi wa mubiri, natundibwa okufugibwanga ekibi." 
Romans7:15 Kubanga kye nkola, ssikimanyi; kubanga kye njagala si kye nkola; naye kye nkyawa kye nkola." 
Romans7:16 Naye oba nga kye ssaagala kye nkola, nzikiriza nga amateeka amalungi." 
Romans7:17 Kale kaakano si nze nkikola nate, wabula ekibi ekituula mu nze." 
Romans7:18 Kubanga mmanyi nga mu nze, gwe mubiri gwange, temutuula kirungi; mpulira nga njagala okukola ekirungi, naye nga sisobola." 
Romans7:19 Kubanga kye njagala ekirungi ssikikola, naye kye ssaagala ekibi kye nkola." 
Romans7:20 Naye oba nga kye ssaagala kye nkola, si nze nkikola nate, wabula ekibi ekituula mu nze." 
Romans7:21 Bwe kityo ndaba etteeka nti, nze bwe njagala okukola ekirungi, ekibi kimbeera kumpi." 
Romans7:22 Kubanga nsanyukira amateeka ga Katonda mu muntu ow'omunda," 
Romans7:23 naye ndaba etteeka eddala mu bitundu byange nga lirwana n'etteeka ly'amagezi gange, era nga lindeeta mu bufuge wansi w'etteeka ly'ekibi eriri mu bitundu byange." 
Romans7:24 Nze nga ndi muntu munaku! Ani alindokola mu mubiri ogw'okufa kuno? 
Romans7:25 Nneebaza Katonda ku bwa Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe. Kale bwe kityo nze nzekka mu magezi ndi muddu wa mateeka ga Katonda, naye mu mubiri wa tteeka lya kibi." 
Romans8:1 Kale kaakano tebaliiko musango abali mu Kristo Yesu. 
Romans8:2 Kubanga etteeka ery'Omwoyo gw'obulamu mu Kristo Yesu lyanfuula ow'eddembe ne linziggya mu tteeka ery'ekibi n'ery'okufa. 
Romans8:3 Kubanga Katonda yakola amateeka kye gatayinza kukola, kubanga manafu olw'omubiri, bwe yatuma Omwana we ye mu kifaananyi ky'omubiri ogw'ekibi, alyoke asalire omusango ekibi mu mubiri." 
Romans8:4 Obutuukirivu bw'amateeka bulyoke butuukirizibwe mu ffe, abatatambula kugoberera mubiri, wabula abagoberera Omwoyo." 
Romans8:5 Kubanga abagoberera omubiri, balowooza bya mubiri, naye abagoberera Omwoyo, bagoberera bya Mwoyo." 
Romans8:6 Kubanga okulowooza kw'omubiri kwe kufa; naye okulowooza kw'Omwoyo bwe bulamu n'emirembe. 
Romans8:7 kubanga okulowooza kw'omubiri bwe bulabe eri Katonda; kubanga tegufugibwa mateeka ga Katonda, kubanga n'okuyinza tegaguyinza:" 
Romans8:8 n'abo abali mu mubiri tebayinza kusanyusa Katonda. 
Romans8:9 Naye mmwe temuli mu mubiri, wabula mu Mwoyo, bwaba nga ddala Omwoyo gwa Katonda atuula mu mmwe. Naye omuntu bw'ataba na Mwoyo gwa Kristo, oyo si wuwe." 
Romans8:10 Naye oba nga Kristo ali mu mmwe, emibiri gyammwe ne bwe gifa olw'ekibi; emyoyo gyammwe giba miramu olw'obutuukirivu." 
Romans8:11 Naye oba nga Omwoyo gw'oyo eyazuukiza Yesu mu bafu atuula mu mmwe, oyo eyazuukiza Kristo Yesu mu bafu, era n'emibiri gyammwe egifa aligifuula emiramu ku bw'Omwoyo gwe atuula mu mmwe." 
Romans8:12 Kale nno, ab'oluganda, tulina ebbanja: omubiri si gwe gutubanja, okugobereranga omubiri," 
Romans8:13 kubanga bwe munaagobereranga omubiri, mugenda kufa; naye bwe munaafiisanga ebikolwa by'omubiri olw'Omwoyo, muliba balamu." 
Romans8:14 Kubanga bonna abakulemberwa Omwoyo gwa Katonda, abo be baana ba Katonda." 
Romans8:15 Kubanga temwaweebwa nate Mwoyo gwa buddu okutya, naye mwaweebwa Omwoyo ow'okufuuka abaana, gwe tuukoowoola nti, “Aba! Kitaffe!”" 
Romans8:16 Omwoyo yennyini wamu n'Omwoyo gwaffe ategeeza nga tuli baana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:17 Nga bwe tuli abaana, era tuli basika, abasika ba Katonda, era abasikira awamu ne Kristo; bwe tubonaabonera awamu, era tulyoke tuweerwe wamu ekitiibwa." 
Romans8:18 Kubanga ngera ng'okubonaabona okw'omu biro bya kaakati, tekwenkanankana na kitiibwa ekigenda okutubikkulirwa." 
Romans8:19 Kubanga ebitonde byonna bitunuula nga byesunga okubikkulirwa kw'abaana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:20 Kubanga ebitonde biringa ebitalina mugaso, si lwa kwagala kwabyo wabula ku bw'oyo eyayagala bibeere bwe bityo mu kusuubira." 
Romans8:21 Kubanga era n'ebitonde byennyini nabyo biriweebwa eddembe okuva mu kufugibwa okuvunda okuyingira mu ddembe ery'ekitiibwa ky'abaana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:22 Tumanyi ng'ebitonde byonna bisinda era birumirwa wamu okutuusa kaakano. 
Romans8:23 Era si bitonde byokka, naye era naffe, abalina ebibala ebibereberye eby'Omwoyo, era naffe tusinda munda yaffe, nga tulindirira okufuuka abaana, kwe kununulibwa kw'omubiri gwaffe." 
Romans8:24 Kubanga twalokoka lwa kusuubira, naye ekisuubirwa ekirabika si kusuubira, kubanga ani asuubira ky'alabako?" 
Romans8:25 Naye bwe tusuubira kye tutalabako, tukirindirira n'okugumiikiriza." 
Romans8:26 Era bwe kityo Omwoyo atubeera mu bunafu bwaffe; kubanga tetumanyi kusaba nga bwe kitugwanira, naye Omwoyo yennyini atwegayiririra n'okusinda okutayogerekeka;" 
Romans8:27 naye akebera emitima amanyi okulowooza kw'Omwoyo bwe kuli, kubanga awolereza abatukuvu nga Katonda bw'ayagala." 
Romans8:28 Era tumanyi nti eri abo abaagala Katonda era abayitibwa ng'okuteesa kwe bwe kuli, ebintu byonna abibakolera wamu olw'obulungi." 
Romans8:29 Kubanga abo bonna be yamanya edda, era yabaawula dda okufaananyizibwa n'engeri y'Omwana we, abeerenga omubereberye mu b'oluganda abangi." 
Romans8:30 Era abo be yayawula edda, abo era yabayita, era be yayita, yabawa obutuukirivu, era be yawa obutuukirivu, ekitiibwa." 
Romans8:31 Kale tunaayogera tutya ku ebyo? Katonda bw'abeera ku lwaffe, omulabe waffe y'ani?" 
Romans8:32 Ataagaana Mwana we ye, naye n'amuwaayo ku lwaffe fenna, era talitugabira bintu byonna wamu naye?" 
Romans8:33 Ani aliroopa abalonde ba Katonda? Katonda abawa obutuukirivu; 
Romans8:34 ani alibasalira omusango? Kristo Yesu eyafa, oba okusinga eyazuukira, ali ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda, era atuwolereza." 
Romans8:35 Ani alitwawukanya n'okwagala kwa Kristo? Kulaba nnaku, oba kulumwa, oba kuyigganyizibwa, oba njala, oba kuba bwereere, oba kabi, oba kitala?" 
Romans8:36 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Tuttibwa obudde okuziba, okutulanga ggwe: Twabalibwa ng'endiga ez'okusalibwa.”" 
Romans8:37 Naye mu ebyo byonna tuwangudde n'okukirawo ku bw'oyo eyatwagala. 
Romans8:38 Kubanga ntegeeredde ddala nga newakubadde okufa, newakubadde obulamu, newakubadde bamalayika, newakubadde abafuga, newakubadde ebiriwo, newakubadde ebigenda okubaawo, newakubadde amaanyi," 
Romans8:39 newakubadde obugulumivu, newakubadde okugenda wansi, newakubadde ekitonde kyonna ekirala, tebiiyinzenga kutwawukanya na kwagala kwa Katonda okuli mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
Romans9:1 Njogera amazima mu Kristo, sirimba, omwoyo gwange ye mujulirwa mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu," 
Romans9:2 nga nnina ennaku nnyingi n'okulumwa okutamala mu mutima gwange. 
Romans9:3 Kubanga nnandyagadde nze mwene okukolimirwa Kristo olwa baganda bange, ab'ekika kyange mu mubiri." 
Romans9:4 Aba Isiraeri; abaweebwa okufuuka abaana, n'ekitiibwa, n'endagaano, n'okuweebwa amateeka, n'okuweerezanga Katonda, n'ebyasuubizibwa;" 
Romans9:5 abalina bajjajjaabo, era omwava Kristo mu mubiri, afuga byonna, Katonda atenderezebwa emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Romans9:6 Naye si kubanga ekigambo kya Katonda kyavaawo. Kubanga abava mu Isiraeri, si be Baisiraeri bonna," 
Romans9:7 so si kubanga lye zzadde lya Ibulayimu, kyebaava babeera abaana bonna; naye, “Mu Isaaka ezzadde lyo mwe linaayitirwanga.”" 
Romans9:8 Kwe kugamba nti, abaana ab'omubiri, abo si be baana ba Katonda; naye abaana b'okusuubiza be babalibwa okuba ezzadde." 
Romans9:9 Kubanga ekigambo kino kye ky'okusuubiza, nti, “Ng'ebiro ebyo bwe biri ndijja, ne Saala aliba n'omwana.”" 
Romans9:10 Naye si ekyo kyokka; era naye ne Lebbeeka bwe yalina olubuto olw'omu, Isaaka jjajjaffe," 
Romans9:11 kubanga nga tebannazaalibwa, so nga tebannakola kirungi oba kibi, okuteesa kwa Katonda mu kulonda kulyoke kunywere, si lwa bikolwa, wabula ku bw'oyo ayita," 
Romans9:12 n'agambibwa nti, “Omukulu aliba muddu wa muto.”" 
Romans9:13 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Yakobo n'amwagala, naye Essawu n'amukyawa.”" 
Romans9:14 Kale tunaayogera tutya? Obutali butuukirivu buli eri Katonda? Nedda, n'akatono." 
Romans9:15 Kubanga agamba Musa nti, “Ndisaasira gwe ndisaasira, era ndikwatirwa ekisa gwe ndikwatirwa ekisa.”" 
Romans9:16 Kale bwe kityo si lwa kwagala kwa muntu oba okufuba kwe, naye lwa kusaasira kwa Katonda." 
Romans9:17 Kubanga ebyawandiikibwa bigamba Falaawo nti, “Kyenvudde nkulekawo ggwe, ndyoke nkulage amaanyi gange, era erinnya lyange liryoke libuulirwenga mu nsi zonna.”" 
Romans9:18 Kale bwe kityo asaasira gw'ayagala okusaasira, era akakanyaza gw'ayagala okukakanyaza." 
Romans9:19 Kale onoŋŋamba nti, “Katonda kiki ekimunnenyesa nate? Kubanga ani aziyiza by'ayagala?”" 
Romans9:20 Naye ekisinga, ggwe omuntu, ggwe ani awakana ne Katonda? Ekibumbe kirigamba eyakibumba nti, “Kiki ekyakumumbisa bw'oti?”" 
Romans9:21 Oba omubumbi talina buyinza ku bbumba, mu kitole ekimu okubumba mu ekibya eky'ekitiibwa, ne mu kirala ekitali kya kitiibwa?" 
Romans9:22 Kale kiki, oba nga Katonda bwe yayagala okulaga obusungu bwe, n'okumanyisa obuyinza bwe, yagumiikiriza n'okulindirira ennyo ebibya eby'obusungu ebyateekerwateekerwa okuzikirira," 
Romans9:23 alyoke amanyise obugagga obw'ekitiibwa kye ku bibya eby'okusaasirwa, bye yateekerateekera edda ekitiibwa," 
Romans9:24 ebibya ebyo ye ffe, n'okuyita be yayita, si mu Bayudaaya bokka, era naye ne mu b'amawanga?" 
Romans9:25 Era nga bw'ayogera mu Koseya nti, “Abataali abantu bange, ‘ndibayita abantu bange;’ Era n'oyo ataayagalwa, ndimuyita, ‘ayagaliddwa.’ ”" 
Romans9:26 “Awo mu kifo kye baagambirwamu nti, ‘Mmwe temuli bantu bange,’ Mwe baliyitirwa, ‘abaana ba Katonda omulamu.’ ”" 
Romans9:27 Era Isaaya ayogerera waggulu ebya Isiraeri nti, “Newakubadde Omuwendo gw'abaana ba Isiraeri oba guliba ng'omusenyu gw'ennyanja, naye kitundu butundu kye kirirokoka;" 
Romans9:28 kubanga Mukama alikola ekigambo kye ku nsi, ng'akituukiriza era ng'akisalako.”" 
Romans9:29 Era nga Isaaya bwe yasooka okwogera nti, “Singa Mukama Ow'eggye teyatulekerawo zzadde, Twandibadde nga Sodomu, era twandifaananye nga Ggomola.”" 
Romans9:30 Kale tunaayogera tutya? Nti ab'amawanga, abataagobereranga butuukirivu, baatuuka ku butuukirivu, bwe butuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza;" 
Romans9:31 naye Isiraeri, mu kugobereranga amateeka ag'obutuukirivu, teyatuuka ku mateeka gali." 
Romans9:32 Lwa ki? Kubanga tebaabugobereranga nga basinziira mu kukkiriza, wabula nga mu bikolwa. Beesittala ku jjinja eryo eryesittalwako," 
Romans9:33 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Laba, nteeka mu Sayuuni ejjinja eryesittalwako n'olwazi olulibasuula; Era akkiriza oyo talikwasibwa nsonyi.”" 
Romans10:1 Ab'oluganda, kye njagala mu mutima gwange era kye nsaba Katonda ku lwabwe kye kino, balokoke." 
Romans10:2 Kubanga mbategeeza nga balina okunyiikiririra Katonda, naye si mu kutegeera." 
Romans10:3 Kubanga bwe batamanya butuukirivu bwa Katonda, era bwe bagezaako okutereeza obutuukirivu bwabwe bo bennyini, tebagondera butuukirivu bwa Katonda." 
Romans10:4 Kubanga Kristo ye nkomerero y'amateeka, olw'okuweesa obutuukirivu buli akkiriza." 
Romans10:5 Kubanga Musa awandiika nti, omuntu akola obutuukirivu obuva mu mateeka aliba mulamu mu bwo." 
Romans10:6 Naye obutuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza bwogera bwe buti nti, Toyogeranga mu mutima gwo nti, “Ani alirinnya mu ggulu?” Okwo kwe kuleeta Kristo wansi;" 
Romans10:7 newakubadde nti, “Ani alikka emagombe?” Okwo kwe kulinnyisa Kristo okuva mu bafu." 
Romans10:8 Naye bwogera butya? Nti, Ekigambo kiri kumpi naawe, mu kamwa ko, ne mu mutima gwo, kye kigambo eky'okukkiriza kye tubuulira;" 
Romans10:9 kubanga bw'oyatula Yesu nga ye Mukama n'akamwa ko, n'okkiriza mu mutima gwo nti Katonda yamuzuukiza mu bafu, olirokoka." 
Romans10:10 Kubanga omuntu akkiriza na mutima okuweebwa obutuukirivu, era ayatula na kamwa ke okulokoka." 
Romans10:11 Kubanga ebyawandiikibwa byogera nti, “Buli amukkiriza talikwasibwa nsonyi.”" 
Romans10:12 Kubanga tewali njawulo ya Muyudaaya na Muyonaani; Mukama waabwe bonna ye omu, era awa obugagga eri abo bonna abamukaabirira." 
Romans10:13 Kubanga, buli alikoowoola erinnya lya Mukama alirokoka." 
Romans10:14 Naye balikoowoola batya gwe batannakkiriza? Era balikkiriza batya gwe batannawulirako? Era baliwulira batya awatali abuulira? 
Romans10:15 Era balibuulira batya nga tebatumiddwa? Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Ebigere byabwe nga birungi abo abaleeta ebigambo ebirungi!”" 
Romans10:16 Naye bonna tebaagondera Njiri. Kubanga Isaaya ayogera nti, “Mukama, ani eyakkiriza ekigambo kyaffe?”" 
Romans10:17 Kale okukkiriza kuva mw'ekyo ekiwuliddwa, n'ekiwuliddwa kiva mu kubuulira Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Naye mbuuza, Tebawuliranga? Weewaawo, ddala, baawulira Kubanga, “Eddoboozi lyabwe lyabuna mu nsi zonna, N'ebigambo byabwe okutuuka ku nkomerero z'ensi.”" 
Romans10:19 Era nate mbuuza, Isiraeri tategeeranga? Musa ye yasooka okwogera nti, “Ndibakwasa obuggya eri abo abatali ggwanga,” Eri eggwanga eritalina magezi ndibasunguwaza." 
Romans10:20 Era Isaaya aguma nnyo n'ayogera nti, “Navumbulibwa abo abatannoonyanga,” Nneeraga eri abo abatambuulirizangako." 
Romans10:21 Naye eri Isiraeri ayogera nti, “Obudde okuziba nnagololera emikono gyange abantu abajeemu era abatawulira.”" 
Romans11:1 Kale mbuuza, Katonda yeegaana abantu be? Nedda! n'akatono. Nange kennyini ndi Muisiraeri, wa mu zzadde lya Ibulayimu, wa mu kika kya Benyamini." 
Romans11:2 Katonda tagaananga bantu be be yamanya edda. Oba temumanyi ebyawandiikibwa ku Eriya bwe byogera, ku ngeri gye yasaba Katonda ku Baisiraeri?" 
Romans11:3 “Mukama, basse bannabbi bo, ne baazikiriza ebyoto byo, era nze nsigaddewo nzekka, era banoonya obulamu bwange.”" 
Romans11:4 Naye Katonda yamuddamu nti, “Nze nneekumidde abasajja kasanvu (7,000), abatafukaamiriranga Baali.”" 
Romans11:5 Kale bwe kityo era ne mu biro bino waliwo ekitundu ekyafikkawo abaalondebwa olw'ekisa. 
Romans11:6 Naye bwe kibanga lwa kisa, olwo kiba nti si lwa bikolwa; kuba olwo ekisa kiba tekikyali kisa nate." 
Romans11:7 Kale tukole tutya? Isiraeri yalemwa okufuna kye yali anoonya, abaalondebwa baakiraba, ate abalala ne bakakanyazibwa," 
Romans11:8 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Katonda yabawa omwoyo ogw'okubongoota, amaaso ag'obutalaba, n'amatu ag'obutawulira, okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero.”" 
Romans11:9 Era Dawudi ayogera nti, Emmeeza yaabwe ebafuukire akakunizo n'ekigu, N'enkonge, n'empeera gyebali;" 
Romans11:10 Amaaso gaabwe gasiikirizibwe obutalaba, Era obakutamyenga emigongo gyabwe emirembe gyonna." 
Romans11:11 Kambuuze, Baamala kwesittala ne balyoka bagwa? Nedda, nakatono. Naye olw'okwonoona kwabwe obulokozi kyebwava bujja eri ab'amawanga, aba Isiraeri bakwatibwe obuggya." 
Romans11:12 Naye oba ng'okwonoona kwabwe kutegeeza bugagga bw'ansi, n'okulemwa kwabwe kutegeeza bugagga eri ab'amawanga; okutuukirira kwabwe tekulisinga nnyo?" 
Romans11:13 Kaakano njogera nammwe ab'amawanga. Kale kubanga nze ndi mutume wa b'amawanga, ngulumiza okuweereza kwange," 
Romans11:14 ndyoke nkwase Bayudaaya bannange obuggya, bwentyo ndokole abamu mu bo." 
Romans11:15 Kuba oba ng'okuganibwa kwabwe kutegeeza kutabaganya ensi, okusembezebwa kwabwe kutegeeza ki, okuggyako obulamu okuva mu bafu?" 
Romans11:16 Era ebibala ebibereberye bwe biba ebitukuvu, era n'ekitole kiba kitukuvu; era ekikolo bwe kiba ekitukuvu, era n'amatabi gaba matukuvu." 
Romans11:17 Naye oba ng'amatabi agamu gaawogolebwako, naawe, eyali omuzeyituuni ogw'omu nsiko, n'osimbibwa mu kifo kyago, ogabane ku bugagga obw'omuzeyituuni;" 
Romans11:18 teweenyumiririzanga ku matabi ago. Bw'oba weenyumiriza, jjukira nti si ggwe owanirira ekikolo, naye ekikolo kye kiwanirira ggwe." 
Romans11:19 Kale onooyogera nti, “Amatabi gaawogolwako nze nsobole okusimbibwako.”" 
Romans11:20 Weewaawo; gaawogolwako lwa butakkiriza, naawe onywedde lwa kukkiriza. Teweegulumizanga, naye tyanga." 
Romans11:21 Kuba oba nga Katonda teyasaasira matabi ga buzaaliranwa, era naawe talikusaasira." 
Romans11:22 Kale laba obulungi n'obukambwe bwa Katonda, eri abaagwa, bukambwe; naye eri ggwe bulungi bwa Katonda, bw'onoobeereranga mu bulungi bwe, naye bw'otoobeererenga mu bwo, naawe oliwogolwako." 
Romans11:23 Era nabo, bwe bataaliremera mu butakkiriza bwabwe baliyungibwa ku kikolo, kubanga Katonda ayinza okubayungako nate." 
Romans11:24 Kuba oba nga ggwe wawogolwa ku muzeyituuni ogwali ogw'omu nsiko mu buzaaliranwa, n'osimbibwa mu muzeyituuni omulungi obutagoberera buzaaliranwa, abo, ab'obuzaaliranwa, tebalisinga nnyo kusimbibwa mu muzeyituuni gwabwe bo?" 
Romans11:25 Kubanga ssaagala mmwe, ab'oluganda, obutamanya kyama kino, mulemenga okubeera ab'amagezi mu maaso gammwe mwekka, ng'obukakanyavu bwabeera ku Baisiraeri, okutuusa ab'amawanga lwe balituuka ku kutuukirira kwonna;" 
Romans11:26 era bwe kityo Abaisiraeri bonna balirokoka, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Omununuzi aliva mu Sayuuni; Aliggyawo obutatya Katonda mu Yakobo.”" 
Romans11:27 “Era eno ye ndagaano yange nabo, bwe ndibaggyako ebibi byabwe.”" 
Romans11:28 Okusinziira mu Njiri, be balabe ba Katonda ku lwammwe; naye okusinziira mu kulondebwa, baagalwa ku lwa bajjajjaabwe." 
Romans11:29 Kubanga ebirabo n'okuyita kwa Katonda tebyejjusibwa. 
Romans11:30 Era nga mmwe edda bwe mwali abajeemu eri Katonda, naye kaakati musaasiddwa olw'obujeemu bwabwe." 
Romans11:31 Bwe batyo nabo kaakati bajeemu, balyoke basaasirwe nga mmwe bwe mwasaasirwa." 
Romans11:32 Kubanga Katonda yasiba abantu bonna mu bujeemu, alyoke asaasire bonna." 
Romans11:33 Obuziba bw'obugagga obw'amagezi n'obw'okumanya kwa Katonda tomanyi bwe buli! emisango gye nga tegikeberekeka, n'amakubo ge nga tegekkaanyizika!" 
Romans11:34 “Kubanga ani eyali ategedde ebirowoozo bya Mukama? Oba ani eyali amuwadde amagezi?” 
Romans11:35 “Oba ani eyali amuwadde ekirabo alyoke amuddizewo?” 
Romans11:36 Kubanga byonna biva gy'ali, era biyita gy'ali, era bituuka gy'ali. Ekitiibwa kibeerenga gy'ali emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Romans12:1 Kyenvudde mbeegayirira, ab'oluganda, olw'okusaasira kwa Katonda, okuwangayo emibiri gyammwe, ssaddaaka ennamu, entukuvu, esanyusa Katonda, kwe kuweereza kwammwe okw'amagezi." 
Romans12:2 So temufaananyizibwanga ng'emirembe gino: naye mukyusibwenga olw'okufuula amagezi gammwe amaggya, mulyoke mutegeere ebyo Katonda by'ayagala, ebirungi, ebisanyusa era ebituufu." 
Romans12:3 Olw'ekisa kye nnaweebwa, mbeegayirira buli omu ku mmwe, alemenga okwerowooza okusinga bwe kimugwanidde okulowooza; naye okulowoozanga nga yeegendereza, nga Katonda bwe yagabira buli muntu ekigera ky'okukkiriza." 
Romans12:4 Kuba nga bwe tulina ebitundu ebingi mu mubiri ogumu, naye ebitundu byonna tebirina mulimu gumu," 
Romans12:5 bwe kityo ffe abangi tuli omubiri gumu mu Kristo, na buli muntu tuli ebitundu bya bannaffe fekka na fekka." 
Romans12:6 Era bwe tulina ebirabo ebitenkanankana ng'ekisa kye twaweebwa bwe kiri, tubikozesenga bwe tutyo, oba bunnabbi, tubuulirenga mu kigera ky'okukkiriza kwaffe;" 
Romans12:7 oba kuweereza, tunyiikirenga mu kuweereza kwaffe; oba ayigiriza, anyiikirenga mu kuyigiriza kwe." 
Romans12:8 Abuulirira, anyiikirenga mu kubuulirira kwe; agaba, agabenga awatali bukuusa; afuga afugenga n'okunyiikira; n'oyo asaasira, asaasirenga n'essanyu." 
Romans12:9 Okwagala kubeerenga kwa mazima. Mukyawenga obubi, munywererenga ku kirungi." 
Romans12:10 Mwagalanenga n'okwagala okw'ab'oluganda; nga musukirira mu kuwaŋŋana ekitiibwa. 
Romans12:11 Mubeere banyiikivu si bagayaavu; nga muli basanyufu mu mwoyo; nga muweereza Mukama waffe. 
Romans12:12 Musanyukenga mu kusuubira; mugumiikirizenga mu bunaku; munyiikirenga mu kusaba. 
Romans12:13 Mugabirenga abatukuvu bye beetaaga; mwanirizenga abagenyi. 
Romans12:14 Musabirenga ababayigganya; mubasabirenga, so temukolimanga." 
Romans12:15 Musanyukirenga wamu n'abo abasanyuka; mukaabirenga wamu n'abo abakaaba. 
Romans12:16 Mubeerenga mu mirembe mwekka na mwekka. Temwegulumizanga, naye mukolaganenga n'abo abatalina bukulu. Temubanga ba magezi mu maaso gammwe mwekka." 
Romans12:17 Temuwalananga muntu kibi olw'ekibi. Mwetegekenga okukola ebirungi mu maaso g'abantu bonna.
