Romans12:18 Oba nga kiyinzika, ku luuyi lwammwe, mutabaganenga n'abantu bonna." 
Romans12:19 Temuwalananga mwekka ggwanga, abaagalwa, naye waakiri musegulirenga obusungu; kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Okuwalana kwange; nze ndisasula, bw'ayogera Mukama.”" 
Romans12:20 Naye “omulabe wo bw'alumwanga enjala, muliisenga; bw'alumwanga ennyonta, muwenga eky'okunywa; kubanga bw'okola bw'otyo, olimukumira amanda g'omuliro ku mutwe gwe.”" 
Romans12:21 Towangulwanga bubi, naye wangulanga obubi olw'obulungi." 
Romans13:1 Buli muntu awulirenga abakulu abafuga, kubanga tewali bukulu butava eri Katonda; n'abakulu abaliwo baateekebwawo Katonda." 
Romans13:2 Awakanya obukulu kyava awakanya okulagira kwa Katonda, era ababawakanya balyereetaako omusango bo bokka." 
Romans13:3 Kubanga abafuga si ba kutiisa abo abakola ebirungi, wabula abo abakola ebibi. Era oyagala obutatya mukulu? Kola bulungi, alikusiima," 
Romans13:4 kubanga ye muweereza wa Katonda eri ggwe olw'obulungi. Naye bw'okola obubi, tya; kubanga takwatira bwereere kitala; kubanga ye muweereza wa Katonda, awalana obusungu bwe ku oyo akola obubi." 
Romans13:5 Kyekivudde kibagwanira okuwulira, si lwa kwewala busungu bwa Katonda bwokka, naye era ne ku lw'omwoyo gwammwe." 
Romans13:6 Era kyemuva muwa omusolo; kubanga be baweereza ba Katonda, nga banyiikirira mu mulimu ogwo." 
Romans13:7 Musasulenga bonna amabanja gaabwe, ab'omusolo musolo; ab'empooza mpooza; ab'okutiibwa kutya; n'ab'ekitiibwa kitiibwa." 
Romans13:8 Temubeeranga na bbanja lyonna eri omuntu yenna, wabula okwagalananga; kubanga ayagala muntu munne, ng'atuukirizza amateeka." 
Romans13:9 Kubanga amateeka gano nti, “Toyendanga, tottanga, tobbanga, teweegombanga,” n'etteeka eddala lyonna, ligattiddwa mu kino, nti, “Yagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala wekka.”" 
Romans13:10 Okwagala tekukola bubi muntu munne; okwagala kyekuva kutuukiriza amateeka. 
Romans13:11 Era mukolenga bwe mutyo, kubanga mumanyi ebiro, ng'obudde butuuse kaakano mmwe okuzuukuka mu tulo; kubanga kaakano obulokozi bwaffe buli kumpi okusinga we twakkiririza." 
Romans13:12 Ekiro kiyise, obudde bunaatera okukya, kale twambule ebikolwa eby'ekizikiza, era twambale eby'okulwanyisa eby'omusana." 
Romans13:13 Tutambulenga nga tuwoomye nga abali mu musana, si mu binyumu ne mu mbaga ez'okutamiiranga, si mu bwenzi n'obukaba, si mu kuyombanga n'obuggya." 
Romans13:14 Naye mwambale Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, so temutegekeranga mubiri, olw'okwegomba." 
Romans14:1 Naye atali munywevu mu kukkiriza mumusembezenga, naye temumusalira musango olw'ensonga ezibuusibwabuusibwa." 
Romans14:2 Omulala akkiriza n'okulya n'alya byonna, naye atali munywevu alya nva zokka." 
Romans14:3 Alya tanyoomanga atalya; era atalya tasaliranga musango alya, kubanga Katonda yamusembeza." 
Romans14:4 Ggwe ani asalira omusango omuweereza wa beene? Eri mukama we yokka gyayinza okuyimiririra oba okugwa. Naye aliyimirira; kubanga Mukama waffe ayinza okumuyimiriza. 
Romans14:5 Omuntu omulala alowooza olunaku olumu okusinga olulala, omulala alowooza ennaku zonna okwenkanankana. Buli muntu ategeererenga ddala mu magezi ge yekka." 
Romans14:6 Alowooza olunaku, alulowooza ku bwa Mukama waffe; n'oyo alya, alya ku bwa Mukama waffe, kubanga yeebaza Katonda; n'oyo atalya, talya ku bwa Mukama waffe, era yeebaza Katonda." 
Romans14:7 Kubanga tewali muntu mu ffe eyeebeerera omulamu ku bubwe yekka, era tewali eyeefiira ku bubwe yekka." 
Romans14:8 Kubanga bwe tubeera abalamu, tuba balamu ku bwa Mukama waffe; oba bwe tufa, tufa ku bwa Mukama waffe, kale, bwe tuba abalamu, oba bwe tufa, tuba ba Mukama waffe." 
Romans14:9 Kubanga Kristo kyeyava afa n'abeera omulamu, alyoke abeerenga Mukama w'abafu era n'abalamu." 
Romans14:10 Naye ggwe kiki ekikusaliza omusango muganda wo? Oba naawe kiki ekikunyoomesa muganda wo? Kubanga fenna tuliyimirira mu maaso g'entebe ey'emisango eya Katonda. 
Romans14:11 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Nga bwe ndi omulamu, bw'ayogera Mukama, buli vviivi lirinfukaamirira, Na buli lulimi lulitendereza Katonda.”" 
Romans14:12 Kale bwe kityo buli muntu mu ffe alibalirira omuwendo gwe yekka eri Katonda. 
Romans14:13 Kale tulemenga okusalira bannaffe emisango nate fekka na fekka, naye waakiri musale omusango guno, obutaleeteranga wa luganda ekyesittaza oba enkonge." 
Romans14:14 Mmanyi era ntegeeredde ddala mu Mukama waffe Yesu, nga tewali kintu kya muzizo mu buwangwa bwakyo; wabula eri oyo akirowooza nga kya muzizo, kiba kya muzizo." 
Romans14:15 Kuba oba nga muganda wo anakuwala olw'emmere, nga tokyatambulira mu kwagala. Tomuzikirizanga lwa mmere yo oyo Kristo gwe yafiirira." 
Romans14:16 Kale ekirungi kyammwe kiremenga okuvumibwa," 
Romans14:17 kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda si kwe kulya n'okunywa, wabula butuukirivu na mirembe na ssanyu mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Romans14:18 Kubanga aweereza Kristo bw'ati asanyusa nnyo Katonda, n'abantu bamusiima." 
Romans14:19 Kale bwe kityo tugobererenga eby'emirembe, n'eby'okuzimbagananga fekka na fekka." 
Romans14:20 Toyonoonanga mulimu gwa Katonda lwa mmere. Byonna birungi; naye kinaabanga kibi eri oyo alya nga yeesittala. 
Romans14:21 Kirungi obutalyanga nnyama newakubadde okunywanga omwenge, newakubadde okukolanga byonna ebyesittazza muganda wo oba ebimunyiiza oba ebimunafuya." 
Romans14:22 Okukkiriza kw'olina, beeranga nakwo wekka mu maaso ga Katonda. Oyo alina omukisa ateesalira musango mu kigambo ky'akakasa." 
Romans14:23 Naye oyo abuusabuusa azza omusango bw'alya, kubanga talya mu kukkiriza; na buli ekitava mu kukkiriza, kye kibi." 
Romans15:1 Era ffe abalina amaanyi kitugwanidde okwetikkanga obunafu bw'abo abatalina maanyi, so si kwesanyusanga fekka." 
Romans15:2 Buli muntu mu ffe asanyusenga munne mu bulungi olw'okuzimba. 
Romans15:3 Kubanga era ne Kristo teyeesanyusanga yekka; naye, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa, nti, “Ebivume byabwe abaakuvuma byagwa ku nze.”" 
Romans15:4 Kubanga byonna ebyawandiikibwa edda, byawandiikibwa kutuyigiriza ffe, bwe tutyo mu kugumiikiriza n'olw'okuzibwamu amaanyi ebyawandiikibwa tubeerenga ne ssuubi." 
Romans15:5 Era Katonda w'okugumiikiriza n'okusanyusa abawe mmwe okulowoozanga obumu mwekka na mwekka mu ngeri ya Kristo Yesu," 
Romans15:6 mulyoke muwenga ekitiibwa Katonda, Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'omwoyo ogumu n'eddoboozi limu." 
Romans15:7 Kale musembezaganyenga mwekka na mwekka, nga Kristo bwe yabasembeza mmwe, olw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda." 
Romans15:8 Kubanga njogera nti Kristo yali muweereza w'abakomole olw'amazima ga Katonda, okunyweza ebyasuubizibwa eri bajjajja," 
Romans15:9 era ab'amawanga balyoke bawenga Katonda ekitiibwa olw'okusaasira; nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Kyenaavanga nkutendereza mu b'amawanga, Era nnaayimbanga ku linnya lyo.”" 
Romans15:10 Era nate ayogera nti, “Musanyukenga, mmwe ab'amawanga, wamu n'abantu be.”" 
Romans15:11 Era nate nti, “Mutenderezenga Mukama, mmwe ab'amawanga mwenna; Era ebika byonna bimutenderezenga.”" 
Romans15:12 Era nate Isaaya ayogera nti, “Waliba ekikolo kya Yese, Era ayimirira okufuga ab'amawanga; Mu ye mwe mulibeera essuubi ly'ab'amawanga.”" 
Romans15:13 Era Katonda ow'okusuubirwa abajjuze mmwe essanyu lyonna n'emirembe olw'okukkiriza, mmwe musukkirirenga mu kusuubira, mu maanyi ag'Omwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Romans15:14 Era nange nze ntegeeredde ddala ebyammwe, baganda bange, nga nammwe mujjudde obulungi, mujjudde okutegeera kwonna, nga muyinza n'okubuuliriragananga mwekka na mwekka." 
Romans15:15 Naye nneeyongedde okuguma katono okubawandiikira, nga mbajjukiza nate, olw'ekisa kye nnaweebwa Katonda," 
Romans15:16 nze okubeeranga omuweereza wa Kristo Yesu eri ab'amawanga nga mpereeza mu bwa kabona Enjiri ya Katonda, ssaddaaka y'ab'amawanga eryoke esiimibwe ng'etukuzibwa Omwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Romans15:17 Kale okwenyumiriza ndi nakwo mu Kristo Yesu mu bya Katonda. 
Romans15:18 Kubanga siryaŋŋaanga kwogera kigambo kyonna wabula Kristo bye yankoza, olw'okuwulira kw'ab'amawanga, mu kigambo ne mu kikolwa," 
Romans15:19 mu maanyi g'obubonero n'eby'amagero, mu maanyi ag'Omwoyo Omutukuvu; bwe kityo okuva mu Yerusaalemi n'okwetooloola okutuuka mu Iruliko, n'abuulira Enjiri ya Kristo." 
Romans15:20 Bwentyo nduubirira okubuuliranga Enjiri, awo erinnya lya Kristo we litayogerwangako, nnemenga okuzimba ku musingi gw'omuntu omulala;" 
Romans15:21 naye nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Baliraba abatabuulirwanga bigambo bye,” Era abatamuwulirangako balitegeera." 
Romans15:22 Era kyennavanga nziyizibwa emirundi emingi okujja gye muli: 
Romans15:23 naye kaakati, kubanga sikyalina kitundu kya kukoleramu mu nsi zino, era kubanga okuva mu myaka mingi nnali njagala okujja gye muli," 
Romans15:24 nsuubira okubalabako nga ŋŋenda mu Esupaniya, era n'okunyamba mu lugendo olwo, bwe ndimala okubalabako n'okusanyukirako awamu nammwe." 
Romans15:25 Naye kaakati ŋŋenda e Yerusaalemi, okutwalira abatukuvu obuyambi." 
Romans15:26 Kubanga ab'e Makedoni n'ab'e Akaya baasiima okuwaayo ebintu eri abaavu ab'omu batukuvu abali e Yerusaalemi. 
Romans15:27 Baasiima okukikola; era ddala balina ebbanja gyebali, kuba oba ng'ab'amawanga bagabana ku mikisa gy'Abayudaaya egy'omwoyo, nabo basaana okugabana nabo ebintu eby'omubiri." 
Romans15:28 Kale bwe ndimala ekyo, bwe ndibakwasiza ddala ebyo ebyampeebwa, ndivaayo, ne mpitira ewammwe okugenda e Supaniya." 
Romans15:29 Era mmanyi nga bwe ndijja gye muli ndijja n'omukisa gwa Kristo nga gutuukiridde. 
Romans15:30 Era mbeegayiridde, ab'oluganda, ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'olw'okwagala kw'Omwoyo, okufubiranga awamu nange mu kunsabira Katonda;" 
Romans15:31 ndyoke mpone mu abo abatawulira mu Buyudaaya, n'okuweereza kwange kwe ntwala e Yerusaalemi kusiimibwe abatukuvu." 
Romans15:32 Olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ndyoke njije gye muli n'essanyu, mpummulire wamu nammwe." 
Romans15:33 Era Katonda ow'emirembe abeerenga nammwe mwenna. Amiina. 
Romans16:1 Mbanjulira Foyibe mwannyinaffe, omuweereza w'ekkanisa ey'omu Kenkereya," 
Romans16:2 mulyoke mumwanirize mu Mukama waffe, nga bwe kigwanidde abatukuvu, era mumuyambe mu kigambo kyonna ky'alyetaaga okuva gye muli, kubanga naye yennyini yayamba bangi, era nange nzennyini." 
Romans16:3 Munnamusize Pulisika ne Akula abaakolera awamu nange mu Kristo Yesu," 
Romans16:4 abaawaayo obulago bwabwe olw'obulamu bwange; be sseebaza nze nzekka, era naye n'ekkanisa zonna ez'ab'amawanga." 
Romans16:5 Munnamusize ekkanisa ey'omu nnyumba yaabwe. Mulamuse Epayineeto, gwe njagala, kye kibala eky'olubereberye eky'omu Asiya eri Kristo." 
Romans16:6 Mulamuse Malyamu, eyabakolera mmwe emirimu emingi." 
Romans16:7 Mulamuse Anduloniiko ne Yuniya, ab'ekika kyange, era abaasibirwa awamu nange, ab'amaanyi mu batume, era abansooka okubeera mu Kristo." 
Romans16:8 Mulamuse Ampuliyaato, gwe njagala mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:9 Mulamuse Ulubano, akolera awamu naffe mu Kristo, ne Sutaku gwe njagala." 
Romans16:10 Mulamuse Apere akkirizibwa mu Kristo. Mubalamuse ab'omu nnyumba ya Alisutobulo. 
Romans16:11 Mulamuse Kerodiyoni, ow'ekika kyange. Mubalamuse ab'omu nnyumba ya Nalukiso, abali mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:12 Mulamuse Terufayina ne Terufoosa abaakola emirimu mu Mukama waffe. Mulamuse Perusi omwagalwa, eyakola emirimu emingi mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:13 Mulamuse Luufo, eyalondebwa mu Mukama waffe, ne nnyina, ye mmange." 
Romans16:14 Mulamuse Asunkulito, Fulegoni, Kerume, Patuloba, Keruma, n'ab'oluganda abali awamu nabo." 
Romans16:15 Mulamuse Firologo ne Yuliya, Nerewu ne mwannyina, ne Olumpa, n'abatukuvu bonna abali awamu nabo." 
Romans16:16 Mulamusagane n'okunywegera okutukuvu. Ekkanisa zonna eza Kristo zibalamusizza. 
Romans16:17 Era mbeegayiridde, ab'oluganda, mutunuulirenga abo abaleeta eby'okwawukanya n'eby'okwesittaza, ebitali bya kuyigiriza kwe mwayiga, mubeewalenga abo." 
Romans16:18 Kubanga abaliŋŋanga abo si baddu ba Mukama waffe Kristo, naye ba mbuto zaabwe bokka; era n'ebigambo ebirungi n'eby'okunyumya obulungi balimbalimba emitima gy'abo abatalina kabi." 
Romans16:19 Kubanga newakubadde obuwulize bwammwe bumanyiddwa bonna, ekindetera okubasanyukira mmwe; naye njagala mmwe okubeeranga abagezi mw'ebyo ebirungi, naye abeewala ebyo ebibi." 
Romans16:20 Era Katonda ow'emirembe alibetenta Setaani wansi w'ebigere byammwe mangu. Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga nammwe. 
Romans16:21 Timoseewo, akolera awamu nange, abalamusizza; ne Lukiyo ne Yasooni ne Sosipateri, ab'ekika kyange." 
Romans16:22 Nze Terutiyo, awandiise ebbaluwa eno, mbalamusizza mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:23 Gayo, ansuza nze n'ekkanisa yonna, abalamusizza. Erasuto, omuwanika w'ekibuga, abalamusizza, ne Kwaluto, ow'oluganda." 
Romans16:24 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Kristo Yesu kibeerenga nammwe mwenna. Amiina. 
Romans16:25 Era oyo ayinza okubanyweza ng'Enjiri n'okubuulirwa kwa Yesu Kristo bwe biri, ng'ekyama bwe kibikkuddwa ekyasirikirwa okuva mu biro eby'emirembe n'emirembe," 
Romans16:26 naye kaakati kirabise ne kitegeezebwa amawanga gonna mu byawandiikibwa bya bannabbi, nga bwe yalagira Katonda ataggwaawo, olw'okuwulira okuva mu kukkiriza." 
Romans16:27 Katonda ow'amagezi omu yekka aweebwenga ekitiibwa mu Yesu Kristo emirembe egitaggwaawo. Amiina. 
1Corinthians1:1 Pawulo, eyayitibwa okuba omutume wa Yesu Kristo olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ne Sossene ow'oluganda," 
1Corinthians1:2 eri ekkanisa ya Katonda eri mu Kkolinso, eri abo abaatukuzibwa mu Kristo Yesu, abaayitibwa okuba abatukuvu, wamu ne bonna abakoowoola erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo mu buli kifo, ye Mukama waabwe era owaffe:" 
1Corinthians1:3 ekisa kibeerenga gye muli n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:4 Nneebaza Katonda wange bulijjo ku lwammwe, olw'ekisa kya Katonda ekyabaweebwa mu Kristo Yesu;" 
1Corinthians1:5 kubanga mu buli kigambo mwagaggawalira mu ye, mu kwogera kwonna ne mu kutegeera kwonna;" 
1Corinthians1:6 ng'okutegeeza kwa Kristo bwe kwanywezebwa mu mmwe: 
1Corinthians1:7 mmwe obutaweebuuka mu kirabo kyonna; nga mulindirira okubikkulibwa kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo; 
1Corinthians1:8 era alibanyweza okutuusa ku nkomerero, obutabaako kya kunenyezebwa ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:9 Katonda mwesigwa, eyabayita okuyingira mu kusseekimu kw'Omwana we Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians1:10 Naye mbeegayirira, ab'oluganda, olw'erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mukkiriziganye mwekka na mwekka, okwawukana kulemenga okuba mu mmwe, naye mube n'omutima gumu n'okulowooza kumu." 
1Corinthians1:11 Kubanga nnabuulirwa ebifa gye muli, baganda bange, abo ab'omu nnyumba ya Kuloowe, ng'eriyo ennyombo mu mmwe." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kye njogedde kye kino nti buli muntu mu mmwe ayogera nti, “Nze ndi wa Pawulo;” “nange wa Apolo;” “nange wa Keefa;” “nange wa Kristo.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Kristo ayawuliddwamu? Pawulo yakomererwa ku lwammwe? Oba mwabatizibwa okuyingira mu linnya lya Pawulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Nneebaza Katonda kubanga sibatizanga muntu yenna mu mmwe, wabula Kulisupo ne Gaayo;" 
1Corinthians1:15 omuntu yenna alemenga okwogera nga mwabatizibwa okuyingira mu linnya lyange. 
1Corinthians1:16 Era nnabatiza n'ennyumba ya Suteefana, nate simanyi nga nnabatiza omuntu omulala yenna." 
1Corinthians1:17 Kubanga Kristo teyantuma kubatiza, wabula okubuulira Enjiri: si mu magezi ga bigambo, omusalaba gwa Kristo gulemenga okuba ogw'obwereere." 
1Corinthians1:18 Kubanga ekigambo eky'omusalaba bwe busirusiru eri abo abazikirira; naye eri ffe abalokolebwa ge maanyi ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians1:19 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Ndizikiriza amagezi g'abagezigezi, N'obukabakaba bw'abakabakaba ndibuggyawo.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Kale Omugezi aluwa? Omuwandiisi aluwa? Omuwakanyi ow'omulembe guno aluwa? Katonda teyafuula amagezi ag'ensi eno okuba obusirusiru? 
1Corinthians1:21 Kubanga Katonda mu magezi ge, yalaba ng'ensi teyinza kumumanya ng'eyita amagezi gaayo, Katonda kyeyava asiima okuyita mu busirisiru bw'okubuulira Enjiri okulokola abo abakkiriza." 
1Corinthians1:22 Kubanga Abayudaaya basaba obubonero, n'Abayonaani banoonya amagezi:" 
1Corinthians1:23 naye ffe tubuulira Kristo eyakomererwa, eri Abayudaaya nkonge, n'eri ab'amawanga busirusiru;" 
1Corinthians1:24 naye eri abo abayite Abayudaaya era n'Abayonaani, Kristo maanyi ga Katonda, era magezi ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians1:25 Kubanga obusirusiru bwa Katonda businga abantu amagezi; n'obunafu bwa Katonda businga abantu amaanyi. 
1Corinthians1:26 Kubanga mutunuulire okuyitibwa kwammwe, ab'oluganda, ng'ab'amagezi ag'omubiri si bangi abayitibwa, ab'amaanyi si bangi, ab'ekitiibwa si bangi;" 
1Corinthians1:27 naye Katonda yalonda ebisirusiru eby'ensi, akwase abagezigezi ensonyi; era Katonda yalonda ebinafu eby'ensi, akwase ab'amaanyi ensonyi," 
1Corinthians1:28 n'ebikopi by'ensi n'ebinyoomebwa Katonda yabironda era n'ebitaliiwo, aggyewo ebiriwo;" 
1Corinthians1:29 waleme kubaawo muntu yenna eyeenyumiriza mu maaso ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians1:30 Naye ku bw'oyo mmwe muli mu Kristo Yesu, eyafuuka amagezi gyetuli okuva eri Katonda, era n'obutuukirivu, n'okutukuzibwa, n'okununulibwa:" 
1Corinthians1:31 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Eyeenyumiriza, yeenyumiririzenga mu Mukama.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Nange, ab'oluganda, bwe nnajja gye muli, sajja na maanyi mangi ag'ebigambo oba amagezi nga mbabuulira ekyama kya Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:2 Kubanga nnasalawo obutamanya kigambo mu mmwe, wabula Yesu Kristo oyo eyakomererwa." 
1Corinthians2:3 Nange nnabeeranga nammwe mu bunafu ne mu kutya ne mu kukankana okungi. 
1Corinthians2:4 Era mu kwogera kwange ne mu kubuulira kwange tebyali mu bigambo eby'amagezi ebisendasenda, naye byali mu kulaga okw'Omwoyo n'amaanyi;" 
1Corinthians2:5 okukkiriza kwammwe kulemenga okubeera mu magezi g'abantu, wabula mu maanyi ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:6 Naye eri abo abakuze mu mwoyo, twogera eby'amagezi, naye amagezi agatali ga mu mulembe guno, oba ag'abafuzi ab'omu mulembe guno abaggwaawo." 
1Corinthians2:7 naye twogera amagezi ga Katonda ag'ekyama, agali gakwekeddwa, Katonda ge yalagira edda ensi nga tezinnabaawo olw'ekitiibwa kyaffe." 
1Corinthians2:8 Tewali n'omu ku bafuzi ab'omu mulembe guno abaagategeera, kuba singa baagategeera, tebandikomeredde Mukama ow'ekitiibwa." 
1Corinthians2:9 naye nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Eriiso bye litalabangako, n'okutu bye kutawuliranga, N'ebitayingiranga mu mutima gwa muntu, Byonna Katonda bye yategekera abamwagala.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Naye ffe Katonda yabitubikkulira mu Mwoyo, kubanga Omwoyo anoonya byonna era n'ebitategeerekeka ebya Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:11 Kubanga muntu ki ategeera eby'omuntu wabula omwoyo gw'omuntu oguli mu ye? Era bwe kityo n'ebya Katonda siwali abitegeera wabula Omwoyo gwa Katonda. 
1Corinthians2:12 Naye ffe tetwaweebwa mwoyo gwa nsi, wabula omwoyo oguva eri Katonda, tulyoke tutegeerenga Katonda by'atuwa obuwa." 
1Corinthians2:13 N'okwogera twogera ebyo, si mu bigambo amagezi g'abantu bye gayigiriza, wabula Omwoyo by'ayigiriza; bwe tugeraageranya eby'omwoyo n'eby'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:14 Naye omuntu ow'omukka obukka takkiriza bya Mwoyo gwa Katonda, kubanga bya busirusiru gy'ali; era tayinza kubitegeera, kubanga bikeberwa na mwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:15 Naye omuntu ow'Omwoyo akebera byonna, naye ye yennyini takeberwa muntu yenna." 
1Corinthians2:16 Kubanga, “ani eyali ategedde okulowooza kwa Mukama waffe, alyoke amuyigirize?” Naye ffe tulina endowooza ya Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:1 Nange, ab'oluganda, ssaayinza kwogera nammwe ng'ab'omwoyo, naye ng'ab'omubiri, ng'abaana abawere mu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nnabanywesa mata, so si mmere; kubanga mwali temunnagiyinza; naye era ne kaakano temunnagiyinza;" 
1Corinthians3:3 kubanga mukyali ba mubiri, kubanga mu mmwe nga bwe mukyalimu obuggya n'okuyomba, temuli ba mubiri, era temutambula ng'abantu obuntu?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Kubanga omuntu bw'ayogera nti, “Nze ndi wa Pawulo;” n'omulala nti, “Nze ndi wa Apolo;” nga temuli bantu buntu?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Kale Apolo kye ki? ne Pawulo kye ki? Baweereza buweereza ababakkirizisa; era buli muntu nga Mukama waffe bwe yamuwa. 
1Corinthians3:6 Nze nnasiga, Apolo n'afukirira; naye Katonda ye yakuza." 
1Corinthians3:7 Kale bwe kityo asiga si kintu, newakubadde afukirira; wabula Katonda akuza." 
1Corinthians3:8 Naye asiga n'afukirira benkanankana, naye buli muntu aliweebwa empeera okusinziira ku mulimu gw'aliba yakola." 
1Corinthians3:9 Kubanga ffe tukolera wamu ne Katonda, ate mmwe muli nnimiro ya Katonda, muli nnyumba ya Katonda." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ng'ekisa kya Katonda bwe kiri kye nnaweebwa, ng'omuzimbi omukugu ow'amagezi n'asima omusingi, naye kaakano omulala aguzimbako. Naye buli muntu yeegenderezenga bw'aguzimbako." 
1Corinthians3:11 Kubanga tewali muntu ayinza kuteekawo musingi mulala wabula ogwo ogwateekebwawo, ye Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Naye omuntu yenna bw'azimbanga ku musingi ogwo zaabu, ffeeza, amayinja ag'omuwendo omungi, emiti, essubi, ebisasiro;" 
1Corinthians3:13 omulimu ogwa buli muntu gulirabibwa, kubanga ku lunaku luli omuliro guligwolesa, n'omuliro gwennyini gulikema omulimu ogwa buli muntu bwe gufaanana." 
1Corinthians3:14 Omulimu ogwa buli muntu gwe yazimbako bwe gulisigalawo, aliweebwa empeera." 
1Corinthians3:15 Omulimu ogwa buli muntu bwe gulyokebwa, alifiirwa; naye ye yennyini alirokoka; naye bw'ati, kuyita mu muliro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Temumanyi nga muli Yeekaalu ya Katonda, era nga Omwoyo gwa Katonda abeera mu mmwe?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Omuntu yenna bw'azikirizanga Yeekaalu ya Katonda, Katonda alimuzikiriza oyo; kubanga Yeekaalu ya Katonda ntukuvu: ye mmwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Omuntu yenna teyeerimbanga. Omuntu yenna bwe yeerowoozanga okuba omugezi mu mmwe mu mirembe gino, afuukenga musirusiru, alyoke afuuke omugezi." 
1Corinthians3:19 Kubanga amagezi ag'omu nsi muno bwe busirusiru eri Katonda. Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Akwatira abagezi mu nkwe zaabwe.”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Era nate nti Mukama ategeera empaka ez'abagezi nga teziriimu. 
1Corinthians3:21 Omuntu yenna kyavanga alema okwenyumiriza mu bantu. Kubanga byonna byammwe; 
1Corinthians3:22 oba Pawulo, oba Apolo, oba Keefa, oba ensi, oba obulamu, oba okufa, oba ebiriwo, oba ebigenda okubaawo; byonna byammwe;" 
1Corinthians3:23 nammwe muli ba Kristo; ne Kristo wa Katonda. 
1Corinthians4:1 Omuntu asaanidde atutwalenga ng'abaweereza ba Kristo era abawanika b'ebyama bya Katonda. 
1Corinthians4:2 Era kigwanira abawanika okubanga abeesigwa. 
1Corinthians4:3 Naye gye ndi ekyo kintu kitono nnyo mmwe okunsalira omusango, oba omuntu yenna: era nange nzekka sseesalira musango." 
1Corinthians4:4 Kubanga sseemanyiiko kigambo; naye ekyo tekimpeesa butuukirivu: naye ansalira omusango ye Mukama waffe. 
1Corinthians4:5 Kale temusalanga musango gwa kigambo kyonna, ebiro nga tebinnatuuka, okutuusa Mukama waffe lw'alijja, alimulisa ebikwekebwa eby'omu kizikiza, era alirabisa okuteesa okw'omu mitima; buli muntu n'alyoka aweebwa ettendo lye eri Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:6 Naye ebyo, ab'oluganda, mbigeredde ku nze ne Apolo ku lwammwe; mulyoke muyigire ku ffe obutasukkanga ku byawandiikibwa; omuntu yenna alemenga okwegulumiza olw'omu okusinga omulala." 
1Corinthians4:7 Kubanga akwawula ye ani? Era olina ki ky'otaaweebwa? Naye okuweebwa oba nga waweebwa, kiki ekikwenyumirizisa ng'ataaweebwa?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Mumaze okukkuta, mumaze okugaggawala, mwafuga nga bakabaka awatali ffe, era mubeera kufuga nnandyagadde, era naffe tulyoke tufugire wamu nammwe." 
1Corinthians4:9 Kubanga ndowooza nga Katonda ffe abatume yatuteeka ku nkomerero ng'abasibe abalindirira okuttibwa, kubanga twafuuka ekyerolerwa eri ensi, eri ba bamalayika n'eri abantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Ffe tuli basirusiru ku bwa Kristo, naye mmwe muli bagezigezi mu Kristo; ffe tuli banafu, naye mmwe muli ba maanyi; mmwe muli ba kitiibwa, ffe tuli ba kunyoomebwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Era n'okutuusa ekiseera kino, tulumwa enjala era n'ennyonta, era tuba bwereere, era tukubibwa ebikonde, era tetuliiko waffe;" 
1Corinthians4:12 era tukola emirimu nga tutegana n'emikono gyaffe, abatuvuma, tubasabira omukisa; bwe tuyigganyizibwa, tugumiikiriza;" 
1Corinthians4:13 bwe tuwaayirizibwa, twegayirira; twafuuka ng'ebisasiro eby'ensi, empitambi eza byonna, okutuusa kaakano." 
1Corinthians4:14 Bino ssibiwandiika kubaswaza, wabula lwa kubabuulirira ng'abaana bange abaagalwa." 
1Corinthians4:15 Kuba newakubadde nga mulina abayigiriza mitwalo mu Kristo, naye temulina bakitammwe bangi; kubanga nze n'afuuka kitammwe mu Kristo Yesu olw'Enjiri." 
1Corinthians4:16 Kyenva mbeegayirira mulabire ku nze. 
1Corinthians4:17 Kyenva ntuma Timoseewo gye muli ye mwana wange omwagalwa omwesigwa mu Mukama waffe, anaabajjukiza amakubo gange agali mu Kristo, nga bwe njigiriza yonna yonna mu buli kkanisa." 
1Corinthians4:18 Naye waliwo abalala abeegulumiza nga balowooza nga nze sigenda kujja gye muli. 
1Corinthians4:19 Naye ndijja gye muli mangu, Mukama waffe bw'alyagala; era ndimanya amaanyi gaabwe abeegulumiza so si mu bigambo obugambo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda tebuli mu bigambo bugambo, wabula mu maanyi." 
1Corinthians4:21 Mwagalako ki? Njije gye muli n'omuggo, oba mu kwagala ne mu mwoyo ogw'obuwombeefu?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Ddala kigambibwa nti mulimu obwenzi mu mmwe, ate obwenzi bwe butyo obutali ne mu b'amawanga; omuntu okubeera ne muka kitaawe." 
1Corinthians5:2 Nammwe mwegulumizizza! So temwandinakuwadde bunakuwazi? Oyo eyakola ekikolwa ekyo mu muggye wakati mu mmwe. 
1Corinthians5:3 Newakubadde siri nammwe mu mubiri, ndi nammwe mu mwoyo, mmaze okusalira omusango oyo eyayonoona bw'atyo." 
1Corinthians5:4 Mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu, mmwe nga mukuŋŋaanye nange nga ndi nammwe mu mwoyo n'amaanyi ga Mukama waffe Yesu nga gali nammwe," 
1Corinthians5:5 mumuweeyo omuntu ng'oyo eri Setaani omubiri guzikirizibwe, omwoyo gulyoke gulokolebwe ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe Yesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Okwenyumiriza kwammwe si kulungi. Tetumanyi ng'ekizimbulukusa ekitono kizimbulukusa ekitole kyonna? 
1Corinthians5:7 Muggyemu ekizimbulukusa eky'edda, mulyoke mubeere ekitole ekiggya, nga temuliimu kizimbulukusa. Kubanga Kristo, y'endiga y'Okuyitako kwaffe eyattibwa." 
1Corinthians5:8 Kale tufumbe embaga, eteriimu kizimbulukusa eky'edda, eky'ettima n'obubi, wabula tulye omugaati ogutalimu kizimbulukusa, ogwo bwesimbu n'amazima." 
1Corinthians5:9 Nnabawandiikira mu bbaluwa yange obuteegattanga na benzi; 
1Corinthians5:10 so si kwewalira ddala abenzi ab'omu nsi muno, oba abeegombi n'abanyazi, oba abasinza ebifaananyi, kubanga bwe kiba kityo kyandibagwanidde okuva mu nsi." 
1Corinthians5:11 Naye kaakano mbawandiikira obuteegattanga naye, omuntu yenna ayitibwa ow'oluganda bw'aba nga mwenzi, oba mwegombi, oba asinza ebifaananyi, oba muvumi, oba mutamiivu, oba munyazi; ali bw'atyo n'okulya temulyanga naye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Kubanga nfaayo ki okusalira omusango abali ebweru? Naye abo ab'omu nnyumba si be musaana okusalira omusango? 
1Corinthians5:13 Naye ab'ebweru Katonda y'abasalira omusango. Omubi oyo mu muggye mu mmwe. 
1Corinthians6:1 Omuntu yenna mu mmwe bw'aba n'ensonga ku munne, ayaŋŋaanga okuwoleza ensonga abatali batuukirivu, so si eri abatukuvu?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Oba temumanyi ng'abatukuvu be balisalira ensi omusango? Kale oba nga mmwe mulisalira ensi omusango, temusobola kusala nsonga entono eziri mu mmwe?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Temumanyi nga tulisalira bamalayika omusango? Tulemwa tutya okusala emisango egy'omu bulamu buno? 
1Corinthians6:4 Kale bwe muba n'okusala emisango egy'omu bulamu buno, lwaki mugitwala eri abo abanyoomebwa mu kkanisa?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Njogera kino kubaswaza. Ddala mu mmwe temuyinza kuzuuka muntu mugezi, ayinza okusalira baganda be ensonga," 
1Corinthians6:6 naye ow'oluganda awoze n'ow'oluganda, era ne mu maaso gaabo abatali bakkiriza?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Naye era bwe mutyo mumaze okubaako akabi, kubanga mulina emisango mwekka na mwekka. Lwaki obutamala gakolwanga bubi? Lwaki obutamala galyazaamaanyizibwanga?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Naye mmwe mwennyini mukola bubi, mulyazaamaanya, era n'ab'oluganda." 
1Corinthians6:9 Oba temumanyi ng'abatali batuukirivu tebalisikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda? Temulimbibwanga: newakubadde abakaba, newakubadde abasinza ebifaananyi, newakubadde abenzi, newakubadde abafuuka abakazi, newakubadde abalya ebisiyaga," 
1Corinthians6:10 newakubadde ababbi, newakubadde abeegombi, newakubadde abatamiivu, newakubadde abavumi, newakubadde abanyazi, tebalisikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:11 Era abamu ku mmwe mwali ng'abo, era mwanaazibwa, era mwatukuzibwa, era mwaweebwa obutuukirivu olw'erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'olw'Omwoyo gwa Katonda waffe." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Ebintu byonna birungi gye ndi,” naye byonna tebingasa. “Byonna birungi gye ndi,” naye nze sigenda kufugibwanga kintu kyonna." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Eby'okulya bya lubuto, n'olubuto lwa bya kulya,” naye byombi Katonda alibiggyawo. Naye omubiri si gwa bwenzi, naye gwa Mukama waffe; ne Mukama waffe avunaana omubiri." 
1Corinthians6:14 Era Katonda yazuukiza Mukama waffe, era naffe alituzuukiza olw'amaanyi ge." 
1Corinthians6:15 Temumanyi ng'emibiri gyammwe bitundu bya Kristo? Kale nzirirenga ebitundu bya Kristo mbifuule bitundu by'omwenzi? Kitalo! 
1Corinthians6:16 Oba temumanyi ng'eyeegatta n'omwenzi gwe mubiri gumu? Kubanga ayogera nti, “Bombi banaafuuka omubiri gumu.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Naye eyeegatta ne Mukama waffe bafuuka omu mu mwoyo. 
1Corinthians6:18 Mwewalenga obwenzi. Buli kibi kyonna omuntu ky'akola kiri kungulu ku mubiri; naye ayenda akola ekibi ku mubiri gwe ye. 
1Corinthians6:19 Oba temumanyi ng'omubiri gwammwe ye Yeekaalu y'Omwoyo Omutukuvu ali mu mmwe, gwe mulina eyava eri Katonda? Nammwe temuli ku bwammwe;" 
1Corinthians6:20 kubanga mwagulibwa na muwendo, kale mugulumizenga Katonda mu mubiri gwammwe." 
1Corinthians7:1 Kaakano ku ebyo bye mwampandiikira, kirungi omusajja obutakwatanga ku mukazi." 
1Corinthians7:2 Naye, olw'obwenzi, buli musajja abeerenga ne mukazi we ye, na buli mukazi abeerenga ne bba." 
1Corinthians7:3 Omusajja asasulenga mukazi we ekyo ekimugwanira ng'omufumbo, era n'omukazi asasulenga bw'atyo bba." 
1Corinthians7:4 Kubanga omukazi tafuga mubiri gwe ye, wabula bba, era n'omusajja bw'atyo tafuga mubiri gwe ye, wabula mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:5 Buli omu alemenga okumma munne, wabula mpozzi nga mulagaanye ekiseera, mulyoke mubeerenga n'ebbanga ery'okusabiramu, ate mulyoke mubeerenga wamu, Setaani alemenga okubakema olw'obuteeziyiza bwammwe." 
1Corinthians7:6 Naye ekyo nkyogera mu ngeri ya kukkiriziganya, so siteeka tteeka." 
1Corinthians7:7 Naye nnandyagadde abantu bonna okubeeranga nga nze. Naye buli muntu alina ekirabo kye ye, ekiva eri Katonda, omulala kino, n'omulala kiri." 
1Corinthians7:8 Naye abatannafumbiriganwa ne bannamwandu mbagamba nti Kirungi bo okubeeranga nga nze. 
1Corinthians7:9 Naye oba nga tebayinza kweziyiza, bafumbirwenga: kubanga kye kirungi okufumbirwa okusinga okwakanga." 
1Corinthians7:10 Naye abaamala okufumbiriganwa mbalagira, so si nze wabula Mukama waffe, omukazi obutanobanga ku bba." 
1Corinthians7:11 naye singa anoba, abeereraawo obutafumbirwa, oba si bwe kityo atabaganenga ne bba; n'omusajja tagobanga mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:12 Naye abalala mbagamba nze, si Mukama waffe, ow'oluganda yenna bw'abanga n'omukazi atakkiriza, omukazi nakkiriza okubeera naye, tamugobanga." 
1Corinthians7:13 N'omukazi bw'abeeranga ne bba atali mukkiriza, naye bba nakkiriza okubeera naye, tamunobangako." 
1Corinthians7:14 Kubanga omusajja atakkiriza atukuzibwa na mukazi we, n'omukazi atakkiriza atukuzibwa na bba, singa tekiri bwe kityo, abaana bammwe tebandibadde balongoofu; naye kaakano batukuvu." 
1Corinthians7:15 Naye atakkiriza bw'ayagala okwawukana, baawukane; mu nsonga eyo ow'oluganda omusajja oba mukazi tali mu buddu mu bigambo ebiri bwe bityo, kubanga Katonda yatuyitira mirembe." 
1Corinthians7:16 Kubanga, ggwe omukazi, omanyi otya nga tolirokola balo? Oba, ggwe omusajja, omanyi otya nga tolirokola mukazi wo?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kino kyokka, buli muntu nga Mukama waffe bwe yamugabira, buli muntu nga Katonda bwe yamuyita, atambulenga bw'atyo. Ekyo ky'ekiragiro kye mpa ekkanisa zonna." 
1Corinthians7:18 Omuntu yenna yayitibwa nga mukomole? Teyeggyangako bukomole bwe. Omuntu yenna yayitibwa nga si mukomole? Tanoonyanga kukomolebwa. 
1Corinthians7:19 Okukomolwa si kintu, n'obutakomolwa si kintu, wabula ekikulu kwe kukwatanga ebiragiro bya Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:20 Buli muntu abeerenga mu kuyitibwa kwe yayitirwamu. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wayitibwa ng'oli muddu? Tokyeraliikiriranga, naye bwewabaawo omukisa ogw'okufuna eddembe, gukozese togufiirwa." 
1Corinthians7:22 Kubanga mu Mukama waffe eyayitibwanga muddu, aweebwa Mukama waffe eddembe, bw'atyo eyayitibwanga wa ddembe afuuka muddu wa Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mwagulibwa na muwendo; temufuukanga baddu b'abantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Ab'oluganda, buli muntu abeerenga mu mbeera gye yalimu, agibeeremu wamu ne Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:25 Naye ku bikwata ku butafumbiriganwa, sirina kiragiro kya Mukama waffe, naye mbagamba nze ng'omuntu Mukama waffe gwe yasaasira okubeera omwesigwa." 
1Corinthians7:26 Nze ndowooza nga ekirungi olw'okubonaabona okwa kaakano, omuntu okubeera nga bw'ali." 
1Corinthians7:27 Wasibibwa n'omukazi? Tonoonyanga kusumululwa. Wasumululwa ku mukazi? Tonoonyanga mukazi. 
1Corinthians7:28 Naye okuwasa bw'owasanga, nga toyonoonye; n'omuwala bw'afumbirwanga, nga tayonoonye. Naye abali bwe batyo banaabeeranga n'emitawaana gy'ensi gye nnandyagadde mwewale." 
1Corinthians7:29 Naye kino kye njogera, ab'oluganda, nti Ebiro biyimpawadde, okuva kaakano abalina abakazi babe ng'abatalina:" 
1Corinthians7:30 era n'abo abakaaba babe ng'abatakaaba; n'abo abasanyuka babe ng'abatasanyuka; n'abo abagula babe ng'abatalina; 
1Corinthians7:31 n'abo abakozesa eby'omu nsi babe ng'abatabikozesa, kubanga engeri ey'omu nsi muno eggwaawo." 
1Corinthians7:32 Naye njagala mmwe obuteeraliikiriranga. Atali mufumbo yeeraliikirira bya Mukama waffe, bw'anaasanyusanga Mukama waffe;" 
1Corinthians7:33 naye omufumbo yeeraliikirira bya mu nsi, bw'anaasanyusanga mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:34 Era waliwo enjawulo ku mufumbo n'omuwala. Atafumbirwa yeeraliikirira bya Mukama waffe, abeerenga mutukuvu omubiri n'omwoyo; naye afumbirwa yeeraliikirira bya mu nsi, bw'anaasanyusanga bba." 
1Corinthians7:35 Njogedde ekyo olw'okubagasa mmwe bennyini; si lwakuba nga kyambika, wabula olw'obulungi era mulyoke muweerezenga Mukama waffe obutategananga." 
1Corinthians7:36 Naye omusajja bw'alowoozanga nti taakole bulungi obutawasa omuwala gw'ayogereza, ate nga tayinza kweziyiza, akolenga nga bw'ayagala, bafumbiriganwe, aba tayonoonye." 
1Corinthians7:37 Naye oyo alina omutima omunywevu, n'asalawo awatali kuwalirizibwa nti omuwala tajja kumuwasa aba asazeewo bulungi." 
1Corinthians7:38 Kale oyo awasa omuwala gw'ayogereza aba akoze bulungi, naye oyo atamuwasa y'aba asinze okukola obulungi." 
1Corinthians7:39 Omukazi omufumbo asibibwa bba ng'akyali mulamu; naye bba bw'afa olwo ayinza okufumbirwa omusajja omulala gw'ayagala, kyokka mu Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians7:40 Naye aba musanyufu okusigala nga bw'ali, nga nze bwe ndowooza, era ndowooza nga nange nnina Omwoyo gwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians8:1 Naye ku ebyo ebiweebwa eri ebifaananyi: tumanyi nga “tulina fenna okutegeera.” Okutegeera kuleeta okwekulumbaza, naye okwagala kuzimba." 
1Corinthians8:2 Omuntu bw'alowoozanga ng'aliko ky'ategedde, aba tannategeera nga bwe kimugwanira okutegeera;" 
1Corinthians8:3 naye omuntu bw'ayagala Katonda, amanyibwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians8:4 Kale ku kulyanga ebiweebwa eri ebifaananyi, tumanyi nti “ng'ekifaananyi si kintu mu nsi,” era nga“ tewali Katonda mulala wabula omu.”" 
1Corinthians8:5 Kuba newakubadde nga waliwo abayitibwa bakatonda, oba mu ggulu, oba mu nsi; nga bwe waliwo“ bakatonda” abangi “n'abaami” abangi;" 
1Corinthians8:6 naye gyetuli waliwo Katonda omu, Kitaffe, omuva byonna, naffe tuli ku bw'oyo; ne Mukama waffe omu, Yesu Kristo, abeesaawo byonna, era atubeesaawo ffe." 
1Corinthians8:7 Naye okutegeera okwo tekuli mu bantu bonna: naye abalala, kubanga baamanyiira ebifaananyi okutuusa kaakano, balya ekiweereddwa eri ekifaananyi, kubanga omwoyo gwabwe munafu, gusigala mu kwonoona." 
1Corinthians8:8 Naye eky'okulya tekitusiimisa eri Katonda, era bwe tutalya tetulina kye tusubwa, era bwe tulya tetulina kyetweyongerako." 
1Corinthians8:9 Naye mwekuumenga eddembe lyammwe lireme okufuuka enkonge eri abanafu. 
1Corinthians8:10 Kubanga omuntu omunafu bw'akulaba ggwe alina okutegeera ng'otudde ku mmere mu ssabo ly'ekifaananyi olya, omwoyo gwe bwe guba omunafu, teguliguma kulya ebiweebwa eri ebifaananyi?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Kale ow'oluganda oyo omunafu, Kristo gwe yafiirira, abula olw'okutegeera kwo." 
1Corinthians8:12 Era bwe kityo, bwe mwonoonanga ab'oluganda, era ne mufumita omwoyo gwabwe, bwe guba nga munafu, nga mwonoona Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:13 Kale, oba ng'eky'okulya kyesittaza muganda wange, siiryenga nnyama emirembe gyonna, nnemenga okwesittaza muganda wange." 
1Corinthians9:1 Ssiri wa ddembe? Ssiri mutume? Ssaalaba Yesu Mukama waffe? mmwe temuli mulimu gwange mu Mukama waffe? 
1Corinthians9:2 Oba nga ssiri mutume eri abalala, naye ndi mutume eri mmwe; kubanga mmwe kabonero k'obutume bwange mu Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians9:3 Bwe mpoza bwe ntyo eri abo abankemereza. 
1Corinthians9:4 Tetulina buyinza okulyanga n'okunywanga? 
1Corinthians9:5 Tetulina buyinza okutwalanga omukazi ow'oluganda awamu naffe, era ng'abatume abalala, ne baganda ba Mukama waffe, ne Keefa bwe bakola?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Oba Balunabba nange, ffe ffekka tetulina buyinza kulekeraawo kukola kweyimirizaawo?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Ani akola ogw'obusirikale n'aba nga yeesasula empeera? Ani asimba olusuku n'atalya ku mmere yaamu? Oba ani alunda ekisibo n'atanywa ku mata g'ekisibo ekyo? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ebyo mbyogera ku bwange? Etteeka si bwe lyogera? 
1Corinthians9:9 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa mu mateeka ga Musa nti, “Togisibanga kamwa ente ng'ewuula.” Mulowooza Katonda afa ku bya nte zokka?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Oba ayogera ku lwaffe fekka? Kubanga kyawandiikibwa ku lwaffe: kubanga alima kimugwanira okulima ng'asuubira, era n'awuula kimugwanira okuwuula ng'asuubira okuweebwako." 
1Corinthians9:11 Oba nga ffe twabasigamu eby'omwoyo, kya kitalo ffe bwe tulikungula ebyammwe eby'omubiri?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Oba nga abalala balina obuyinza obwo ku mmwe, ffe tetusinga bo? Naye tetwakoza buyinza obwo; naye tugumiikiriza byonna, tulemenga okuleeta ekiziyiza Enjiri ya Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Temumanyi ng'abo abaweereza ebitukuvu balya ku by'omu Yeekaalu, n'abo abaweereza ku kyoto bagabana n'ekyoto?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Era ne Mukama waffe bw'atyo yalagira ababuulira Enjiri baliisibwenga olw'Enjiri. 
1Corinthians9:15 Naye nze siriiko na kimu ku ebyo kye nkozesezzaako. Era ssiwandiika bino biryoke binkolerwe, kubanga waakiri nze okufa, okusinga omuntu yenna okufuula okwenyumiriza kwange okw'obwereere." 
1Corinthians9:16 Kubanga bwe mbuulira Enjiri, ekyo tekinneenyumiririzisa, kubanga mpalirizibwa okugibuulira. Ziba zinsanze, bwe ssibuulira njiri." 
1Corinthians9:17 Kuba oba nga nkola bwe ntyo n'okwagala, mbeera n'empeera, naye ne bwe mba nga ssikola na kwagala, nkikola lwa kubanga nnateresebwa omulimu ogwo." 
1Corinthians9:18 Kale mpeera ki gye nnina? Empeera yange y'eno, kwe kubuulira Enjiri okugifuula ey'obwereere, nneme okukozesa ddala obuyinza bwange mu Njiri." 
1Corinthians9:19 Kuba newakubadde nga ndi wa ddembe eri bonna, nneefuula muddu eri bonna, ndyoke nfunenga abangi." 
1Corinthians9:20 N'eri Abayudaaya nnafuuka nga Omuyudaaya, nfunenga Abayudaaya; eri abo abafugibwa amateeka nnafuuka ng'afugibwa amateeka, nze kennyini nga sifugibwa mateeka, nfunenga abafugibwa amateeka;" 
1Corinthians9:21 eri abatalina mateeka nnafuuka ng'atalina mateeka, si butaba na mateeka eri Katonda, naye nga mpulira amateeka eri Kristo, nfunenga abatalina mateeka." 
1Corinthians9:22 Eri abanafu nnafuuka munafu, nfunenga abanafu: eri bonna nfuuse byonna, mu byonna byonna ndyoke ndokolenga abamu." 
1Corinthians9:23 Era nkola byonna olw'Enjiri, ndyoke nzisenga kimu mu yo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Temumanyi ng'abadduka mu mbiro mu mpaka nga bonna badduka, naye afuna ekirabo abeera omu? Nammwe muddukenga bwe mutyo nga mufubirira okuweebwa ekirabo." 
1Corinthians9:25 Buli muzanyi asaayo omwoyo okwefuga mu byonna nga alubirira okufuna engule eryonooneka, naye ffe tulifuna etayonooneka." 
1Corinthians9:26 N'olwekyo ssidduka ng'atalina kigendererwa; nnwana naye si ng'akuba ebbanga. 
1Corinthians9:27 Naye nneebonereza omubiri gwange era ngufuga; mpozzi, nga mmaze okubuulira abalala, nze nzekka nneme okubeera atasiimibwa." 
1Corinthians10:1 Kubanga ssaagala mmwe obutategeera, ab'oluganda, bajjajjaffe bonna bwe baali wansi w'ekire, era bonna bwe baayita mu nnyanja;" 
1Corinthians10:2 era bonna bwe baabatizibwa eri Musa mu kire ne mu nnyanja; 
1Corinthians10:3 era bonna ne balyanga emmere emu ey'omwoyo; era bonna ne banywanga eky'okunywa ekimu eky'omwoyo: 
1Corinthians10:4 kubanga baanywanga mu lwazi olw'omwoyo olwabagobereranga: n'olwazi olwo yali Kristo. 
1Corinthians10:5 Naye bangi ku bo Katonda teyabasiima, kubanga baazikiririzibwa mu ddungu." 
1Corinthians10:6 Naye ebyo byali byakulabirako gyetuli, tulemenga okwegomba ebibi, era nga bo bwe beegomba." 
1Corinthians10:7 So temubanga basinza ba bifaananyi, ng'abamu ku bo, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Abantu ne batuula okulya n'okunywa, ne bagolokoka okuzannya.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Era tetwendanga, ng'abamu ku bo bwe baayenda, ne bafa ku lunaku olumu abantu emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ssatu (23,000)." 
1Corinthians10:9 Era tetukemanga Mukama waffe, ng'abamu ku bo bwe baakema, emisota egyo ne gibatta." 
1Corinthians10:10 Era temwemulugunyanga, ng'abamu ku bo bwe beemulugunya, ne bazikirizibwa omuzikiriza." 
1Corinthians10:11 Naye ebyo byababaako abo okubeeranga ebyokulabirako; era byawandiikibwa olw'okutulabulanga ffe abatuukiddwako enkomerero z'emirembe. 
1Corinthians10:12 Kale alowooza ng'ayimiridde yeekuumenga aleme okugwa. 
1Corinthians10:13 Tewali kukemebwa okubatuukako okutali kw'abantu; naye Katonda mwesigwa, ataabaganyenga kukemebwa okusinga bwe muyinza; naye awamu n'okukemebwa era anassangawo n'obuddukiro, mulyoke muyinzenga okugumiikiriza." 
1Corinthians10:14 Kale, baganda bange, muddukenga okusinza ebifaananyi." 
1Corinthians10:15 Mbagamba ng'abalina amagezi; mulowooze kye njogera. 
1Corinthians10:16 Ekikompe eky'omukisa, kye tusabira omukisa, si kwe kusseekimu okw'omusaayi gwa Kristo? Omugaati gwe tumenyaamenya si kwe kusseekimu okw'omubiri gwa Kristo?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Kubanga ffe abangi tuli mugaati gumu, omubiri gumu, kubanga fenna tugabana omugaati gumu." 
1Corinthians10:18 Mulabe Isiraeri ow'omubiri, abalya ssaddaaka tebassa kimu na kyoto?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Kale kiki kye ngezaako okutegeeza? Ekiweebwa eri ekifaananyi kintu, oba ekifaananyi kintu?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Nedda. kye ntegeeza kye kino nti ab'amawanga bye bawaayo bawa eri baddayimooni so si eri Katonda, nange ssaagala mmwe okubeeranga abasseekimu ne baddayimooni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Temuyinza kunywa ku kikompe kya Mukama waffe ne ku kikompe kya baddayimooni. Era temuyinza kugabana ku mmeeza ya Mukama waffe ne ku mmeeza ya baddayimooni. 
1Corinthians10:22 Tusaanye okunyiiza Mukama waffe? Ffe tumusinga amaanyi? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Byonna birungi;” naye ebisaana si byonna. “ Byonna birungi,” naye ebizimba si byonna." 
1Corinthians10:24 Omuntu yenna tanoonyanga bibye yekka, afengayo ne ku bya munne." 
1Corinthians10:25 Buli kye batundanga mu katale, mukiryanga, nga temubuuzizza kigambo olw'omwoyo;" 
1Corinthians10:26 kubanga“ ensi ya Mukama waffe, n'okujjula kwayo.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 Omu ku abo abatakkiriza bw'abayitanga, nammwe bwe mwagalanga okugenda; ekiteekebwanga mu maaso gammwe mukiryanga, nga temubuuzizza kigambo olw'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians10:28 Naye omuntu bw'abagambanga nti, “Kino kyaweereddwayo” okubeera ssaddaaka, temukiryanga ku lw'oyo ababuulidde, n'olw'omwoyo," 
1Corinthians10:29 bwe njogera omwoyo, si gugwo ggwe naye gwa mulala; kubanga eddembe lyange lwaki okusalirwa omusango n'omwoyo gw'omulala?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Nze bwe ndya n'okwebaza, kiki ekinvumya olw'ekyo kye nneebaza?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Kale oba nga mulya, oba nga munywa, oba nga mukola ekigambo kyonna kyonna, mukolenga byonna olw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda." 
1Corinthians10:32 Temuleetanga ekyesittaza eri Abayudaaya, newakubadde eri Abayonaani, newakubadde eri ekkanisa ya Katonda." 
1Corinthians10:33 Era nga nange bwe ntyo ngezaako okusanyusa bonna mu byonna, nga sinoonya magoba gange nze, wabula ag'abangi, balyoke balokoke." 
1Corinthians11:1 Mundabireko, nga nze bwe ndabira ku Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:2 Mbatendereza kubanga munjijukira mu byonna, era munyweza bye mwaweebwa nga bwe nnabibawa." 
1Corinthians11:3 Naye njagala mmwe mutegeere ng'omutwe gwa buli musajja ye Kristo; n'omutwe gw'omukazi ye musajja; n'omutwe gwa Kristo ye Katonda. 
1Corinthians11:4 Buli musajja bw'asaba oba bw'abuulira, omutwe gwe nga gubikkiddwako, aswaza omutwe gwe." 
1Corinthians11:5 Naye buli mukazi bw'asaba oba bw'abuulira, omutwe gwe nga tegubikkiddwako, aswaza bba, kubanga aba ng'amwereddwa." 
1Corinthians11:6 Oba nga omukazi tayagala kubikka ku mutwe gwe, kale asalengako enviiri ze, naye oba nga kya nsonyi omukazi okusalibwako enviiri oba okuzimwako, agubikkengako." 
1Corinthians11:7 Kubanga omusajja tekimugwanira kubikkanga ku mutwe gwe, kubanga ye kye kifaananyi n'ekitiibwa kya Katonda; naye omukazi ye kye kitiibwa ky'omusajja." 
1Corinthians11:8 Kubanga omusajja teyava mu mukazi; wabula omukazi ye yava mu musajja. 
1Corinthians11:9 Era kubanga omusajja teyatondebwa lwa mukazi; wabula omukazi olw'omusajja. 
1Corinthians11:10 Kyekiva kigwanira omukazi okubangako akabonero ak'okufugibwa ku mutwe gwe olwa bamalayika. 
1Corinthians11:11 Kyokka mu Mukama waffe, omukazi tabaawo awatali musajja, era n'omusajja tabaawo awatali mukazi," 
1Corinthians11:12 kubanga ng'omukazi nga bwe yava mu musajja, era n'omusajja bw'atyo azaalibwa omukazi; naye byonna biva eri Katonda." 
1Corinthians11:13 Kale nammwe musaalewo, oba nga kisaana omukazi okusaba Katonda nga tabisse ku mutwe?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Obuzaaliranwa bwokka tebubayigiriza nga omusajja bw'akuza enviiri zimuswaza? 
1Corinthians11:15 Naye omukazi bw'akuza enviiri, kye kitiibwa gy'ali: kubanga yaweebwa enviiri ze mu kifo ky'ekyambalo." 
1Corinthians11:16 Naye omuntu yenna bw'aba ng'ayagala okuleeta empaka, ffe tetulina mpisa ng'eyo, newakubadde ekkanisa za Katonda." 
1Corinthians11:17 Naye mu bino bye ŋŋenda okubagamba temuli kya kubatendereza, kubanga bwe mukuŋŋaana ebivaamu biba bibi, si birungi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Kubanga ekisookera ddala, bwe mukuŋŋaanira mu kkanisa, mpulira nga waliwo okwawukana mu mmwe, era nzikiriza nga kiyinza okuba nga kiri bwe kityo." 
1Corinthians11:19 Kubanga era n'okwesalamu kikugwanira okubaawo, abasiimibwa balyoke balabikenga mu mmwe." 
1Corinthians11:20 Bwe mukuŋŋaana, ekyo kye mulya kiba tekikyali mmere ya Mukama waffe:" 
1Corinthians11:21 kubanga bwe muba mulya buli muntu alya ku lulwe, talinda banne, omu asigala akyali muyala, ate omulala ng'atamidde." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kiki ekyo? Temulina nnyumba ze muyinza kuliiramu n'okunyweramu? Oba munyooma ekkanisa ya Katonda, ne muswaza abatalina kintu? Nnaabagamba ntya? Nnaabatendereza olw'ekyo? Ssibatendereza." 
1Corinthians11:23 Kubanga Mukama kye yampa, kye nnabayigiriza nti: Mukama waffe Yesu, mu kiro kiri kye yaliirwamu olukwe yatoola omugaati;" 
1Corinthians11:24 ne yeebaza, n'agumenyamu, n'agamba nti, “ Mutoole, mulye; guno gwe Mubiri gwange oguweereddwayo ku lwammwe, mukolenga bwe mutyo olw'okunjijukiranga nze.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Era n'eku kikompe bw'atyo, bwe baamala okulya, n'agamba nti, “ Ekikompe kino ye ndagaano empya mu musaayi gwange, mukolenga bwe mutyo buli lwe munaankinywangako, olw'okunjijukiranga nze.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Kubanga buli lwe munaalyanga ku mugaati guno ne lwe munaanywanga ku kikompe, munaayolesanga okufa kwa Mukama waffe okutuusa lw'alijja." 
1Corinthians11:27 Kyanaavanga azza omusango ogw'omubiri n'omusaayi gwa Mukama waffe buli anaalyanga ku mugaati oba anaanywanga ku kikompe kya Mukama waffe nga tasaanidde. 
1Corinthians11:28 Naye omuntu yeekeberenga yekka alyoke alyenga ku mugaati bw'atyo, era anywenga ne ku kikompe." 
1Corinthians11:29 Kubanga buli alya era anywa nga tategeera makulu ga mubiri, aba yeesalira yekka omusango okumusinga." 
1Corinthians11:30 Mu mmwe kyemuvudde mubeeramu abangi abanafu n'abalwadde, era bangi na bafudde." 
1Corinthians11:31 Naye singa tusooka okwesalira omusango fekka, tetwandisaliddwa musango." 
1Corinthians11:32 Naye Mukama bwa tusalira omusango, atukangavvula, tuleme okusingibwa omusango awamu n'ensi." 
1Corinthians11:33 Kale, baganda bange, bwe mukuŋŋaananga okulya, mulindaganenga." 
1Corinthians11:34 Omuntu bw'alumwanga enjala, alyenga eka; okukuŋŋaana kwammwe kulemenga okuba okw'ensobi. N'ebirala ndibirongoosa, we ndijjira wonna." 
1Corinthians12:1 Kaakano ku bikwata ku birabo eby'omwoyo, ab'oluganda, ssaagala mmwe obutabitegeera." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mumanyi bwe mwali ab'amawanga nga mwakyamizibwanga eri ebifaananyi ebitoogera, nga mukyamizibwa mu ngeri yonna." 
1Corinthians12:3 Kyenva mbategeeza tewali n'omu ayogera mu Mwoyo gwa Katonda agamba nti, “Yesu akolimiddwa;” era tewali n'omu ayinza okwogera nti, “Yesu ye Mukama waffe,” wabula mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu." 
1Corinthians12:4 Waliwo ebirabo bya ngeri nnyingi, naye Omwoyo ali omu." 
1Corinthians12:5 Era waliwo engeri nnyingi ez'okuweereza, era Mukama waffe ali omu." 
1Corinthians12:6 Era waliwo okukola kwa ngeri nnyingi, naye Katonda ali omu, akola byonna mu bonna." 
1Corinthians12:7 Omwoyo alabikira mu buli muntu olw'okugasa bonna. 
1Corinthians12:8 Omwoyo awa omu ekigambo eky'amagezi; n'omulala Omwoyo oyo y'omu n'amuwa ekigambo eky'okutegeera. 
1Corinthians12:9 Omulala Omwoyo oyo y'omu n'amuwa okukkiriza, n'omulala n'amuwa ebirabo eby'okuwonyanga." 
1Corinthians12:10 Omulala n'amuwa okukolanga eby'amagero; n'omulala okubuuliranga; n'omulala okwawulanga emyoyo; omulala okwogeranga ennimi; n'omulala okuvvuunulanga ennimi; 
1Corinthians12:11 naye ebyo byonna Omwoyo oyo omu ye abikola, ng'agabira buli muntu kinnoomu nga ye bw'ayagala." 
1Corinthians12:12 Kuba omubiri nga bwe guli ogumu ne guba n'ebitundu ebingi, n'ebitundu byonna eby'omubiri, newakubadde nga bingi, gwe mubiri gumu; era ne Kristo bw'atyo." 
1Corinthians12:13 Kubanga mu Mwoyo omu fenna twabatizibwa okuyingira mu mubiri gumu, oba Bayudaaya oba Bayonaani, oba baddu oba ba ddembe; fenna ne tunywesebwa mu Mwoyo omu." 
1Corinthians12:14 Kubanga n'omubiri si kitundu kimu, naye bingi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ekigere bwe kyogera nti, “Kubanga siri mukono, n'olwekyo, siri kitundu kya mubiri;” ekyo tekikifuula butaba kitundu kya mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:16 Era okutu bwe kwogera nti, “Kubanga siri liiso, n'olwekyo siri kitundu kya mubiri;” ekyo tekikifuula butaba kitundu kya mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:17 Omubiri gwonna singa liiso, okuwulira kwandibadde wa? Gwonna singa kuwulira, okuwunyiriza kwandibadde wa?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Naye kaakano Katonda yassaawo ebitundu buli kinnakimu mu mubiri, nga bwe yayagala." 
1Corinthians12:19 Era byonna singa kyali kitundu kimu, omubiri gwandibadde wa?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Naye kaakano ebitundu biri bingi, naye omubiri gumu." 
1Corinthians12:21 N'eriiso teriyinza kugamba mukono nti, “Ggwe sikwetaaga,” oba omutwe okugamba ebigere nti, “Mmwe sibeetaaga.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Naye, ekisinga ennyo, ebitundu bino eby'omubiri ebirowoozebwa okubeera ebinafu byetaagibwa," 
1Corinthians12:23 n'ebyo eby'oku mubiri bye tulowooza obutaba na kitiibwa nnyo bye twambaza ekitiibwa ekisinga obungi, n'ebitundu byaffe ebitali birungi bye tusinga okulabirira;" 
1Corinthians12:24 naye ebitundu byaffe ebisinga obulungi kye biteetaaga. Bwatyo Katonda bwe yakola omubiri, ebitundu ebyandibadde biragajjalirwa n'abiwa ekitiibwa ekisinga obungi;" 
1Corinthians12:25 walemenga okubeera okwawula mu mubiri; naye ebitundu biyambaganenga bumu byokka na byokka. 
1Corinthians12:26 Era ekitundu ekimu bwe kibonaabona, ebitundu byonna bibonerabonera wamu nakyo; oba ekitundu ekimu bwe kigulumizibwa, ebitundu byonna bisanyukira wamu nakyo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Naye mmwe muli mubiri gwa Kristo, n'ebitundu byagwo, buli muntu." 
1Corinthians12:28 Era Katonda yassaawo mu kkanisa, okusooka batume, abokubiri bannabbi, ab'okusatu bayigiriza, ne kuddako abakola eby'amagero, ne kuddako abalina ebirabo eby'okuwonyanga, abayambi, abafuga, aboogezi b'ennimi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Bonna batume? Bonna bannabbi? Bonna bayigiriza? Bonna bakola eby'amagero? 
1Corinthians12:30 Bonna balina ebirabo eby'okuwonyanga? Bonna boogera ennimi? Bonna baavvuunula? 
1Corinthians12:31 Naye mwegombenga ebirabo ebisinga obukulu. Era kambalage ekkubo erisinga ennyo obulungi. 
1Corinthians13:1 Bwe njogera n'ennimi z'abantu n'eza bamalayika, naye nga sirina kwagala, mba nga ekide ekivuga, oba ekitaasa ekisaala." 
1Corinthians13:2 Era bwe mba ne bunnabbi ne ntegeera ebyama byonna n'okutegeera kwonna; era bwe mba n'okukkiriza kwonna, okunsobozesa n'okusiguukulula ensozi, naye nga sirina kwagala, mba ssiri kintu." 
1Corinthians13:3 Era bwe mpaayo bye nnina byonna eri abaavu, era ne bwe mpaayo omubiri gwange okwokebwa, naye nga sirina kwagala, mba ssiriiko kye ngasizza." 
1Corinthians13:4 Okwagala kugumiikiriza era kulina ekisa; okwagala tekuba na buggya; okwagala tekwekulumbaza, tekwegulumiza," 
1Corinthians13:5 tekukola bitasaana, tekunoonya byakwo, tekunyiiga mangu era tekusiba kibi ku mwoyo;" 
1Corinthians13:6 tekusanyukira bitali bya butuukirivu, naye kusanyukira wamu n'amazima;" 
1Corinthians13:7 kugumira byonna, kukkiriza byonna, kusuubira byonna, kugumiikiriza byonna." 
1Corinthians13:8 Okwagala tekuggwaawo emirembe gyonna: naye oba bunnabbi, bulivaawo; oba ennimi, zirikoma; oba okutegeera, kulivaawo." 
1Corinthians13:9 Kubanga tutegeerako kitundu, era ne bunnabbi bwaffe bwa kitundu:" 
1Corinthians13:10 naye ebituukirivu bwe birijja, eby'ekitundu birivaawo." 
1Corinthians13:11 Bwe nnali omuto, nnayogeranga ng'omuto, nnategeeranga ng'omuto, nnalowoozanga ng'omuto: bwe nnakula, ne ndeka eby'obuto." 
1Corinthians13:12 Kubanga kaakano tulabira mu ndabirwamu ebitalabika bulungi; naye mu biro biri tulirabira ddala bulungi amaaso n'amaaso; kaakano ntegeerako kitundu; naye mu biro biri nditegeerera ddala era nga bwe nnategeererwa ddala. 
1Corinthians13:13 Naye kaakano waliwo ebintu bisatu: okukkiriza, okusuubira, okwagala, naye ku ebyo ekisinga obukulu kwagala." 
1Corinthians14:1 Mugobererenga okwagala, era mwegombenga ebirabo eby'omwoyo, n'okusingira ddala eky'okutegeeza eby'obunnabbi." 
1Corinthians14:2 Kubanga ayogera mu nnimi tayogera na bantu; kubanga tewali ategeera by'ayogera, naye aba ayogera byama mu mwoyo." 
1Corinthians14:3 Naye oyo ategeeza eby'obunnabbi atuusa ku bantu ebibazimba, ebibawa amaanyi era ebibagumya." 
1Corinthians14:4 Ayogera ennimi aba yeezimba yekka; naye ategeeza eby'obunnabbi azimba ekkanisa. 
1Corinthians14:5 Kale njagala mwenna mwogere mu nnimi, naye ekisingira ddala mutegeeze eby'obunnabbi, kubanga ategeeza eby'obunnabbi ye asinga obukulu ayogera mu nnimi, okuggyako nga waliwo avvuunula, ekkanisa eryoke ezimbibwe." 
1Corinthians14:6 Naye kaakano, ab'oluganda, bwe ndijja gye muli ne njogera mu nnimi, ndibagasa ntya? Okuggyako nga mbaleetera ebyo ebimbikuliddwa, bye mmanyi, oba bunnabbi, oba kuyigiriza." 
1Corinthians14:7 Era n'ebivuga ebitalina bulamu, nga endere, oba ennanga, bwe bitavuga mu maloboozi agategeerekeka, omuntu ategeera atya oluyimba olufuuyibwa oba olukubibwa?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Era singa eŋŋombe tevaamu ddoboozi litegeerekeka, ani alyeteekeraateekera okulwana?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Bwe kityo ne ku mmwe bwe kiri, singa omuntu ayogera mu nnimi ebitategeerekeka, oli aliyinza atya okutegeera ekyogeddwa? Aba ayogeredde mu bbanga." 
1Corinthians14:10 Weewaawo waliwo mu nsi ennimi nnyingi, era tewali lutalina makulu." 
1Corinthians14:11 Naye bwe ssimanya makulu ga lulimi mba mugwira eri ayogera, naye bwatyo gye ndi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Bwe mutyo nammwe, kubanga mwegomba eby'omwoyo, mufubenga nnyo okubeera mu bizimba ekkanisa." 
1Corinthians14:13 Kale ayogera mu lulimi asabe okufuna amaanyi agaluvvuunula. 
1Corinthians14:14 Kubanga bwe nsaba mu lulimi, omwoyo gwange gusaba, naye amagezi gange tegabala bibala." 
1Corinthians14:15 Kale kiki kye mba nkola? Nnaasabanga n'omwoyo, era nnaasabanga n'amagezi; nnaayimbanga n'omwoyo, era nnaayimbanga n'amagezi." 
1Corinthians14:16 Kubanga bw'osaba omukisa mu mwoyo, oyo atategedde ky'ogamba anaddangamu atya nti, “Amiina,” olw'okwebaza kwo, bw'atategeera ky'oyogedde?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Kubanga ggwe oyinza okuba nga weebaziza bulungi, naye omuntu omulala nga tazimbiddwa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Nneebaza Katonda, kubanga njogera ennimi okubasinga mwenna;" 
1Corinthians14:19 naye mu kkanisa njagala wakiri njogere ebigambo bitaano n'amagezi gange, nga njigiriza, okusinga ebigambo omutwalo mu lulimi olutategeerekeka." 
1Corinthians14:20 Ab'oluganda, temubanga baana bato mu kulowooza, mube bato mu bubi, naye mu kulowooza mube bakulu." 
1Corinthians14:21 Kyawandiikibwa mu mateeka nti, “Ndyogera n'abantu bano mu bantu ab'ennimi endala ne mu mimwa gya bannamawanga; era newakubadde bwe kityo tebalimpulira, bw'ayogera Mukama”" 
1Corinthians14:22 N'olwekyo ennimi kyeziva zibeera akabonero, si eri abo abakkiriza, wabula eri abatakkiriza, naye okutegeeza obunnabbi kw'abo abakkiriza." 
1Corinthians14:23 Kale ekkanisa yonna bw'eba ng'ekuŋŋaanidde wamu, bonna ne boogera ennimi, ne wayingira ab'ebweru oba abatakkiriza, tebaligamba nti mulaluse?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Naye singa bonna bategeeza eby'obunnabbi, ne wayingira atakkiriza oba ow'ebweru, ebyogerwa bijja kumuleetera okwenenya, nga mu byonna yeesalira omusango." 
1Corinthians14:25 Ebyama eby'omu mutima gwe bibikkulwe, alyoke avuuname ku ttaka, asinze Katonda, ng'ayogera nga Katonda bwali mu mmwe ddala." 
1Corinthians14:26 Kale kiri kitya, ab'oluganda? Bwe mukuŋŋaana, buli muntu alina oluyimba, alina okuyigiriza, alina ekimubikkuliddwa, alina olulimi, alina okutegeeza; byonna bikolebwenga olw'okuzimba." 
1Corinthians14:27 Singa wabaawo muntu ayogera mu nnimi, boogerenga babiri oba obutasukka basatu, naye mu mpalo, era omu avvuunulenga;" 
1Corinthians14:28 naye oba nga tewali avvuunula, asirikenga mu kkanisa; ayogererenga mu mmeeme ye ne Katonda." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ne bannabbi boogerenga babiri oba basatu, ng'abalala bafumiitiriza ku ebyo ebyogerwa." 
1Corinthians14:30 Naye singa omu ku batudde abikkulirwa ekigambo, eyasoose asirikenga." 
1Corinthians14:31 Kubanga mwenna muyinza okubuuliranga kinnoomu, bonna bayigenga, era bonna basanyusibwenga;" 
1Corinthians14:32 n'emyoyo gya bannabbi gifugibwa bannabbi. 
1Corinthians14:33 Kubanga Katonda si wa luyoogaano, naye wa mirembe; nga bwe kiri mu kkanisa ez'abatukuvu zonna." 
1Corinthians14:34 Abakazi basirikenga mu kkanisa: kubanga tebakkirizibwa kwogera; naye bafugibwenga, era nga n'amateeka bwe googera." 
1Corinthians14:35 Era bwe baagalanga okuyiga ekigambo, babuulizenga babbaabwe eka: kubanga kya nsonyi omukazi okwogeranga mu kkanisa." 
1Corinthians14:36 Kiki! ekigambo kya Katonda kyatandikira mu mmwe oba kyatuuka eri mmwe mwekka? 
1Corinthians14:37 Omuntu yenna bwe yeerowoozanga okuba nnabbi oba wa mwoyo, ategeerenga bye mbawandiikira, nga kye kiragiro kya Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians14:38 Naye omuntu yenna bw'atategeera, aleme okutegeera." 
1Corinthians14:39 Kale ab'oluganda, mwegombenga okutegeeza eby'obunnabbi, era temuziyizanga kwogeranga mu nnimi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Naye byonna bikolebwenga nga bwe kisaana era mu mpisa ennungi. 
1Corinthians15:1 Kaakano, ab'oluganda, mbajjukiza bye nnasinzirako okubabuulira Enjiri, gye mwafuna, gye muyimiriddemu," 
1Corinthians15:2 gye mulokokeramu, singa muginyweza, wabula nga mwakkiririza bwereere." 
1Corinthians15:3 Kubanga nnabategeeza ekigambo ekikulu ennyo nange kye nnaweebwa, nga Kristo yafa olw'ebibi byaffe ng'ebyawandiikibwa bwe bigamba," 
1Corinthians15:4 nga yaziikibwa, nga yazuukizibwa ku lunaku olwokusatu ng'ebyawandiikibwa bwe bigamba," 
1Corinthians15:5 era nga yalabikira Keefa, n'alyoka alabikira ekkumi n'ababiri;" 
1Corinthians15:6 n'alyoka alabikira ab'oluganda abasukka mu bikumi ebitaano (500) omulundi gumu, era bangi ku bo abakyali abalamu newakubadde nga abamu baafa." 
1Corinthians15:7 Olwo n'alyoka alabikira Yakobo ate n'alyoka alabikira abatume bonna. 
1Corinthians15:8 Oluvannyuma lwa bonna n'alabikira nange ng'omwana omusowole. 
1Corinthians15:9 Kubanga nze ndi muto mu batume, atasaanira kuyitibwa mutume, kubanga nnayigganyanga ekkanisa ya Katonda." 
1Corinthians15:10 Naye olw'ekisa kya Katonda bwe ndi bwe ndi, n'ekisa kye ekyali gye ndi tekyali kya bwereere. Kubanga nnakola emirimu mingi okusinga bonna, naye si nze, wabula ekisa kya Katonda ekyali nange." 
1Corinthians15:11 Kale oba nze oba bo, bwe tutyo bwe tubuulira, era bwe mutyo bwe mwakkiriza." 
1Corinthians15:12 Naye Kristo bw'abuulirwa nga yazuukizibwa mu bafu, ate lwaki abamu mu mmwe bagamba nti tewali kuzuukira kw'abafu?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Naye oba nga tewali kuzuukira kw'abafu, era ne Kristo teyazuukizibwa;" 
1Corinthians15:14 era oba nga Kristo teyazuukizibwa, kale okubuulira kwaffe tekuliimu, so n'okukkiriza kwammwe tekuliimu." 
1Corinthians15:15 Era naye tulabika ng'abajulirwa ab'obulimba aba Katonda; kubanga twategeeza Katonda nga yazuukiza Kristo, gw'ataazuukiza, oba ng'abafu tebazuukizibwa." 
1Corinthians15:16 Kuba oba ng'abafu tebazuukizibwa, era ne Kristo teyazuukizibwa." 
1Corinthians15:17 Oba nga Kristo teyazuukizibwa, okukkiriza kwammwe tekuliiko kye kugasa; mukyali mu bibi byammwe." 
1Corinthians15:18 Era n'abo abaafiira mu Kristo baazikirira. 
1Corinthians15:19 Oba nga mu bulamu buno bwokka mwe tubeeredde n'essuubi mu Kristo, tuli ba kusaasirwa okusinga abantu bonna." 
1Corinthians15:20 Naye kituufu Kristo yazuukizibwa mu bafu, ebibala ebibereberye eby'abo abaafa." 
1Corinthians15:21 Kubanga okufa bwe kwaleetebwa omuntu, era n'okuzuukira kw'abafu kwaleetebwa muntu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Kuba bonna nga bwe baafiira mu Adamu, era bwe batyo mu Kristo bonna mwe balifuukira abalamu." 
1Corinthians15:23 Naye buli muntu mu kifo kye ye, Kristo ye yasooka, oluvannyuma mu kujja kwe ababe baddeko." 
1Corinthians15:24 Olwo enkomerero n'eryoka etuuka bw'aliwaayo obwakabaka eri Katonda ye Kitaawe; bw'aliba ng'amaze okuggyawo okufuga kwonna n'amaanyi gonna n'obuyinza. 
1Corinthians15:25 Kubanga kimugwanira okufuganga okutuusa lw'alissa abalabe be bonna wansi w'ebigere bye. 
1Corinthians15:26 Omulabe alisembayo okuzikirizibwa kwe kufa. 
1Corinthians15:27 Kubanga “Katonda atadde ebintu byonna wansi w'ebigere bye.” Naye bwe kigambibwa nti, “ Ebintu byonna bisiddwa wansi w'ebigere bye.” Kiba kitegeeza nti ng'oyo teyassibwa wansi eyassa byonna wansi we." 
1Corinthians15:28 Naye byonna bwe birimala okussibwa wansi we, era n'Omwana yennyini n'alyoka assibwa wansi w'oyo eyassa byonna wansi we, Katonda alyoke abeerenga byonna mu byonna." 
1Corinthians15:29 Kubanga balikola batya ababatizibwa ku lw'abafu? Oba ng'abafu tebazuukizibwa ddala, kiki ekibabatizisa ku lw'abo?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Naffe lwaki okubeera mu kabi buli kaseera? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ab'oluganda, mpakanya, okwenyumiriza kwe nnina mu mwe, ndi nakwo mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe, nange nfa buli lunaku." 
1Corinthians15:32 Oba nga nnalwana n'ensolo mu Efeso ng'omuntu obuntu, ngasibwa ntya? Oba ng'abafu tebazuukizibwa,“ tulye tunywe, kubanga tufa enkya.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Temulimbibwanga, “Emikwano emibi gyonoona empisa ennungi.”" 
1Corinthians15:34 Muddemu amagezi, temuddamu kwonoona, kubanga abalala tebamanyi Katonda, njogedde kubakwasa nsonyi." 
1Corinthians15:35 Naye omuntu ayinza okubuuza nti, “ Abafu bazuukizibwa batya? Era mubiri ki gwe bajja nagwo?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Musirusiru ggwe, ensigo gy'osiga temeruka nga tefudde," 
1Corinthians15:37 ne gy'osiga, tosiga mubiri oguliba, wabula mpeke njereere, mpozzi ya ŋŋaano, oba ya ngeri ndala;" 
1Corinthians15:38 naye Katonda agiwa omubiri nga bw'ayagala, era buli nsigo agiwa omubiri gwayo yokka." 
1Corinthians15:39 Ennyama yonna si nnyama emu: naye endala ya bantu, n'endala ya nsolo, n'endala ya nnyonyi, n'endala ya byannyanja." 
1Corinthians15:40 Era waliwo emibiri egy'omu ggulu n'emibiri egy'omu nsi, naye ekitiibwa eky'egy'omu ggulu kirala, n'eky'egy'omu nsi kirala." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ekitiibwa ky'enjuba kirala, n'ekitiibwa ky'omwezi kirala, n'ekitiibwa ky'emmunyeenye kirala, kubanga emmunyeenye teyenkana na ginnaayo kitiibwa." 
1Corinthians15:42 Era n'okuzuukira kw'abafu bwe kutyo. Gusigibwa mu kuvunda; guzuukizibwa mu butavunda: 
1Corinthians15:43 gusigibwa awatali kitiibwa; guzuukizibwa mu kitiibwa; gusigibwa mu bunafu; guzuukizibwa mu maanyi," 
1Corinthians15:44 gusigibwa nga mubiri gwa mukka; guzuukizibwa mubiri gwa mwoyo. Oba nga waliwo omubiri gw'omukka, era waliwo n'ogw'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians15:45 Era bwe kityo kyawandiikibwa nti, “Omuntu ow'olubereberye Adamu yafuuka mukka mulamu.” Adamu ow'oluvannyuma yafuuka mwoyo oguleeta obulamu." 
1Corinthians15:46 Naye eky'omwoyo tekisooka, wabula eky'omukka; oluvannyuma kya mwoyo." 
1Corinthians15:47 Omuntu ow'olubereberye yava mu nsi, wa ttaka, omuntu ow'okubiri yava mu ggulu." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ng'oli ow'ettaka bwe yali, era n'ab'ettaka bwe bali bwe batyo, era ng'oli ow'omu ggulu bw'ali, era n'ab'omu ggulu bwe bali batyo." 
1Corinthians15:49 Era nga bwe twatwala ekifaananyi ky'oli ow'ettaka, era tulitwala n'ekifaananyi ky'oli ow'omu ggulu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Naye kino kye ŋŋamba, ab'oluganda, ng'omubiri n'omusaayi tebiyinza kusikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda; so okuvunda tekusikira butavunda." 
1Corinthians15:51 Laba, kambabuulire ekyama: Ffenna tetulifa, naye fenna tulifuusibwa," 
1Corinthians15:52 mangu ago, nga kutemya kikowe, akagombe ak'enkomerero bwe kalivuga: kubanga kalivuga, n'abafu balizuukizibwa obutavunda, naffe tulifuusibwa." 
1Corinthians15:53 Kubanga oguvunda guno kigugwanira okwambala obutavunda, n'ogufa guno okwambala obutafa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Naye oguvunda guno bwe guliba nga gumaze okwambala obutavunda, n'ogufa guno okwambala obutafa, ekigambo ekyawandiikibwa ne kiryoka kituukirira nti, “Okufa kumiriddwa mu kuwangula." 
1Corinthians15:55 Ggwe okufa, okuwangula kwo kuli luuyi wa? Ggwe okufa, okuluma kwo kuli luuyi wa?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Okuluma kw'okufa kye kibi; n'amaanyi g'ekibi ge mateeka: 
1Corinthians15:57 naye Katonda yeebazibwe, atuwanguza ffe ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:58 Kale, baganda bange abaagalwa, munywerenga obutasagaasagana, nga mweyongeranga bulijjo mu mulimu gwa Mukama waffe, kubanga mumanyi ng'okufuba kwammwe si kwa bwereere mu Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians16:1 Ku bikwata ku kukuŋŋaanyiza ebintu abatukuvu, nga bwe nnalagira ekkanisa ez'e Ggalatiya, nammwe mukolenga bwe mutyo." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ku lunaku olusooka mu ssabbiiti buli muntu mu mmwe abeeko kyatereka ewuwe nga asinziira ku busobozi bwe, ebintu bireme okukuŋŋaanyizibwa lwe ndijja." 
1Corinthians16:3 Era bwe ndituuka be mulisiima bendiwa ebbaluwa ne mbatuma okutwala ekisa kyammwe mu Yerusaalemi. 
1Corinthians16:4 Era bwe kirirabika nga kiryetaagisa nange okugenda, baligenda nange." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ŋŋenda kujja gye muli bwe ndiba nga mmaze okuyita mu Makedoni; kubanga ŋŋenda kuyita mu Makedoni. 
1Corinthians16:6 Oboolyawo ndibeera nammwe, oba n'okumala ndimalayo nammwe ebiseera eby'obutiti byonna, mmwe mulyoke munsibirire gye ndigenda yonna." 
1Corinthians16:7 Kubanga ssaagala kubalaba nga mpita buyisi, naye nsuubira okumala nammwe ekiseera ekiwerako, Mukama waffe bw'alikkiriza." 
1Corinthians16:8 Naye nja kusigala mu Efeso okutuusa ku Pentekoote," 
1Corinthians16:9 kubanga oluggi olunene era olw'emirimu emingi lunziguliddwawo, era n'abalabe bangi." 
1Corinthians16:10 Naye Timoseewo bw'alijja, mulabe nga mumuyamba abeere nammwe awatali kutya; kubanga naye akola omulimu gwa Mukama waffe era nga nze." 
1Corinthians16:11 Kale omuntu yenna tamunyoomanga. Naye mumusibirire n'emirembe, ajje gye ndi: kubanga nsuubira okumulaba awamu n'ab'oluganda." 
1Corinthians16:12 Naye ku bya Apolo ow'oluganda, nnamwegayirira nnyo okujja gye muli awamu n'ab'oluganda, n'atayagalira ddala kujja mu kiseera kino; naye alijja bw'alifuna ebbanga." 
1Corinthians16:13 Mutunulenga, munywerenga mu kukkiriza, mubeerenga bazira, ba maanyi." 
1Corinthians16:14 Byonna bye mukola bikolebwenga mu kwagala. 
1Corinthians16:15 Naye mbeegayirira, ab'oluganda mumanyi ennyumba ya Suteefana, be basooka okukkiriza mu Akaya, era nga beeteeseteese okuweereza abatukuvu," 
1Corinthians16:16 nammwe muwulirenga abali ng'abo, na buli muntu afuba okukolera awamu naffe." 
1Corinthians16:17 Era nsanyukira okujja kwa Suteefana ne Folutunaato ne Akayiko: kubanga ebyabula ku lwammwe baabituukiriza. 
1Corinthians16:18 Kubanga baawummuza omwoyo gwange n'ogwammwe, kale mukkirizenga abali ng'abo." 
1Corinthians16:19 Ekkanisa ez'omu Asiya zibalamusizza. Akula ne Pulisika babalamusizza nnyo mu Mukama waffe, n'ekkanisa eri mu nnyumba yaabwe." 
1Corinthians16:20 Ab'oluganda bonna babalamusizza. Mulamusagane n'okunywegera okutukuvu. 
1Corinthians16:21 Nze Pawulo, mpandiise okulamusa kuno, n'omukono gwange." 
1Corinthians16:22 Omuntu yenna bw'atayagalanga Mukama waffe, akolimirwenga. Mukama waffe ajja." 
1Corinthians16:23 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga nammwe. 
1Corinthians16:24 Okwagala kwange kubeerenga nammwe mwenna mu Kristo Yesu. Amiina. 
2Corinthians1:1 Pawulo, omutume wa Kristo Yesu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ne Timoseewo ow'oluganda, eri ekkanisa ya Katonda eri mu Kkolinso, awamu n'abatukuvu bonna abali mu Akaya yonna." 
2Corinthians1:2 Ekisa kibeerenga gye muli n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
2Corinthians1:3 Yeebazibwe Katonda era Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, Kitaffe ow'okusaasira era Katonda ow'okusanyusa kwonna;" 
2Corinthians1:4 atusanyusa mu buli kibonoobono kyaffe, ffe tulyoke tuyinzenga okusanyusanga abali mu kubonaabona kwonna, n'okusanyusa ffe kwe tusanyusibwa Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:5 Kuba nga bwe tugabana ennyo mu bibonyoobonyo bya Kristo, era bwe tutyo mu Kristo mwe tugabanira ennyo essanyu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Naye bwe tubonaabona, tubonaabona olw'okusanyusibwa n'okulokoka kwammwe; era bwe tusanyusibwa, tusanyusibwa olw'okusanyusibwa kwammwe, okuleeta okugumiikiriza ebibonyoobonyo ebyo naffe bye tubonyaabonyezebwa." 
2Corinthians1:7 Essuubi lyaffe lya maanyi gye muli, kubanga tumanyi nti nga bwe mugabana ku bibonyoobonyo byaffe, era bwe mutyo mugabana ne ku ssanyu lyaffe." 
2Corinthians1:8 Kubanga ab'oluganda, tetwagala mmwe obutategeera, okubonyaabonyezebwa okwatutuukako mu Asiya, bwe twazitoowererwa ennyo nnyini okusinga amaanyi gaffe, era n'okusuubira ne tutasuubira kuba balamu." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ffe lwaki twawulira nga abasaliddwa ogw'okufa; ekyo kyaliwo, tuleme kwesiga maanyi gaffe, wabula twesige Katonda azuukiza abafu." 
2Corinthians1:10 Katonda eyatuwonya mu kufa okunene okwenkana awo, era anaatuwonyanga; era oyo gwe tulinamu essuubi ery'okutuwonyanga." 
2Corinthians1:11 Nammwe mutuyambe mu kusaba, bwe batyo bangi beebaze Katonda ku lwaffe, olw'emikisa egituweereddwa olw'okusaba kw'abangi." 
2Corinthians1:12 Kubanga okwenyumiriza kwaffe kwe kuno, omwoyo gwaffe gutukakasa nti mu nsi muno, n'okusingira ddala mu mmwe, tubadde tweyisa mu butukuvu ne mu mazima ga Katonda, si mu magezi ag'omubiri wabula mu kisa kya Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:13 Kubanga tetubawandiikira birala wabula ebyo bye musobola okusoma era n'okutegeera, era nsuubira nga mulibitegeerera ddala." 
2Corinthians1:14 Era nga bwe mutegeeddeko ekitundu, musobola okwenyumiriza mu ffe, era nga naffe bwe tulyenyumiriza mu mmwe ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe Yesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Olw'okubanga nali nnekakasa mu ekyo, n'ayagala nnyo okusooka okujja gye muli, mulyoke muweebwe omukisa gwa mirundi ebiri." 
2Corinthians1:16 N'ayagala mbakyalire nga ŋŋenda e Makedoni, era nkomewo gye muli nga nva e Makedoni, mulyoke munsibirire nga ŋŋenda e Buyudaaya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Kale bwe nnali njagala okukola ekyo, nnalagaalaganya? Oba bye nteesa, mbiteesa ng'omuntu ow'omunsi, okugamba nti weewaawo, weewaawo, ate nti si weewaawo, si weewaawo?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Naye nga Katonda bw'ali omwesigwa, ekigambo kyaffe gye muli tekiri nti weewaawo ate nti si weewaawo." 
2Corinthians1:19 Kubanga Omwana wa Katonda, Yesu Kristo, ffe gwe twabuulira mu mmwe, nze ne Sirwano ne Timoseewo, teyali nti weewaawo ate nti si weewaawo, naye mu ye bulijjo mulimu weewaawo." 
2Corinthians1:20 Kubanga mu byonna byonna Katonda bye yasuubiza, mu oyo mwe muli weewaawo; era oyo kyava aleeta Amiina, Katonda atenderezebwe ku bwaffe." 
2Corinthians1:21 Naye atunyweza ffe awamu nammwe mu Kristo, era eyatufukako amafuta, ye Katonda;" 
2Corinthians1:22 era eyatussaako akabonero, n'atuwa omusingo ogw'Omwoyo mu mitima gyaffe." 
2Corinthians1:23 Naye nze mpita Katonda okuba omujulirwa w'emmeeme yange, era kyennava nnema okujja mu Kkolinso, kubanga nnabasaasira." 
2Corinthians1:24 Si kubanga tufuga okukkiriza kwammwe, naye tuli bakozi bannammwe ab'essanyu lyammwe: kubanga muli banywevu mu kukkiriza." 
2Corinthians2:1 Naye nnamalirira mu mutima gwange, obutajja nate na nnaku gye muli." 
2Corinthians2:2 Kubanga nze bwe mbanakuwaza, kale ansanyusa ye ani wabula oyo nze gwe nnakuwaza?" 
2Corinthians2:3 N'ekyo nnakiwandiika bwe ndijja nneme kunnakuwazibwa abo abagwanira okunsanyusa; kubanga mbeesiga mmwe mwenna, ng'essanyu lyange lye lyammwe mwenna." 
2Corinthians2:4 Kubanga mu kubonaabona okungi n'okulumwa omutima nnabawandiikira n'amaziga amangi, si lwa kubanakuwaza, naye mutegeere okwagala kwe nnina gye muli bwe kuli okungi ennyo." 
2Corinthians2:5 Naye bwe wabaawo omuntu eyaleeta okunakuwala, aba tanakuwazizza nze, wabula mmwe mwenna, so si mwenna, nneme okubazitowerera ennyo." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kubanga ali bw'atyo ekibonerezo ekyo ky'awereddwa abangi kimala. 
2Corinthians2:7 Kyekiva kibagwanira mmwe okumusonyiwa obusonyiyi n'okumusanyusa afaanana bw'atyo mpozzi aleme okumirwa ennaku ze nga ziyinze obungi. 
2Corinthians2:8 Kyenva mbeegayirira okunyweza okwagala gyali. 
2Corinthians2:9 Kubanga era kyennava mpandiika, ndyoke mbagezese ntegeere, oba nga muli bawulize mu bigambo byonna." 
2Corinthians2:10 Buli gwe musonyiwa ekigambo, nange mmusonyiwa: kubanga nange kye nsonyiye, oba nga nsonyiye, nkisonyiye ku lwammwe mu maaso ga Kristo." 
2Corinthians2:11 Setaani alemenga kutwekulumbalizaako; kubanga tetuli ng'abatategeera nkwe ze. 
2Corinthians2:12 Naye bwe nnajja mu Tulowa olw'Enjiri ya Kristo, era oluggi bwe lwanzigulirwawo mu Mukama waffe," 
2Corinthians2:13 omutima gwange tegwatereera kubanga saasangayo Tito muganda wange. Kyennava mbasiibula ne ŋŋenda mu Makedoni. 
2Corinthians2:14 Naye Katonda yeebazibwe, atutwala bulijjo ng'abawanguzi mu Kristo, era naatukozesa okumumanyisa mu bantu bonna, ng'evvumbe erisaasanira wonna." 
2Corinthians2:15 Kubanga tuli vvumbe eddungi erya Kristo eri Katonda mu abo abalokoka ne mu abo ababula. 
2Corinthians2:16 Eri abo ababula tuli vvumbe eriva mu kufa erireeta okufa; naye eri abalokoka tuli vvumbe eriva mu bulamu erireeta obulamu. Era ebyo ani abiyinza? 
2Corinthians2:17 Kubanga tetuli nga bali abasinga obungi, abatabanguzi b'ekigambo kya Katonda, naye ng'abantu ab'amazima era abaatumibwa Katonda, bwe tutyo mu maaso ga Katonda bwe twogera mu Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Tutandise nate okwetendereza fekka? Oba twetaaga ebbaluwa ng'abalala, ezitusemba gye muli, oba mmwe ze muwandiise nga zitusemba?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Mmwe muli bbaluwa yaffe, etusemba ewandiikiddwa mu mitima gyaffe, abantu bonna gye bategeera, gye basoma." 
2Corinthians3:3 Era mweraga okuba ebbaluwa ya Kristo, ffe gye twaleeta, etaawandiikibwa na bwino, wabula Omwoyo gwa Katonda omulamu; si ku bipande eby'amayinja, wabula ku bipande eby'emitima gy'abantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Obwo bwe bwesige bwe tulina okuyita mu Kristo eri Katonda," 
2Corinthians3:5 si kubanga fekka tulina obusobozi, okulowooza ekigambo kyonna ng'ekiva gyetuli; naye obusobozi bwaffe buva eri Katonda." 
2Corinthians3:6 Oyo ye yatusobozesa okuba abaweereza b'endagaano empya; si baweereza ba nnukuta, wabula ab'Omwoyo; kubanga ennukuta etta, naye Omwoyo guleeta obulamu." 
2Corinthians3:7 Naye oba nga okuweereza okw'okufa okwali mu nnukuta, okwasalibwa ku mayinja, kwajjira mu kitiibwa bwe kityo, n'abaana ba Isiraeri n'okuyinza ne batayinza kwekaliriza maaso ga Musa olw'ekitiibwa ky'amaaso ge; ekyali kigenda okuggwaawo," 
2Corinthians3:8 okuweereza okw'Omwoyo tekulisinga nnyo okuba n'e kitiibwa? 
2Corinthians3:9 Kuba oba ng'okuweereza okw'omusango kye kitiibwa, okuweereza okw'obutukirivu kweyongera nnyo okusukkiriza ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians3:10 Ddala mu nsonga eyo ekyo ekyali kirina ekitiibwa luli, kaakano tekikyalina kitiibwa, olw'ekitiibwa ekisingirawo ddala." 
2Corinthians3:11 Kuba oba ng'ekyaggwaawo kyalina ekitiibwa, eky'olubeerera kiteekwa okusinga ennyo okuba n'ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians3:12 Kale nga bwe tulina essuubi eryenkana awo, twogera n'obuvumu bungi." 
2Corinthians3:13 So si nga Musa eyeebikkanga ku maaso ge, abaana ba Isiraeri balemenga okwekaliriza enkomerero y'ekyo ekyali kiggwaawo." 
2Corinthians3:14 Naye emitima gyabwe gyakakanyazibwa; kubanga n'okutuusa leero bwe basoma endagaano ey'edda eky'okubikkako kiri kikyaliwo; eky'okubikkako ekyo kivaawo mu Kristo. 
2Corinthians3:15 Naye n'okutuusa leero, ebya Musa bwe bisomebwa, eky'okubikkako kiri ku mutima gwabwe." 
2Corinthians3:16 Naye omuntu bw'akyukira Mukama waffe, eky'okubikkako kiggibwawo." 
2Corinthians3:17 Naye Mukama waffe gwe Mwoyo, era awaba Omwoyo gwa Mukama waffe we waba eddembe." 
2Corinthians3:18 Naye ffe fenna, bwe tuggyibwako eky'okubika ku maaso, nga tulaba ekitiibwa kya Mukama waffe, tukyusibwa okufaananyizibwa nga ye, okuva ku mutendera gumu ogw'ekitiibwa okutuusa ku mulala, kubanga kino kiva eri Mukama gwe Mwoyo." 
2Corinthians4:1 Kale, nga bwe tulina okuweereza kuno, olw'okusaasira kwa Katonda, tetuddirira." 
2Corinthians4:2 Naye twagaana eby'ensonyi ebikisibwa, nga tetutambulira mu bukuusa, so tetukyamya kigambo kya Katonda; naye olw'okulabisa amazima tuleka buli muntu atulowoozeeko ng'Omwoyo gwe bwe guli mu maaso ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians4:3 Era newakubadde ng'enjiri yaffe ebikkibwako, ebikkibwako eri abo ababula." 
2Corinthians4:4 Be bo abatakkiriza, Setaani omufuzi ow'emirembe gino be yaziba emitima gyabwe, n'abaziyiza okulaba omusana gw'Enjiri ey'ekitiibwa eya Kristo, oyo kye kifaananyi kya Katonda." 
2Corinthians4:5 Kubanga tetwebuulira fekka, wabula Kristo Yesu nga ye Mukama waffe, naffe nga tuli baddu bammwe ku lwa Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Kubanga Katonda ye yayogera nti, “Leka omusana gwake mu kizikiza,” eyayaka mu mitima gyaffe, okuleeta omusana ogw'okutegeera ekitiibwa kya Katonda mu maaso ga Yesu Kristo." 
2Corinthians4:7 Naye obugagga obwo tuli nabwo mu bibya eby'ebbumba, amaanyi amangi ennyo galyoke gavenga eri Katonda, so si eri ffe." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tubonyaabonyezebwa mu buli ngeri, naye tetumalibwawo; tusoberwa, naye tetuggwaamu ssuubi." 
2Corinthians4:9 Tuyigganyizibwa, naye tetulekebwa; tumeggebwa, naye tetuzikirira." 
2Corinthians4:10 Bulijjo tutambula nga tulina mu mubiri okuttibwa kwa Yesu, era n'obulamu bwa Yesu bulyoke bulabisibwenga mu mubiri gwaffe." 
2Corinthians4:11 Kubanga ffe abalamu tuweebwayo ennaku zonna eri okufa okutulanga Yesu, era n'obulamu bwa Yesu bulyoke bulabisibwenga mu mubiri gwaffe ogufa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Bwe kityo okufa kukolera mu ffe, naye obulamu mu mmwe." 
2Corinthians4:13 Naye nga tulina omwoyo guli ogw'okukkiriza, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Nakkiriza, kyennava njogera,” Era naffe tukkiriza, era kyetuva twogera." 
2Corinthians4:14 Nga tumanyi ng'oyo eyazuukiza Mukama waffe Yesu, era naffe alituzuukiza wamu ne Yesu, era alitwanjulira wamu nammwe." 
2Corinthians4:15 Kubanga byonna biri ku bwammwe, ekisa ekyo nga bwe kyeyongera okubuna mu bantu abangi, kyongera okuleeta okwebaza Katonda n'okumuweesa ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians4:16 Kyetuva tulema okuddirira; naye newakubadde omuntu waffe ow'okungulu ng'aggwaawo, naye omuntu waffe ow'omunda afuuka omuggya bulijjo bulijjo."
