2Corinthians4:17 Kubanga okubonaabona kwaffe okutazitowa, okw'ekiseera ekya kaakano, kwongerayongera nnyo okutukolera ekitiibwa ekizitowa eky'emirembe n'emirembe." 
2Corinthians4:18 Ffe nga tetutunuulira ebirabika, wabula ebitalabika, kubanga ebirabika bya kiseera; naye ebitalabika bya mirembe na mirembe." 
2Corinthians5:1 Kubanga tumanyi nti, oba ng'ennyumba yaffe ey'ensiisira ey'omu nsi eryabizibwa, tulina eyazimbibwa eva eri Katonda, ennyumba etaazimbibwa na mikono, ey'emirembe n'emirembe, ey'omu ggulu." 
2Corinthians5:2 Kubanga tusindira mu eno, nga twegomba okwambazibwa ennyumba yaffe eriva mu ggulu," 
2Corinthians5:3 bwe tulyambazibwa, mpozzi tuleme okusangibwa nga tuli bwereere." 
2Corinthians5:4 Kubanga ffe abali mu nsiisira eno tusinda, nga tuzitoowererwa; si kubanga twagala okwambula, wabula okwambazibwa, ogwo ogufa gulyoke gumirwe obulamu." 
2Corinthians5:5 Naye eyatukolera ekyo ye Katonda, eyatuwa Omwoyo okuba omusingo." 
2Corinthians5:6 Kyetuva tuguma ennaku zonna, era tumanya nti bwe tuba mu mubiri tuba wala Mukama waffe." 
2Corinthians5:7 Kubanga tutambula olw'okukkiriza, sso si ku kulaba." 
2Corinthians5:8 Tuguma, era kino kye tusinga okwagala, okuva mu mubiri guno, n'okubeera Mukama waffe gy'ali." 
2Corinthians5:9 Era kyetuva tufuba, oba nga tukyali muno, oba nga tuli wala, okusiimibwa ye." 
2Corinthians5:10 Kubanga ffe fenna kitugwanira okulabisibwa Kristo w'alisalira emisango; buli muntu aweebwe ekimusanira okusinziira ku birungi oba ku bibi bye yakola nga akyali mu mubiri. 
2Corinthians5:11 N'olw'ekyo, bwe tumanya okutya Mukama waffe, tusendasenda abantu, naye Katonda amanyi bwe tuli, era nsuubira nga nammwe mumanyi mu myoyo gyammwe." 
2Corinthians5:12 Tetwetendereza nate gye muli, wabula okubawa mmwe kye munaasinziirangako okwenyumirizanga ku lwaffe, mulyoke mubenga n'eky'okubaddamu abeenyumiriza olw'ebyo ebirabika, so si mu mutima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Kuba oba nga tulaluse, tulaluse eri Katonda; oba nga twegendereza, twegendereza ku lwa mmwe." 
2Corinthians5:14 Kubanga okwagala kwa Kristo kwe kutufuga, nga tulowooza bwe tuti ng'omu yabafiirira bonna, bonna kyebaava bafa." 
2Corinthians5:15 Naye yafiirira bonna, abalamu balemenga okubeera abalamu nate ku bwabwe bokka, wabula ku bw'oyo eyabafiirira n'azuukira." 
2Corinthians5:16 Okusooka leero kyetuva tulema okumanya omuntu yenna okusinziira ku ndaba y'obuntu; okumanya newakubadde okusooka twatwala Kristo mu ndaba y'obuntu, naye kaakano tetukyamumanya nate bwe tutyo." 
2Corinthians5:17 N'olw'ekyo omuntu yenna bw'aba mu Kristo, aba kitonde kiggya; eby'edda nga biweddewo; laba, nga bifuuse biggya." 
2Corinthians5:18 Naye byonna biva eri Katonda, eyatutabaganya naye yekka ku bwa Kristo, n'atuwa ffe okuweereza okw'okutabaganya." 
2Corinthians5:19 Kwe kugamba nti Katonda yali mu Kristo ng'atabaganya ensi naye yennyini, nga tababalira byonoono byabwe, era nga yatuteresa ffe ekigambo eky'okutabaganya." 
2Corinthians5:20 Kyetuva tubeera ababaka mu kifo kya Kristo, Katonda ng'afaanana ng'abeegayirira okuyita mu ffe, tubeegayirira mu kifo kya Kristo mutabagane ne Katonda." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ataamanya kwonoona, yamufuula ekibi ku lwaffe; ffe tulyoke tufuuke obutuukirivu bwa Katonda mu ye." 
2Corinthians6:1 Era bwe tukolera awamu ne Katonda, tubeegayirira obutaweerwa bwereere kisa kya Katonda." 
2Corinthians6:2 Kubanga Katonda agamba nti, “Mu biro eby'okukkirizibwamu nnakuwulira, Ne ku lunaku olw'obulokozi nnakuyamba; laba, kaakano bye biro eby'okukkirizibwamu; laba, kaakano lwe lunaku olw'obulokozi.”" 
2Corinthians6:3 Tetuteeka nkonge yonna mu kkubo lya muntu yenna, okuweereza kwaffe kulemenga okunenyezebwa." 
2Corinthians6:4 Naye ng'abaweereza ba Katonda, twetendereza mu byonna, mu kugumiikiriza okungi, mu bibonoobono, mu kwetaaga, ne mu nnaku." 
2Corinthians6:5 Mu kukubibwa, mu kusibibwa, mu kukaayana, mu kufuba, mu kutunula, ne mu kusiiba." 
2Corinthians6:6 Mu bulongoofu, mu kutegeera, mu kugumiikiriza, mu kisa, mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu, ne mu kwagala okutaliimu bunnanfuusi." 
2Corinthians6:7 Mu kigambo eky'amazima, mu maanyi ga Katonda; n'olw'eby'okulwanyisa eby'obutuukirivu mu mukono ogwa ddyo n'ogwa kkono." 
2Corinthians6:8 Olw'ekitiibwa n'olw'okunyoomebwa, olw'okuvumibwa n'olw'okusiimibwa. Tuyitibwa ng'abalimba, naye nga tuli ba mazima." 
2Corinthians6:9 Ng'abatategeerebwa, era naye abategeerebwa ennyo; ng'abafa, era, laba, tuli balamu; ng'ababonerezebwa, naye ne tutattibwa." 
2Corinthians6:10 Abanakuwala, naye abasanyuka bulijjo; ng'abaavu, naye abagaggawaza abangi; ng'abatalina kintu, era naye abalina ddala byonna." 
2Corinthians6:11 Akamwa kaffe kaasamiddwa gye muli, Abakkolinso, n'omutima gwaffe tugubabikulidde." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ffe tetubanyigiriza, naye mwenyigiriza mmwekka mu myoyo gyammwe." 
2Corinthians6:13 Njogera nammwe ng'abaana, mutubikulire emitima gyammwe." 
2Corinthians6:14 Temwegattanga na batakkiriza kubanga temwenkanankana; kubanga obutuukirivu butabagana butya n'obujeemu? Oba omusana gussa gutya ekimu n'ekizikiza? 
2Corinthians6:15 Era Kristo atabagana atya ne Beriyali? oba omukkiriza agabana mugabo ki n'atali mukkiriza? 
2Corinthians6:16 Era Yeekaalu ya Katonda yeegatta etya n'ebifaananyi? Kubanga ffe tuli Yeekaalu ya Katonda omulamu; nga Katonda bwe yayogera nti, “Nnaabeeranga mu bo, ne ntambuliranga mu bo; nange nnaabeeranga Katonda waabwe, nabo banaabeeranga bantu bange.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 “Kale ” Muve wakati mubo, mweyawule, bw'ayogera Mukama, So temukwatanga ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu; Nange ndibasembeza," 
2Corinthians6:18 Era nnaabeeranga Kitammwe gye muli, “Nammwe munaabeeranga gye ndi abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala, bw'ayogera Mukama Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Abaagalwa nga bwe tulina ebisuubizo ebyo, twenaazengako obugwagwa bwonna obw'omubiri n'obw'omwoyo, nga tutuukiriza obutukuvu mu kutya Katonda." 
2Corinthians7:2 Mutubikulire emitima gyammwe; tetwonoonanga muntu yenna, tetuguliriranga muntu yenna, tetulyazaamaanyanga muntu yenna." 
2Corinthians7:3 Soogedde kubanenya, kubanga nayogedde dda nga muli mu mitima gyaffe okufiira awamu nammwe n'okubeera abalamu awamu nammwe." 
2Corinthians7:4 Njogera n'obuvumu bungi gye muli, nneenyumiriza nnyo ku lwammwe; njijudde nnyo essanyu, nsukkiridde okujaguza mu bibonoobono byaffe byonna." 
2Corinthians7:5 Kubanga era bwe twajja mu Makedoni, omubiri gwaffe ne gutalaba kuwummula n'akatono, naye ne tubonaabona eruuyi n'eruuyi; ebweru yaliyo entalo, munda mwalimu okutya." 
2Corinthians7:6 Naye asanyusa abasobeddwa, ye Katonda, n'atusanyusa ffe, olw'okujja kwa Tito." 
2Corinthians7:7 So si lwa kujja kwe kwokka, era naye n'olw'okusanyusibwa kwe mwa musanyusa, bwe yatubuulira okwegomba kwammwe, okunakuwala kwammwe, okunyiikira kwammwe ku lwange; nange kyennava nneeyongera okusanyuka." 
2Corinthians7:8 Kuba newakubadde nga nnabanakuwaza n'ebbaluwa yange, sejjusa, newakubadde nga nnamala okwejjusa; kubanga ndabye ng'ebbaluwa eyo yabanakuwaza, newakubadde nga yabanakuwaza akaseera." 
2Corinthians7:9 Kaakano nsanyuse, sisanyuse kubanga mwanakuwazibwa, naye kubanga mwanakuwala n'okwenenya ne mwenenya: kubanga mwanakuwala eri Katonda, muleme okufiirwa mu kigambo kyonna ku bwaffe." 
2Corinthians7:10 Kubanga okunakuwala eri Katonda kuleeta okwenenya okw'obulokozi okutejjusibwa: naye okunakuwala okw'omu nsi kuleeta okufa. 
2Corinthians7:11 Kubanga, laba, okunakuwala okwo eri Katonda nga kwabaleetera okufuba okungi, era n'okuwoza ensonga yammwe, era n'okusunguwala, era n'okutya, era n'okwegomba, era n'okunyiikira, era n'okuwalana eggwanga! Mu byonna mwetegeeza nga muli balongoofu mu kigambo ekyo." 
2Corinthians7:12 Kale newakubadde nga nnabawandiikira, ssaawandiika ku lw'oyo eyakola obubi, newakubadde ku lw'oyo eyakolwa obubi, wabula okunyiikira kwammwe ku lwaffe kulyoke kulabisibwe eri mmwe mu maaso ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians7:13 Kyetwava tusanyusibwa; ne mu kusanyusibwa kwaffe, ne tweyongera nnyo okusanyuka olw'essanyu lya Tito, kubanga mmwe mwenna mwawummuza omwoyo gwe." 
2Corinthians7:14 Kuba oba nga nneenyumiriza mu kigambo kyonna ku lwammwe eri oyo, ssaakwatibwa nsonyi; naye nga bwe twababuulira byonna mu mazima, era bwe kutyo n'okwenyumiriza kwaffe eri Tito kwali kwa mazima." 
2Corinthians7:15 N'okwagala kwe okw'omunda kweyongera nnyo nnyini okubeera gye muli, ng'ajjukira okugonda kwammwe mwenna, bwe mwamusembeza n'okutya n'okukankana." 
2Corinthians7:16 Nsanyuse kubanga mu byonna nnina obwesige mu mmwe. 
2Corinthians8:1 Era tubategeeza, ab'oluganda, ekisa kya Katonda kye yalaga ekkanisa ez'e Makedoni." 
2Corinthians8:2 Mu kugezebwa kwabwe, nga baabonyaabonyezebwa ennyo, essanyu lyabwe eryasukkirira, n'obwavu bwabwe obwassuka, byombi byajjuzibwa okugaba kwabwe okwanjulukufu." 
2Corinthians8:3 Kubanga, ntegeeza nti bo, baagaba okusinziira ku busobozi bwabwe, era nkakasa nga baasinzawo, naye nga beeyagalidde bokka." 
2Corinthians8:4 Baatusaba n'okwegayirira okungi bakkirizibwe okwegatta n'abo abayamba abatukuvu. 
2Corinthians8:5 Era baakola si nga bwe nnali ndowooza, naye baasooka okwewaayo bokka eri Mukama waffe, n'eri ffe mu kwagala kwa Katonda." 
2Corinthians8:6 Kyetwava tusaba Tito, nga bwe yatandika edda omulimu ogwo ogw'ekisa, ajje agumalirize ne mu mmwe." 
2Corinthians8:7 Naye nga bwe musukkirira mu byonna, mu kukkiriza, ne mu kwogera, ne mu kutegeera, ne mu kufuba kwonna, ne mu kwagala kwammwe gyetuli, era musukkirirenga ne mu mulimu guno ogw'ekisa." 
2Corinthians8:8 Soogera nga mbalagira bulagizi, wabula okukakasa nti olw'okufuba kw'abalala okwagala kwammwe nakwo kwa mazima." 
2Corinthians8:9 Kubanga mumanyi ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, nti bwe yali omugagga, naye n'afuuka omwavu ku lwammwe, obwavu bwe bulyoke bubagaggawaze mmwe." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ku nsonga eno mbawa amagezi, kisingako kaakano okumaliriza kye mwatandika omwaka gumu ogwayita, sso si kukola kwokka, era naye n'okwagala," 
2Corinthians8:11 bwe butyo obumalirivu bwammwe obw'okukyagala bwenkane n'okukimaliriza, nga mukozesa ebyo bye mulina." 
2Corinthians8:12 Kuba oba nga waliwo kye mwagala okukola, kikkirizibwa okusinziira ku muntu kyalina, sso si ekyo kyatalina." 
2Corinthians8:13 Kubanga soogedde bwe ntyo, abalala bawummuzibwe, nammwe muteganyizibwe;" 
2Corinthians8:14 wabula olw'okwenkanankana, mmwe bye mulina ebingi mu kiseera kino, bibayambe bo mu kwetaaga kwabwe. Ate ebyabwe bye baliba nabyo ebingi, biribayamba mmwe mu kwetaaga kwammwe; okwenkanankana kubeerewo." 
2Corinthians8:15 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Eyakuŋŋanyanga ennyingi, teyasigazangawo; naye eyakuŋŋaanyanga akatono, teyeetaaganga.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Naye Katonda yeebazibwe, awadde Tito omutima ogubalumirwa." 
2Corinthians8:17 Kubanga teyakoma ku kukkiriza bukkirizza kye twamusaba, naye kennyini mukufuba ajja gye muli ku bubwe." 
2Corinthians8:18 Era tutuma wamu naye ow'oluganda, atenderezebwa olw'okubuulira Enjiri mu kkanisa zonna." 
2Corinthians8:19 Sso si ekyo kyokka, era naye oyo ye yalondebwa ekkanisa okutambula naffe olw'ekisa ekyo, kye tuweereza ffe, Mukama waffe aweebwe ekitiibwa, era tulage n'okwagala kwaffe." 
2Corinthians8:20 Twewala omuntu yenna obutatunenya olw'ekirabo kino kye tuweereza. 
2Corinthians8:21 Kubanga tuteekateeka ebirungi, si mu maaso ga Mukama waffe mwokka, era naye ne mu maaso g'abantu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Era tutuma wamu nabo muganda waffe, gwe twakemanga emirundi emingi mu bigambo ebingi nga munyiikivu, naye kaakano munyiikivu nnyo okusingawo, olw'okwesiga okungi kw'alina gye muli." 
2Corinthians8:23 Ebya Tito ye, assa kimu nange, era ye mukozi munnange mu buweereza bwammwe, era ebya baganda baffe abo, be babaka ab'ekkanisa, abo kye kitiibwa kya Kristo." 
2Corinthians8:24 Kale mu maaso g'ekkanisa mubalage ekikakasa okwagala kwammwe n'okwenyumiriza kwaffe ku lwammwe. 
2Corinthians9:1 Kubanga tekinneetaagisa kubawandiikira ku by'ebirabo ebiweebwayo okuyamba abatukuvu. 
2Corinthians9:2 Kubanga mmanyi nga muli beetegefu okuyamba, ekyo kye mbeenyumiririzaamu eri ab'e Makedoni ku lwammwe, nga mbagamba nti, “Ab'omu Akaya beetegefu okuviira ddala mu mwaka ogwayita.” Era obumalirivu bwammwe bwakubiriza bangi mu bo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Naye ntuma ab'oluganda, gye muli okwenyumiriza kwaffe ku lwammwe kuleme okuba okw'obwereere mu kigambo ekyo; wabula mube beetegefu nga bwe njogedde." 
2Corinthians9:4 Sikulwa ng'abamu ku be Makedoni abalijja nange, balibasanga nga temweteeseteese, ffe, ne bwe siiyogere ku kuswala okwammwe, ne tukwatibwa ensonyi olw'obwesige bwetwabalinamu." 
2Corinthians9:5 Kyenvudde ndowooza nga kiŋŋwanidde okwegayirira ab'oluganda, bankulembere okujja gye muli, bateeketeeke ekirabo ekyo kye mwasuubiza, kisangibwe nga kitegekeddwa lwa kweyagalira, sso si lwa kuwalirizibwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Naye kye njogedde kino nti Asiga entono, alikungula ntono; era asiga ennyingi, alikungula nnyingi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Buli muntu akolenga nga bw'amaliridde mu mutima gwe; si lwa nnaku, newakubadde olw'okuwalirizibwa, kubanga Katonda ayagala oyo agaba n'essanyu." 
2Corinthians9:8 Era Katonda ayinza okwaza ekisa kyonna gye muli; mmwe nga mulina ebibamala byonna ennaku zonna mu bigambo byonna mulyoke musukkirirenga mu bikolwa byonna ebirungi. 
2Corinthians9:9 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Yasaasaanya, yagabira abaavu; Obutuukirivu bwe bwa lubeerera emirembe gyonna.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Era oyo awa ensigo omusizi n'emmere ey'okulya, anaabawanga, anaabongerangako ensigo zammwe, era anaayazanga ebibala eby'obutuukirivu bwammwe." 
2Corinthians9:11 Munnagaggawazibwa mu byonna ne mugaba nnyo, okuyita mu ffe Katonda yeebazibwenga." 
2Corinthians9:12 Kubanga okugaba okw'okuweereza okwo tekujjula bujjuzi ekigera ky'ebyo abatukuvu bye beetaaga, era naye kusukkirira olw'okwebaza okungi eri Katonda:" 
2Corinthians9:13 Kubanga olw'okukemebwa kwammwe mu kuweereza kuno batendereza Katonda olw'okugonda kwammwe n'okukkiriza Enjiri ya Kristo, n'olw'obugabi bwammwe gyebali n'eri abalala bonna." 
2Corinthians9:14 Era bo bokka nga babalumirwa mmwe n'okubasabira olw'ekisa kya Katonda ekitasingika mu mmwe. 
2Corinthians9:15 Katonda yeebazibwe olw'ekirabo kye ekitayogerekeka. 
2Corinthians10:1 Naye nze kennyini Pawulo mbeegayirira olw'obukkakkamu n'obuwombeefu bwa Kristo, nze omwetoowaze bwe mba nammwe, ate omuzira nga siri nammwe." 
2Corinthians10:2 Kale mbeegayirira bwegayirizi, bwe ndiba nga ndi nammwe, nneme okubalaga obuzira obwo bwe nkozesa eri abalala abalowooza nga ffe tutambula okugobereranga omubiri." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kuba newakubadde nga tutambulira mu mubiri, tetulwana kugobereranga mubiri," 
2Corinthians10:4 kubanga eby'okulwanyisa eby'entalo zaffe si bya mubiri, naye birina amaanyi agava eri Katonda olw'okusaanyawo ebigo." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tusaanyaawo empaka na buli kintu ekigulumivu ekikulumbazibwa okulwana n'okutegeera kwa Katonda, era nga tujeemulula buli kirowoozo okugondera Kristo." 
2Corinthians10:6 Tweteeseteese okubonereza obutagonda bwonna, okugonda kwammwe lwe kulituukirira." 
2Corinthians10:7 Mutunuulire ebintu nga bwe biri. Omuntu yenna bwe yeekakasa muli nga wa Kristo yeerowooze kino nate yekka nti nga ye bw'ali owa Kristo, era naffe bwe tutyo." 
2Corinthians10:8 Kubanga ne bwe ndisukkirira okwenyumiriza olw'obuyinza bwaffe, Mukama waffe bwe yatuwa olw'okubazimba, so si lwa kubasuula, mu byonna ssirikwatibwa nsonyi." 
2Corinthians10:9 Sandyagadde kufaanana ng'abatiisa n'ebbaluwa zange. 
2Corinthians10:10 Kubanga boogera nti, “Ebbaluwa ze nzibu, za maanyi; naye bw'abaawo omubiri gwe munafu, n'okwogera kwe si kintu.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Alowooza kino, ategeere nti bye tugamba mu bbaluwa nga tetuliiyo, era bye tukola nga tuli nammwe." 
2Corinthians10:12 Kubanga tetwaŋŋaanga kwebalira ku muwendo gw'abo abeetendereza bokka newakubadde okwegeraageranya nabo: naye bo bokka nga beegeza bokka na bokka, era nga beegeraageranya bokka na bokka, tebalina kutegeera." 
2Corinthians10:13 Naffe ffe tetulyenyumiriza okusinga ekigera kyaffe, wabula mu kigera eky'ensalo Katonda gye yatugabira okuba ekigera, era n'okutuuka ne gye muli." 
2Corinthians10:14 Kubanga tetukununkiriza kusinga kigera ng'abatatuuka gye muli; kubanga era twajja n'okutuuka gye muli mu Njiri ya Kristo. 
2Corinthians10:15 Tetwenyumiriza kusinga kigera kyaffe mu mirimu egy'abalala; naye nga tusuubira, okukkiriza kwammwe bwe kukula okugulumizibwa mu mmwe ng'ensalo yaffe bw'eri okusukkirira." 
2Corinthians10:16 Olwo tulisobola okubuulira Enjiri mu bifo ebiri ewala okusinga ewammwe, nga tetwenyumiriza lwa mulimu ogukoleddwa mu kitundu kyabalala." 
2Corinthians10:17 Naye eyeenyumiriza yeenyumirizenga mu Mukama waffe. 
2Corinthians10:18 Kubanga omuntu eyeetendereza yekka si ye asiimibwa, wabula oyo Mukama waffe gw'atendereza." 
2Corinthians11:1 Nnandyagadde mungumiikirize mu busirusiru bwange obutono; era ddala mungumiikirize. 
2Corinthians11:2 Kubanga mbakwatirwa obuggya bwa Katonda; kubanga nnabafumbiza bbammwe omu Kristo, ndyoke mbaleete gyali nga omuwala omulongoofu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Naye ntidde, nti ng'omusota bwe gwalimbalimba Kaawa mu bukujjukujju bwagwo, mpozzi ebirowoozo byammwe biyinza okukyamizibwa muleme okweweerayo ddala mu mazima eri Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:4 Kuba omuntu bw'ajja n'ababuulira Yesu omulala gwe tutaababuulira, oba bwe muweebwa omwoyo omulala gwe mutaaweebwa, oba Njiri ndala, gye mutakkiriza, mwanguwa okubikkiriza." 
2Corinthians11:5 Kubanga ndowooza nti mu butono bwange ssisingibwa nnyo abatume abo abakulu. 
2Corinthians11:6 Naye newakubadde nga siri mumanyirivu mu kwogera, naye siri bwentyo mu kutegeera; naye mu byonna ne mu buli ngeri ekyo twakibolesa." 
2Corinthians11:7 Nnayonoona bwe nneetoowaza nzekka mmwe mugulumizibwe kubanga nnababuulira Enjiri ya Katonda awatali kubasasuza? 
2Corinthians11:8 Nnanyaga ekkanisa endala, nga mpeebwa empeera okuva gyebali ndyoke mbaweereza mmwe." 
2Corinthians11:9 Era bwe nnabanga nammwe nga nneetaaga, ssaazitoowereranga muntu yenna; kubanga ab'oluganda abaava mu Makedoni, bandeetera byonna bye nali nneetaaga. Mu byonna nneekuuma era nja kwekuumanga obutabazitoowereranga, mu ngeri yonna." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ng'amazima ga Kristo bwe gali mu nze, siwali alinziyiza okwenyumiriza okwo mu nsalo ez'e Yakaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Lwaki? kubanga sibaagala? Katonda amanyi nti mbaagala. 
2Corinthians11:12 Ekyo kye nkola, nja kweyongera okukolanga bwentyo, ndyoke nziyize abo abeenyumiririza mu butume bwabwe, nga bagamba nti bakola nga bwe tukola." 
2Corinthians11:13 Kubanga abali ng'abo be batume ab'obulimba, abakozi ab'obukuusa, abeefaananya ng'abatume ba Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 So si ky'amagero; kubanga ne Setaani yeefaananya nga malayika ow'omusana. 
2Corinthians11:15 Kale si kitalo era n'abaweereza be bwe beefaananya ng'abaweereza ab'obutuukirivu; enkomerero yaabwe eribeera ng'ebikolwa byabwe. 
2Corinthians11:16 Nziramu okugamba nti Omuntu yenna aleme okundowooza nga ndi musirusiru; naye okulowooza bwe mundowooza bwe mutyo, kale munsembeze ng'omusirusiru, nange nneenyumirizeeko akatono." 
2Corinthians11:17 Kye njogera, sikyogera nga kigambo kya Mukama waffe, naye nga mu busirusiru, mu buvumu buno obw'okwenyumiriza." 
2Corinthians11:18 Kubanga bangi abeenyumiriza mu mubiri, nange nneenyumiriza." 
2Corinthians11:19 Kubanga mugumiikiriza n'essanyu abasirusiru, kubanga mmwe muli bagezigezi." 
2Corinthians11:20 Kubanga mugumiikiriza omuntu, bw'abafuula abaddu, bw'abamira, bw'abawamba, bwe yeegulumiza, bw'abakuba mu maaso." 
2Corinthians11:21 Njogedde olw'okweswaza, ng'abanafuwala. Naye omuntu yenna ky'agumira (njogera mu busirusiru), nange nguma." 
2Corinthians11:22 Bo Baebbulaniya? Nange. Bo Baisiraeri? Nange. Bo zzadde lya Ibulayimu? Nange. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bo baweereza ba Kristo? (njogera ng'omulalu) Nze mbasinga; mu kufuba mbasukkirira, mu kusibibwa mbasukkirira, mu kukubibwa okuyingirira ennyo, era emirundi mingi nga mbulako katono okufa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Eri Abayudaaya nnakubibwa emirundi etaano (5) emiggo asatu mu mwenda (39). 
2Corinthians11:25 Emirundi esatu (3) nnakubibwa enga, omulundi gumu nnakasuukirirwa amayinja, emirundi esatu (3) eryato lyayatika, nnasula ne nsiiba mu buziba bw'ennyanja." 
2Corinthians11:26 Mu kutambulanga emirundi emingi, nnatuukibwako obulabe obuva mu migga, obulabe obuva mu banyazi, obulabe obuva eri eggwanga lyange, obulabe obuva eri ab'amawanga, obulabe obuva mu kibuga, obulabe obuva mu ddungu, obulabe obuva mu nnyanja, n'obulabe obuva mu b'oluganda ab'obulimba." 
2Corinthians11:27 Mu kufuba n'okukoowa, mu kutunulanga emirundi emingi, mu njala n'ennyonta, mu kusiibanga emirundi emingi, mu mpewo n'okubeera obwereere." 
2Corinthians11:28 Okwongera ku ebyo, waliwo ekinzitoowerera bulijjo bulijjo, okwerariikiriranga olw'ekkanisa zonna." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ani omunafu, nange bwe ssiba munafu? Ani akemebwa n'agwa, nange ne sisaalirwa?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Oba nga kiŋŋwanidde okwenyumiriza, nneenyumirizanga olw'eby'obunafu bwange." 
2Corinthians11:31 Katonda Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu, eyeebazibwa emirembe gyonna, amanyi nga ssirimba." 
2Corinthians11:32 Mu Ddamasiko owessaza eyateekebwawo kabaka Aleta yateega ekibuga Ddamasiko, alyoke ankwate:" 
2Corinthians11:33 ne bampisa mu ddirisa nga ndi mu kisero ku bbugwe, ne ndokoka okuva mu mikono gye." 
2Corinthians12:1 Kiŋŋwanidde okwenyumiriza, newakubadde nga tekusaana; naye ka ŋŋende mu kwolesebwa n'okubikkulirwa kwa Mukama waffe." 
2Corinthians12:2 Mmanyi omuntu mu Kristo, emyaka ekkumi n'ena (14) egiyiseewo eyatwalibwa mu ggulu eryokusatu, oba mu mubiri, oba si mu mubiri, ssimanyi; Katonda ye amaanyi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Era mmanyi nti omuntu oyo oba mu mubiri, oba si mu mubiri, ssimanyi; Katonda ye amanyi," 
2Corinthians12:4 bwe yatwalibwa mu lusuku lwa Katonda, n'awulira ebigambo ebitayogerekeka, ebitasaanira muntu kubyatula." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ku bw'omuntu oyo nneenyumirizanga; naye ku bwange ssiryenyumiriza, wabula mu by'obunafu bwange." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kuba singa nnayagala okwenyumirizanga, ssandibadde musirusiru; kubanga mba njogera mazima; naye mbireka omuntu yenna aleme kulowooza ku nze okusinga kyandabamu oba kyawulira gyendi." 
2Corinthians12:7 Naye olw'okunziyiza okwegulumiza ennyo, olw'ebyo ebyambikkulirwa, kyennava mpeebwa eriggwa mu mubiri, omubaka wa Setaani okumbonyaabonya, nnemenga okugulumizibwa ennyo." 
2Corinthians12:8 Emirundi esatu nneegayirira Mukama ekigambo ekyo kinveeko. 
2Corinthians12:9 N'aŋŋamba nti, “Ekisa kyange kikumala; kubanga amaanyi gange gatuukiririra mu bunafu.” Kyenaavanga nneenyumiriza n'essanyu eringi olw'eby'obunafu bwange, amaanyi ga Kristo galyoke gasiisire ku nze." 
2Corinthians12:10 Kale olwa Kristo, kyenva nsanyukira obunafu, okugirirwanga ekyejo, okwetaaganga, okuyigganyizibwanga, okutegananga, okulangibwanga Kristo: kubanga bwe mba omunafu, lwe mba ow'amaanyi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Mbadde musirusiru! Mmwe mwampaliriza; kubanga nnagwanira mmwe okuntendereza; kubanga newakubadde nga nze siri kintu, naye abatume abo abakulu ennyo, tebansinga mu kigambo kyonna." 
2Corinthians12:12 Mazima obubonero obw'omutume bwakolerwanga ewammwe mu kugumiikiriza kwonna, mu bubonero n'eby'amagero n'eby'amaanyi." 
2Corinthians12:13 Kubanga kiki ekkanisa endala kye zaabasingamu, okuggyako nze nzekka obutabazitoowereranga? Munsonyiwe ekyonoono ekyo." 
2Corinthians12:14 Laba, omulundi ogwokusatu kaakano nneeteeseteese okujja gye muli; so siribazitoowerera, kubanga sinoonya byammwe, wabula mmwe, kubanga tekigwanira abaana okuterekeranga abakadde, wabula abakadde okuterekeranga abaana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ndiwaayo ebyange, era nange ndyeweerayo ddala ku lwammwe, nga ndi musanyufu. Kale bwe mbaagala ennyo, mmwe musaana kunjagala katono?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Mukkiriza nti nze ssaabazitoowerera, naye, bwe nnali omugerengetanya, nnabatega mu lukwe ne mbakwasa." 
2Corinthians12:17 Waliwo amagoba gonna ge nnafuna okuva gye muli okuyita mu abo be nnabatumira? 
2Corinthians12:18 Neegayirira Tito okugenda, era ne ntuma ow'oluganda omulala awamu naye. Tito yafuna amagoba gonna okuva gye muli? Ye nange tetwakolera mu mwoyo gumu? Tetwatambulira mu kisinde kimu?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Obw'edda mulowoozezza nga ffe twewolereza mu maaso gammwe? Mu maaso ga Katonda twogerera mu Kristo. Naye byonna, abaagalwa, twogera bya kubazimba mmwe." 
2Corinthians12:20 Kubanga ntidde, bwe ndijja, mpozzi nneme okubasanga nga mufaanana nga bwe ssaagala, nange mmwe muleme okunsanga nga nfaanana nga bwe mutayagala; mpozzi ne wabaawo okuyomba, obuggya, obusungu, empaka, okulyolyoma, okugeya, okwegulumiza, n'okujeema." 
2Corinthians12:21 Era ntya nti bwe ndijja nate, Katonda wange alintoowaza mu maaso gammwe, nange ne nakuwalira abangi abaayonoona edda ne bateenenya obugwagwa n'obwenzi n'obukaba bwe baakola." 
2Corinthians13:1 Guno gwe mulundi ogwokusatu nga njija gye muli. Mu kamwa k'abajulirwa ababiri oba basatu buli kigambo kirinywera. 
2Corinthians13:2 Nnalaalika era ndaalika, nga bwe nnakola bwe nnali eyo omulundi ogwokubiri, era ne kaakano bwe ntyo nga ssiriiyo, mbagamba abo abaayonoona edda n'abalala bonna, nti bwe ndijja nate, ssirisaasira." 
2Corinthians13:3 Kubanga munoonya ekikakasa nga Kristo ayogerera mu nze; Kristo oyo si munafu nga akolagana nammwe, naye alina amaanyi mu mmwe;" 
2Corinthians13:4 Kubanga yakomererwa mu bunafu, naye mulamu olw'amaanyi ga Katonda. Kubanga naffe tuli banafu mu ye, naye mu kukolagana nammwe tuliba balamu awamu naye olw'amaanyi ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians13:5 Mwekebere mwekka oba nga muli mu kukkiriza; mwekeme mwekka. Oba temutegeera mwekka nga Yesu Kristo ali mu mmwe? Mpozzi ng'ekigezo ekyo kibalemye! 
2Corinthians13:6 Naye nsuubira nga mulitegeera nga ffe tetulemeddwa. 
2Corinthians13:7 Era tusaba Katonda mmwe mulemenga okukola obubi bwonna; si ffe okulabika ng'abasiimibwa, wabula mmwe okukolanga obulungi, ffe ne bwe tulibeera ng'abatasiimibwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Kubanga tetuyinza kuziyiza mazima, wabula okugayamba." 
2Corinthians13:9 Kubanga tusanyuka ffe bwe tuba abanafu, nammwe bwe muba n'amaanyi; era na kino tukisaba, mmwe okutuukirira." 
2Corinthians13:10 Kyenvudde mpandiika ebyo nga ssiri eyo, bwe mbeera eyo nneme okuba omukambwe, ng'obuyinza bwe buli Mukama waffe bwe yampa olw'okuzimba, so si lwa kumenya." 
2Corinthians13:11 Eky'enkomerero, ab'oluganda, mweraba. Mutuukirire; musanyusibwe; mulowooze bumu; mubeere n'emirembe, ne Katonda ow'okwagala n'emirembe anaabanga nammwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Mulamusagane n'okunywegera okutukuvu. 
2Corinthians13:13 Abatukuvu bonna babalamusizza. 
2Corinthians13:14 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'okwagala kwa Katonda, n'okusseekimu okw'Omwoyo Omutukuvu, bibeerenga nammwe mwenna." 
Galatians1:1 Pawulo omutume, ataabufuna kuva mu bantu wadde okuyita mu muntu, wabula okuva eri Yesu Kristo ne Katonda Kitaffe, eyamuzuukiza mu bafu," 
Galatians1:2 n'ab'oluganda bonna abali nange tuwandiikira ekkanisa ez'e Ggalatiya. 
Galatians1:3 Ekisa kibenga gye muli n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe, ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo," 
Galatians1:4 eyeewaayo olw'ebibi byaffe, alyoke atuggye mu mirembe gino egiriwo emibi ng'okwagala kwa Katonda era Kitaffe bwe kuli," 
Galatians1:5 aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
Galatians1:6 Nneewuunya kubanga muvudde mangu ku oyo, eyabayita mu kisa kya Kristo okugoberera enjiri endala," 
Galatians1:7 si kuba nti waliwo enjiri endala, wabula mwatawanyizibwa abantu abamu, abaagala okukyusiza ddala Enjiri ya Kristo." 
Galatians1:8 Naye oba nga ffe oba malayika ava mu ggulu bw'abuuliranga enjiri okuggyako gye twababuulira, akolimirwenga." 
Galatians1:9 Nga bwe twasooka okwogera, bwe ntyo ne kaakano nkiddamu nti, Omuntu bw'ababuuliranga enjiri eteri eyo ggye mwakkiriza, akolimirwenga." 
Galatians1:10 Nkolerera kusiimibwa bantu, nantiki Katonda? Oba ngezaako kusanyusa bantu? Singa nnali nga nkyali mu kusanyusa abantu, ssandibadde muddu wa Kristo." 
Galatians1:11 Kubanga mbategeeza, ab'oluganda, nti Enjiri gye nnababuulira, si ya buntu," 
Galatians1:12 kubanga nange ssaagiweebwa muntu wadde okuyigirizibwa omuntu, wabula Yesu Kristo ye yagimbikkulira." 
Galatians1:13 Kubanga mwawulira nga bwe nnali edda mu ddiini y'Ekiyudaaya, nga nnayigganyanga ekkanisa ya Katonda nga ngezaako okugizikiriza." 
Galatians1:14 ne mpitirizanga mu ddiini y'Ekiyudaaya okusinga bangi bwe twakula mu ggwanga lyaffe, nga mbakiranga okubeera n'obuggya obungi ennyo mu mpisa ze nnaweebwa bajjajjange." 
Galatians1:15 Naye Katonda bwe yasiima, eyanjawula okuva mu lubuto lwa mmange, n'ampita olw'ekisa kye," 
Galatians1:16 n'ambikkulira Omwana we, ndyoke mmubuulirenga mu b'amawanga; sseebuuza ku muntu n'omu," 
Galatians1:17 so ssaayambuka Yerusaalemi eri abo abansooka okubeera abatume, naye n'agenda mu Buwalabu, oluvannyuma ne nkomawo mu Ddamasiko." 
Galatians1:18 Awo bwe waayitawo emyaka esatu ne nnyambuka e Yerusaalemi okulaba Keefa, ne mmala naye ennaku kkumi na ttaano (15)." 
Galatians1:19 Naye ssaalaba mulala ku batume wabula Yakobo muganda wa Mukama waffe. 
Galatians1:20 Kale, bye mpandiika, si bya bulimba mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Galatians1:21 Awo bwe n'avaayo ne ŋŋenda mu bitundu bye Busuuli ne Kirukiya. 
Galatians1:22 Era ekkanisa za Kristo mu Buyudaaya zaali tezinantegeera," 
Galatians1:23 naye ne bawuliranga buwulizi nti, “Eyatuyigganyanga edda kaakano abuulira okukkiriza kwe yagezaako okuzikiriza,”" 
Galatians1:24 ne bagulumiza Katonda ku lwange. 
Galatians2:1 Awo nga wayiseewo emyaka kkumi n'ena (14) n'ayambuka nate e Yerusaalemi wamu ne Balunabba nga ntutte ne Tito. 
Galatians2:2 Nnagendayo lwa kubikkulirwa; ne mbanjulira enjiri, gye mbuulira mu b'amawanga. Nnayogera n'abo abaatenderezebwa, mu kyama bategeere Enjiri gye mbuulira mu b'amawanga, si kulwa nga bwe nkola mba nga akolera obwereere." 
Galatians2:3 Naye newakubadde Tito, gwe nnali naye, eyali Omuyonaani, teyawalirizibwa kukomolebwa." 
Galatians2:4 Naye olw'ab'oluganda ab'obulimba abaayingizibwa mu kyama, abaayingira mu kyama okuketta eddembe lyaffe lye tulina mu Kristo Yesu, okututeeka mu buddu." 
Galatians2:5 Abo tetwabagonderako n'akatono, amazima g'Enjiri gasobole okubakuumirwa mmwe." 
Galatians2:6 Naye abo abatwalibwa okuba ekintu eky'omuwendo, nga bwe bali, ku nze tewali njawulo, Katonda tasosola mu bantu, abo, ŋŋamba, abali baatenderezebwa tebalina kye bannyongerako;" 
Galatians2:7 naye mu ngeri endala, bwe baalaba nga nnateresebwa Enjiri y'abo abatali bakomole, nga Peetero bwe yateresebwa ey'abakomole" 
Galatians2:8 kubanga oyo eyakolera Peetero olw'obutume bw'abakomole, ye yakolera ne mu nze olw'ab'amawanga;" 
Galatians2:9 era bwe baategeera ekisa kye nnaweebwa, Yakobo ne Keefa ne Yokaana, abaatenderezebwa okuba empagi, ne batuwa, nze ne Balunabba, omukono ogwa ddyo ogw'okussa ekimu naffe, ffe tugende eri ab'amawanga, bo bagende eri abakomole;" 
Galatians2:10 kyokka, baatusaba tujjukirenga abaavu; ekyo kye nnyini kye nesunga okukola." 
Galatians2:11 Naye Keefa bwe yajja e Antiyokiya, nnamuwakanya nga tulabagana amaaso n'amaaso, kubanga yali mukyamu ddala." 
Galatians2:12 Kubanga abantu abamu abaava ewa Yakobo bwe baali tebannajja, yalyanga n'ab'amawanga: naye bwe bajja, ne yeeyawula n'abaawukanako, ng'atya abakomole." 
Galatians2:13 Era n'Abayudaaya abalala bonna abaali naye, ne bamwegattako mu bukuusa, ne Balunabba n'okuwalulwa n'awalulwa obukuusa bwabwe." 
Galatians2:14 Naye bwe nnalaba nga teberambise butereevu mu mazima g'Enjiri, ne ŋŋambira Keefa mu maaso gaabwe bonna nti, “Oba nga ggwe bw'oli Omuyudaaya ogoberera empisa z'ab'amawanga ezitali za Kiyudaaya, owaliriza otya ab'amawanga okugobereranga empisa z'Ekiyudaaya?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ffe, Abayudaaya mu buzaaliranwa, tetuli b'amawanga aboonoonyi," 
Galatians2:16 kyokka tukimanyi bulungi nti omuntu taweebwa butuukirivu lwa bikolwa bya mateeka wabula olw'okukkiriza Yesu Kristo, era naffe twakkiriza Kristo Yesu, tulyoke tuweebwe obutuukirivu olw'okukkiriza Kristo, naye si lwa bikolwa bya mateeka: kubanga olw'ebikolwa eby'amateeka tewali alina omubiri aliweebwa obutuukirivu." 
Galatians2:17 Naye oba nga, mu kufuba kwaffe okuweebwa obutuukirivu mu Kristo, ffe ffennyini twasangibwa okuba aboonoonyi, kale Kristo muweereza wa kibi? Nedda, n'akatono!" 
Galatians2:18 Kubanga bwe nzimba nate bye nnasuula, nneeraga nzekka okuba omwonoonyi." 
Galatians2:19 Kubanga olw'amateeka nnafa ku mateeka, ndyoke mbe omulamu eri Katonda." 
Galatians2:20 Nnakomererwa wamu ne Kristo; naye ndi mulamu; si ku bwange nate, naye Kristo ye mulamu mu nze: era obulamu bwe nnina kaakano mu mubiri, mbulina lwa kukkiriza Omwana wa Katonda eyanjagala ne yeewaayo ku lwange." 
Galatians2:21 Ssidibya kisa kya Katonda: kubanga obutuukirivu bwe buba mu mateeka, nga Kristo yafiira bwereere." 
Galatians3:1 Mmwe Abaggalatiya abasirusiru! Ani eyabaloga, so nga mwalagibwa mu lwatu Yesu Kristo eyakomererwa?" 
Galatians3:2 Kino kyokka kye njagala okubabuuza: Mwaweebwa Omwoyo lwa bikolwa bya mateeka nantiki lwa kuwulira kwa kukkiriza? 
Galatians3:3 Bwe mutyo bwe mutalina magezi? Abaasookera mu Mwoyo, kaakati mukomekerereza mu mubiri?" 
Galatians3:4 Mwabonyaabonyezebwa ebyenkana awo bya bwereere? So nga ddala si bwereere. 
Galatians3:5 Abawa Omwoyo, akola eby'amaanyi mu mmwe, akola lwa bikolwa bya mateeka nantiki lwa kuwulira kwa kukkiriza?" 
Galatians3:6 Mulabe Ibulayimu “yakkiriza Katonda, n'abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu.”" 
Galatians3:7 Kale mutegeere nti abantu abakkiriza be baana ba Ibulayimu. 
Galatians3:8 N'ekyawandiikibwa, kyalaba edda nti Katonda aliwa Ab'amawanga obutuukirivu lwa kukkiriza, Enjiri neesooka okubuulirwa Ibulayimu nti, “Mu ggwe amawanga gonna mmwe galiweerwa omukisa.”" 
Galatians3:9 Bwe kityo n'abo abali mu kukkiriza baweebwa omukisa Ibulayimu gwe yaweebwa bwe yakkiriza. 
Galatians3:10 Kubanga bonna abeesigama ku bikolwa by'amateeka, bali wansi wa kikolimo: kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Akolimiddwa buli ataatuukirizenga kukola byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'amateeka.”" 
Galatians3:11 Era kaakano kimanyiddwa nti tewali Katonda gwawa butuukirivu olw'okukuuma amateeka; kubanga, “ Oyo ali mu kukkiriza ye mutuukirivu, yaliba omulamu.”" 
Galatians3:12 Naye amateeka go tegeesigama ku kukkiriza, “naye nti Omuntu agakola anaabeeranga mulamu mu go.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kristo yatununula okuva mu kikolimo ky'amateeka, bwe yafuuka ekikolimo ku lwaffe: kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Akolimiddwa buli awanikiddwa ku muti.”" 
Galatians3:14 Kale kaakano mu Kristo Yesu omukisa gwa Ibulayimu gutuuka eri Ab'amawanga, tulyoke tuweebwe ekyasuubizibwa eky'Omwoyo olw'okukkiriza." 
Galatians3:15 Ab'oluganda, njogera mu buntu: endagaano newakubadde nga ya muntu buntu bw'emala okukakasibwa, tewali agiggyawo newakubadde agyongerako." 
Galatians3:16 Kaakano ebyo ebyasuubizibwa byagambibwa Ibulayimu n'omwana we. Naye tekyogera nti, “ N'eri abaana be nga bangi,” naye eri omu, “nga ye mwana we,” oyo ye Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Kino kye ntegeeza: amateeka, agajja nga wayiseewo emyaka bina mu asatu (430) tegaggyaawo ndagaano Katonda gye yali amaze okukakasa, okusobola okudibya ekyasuubizibwa." 
Galatians3:18 Kale oba ng'obusika buva mu mateeka, buba tebukyali bwa kisuubizo: naye Katonda yabuwa Ibulayimu olw'okusuubiza." 
Galatians3:19 Kale lwaki amateeka gaateekebwawo? Gassibwawo lwa kwonoona, okutuusa nga omwana gwe basuubiza ekisuubizo azze, era gaalagirwa bamalayika okuyita mu mutabaganya." 
Galatians3:20 Naye omutabaganya kitegeeza kusukka kw'omu, naye Katonda ali omu." 
Galatians3:21 Kale olwo amateeka gakontana n'ebisuubizo bya Katonda? Si bwe kiri; kuba singa amateeka gaaweebwa nga ge gayinza okuleeta obulamu, ddala obutuukirivu bwandibadde mu mateeka." 
Galatians3:22 Naye ebyawandiikibwa biteeka ebintu byonna ku kibi, olwo ekyo ekyasuubizibwa olw'okukkiriza Kristo Yesu kiryoke kiweebwe abo abakkiriza." 
Galatians3:23 Naye okukkiriza nga tekunnaba kujja, twakuumirwanga mu bufuge bwa mateeka, nga tusibibwa olw'okukkiriza okugenda okubikkulwa." 
Galatians3:24 Bwe kityo amateeka gaatukuuma okutuusa Kristo bwe yajja, tulyoke tuweebwe obutuukirivu olw'okukkiriza." 
Galatians3:25 Naye kaakano ng'okukkiriza nga kumaze okujja, tetukyali wansi wa mukuumi." 
Galatians3:26 Kubanga mu Kristo Yesu mmwe mwenna muli baana ba Katonda olw'okukkiriza. 
Galatians3:27 Kubanga mwenna abaabatizibwa okuyingira mu Kristo, mwayambala Kristo." 
Galatians3:28 Tewali Muyudaaya, newakubadde Omuyonaani, tewali muddu newakubadde ow'eddembe, tewali musajja na mukazi: kubanga mmwe mwenna muli omu mu Kristo Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Era mmwe bwe muli aba Kristo, kale muli zzadde lya Ibulayimu, era muli basika ng'okusuubiza bwe kwali." 
Galatians4:1 Ntegeeza kino nti omusika ng'akyali muto tayawulwa na muddu n'akatono, newakubadde nga ye mukama wa byonna;" 
Galatians4:2 naye afugibwa abakuza n'abasigire okutuusa ekiseera kitaawe kye yalagira nga kituuse. 
Galatians4:3 Bwe tutyo naffe, bwe twali tukyali bato, twali baddu nga tufugibwa emyoyo egy'omu nsi." 
Galatians4:4 Naye ekiseera kye nnyini bwe kyatuuka, Katonda n'atuma Omwana we eyazaalibwa omukazi, eyazaalibwa ng'afugibwa amateeka," 
Galatians4:5 alyoke abanunule abafugibwa amateeka, tulyoke tuweebwe okufuuka abaana." 
Galatians4:6 Era kubanga muli baana, Katonda yatuma Omwoyo gw'Omwana we mu mitima gyaffe, ng'akaaba nti “Aba, Kitaffe.”" 
Galatians4:7 Bwe kityo naawe tokyali muddu, naye mwana; oba ng'oli mwana, era oli musika ku bwa Katonda." 
Galatians4:8 Naye mu nnaku ziri bwe mwali temunnamanya Katonda, mwabanga baddu ba bitonde ebitali bakatonda." 
Galatians4:9 Naye kaakano bwe mutegedde Katonda, oba ekisinga bwe mutegeddwa Katonda, mukyuka mutya okudda emabega okugoberera emyoyo eminafu egisabiriza, ate era mweteeke mu buddu bwagyo?" 
Galatians4:10 Mukwata ennaku n'emyezi n'ebiro n'emyaka. 
Galatians4:11 Ntidde si kulwa nga okutegana kwange gye muli okuba okw'obwereere. 
Galatians4:12 Mbeegayirira ab'oluganda, mubeere nga nze, kubanga nange ndi nga mmwe, temunsobyangako;" 
Galatians4:13 naye mumanyi ng'olw'obunafu bw'omubiri nnababuulira Enjiri omulundi ogwolubereberye; 
Galatians4:14 naye newakubadde nga nnabazitowerera olw'obulwadde bwange, temwannyooma oba okunsekerera, naye mwanzikiriza nga malayika wa Katonda, nga Kristo Yesu." 
Galatians4:15 Kale okumatira okwo kwe mwafuna kwadda wa? Kubanga ndi mujulirwa wammwe nti, singa kyali kyetaagisa, mwandiggyeemu amaaso gammwe ne mugawa nze." 
Galatians4:16 Kale nfuuse mulabe wammwe nga mbabuulira amazima? 
Galatians4:17 Abo babakozesa bukozesa, naye si lwa bulungi; kye baagala kwe kubaggalira ebweru, mmwe mulyoke mwegonzenga gyebali." 
Galatians4:18 Naye kirungi abantu okwegonzanga mu bulungi ennaku zonna, naye si nze lwe mbeera nammwe lwokka." 
Galatians4:19 Abaana bange abato, munnyongedde okubeera mu bulumi obungi, okutuusa Kristo lw'alibumbibwa mu mmwe," 
Galatians4:20 era nnandyagadde okubeera nammwe kaakano, n'okukyusa eddoboozi lyange, kubanga mberalikiridde nnyo." 
Galatians4:21 Mmumbuulire mmwe abaagala okufugibwa amateeka, temuwulira mateeka?" 
Galatians4:22 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti Ibulayimu yalina abaana babiri, omu wa muzaana, omulala wa wa ddembe." 
Galatians4:23 Ow'omuzaana yazaalibwa lwa mubiri; naye ow'ow'eddembe lwa kusuubiza. 
Galatians4:24 Ebyo bya lugero: kubanga abakazi abo ze ndagaano bbiri; emu eva ku lusozi Sinaayi, ye yazaala abaana ab'obuddu, eyo ye Agali." 
Galatians4:25 Agali oyo lwe lusozi Sinaayi, oluli mu Buwalabu, era yenkanankana ne Yerusaalemi ekya kaakano: kubanga muddu wamu n'abaana be." 
Galatians4:26 Naye Yerusaalemi eky'omu ggulu kye ky'eddembe, ye nnyaffe." 
Galatians4:27 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Sanyuka, omugumba atazaala; Yanguwa oyogerere waggulu, ggwe atali mu bulumi bwa kuzaala, Kubanga abaana b'oyo eyalekebwayo bangi okusinga ab'oyo alina omusajja.”" 
Galatians4:28 Naye ffe, ab'oluganda, tuli baana ba kisuubizo nga Isaaka bwe yali." 
Galatians4:29 Naye nga mu biro biri eyazaalibwa olw'omubiri nga bwe yayigganya eyazaalibwa olw'Omwoyo, bwe kityo bwe kiri ne kaakano." 
Galatians4:30 Naye ebyawandiikibwa byogera bitya? nti, “Goba omuzaana n'omwana we: kubanga omwana w'omuzaana talisikira wamu n'omwana w'ow'eddembe.”" 
Galatians4:31 Kale, ab'oluganda, ffe tetuli ba muzaana, naye tuli baana ab'omukazi ow'eddembe." 
Galatians5:1 Mu ddembe Kristo yatufuula ba ddembe: kale munywere, mulemenga okusibibwa nate mu kikoligo ky'obuddu." 
Galatians5:2 Kaakano, nze Pawulo, kambategeeze nti, bwe munaakomolebwa, nga Kristo taliiko ky'abagasa." 
Galatians5:3 Era nate ntegeeza buli muntu akomolebwa nti alina ebbanja ery'okukolanga eby'amateeka byonna. 
Galatians5:4 Mwawuliddwa ku Kristo, mmwe abaagala okuweebwa obutuukirivu mu mateeka; mugudde okuva mu kisa." 
Galatians5:5 Kubanga nga tuyita mu Mwoyo, olw'okukkiriza, tulindirira essuubi ery'obutuukirivu." 
Galatians5:6 Kubanga mu Kristo Yesu okukomolebwa newakubadde obutakomolebwa, tekulina maanyi, wabula okukkiriza okukola olw'okwagala." 
Galatians5:7 Mwali mutambula bulungi; ani eyabaziyiza okugonderanga amazima? 
Galatians5:8 Okusendebwasendebwa okwo tekwava eri oyo abayita. 
Galatians5:9 Ekizimbulukusa ekitono kizimbulukusa ekitole kyonna. 
Galatians5:10 Mbeesiga mmwe mu Mukama waffe, nti temulirowooza kigambo kirala: naye oyo abateganya alibaako omusango gwe, ne bw'aliba ani." 
Galatians5:11 Naye nze, ab'oluganda, oba nga nkyayigiriza okukomolebwa, kiki ekikyanjigganyisa? Kale enkonge ey'omusalaba ng'evuddewo." 
Galatians5:12 Nnandyagadde abo abababuguutanya beeraawe! 
Galatians5:13 Kubanga mmwe, ab'oluganda, mwayitibwa lwa ddembe; naye temukozesa ddembe lyammwe, kukola omubiri bye gwagala, naye olw'okwagala muweerezaganenga mwekka na mwekka." 
Galatians5:14 Kubanga amateeka gonna gatuukirira mu kigambo kimu, mu kino nti, “Oyagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala wekka.”" 
Galatians5:15 Naye bwe mulumagana, bwe mulyaŋŋana, mwegenderezenga mulemenga okwemalawo mwekka na mwekka." 
Galatians5:16 Naye njogera nti mutambulirenga mu Mwoyo, era temuutuukirizanga kwegomba kwa mubiri." 
Galatians5:17 Kubanga okwegomba kw'omubiri kulwanagana n'Omwoyo, n'Omwoyo gulwanagana n'omubiri; kubanga ebyo byombiriri bikontana, mulemenga okukola ebyo bye mwagala." 
Galatians5:18 Naye bwe muluŋŋamizibwa Omwoyo, nga temufugibwa mateeka." 
Galatians5:19 Naye ebikolwa by'omubiri bya lwatu, bye bino, obwenzi, obugwenyufu, obukaba," 
Galatians5:20 okusinza ebitali Katonda, obulaguzi, obulabe, okuyomba, obuggya, obusungu, empaka, okweyawula, okwesalamu," 
Galatians5:21 ettima, obutamiivu, ebinyumu, n'ebiri ng'ebyo: mbalabula nga bwenasooka okubalabula nti abo abakola ebyo tebalisikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Galatians5:22 Naye ebibala by'Omwoyo kwe kwagala, okusanyuka, emirembe, okugumiikiriza, ekisa, obulungi, okukkiriza," 
Galatians5:23 obuwombeefu, okwegendereza: ku biri ng'ebyo tewali mateeka." 
Galatians5:24 N'abo aba Kristo Yesu baakomerera omubiri wamu n'omululu gwagwo n'okwegomba kwagwo. 
Galatians5:25 Bwe tuba abalamu ku bw'Omwoyo, era tutambulenga ku bw'Omwoyo." 
Galatians5:26 Tuleme okwenyumiririzanga obwereere, nga twesunguwaza fekka na fekka, nga tetukwatibwa buggya fekka na fekka." 
Galatians6:1 Ab'oluganda, omuntu bw'abanga alina ekibi ky'akoze, mmwe ab'omwoyo mumuluŋŋamyenga mu mwoyo gw'obuwombeefu; nga mwegendereza si kulwa nga nammwe mugwa mu kukemebwa." 
Galatians6:2 Mubeeraganenga emigugu mwekka na mwekka, mutuukirizenga bwe mutyo etteeka lya Kristo." 
Galatians6:3 Kubanga omuntu bwe yeerowoozanga okuba ekintu, so nga si bwali, aba yeerimbalimba." 
Galatians6:4 Naye buli muntu akeberenga omulimu gwe yekka, era n'okwenyumiriza kunaabanga mu ye yekka so si mu mulala." 
Galatians6:5 Kubanga buli muntu alyetikka omugugu gwe yekka. 
Galatians6:6 Naye oyo ayigirizibwa ekigambo agabanirenga wamu ebirungi byonna by'alina n'oyo amuyigiriza. 
Galatians6:7 Temulimbibwanga, Katonda tasekererwa: kubanga omuntu kyonna ky'asiga era ky'alikungula." 
Galatians6:8 Kubanga asigira omubiri gwe ye, alikungula mu mubiri okuvunda; naye asigira Omwoyo, alikungula mu Mwoyo obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Galatians6:9 Tuleme okuddiriranga mu kukola obulungi: kubanga bwe tutakoowa, ebiro bwe birituuka, tulikungula, nga tetuzirise." 
Galatians6:10 Kale, bwe tunaalabanga ebbanga, tubakolenga obulungi bonna, naye okusinga abo abali mu nnyumba ey'okukkiriza." 
Galatians6:11 Mulabe bwe mbawandiikidde mu nnukuta ennene n'omukono gwange nze. 
Galatians6:12 Bonna abaagala okwewoomereza mu mubiri be babawaliriza okukomolebwanga, balemenga okuyigganyizibwa olw'omusalaba gwa Kristo." 
Galatians6:13 Kubanga era n'abo bennyini abakomolebwa amateeka tebagakwata; naye baagala mmwe okukomolebwanga, balyoke beenyumiririzenga ku mubiri gwammwe." 
Galatians6:14 Naye nze ssaagala kwenyumirizanga, wabula mu musalaba gwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo; olw'ogwo ensi ekomereddwa gye ndi, nange eri ensi." 
Galatians6:15 Kubanga okukomolebwa oba obutakomolebwa, si kye kikulu, wabula okufuuka ekitonde ekiggya." 
Galatians6:16 N'abo bonna abanaatambuliranga mu tteeka eryo, emirembe gibenga ku bo, n'okusaasirwa, ne ku Isiraeri wa Katonda." 
Galatians6:17 Okuva ne kaakano, omuntu yenna aleme okunteganya; kubanga nnina enkovu za Yesu ku mubiri gwange." 
Galatians6:18 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga wamu n'omwoyo gwammwe, ab'oluganda. Amiina." 
Ephesians1:1 Pawulo, omutume wa Kristo Yesu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, eri abatukuvu abali mu Efeso n'abakkiriza mu Kristo Yesu." 
Ephesians1:2 Ekisa kibeerenga gye muli n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
Ephesians1:3 Yeebazibwe Katonda Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, eyatuweera mu Kristo buli mukisa gwonna ogw'Omwoyo oguva mu bifo eby'omu ggulu;" 
Ephesians1:4 Kubanga yatulondera mu ye ng'ensi tennaba kutondebwa, ffe okubeera abatukuvu era abatalina kyakunnenyezebwa." 
Ephesians1:5 Yatwawula edda mu kwagala okubeera abaana be okuyita mu Yesu Kristo, nga bwe yasiima olw'okuteesa kwe," 
Ephesians1:6 ekitiibwa eky'ekisa kye kiryoke kitenderezebwenga, kye yatuwa obuwa mu oyo Omwagalwa." 
Ephesians1:7 Mu ye tulina okununulibwa okuyita mu musaayi gwe, okusonyiyibwa ebyonoono byaffe, ng'obugagga obw'ekisa kye bwe buli," 
Ephesians1:8 kye yasukkiriza gyetuli mu magezi gonna n'okutegeera kwonna. 
Ephesians1:9 Kubanga yatumanyisa mu magezi n'okutegeera ekyama eky'okwagala kwe, nga bwe yasiima yekka, okusinziira ku nteekateeka ze yategeka edda mu Kristo." 
Ephesians1:10 Entegeka ezatuukirira mu kiseera kyazo, okugattira awamu ebintu byonna mu Kristo, ebiri mu ggulu n'ebiri ku nsi." 
Ephesians1:11 Mu oyo naffe mwe twafuukira abasika, bwe twayawulibwa edda mu kumalirira kw'oyo akola byonna nga bw'ayagala mu kuteesa kwe." 
Ephesians1:12 Ffe abaasooka okusuubira mu Kristo, twategekebwa n'okulondebwa tulyoke tubeerewo olw'okutendereza ekitiibwa kye." 
Ephesians1:13 Mu oyo nammwe, abawulira ekigambo eky'amazima, Enjiri ey'obulokozi n'okukkiriza bwe mwakkiriza, mwateekebwako envumbo ey'Omwoyo Omutukuvu eyasuubizibwa." 
Ephesians1:14 Oyo gwe musingo gw'obusika bwaffe, okutuusa envuma ya Katonda lw'erinunulibwa, ekitiibwa kye kitenderezebwe." 
Ephesians1:15 Bwe nnawulira okukkiriza Mukama waffe Yesu okuli mu mmwe, n'okwagala kwe mulaga abatukuvu bonna," 
Ephesians1:16 kyenva sirekangayo kwebaza, nga mboogerako mu kusaba kwange." 
Ephesians1:17 Nsaba Katonda wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, Kitaffe ow'ekitiibwa, abawe omwoyo ogw'amagezi n'ogw'okubikkulirwa mu kumutegeera ye." 
Ephesians1:18 Emyoyo gyammwe bwe gibikkulibwa mulyoke mumanye essuubi ery'okuyita kwe bwe liri, n'obugagga obw'ekitiibwa eky'obusika bwe mu batukuvu bwe buli." 
Ephesians1:19 Era n'obukulu obw'amaanyi ge agasinga ennyo eri ffe abakkiriza bwe buli, ng'obuyinza bw'amaanyi ge bwe bukola." 
Ephesians1:20 Ago ge yakozesa mu Kristo, bwe yamuzuukiza okuva mu bafu, n'amutuuza ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo mu bifo eby'omu ggulu," 
Ephesians1:21 waggulu ennyo okusinga okufuga kwonna n'obuyinza n'amaanyi n'obwami na buli linnya eryatulwa si mu mirembe gino gyokka naye ne mu egyo egigenda okujja. 
Ephesians1:22 N'ateeka byonna wansi w'ebigere bye, n'amuteekawo okuba omutwe ku byonna eri ekkanisa," 
Ephesians1:23 gwe mubiri gwe, okutuukirira ku oyo atuukiriza byonna mu byonna." 
Ephesians2:1 Era nammwe yabazuukiza bwe mwali nga mufiiridde mu byonoono n'ebibi byammwe," 
Ephesians2:2 bye mwatambulirangamu edda ng'emirembe egy'ensi eno bwe giri, okugobereranga omukulu w'obuyinza obw'omu bbanga, omwoyo ogukola kaakano mu baana abajeemu." 
Ephesians2:3 Naffe fenna abo be twatambulirangamu edda mu kwegomba kw'omubiri gwaffe, nga tukolanga omubiri n'ebirowoozo bye byagala, ne tubeeranga olw'obuzaaliranwa abaana b'obusungu, nga n'abalala." 
Ephesians2:4 Naye Katonda, kubanga ye mugagga w'ekisa, olw'okwagala kwe okungi kwe yatwagala ffe," 
Ephesians2:5 bwe twali nga tufiiridde mu byonoono byaffe, yatufuula abalamu awamu ne Kristo (mwalokoka lwa kisa)," 
Ephesians2:6 n'atuzuukiza wamu naye, n'atutuuza wamu naye mu bifo eby'omu ggulu mu Kristo Yesu." 
Ephesians2:7 Bwatyo mu mirembe egigenda okujja alyoke alage obugagga obusinga ennyo obw'ekisa kye mu bulungi obuli gyetuli mu Kristo Yesu. 
Ephesians2:8 Kubanga mwalokoka lwa kisa lwa kukkiriza; so tekwava gye muli, kye kirabo kya Katonda," 
Ephesians2:9 tekwava mu bikolwa, omuntu yenna aleme okwenyumirizanga." 
Ephesians2:10 Kubanga ffe tuli mulimu gwe, abaatonderwa mu Kristo Yesu olw'ebikolwa ebirungi, Katonda bye yasooka okuteekateeka ffe okubitambulirangamu." 
Ephesians2:11 Kale mujjukire ng'edda mmwe, abaali ab'amawanga mu mubiri, Abakomole be bayita Abataakomolebwa, mu mubiri okukolebwa n'emikono;" 
Ephesians2:12 nga mu biro biri mwali nga muli wala ne Kristo, mwali nga mubooleddwa mu kika kya Isiraeri, era mwali bannamawanga eri endagaano ez'okusuubiza, nga temulina kusuubira, nga temulina Katonda mu nsi." 
Ephesians2:13 Naye kaakano mu Kristo Yesu mmwe abaali ewala edda musembezebwa olw'omusaayi gwa Kristo. 
Ephesians2:14 Kubanga ye gye mirembe gyaffe, eyafuula byombi ekimu, n'amenyawo ekisenge ekya wakati ekyawula," 
Ephesians2:15 bwe yamala okuggyawo mu mubiri gwe obulabe, obwali ku bipande eby'ebiragiro n'amateeka; alyoke atonde omuntu omuggya mu kifo kyebyo byombi, okuleeta emirembe." 
Ephesians2:16 Era alyoke atabaganye byombi eri Katonda mu mubiri gumu olw'omusalaba, bwe yattira obulabe ku gwo." 
Ephesians2:17 N'ajja n'ababuulira emirembe mmwe abaali ewala, era n'emirembe abo abaali okumpi;" 
Ephesians2:18 kubanga ku bw'oyo naffe tusobola okusembera eri Kitaffe mu Mwoyo omu. 
Ephesians2:19 Kale bwe mutyo temukyali bannamawanga na bayise, naye muli ba kika kimu n'abatukuvu, era ba mu nnyumba ya Katonda." 
Ephesians2:20 Kubanga mwazimbibwa ku musingi gw'abatume ne bannabbi, Kristo Yesu yennyini nga lye jjinja eddene ery'oku nsonda." 
Ephesians2:21 Mu ye buli nnyumba yonna, bw'egattibwa obulungi, ekula okubeeranga Yeekaalu entukuvu mu Mukama waffe;" 
Ephesians2:22 era mu ye nammwe muzimbibwa wamu okubeeranga ekisulo kya Katonda mu Mwoyo. 
Ephesians3:1 Olw'ensonga eno, nze Pawulo, omusibe wa Yesu Kristo ku lwammwe ab'amawanga," 
Ephesians3:2 nsuubira nga mwawulira obuwanika obw'ekisa kya Katonda kye nnaweebwa ku lwa mmwe," 
Ephesians3:3 n'engeri ekyama ekyo gye kyantegeezebwamu mu kubikkulirwa, nga bwe n'awandiika edda mu bigambo ebitono." 
Ephesians3:4 Bwe munaasoma bino munaamanya okutegeera kwange okw'ekyama kya Kristo. 
Ephesians3:5 Ekyo ekitaategeezebwa baana b'abantu, mu mirembe egy'edda nga kaakano bwe kibikkuliddwa abatume be abatukuvu ne bannabbi mu Mwoyo." 
Ephesians3:6 Eno y'engeri ab'amawanga gye babeera, abasikira awamu, era ab'omubiri ogumu, era abassa ekimu mu byasuubizibwa mu Kristo Yesu olw'Enjiri." 
Ephesians3:7 Olw'Enjiri eno, nnafuulibwa omuweereza waayo, ng'ekirabo eky'ekisa kya Katonda bwe kiri kye nnaweebwa ng'okukola kw'amaanyi ge bwe kuli." 
Ephesians3:8 Nze, omuto okusinga abato ab'omu batukuvu bonna, nnaweebwa ekisa kino, okubuuliranga ab'amawanga obugagga bwa Kristo obutanoonyezeka;" 
Ephesians3:9 n'okumulisizanga bonna balabe entegeka ye kyama kino bwe kiri, ekyakwekebwa okuva edda n'edda lyonna mu Katonda eyatonda byonna." 
Ephesians3:10 Kaakano ng'ayita mu kkanisa, Katonda ayagala amanyise amagezi ge amangi, eri abaamasaza n'ab'obuyinza mu bifo eby'omu ggulu." 
Ephesians3:11 Ekyo yakitegeka okuva edda nedda, n'akituukiririza mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
Ephesians3:12 Mu ye mwe tuggya obuvumu, n'obugumu okumusemberera olw'okumukkiriza." 
Ephesians3:13 Kyenva nsaba mmwe mulemenga okuddirira olw'ebibonoobono byange ku lwammwe, ebyo kye kitiibwa kyammwe." 
Ephesians3:14 Kyenva nfukaamirira Kitaffe," 
Ephesians3:15 buli kika eky'omu ggulu n'eky'oku nsi kwe kiggya erinnya," 
Ephesians3:16 abawe mmwe, ng'obugagga bw'ekitiibwa kye bwe buli, okunywezebwa n'amaanyi mu Mwoyo gwe mu muntu ow'omunda." 
Ephesians3:17 Kristo atuulenga mu mitima gyammwe olw'okukkiriza; mubeerenga n'emmizi, munywezebwenga mu kwagala," 
Ephesians3:18 mulyoke muweebwe amaanyi okukwatanga n'amagezi awamu n'abatukuvu bonna obugazi n'obuwanvu n'obugulumivu n'okugenda wansi bwe biri," 
Ephesians3:19 n'okutegeera okwagala kwa Kristo okusinga okutegeerwa, mulyoke mujjulire ddala n'okutuukirira kwonna okwa Katonda." 
Ephesians3:20 Kale oyo ayinza okukola ennyo okusingira ddala byonna bye tusaba oba bye tulowooza, ng'amaanyi bwe gali agakolera mu ffe," 
Ephesians3:21 aweebwenga ekitiibwa mu kkanisa ne mu Kristo Yesu okutuusa emirembe n'emirembe egitaggwaawo. Amiina. 
Ephesians4:1 Kyenva mbeegayirira nze omusibe mu Mukama waffe okutambulanga nga bwe kusaanira okuyitibwa kwe mwayitibwa," 
Ephesians4:2 n'obukkakkamu bwonna n'obuwombeefu, n'okugumiikiriza, nga muzibiikirizagananga mu kwagalana," 
Ephesians4:3 nga munyiikiranga okwekuuma obumu bw'Omwoyo mu kusibibwa n'emirembe. 
Ephesians4:4 Omubiri guli gumu, n'Omwoyo omu, era nga nammwe bwe mwayitibwa mu kusuubira okumu okw'okuyitibwa kwammwe;" 
Ephesians4:5 Mukama waffe omu, okukkiriza kumu, okubatiza kumu," 
Ephesians4:6 Katonda omu, Kitaawe wa bonna, afuga byonna, ayita mu byonna, era ali mu byonna." 
Ephesians4:7 Naye buli muntu mu ffe yaweebwa ekisa ng'ekigera ky'ekirabo kya Kristo bwe kiri. 
Ephesians4:8 Kyava ayogera nti, “Bwe yalinnya waggulu, n'anyaga okunyaga, N'awa abantu ebirabo.”" 
Ephesians4:9 (Naye ekigambo ekyo nti, “Yalinnya,” kitegeeza ki wabula okugamba nti era yakka mu njuyi eza wansi ez'ensi?" 
Ephesians4:10 Eyakka era ye wuuyo eyalinnya waggulu ennyo okusinga eggulu lyonna, alyoke ajjuze byonna)." 
Ephesians4:11 Era oyo n'awa abalala okubeera abatume, n'abalala bannabbi, n'abalala ababuulizi, n'abalala abalunda n'abayigiriza." 
Ephesians4:12 Olw'okuteekateeka abatukuvu, olw'omulimu ogw'okuweereza, n'olw'okuzimba omubiri gwa Kristo," 
Ephesians4:13 okutuusa lwe tulituuka fenna mu bumu obw'okukkiriza, n'obw'okutegeera Omwana wa Katonda, lwe tulituuka okuba omuntu omukulu okutuuka mu kigera eky'obukulu obw'okutuukirira kwa Kristo." 
Ephesians4:14 Tulemenga okubeera nate abaana abato, nga tuyuugana nga tutwalibwanga buli mpewo ey'okuyigiriza, mu bukuusa bw'abantu, mu nkwe, olw'okugoberera okuteesa okw'obulimba." 
Ephesians4:15 Naye, bwe twogeranga amazima mu kwagalana, tulyoke tukule okutuuka mu ye mu byonna, gwe mutwe, Kristo." 
Ephesians4:16 Mu oyo omubiri gwonna bwe gugattibwa obulungi ne gunywezebwa awamu buli nnyingo ng'ereeta ebyayo, ng'okukola mu kigera okwa buli kitundu bwe kuli, omubiri gweyongera okukula olw'okwezimba mu kwagalana." 
Ephesians4:17 Kyenva njogera kino ne ntegeeza mu Mukama waffe, mmwe mulemenga okutambula nate, era ng'ab'amawanga bwe batambula mu birowoozo byabwe ebitaliimu," 
Ephesians4:18 nga balina ekizikiza mu magezi gaabwe, nga baabooleddwa okuva mu bulamu bwa Katonda olw'obutategeera obuli mu bo, obuleetebwa okukakanyala okw'omutima gwabwe." 
Ephesians4:19 Baafuuka bakakanyanyavu, ne beewaayo mu bwenzi, okukolanga eby'obugwagwa bwonna mu kwegomba." 
Ephesians4:20 Naye mmwe temwayiga bwe mutyo Kristo; 
Ephesians4:21 nsuubira nga mwamuwulira, ne muyigirizibwa mu ye ng'amazima bwe gali mu Yesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Mweggyeko omuntu ow'edda agoberera embeera z'obulamu bwammwe ez'edda, eyayonooneka olw'okwegomba okw'obulimba;" 
Ephesians4:23 era muzzibwe abaggya mu mwoyo ogw'ebirowoozo byammwe. 
Ephesians4:24 Mwambale omuntu omuggya, eyatondebwa mu kifaananyi kya Katonda mu butuukirivu ne mu butukuvu obw'amazima." 
Ephesians4:25 Kale mwambule obulimba, mwogerenga amazima buli muntu ne munne, kubanga tuli bitundu bya bannaffe fekka na fekka." 
Ephesians4:26 Musunguwalenga so temwonoonanga, enjuba eremenga okugwa nga mukyalina obusungu," 
Ephesians4:27 so temuwanga bbanga Setaani. 
Ephesians4:28 Eyabbanga alemenga okubba nate, naye waakiri afubenga, ng'akola ebirungi n'emikono gye, alyoke abeerenga n'eky'okumuwa eyeetaaga." 
Ephesians4:29 Buli kigambo ekivundu kireme okuvanga mu kamwa kammwe, naye ekirungi bwe kinaabangawo olw'okuzimba nga omuntu bwe yeetaaga, abawulira kibawenga ekisa." 
Ephesians4:30 So temunakuwazanga Mwoyo Mutukuvu owa Katonda, eyabateesaako akabonero okutuusa olunaku olw'okununulibwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Okukaawa kwonna n'obusungu n'obukambwe n'okukaayana n'okuvuma bibavengako, awamu n'ettima lyonna," 
Ephesians4:32 era mubeerenga n'obulungi mwekka na mwekka, abakwatibwa ekisa, nga musonyiwagananga, era nga Katonda bwe yabasonyiwa mu Kristo." 
Ephesians5:1 Kale mufaananenga Katonda, ng'abaana abaagalwa;" 
Ephesians5:2 era mutambulirenga mu kwagala, era nga Kristo bwe yabaagala mmwe, ne yeewaayo ku lwaffe okubeera ekirabo eky'evvumbe eriwunya obulungi era ssaddaaka eri Katonda." 
Ephesians5:3 Naye obwenzi n'obugwagwa bwonna n'okwegomba n'okwogerebwa tebyogerebwangako mu mmwe, kubanga ebyo tebigwanira batukuvu." 
Ephesians5:4 Tewaabeerangawo eby'ensonyi, newakubadde ebinyumizibwa eby'obusiru, newakubadde okubalaata, ebitasaana, naye waakiri wabeerengawo okwebazanga." 
Ephesians5:5 Kubanga ekyo mukitegeerera ddala nga tewali mwenzi, oba mugwagwa, oba eyeegomba, ye oyo asinza ebifaananyi, alina obusika mu bwakabaka bwa Kristo ne Katonda." 
Ephesians5:6 Omuntu yenna tabalimbanga n'ebigambo ebitaliimu, kubanga olw'ebyo obusungu bwa Katonda bujja ku baana abatawulira." 
Ephesians5:7 Kale temussanga kimu nabo; 
Ephesians5:8 kubanga edda mwali kizikiza, naye kaakano muli musana mu Mukama waffe, mutambulenga ng'abaana b'omusana" 
Ephesians5:9 (kubanga ebibala by'omusana biri mu bulungi bwonna n'obutuukirivu n'amazima)," 
Ephesians5:10 nga mukeberanga Mukama waffe ky'ayagala bwe kiri. 
Ephesians5:11 Temussanga kimu n'ebikolwa ebitabala eby'ekizikiza, naye waakiri mubibuulirirenga bubuulirizi;" 
Ephesians5:12 kubanga kya nsonyi n'okubyogerako ebyo bye bakola mu kyama. 
Ephesians5:13 Naye ebigambo byonna, bwe bibuulirirwa, omusana gubirabisa, kubanga buli ekirabisibwa gwe musana." 
Ephesians5:14 Kyava ayogera nti, “Zuukuka, ggwe eyeebase, ozuukire mu bafu, Kristo anaakwakira.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Kale mutunule nnyo bwe mutambulanga, si ng'abatalina magezi, naye ng'abalina amagezi;" 
Ephesians5:16 nga mweguliranga ebbanga, kubanga ennaku zino mbi." 
Ephesians5:17 Kale temubeeranga basirusiru, naye mutegeerenga Mukama waffe ky'ayagala bwe kiri." 
Ephesians5:18 So temutamiiranga mwenge, kubanga mu gwo mulimu okwegayaggula, naye mujjulenga Omwoyo;" 
Ephesians5:19 nga mwogereganyanga mu zabbuli n'ennyimba n'ebiyiiye eby'Omwoyo, nga muyimbanga, nga mumukubiranga ennanga mu mutima gwammwe Mukama waffe." 
Ephesians5:20 Mwebazanga Katonda Kitaffe ennaku zonna olwa byonna mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
Ephesians5:21 Muwuliraganenga olw'okussamu Kristo ekitiibwa. 
Ephesians5:22 Abakazi, muwulirenga babbammwe, nga bwe muwulira Mukama waffe." 
Ephesians5:23 Kubanga omusajja gwe mutwe gwa mukazi we, era nga Kristo bw'ali omutwe gw'ekkanisa, omubiri gwe, era nga ye yennyini ye mulokozi waayo." 
Ephesians5:24 Naye ng'ekkanisa bw'ewulira Kristo, n'abakazi bwe batyo bawulirenga babbaabwe mu buli kigambo." 
Ephesians5:25 Abasajja, mwagalenga bakazi bammwe, era nga Kristo bwe yayagala ekkanisa, ne yeewaayo ku lwayo;" 
Ephesians5:26 alyoke agitukuze ng'amaze okugirongoosa n'okuginaaza n'amazzi mu kigambo. 
Ephesians5:27 Alyoke agyereetere yennyini ekkanisa ey'ekitiibwa, nga terina bbala newakubadde olufunyiro newakubadde kyonna ekifaanana nga bino; naye ebeere entukuvu, eteriiko bulema." 
Ephesians5:28 Era bwe kibagwanidde bwe kityo abasajja okwagalanga bakazi baabwe bennyini ng'emibiri gyabwe bennyini. Ayagala mukazi we yennyini, yeeyagala yekka." 
Ephesians5:29 Kubanga tewali muntu eyali akyaye omubiri gwe yennyini, naye aguliisa agujjanjaba, era nga Kristo bw'ajjanjaba ekkanisa;" 
Ephesians5:30 kubanga tuli bitundu bya mubiri gwe. 
Ephesians5:31 Omuntu kyanaavanga aleka kitaawe ne nnyina ne yeegatta ne mukazi we; nabo bombi banaabanga omubiri gumu. 
Ephesians5:32 Ekyama kino kikulu, naye njogera ku Kristo n'ekkanisa." 
Ephesians5:33 Naye era nammwe buli musajja ayagalenga mukazi we nga bwe yeeyagala yekka; n'omukazi assengamu bba ekitiibwa. 
Ephesians6:1 Abaana abato, muwulirenga abazadde bammwe mu Mukama waffe, kubanga kino kye kituufu." 
Ephesians6:2 “Ossangamu ekitiibwa kitaawo ne nnyoko” (lye tteeka ery'olubereberye eririmu okusuubiza)," 
Ephesians6:3 “olyoke obeerenga bulungi, era owangaalenga ennaku nnyingi ku nsi.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Nammwe, bakitaabwe, temusunguwazanga baana bammwe, naye mubalerenga mu kukangavvulanga ne mu kubuuliriranga kwa Mukama waffe." 
Ephesians6:5 Abaddu, muwulirenga bakama bammwe ab'omubiri nga mulina okutya n'okukankana, omutima gwammwe nga teguliimu bukuusa, nga Kristo;" 
Ephesians6:6 si nga mu kuweereza okw'okungulu, ng'abaagala okusiimibwanga abantu; naye ng'abaddu ba Kristo, nga mukolanga n'omwoyo Katonda by'ayagala." 
Ephesians6:7 Muweerezenga n'okwagala, ng'abaweereza Mukama waffe so si bantu;" 
Ephesians6:8 nga mumanyi nti buli muntu ekirungi ky'akola, ky'aliweebwa nate eri Mukama waffe, oba muddu oba wa ddembe." 
Ephesians6:9 Nammwe, bakama baabwe, mubakolenga bwe mutyo, nga mulekanga okutiisa, nga mumanyi nga Mukama waabwe era owammwe ali mu ggulu, so tewali kusosola mu bantu gy'ali." 
Ephesians6:10 Eky'enkomerero, mubenga n'amaanyi mu Mukama waffe ne mu buyinza obw'amaanyi ge." 
Ephesians6:11 Mwambalenga eby'okulwanyisa byonna ebya Katonda, mulyoke muyinzenga okuyimirira eri enkwe za Setaani." 
Ephesians6:12 Kubanga tetumeggana na musaayi na mubiri, wabula n'abaamasaza, n'ab'obuyinza, n'abafuga ensi ab'omu kizikiza kino, n'emyoyo egy'obubi mu bifo ebya waggulu." 
Ephesians6:13 Kale mutwalenga eby'okulwanyisa byonna ebya Katonda, mulyoke muyinzenga okuguma ku lunaku olubi, era bwe mulimala okukola byonna, musobole okuyimirira." 
Ephesians6:14 Kale muyimirirenga, nga mwesibye mu kiwato kyammwe amazima, era nga mwambadde eky'omu kifuba obutuukirivu," 
Ephesians6:15 era nga munaanise mu bigere okweteekateeka okw'Enjiri ey'emirembe. 
Ephesians6:16 Era ku ebyo byonna nga mukwatiddeko engabo ey'okukkiriza, eneebayinzisanga okuzikiza obusaale bwonna obw'omuliro obw'omubi." 
Ephesians6:17 Muweebwe ne sseppewo ey'obulokozi, n'ekitala eky'Omwoyo, kye kigambo kya Katonda." 
Ephesians6:18 Musabenga buli kiseera mu Mwoyo n'okusaba n'okwegayiriranga kwonna. Mutunulenga n'okugumiikiriza nga musabiranga abatukuvu bonna. 
Ephesians6:19 Nange munsabire buli lwenayasamyanga akamwa kange ndyoke mpeebwe okwogeranga, n'okutegeezanga n'obuvumu ekyama eky'Enjiri." 
Ephesians6:20 Eyo nze gye mbeerera omubaka waayo mu lujegere; njogerenga n'obuvumu nga bwe kiŋŋwanira okwogeranga. 
Ephesians6:21 Naye nammwe mulyoke mutegeere ebifa gye ndi bwe biri, Tukiko, ow'oluganda omwagalwa era omuweereza omwesigwa mu Mukama waffe alibategeeza byonna." 
Ephesians6:22 Mmutumye gye muli olw'ensonga eno, mulyoke mutegeere ebifa gyetuli, era asanyuse emitima gyammwe." 
Ephesians6:23 Emirembe gibenga eri ab'oluganda, n'okwagala awamu n'okukkiriza ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Ephesians6:24 Ekisa kibeerenga n'abo bonna abaagala Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo n'okwagala obutaggwaawo. 
Philippians1:1 Pawulo ne Timoseewo, abaddu ba Kristo Yesu, eri abatukuvu bonna mu Kristo Yesu abali mu Firipi, wamu n'abalabirizi n'abaweereza," 
Philippians1:2 ekisa kibeerenga gye muli n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
Philippians1:3 Nneebaza Katonda wange buli lwe mbajjukira," 
Philippians1:4 buli lwe mbasabira mwenna nsaba nga nzijudde essanyu," 
Philippians1:5 olw'okuba nga okuviira ddala ku lubereberye n'okutuusa kaakano muli wamu nange mu mulimu ogw'okubunya Enjiri. 
Philippians1:6 Era nkakasiza ddala ng'oyo eyatandika omulimu omulungi mu mmwe aligutuukiriza okutuusa ku lunaku lwa Yesu Kristo. 
Philippians1:7 Kirungi ddala nze okubalowoozaako bwe ntyo mwenna, kubanga mundi mu mutima gwange, kubanga mwenna mugabana awamu nange mu kisa, mu kusibibwa kwange era ne mu kuwolerezanga Enjiri n'okuginywezanga." 
Philippians1:8 Kubanga Katonda ye mujulirwa wange, kubanga alaba nga bwe mbayaayaanira n'okwagala kwa Kristo Yesu." 
Philippians1:9 Era kino kye nsaba okwagala kwammwe kweyongerere ddala, nga kulimu okutegeera n'okwawula kwonna," 
Philippians1:10 mulyoke musiimenga ebisinga obulungi; mubeerenga abalongoofu era abataliiko kya kunenyezebwa okutuusa ku lunaku lwa Kristo; 
Philippians1:11 nga mujjudde ebibala eby'obutuukirivu, ebiyita mu Yesu Kristo, olw'ekitiibwa n'okutendereza Katonda." 
Philippians1:12 Naye njagala mmwe okutegeera, ab'oluganda, ng'ebyambaako byongedde bwongezi kubunya bubunya njiri;" 
Philippians1:13 era kino kiretedde abasserikale abakuuma kabaka, wamu n'abalala bonna okutegeera nti nnasibibwa lwa Kristo," 
Philippians1:14 n'ab'oluganda bangi okusibwa kwange kwongedde okubagumya, era beeyongedde okufuna obuvumu okubuulira ekigambo kya Katonda nga tebatya." 
Philippians1:15 Abalala babuulira Kristo lwa buggya n'akuvuganya, naye abalala babuulira lwa bulungi." 
Philippians1:16 Bano babuulira lwa kwagala, nga bamanyi nga nnateekebwawo lwa kuwolerezanga Enjiri;" 
Philippians1:17 naye bali babuulira Kristo lwa kwawula, si mu bwesimbu, nga balowooza nga banaayongera okundeetera ennaku mu busibe bwange." 
Philippians1:18 Naye n'ekyo nsonga? Mu ngeri zonna, oba za bukuusa oba za mazima, Kristo abuulirwa, nze n'emw'ekyo nsanyuka busanyusi." 
Philippians1:19 Ddala nteekwa okusanyuka, kubanga mmanyi nti olw'okusaba kwammwe, n'olw'obuyambi bw'Omwoyo wa Kristo, ndisumululwa." 
Philippians1:20 Kino kye nduubirira era kye nsuubira nti ssirikwatibwa nsonyi mu kigambo kyonna, naye nja kuba muvumu nga bulijjo, Kristo, agulumizibwe mu mubiri gwange, oba mu bulamu oba mu kufa." 
Philippians1:21 Kubanga nze mba mulamu lwa Kristo, ate ne bwe nfa ngobolola." 
Philippians1:22 Naye oba ng'okuba omulamu mu mubiri, kye kibala eky'okufuba kwange, kale ssimanyi kye nneeroboza." 
Philippians1:23 Naye nyigirizibwa eruuyi n'eruuyi, nga nneegomba okugenda okubeera ne Kristo, kubanga ekyo kye kisingako obulungi." 
Philippians1:24 Naye okubeera mu mubiri kye kisinga okwetaagibwa ku lwammwe. 
Philippians1:25 Kino nkikakasa kubanga ntegeeredde ddala nga nja kuba nkyaliwo mbeere nammwe, mulyoke mweyongere okukula, n'okusanyukira mu kukkiriza," 
Philippians1:26 bwe ndikomawo nate gye muli, mulyoke mweyongere okwenyumiririza Kristo Yesu ku lwange." 
Philippians1:27 Naye kyokka embeera z'obulamu bwammwe, zibeere nga bwe kigwanira Enjiri ya Kristo, bwe ndijja okubalabako oba nga ssiriiwo, ndyoke mpulire ebifa gye muli, nga munywedde mu mwoyo gumu, nga mulwaniriranga okukkiriza okw'Enjiri n'emmeeme emu;" 
Philippians1:28 era nga temukangibwa balabe mu kigambo kyonna, kabeere akabonero ddala gyebali ak'okuzikirira, naye eri mmwe ka bulokozi, obuva eri Katonda;" 
Philippians1:29 kubanga mwaweebwa ku lwa Kristo ekisa, si kya kumukkiriza kwokka, era naye n'okubonaabonanga ku lulwe." 
Philippians1:30 Muli mu lutalo lwe mwalaba nga nnwana, era lwe muwulira nga nkyaluliko." 
Philippians2:1 Kale oba nga waliwo okubazamu amaanyi kwonna mu Kristo, oba okusikiriza kwonna okw'okwagala, oba okussa ekimu kwonna mu Mwoyo, oba okwagala okw'engeri yonna n'okusaasira," 
Philippians2:2 mutuukirize essanyu lyange, mulowoozenga bumu, nga mulina okwagala kumu, omwoyo gumu, nga mulowooza bumu." 
Philippians2:3 Temukolanga kintu kyonna lwa kweyagaliza mwekka, oba mu bukuusa, wabula mu buwombeefu buli muntu agulumizenga munne okusinga bwe yeegulumiza yekka." 
Philippians2:4 Buli muntu tatunuulira bibye yekka, naye buli omu ng'afaayo ne ku by'abalala." 
Philippians2:5 Mmwe mubeemu okulowooza okwo, okwali mu Kristo Yesu," 
Philippians2:6 ye newakubadde nga yali mu kifaananyi kya Katonda, teyeerowooza kwenkanankana na Katonda," 
Philippians2:7 naye yeeggyako ekitiibwa, bwe yatwala engeri y'omuddu, n'azaalibwa ng'omuntu." 
Philippians2:8 Era bwe yalabikira mu mutindo ogw'obuntu, ne yeetoowaza, nga muwulize okutuusa okufa, era okufa okw'oku musalaba." 
Philippians2:9 Era Katonda kyeyava amugulumiza ennyo n'amuwa erinnya liri erisinga amannya gonna; 
Philippians2:10 nti olw'erinnya lya Yesu, buli vviivi lifukaamire, ery'abo abali mu ggulu n'abali ku nsi n'abali wansi w'ensi," 
Philippians2:11 era buli lulimi lwatulenga nga Yesu Kristo ye Mukama waffe, Katonda Kitaffe aweebwe ekitiibwa." 
Philippians2:12 Kale, abaagalwa bange, nga bwe mubadde abawulize bulijjo nga ndi nammwe, naye kaakano nga ssiriiwo, mweyongere okuba abawulize. Mutuukirizenga obulokozi bwammwe bennyini n'okutya n'okukankana;" 
Philippians2:13 kubanga Katonda akolera mu mmwe, yabaagazisa era n'abasobozesa n'okukola, by'asiima." 
Philippians2:14 Mukolenga byonna awatali kwemulugunyanga n'empaka; 
Philippians2:15 mulemenga okubaako kye munenyezebwa newakubadde ettima, abaana ba Katonda abatalina mabala wakati w'emirembe egyakyama emikakanyavu, gye mulabikiramu ng'ettaala mu nsi," 
Philippians2:16 ngamunywezeza ekigambo eky'obulamu; ndyoke mbeere n'okwenyumiriza ku lunaku lwa Kristo, okulaga nti ssaddukira bwereere, so ssaafubira busa." 
Philippians2:17 Naye newakubadde nga nfukibwa ku ssaddaaka n'okuweereza okw'okukkiriza kwammwe, nsanyuka era nsanyukira wamu nammwe mwenna:" 
Philippians2:18 era nammwe bwe mutyo musanyuke era musanyukire wamu nange. 
Philippians2:19 Naye nsuubira mu Mukama waffe Yesu, okubatumira amangu Timoseewo, nange ndyoke ngume omwoyo, bwe ndimala okutegeera ebifa gye muli." 
Philippians2:20 Kubanga sirina muntu mulala alina emmeeme eyenkana n'ey'oyo, aligenderera ebyammwe mu mazima." 
Philippians2:21 Kubanga abo bonna beenoonyeza byabwe ku bwabwe, si bya Yesu Kristo." 
Philippians2:22 Naye Timoseewo mumanyi nga bw'asaanira, kubanga yaweerezanga wamu nange olw'Enjiri, ng'omwana eri kitaawe." 
Philippians2:23 Kale oyo gwe nsuubira okubatumira amangu ddala nga ntegedde embeera nga bwe n'ebeera gye ndi," 
Philippians2:24 naye nange nsuubira mu Mukama waffe nti ndijja mangu. 
Philippians2:25 Era ndabye nga kigwanye okubatumira Epafuloddito muganda wange, era mukozi munnange, era mulwanyi munnange, naye ye mutume wammwe era omuweereza w'ebintu bye nneetaaga;" 
Philippians2:26 kubanga yabalumirwa omwoyo mmwe mwenna, ne yeeraliikirira nnyo, kubanga mwawulira nga yalwala:" 
Philippians2:27 Ddala okulwala yalwala era yali kumpi n'okufa, naye Katonda yamusaasira; so si ye yekka, naye era nange, ennaku n'eteenneeyongera." 
Philippians2:28 Kyenva njagala ennyo okumutuma, bwe mulimulaba nate mulyoke musanyuke, nange nkendeeze ku kunakuwala kwange." 
Philippians2:29 Kale mu mwanirize mu Mukama waffe n'essanyu lingi, era abafaanana ng'oyo mubassengamu ekitiibwa," 
Philippians2:30 kubanga yabulako katono okufa olw'omulimu gwa Kristo, bwe yawaayo obulamu bwe ng'akola ebyo bye mwandinkoledde singa mwali nange." 
Philippians3:1 Eky'enkomerero, ab'oluganda, musanyukirenga Mukama waffe. Okuddamu okubawandiikira ebyo bye nnabawandiikira edda tekunkooya nze, naye kirungi eri mmwe." 
Philippians3:2 Mwekuumenga embwa, mwekuumenga abakola ebibi, mwekuumenga abekomola omubiri." 
Philippians3:3 Kubanga ffe bakomole abatuufu, abasinza Katonda mu Mwoyo, era abeenyumiririza mu Kristo Yesu, era abateesiga mubiri." 
Philippians3:4 Newakubadde nga nze nnyinza okuba n'ensonga okwesiga omubiri: omuntu omulala yenna bw'alowooza okwesiga omubiri, nze mmusinga:" 
Philippians3:5 nze nnakomolerwa ku lunaku olw'omunaana, ow'omu ggwanga lya Isiraeri, ow'omu kika kya Benyamini, Omwebbulaniya wawu; mu mateeka ndi Mufalisaayo;" 
Philippians3:6 mu kunyiikira, nga njigganya ekkanisa; mu butuukirivu obuli mu mateeka, nnalabikanga nga ssiriiko kya kunenyezebwa." 
Philippians3:7 Naye byonna ebyali amagoba gye ndi, ebyo nnabirowooza nga kufiirwa olwa Kristo." 
Philippians3:8 Naye era n'ebintu byonna mbirowooza nga kufiirwa olw'omuwendo omungi ogusinga oguli mu kutegeera Kristo Yesu Mukama wange, ku bw'oyo nnafiirwa ebintu byonna, era mbirowooza okubeera nga mpitambi, ndyoke nfune amagoba ye Kristo," 
Philippians3:9 era ndyoke ndabikire mu ye, nga ssirina butuukirivu bwange obuva mu mateeka, wabula obutuukirivu obuliwo olw'okukkiriza Kristo, obuva eri Katonda mu kukkiriza:" 
Philippians3:10 ndyoke mmutegeere ye n'obuyinza obw'okuzuukira kwe era n'okugabana ku bibonoobono bye, nga mmufaanana ne mu kufa kwe;" 
Philippians3:11 era bwe kiba kiyinzika nfune okuzuukira mu bafu. 
Philippians3:12 Si kugamba nti mmaze okukifuna oba nti mmaze okutuukirira, naye nfuba okukifuna, kubanga Kristo Yesu yanfuula owuwe." 
Philippians3:13 Ab'oluganda, ssirowooza nga mmaze okukifuna, naye ekintu kimu kye nkola, kwe kwerabira ebyo ebiri emabega, nkununkiriza ebyo ebiri mu maaso," 
Philippians3:14 nduubirira okutuuka awawakanirwa awali empeera ey'okuyita kwa Katonda okwa waggulu mu Kristo Yesu. 
Philippians3:15 Kale ffe fenna abakuze mu mwoyo, tulowoozenga ekyo: naye oba nga mulowooza bulala, na kino Katonda alikibabikulira," 
Philippians3:16 naye ka tunywerere ku ekyo kye tutuuseeko. 
Philippians3:17 Ab'oluganda, mukkirize okundabirako, era mugobererenga abo abatambula nga ffe be mulina nga ekyokulabirako." 
Philippians3:18 Kubanga bangi abatambula be nnababuulirako emirundi emingi, ne kaakano mbabuulira nga nkaaba amaziga, nga be balabe ab'omusalaba gwa Kristo," 
Philippians3:19 enkomerero yaabwe kwe kuzikirira, katonda waabwe lwe lubuto, era ekitiibwa kyabwe kiri mu nsonyi zaabwe, balowooza bya mu nsi." 
Philippians3:20 Kubanga ffe ewaffe mu ggulu; era gye tulindiririra Omulokozi okuvaayo, Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo:" 
Philippians3:21 aliwaanyisa omubiri ogw'okutoowazibwa kwaffe okufaananyizibwa ng'omubiri ogw'ekitiibwa kye, ng'okukola okwo bwe kuli okumuyinzisa n'okussa ebintu byonna wansi we." 
Philippians4:1 Kale, ab'oluganda abaagalwa be nnumirwa omwoyo, essanyu lyange era engule yange, muyimirirenga bwe mutyo okunywerera mu Mukama waffe, abaagalwa." 
Philippians4:2 Nneegayirira Ewodiya, era nneegayirira Suntuke, bakkiriziganye mu Mukama waffe." 
Philippians4:3 Nate era naawe, muddu munnange ddala ddala, nkwegayiridde yamba abakazi abo, kubanga baakolera wamu nange omulimu gw'enjiri nga tuli ne Kulementi, ne bakozi bannange abalala, amannya gaabwe gali mu kitabo ky'obulamu." 
Philippians4:4 Musanyukirenga mu Mukama waffe ennaku zonna, nate njogera nti Musanyukenga." 
Philippians4:5 Abantu bonna balabenga obugumiikiriza bwammwe. Mukama waffe ali kumpi. 
Philippians4:6 Temweraliikiriranga kigambo kyonna kyonna; naye mu kigambo kyonna nga musaba n'okwegayiriranga awamu n'okwebazanga, bye mwagala bitegeezebwenga Katonda." 
Philippians4:7 N'emirembe gya Katonda, egisinga okutegeerwa kwonna, ginaakuumanga emitima gyammwe n'amagezi gammwe mu Kristo Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Eky'enkomerero, ab'oluganda, oba nga waliwo eby'amazima byonna, ebisaanira ekitiibwa byonna, eby'obutuukirivu byonna, ebirongoofu byonna, ebyagalibwa byonna, ebisiimibwa byonna; oba nga waliwo obulungi, era oba nga waliwo ettendo, ebyo mubirowoozenga." 
Philippians4:9 Bye mwayiga era ne muweebwa ne muwulira ne mulaba gye ndi, ebyo mubikolenga: ne Katonda ow'emirembe anaabeeranga nammwe." 
Philippians4:10 Nsanyuse nnyo mu Mukama waffe, kubanga kaakano oluvannyuma lw'ebbanga muzzeemu okulowooza ku byange; naye ekyo okulowooza mwakirowoozanga, naye temwalina bbanga." 
Philippians4:11 Ssoogera kino olw'okubanga ndiko kye nneetaaga, kubanga mu buli mbeera gye mbaamu nnayiga okumalibwa." 
Philippians4:12 Mmanyi okwetoowaza, era mmanyi bwe kiba okuba n'ebintu ebingi: mu buli kigambo ne mu bigambo byonna nnayiga ekyama ekiri mu kukkuta ne mu kulumwa enjala, okuba n'ebingi era n'okuba mu bwetaavu." 
Philippians4:13 Nnyinza okukola byonna mu oyo ampa amaanyi. 
Philippians4:14 Naye mwakola bulungi okulumirirwa awamu nange mu bibonoobono byange. 
Philippians4:15 Era mmwe, Abafiripi, mumanyi nga bwe nnava e Makedoni nga nnakatandika okubuulira Enjiri, tewali kkanisa eyassa ekimu nange mu kigambo eky'okugaba n'okuweebwa, wabula mmwe mwekka;" 
Philippians4:16 kubanga era ne bwe nali mu Ssessaloniika mwampeereza eby'okunyamba emirundi ebiri. 
Philippians4:17 Ssoogera kino kubanga njagala kufuna kirabo, naye nnoonya ekibala ekyeyongera ku muwendo gwammwe." 
Philippians4:18 Naye kaakano nfunye bingi okusinga bye neetaaga, olw'ebyo Epafulodito byeyaleeta ebyava gye muli, biringa evvumbe eriwunya obulungi, ssaddaaka ekkirizibwa, esiimibwa Katonda." 
Philippians4:19 Era Katonda wange anaatuukirizanga buli kye mwetaaga, ng'obugagga bwe obungi obw'ekitiibwa bwe buli obuli mu Kristo Yesu." 
Philippians4:20 Era Katonda waffe era Kitaffe aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
Philippians4:21 Mulamuse buli mutukuvu mu Kristo Yesu. Ab'oluganda abali nange babalamusizza. 
Philippians4:22 Abatukuvu bonna babalamusizza, naye okusinga ab'omu nnyumba ya Kayisaali." 
Philippians4:23 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga n'omwoyo gwammwe. 
Colossians1:1 Pawulo omutume wa Kristo Yesu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ne Timoseewo ow'oluganda," 
Colossians1:2 eri abatukuvu, ab'oluganda abeesigwa mu Kristo ab'omu Kkolosaayi: ekisa kibeerenga gye muli n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe." 
Colossians1:3 Buli bwe tubasabira twebaza Katonda Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo," 
Colossians1:4 kubanga twawulira okukkiriza kwammwe mu Kristo Yesu, n'okwagala kwe mulina eri abatukuvu bonna," 
Colossians1:5 olw'essuubi eryabaterekerwa mu ggulu, lye mwawulira edda mu kigambo eky'amazima ag'Enjiri," 
Colossians1:6 eyajja gye muli; era nga bw'eri mu nsi zonna, ng'ebala ebibala era ng'ekula, era nga ne mu mmwe, okuva ku lunaku bwe mwawulira ne mutegeera ekisa kya Katonda mu mazima;" 
Colossians1:7 nga bwe mwayigirizibwa Epafula muddu munnaffe omwagalwa, ye muweereza omwesigwa owa Kristo ku lwaffe," 
Colossians1:8 era eyatubuulira okwagala kwammwe mu Mwoyo. 
Colossians1:9 Naffe kyetuva tetulekaangayo kubasabira okuviira ddala ku lunaku lwe twawulira ebibafaako, nga tubeegayiririra mujjuzibwe okutegeeranga by'ayagala mu magezi gonna n'okutegeera eby'Omwoyo," 
Colossians1:10 era mutambulenga nga bwe kisaanira Mukama, nga mumusanyusa, nga mubalanga ebibala mu buli kikolwa ekirungi, era nga mweyongeranga mu kutegeera Katonda." 
Colossians1:11 Kale munywezebwenga n'amaanyi ag'ekitiibwa kye bwe gali, olw'okugumiikiriza kwonna n'okuzibiikiriza awamu n'okusanyuka;" 
Colossians1:12 nga mwebaza Kitaffe, eyatusaanyiza ffe omugabo ogw'obusika obw'abatukuvu mu musana," 
Colossians1:13 eyatulokola mu buyinza obw'ekizikiza, n'atutwala mu bwakabaka obw'Omwana we omwagalwa;" 
Colossians1:14 mwe tubeerera n'okununulwa, kwe kusonyiyibwa kw'ebibi byaffe." 
Colossians1:15 Oyo kye kifaananyi kya Katonda atalabika, omubereberye ow'ebitonde byonna;" 
Colossians1:16 kubanga mu oyo ebintu byonna mwe byatonderwa mu ggulu ne ku nsi, ebirabika n'ebitalabika, oba nga ntebe za bwakabaka, oba bwami, oba kufuga, oba buyinza; ebintu byonna byatondebwa nga biyita mu ye, era ku lulwe." 
Colossians1:17 Naye ye yaliwo nga byonna tebinnabaawo, era mu ye ebintu byonna mwe bibeereraawo." 
Colossians1:18 Era oyo gwe mutwe gw'omubiri, ye kkanisa: oyo lwe lubereberye, omubereberye ow'omu bafu; ye alyoke abeerenga waggulu wa byonna." 
Colossians1:19 Kubanga Kitaffe yasiima okutuukirira kwonna okubeeranga mu ye; 
Colossians1:20 era nga ayita mu ye okutabaganya ebintu byonna eri ye yennyini, oba ku nsi oba mu ggulu, bwe yaleeta emirembe olw'omusaayi gw'omusalaba gwe." 
Colossians1:21 Nammwe, mmwe abali beeyawudde ku Katonda, era abalabe mu kulowooza kwammwe, nga mukola ebikolwa ebibi,"
