Colossians1:22 naye kaakano abatabaganyiza mu mubiri gw'ennyama ye olw'okufa kwe, alyoke abanjule abatukuvu era abatalina kya kunenyezebwa era abataliiko bbala mu maaso ge," 
Colossians1:23 kasita mweyongera okubeera mu kukkiriza, nga munywedde, nga temusagaasagana, so nga temuvudde mu ssuubi ly'Enjiri gye mwawulira, eyabuulirwa ebitonde byonna ebiri wansi w'eggulu; nze Pawulo gye nnafuukira omuweereza waayo." 
Colossians1:24 Kaakano nsanyukira mu bibonoobono byange ku lwammwe, era mu mubiri gwange ntuukiriza ebyo ebibulako mu kulaba ennaku kwa Kristo olw'omubiri gwe, ye kkanisa;" 
Colossians1:25 nze gye nnafuukira omuweereza waayo, ng'obuwanika bwa Katonda bwe buli bwe nnaweebwa gye muli, okutuukiriza ekigambo kya Katonda," 
Colossians1:26 ekyama ekyakwekebwa okuva edda n'edda n'emirembe n'emirembe: naye kaakano kibikuliddwa abatukuvu be," 
Colossians1:27 Katonda be yayagala okutegeeza obugagga obw'ekitiibwa obw'ekyama kino bwe buli mu b'amawanga, ekyo ye Kristo mu mmwe, essuubi ery'ekitiibwa:" 
Colossians1:28 gwe tubuulira ffe, nga tulabula buli muntu, era nga tuyigiriza buli muntu mu magezi gonna, tulyoke twanjule buli muntu ng'atuukiridde mu Kristo." 
Colossians1:29 Olw'ekyo nfuba n'amaanyi gonna gatadde mu ngeri ey'ekitalo mu nze. 
Colossians2:1 Kubanga njagala mmwe okumanya okufuba bwe kuli okunene kwe nnina ku lwammwe n'abo ab'omu Lawodikiya, ne bonna abatalabanga maaso gange mu mubiri;" 
Colossians2:2 emitima gyabwe giryoke gisanyusibwe, nga bagattibwa wamu mu kwagalana, n'okutuuka ku bugagga bwonna obw'okumanyira ddala okw'amagezi, bategeerenga ekyama kya Katonda, ye Kristo," 
Colossians2:3 mu ye obugagga bwonna obw'amagezi n'obw'okutegeera mmwe bukwekeddwa. 
Colossians2:4 Kino nkibategeeza waleme kubaawo omuntu yenna abakyamya n'ebigambo ebisendasenda. 
Colossians2:5 Kubanga newakubadde nga ssiriiyo mu mubiri, naye mu mwoyo ndi nammwe, nga nsanyuka era nga ndaba empisa zammwe ennungi, n'obunywevu obw'okukkiriza kwammwe mu Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 Kale nga bwe mwaweebwa Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe, mutambulirenga bwe mutyo mu ye," 
Colossians2:7 nga mulina emmizi, era nga muzimbibwa mu ye, era nga munywezebwa okukkiriza kwammwe, nga bwe mwayigirizibwa, nga musukkirira okwebaza." 
Colossians2:8 Mwekuume tewabeerangawo muntu abanyaga mu bufirosoofo n'eby'obulimba ebitaliimu, n'ebiyigirizibwa abantu mu buwangwa bwabwe bo, n'okugoberera emyoyo egy'ensi, okutali kugoberera Kristo." 
Colossians2:9 Kubanga mu oyo mu mubiri mwe mutuula okutuukirira kwonna okw'Obwakatonda," 
Colossians2:10 era mwafuna obulamu obujjuvu mu ye, ye gwe mutwe ogw'obufuzi n'obuyinza bwonna," 
Colossians2:11 era mwakomolerwa mu oyo obukomole obutali bwa mikono, bwe mwayambula omubiri mu kukomolebwa kwa Kristo;" 
Colossians2:12 bwe mwaziikibwa awamu naye mu kubatizibwa, era mmwe mwazuukirira awamu naye olw'okukkiriza okukola kwa Katonda, eyamuzuukiza mu bafu." 
Colossians2:13 Nammwe bwe mwali nga mufudde olw'ebyonoono byammwe n'obutakomolebwa mubiri gwammwe, yabafuula balamu wamu naye, bwe yamala okutusonyiwa ebyonoono byaffe byonna;" 
Colossians2:14 era n'aggyawo endagaano eyawandiikibwa mu mateeka, eyatuwalirizanga okutuukiriza ebiragiro byayo, bwe yagikomerera ku musalaba;" 
Colossians2:15 kwe yayambulira ddala abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza, n'abawemuukiriza mu lwatu, n'abawangulira ddala." 
Colossians2:16 N'olwekyo tewabangawo omuntu yenna abasalira musango mu by'okulya oba mu by'okunywa, oba olw'embaga oba olw'omwezi oguboneka oba olwa ssabbiiti." 
Colossians2:17 Kubanga ebyo kisiikirize ky'ebyo ebigenda okujja; naye eky'omugaso ye Kristo. 
Colossians2:18 Omuntu yenna tabanyagangako mpeera yammwe mu kwewombeeka kw'ayagala yekka n'okusinzanga bamalayika, ng'anywerera mu ebyo bye yalaba, nga yeegulumiririza bwereere mu magezi ag'omubiri gwe," 
Colossians2:19 so nga teyeekwase Mutwe, omuva omubiri gwonna, ennyingo n'ebinyweza nga biguleetera era nga bigugatta wamu, nga gukula n'okukuza kwa Katonda." 
Colossians2:20 Oba nga mwafiira wamu ne Kristo okuleka emyoyo gyonna egy'ensi, lwaki ate mweyisa nga abakyafugibwa eby'ensi?" 
Colossians2:21 nti, “Tokwatangako, so tolegangako, so tokomangako,”" 
Colossians2:22 ebyo byonna biriggwaawo, era okwo tekuba kugoberera biragiro n'okuyigiriza kw'abantu?" 
Colossians2:23 Ebyo birabika ng'eby'amagezi mu ngeri ey'okusinza Katonda abantu kwe bagunja bokka, ne mu kwewombeeka ne mu kubonyaabonya omubiri; naye tebiriiko kye bigasa n'akatono mu kufuga okwegomba kw'omubiri." 
Colossians3:1 Kale oba nga mwazuukirira wamu ne Kristo, munoonyenga ebiri waggulu, Kristo gy'ali ng'atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda." 
Colossians3:2 Mulowoozenga ku by'omu ggulu, so si ebiri ku nsi." 
Colossians3:3 Kubanga mwafa, n'obulamu bwammwe bukwekeddwa wamu ne Kristo mu Katonda." 
Colossians3:4 Kristo, obulamu bwaffe, bw'alirabisibwa, era nammwe ne mulyoka mulabisibwa wamu naye mu kitiibwa." 
Colossians3:5 Kale mufiise eby'ensi mu mmwe: obwenzi, obugwagwa, okwegomba okw'ensonyi, omululu n'okuyaayaana, kwe kusinza ebifaananyi;" 
Colossians3:6 olw'ebyo obusungu bwa Katonda bujja ku baana abatawulira; 
Colossians3:7 era nammwe mu ebyo mwe mwatambuliranga edda, bwe mwabikolanga ebyo." 
Colossians3:8 Naye kaakano era nammwe muggyeewo byonna, obusungu, ekiruyi, ettima, okuvuma, era n'okunyumya eby'ensonyi mu kamwa kammwe." 
Colossians3:9 Temulimbagananga mwekka na mwekka; kubanga mwamweyambulako omuntu ow'edda wamu n'ebikolwa bye," 
Colossians3:10 ne mwambala omuntu omuggya, afuulibwa omuggya olw'okutegeera mu kifaananyi ky'oyo eyamutonda." 
Colossians3:11 Awo waba tewakyali kwawula Muyonaani na Muyudaaya, eyakomolebwa n'ataakomolebwa, munnaggwanga n'Omusukusi, omuddu n'ow'eddembe, naye Kristo bye bintu byonna era yali mu byonna." 
Colossians3:12 Kale mwambalenga ng'abalonde ba Katonda, abatukuvu era abaagalwa, omwoyo ogw'ekisa, obulungi, okwewombeeka, obuteefu, okugumiikiriza;" 
Colossians3:13 nga muzibiikirizagananga, era nga musonyiwagananga mwekka na mwekka, omuntu yenna bw'abeeranga n'ensonga ku muntu munne; era nga Mukama waffe bwe yabasonyiwa mmwe, era nammwe musonyiwaganenga." 
Colossians3:14 Ku ebyo byonna era mwambalireko okwagalana, kubanga kwe kunyweza ebintu byonna." 
Colossians3:15 Era emirembe gya Katonda giramulenga mu mitima gyammwe, era gye mwayitirwa mu mubiri ogumu; era mubeerenga n'okwebaza." 
Colossians3:16 Ekigambo kya Kristo kibeerenga mu mmwe n'obugagga mu magezi gonna; nga muyigirizagananga era nga mulabulagananga mwekka na mwekka mu zabbuli n'ennyimba n'ebiyiiye eby'Omwoyo, nga mwebaza Katonda mu mitima gyammwe." 
Colossians3:17 Era buli kye munaakolanga, mu kigambo oba mu kikolwa, mukolerenga byonna mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu, nga mwebaza Katonda Kitaffe nga muyita mu ye." 
Colossians3:18 Abakazi, muwulirenga babbammwe, nga bwe kiri ekirungi mu Mukama waffe." 
Colossians3:19 Abasajja, mwagalenga bakazi bammwe, so temubakambuwaliranga." 
Colossians3:20 Abaana, muwulirenga bakadde bammwe mu byonna, kubanga ekyo kisanyusa Mukama." 
Colossians3:21 Bakitaabwe, temunyiizanga baana bammwe, balemenga okuddirira mu mwoyo." 
Colossians3:22 Abaddu, muwulirenga bakama bammwe ab'omu nsi mu byonna, si kubasanyusa kubanga ba balaba, naye mubagonderenga n'omutima ogutalimu bukuusa, nga mutya Mukama waffe." 
Colossians3:23 Buli kye mukola mukikolenga n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, ng'abakolera Mukama waffe, so si abantu;" 
Colossians3:24 nga mumanyi nga mulisasulibwa Mukama waffe empeera ey'obusika; muweereza Mukama waffe Kristo. 
Colossians3:25 Kubanga ayonoona alisasulwa nga bwe yayonoona, so tewaliba kusaliriza." 
Colossians4:1 Bakama b'abaddu, muyisenga mu bwenkanya abaddu bammwe, nga mumanyi nga nammwe mulina Mukama wammwe mu ggulu." 
Colossians4:2 Munyiikirirenga mu kusaba, nga mulindirira n'okwebaza;" 
Colossians4:3 era naffe mutusabire, Katonda okutuggulirawo oluggi olw'ekigambo, okutegeeza ekyama kya Kristo, n'okusibibwa kye nnasibirwa;" 
Colossians4:4 ndyoke nkitegeeze bulungi nga bwe kiŋŋwanidde okwogera. 
Colossians4:5 Mutambulirenga mu magezi eri abo ab'ebweru, nga mukozesa bulungi ekiseera kye mulina." 
Colossians4:6 Ebigambo byammwe bibeerenga n'ekisa ennaku zonna, nga binoga omunnyo, mulyoke mumanye bwe kibagwanidde okwanukulanga buli muntu yenna." 
Colossians4:7 Tukiko, ow'oluganda omwagalwa era omuweereza omwesigwa era muddu munnaffe mu Mukama waffe, alibategeeza ebinfaako byonna." 
Colossians4:8 Kyenva mmutuma gye muli olw'ensonga eyo, mulyoke mutegeere ebifa gyetuli era asanyuse emyoyo gyammwe;" 
Colossians4:9 wamu ne Onnessimo, ow'oluganda omwesigwa omwagalwa, ow'ewammwe. Balibategeeza byonna ebifa eno." 
Colossians4:10 Alisutaluuko, musibe munnange, ne Makko, mujjwa wa Balunabba, gwe baabagambako bw'alijja gye muli, mumwanirizanga," 
Colossians4:11 ne Yesu ayitibwa Yusito babalamusizza. Abo be b'omu bakomole bokka, bakozi bannange mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda, abanzizaamu essuubi." 
Colossians4:12 Epafula, ow'ewammwe, omuddu wa Kristo Yesu, abalamusizza, afuba ennaku zonna okubasabira mu kusaba kwe, mulyoke muyimirirenga nga muli batuukirivu era nga mutegeerera ddala mu byonna Katonda by'ayagala." 
Colossians4:13 Kubanga mmuweera obujulirwa, nga bw'afuba ennyo ku lwammwe, n'ab'omu Lawodikiya, n'ab'omu Kiyerapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Lukka, omusawo omwagalwa, ne Dema babalamusizza." 
Colossians4:15 Mulamuse ab'oluganda ab'omu Lawodikiya, ne Nunfa, n'ekkanisa ey'omu nnyumba yaabwe." 
Colossians4:16 Era ebbaluwa eno bw'emalanga okusomerwa mu mmwe, mulabe nga esomerwa n'ab'ekkanisa y'omu Lawodikiya; era nammwe musome eriva e Lawodikiya." 
Colossians4:17 Era mugambe Alukipo nti, “Laba ng'otuukiriza okuweereza kwe waweebwa mu Mukama waffe.”" 
Colossians4:18 Nze Pawulo, nze mpandiise okulamusa kuno n'omukono gwange. Mujjukirenga okusibibwa kwange. Ekisa kibeerenga nammwe." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Pawulo ne Sirwano ne Timoseewo eri ekkanisa ey'Abasessaloniika mu Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, ekisa kibeerenga gye muli n'emirembe." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Twebaza Katonda ku lwammwe mwenna ennaku zonna, nga tuboogerako mu kusaba kwaffe;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 nga tujjukira bulijjo mu maaso ga Katonda, omulimu gwammwe ogw'okukkiriza, n'okufuba okw'okwagala, n'okugumiikiriza okw'essuubi lyammwe mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Kubanga tumanyi, ab'oluganda abaagalwa Katonda, nga yabalonda," 
1Thessalonians1:5 kubanga enjiri yaffe teyajja gye muli mu kigambo bugambo, wabula era ne mu maanyi, ne mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu, ne mu kutegeerera ddala okungi; nga bwe mumanyi bwe twali gye muli ku lwammwe." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nammwe ne mutugoberera ffe ne Mukama waffe, kubanga mwafuna ekigambo mu kubonaabona okungi, n'essanyu eriva mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Bwe mutyo ne muba ekyokulabirako eri abakkiriza bonna mu Makedoni ne mu Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Kubanga gye muli ye yava eddoboozi ly'ekigambo kya Mukama waffe, si mu Makedoni ne mu Akaya yokka, naye mu buli kifo okukkiriza kwammwe eri Katonda kwabuna; bwe tutyo ne tutabaako kigambo kye twetaaga okwogera." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Kubanga bo bokka bategeeza ebitukwatako, bwe mwatwaniriza bwe twajja; era ne bwe mwakyukira Katonda okuleka ebifaananyi, okuweerezanga Katonda omulamu ow'amazima," 
1Thessalonians1:10 n'okulindiriranga Omwana we okuva mu ggulu, gwe yazuukiza mu bafu, Yesu, atulokola mu busungu obugenda okujja." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Kubanga mmwe mwennyini ab'oluganda, mumanyi ng'okukyala kwaffe gye muli tekwali kwa bwereere." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Newakubadde nga twali tumaze okubonaabona n'okugirirwa ekyejo mu Firipi, nga bwe mumanyi, twagumira mu Katonda waffe okubuulira gye muli enjiri ya Katonda mu kuwakanyizibwa okungi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kubanga okubuulirira kwaffe si kwa bulimba, so si kwa bugwagwa, so tekukolebwa mu bukuusa;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 naye nga bwe twasaanyizibwa Katonda okuteresebwa enjiri, bwe twogera bwe tutyo, si ng'abaagala okusiimibwa abantu, wabula Katonda akema emitima gyaffe." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Kubanga tetukozesanga wadde bigambo bya kubawaanawaana, nga bwe mumanyi, oba okukisa okwegomba kwaffe, Katonda ye mujulirwa." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Tetunoonyanga kitiibwa okuva eri abantu, oba mmwe, wadde okuva eri abalala, newakubadde twandiyinzizza okukibasaba ng'abatume ba Kristo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Naye twali bawombeefu mu mmwe, nga maama bw'alabirira abaana be." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Olw'okubalumirwa omwoyo bwe tutyo, twetegeka okugabana nammwe si njiri ya Katonda yokka, naye era n'emyoyo gyaffe ffe, kubanga mwali baagalwa baffe nnyo." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Kubanga mujjukira, ab'oluganda, okufuba kwaffe n'okutegana, bwe twakolanga emirimu emisana n'ekiro, obutazitoowereranga muntu yenna ku mmwe, ne tubabuuliranga enjiri ya Katonda." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Mmwe bajulirwa era ne Katonda, bwe twabanga n'obutukuvu n'obutuukirivu awatali kya kunenyezebwa mu mpisa zaffe eri mmwe abakkiriza." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Mumanyi nga taata bwaba n'abaana be, naffe bwe twali nammwe, nga tubabuulirira era nga tubagumya emyoyo era nga tubakubiriza," 
1Thessalonians2:12 mulyoke mutambulenga nga bwe kisaanira Katonda abayita okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwe ne mu kitiibwa kye. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Naffe kyetuva twebaza Katonda obutayosa, kubanga bwe mwafuna ekigambo kya Katonda, kye mwawulira okuva gyetuli, mwakikkiriza si ng'ekigambo ekya bantu, naye nga ddala kiri ekigambo kya Katonda, n'okukola ekikolera mu mmwe abakkiriza." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Kubanga mmwe, ab'oluganda, mwafaanana ekkanisa za Katonda Kristo Yesu eziri mu Buyudaaya, kubanga nammwe mwabonyaabonyezebwa bwe mutyo ab'eggwanga lyammwe mmwe, nga nabo bwe baabonyaabonyezebwa Abayudaaya;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 abatta Mukama waffe Yesu ne bannabbi, era naffe abaatugoba, ne banyiiza Katonda, era balabe b'abantu bonna." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Era baatuziyiza okubuulira ab'amawanga balyoke balokoke; bwe batyo ne bongera ku bibi byabwe eby'edda, naye obusungu bwa Katonda bubatuuseeko ku nkomerero." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Naye ffe, ab'oluganda, bwe mwatwawukanako akaseera akatono, mu maaso si mu mutima, tweyongera nnyo okufuba okubalaba mu maaso gammwe n'okubalumirwa ennyo omwoyo," 
1Thessalonians2:18 kubanga twayagala okujja gye muli, nze Pawulo omulundi ogwolubereberye era n'ogwokubiri; naye Setaani n'atuziyiza." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Kubanga essuubi lyaffe, oba essanyu lyaffe, oba ngule ki ey'okwenyumiriza kwaffe mu maaso ga Mukama waffe Yesu mu kujja kwe? Si ye mmwe?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Kubanga mmwe kitiibwa kyaffe n'essanyu lyaffe. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Bwe tutaayinza kwongera kugumiikiriza, kyetwava tulowooza okulekebwa fekka emabega mu Asene." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Era ne tutuma Timoseewo muganda waffe era omuweereza wa Katonda mu njiri ya Kristo, okubanyweza n'okubagumya mu kukkiriza kwammwe;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 omuntu yenna aleme okusagaasagana olw'okubonaabona kuno; kubanga mwekka mumanyi ng'ekyo kye twateekerwawo. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Kubanga mazima, bwe twali gye muli, twababuulira olubereberye nga tugenda okubonaabona; era bwe kyali bwe kityo era nga bwe mumanyi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Olw'ensonga eno, bwe ssaayinza kugumiikiriza nate, kyennava ntuma, ndyoke mmanye okukkiriza kwammwe bwe kuli, nga ntya nti mpozzi omukemi oyo yabakema okufuba kwaffe ne kuba okw'obwereere." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Naye Timoseewo kaakano bwe yajja gyetuli ng'ava gye muli, n'atuleetera ebigambo ebirungi eby'okukkiriza n'okwagala kwammwe, era nga mutujjukira bulungi ennaku zonna, nga mutulumirwa okutulaba, era nga ffe bwe tubalumirwa mmwe;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 olw'ekyo ab'oluganda, mu kulaba ennaku n'okubonaabona kwaffe kwonna, tuzibwamu nnyo amaanyi olw'okukkiriza kwammwe." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Kubanga kaakano tuli balamu, mmwe bwe muyimirira nga muli banywevu mu Mukama waffe." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Kubanga kwebaza ki kwe tuyinza okusasula Katonda ku lwammwe, olw'essanyu lyonna lye tusanyuka ku lwammwe mu maaso ga Katonda waffe;" 
1Thessalonians3:10 emisana n'ekiro nga tusaba nnyo nnyini okulaba ku maaso gammwe, n'okutuukiriza ebikyabulako mu kukkiriza kwammwe?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Naye Katonda yennyini era Kitaffe, ne Mukama waffe Yesu aluŋŋamye ekkubo lyaffe okujja gye muli." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Nammwe Mukama waffe abongerengako era abasukkirizenga okwagalananga mwekka na mwekka, n'okwagalanga abantu bonna, era nga naffe bwe tubaagala mmwe." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Alyoke anywezenga emitima gyammwe nga tegiriiko kya kunenyezebwa mu butukuvu, mu maaso ga Katonda waffe era Kitaffe, mu kujja kwa Mukama waffe Yesu wamu n'abatukuvu be bonna." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Eky'enkomerero, ab'oluganda, tubeegayirira era tubabuulirira mu Mukama waffe Yesu, nga bwe mwatuyigirako bwe kibagwanira okutambulanga n'okusiimibwanga Katonda, era nga bwe mutambula, mweyongerenga bwe mutyo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Kubanga mumanyi ebiragiro bwe biri bye twabawa ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Kubanga ekyo Katonda ky'ayagala, okutukuzibwa kwammwe, okwewalanga obwenzi;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 buli muntu ku mmwe ateekwa okumanyanga okufuga omubiri gwe ye mu butukuvu n'ekitiibwa. 
1Thessalonians4:5 Temufugibwanga mululu ogw'okwegomba, era ng'amawanga agatamanyi Katonda." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Omuntu yenna alemenga okwonoona muganda we newakubadde okumusobyako mu kigambo ekyo, kubanga Mukama waffe awalana eggwanga ery'ebyo byonna, era nga bwe twasooka okubabuulira n'okubategeereza ddala." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Kubanga Katonda teyatuyitira bugwagwa, wabula kubeera mu butukuvu." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Kale agaana tagaana muntu, wabula Katonda, abawa Omwoyo gwe Omutukuvu." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Naye ebikwata ku by'okwagalanga ab'oluganda, temwetaaga muntu yenna kubawandiikira, kubanga mmwe mwekka mwayigirizibwa Katonda okwagalananga." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Kubanga ddala mwagala ab'oluganda bonna ab'omu Makedoni yonna. Naye tubabuulirira ab'oluganda, okweyongeranga okusukkirira;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 era mwegombe okukkakkananga, n'okukolanga emirimu n'emikono gyammwe, nga bwe twabalagira." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Mulyoke mubenga n'ekitiibwa eri ab'ebweru, nga temuliiko kye mwetaaga." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Naye tetwagala mmwe obutategeera, ab'oluganda, eby'abo abeebaka; mulemenga okunakuwala, era ng'abalala abatalina ssuubi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Kubanga bwe tukkiriza nga Yesu yafa n'azuukira, era Katonda alikomyawo bw'atyo abeebaka ku bwa Yesu wamu naye." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Kubanga ekyo kye tubabuulira mu kigambo kya Mukama waffe, nga ffe abalamu abaasigalawo okutuusa okujja kwa Mukama waffe tetulisooka abeebaka." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Kubanga Mukama waffe yennyini alikka okuva mu ggulu n'okwogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi lya malayika omukulu n'ekkondeere lya Katonda, n'abo abaafiira mu Kristo be balisooka okuzuukira." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Naffe abaliba bakyali abalamu ne tulyoka tutwalibwa wamu nabo mu bire okusisinkana Mukama waffe mu bbanga; kale bwe tutyo tunaabeeranga ne Mukama waffe ennaku zonna. 
1Thessalonians4:18 Kale musanyusaganenga mwekka na mwekka n'ebigambo bino. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Naye eby'entuuko n'ebiro, ab'oluganda, temwetaaga kubiwandiikirwa." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Kubanga mwekka mumanyidde ddala ng'olunaku lwa Mukama waffe lujja ng'omubbi bw'ajja ekiro. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Bwe baliba nga boogera nti, “Mirembe, tewali kabi,” okuzikiriza okw'amangu ne kulyoka kubajjira, ng'okulumwa bwe kujjira omukazi ali olubuto; so tebaliwona n'akatono." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Naye mmwe, ab'oluganda, temuli mu kizikiza, olunaku luli okubasisinkaniriza ng'omubbi:" 
1Thessalonians5:5 kubanga mmwe mwenna muli baana ba kutangaala, era muli baana ba musana, tetuli ba kiro newakubadde ab'ekizikiza." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Kale nno tulemenga okwebaka ng'abalala, naye tutunulenga tulemenga okutamiira." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Kubanga abeebaka beebaka kiro; n'abatamiira batamiira kiro. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Naye ffe, kubanga tuli ba musana, tulemenga okutamiira, era twambale eky'omu kifuba okukkiriza n'okwagala, n'enkuufiira, essuubi ly'obulokozi." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Kubanga ffe Katonda teyatuteekerawo busungu, wabula okuweebwa obulokozi ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 eyatufiirira ffe, bwe tutyo bwe tutunula oba bwe twebaka tulyoke tubeere abalamu wamu naye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Kale musanyusaganenga, era muzimbaganenga buli muntu munne, era nga bwe mukola." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Naye tubeegayirira, ab'oluganda, okumanyanga abafuba okukola emirimu mu mmwe, ababafuga mu Mukama waffe, abababuulirira;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 n'okubassangamu ekitiibwa ennyo nnyini mu kwagala olw'omulimu gwabwe. Mubeerenga n'emirembe mu mmwe. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Era tubabuulirira, ab'oluganda, munenyenga abatatambula bulungi, mugumyenga abalina omwoyo omunafu, muyambenga abatalina maanyi, mugumiikirizenga eri bonna." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mulabe omuntu yenna alemenga okuwalana ekibi olw'ekibi; naye ennaku zonna mugobererenga ekirungi mwekka na mwekka n'eri bonna. 
1Thessalonians5:16 Musanyukenga ennaku zonna; 
1Thessalonians5:17 musabenga obutayosa; 
1Thessalonians5:18 mwebazenga mu kigambo kyonna kyonna, kubanga ekyo Katonda ky'abaagaliza mu Kristo Yesu gye muli." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Temuzikizanga Mwoyo; 
1Thessalonians5:20 temunyoomanga bunnabbi. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Mugezese ebintu byonna, munywerezenga ddala ekirungi;" 
1Thessalonians5:22 mwewalenga buli ngeri ya bubi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Era Katonda ow'emirembe yennyini abatukulize ddala; era omwoyo gwammwe n'obulamu n'omubiri byonna awamu bikuumibwenga awatali kunenyezebwa mu kujja kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
1Thessalonians5:24 Abayita mwesigwa, n'okukola ye alikola." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Ab'oluganda, mutusabirenga." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Mulamuse ab'oluganda bonna n'okunywegera okutukuvu. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mbalayiza Mukama waffe okusomera ebbaluwa eno ab'oluganda bonna. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga wamu nammwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Pawulo ne Sirwano ne Timoseewo eri ekkanisa ey'Abasessaloniika mu Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo; 
2Thessalonians1:2 ekisa kibeerenga gye muli n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Kitugwanidde okwebazanga Katonda ennaku zonna ku lwammwe, ab'oluganda, nga bwe kisaana, kubanga okukkiriza kwammwe kukula nnyo, n'okwagalana kwa buli muntu kw'alina eri munne kweyongera." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Naffe bennyini n'okwenyumiriza ne twenyumiririzanga mu mmwe mu kkanisa za Katonda olw'okugumiikiriza kwammwe n'okukkiriza mu kuyigganyizibwa kwammwe kwonna n'okubonaabona bye mugumira. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ebyo ke kabonero k'omusango gwa Katonda ogw'ensonga; mulyoke musaanyizibwe obwakabaka bwa Katonda, n'okubonaabona bwe mubonaabonera." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Kuba ddala kya nsonga eri Katonda okubasasula okubonaabona abo abababonyaabonya," 
2Thessalonians1:7 era nammwe ababonyaabonyezebwa okubasasula okuwummula awamu naffe, mu kubikkulibwa kwa Mukama waffe Yesu okuva mu ggulu awamu ne bamalayika be ab'obuyinza mu muliro ogwaka." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Aliwalana eggwanga ku abo abatamanyi Katonda, n'abo abatagondera njiri ya Mukama waffe Yesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Balibonerezebwa, n'okuzikirira okw'emirembe n'emirembe, n'okugobebwa okuva mu maaso ga Mukama waffe ne mu kitiibwa ky'amaanyi ge." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Bw'alijja ku lunnaku olwo okuweebwa ekitiibwa mu batukuvu be, n'okwewuunyizibwa mu bonna abakkiriza (kubanga okutegeeza kwaffe gye muli kwakkirizibwa) ku lunaku luli." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Kyetuva tubasabira ennaku zonna, Katonda waffe abasaanyize okuyitibwa kwammwe, era atuukirize buli kye mwagala eky'obulungi na buli mulimu gwe mukola olw'okukkiriza mu maanyi ge." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Bwerityo erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu liryoke liweebwe ekitiibwa mu mmwe, era nammwe mu ye ng'ekisa kya Katonda waffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo bwe kiri." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Kaakano ebikwata ku kujja kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'olw'okukuŋŋaana kwaffe okumusisinkana, tubeegayirira ab'oluganda," 
2Thessalonians2:2 obutasagaasagana mangu mu magezi gammwe, newakubadde okweraliikirira newakubadde olw'omwoyo, newakubadde olw'ebbaluwa efaanana ng'evudde gyetuli, nti olunaku lwa Mukama waffe lutuuse." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Omuntu yenna tabalimbanga mu kigambo kyonna kyonna; kubanga olunaku olwo terulijja wabula ng'okwawukana kuli kumaze kubaawo, era omuntu oli ow'okwonoona nga alimala okubikkulwa, omwana w'okuzikirira," 
2Thessalonians2:4 aziyiza era eyeegulumiza okusinga buli kintu ekiyitibwa Katonda oba ekisinzibwa, n'okutuula n'atuula mu Yeekaalu ya Katonda, nga yeeraga yekka nti ye Katonda." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Temujjukira, nga bwe nnali nga nkyali gye muli, nnababuulira ebyo?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Era ne kaakano ekirobera mukimanyi, alyoke abikkulwe mu ntuuko ze." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Kubanga ne kaakano ekyama eky'obujeemu weekiri kikola, wabula kyokka aziyiza kaakano okutuusa lw'aliggibwawo." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Awo omujeemu oli n'alyoka abikkulwa, Mukama waffe Yesu gw'alitta n'omukka ogw'omu kamwa ke, era gw'alizikiriza n'okulabisibwa kwe n'okujja kwe." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Naye okujja kw'oyo atakwata mateeka, olw'okukola kwa Setaani kulijja n'amaanyi gonna n'obubonero n'eby'amagero eby'obulimba," 
2Thessalonians2:10 n'okukyamya kwonna okutali kwa butuukirivu eri abo ababula; kubanga bagaana okwagala amazima, balyoke balokoke." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Katonda kyava abasindikira okukyamya okw'amaanyi, bakkirize eby'obulimba," 
2Thessalonians2:12 bonna balyoke basalirwe omusango abatakkiriza mazima naye abasanyukira obutali butuukirivu. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Naye kitugwanidde ffe okwebazanga Katonda ennaku zonna ku lwammwe, ab'oluganda abaagalwa Mukama waffe, kubanga Katonda yabalondera obulokozi okuva ku lubereberye mu kutukuzibwa Omwoyo n'okukkiriza amazima." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Kino yakibayitira okuyita mu njiri yaffe, mulyoke mufune ekitiibwa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Kale nno, ab'oluganda, muyimirirenga, era munywezenga bye mwaweebwa ne muyigirizibwa, oba mu kigambo oba mu bbaluwa yaffe." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Naye Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo yennyini, ne Katonda Kitaffe, eyatwagala n'atuwa okusanyusa okutaggwaawo n'essuubi eddungi mu kisa," 
2Thessalonians2:17 abasanyuse emitima gyammwe aginywezenga mu buli kikolwa n'ekigambo ekirungi. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Eky'enkomerero, ab'oluganda, mutusabirenga ekigambo kya Mukama waffe kibune mangu, era kiweebwenga ekitiibwa, era nga bwe kyali mu mmwe." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Era mutusabire, tulokolebwe okuva mu bantu abatalina magezi era ababi; kubanga okukkiriza si kwa bonna." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Naye Mukama waffe mwesigwa, alibanyweza, era anaabakuumanga eri omubi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Era twesiga Mukama waffe mu bigambo byammwe, nga mukola bye twabalagira era munaabikolanga." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Era Mukama waffe aluŋŋamyenga emitima gyammwe okutuuka mu kwagala kwa Katonda ne mu kugumiikiriza kwa Kristo. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Era tubalagira, ab'oluganda, mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mweyawulenga eri buli ow'oluganda atatambula bulungi, newakubadde mu mpisa ze baaweebwa ffe." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Kubanga mmwe mwennyini mumanyi bwe kibagwanira okutugobereranga, kubanga tetwali bagayaavu bwe twali nammwe," 
2Thessalonians3:8 so tetulyanga mmere ya muntu yenna ya bwereere, naye mu kufuba n'okukoowa twakolanga emirimu ekiro n'emisana obutazitoowerera muntu ku mmwe;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 si kubanga tetulina buyinza, naye tweweeyo gye muli ng'eky'okulabirako mulyoke mutugobererenga." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Kubanga era bwe twali gye muli, twabalagira bwe tutyo nti Omuntu yenna bw'agaananga okukola emirimu, n'okulya talyanga." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Kubanga tuwulira nti eriyo abamu abatatambula bulungi mu mmwe nga tebakola mirimu gyabwe n'akatono, wabula egy'abalala." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Abali bwe batyo tubalagira era tubabuulirira mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, okukolanga emirimu n'obuteefu balyoke balyenga emmere yaabwe bo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Naye mmwe, ab'oluganda, temukoowanga mu kukola obulungi." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Era omuntu yenna bw'atagonderanga kigambo kyaffe mu bbaluwa eno, oyo mumwetegerezanga, so temwegattanga naye, ensonyi ziryoke zimukwate." 
2Thessalonians3:15 So temumulowoozanga nga mulabe, naye mumubuuliriranga ng'ow'oluganda." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Era Mukama waffe ow'emirembe yennyini abawenga emirembe ennaku zonna mu bigambo byonna. Mukama waffe abeerenga nammwe mwenna. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Kuno kwe kulamusa kwange Pawulo n'omukono gwange, ke kabonero mu bbaluwa yonna, bwe ntyo bwe mpandiika." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga nammwe mwenna. 
1Timothy1:1 Pawulo, omutume wa Kristo Yesu ng'okulagira kwa Katonda Omulokozi waffe bwe kuli n'okwa Kristo Yesu essuubi lyaffe;" 
1Timothy1:2 eri Timoseewo omwana wange ddala olw'okukkiriza. Ekisa, okusaasira, n'emirembe bibenga gy'oli ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
1Timothy1:3 Nga bwe nnakubuulirira okubeera mu Efeso, bwe nnali nga ŋŋenda e Makedoni, olagirenga abamu obutayigirizanga bulala," 
1Timothy1:4 newakubadde okulowoozanga enfumo n'ebigambo eby'obuzaale ebitakoma, ebireeta empaka mu kifo ky'okuyigiriza kw'obwa Katonda okuli mu kukkiriza." 
1Timothy1:5 Ekigendererwa ky'ekiragiro kyaffe kwe kwagala okuva mu mutima omulongoofu n'omwoyo omulungi n'okukkiriza okutalina bukuusa. 
1Timothy1:6 Ebyo abantu abamu babiwunjukamu ne bakyamira mu bigambo ebitaliimu; 
1Timothy1:7 nga baagala okuba ng'abayigiriza b'amateeka, nga tebategeera bye boogera newakubadde bye bakakasa." 
1Timothy1:8 Naye tumanyi ng'amateeka malungi, omuntu bw'agakozesa mu butuufu bw'ago," 
1Timothy1:9 ng'atutegeera kino nti, amateeka tegateekerwawo muntu mutuukirivu, wabula abatali batuukirivu n'abajeemu, abatatya Katonda n'abalina ebibi, abatali batukuvu n'abavvoola Katonda, abatta bakitaabwe ne bannyaabwe, abassi b'abantu," 
1Timothy1:10 abenzi, abalya ebisiyaga, abanyazi b'abantu, abalimba, abalayirira obwereere, n'ebirala byonna ebiwakana n'okuyigiriza okw'obulamu," 
1Timothy1:11 ng'Enjiri bw'eri ey'ekitiibwa kya Katonda eyeebazibwa gye nnateresebwa. 
1Timothy1:12 Mmwebaza oyo eyampa amaanyi, ye Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe, kubanga yandowooza nga ndi mwesigwa, bwe yanteeka mu buweereza," 
1Timothy1:13 olubereberye bwe nnali omuvumi era omuyigganya era ow'ekyejo; naye nnasaasirwa kubanga nnakolanga nga ssimanyi mu butakkiriza. 
1Timothy1:14 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe ne kyeyongera nnyo gyendi wamu n'okukkiriza n'okwagala okuli mu Kristo Yesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Ekigambo kyesigwa, era ekisaanira okukkirizibwa kwonna nti Kristo Yesu yajja mu nsi okulokola abalina ebibi; mu bo nze w'olubereberye." 
1Timothy1:16 Naye kyennava nsaasirwanti mu nze asinga obubi mu boonoonyi, Yesu Kristo mwayinza okulabisiza okugumiikiriza kwe kwonna, okunaabeeranga ekyokulabirako eri abo abagenda okumukkiriza olw'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
1Timothy1:17 Era Kabaka ow'emirembe n'emirembe, ataggwaawo, atalabika, Katonda omu, aweebwenga ettendo n'ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
1Timothy1:18 Ekiragiro kino nkikuteresa, mwana wange Timoseewo, ng'ebigambo bya bannabbi bwe byali bye baakwogerako edda, olyoke olwanirenga mu byo olutalo olulungi," 
1Timothy1:19 ng'onyweza okukkiriza n'omwoyo omulungi, abalala gwe basindika eri ne bamenyekerwa okukkiriza kwabwe." 
1Timothy1:20 Mu abo mwe muli Kumenayo ne Alegezanda, be nnawa eri Setaani, balyoke bayigirizibwe obutavumanga." 
1Timothy2:1 Kale okusooka byonna mbabuulirira okwegayiriranga n'okusabanga n'okutakabananga n'okwebazanga bikolebwenga ku lw'abantu bonna; 
1Timothy2:2 ku lwa bakabaka n'abakulu bonna; tulyoke tubeerenga n'obulamu obutereevu obw'emirembe mu kutya Katonda kwonna ne mu kwegendereza. 
1Timothy2:3 Ekyo kye kirungi, ekikkirizibwa mu maaso g'Omulokozi waffe Katonda," 
1Timothy2:4 ayagala abantu bonna okulokoka, era okutuuka mu kutegeerera ddala amazima." 
1Timothy2:5 Kubanga waliwo Katonda omu, era omutabaganya wa Katonda n'abantu omu, omuntu Kristo Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 eyeewaayo abe omutango olwa bonna; obujulizi bwakyo obwalabisibwa mu ntuuko zaabwo. 
1Timothy2:7 Olwa kino, nze nnateekebwawo okuba omubuulizi era omutume (njogera mazima, ssirimba), Omuyigiriza w'amawanga olw'okukkiriza n'amazima." 
1Timothy2:8 Kyenva njagala abasajja basabenga mu buli kifo, nga bayimusa emikono emitukuvu, awatali busungu na mpaka." 
1Timothy2:9 Bwe batyo n'abakazi beeyonjenga mu byambalo ebisaana, n'okukwatibwa ensonyi n'okwegendereza; si mu kulanganga enviiri, ne zaabu oba luulu oba engoye ez'omuwendo omungi;" 
1Timothy2:10 naye (nga bwe kisaanira abakazi abeeyita abatya Katonda) n'ebikolwa ebirungi. 
1Timothy2:11 Omukazi ayigenga mu bukkakkamu mu kugonda kwonna. 
1Timothy2:12 Naye omukazi mmugaanyi okuyigirizanga, newakubadde okufuganga omusajja, naye okubeeranga mu bukkakkamu." 
1Timothy2:13 Kubanga Adamu ye yasooka okutondebwa, oluvannyuma Kaawa;" 
1Timothy2:14 era Adamu si ye yalimbibwa, naye omukazi oli ye yalimbibwa n'aba mu kwonoona," 
1Timothy2:15 naye anaalokokanga mu kuzaala, bwe banaanyiikiriranga mu kukkiriza n'okwagala n'obutukuvu awamu n'okwegendereza." 
1Timothy3:1 Kyesigwa ekigambo ekyo nti, Omuntu bw'ayagalanga obulabirizi, yeegomba mulimu mulungi." 
1Timothy3:2 Kale omulabirizi kimugwanira obutabangako kya kunenyezebwa, abeerenga musajja wa mukazi omu, atatamiira, mwegendereza, mukwata mpola, ayaniriza abagenyi, ayigiriza;" 
1Timothy3:3 si mutamiivu, si mukambwe; naye omuwombeefu, si muyombi era atalulunkanira nsimbi;" 
1Timothy3:4 afuga obulungi ennyumba ye ye, akuuma abaana be nga bawulize, era nga balina ekitiibwa." 
1Timothy3:5 Kubanga omuntu bw'atamanya kufuga nnyumba ye ye, ayinza atya okulabirira ekkanisa ya Katonda?" 
1Timothy3:6 Tasaana kuba oyo eyaakakyuka, alemenga okwekulumbaza si kulwa nga agwa mu musango gwa Setaani." 
1Timothy3:7 Era nate kimugwanira okubeeranga n'okutegeezebwa okulungi eri abo ab'ebweru, alemenga okugwa mu kuvumibwa ne mu kyambika kya Setaani." 
1Timothy3:8 Bwe batyo n'abaweereza kibagwanira okubeeranga abalimu ekitiibwa, si bannimibbirye, abatafugibwa mwenge, abatalulunkanira bintu olw'amagoba;" 
1Timothy3:9 nga bakuuma ekyama eky'okukkiriza mu mwoyo omulungi. 
1Timothy3:10 Era nate abo basookenga okugezesebwa, balyoke baweereze, nga tebaliiko kya kunenyezebwa." 
1Timothy3:11 Bwe batyo n'abakazi kibagwanira okubeeranga abalimu ekitiibwa, abatawaayiriza, abeegendereza, abeesigwa mu byonna." 
1Timothy3:12 Abaweereza babeerenga basajja ba mukazi omu, nga bafuga abaana baabwe obulungi n'ennyumba zaabwe bo." 
1Timothy3:13 Kubanga abamala okuweereza obulungi beefunira obukulu obulungi n'obugumu bungi mu kukkiriza okuli mu Kristo Yesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Nkuwandiikidde ebyo nga nsuubira okujja gy'oli mangu; 
1Timothy3:15 naye bwe ndwanga olyoke obe ng'omanyi bwe kigwana okukolanga mu nnyumba ya Katonda, ye kkanisa ya Katonda omulamu, empagi n'omusingi eby'amazima." 
1Timothy3:16 Era awatali kubuusabuusa ekyama eky'okutya Katonda kye kikulu; oyo eyalabisibwa mu mubiri, n'aweebwa obutuukirivu mu mwoyo, n'alabibwa bamalayika, n'abuulirwa mu mawanga, n'akkirizibwa mu nsi, n'atwalibwa mu kitiibwa." 
1Timothy4:1 Naye Omwoyo ayogera lwatu nti mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma walibaawo abaliva mu kukkiriza, nga bawulira emyoyo egikyamya n'okuyigiriza kwa basetaani," 
1Timothy4:2 olw'obunnanfuusi bw'abalimba, nga bookebwa emyoyo gyabwe ng'ekyuma ekyokya." 
1Timothy4:3 Abo bawera okufumbiriganwanga era nga balagira okulekanga ebiriibwa, Katonda bye yatonda biriirwenga mu kwebaza abakkiriza ne bategeerera ddala amazima." 
1Timothy4:4 Kubanga buli kitonde kya Katonda kirungi, so siwali kya kusuula bwe kitoolebwa n'okwebaza," 
1Timothy4:5 kubanga kitukuzibwa na kigambo kya Katonda n'okusaba. 
1Timothy4:6 Bw'onojjukizanga ab'oluganda ebyo, onoobanga muweereza mulungi owa Kristo Yesu, ng'okulira mu bigambo eby'okukkiriza n'eby'okuyigiriza okulungi kwe wagoberera." 
1Timothy4:7 Naye enfumo ezitali za ddiini ez'obusirusiru z'oba olekanga. Weemanyiizenga okutya Katonda," 
1Timothy4:8 kubanga okwemanyiiza kw'omubiri kugasa akaseera katono; naye okutya Katonda kugasa mu byonna, kubanga kulina okusuubiza kw'obulamu obwa kaakano n'obw'obugenda okujja." 
1Timothy4:9 Ekigambo ekyo kyesigwa era ekisaanira okukkirizibwa kwonna. 
1Timothy4:10 Kubanga kyetuva tutegana ne tufuba, kubanga twasuubira Katonda omulamu, Omulokozi w'abantu bonna, okusinga w'abakkiriza." 
1Timothy4:11 Lagiranga ebyo obiyigirizenga. 
1Timothy4:12 Omuntu yenna takunyoomanga lwa buvubuka bwo; naye beeranga kyakulabirako eri abo abakkiriza mu kwogeranga, mu kutambulanga, mu kwagalanga, mu kukkirizanga, mu kubanga omulongoofu." 
1Timothy4:13 Okutuusa lwe ndijja, nyiikiranga mu kusoma, n'okubuuliriranga, n'okuyigirizanga." 
1Timothy4:14 Tolekanga kirabo ekiri mu ggwe, kye waweebwa olw'obunnabbi awamu n'okuteekebwako emikono gy'abakadde." 
1Timothy4:15 Ebyo obirowoozenga, obeerenga mu ebyo; bonna balabenga ng'ogenda mu maaso." 
1Timothy4:16 Weekuumenga wekka n'okuyigiriza kwo. Nyiikiriranga mu ebyo; kubanga bw'okola bw'otyo, olyerokola wekka era n'abo abakuwulira." 
1Timothy5:1 Tonenyanga mukadde, naye omubuuliriranga nga kitaawo; abavubuka nga baganda bo," 
1Timothy5:2 abakazi abakadde nga nnyoko; n'abakazi abato nga bannyoko mu bulongoofu bwonna. 
1Timothy5:3 Obawenga ekitiibwa bannamwandu ababa bannamwandu ddala. 
1Timothy5:4 Naye nnamwandu yenna bw'aba n'abaana oba bazzukulu, basookenga okuyiga okwegendereza eri ab'omu nnyumba zaabwe, n'okusasula bakadde baabwe, kubanga ekyo kye kikkirizibwa mu maaso ga Katonda." 
1Timothy5:5 Naye abeera nnamwandu ddala n'alekebwa yekka, asuubira Katonda, n'anyiikiranga mu kusaba n'okwegayiriranga emisana n'ekiro." 
1Timothy5:6 Naye oyo awoomerwa ebinyumu ng'afudde newakubadde ng'akyali mulamu. 
1Timothy5:7 Era n'ebyo obalagire, balemenga okubaako eky'okunenyezebwa." 
1Timothy5:8 Naye omuntu yenna bw'atajjanjaba babe, n'okusinga ab'omu nnyumba ye, nga yeegaanyi okukkiriza, era nga ye mubi okusinga atakkiriza." 
1Timothy5:9 Nnamwandu yenna tawandiikibwanga nga tannatuusa myaka nkaaga (60), eyafumbirwa omusajja omu," 
1Timothy5:10 asiimibwa mu bikolwa ebirungi; oba nga yaleranga abaana, oba nga yayanirizanga abagenyi, oba nga yanaazanga abatukuvu ebigere, oba nga yayambanga ababonaabona, oba nga yagobereranga nnyo buli kikolwa ekirungi." 
1Timothy5:11 Naye bannamwandu abakyali abato obagaanenga, kubanga bwe balikabawala eri Kristo, nga baagala okufumbirwa;" 
1Timothy5:12 bwe batyo ne bazza omusango kubanga basuula okukkiriza kwabwe okw'olubereberye. 
1Timothy5:13 Era ate bayiga okubeeranga abagayaavu, nga baatambulatambula okubuna amayumba; naye tebagayaala bugayaazi, era naye balina olugambo n'akajanja, nga boogera ebitasaana." 
1Timothy5:14 Kyenva njagala abakyali abato bafumbirwenga, bazaalenga abaana, bafugenga ennyumba zaabwe, balemenga okuwa omulabe ebbanga w'ayima okutuvuma." 
1Timothy5:15 Kubanga waliwo kaakano abakyamye okugoberera Setaani. 
1Timothy5:16 Omukazi yenna akkiriza bw'abanga ne bannamwandu, abayambenga, era ekkanisa eremenga okuzitoowererwa, eryoke eyambenga bannamwandu ddala ddala." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakadde abafuga obulungi basaanyizibwe okuweebwanga ekitiibwa emirundi ebiri, naddala abo abafuba mu kubuulira ekigambo n'okuyigiriza." 
1Timothy5:18 Kubanga ekyawandiikibwa kyogera nti, “Tosibanga mumwa gwa nte ewuula eŋŋaano.” Era nti, “Akola emirimu asaanira empeera ye.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Tokkirizanga kiroope ku mukadde awatali bajulirwa babiri oba basatu. 
1Timothy5:20 Aboonoona obanenyezanga mu maaso g'abantu bonna, era n'abalala balyoke batyenga." 
1Timothy5:21 Nkukuutirira mu maaso ga Katonda, ne Kristo Yesu, ne bamalayika abalonde, weekuumenga ebyo awatali kusaliriza, nga tokola kigambo olw'obuganzi." 
1Timothy5:22 Toyanguyirizanga kussaako mikono ku muntu yenna, so tossanga kimu na bibi by'abantu abalala, weekuume obeerenga mulongoofu." 
1Timothy5:23 Tonywanga mazzi gokka, naye onywanga ne ku mwenge katono olw'olubuto lwo n'olw'okulwalalwala." 
1Timothy5:24 Waliwo abantu ebibi byabwe biba mu lwatu; nga bibakulembera okugenda mu musango; era n'abalala birabika luvannyuma. 
1Timothy5:25 Era bwe kityo n'ebikolwa ebirungi biba mu lwatu; bwe kitaba bwe kityo era tebirirema kwolesebwa. 
1Timothy6:1 Abali mu kikoligo ky'obuddu balowoozenga bakama baabwe bennyini nga basaanidde ekitiibwa kyonna, erinnya lya Katonda n'okuyigiriza kwaffe biremenga okuvumibwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Abo abalina bakama baabwe abakkiriza tebabanyoomanga, kubanga ba luganda; naye beeyongere okubaweerezanga, kubanga abagasibwa mu kuweereza kwabwe, bakkiriza era baagalwa. Yigirizanga ebyo obibuulirirenga." 
1Timothy6:3 Omuntu yenna bw'ayigirizanga obulala, era nga takkiriza bigambo bya bulamu, ebya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'okuyigiriza okugoberera okutya Katonda;" 
1Timothy6:4 nga yeekulumbaza, nga taliiko ky'ategeera, wabula okukalambiza obukalambizi empaka n'entalo ez'ebigambo, omuva obuggya, okuyomba, okuvuma, n'okuwayiriza," 
1Timothy6:5 awamu n'okukaayana kw'abantu abayonooneka amagezi, abaggibwako amazima, nga balowooza ng'okutya Katonda kwe kufuna amagoba." 
1Timothy6:6 Naye okutya Katonda wamu n'obutayaayaananga ge magoba amangi," 
1Timothy6:7 kubanga tetwaleeta kintu mu nsi, era tetuyinza kuggyamu kintu." 
1Timothy6:8 Naye bwe tuba n'emmere n'eby'okwambala, ebyo binaatumalanga." 
1Timothy6:9 Naye abaagala okugaggawala bagwa mu kukemebwa ne mu mutego n'okwegomba okungi okw'obusirusiru okwonoona, okunnyika abantu mu kubula n'okuzikirira." 
1Timothy6:10 Kubanga okwagala ebintu kye kikolo ky'ebibi byonna; waliwo abantu abayaayaanira ebyo, ne bakyamizibwa okuva mu kukkiriza, ne beefumitira ddala n'ennaku ennyingi." 
1Timothy6:11 Naye ggwe, omuntu wa Katonda, ddukanga ebyo, ogobererenga obutuukirivu, okutya Katonda, okukkiriza, okwagala, okugumiikiriza, n'obuwombeefu." 
1Timothy6:12 Lwananga okulwana okulungi okw'okukkiriza, nywezanga obulamu obutaggwaawo, bwe wayitirwa, n'oyatula okwatula okulungi mu maaso g'abajulirwa abangi." 
1Timothy6:13 Nkukuutirira mu maaso ga Katonda, awa byonna obulamu, ne Kristo Yesu eyategeeza okwatula okulungi eri Pontio Piraato;" 
1Timothy6:14 weekuumenga ekiragiro awatali bbala, awatali kya kunenyezebwa, okutuusa ku kulabika kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Timothy6:15 Kuno kuliragibwa mu ntuuko zaakwo Nannyini buyinza yekka atenderezebwa, Kabaka wa bakabaka, era Mukama w'abaami;" 
1Timothy6:16 alina obutafa yekka, atuula mu kutangaala okutasemberekeka; omuntu yenna gw'atalabangako, so siwali ayinza okumulaba, aweebwenga ekitiibwa n'obuyinza obutaggwaawo. Amiina." 
1Timothy6:17 Okuutirenga abagagga ab'omu mirembe gya kaakano obuteegulumizanga, newakubadde okwesiga obugagga obutali bwa lubeerera, wabula Katonda, atuwa byonna olw'obugagga tulyoke twesanyusenga n'ebyo;" 
1Timothy6:18 bakolenga obulungi, babeerenga abagagga mu bikolwa ebirungi, babeerenga bagabi, bassenga kimu." 
1Timothy6:19 Olwo banaabanga beeterekera eky'okunsinzirako ekirungi olw'ebiro ebigenda okujja, balyoke banywezenga obulamu ddala ddala." 
1Timothy6:20 Ayi Timoseewo, kuumanga kye wateresebwa, nga weewala ebigambo ebitaliimu ebitali bya Katonda n'okuwakana kw'ebigambo bye beerimba nti magezi." 
1Timothy6:21 Waliwo abantu abeegamba okuba nakwo, ne bakyama mu kukkiriza. Ekisa kibeerenga nammwe." 
2Timothy1:1 Pawulo, omutume wa Kristo Yesu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ng'okusuubiza bwe kuli okw'obulamu obuli mu Kristo Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 eri Timoseewo, omwana wange omwagalwa; ekisa, okusaasira, n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
2Timothy1:3 Nneebaza Katonda gw'empeereza mu mwoyo omulungi, era nga bajjajjange bwe baakola, bwe nkujjukira obutayosa mu kusaba kwange." 
2Timothy1:4 Bwe nzijukira amaziga go, neegomba emisana n'ekiro okukulaba ndyoke njijule essanyu." 
2Timothy1:5 Nzijukizibwa okukkiriza kwo okutaliimu bukuusa, okukkiriza okwabeeranga olubereberye mu jjajjaawo Looyi ne mu nnyoko Ewuniike, era ntegeeredde ddala nga kuli ne mu ggwe." 
2Timothy1:6 Kyenva nkujjukiza okuseesanga ekirabo kya Katonda ekiri mu ggwe olw'okuteekebwako emikono gyange. 
2Timothy1:7 Kubanga Katonda teyatuwa ffe omwoyo ogw'okutya, wabula ogw'amaanyi era ogw'okwagala era ogw'okwegenderezanga." 
2Timothy1:8 Kale, tokwatirwanga nsonyi kutegeeza kwa Mukama waffe, newakubadde nze omusibe we, naye obonyaabonyezebwanga wamu n'Enjiri ng'amaanyi ga Katonda bwe gali;" 
2Timothy1:9 eyatulokola n'atuyita okuyita okutukuvu, si ng'ebikolwa byaffe bwe biri, wabula okumalirira kwe ye n'ekisa bwe biri, kye twaweerwa mu Kristo Yesu emirembe n'emirembe nga teginnabaawo." 
2Timothy1:10 Naye kaakano kirabisibwa olw'okwolesebwa kw'Omulokozi waffe Kristo Yesu, eyaggyawo okufa n'aleeta obulamu n'obutafa mu kitangaala okuyita mu njiri," 
2Timothy1:11 gye nnateekerwawo okuba omubuulizi era omutume era Omuyigiriza. 
2Timothy1:12 Era kyenva mbonaabona bwe ntyo, naye sikwatibwa nsonyi; kubanga mmanyi gwe nnakkiriza, ne ntegeerera ddala ng'ayinza okukuumanga kye nnamuteresa okutuusa ku lunaku luli." 
2Timothy1:13 Nywezanga ekyokulabirako eky'ebigambo eby'obulamu bye wawuliranga gye ndi, mu kukkiriza ne mu kwagala okuli mu Kristo Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Ekintu ekirungi kye wateresebwa okikuumenga n'Omwoyo Omutukuvu, abeera mu ffe." 
2Timothy1:15 Kino okimanyi nga bonna abali mu Asiya bankuba amabega; ku abo ye Fugero ne Kerumogene. 
2Timothy1:16 Mukama waffe asaasire ennyumba ya Onesifolo, kubanga yampummuzanga emirundi mingi, so teyakwatirwa nsonyi lujegere lwange," 
2Timothy1:17 naye bwe yali mu Ruumi n'anyiikira okunnoonya n'okulaba n'andaba. 
2Timothy1:18 (Mukama waffe amuwe okulaba okusaasirwa eri Mukama waffe ku lunaku luli), era n'okuweereza kwonna kwe yaweerezanga mu Efeso, ggwe okutegeera bulungi nnyo." 
2Timothy2:1 Kale ggwe, mwana wange, beeranga wa maanyi mu kisa ekiri mu Kristo Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Era bye wawuliranga gye ndi mu bajulirwa abangi, ebyo biteresenga abantu abeesigwa, era abalisaanira okuyigiriza n'abalala." 
2Timothy2:3 Bonaaboneranga wamu nange ng'omulwanyi omulungi owa Kristo Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Tewali mulwanyi bw'atabaala eyeeyingiza mu mitawaana egy'obulamu buno, alyoke asiimibwe oyo eyamuwandiika okuba omulwanyi." 
2Timothy2:5 Naye era omuntu bweyetaba mu mbiro ez'empaka, taweebwa ngule bw'atawakana nga bwe kiragirwa." 
2Timothy2:6 Omulimi akola emirimu n'amaanyi yasaana okusooka okutwala ku bibala. 
2Timothy2:7 Lowooza kye njogedde; kubanga Mukama waffe anaakuwanga okutegeera mu bigambo byonna. 
2Timothy2:8 Jjukira Yesu Kristo, nga yazuukira mu bafu, ow'omu zzadde lya Dawudi, ng'enjiri yange bw'eyogera;" 
2Timothy2:9 Enjiri eyo gye mbonaaboneramu okutuusa ku kusibibwa, ng'akola obubi; naye ekigambo kya Katonda tekisibibwa." 
2Timothy2:10 Kyenva ngumiikiriza byonna olw'abalonde, era nabo balyoke bafune okulokoka okuli mu Kristo Yesu, wamu n'ekitiibwa ekitaggwaawo." 
2Timothy2:11 Ekigambo kino kyesigwa nti, “Oba nga twafa naye, era tulibeera balamu wamu naye." 
2Timothy2:12 Bwe tugumiikiriza, era tulifugira wamu naye; bwe tumwegaana, era naye alitwegaana." 
2Timothy2:13 Bwe tutabeera beesigwa, ye abeera mwesigwa, kubanga tayinza kwegaana kyali.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Ebyo obibajjukizanga, ng'obakuutirira mu maaso ga Mukama waffe, obutalwananga na bigambo ebitagasa, ebikyamya abawulira." 
2Timothy2:15 Fubanga okweraga ng'osiimibwa Katonda, omukozi atakwatibwa nsonyi, ayisa wakati ekigambo eky'amazima." 
2Timothy2:16 Naye ebigambo ebitaliimu ebitali bya ddiini obyewalanga, kubanga bireetera abantu kweyongera bweyongezi mu butatya Katonda." 
2Timothy2:17 Ekigambo kyabwe kirirya nga kookolo; ku abo ye Kumenayo ne Fireeto; 
2Timothy2:18 kubanga baakyama mu mazima, nga boogera ng'okuzuukira kwamala okubeerawo, era waliwo abantu be baavuunikirira okukkiriza kwabwe." 
2Timothy2:19 Naye omusingi gwa Katonda omugumu gubeerawo, nga gulina akabonero kano nti, “Mukama waffe amanyi ababe,” era nti, “Buli ayatula erinnya lya Mukama, yeewalenga obutali butuukirivu.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Naye mu nnyumba ennene temubaamu bintu bya zaabu na bya ffeeza byokka, naye era mubaamu n'eby'emiti n'eby'ebbumba; n'ebirala eby'ekitiibwa, n'ebirala ebitali bya kitiibwa." 
2Timothy2:21 Kale omuntu bwe yeerongoosaako ebyo, anaabeeranga ekintu eky'ekitiibwa, ekyatukuzibwa, ekisaanira omwami okuweerezanga, ekyalongooserezebwa buli mulimu omulungi." 
2Timothy2:22 Naye okwegomba okw'omu buvubuka okwewalanga, naye ogobereranga obutuukirivu, okukkiriza, okwagala, emirembe, awamu n'abo abasaba Mukama waffe mu mwoyo omulongoofu." 
2Timothy2:23 Naye empaka ez'obusirusiru era ez'obutayigirizibwa ozirekanga, ng'omanyi nga zizaala okulwana." 
2Timothy2:24 Naye omuddu wa Mukama waffe tekimugwanira kulwananga, wabula okubeeranga omukkakkamu eri bonna, omuyigiriza, omugumiikiriza," 
2Timothy2:25 abuulirira n'obuwombeefu abawakanyi, mpozzi oba nga Katonda alibawa okwenenya olw'okutegeerera ddala amazima," 
2Timothy2:26 era balyoke badduke okuva mu mutego gwa Setaani, oyo eyabanyaga okukolanga by'ayagala." 
2Timothy3:1 Naye tegeera kino nga mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma walibaawo ebiro eby'okulaba ennaku. 
2Timothy3:2 Kubanga abantu baliba nga beeyagala bokka, abaagala ebintu, abeenyumiriza, ab'amalala, abavumi, abatagondera bazadde baabwe, abateebaza, si batuukirivu," 
2Timothy3:3 abatayagala ba luganda, abatatabagana, abawaayiriza, abateegendereza, abakambwe, abatayagala bulungi," 
2Timothy3:4 ab'enkwe, abakakanyavu, abeegulumiza, abaagala essanyu okusinga Katonda." 
2Timothy3:5 Balina ekifaananyi ky'okutya Katonda, naye nga beegaana amaanyi gaakwo, abantu bwe batyo obakubanga amabega." 
2Timothy3:6 Kubanga mu abo mulimu abasensera mu nnyumba ne banyaga abakazi abasirusiru abazitoowererwa ebibi ebingi, abafugibwa okwegomba okutali kumu," 
2Timothy3:7 abayiga bulijjo, naye ne batayinza ennaku zonna okutuuka ku kutegeerera ddala amazima." 
2Timothy3:8 Era nga Yane ne Yambere bwe baaziyiza Musa, ne bano bwe batyo baziyiza amazima; abayonooneka amagezi gaabwe, abatasiimibwa mu kukkiriza." 
2Timothy3:9 Naye tebalyeyongera wala nnyo, kubanga obusirusiru bwabwe bulitegeererwa ddala abantu bonna, era ng'obwa bali bwe bwategeerebwa." 
2Timothy3:10 Naye ggwe wagoberera nnyo okuyigiriza kwange, empisa zange, okuteesa kwange, okukkiriza kwange, okugumiikiriza kwange, okwagala kwange, okulindirira kwange," 
2Timothy3:11 okuyigganyizibwa kwange, n'okubonaabona kwange; ebyambeerako mu Antiyokiya, mu Ikoniyo, ne mu Lusitula; okuyigganyizibwa kwe nnayigganyizibwanga bwe kwali, era Mukama waffe yandokola mu byonna." 
2Timothy3:12 Naye era bonna abaagala mu Kristo Yesu okukwatanga empisa ez'okutya Katonda banaayigganyizibwanga. 
2Timothy3:13 Naye abantu ababi n'abeetulinkirira balyeyongera okuyitiriranga mu kukola obubi, nga balimba era nga balimbibwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Naye ggwe beeranga mu ebyo bye wayiga n'otegeerera ddala, ng'omanyi abakuyigiriza bwe bali;" 
2Timothy3:15 era ng'okuva mu buto wamanyanga ebyawandiikibwa ebitukuvu ebiyinza okukugeziwaza okuyingira mu kulokoka olw'okukkiriza okuli mu Kristo Yesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Ebyawandiikibwa byonna ebitukuvu birina okuluŋŋamya kwa Katonda era bigasa olw'okuyigirizanga, olw'okunenyanga, olw'okutereezanga, olw'okubuulira okuli mu butuukirivu:" 
2Timothy3:17 omuntu wa Katonda alemenga okubulwa kyonna kyonna, ng'alina ddala byonna olwa buli mulimu omulungi." 
2Timothy4:1 Nkukuutirira mu maaso ga Katonda ne Kristo Yesu, alisalira omusango abalamu n'abafu, era n'olw'okulabika kwe n'obwakabaka bwe;" 
2Timothy4:2 buuliranga ekigambo; kubiririzanga mu bbanga erisaaniramu n'eritasaaniramu; weranga, nenyanga, buuliriranga n'okugumiikiriza kwonna n'okuyigiriza." 
2Timothy4:3 Kubanga ebiro birijja lwe batalikkiriza kuwulira kuyigiriza kwa bulamu; naye, amatu nga gabasiiwa balikuŋŋaanya abayigiriza ng'okwegomba kwabwe bo bwe kuli;" 
2Timothy4:4 baliziba amatu okulekanga amazima, balikyama okugobereranga enfumo obufumo." 
2Timothy4:5 Naye ggwe tamiirukukanga mu byonna, bonaabonanga, kolanga omulimu ogw'omubuulizi w'Enjiri, tuukirizanga okuweereza kwo." 
2Timothy4:6 Kubanga nze kaakano nsemberedde okufa, n'ebiro eby'okuteebwa kwange bituuse." 
2Timothy4:7 Nnwanye okulwana okulungi, olugendo ndutuusizza, okukkiriza nkukuumye." 
2Timothy4:8 Kaakano ekisigaddeyo, engule enterekeddwa ey'obutuukirivu, Mukama waffe gy'alimpeera ku Lunaku luli, asala emisango egy'ensonga, so si nze nzekka, naye era ne bonna abaagala okulabika kwe." 
2Timothy4:9 Fuba okujja gye ndi mangu," 
2Timothy4:10 kubanga Dema yandekawo, ng'ayagala eby'ensi eno, n'agenda e Ssessaloniika; Kulesuke n'agenda e Ggalatiya, ne Tito n'agenda e Dalumatiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Lukka ye ali awamu nange yekka. Laba Makko, mujje naye; kubanga angasa olw'okuweereza." 
2Timothy4:12 Naye Tukiko nnamutuma mu Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Ekyambalo kye nnaleka mu Tulowa ewa Kappo, bw'oliba ng'ojja, kireete, n'ebitabo, naye, okusinga, biri eby'amaliba." 
2Timothy4:14 Alegezanda omuweesi w'ebikomo yankola obubi bungi, Mukama waffe alimusasula ng'ebikolwa bye bwe byali." 
2Timothy4:15 Oyo naawe omwekuumanga; kubanga yaziyiza nnyo ebigambo byaffe. 
2Timothy4:16 Mu kuwoza kwange okw'olubereberye tewali yannyamba, naye bonna banjabulira, nsaba baleme okukibalirwa." 
2Timothy4:17 Naye Mukama waffe yayimirira kumpi nange, n'ampa amaanyi; nze ndyoke ntuukirize kye mbuulira, era ab'amawanga bonna balyoke bawulire, bwentyo ne ndokoka mu kamwa k'empologoma." 
2Timothy4:18 Mukama waffe anaamponyanga mu buli kikolwa ekibi, era anandokolanga olw'obwakabaka bwe obw'omu ggulu, aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe Amiina." 
2Timothy4:19 Lamusa Pulisika ne Akula, n'ennyumba ya Onesifolo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasuto yasigala mu Kkolinso, naye Tulofiimo nnamuleka mu Mireeto ng'alwadde." 
2Timothy4:21 Fuba okujja ebiro eby'obutiti nga tebinnatuuka. Ewubulo akulamusizza, ne Pudente, ne Lino, ne Kulawudiya, n'ab'oluganda bonna." 
2Timothy4:22 Mukama waffe abeerenga n'omwoyo gwo. Ekisa kibeerenga nammwe. 
Titus1:1 Pawulo, omuddu wa Katonda, era omutume wa Yesu Kristo, ng'okukkiriza kw'abalonde ba Katonda bwe kuli n'okutegeera amazima agali mu kutya Katonda," 
Titus1:2 ebyesigamye mu kusuubira obulamu obutaggwaawo, Katonda ow'amazima bwe yasuubiza ng'ebiro eby'emirembe n'emirembe tebinnabaawo;" 
Titus1:3 naye mu ntuuko zaabyo yayolesa ekigambo kye mu kubuulira kwe nnateresebwa nze ng'ekiragiro kya Katonda Omulokozi waffe bwe kiri; 
Titus1:4 eri Tito, omwana wange ggeregere ng'okukkiriza kwaffe fenna bwe kuli; ekisa n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Kristo Yesu Omulokozi waffe bibeerenga gy'oli." 
Titus1:5 Kyennava nkuleka mu Kuleete, olyoke olongoosenga ebyasigalira, era oteekenga abakadde mu buli kibuga, nga nze bwe nnakulagira;" 
Titus1:6 omuntu ateekwa okuba nga taliiko kya kunenyezebwa, nga musajja wa mukazi omu, ng'alina abaana abakkiriza, abataloopebwa nga balalulalu oba abajeemu." 
Titus1:7 Kubanga omulabirizi kimugwanira okuba nga taliiko kya kunenyezebwa, ng'omuwanika wa Katonda, nga si mukakanyavu, si wa busungu, si mutamiivu, si mukambwe, nga teyeegomba kufuna magoba mu bukuusa;" 
Titus1:8 naye ayaniriza abagenyi, ayagala obulungi, eyeegendereza, mutuukirivu, mutukuvu, eyeefuga;" 
Titus1:9 anyweza ekigambo ekyesigwa ekiri ng'okuyigiriza kwaffe bwe kuli, alyoke ayinzenga okunyonnyola abantu enjigiriza entuufu, era n'okulaga obukyamu bwabo abagiwakanya." 
Titus1:10 Kubanga eriyo bangi abawakana, aboogera ebitaliimu era abalimba, era okusingira ddala abo ab'omu bakomole," 
Titus1:11 basaanye okuziyizibwa, kubanga abo be bavuunika ennyumba ennamba nga bayigiriza ebitabagwanidde, olw'amagoba ag'obukuusa." 
Titus1:12 Omu ku bo, era nnabbi waabwe bo, yagamba nti, “Abakuleete balimba ennaku zonna, zensolo embi, ba mululu era bagayaavu.”" 
Titus1:13 Okutegeeza okwo kwa mazima. Kyova oteekwa okubanenya n'amaanyi, balyoke babeere mu kukkiriza okutuufu," 
Titus1:14 balekeraawo okuwuliriza enfumo ez'obulimba ez'Ekiyudaaya n'ebiragiro by'abantu abakyama okuva ku mazima. 
Titus1:15 Eri abalongoofu byonna birongoofu, naye eri abagwagwa n'abatakkiriza tewali kirongoofu; naye amagezi gaabwe era n'omwoyo byasiigibwa obugwagwa." 
Titus1:16 Baatula nga bamanyi Katonda; naye mu bikolwa byabwe bamwegaana, kubanga bagwagwa era abatawulira era abatasiimibwa mu buli kikolwa kyonna ekirungi." 
Titus2:1 Naye ggwe yigirizanga ebisaanira okuyigiriza okw'obulamu. 
Titus2:2 Kubirizanga abasajja abakulu babeerenga bateefu, baabuvunaanyizibwa, bategeevu, abalina okukkiriza, okwagala, era abanywevu." 
Titus2:3 Abakazi abakulu nabo bakubirizenga babeerenga n'empisa ezisaanira mu bantu, nga tebawaayiriza, era nga si batamiivu, naye abayigiriza ebirungi;" 
Titus2:4 balyoke batendeke abakazi abato okwagalanga babbaabwe, n'abaana baabwe," 
Titus2:5 era babeerenga bategeevu, nga si benzi, abakola emirimu mu maka gaabwe, ab'ekisa, era abagondera babbaabwe, ekigambo kya Katonda kiremenga okuvumibwa." 
Titus2:6 N'abasajja abavubuka baakubirizenga okubeera abasobola okwefuga mu byonna. 
Titus2:7 Mu bigambo byonna ggwe beera ekyokulabirako ekirungi mu bikolwa, ne mu kuyigiriza kwo ng'olaganga obugolokofu, obumalirivu," 
Titus2:8 nga buli ky'oyogera tekiriiko kya kunenyezebwa, oyo atali ku lulwo alyoke akwatibwenga ensonyi, nga talina kibi kya kutwogerako." 
Titus2:9 Kubirizanga abaddu okugonderanga bakama baabwe, nga basiimibwanga mu byonna; tebateekwa kuba bajeemu," 
Titus2:10 nga tebabba, naye nga beesigwa ddala mu byonna; balyoke bayonjenga okuyigiriza kw'Omulokozi waffe Katonda mu byonna." 
Titus2:11 Kubanga ekisa kya Katonda kirabise, nga kireetera abantu bonna obulokozi," 
Titus2:12 nga kitubuulirira okugaananga obutatya Katonda n'okwegomba okw'omu nsi, tulyoke tubeerenga abateefu, abatuukirivu, era abatya Katonda mu nsi eno," 
Titus2:13 nga tulindirira essuubi ery'omukisa n'okulabika kw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda omukulu era Omulokozi waffe Yesu Kristo; 
Titus2:14 eyeewaayo ku lwaffe, alyoke atununule mu bujeemu bwonna, era yeerongooseze eggwanga ery'envuma, erinyiikirira ebikolwa ebirungi." 
Titus2:15 Yogeranga ebyo, obibuulirirenga, onenyenga n'obuyinza bwonna. Omuntu yenna takunyoomanga." 
Titus3:1 Obajjukizenga okugonderanga abafuga n'abalina obuyinza, okuwuliranga, okubeera abeetegefu okukola omulimu omulungi," 
Titus3:2 nga teboogera bubi ku muntu yenna, nga beewala okuyomba, abawombeefu, era nga bassaamu ekitiibwa abantu bonna." 
Titus3:3 Kubanga era naffe edda twali basirusiru, abatawulira, abalimbibwa, nga tuli baddu ba buli kwegomba okubi, n'ebinyumu ebitali bimu, nga tuli ba ttima era ab'obuggya, nga tukyayibwa abantu era nga tukyawagana ffekka na ffekka." 
Titus3:4 Naye obulungi n'okwagala okw'ekisa okwa Katonda Omulokozi waffe bwe byalabika," 
Titus3:5 n'atulokola, si lwa bikolwa bye twakola mu butuukirivu, wabula olw'okusaasira kwe, olw'okunaazibwa okw'okuzaalibwa omulundi ogwokubiri n'okufuulibwa abaggya Omwoyo Omutukuvu," 
Titus3:6 gwe yatufukako mu bungi mu Yesu Kristo Omulokozi waffe; 
Titus3:7 tulyoke tutukuzibwe olw'ekisa kye, era tufuuke abasika mu kusuubira obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Titus3:8 Ekigambo kino kyesigwa, ne ku bino njagala ggwe okukakasizanga ddala, abakkiriza Katonda bajjukirenga okussaako omwoyo ku bikolwa ebirungi. Ebyo birungi, era bigasa abantu:" 
Titus3:9 naye weewalenga empaka ez'obusirusiru, enkalala ez'endyo, ennyombo n'okuwakanira amateeka, kubanga tebiriiko kye bigasa so tebiriimu." 
Titus3:10 Omuntu omukyamu, bw'omalanga okumubuulirira omulundi ogwolubereberye n'ogwokubiri, omwewalanga," 
Titus3:11 ng'omanya ng'ali ng'oyo amaze okukyamizibwa era mwonoonyi; nga yeesalira yekka omusango. 
Titus3:12 Bwe ntumanga Atema oba Tukiko gy'oli ofubanga okujja gye ndi mu Nikopoli, kubanga nsazeewo okubeera eyo mu biseera eby'obutiti." 
Titus3:13 Fuba okwanguyaako Zeena munnamateeka ne Apolo, laba nga balina byonna bye beetaaga." 
Titus3:14 Era fubisa abantu baffe bayige okussangako omwoyo ku bikolwa ebirungi mu bigambo ebyetaagibwa, baleme okuba nga tebaabala bibala." 
Titus3:15 Abali nange bonna bakulamusizza. Olamuse abatwagala mu kukkiriza. Ekisa kibeerenga nammwe mwenna. 
Philemon1:1 Pawulo, omusibe wa Kristo Yesu ne Timoseewo ow'oluganda, eri Firemooni omwagalwa era mukozi munnaffe," 
Philemon1:2 ne Apofiya ow'oluganda ne Alukipo mulwanyi munnaffe, n'ekkanisa eri mu nnyumba yo." 
Philemon1:3 Ekisa n'emirembe ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo bibeerenga nammwe. 
Philemon1:4 Nneebaza Katonda wange bulijjo, bwe nkujjukira mu kusaba kwange," 
Philemon1:5 kubanga mpulira okwagala kwo n'okukkiriza kw'olina eri Mukama waffe Yesu n'eri abatukuvu bonna; 
Philemon1:6 era nsaba nti okutegeeza abalala okukkiriza kwo kuleetere okumanya ebirungi bye tulina mu Kristo. 
Philemon1:7 Kubanga nfunye essanyu lingi, n'okuwummuzibwa mu mutima, ebiva mu kwagala kwo, ow'oluganda, kubanga emyoyo gy'abatukuvu giziddwa buggya ku lulwo." 
Philemon1:8 Kale, newakubadde nga nnina obuvumu bwonna mu Kristo okukulagira okukola ekyo ekisaana," 
Philemon1:9 naye olw'okwagala nkwegayirira bwegayirizi, nze, Pawulo, omubaka era kaakano omusibe olwa Kristo Yesu;" 
Philemon1:10 nkwegayirira olw'omwana wange, Onnessimo, gwe nfukidde kitaawe mu busibe bwange," 
Philemon1:11 ataakugasanga edda, naye kaakano atugasa ffembi, ggwe nange," 
Philemon1:12 gwe nkomyawo gy'oli, ye gwe mutima gwange gwe nkuweerezza." 
Philemon1:13 Nnandibadde musanyufu okumusigaza, alyoke ampeerezenga mu kifo kyo mu kiseera eky'okusibibwa kwange olw'Enjiri," 
Philemon1:14 naye ssaagadde kukikola nga tonzikirizza, obulungi bwo buleme okubeera mu kuwalirizibwa, wabula mu kwagala." 
Philemon1:15 Kubanga mpozzi kyeyava ayawukana naawe ekiseera, olyoke obeerenga naye emirembe n'emirembe;" 
Philemon1:16 nga takyali muddu buddu, naye ng'asingako awo, ng'afuuse ow'oluganda omwagalwa, na ddala gye ndi, naye era okusingira ddala eri ggwe mu mubiri ne mu Mukama waffe." 
Philemon1:17 Kale oba ng'ondowooza nze okubeera munno, musembeze nga bwe wandinsembezeza." 
Philemon1:18 Naye oba nga alina kye yakusobya, oba ng'omubanja ekintu kyonna, kibalire nze." 
Philemon1:19 Nze Pawulo mpandiise n'omukono gwange, nze ndisasula, sijja kukugamba nti nkubanja, era naawe wekka." 
Philemon1:20 Kale, ow'oluganda, onsanyuse mu Mukama waffe, owummuze omwoyo gwange mu Kristo." 
Philemon1:21 Nkuwandiikidde nga nneesiga obuwulize bwo, nga mmanyi ng'ojja kukikola oba n'okusinga wo." 
Philemon1:22 Ate ekirala, ntegekera we ndisula, kubanga nsuubira olw'okusaba kwammwe muliweebwa okundaba." 
Philemon1:23 Epafula musibe munnange mu Kristo Yesu, akulamusizza;" 
Philemon1:24 ne Makko, Alisutaluuko, Dema, Lukka, bakozi bannange." 
Philemon1:25 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga n'omwoyo gwammwe. 
Hebrews1:1 Mu ngeri nnyingi ez'enjawulo edda, Katonda yayogereranga eri bajjajjaffe mu bannabbi," 
Hebrews1:2 naye mu nnaku zino ez'oluvannyuma ayogedde naffe mu Mwana, gwe yassaawo okuba omusika wa byonna, era mu ye mwe yatondera ebintu byonna." 
Hebrews1:3 Oyo alaga ekitiibwa kya Katonda era n'ekifaananyi kye ddala bw'ali, era abeezaawo buli kintu n'ekigambo eky'obuyinza bwe. Bwe yamala okukola eky'okunaaza ebibi, n'atuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'Obukulu waggulu;" 
Hebrews1:4 ng'asingira ddala obukulu bamalayika bwe yaweebwa erinnya erisingira ddala agaabwe. 
Hebrews1:5 Kubanga ani ku bamalayika gwe yali ayogeddeko nti, “Ggwe oli Mwana wange, Leero nkuzadde ggwe?” Era nate nti, “Nze nnaabeeranga Kitaawe gy'ali, Naye anaabeeranga mwana gye ndi?”" 
Hebrews1:6 Era nate bw'aleeta omubereberye mu nsi, ayogera nti, “Era bamalayika ba Katonda bonna bamusinzenga.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Era ayogera ku bamalayika nti, “Afuula bamalayika be empewo, N'abaweereza be ennimi z'omuliro.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Naye ku Mwana ayogera nti, “Entebe yo, ayi Katonda, ya lubeerera emirembe n'emirembe; N'omuggo ogw'obutuukirivu, gwe muggo ogw'obwakabaka bwo." 
Hebrews1:9 Wayagala obutuukirivu, n'okyawa obujeemu; Katonda, Katonda wo, kyavudde akufukako Amafuta ag'okusanyuka okusinga banno.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Era ayongera n'agamba nti, “Ggwe, Mukama, ku lubereberye wassaawo emisingi gy'ensi, N'eggulu mulimu gwa mikono gyo;" 
Hebrews1:11 Ebyo biriggwaawo; naye ggwe oli wa lubeerera; N'ebyo byonna birikaddiwa ng'ekyambalo; 
Hebrews1:12 Era olibizinga ng'essuuka, Ng'ekyambalo, ne biwaanyisibwa. Naye ggwe oba bumu, N'emyaka gyo tegirikoma.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Ani ku bamalayika gwe yali ayogeddeko nti, “Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, Okutuusa lwe ndifuula abalabe bo entebe y'ebigere byo?”" 
Hebrews1:14 Bamalayika bonna si gy'emyoyo egitumibwa okuweereza abo abagenda okusikira obulokozi? 
Hebrews2:1 Kyekivudde kitugwanira okussaayo ennyo omwoyo ku bintu bye twawulira, si ku lwa nga tuwaba ne tubivaako." 
Hebrews2:2 Kuba oba ng'ekigambo ekyayogerwa bamalayika kyanywera, na buli kyonoono n'obutawulira byaweebwanga empeera ebisaanira," 
Hebrews2:3 ffe tuliwona tutya bwe tulagajjalira obulokozi obukulu obwenkana awo? Obwo obwasooka okwogerwa Mukama waffe, ne bulyoka bututegeerezebwa ddala abaabuwulira;" 
Hebrews2:4 era Katonda n'akakasiza ddala bye baayogeranga mu bubonero ne mu by'ekitalo ne mu by'amagero ebitali bimu era ne mu birabo eby'Omwoyo Omutukuvu, bye yagaba nga bwe yayagala." 
Hebrews2:5 Kubanga bamalayika si be bagenda okufuga ensi egenda okubaawo, gye twogerako." 
Hebrews2:6 Waliwo ekifo mu byawandiikibwa omu we yategeereza, ng'ayogera nti, “Omuntu kye ki, ggwe okumujjukira? Oba omwana w'omuntu, ye ani ggwe okumujjira?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wamussa akaseera katono obuteenkana nga bamalayika; Wamussaako engule ey'ekitiibwa n'ettendo, N'omufuza emirimu egy'emikono gyo:" 
Hebrews2:8 Wateeka ebintu byonna wansi w'ebigere bye.” Bwe yateeka ebintu byonna wansi we, tewali kintu kyonna kyatamuwa kufuga. Naye kaakano tetunnalaba bintu byonna nga biteekeddwa wansi we." 
Hebrews2:9 Naye tulaba Yesu, eyassibwa wansi wa bamalayika okumala akaseera akatono. Olw'ekisa kya Katonda yabonaabona n'afa, alyoke alege ku kufa ku lwa buli muntu, n'alyoka atikirwa engule ey'ekitiibwa n'ettendo." 
Hebrews2:10 N'olwekyo kyasaanira nti ye, ku bubwe era mu ye ebintu byonna mwe bibeererawo, olw'okuleeta abaana abangi mu kitiibwa, asooke okutuukiriza obulokozi bwabwe ng'ayita mu kubonaabona." 
Hebrews2:11 Kubanga oyo atukuza era n'abo abaatukuzibwa bava mu omu bonna, kyava takwatibwa nsonyi kubayita baganda be." 
Hebrews2:12 ng'ayogera nti, “Ndibuulira baganda bange erinnya lyo, Ndikutenderereza wakati mu kkuŋŋaaniro.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Era awalala agamba nti, “Nze nnaamwesiganga oyo.” Era ne yeyongera n'agamba nti, “Laba nze n'abaana Katonda be yampa.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Olw'okubanga abaana balina omubiri n'omusaayi, naye yalina omubiri n'omusaayi, nga ayita mu kufa alyoke azikirize oyo eyalina amaanyi ag'okufa, ye Setaani;" 
Hebrews2:15 era alyoke abawe eddembe abo bonna abali mu buddu obulamu bwabwe bwonna olw'entiisa y'okufa. 
Hebrews2:16 Kubanga mazima bamalayika si b'ayamba, naye ayamba zzadde lya Ibulayimu." 
Hebrews2:17 Kyekyava kimugwanira mu byonna okufaananyizibwa baganda be, alyoke abeerenga kabona asinga obukulu ow'ekisa omwesigwa mu bigambo ebiri eri Katonda olw'okutangirira ebibi by'abantu." 
Hebrews2:18 Kubanga ye yennyini yabonaabona ng'akemebwa, kyava ayinza okubayamba abo abakemebwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Kale, ab'oluganda abatukuvu, abalina omugabo mu kuyitibwa okw'omu ggulu, mulowooze ku Yesu, Omutume era Kabona Asinga Obukulu ow'okukkiriza kwaffe." 
Hebrews3:2 eyali omwesigwa eri oyo eyamulonda, era nga Musa bwe yali omwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda." 
Hebrews3:3 Naye Yesu asaana ekitiibwa ekingi okusinga Musa, ng'omuzimbi w'ennyumba bw'abeera n'ekitiibwa okusinga ennyumba." 
Hebrews3:4 Kubanga buli nnyumba wabaawo agizimba; naye eyazimba byonna ye Katonda. 
Hebrews3:5 Ne Musa yali mwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda, ng'omuweereza, okutegeeza ebintu ebyali bigenda okwogerwa," 
Hebrews3:6 naye Kristo yali mwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda ng'omwana. naffe tuli nnyumba ye bwe tunywera ne tuba bavumu ne twenyumiririza mu ssuubi lye tunywezezza. 
Hebrews3:7 Kale, nga Omwoyo Omutukuvu bw'ayogera nti, “Leero bwe munaawulira eddoboozi lye," 
Hebrews3:8 Temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe, nga mu kiseera kye baajeemeramu, Nga ku lunaku lw'ebakemerwako mu ddungu," 
Hebrews3:9 Bajjajjammwe kwe bankema, nga bangeza, Ne balaba ebikolwa byange emyaka ana (40)." 
Hebrews3:10 Kyennava nnyiigira emirembe egyo, Ne njogera nti, ‘Bakyama bulijjo mu mutima gwabwe, tebaategeera makubo gange.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Nga bwe nnalayira mu busungu bwange, ‘Tebaliyingira mu kiwummulo kyange. ’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Mwekuume, ab'oluganda, omutima omubi ogw'obutakkiriza gulemenga okuba mu muntu yenna ku mmwe, ne gubaggya ku Katonda omulamu." 
Hebrews3:13 Naye mubuuliraganenga bulijjo bulijjo, nga bwe mukyalina ekiseera ekiyitibwa, “leero,” waleme okubaawo omuntu yenna ku mmwe okukakanyazibwa obulimba bw'ekibi." 
Hebrews3:14 Tunaaba tussa kimu mu Kristo, bwe tunanywereza ddala okusuubira kwaffe okutuusa ku nkomerero kwe twatandika nakwo," 
Hebrews3:15 nga bwe kikyayogerwa nti, “Leero bwe munaawulira eddoboozi lye, Temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe, nga mu kiseera kye bajeemeeramu.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Baani abo abaawulira, naye ne bajeema? Si beebo bonna abaava mu Misiri nga bakulemberwa Musa?" 
Hebrews3:17 Era baani be yanyiigira okumala emyaka ana (40)? Si beebo abaayonoona, n'emirambo gyabwe ne gigwa mu ddungu?" 
Hebrews3:18 Era baani be yalayirira obutayingira mu kiwummulo kye? Si beebo abataagonda? 
Hebrews3:19 Era tulaba nga tebaayinza kuyingira olw'obutakkiriza. 
Hebrews4:1 N'olwekyo ng'ekisuubizo eky'okuyingira mu kiwummulo kye nga bwe kikyaliwo, twekuume, omuntu yenna ku mmwe aleme kulabika nga takituuseemu." 
Hebrews4:2 Kubanga naffe twabuulirwa Enjiri, era nga bo, naye ekigambo kye baabuulirwa tekyabagasa bo, kubanga bwe baakiwulira tebakikkiriza." 
Hebrews4:3 Kubanga ffe abamaze okukkiriza tuyingira mu kiwummulo ekyo; nga bwe yayogera nti, “Nga bwe nnalayirira mu busungu bwange, Nti Tebaliyingira mu kiwummulo kyange,” newakubadde ng'emirimu gye gyaggwa okuva mu kutondebwa kw'ensi." 
Hebrews4:4 Kubanga waliwo w'ayogerera ku lunaku olw'omusanvu bw'ati, nti, “Katonda n'awummulira ku lunaku olw'omusanvu mu mirimu gye gyonna;”" 
Hebrews4:5 era nate ne mu kino nti, “Tebaliyingira mu kiwummulo kyange.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Kale kubanga kisigaddeyo abalala okukiyingiramu, n'abo abaasooka okubuulirwa Enjiri tebaayingira olw'obujeemu." 
Hebrews4:7 Kyeyava nate ateekaawo olunaku oluyitibwa,“ leero,” nga bwe yayogerera mu Dawudi oluvannyuma lw'ebiro ebingi, mu bigambo bye tumaze okwogera waggulu, “Leero, bwe munaawulira eddoboozi lye, Temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Kuba singa Yoswa yabawa ekiwummulo, Katonda teyandyogedde ate ku lunaku lulala." 
Hebrews4:9 Kale wakyaliyo ekiwummulo kya ssabbiiti eri abantu ba Katonda. 
Hebrews4:10 Kubanga buli ayingira mu kiwummulo kya Katonda, era aba awummula emirimu gye, nga Katonda bwe yawummula egigye." 
Hebrews4:11 Kale tufubenga okuyingira mu kiwummulo ekyo, waleme kubaawo omuntu yenna alemwa okuyingira olw'engeri ng'eyo ey'obujeemu." 
Hebrews4:12 Kubanga ekigambo kya Katonda kiramu, era kikozi, era kisala okusinga buli kitala kyonna eky'obwogi obubiri, era kiyitamu n'okwawula ne kyawula obulamu n'omwoyo, ennyingo n'obusomyo, era kyangu okwawula okulowooza n'okufumiitiriza okw'omu mutima." 
Hebrews4:13 So tewali kitonde ekitalabika mu maaso ge, naye ebintu byonna byeruliddwa era bibikkuliddwa mu maaso g'oyo gwe tuleetera ebigambo byaffe." 
Hebrews4:14 Kale bwe tulina kabona asinga obukulu omunene, eyayita mu ggulu, Yesu Omwana wa Katonda, tunywezenga okukkiriza kwaffe." 
Hebrews4:15 Kubanga tulina Kabona Asinga obukulu alumirwa wamu naffe mu bunafu bwaffe, eyakemebwa mu byonna nga ffe, so nga ye talina kibi." 
Hebrews4:16 Kale tusemberenga n'obuvumu eri entebe ey'ekisa, tulyoke tuweebwe okusaasirwa, era tufune ekisa ekinatuyambanga mu kiseera nga twetaaga." 
Hebrews5:1 Kubanga buli kabona asinga obukulu, alondebwa okuva mu bantu, ateekebwawo okuweereza ku lwa bantu eri Katonda, okuwangayo ebirabo era ne ssaddaaka olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Hebrews5:2 Ayinza okukwata empola abatamanyi n'abakyamye, kubanga era naye yennyini yeetooloddwa obunafu." 
Hebrews5:3 Era olw'obunafu obwo kimugwanira okuwangayo ssaddaaka ku lulwe yennyini ne ku lw'abantu. 
Hebrews5:4 Tewali muntu yenna ayinza okwetwalira ekitiibwa ekyo, wabula ng'ayitiddwa Katonda, era nga Alooni bwe yayitibwa." 
Hebrews5:5 Ne Kristo bwatyo, teyeegulumiza yekka okufuuka kabona asinga obukulu, wabula yalondebwa oyo eyamugamba nti, “Ggwe oli Mwana wange, Leero nkuzadde ggwe;”" 
Hebrews5:6 era nga bw'ayogera awalala nti, “Ggwe oli kabona emirembe gyonna, mu lubu lwa Merukizeddeeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Yesu mu kiseera kye yabeerera mu mubiri, yasaba ne yeegayiriranga ng'akaaba mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka na maziga, oyo eyayinza okumulokola mu kufa, era yawulirwa olw'okutya kwe Katonda." 
Hebrews5:8 Newakubadde nga yali Mwana wa Katonda, yayiga okugonda olw'ebyo bye yabonaabona;" 
Hebrews5:9 awo bwe yamala okutuukirizibwa, n'afuuka ensibuko y'obulokozi obutaggwaawo eri abo bonna abamugondera," 
Hebrews5:10 era bwe yalondebwa Katonda okuba kabona asinga obukulu mu lubu lwa Merukizeddeeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Waliwo bingi bye twandyagadde okumwogerako, naye ate nga kizibu okubinyonnyola, kubanga temuyiga mangu." 
Hebrews5:12 Newakubadde nga kaakano mwandibadde musobola okuyigiriza abalala, kikyetaagisa okuddamu okubayigiriza ebisookerwako eby'ekigambo kya Katonda. Mwetaaga mata so si mmere nkalubo." 
Hebrews5:13 Kubanga buli anywa amata nga tannamanya kigambo kya butuukirivu, aba akyali mwana muto." 
Hebrews5:14 Naye emmere enkalubo ya bakulu, abamaze okwetendeka ne bayiga okwawula ekirungi ku kibi." 
Hebrews6:1 N'olwekyo katuleke ebyo ebisookerwako okuyigiriza Kristo, tweyongere mu kukula mu kukkiriza, kuba twabatekerawo dda omusingi ogw'okwenenya ebikolwa ebifu n'okukkiriza Katonda." 
Hebrews6:2 Twabayigiriza dda eby'okubatizibwa, eby'okussibwako emikono, eby'okuzuukira kw'abafu, n'eby'omusango ogutaggwaawo." 
Hebrews6:3 Era tunaakola bwe tutyo Katonda nga bw'anayagala. 
Hebrews6:4 Kubanga kizibu okuzza mu kwenenya abo abaamala okwakirwa, ne balega ku kirabo eky'omu ggulu, ne bafuuka abassa ekimu mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu," 
Hebrews6:5 ne balega ku kigambo ekirungi ekya Katonda ne ku maanyi ag'emirembe egigenda okujja," 
Hebrews6:6 ne bagwa okubivaamu, tekiyinzika bo okubazza obuggya olw'okwenenya. Kuba baba bakomerera Omwana wa Katonda omulundi ogwokubiri, ne bamuswaza mu lwatu." 
Hebrews6:7 Kubanga ensi enywa enkuba egitonnyako emirundi emingi, n'ebala ebibala ebibasaanira abo ababirima, efuna mukisa okuva eri Katonda," 
Hebrews6:8 naye bw'ebala amaggwa n'amatovu, tesiimibwa era eba kumpi n'okukolimirwa, ku nkomerero ebimezeeko byokebwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Naye, abaagalwa, newakubadde twogedde bwe tutyo, mmwe tetubabuusabuusa, tumanyi nga mulina ebintu ebirungi ebiraga nga muli mu bulokozi." 
Hebrews6:10 Kubanga Katonda mutuukirivu tayinza kwerabira mulimu gwammwe n'okwagala kwe mwalaga eri erinnya lye, bwe mwaweereza abatukuvu, era mukyaweereza." 
Hebrews6:11 Era twagala nnyo buli muntu ku mmwe okulaganga obunyiikivu obwo olw'okwetegerereza ddala essuubi eryo okutuusa ku nkomerero; 
Hebrews6:12 mulemenga okubeera abagayaavu, naye mube ng'abo abakkiriza era abagumikiriza ne bafuna ebyasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews6:13 Kubanga, Katonda bwe yasuubiza Ibulayimu, bwe watali gw'ayinza kulayira amusinga obukulu, ne yeerayira yekka" 
Hebrews6:14 ng'ayogera nti, “Mazima ndikuwa omukisa, nnaakwazanga.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Bw'atyo Ibulayimu bwe yamala okugumiikiriza n'aweebwa ekyasuubizibwa. 
Hebrews6:16 Kubanga abantu balayira asinga obukulu, era mu mpaka zaabwe zonna ekirayiro bwe bukakafu obusalawo." 
Hebrews6:17 Ne Katonda bw'atyo, kyeyava ateekawo ekirayiro ng'ayagala okukakasiza ddala abasika b'ekisuubizo nti talijjulula ekyo kye yasuubiza." 
Hebrews6:18 Katonda yakikola bw'atyo, okutulaga ebintu bibiri ebitajjulukuka, Katonda by'atayinza kulimbiramu, tulyoke tubeerenga n'ekitugumya ekinywevu ffe abaddukira gy'ali okutulokola, tusaana okuba abagumu kubanga talirema kutuwa ebyo bye yasuubiza." 
Hebrews6:19 Ebyo bye binyweza ddala emmeeme zaffe ng'essika ery'obulamu, essuubi eritabuusibwabuusibwa era erinywevu, era eriyingira munda w'eggigi;" 
Hebrews6:20 Yesu mwe yayingira omukulembeze ku lwaffe, bwe yafuuka kabona asinga obukulu emirembe gyonna ng'olubu lwa Merukizeddeeki bwe luli." 
Hebrews7:1 Kubanga oyo Merukizeddeeki, kabaka w'e Ssaalemi, kabona wa Katonda Ali waggulu ennyo, yasisinkana Ibulayimu bwe yali ng'akomawo ng'ava okutta bakabaka, n'amusabira omukisa," 
Hebrews7:2 era Ibulayimu n'awa Merukizeddeeki ekitundu eky'ekkumi ekya byonna bye yanyaga. Okusooka erinnya eryo litegeeza, kabaka ow'obutukirivu, era eky'okubiri, ye kabaka w'e Ssaalemi, ekitegeeza nti ye kabaka ow'emirembe;" 
Hebrews7:3 atalina kitaawe, atalina nnyina, atalina bajjajjaabe, atalina lunaku lwe yasookerako newakubadde enkomerero y'obulamu, naye eyafaananyizibwa Omwana wa Katonda, abeera kabona ow'olubeerera ennaku zonna." 
Hebrews7:4 Kale mulowooze omuntu oyo bwe yali omukulu, Ibulayimu jjajja omukulu gwe yawa ekitundu eky'ekkumi ku munyago gwe yali afunye." 
Hebrews7:5 N'abo ab'omu baana ba Leevi abaaweebwa obwakabona amateeka gabalagira okusoloozanga ebitundu eby'ekkumi mu bantu, be baganda baabwe, newakubaddenga bo n'abo baava mu Ibulayimu." 
Hebrews7:6 Naye oyo, atali wa mu kika kyabwe, yafuna ekimu eky'ekkumi okuva ku Ibulayimu n'amusabira omukisa ogw'oyo eyalina ebyasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews7:7 Naye, tekyegaanika n'akatono, omukulu yasabira omuto omukisa." 
Hebrews7:8 Mu ngeri emu, abaweebwa ebitundu eby'ekkumi be bantu abafa, naye mu ngeri endala kiweebwa eri oyo ategeezebwa nga mulamu." 
Hebrews7:9 Tuyinza era okugamba nti ne Leevi, aweebwa ekimu eky'ekkumi, yawaayo ekikye nga ayita mu Ibulayimu;" 
Hebrews7:10 kubanga yali akyali mu ntumbwe za jjajjaawe, Merukizeddeeki bwe yamusisinkana." 
Hebrews7:11 Kale okutuukirira singa kwaliwo lwa bwakabona obw'Abaleevi, kubanga abantu baaweebwa amateeka mu biro byabwo, kiki ekyetaaza nate kabona ow'okubiri okuyimuka mu ngeri ya Merukizeddeeki, n'atabalirwa mu ngeri ya Alooni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Kubanga obwakabona bwe bukyusibwa era n'amateeka tegalema kukyusibwa. 
Hebrews7:13 Kubanga oyo eyayogerwako ebigambo ebyo wa kika kirala omutavanga muntu yenna eyali aweerezza ku kyoto. 
Hebrews7:14 Kubanga kitegeerekese nga Mukama waffe yava mu Yuda; ekika Musa ky'atayogerako bigambo bya bakabona. 
Hebrews7:15 Era kitegeerekeka nga wazeewo kabona omulala ali mu kifaananyi kya Merukizeddeeki," 
Hebrews7:16 afuuse kabona si mu mateeka nga bwe galagira abe nga ava mu lubu lwa buzaale, naye avudde mu maanyi ag'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Hebrews7:17 Kubanga Kristo ayogerwako nti, “Oli kabona okutuusa emirembe gyonna Ng'engeri ya Merukizeddeeki bw'eri.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Kubanga ekiragiro ekyasooka kijjulukuka olw'obunafu n'obutagasa bwakyo," 
Hebrews7:19 kubanga amateeka tagaliiko kye gaatuukiriza, essuubi erisinga obulungi ne liyingizibwa, eritusembezesa eri Katonda." 
Hebrews7:20 Era kino tekyakolebwa watali kulayira kirayiro. 
Hebrews7:21 Kubanga abo baafuulibwanga bakabona awatali kirayiro; naye ye yafuulibwa kabona mu kirayiro ng'ayita mu oyo amwogerako nti, “Mukama yalayira, era talyejjusa, Oli kabona okutuusa emirembe gyonna.”" 
Hebrews7:22 Era ne Yesu bw'atyo bw'afuuka omuyima w'endagaano esinga obulungi. 
Hebrews7:23 Bakabona baali bangi kubanga baafanga nga tebayinza kubeerawo bbanga lyonna. 
Hebrews7:24 Naye kubanga ye Yesu abeerera emirembe gyonna, kyava alina obwakabona obutavaawo." 
Hebrews7:25 Era kyava ayinza okulokolera ddala abajja eri Katonda ku bubwe, kubanga abeera mulamu ennaku zonna okubawolerezanga." 
Hebrews7:26 N'olwekyo kabona asinga obukulu afaanana bw'atyo ye yatusaanira, omutukuvu, ataliiko kabi, ataliiko bbala, eyayawulibwa okuva ku abo abalina ebibi, era eyagulumizibwa okusinga eggulu;" 
Hebrews7:27 atawalirizibwa, nga bakabona abasinga obukulu bali, okuwangayo ssaddaaka buli lunaku, okusooka olw'ebibi bye yennyini, oluvannyuma olw'ebyo eby'abantu: kubanga okwo yakukolera ddala omulundi gumu, bwe yeewaayo yennyini." 
Hebrews7:28 Kubanga amateeka gaalondanga abantu okuba bakabona abasinga obukulu, n'obunafu bwabwe, naye ekigambo eky'ekirayiro, ekyaddirira amateeka, kyalonda Omwana, eyatuukirizibwa okutuusa emirembe gyonna." 
Hebrews8:1 Kale mu bigambo byetwogera kino kye kinyusi: tulina kabona asinga obukulu, afaanana bw'atyo, eyatuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'entebe ey'Obukulu obw'omu ggulu,"
