Hebrews8:2 omuweereza w'ebitukuvu, era ow'eweema ey'amazima, etaazimbibwa bantu, wabula Mukama." 
Hebrews8:3 Kubanga buli kabona asinga obukulu alondebwa olw'omulimu ogw'okuwangayo ebirabo era ne ssaddaaka, kye kiva kimugwanira ne kabona ono okubaako n'ekintu ky'awaayo." 
Hebrews8:4 Kale singa yali ku nsi, teyandibadde kabona n'akatono, nga waliwo bakabona abawaayo ebirabo ng'amateeka bwe gali;" 
Hebrews8:5 baweerereza mu kifaananyi na kisiikirize ky'ebyo eby'omu ggulu, nga Musa bwe yabuulirwa Katonda, bwe yali ng'agenda okukola eweema: kubanga Katonda yamugamba nti, “Laba ng'okola byonna nga bwe byakulagiddwa ku lusozi.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Naye kaakano bwe kiri, Yesu yaweebwa okuweereza okusinga obukulu, era n'endagaano gyalimu ng'omutabaganya y'esinga obulungi, kubanga era n'ebisuubizo byayo bye bisinga obulungi." 
Hebrews8:7 Kuba endagaano eri eyolubereberye singa teyaliiko kya kunenyezebwa, tewandibaddewo nsonga eyagaza ya kubiri." 
Hebrews8:8 Kubanga bw'abanenya ayogera nti, “Laba, ennaku zijja,” bw'ayogera Mukama, “Bwe ndiragaana endagaano empya n'ennyumba ya Isiraeri era n'ennyumba ya Yuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Si ng'endagaano gye nnalagaana ne bajjajjaabwe Ku lunaku lwe nnabakwata ku mukono okubaggya mu nsi y'Emisiri; Kubanga abo tebaanywerera mu ndagaano yange, Nange ne ssibassaako mwoyo, bw'ayogera Mukama." 
Hebrews8:10 Kubanga eno ye ndagaano gye ndiragaana n'ennyumba ya Isiraeri Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ezo. bw'ayogera Mukama; Nditeeka amateeka gange mu birowoozo byabwe, Era ndigawandiika ku mutima gwabwe, Nange nnaabeeranga Katonda waabwe, Nabo banaabeeranga bantu bange." 
Hebrews8:11 Era tewaliba muntu aliyigiriza munne, oba muganda we, ng'agamba nti, ‘Manya Mukama,’ Kubanga bonna balimmanya, Okuva ku muto okutuuka ku asinga obukulu." 
Hebrews8:12 Kubanga ndibasaasira mu butali butuukirivu bwabwe, N'ebibi byabwe siribijjukira nate.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Bw'ayogera ku ndagaano empya, kiba kitegeeza nti eyolubereberye aba agiddibizza. Naye ekikulu era ekikaddiwa kiba kiri kumpi okuggwaawo." 
Hebrews9:1 Era n'endagaano eyolubereberye yalina empisa ezaalagirwa ez'okusinzanga Katonda, n'ekifo ekitukuvu, eky'omu nsi." 
Hebrews9:2 Weema yakolebwa nga erimu ebitundu bibiri, ekitundu ekimu nga mwe muli ekikondo ekya zaabu eky'ettaala, n'emmeeza n'emigaati egy'okulaga. Kino nga kiyitibwa Awatukuvu." 
Hebrews9:3 Era waliwo olutimbe olwokubiri ng'emabega waalwo we wali ekifo ekiyitibwa Awatukuvu w'Awatukuvu. 
Hebrews9:4 Mu kifo ekyo mwalimu ekyoterezo ekya zaabu, n'essanduuko ey'endagaano eyabikkibwako zaabu enjuyi zonna, eyalimu ekibya ekya zaabu omwali emmaanu, n'omuggo gwa Alooni ogwaloka, n'ebipande eby'endagaano;" 
Hebrews9:5 ne kungulu ku yo bakerubi ab'ekitiibwa nga basiikiriza entebe ey'okusaasira; bye tutayinza kwogerako kaakano kinnakimu. 
Hebrews9:6 Naye ebyo bwe byakolebwa bwe bityo, bakabona bayingiranga buli lunaku mu kitundu kya weema ekisooka okutuukirizanga emirimu egy'okuweereza;" 
Hebrews9:7 naye mu kiri eky'okubiri, kabona asinga obukulu yekka, yayingirangamu omulundi gumu buli mwaka, era yagendangayo n'omusaayi gwe yawangayo ku lulwe n'olw'ebibi by'abantu bye baakolanga mu butamanya." 
Hebrews9:8 Omwoyo Omutukuvu atutegeeza nti, ng'ekkubo erituuka mu kifo ekitukuvu lyali terinnalabisibwa, ng'eweema eyolubereberye ekyayimiriddewo;" 
Hebrews9:9 amakulu g'ebyo mu kiseera kino ge gano nti, ebirabo era ne ssaddaaka ebyaweebwangayo nga tebiyinza kutukuza mutima gw'oyo asinza." 
Hebrews9:10 Ebyo byakomanga ku ngulu, nga bifa ku kulya na kunywa na bulombolombo obw'okunaaba, okutuusa ku biro eby'okudda obuggya." 
Hebrews9:11 Naye Kristo bwe yajja kabona asinga obukulu ow'ebigambo ebirungi ebigenda okujja, n'ayita mu weema esinga obukulu n'okutuukirira, etaakolebwa na mikono, amakulu, etali ya mu nsi muno," 
Hebrews9:12 so si lwa musaayi gwa mbuzi n'ennyana, naye lwa musaayi gwe ye, n'ayingirira ddala omulundi gumu mu watukuvu, bwe yamala okufuna okununula okutaggwaawo." 
Hebrews9:13 Kuba oba ng'omusaayi gw'embuzi n'ente ennume n'evvu ly'ente enduusi, ebimansirwa ku abo abalina ebibi, bitukuza okunaaza omubiri;" 
Hebrews9:14 omusaayi gwa Kristo, eyeewaayo yekka olw'Omwoyo ataggwaawo eri Katonda nga taliiko bulema, tegulisinga nnyo okunaaza omwoyo gwammwe okuva mu bikolwa ebifu okuweereza Katonda omulamu?" 
Hebrews9:15 N'olwekyo Kristo ye kyava abeera omubaka w'endagaano empya, okufa bwe kwabeerawo olw'okununula mu byonoono eby'omu ndagaano eyolubereberye, abaayitibwa balyoke baweebwe okusuubiza kw'obusika obutaggwaawo." 
Hebrews9:16 Kubanga awaba endagaano ey'obusika, kigwana okubaawo okufa kw'oyo eyagikola." 
Hebrews9:17 Kubanga endagaano ey'obusika ekola nga eyagikola amaze okufa, kubanga teba na makulu nga eyagikola akyali mulamu." 
Hebrews9:18 Era n'endagaano eyolubereberye teyakakasibwa awatali musaayi. 
Hebrews9:19 Kubanga buli kiragiro bwe kyamalanga okwogerwa Musa eri abantu bonna ng'amateeka bwe gali, n'atwalanga omusaayi gw'ennyana n'embuzi, wamu n'amazzi n'ebyoya by'endiga ebimyufu n'ezobu, n'amansiranga ku kitabo kyennyini, era ne ku bantu bonna," 
Hebrews9:20 ng'ayogera nti,“ Guno gwe musaayi gw'endagaano Katonda gye yabalagira.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Era nate eweema n'ebintu byonna eby'okuweereza n'abimansirangako omusaayi bw'atyo. 
Hebrews9:22 Era mu mateeka buli kintu kitukuzibwa na musaayi, era awatali kuyiwa musaayi tewabaawo kusonyiyibwa." 
Hebrews9:23 Kale ebifaananyi by'ebyo eby'omu ggulu kye biva byetaaga okutukuzibwa ne ssaddaaka, naye ebintu eby'omu ggulu byennyini biteekwa kutukuzibwa na ssaddaaka ezisinga ezo." 
Hebrews9:24 Kubanga Kristo teyayingira mu kifo ekitukuvu ekyakolebwa n'emikono, ekyafaanana ng'ekyo eky'amazima; naye yayingira mu ggulu mwennyini, gy'ali kaakano mu maaso ga Katonda ku lwaffe." 
Hebrews9:25 So si kwewangayo mirundi mingi; nga kabona asinga obukulu bw'ayingira mu kifo ekitukuvu buli mwaka n'omusaayi ogutali gugwe; 
Hebrews9:26 kubanga kyandimugwanidde okubonaabonanga emirundi mingi okuva ku kutondebwa kw'ensi, naye kaakano yajja omulundi gumu ku nkomerero y'emirembe alyoke aggyewo ekibi olw'okwewaayo ye yennyini." 
Hebrews9:27 Era ng'abantu bwe baterekerwa okufa omulundi ogumu, oluvannyuma lw'okwo musango;" 
Hebrews9:28 era ne Kristo bw'atyo, bwe yamala okuweebwayo omulundi ogumu okwetikka ebibi by'abangi, alirabika omulundi ogwokubiri awatali kibi eri abo abamulindirira olw'obulokozi." 
Hebrews10:1 Kubanga amateeka bwe gali ekisiikirize eky'ebirungi ebyali bigenda okujja, so si kifaananyi kyennyini eky'ebigambo, ne ssaddaaka ezitajjulukuka, ze bawaayo obutayosa buli mwaka buli mwaka, nga teziyinza kutukuza abo abazisemberera." 
Hebrews10:2 Kubanga tezandirekeddwayo kuweebwayo? Kubanga abasinza bwe bamala okunaazibwa ddala omulundi ogumu, tebandibadde na kwetegeerako bibi nate." 
Hebrews10:3 Naye mu ezo mulimu okujjukizanga ebibi buli mwaka buli mwaka. 
Hebrews10:4 Kubanga tekiyinzika omusaayi gw'ente ennume n'embuzi okuggyawo ebibi. 
Hebrews10:5 Kristo ng'ajja mu nsi, kye yava ayogera nti, “Ssaddaaka n'ebiweebwayo tewabyagala, Naye wanteekerateekera omubiri;" 
Hebrews10:6 Tewasiima ebyokebwa ebiramba n'ebiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Hebrews10:7 Ne ndyoka njogera nti,‘ Laba, nzize okukola by'oyagala, ayi Katonda,’ Nga bwe kyampandiikibwako mu muzingo gw'ekitabo.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Bw'ayogera waggulu nti, “Ssaddaaka n'ebiweebwayo n'ebyokebwa ebiramba n'ebiweebwayo olw'ebibi tewabyagala so tewabisiima, so nga biweebwayo ng'amateeka bwe gali,”" 
Hebrews10:9 n'alyoka ayogera nti, “Laba, nzize okukola by'oyagala.” Aggyawo eky'olubereberye, alyoke anyweze eky'okubiri." 
Hebrews10:10 Mu ebyo by'ayagala twatukuzibwa olw'okuwaayo omubiri gwa Yesu Kristo omulundi ogumu. 
Hebrews10:11 Na buli kabona ayimirira buli lunaku ng'aweereza ng'awaayo emirundi emingi ssaddaaka ezitajjulukuka, ezitayinza kuggyako bibi emirembe gyonna," 
Hebrews10:12 naye oyo bwe yamala okuwaayo ssaddaaka emu olw'ebibi okutuusa emirembe gyonna, n'alyoka atuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda;" 
Hebrews10:13 ng'alindirira oluvannyuma abalabe be okufuusibwa entebe ey'ebigere bye. 
Hebrews10:14 Kubanga olw'okuwaayo ssaddaaka emu yatuukiriza okutuusa emirembe gyonna abo abaatukuzibwa. 
Hebrews10:15 Era n'Omwoyo Omutukuvu ye mujulirwa gyetuli: kubanga bw'amala okwogera nti," 
Hebrews10:16 “Eno ye ndagaano gye ndiragaana nabo Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ziri, bw'ayogera Mukama; Nditeeka amateeka gange ku mutima gwabwe, Era ne ku magezi gaabwe ndigawandiika;” n'alyoka ayogera nti," 
Hebrews10:17 “N'ebibi byabwe n'obujeemu bwabwe siribijjukira nate.” 
Hebrews10:18 Naye awali okuggyibwako ebyo, tewakyali kuwangayo ssaddaaka olw'ekibi." 
Hebrews10:19 Kale ab'oluganda, nga bwe tulina obugumu okuyingira mu kifo ekitukuvu olw'omusaayi gwa Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 mu kkubo lye yatukubira, eriggya eddamu, eriyita mu ggigi, gwe mubiri gwe;" 
Hebrews10:21 era nga bwe tulina kabona omunene afuga ennyumba ya Katonda; 
Hebrews10:22 tusemberenga n'omwoyo ogw'amazima olw'okukkiriza okutuukiridde, emitima gyaffe nga gimansirwako okuggyamu omwoyo omubi, n'emibiri gyaffe nga ginaazibwa n'amazzi amalungi." 
Hebrews10:23 Tunyweze okwatulanga essuubi lyaffe obutasagaasagana; kubanga eyasuubiza mwesigwa," 
Hebrews10:24 era tulowoozaganenga fekka na fekka okukubirizanga okwagala n'ebikolwa ebirungi; 
Hebrews10:25 obutalekanga kukuŋŋaana wamu, ng'abalala bwe bayisa, naye nga tubuulirira, era nga tweyongeranga okukola ebyo bwe tutyo, nga bwe mulaba Olunaku luli nga lunaatera okutuuka." 
Hebrews10:26 Kuba bwe tugenderera okwonoona nga tumaze okuweebwa okutegeera amazima, waba tewakyaliwo ssaddaaka eweebwayo olw'ebibi," 
Hebrews10:27 wabula okulindirira n'okutya okusalirwa omusango, n'omuliro ogw'amaanyi ogugenda okwokya abalabe." 
Hebrews10:28 Anyooma amateeka ga Musa afa awatali kusaasirwa olw'abajulirwa ababiri oba basatu," 
Hebrews10:29 mulowooza mutya, okubonerezebwa oyo kw'alisaanyizibwa kulyenkana wa okusinga okuba okubi eyalinnyiririra ddala Omwana wa Katonda, n'alowooza omusaayi gw'endagaano ogwamutukuza obutaba mutukuvu, n'agirira ekyejo Omwoyo ow'ekisa?" 
Hebrews10:30 Kubanga tumumanyi oyo eyayogera nti, “Nze ndiwoolera eggwanga, Nze ndisasula.” Era nate nti, “Mukama yalisalira omusango abantu be.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Kigambo kya ntiisa okugwa mu mikono gya Katonda omulamu. 
Hebrews10:32 Naye mujjukire ennaku ez'edda, bwe mwamala okwakirwa, ze mwagumiikiririzaamu okubonyaabonyezebwa okw'amaanyi." 
Hebrews10:33 Oluusi mwafuuka ekyerolerwa n'emuvumibwa, n'emuyigganyizibwa, olulala ne mussa kimu n'abo abaabonaabona nga mmwe." 
Hebrews10:34 Kubanga mwasaasira abasibe, era mwagumiikiriza n'essanyu okunyagibwako ebintu byammwe, nga mutegeera nga mulina mwekka ebintu ebisinga obulungi era eby'olubeerera." 
Hebrews10:35 Kale temusuulanga bugumu bwammwe, obuliko empeera ennene." 
Hebrews10:36 Kubanga mwetaaga okugumiikiriza, bwe mulimala okukola Katonda by'ayagala mulyoke muweebwe ekyasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews10:37 “Kubanga wakyasigaddeyo akaseera katono nnyo, Ajja alituuka, so talirwa." 
Hebrews10:38 Naye omutuukirivu wange aliba mulamu lwa kukkiriza, Era bw'addayo emabega, emmeeme yange temusanyukira.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Naye ffe tetuli mu abo abadda emabega mu kuzikirira, naye tuli mu abo abakkiriza okulokola obulamu bwabwe." 
Hebrews11:1 Okukkiriza kwe kukakasa nti ebisuubirwa birituukirira, era n'obutabuusabuusa newakubadde nga tebinalabika." 
Hebrews11:2 Kubanga okukkiriza okwo kwavirako abantu ab'edda okusiimibwa Katonda. 
Hebrews11:3 Olw'okukkiriza tutegeera ng'ebintu byonna byakolebwa kigambo kya Katonda, era ebirabika kye byava bikolebwa nga biggyibwa mu bitalabika." 
Hebrews11:4 Olw'okukkiriza Abiri yawa Katonda ssaddaaka esinga obulungi okukira eya Kayini, n'ekimuweesa obutuukirivu, Katonda bwe yakkiriza ebirabo bye, era olw'ekyo newakubadde nga Abiri yafa, naye akyayogera." 
Hebrews11:5 Olw'okukkiriza, Enoka yatwalibwa nga tayise mu kufa n'atalabika kubanga Katonda yamutwala, kubanga bwe yali nga tannamutwala, Katonda yategeeza nga bwe yamusiima." 
Hebrews11:6 Era awatali kukkiriza tekiyinzika kusanyusa Katonda, kubanga buli ajja eri Katonda kimugwanira okukkiriza nga Katonda waali, era nga ye mugabi w'empeera eri abo abamunoonya." 
Hebrews11:7 Olw'okukkiriza Nuuwa, bwe yalabulwa Katonda ku bigambo ebyali bitannalabika, n'atya era mu kukkiriza n'azimba eryato olw'okulokola ennyumba ye, kye yava asalira ensi omusango, n'afuuka omusika w'obutuukirivu obuli mu kukkiriza." 
Hebrews11:8 Olw'okukkiriza Ibulayimu bwe yayitibwa, n'awulira n'okugenda n'agenda mu kifo kye yali agenda okuweebwa okuba obusika; bw'atyo n'agenda nga tamanyi gy'agenda." 
Hebrews11:9 Olw'okukkiriza n'abeeranga omugenyi mu nsi eyasuubizibwa, ng'etali yiye, ng'asula mu weema wamu ne Isaaka ne Yakobo, basika banne ab'okusuubizibwa okwo," 
Hebrews11:10 kubanga yalindirira ekibuga kiri ekirina emisingi, Katonda kye yakuba era kye yazimba." 
Hebrews11:11 Olw'okukkiriza era ne Saala yennyini n'aweebwa amaanyi okuba olubuto newakubadde nga yali ayitiridde mu myaka, kubanga oyo eyamusuubiza yamulowooza nga mwesigwa:" 
Hebrews11:12 n'olwekyo okuva mu muntu omu eyali Afaanana ng'afudde, mwe mwava abantu abangi ng'emmunyeenye ez'omu ggulu obungi, era ng'omusenyu oguli ku ttale ly'ennyanja ogutabalika." 
Hebrews11:13 Abo bonna baafiira mu kukkiriza, nga tebaweereddwa byabasuubizibwa, naye nga babirengerera wala, era nga babiramusa, era nga baatula nga bagenyi era abatambuze ku nsi." 
Hebrews11:14 Kubanga aboogera bwe batyo boolesa nga banoonya ensi ey'obutaka. 
Hebrews11:15 Era singa bajjukira ensi eri gye baavaamu, bandibadde n'ebbanga okuddayo." 
Hebrews11:16 Naye kaakano beegomba ensi esinga obulungi, ye y'omu ggulu, Katonda kyava alema okukwatibwa ensonyi ku lw'abo, okuyitibwanga Katonda waabwe: kubanga yabateekerateekera ekibuga." 
Hebrews11:17 Olw'okukkiriza Ibulayimu, bwe yagezesebwa, yawaayo Isaaka omwana we eyazaalibwa omu yekka, eyaweebwa ebyasuubizibwa," 
Hebrews11:18 eyagambibwa nti,“ Mu Isaaka ezzadde lyo mwe linaayitirwanga.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Yamanya nga Katonda ayinza okumuzuukiza mu bafu, era n'ayaniriza Isaaka ng'alinga azuukidde mu bafu." 
Hebrews11:20 Olw'okukkiriza Isaaka yasabira omukisa Yakobo ne Esawu, mu bigambo ebyali bigenda okujja." 
Hebrews11:21 Olw'okukkiriza Yakobo, bwe yali agenda okufa, yasabira omukisa abaana ba Yusufu bombiriri; n'asinza ng'akutamye ku musa gw'omuggo gwe." 
Hebrews11:22 Olw'okukkiriza Yusufu, bwe yali ng'anaatera okufa, n'ayogera ku kuvaayo kw'abaana ba Isiraeri; n'alagira ku by'amagumba ge." 
Hebrews11:23 Olw'okukkiriza Musa, bwe yazaalibwa, abazadde be ne bamukwekera emyezi esatu, kubanga baamulaba nga mwana mulungi, ne batatya kiragiro kya kabaka." 
Hebrews11:24 Olw'okukkiriza Musa, bwe yakula, n'agaana okuyitibwanga omwana wa muwala wa Falaawo;" 
Hebrews11:25 ng'asinga okwagala okukolebwanga obubi awamu n'abantu ba Katonda okusinga okubanga mu kwesiima okw'ekibi okuggwaawo amangu; 
Hebrews11:26 ng'alowooza ekivume kya Kristo okuba obugagga obusinga ebintu by'e Misiri: kubanga yali asuubira empeera eyo. 
Hebrews11:27 Olw'okukkiriza n'aleka Misiri, nga tatya busungu bwa kabaka: kubanga yagumiikiriza ng'alaba oyo atalabika." 
Hebrews11:28 Olw'okukkiriza yakola Okuyitako n'okumansira omusaayi, eyazikiriza ababereberye be Misiri aleme nabo okubatwaliramu." 
Hebrews11:29 Olw'okukkiriza ne bayita mu Nnyanja Emmyufu nga ng'abayita ku lukalu. Abamisiri bwe baagezaako okukola bwe batyo ne basaanyizibwawo. 
Hebrews11:30 Olw'okukkiriza bbugwe wa Yeriko n'agwa, nga kimaze okwebungululwa okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Hebrews11:31 Olw'okukkiriza Lakabu omwenzi oyo teyazikiririra wamu n'abo abataagonda, bwe yasembeza abakessi emirembe." 
Hebrews11:32 Njogere ki nate? Kubanga ekiseera kinaanzigwako bwe nnaayogera ku Gidiyooni, Balaki, Samusooni, Yefusa ne ku Dawudi, Samwiri ne bannabbi abalala." 
Hebrews11:33 Olw'okukkiriza abo be baawangula obwakabaka, be baakola eby'obutuukirivu, be baafuna ebyasuubizibwa, be baabuniza obumwa bw'empologoma," 
Hebrews11:34 be baazikiza amaanyi g'omuliro, be badduka obwogi bw'ekitala, be baaweebwa amaanyi okuva mu bunafu, be baafuuka abazira mu ntalo, be baagoba eggye ly'ab'amawanga." 
Hebrews11:35 Abakazi ne baweebwa abafu baabwe nga bazuukidde, n'abalala ne bayigganyizibwa, nga tebaganya kununulibwa, balyoke baweebwe okuzuukira okusinga obulungi," 
Hebrews11:36 n'abalala ne baduulirwa ne bakubibwa, ne basibibwa ne bateekebwa mu kkomera." 
Hebrews11:37 Baakubibwa amayinja, baasalibwamu n'emisumeeno, baakemebwa, battibwa n'ekitala, baatambulanga nga bambadde amaliba g'endiga n'ag'embuzi; nga tebalina kantu, nga babonyaabonyezebwa, nga bakolwa obubi" 
Hebrews11:38 n'ensi nga tebasaanira, nga bayita mu malungu ne mu nsozi, nga beekweka mu mpuku ne mu bunnya obw'ensi." 
Hebrews11:39 Naye abantu abo bonna newakubadde bakakasibwa olw'okukkiriza kwabwe, tabafuna ekyasuubizibwa," 
Hebrews11:40 Kubanga Katonda yatulabira dda ffe ekisinga obulungi, bo baleme okutuukirizibwa ffe nga tetuliiwo." 
Hebrews12:1 Kale naffe, bwe tulina ekibiina eky'abajulirwa eky'enkana awo, twambulenga buli ekizitowa n'ekibi ekyegatta naffe, tuddukenga n'okugumiikiriza embiro eziteekeddwa mu maaso gaffe," 
Hebrews12:2 nga tutunuulira Yesu yekka omukulu w'okukkiriza kwaffe era omutuukiriza waakwo, olw'essanyu eryateekebwa mu maaso ge eyagumiikiriza omusalaba, ng'anyooma ensonyi, n'atuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'entebe ya Katonda." 
Hebrews12:3 Kubanga mumulowooze oyo eyagumiikiriza empaka embi ezenkana awo ez'abakola ebibi, mulemenga okukoowa, oba okuddirira mu mmeeme zammwe." 
Hebrews12:4 Temunnawakana okutuuka ku kuyiwa omusaayi gwammwe nga mulwana ne kibi. 
Hebrews12:5 Mwerabidde ebigambo ebibabuulirirwa ng'abaana, “Mwana wange, tonyoomanga kukangavvula kwa Mukama, So toddiriranga bw'akunenyanga;" 
Hebrews12:6 Kubanga Mukama gw'ayagala amukangavvula, Era akuba buli mwana gw'akkiriza.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Olw'okukangavvulwa kyemunaavanga mugumiikiriza. Katonda abakola ng'abaana; kuba mwana ki kitaawe gw'atakangavvula? 
Hebrews12:8 Naye bwe mutakangavvulwa nga n'abalala bwe bakangavvulwa, munaaba beebolereze, so si baana." 
Hebrews12:9 Twalina bakitaffe ab'omubiri abaatukangavvulanga, ne tubassangamu ekitiibwa, tetulisinga nnyo okugonderanga Kitaawe w'emyoyo, ne tuba abalamu?" 
Hebrews12:10 Kubanga bo baatukangavvuliranga ennaku si nnyingi olw'okwegasa bo; naye oyo atukangavvula olw'okutugasa, tulyoke tufune omugabo ku butukuvu bwe." 
Hebrews12:11 Okukakangavvulwa kwonna mu biro ebya kaakano tekufaanana nga kwa ssanyu wabula kwa nnaku, naye oluvannyuma kubala ebibala eby'emirembe eri abo abayigirizibwa mu kwo, bye bibala eby'obutuukirivu." 
Hebrews12:12 Kale mugolole emikono gyammwe egikooye, n'amaviivi gammwe agakozimba;" 
Hebrews12:13 era mukubirenga ebigere byammwe amakubo amagolokofu, awenyera alemenga okugavaamu, naye awonenga buwonyi." 
Hebrews12:14 Mugobererenga emirembe eri abantu bonna, n'obutukuvu, awatali obwo tewali aliraba Mukama:" 
Hebrews12:15 mulabe waleme kubaawo omuntu yenna asubwa ekisa kya Katonda, era mwekuume “ekikolo kyonna eky'okukaawa” kiremenga okuloka mu mmwe, okugwagwawaza abangi;" 
Hebrews12:16 era mwegendereze waleme okubaawo omwenzi, oba atatya Katonda, nga Esawu, eyatunda obusika bwe olw'akawumbo k'emmere akamu." 
Hebrews12:17 Kubanga mumanyi nga era oluvannyuma bwe yayagala okusikira omukisa, tekyasoboka kubanga teyafuna bbanga lya kwenenyezaamu, newakubadde nga yagunoonya n'amaziga mangi." 
Hebrews12:18 Kubanga temuzze ku lusozi olukwatibwako era olwaka n'omuliro, n'eri ekizikiza ekikutte zzigizigi, ne kibuyaga," 
Hebrews12:19 n'okuvuga kw'ekkondeere, n'eddoboozi ly'ebigambo; abaaliwulira ne beegayirira obutayongerwako kigambo lwa kubiri;" 
Hebrews12:20 kubanga tebaakiyinza ekyalagirwa nti, “Newakubadde n'ekisolo bwe kikoma ku lusozi, kirikubibwa amayinja,”" 
Hebrews12:21 n'ebyalabika byali byantiisa bwe biti Musa n'okugamba n'agamba nti, “Ntidde nnyo era nkankanye.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Naye muzze ku lusozi Sayuuni, ne ku kibuga kya Katonda omulamu, Yerusaalemi eky'omu ggulu, n'eri obukumi bwa bamalayika," 
Hebrews12:23 eri ekkuŋŋaaniro eddene era ekkanisa ey'ababereberye abaawandiikibwa mu ggulu, n'eri Katonda Omulamuzi wa bonna, n'eri emyoyo gy'abatuukirivu abaatuukirizibwa," 
Hebrews12:24 n'eri Yesu omubaka w'endagaano empya, n'eri omusaayi ogw'okumansira ogwogera ebirungi okusinga ogwa Abbeeri." 
Hebrews12:25 Mwekuume obutagaananga ayogera. Kubanga bali bwe bataalokoka, bwe baamugaana oyo eyabalabula ng'ayima mu nsi, ffe abakuba oyo atulabula ng'ayima mu ggulu tulisinga nnyo obutalokoka:" 
Hebrews12:26 eyakankanya ensi n'eddoboozi lye mu biro biri: naye kaakano yasuubiza, ng'ayogera nti, “Ekyasigadde omulundi gumu ndinyeenya, si nsi yokka, naye era n'eggulu.”" 
Hebrews12:27 N'ekyo, nti, “Ekyasigadde omulundi gumu,” kitegeeza okuggibwawo kw'ebyo ebikankanyizibwa, ng'ebyakolebwa, ebitakankanyizibwa biryoke bibeerewo." 
Hebrews12:28 Kale, bwe tuweebwa obwakabaka obutakankanyizibwa, tubenga n'ekisa, kituweerezese okuweereza okusiimibwa Katonda n'okwegendereza n'okutya," 
Hebrews12:29 Katonda waffe gwe muliro ogwokya. 
Hebrews13:1 Okwagalana ng'ab'oluganda kweyongere. 
Hebrews13:2 Temwerabiranga kusembeza bagenyi: kubanga olw'okwo waaliwo abaasembeza bamalayika nga tebamanyi. 
Hebrews13:3 Mujjukirenga abasibe, ng'abasibirwa awamu nabo; era n'abalaba ennaku, kubanga nammwe muli mu mubiri." 
Hebrews13:4 Obufumbo bussibwemu ekitiibwa abantu bonna, n'ekitanda kibeere kirongoofu; kubanga abakaba n'abenzi Katonda alibasalira omusango." 
Hebrews13:5 Mubeerenga n'empisa ey'obutaagalanga bintu; bye mulina bibamalenga: kubanga ye yennyini yagamba nti Sirikuleka n'akatono, so sirikwabulira n'akatono." 
Hebrews13:6 Kye tuva twaŋŋanga okwogera n'obuvumu nti, “Mukama ye mubeezi wange, ssiityenga. Omuntu ayinza kunkola ki?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Mujjukirenga abakulembeze bammwe, abaababuulira ekigambo kya Katonda, nga mutunuulira empisa zaabwe era mugobererenga okukkiriza kwabwe." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristo jjo ne leero aba bumu okutuusa emirembe n'emirembe. 
Hebrews13:9 Temutwalibwatwalibwanga kuyigiriza okw'engeri ennyingi okuggya, kubanga kirungi omutima okunywezebwa ekisa, so si kunywezebwa na mpisa ez'okulyanga, ezitagasa abo abazitambuliramu." 
Hebrews13:10 Tulina ekyoto abaweereza eby'omu weema kye batalagirwa kuliirangako. 
Hebrews13:11 Kubanga ebisolo biri, ebitwalibwamu omusaayi gwabyo kabona asinga obukulu mu kifo ekitukuvu olw'ekibi, emibiri gyabyo gyokerwa bweru wa lusiisira." 
Hebrews13:12 Era ne Yesu kyeyava abonaabonera ebweru wa wankaaki, alyoke atukuze abantu n'omusaayi gwe ye." 
Hebrews13:13 Kale tufulume okugenda gy'ali ebweru w'olusiisira nga twetisse ekivume kye. 
Hebrews13:14 Kubanga wano tetulina kibuga ekibeerera, naye tunoonya ekigenda okujja." 
Hebrews13:15 Kale mu oyo tuweereyo eri Katonda bulijjo ssaddaaka ey'ettendo, kye kibala eky'emimwa egyatula erinnya lye." 
Hebrews13:16 Naye okukola obulungi n'okukkaanya temwerabiranga: kubanga ssaddaaka eziri ng'ezo zimusanyusa nnyo Katonda. 
Hebrews13:17 Muwulirenga abo ababafuga mubagonderenga: kubanga abo batunula olw'obulamu bwammwe, nga baliwoza bwe baakola; balyoke bakolenga bwe batyo n'essanyu nga tebeemulugunya, kubanga bwe babeemulugunyiza tekibagasa mmwe." 
Hebrews13:18 Mutusabirenga, kubanga tumanyidde ddala nga tulina omwoyo omulungi, nga twagala okubanga n'empisa ennungi mu byonna." 
Hebrews13:19 Era okusinga ennyo mbeegayirira okukolanga bwe mutyo, ndyoke nkomezebwewo mangu gye muli." 
Hebrews13:20 Naye Katonda ow'emirembe, eyakomyawo okuva mu bafu omusumba w'endiga omukulu olw'omusaayi ogw'endagaano ey'olubeerera, ye Mukama waffe Yesu," 
Hebrews13:21 abatuukirize mu buli kigambo ekirungi okukolanga by'ayagala, ng'akolera mu ffe ekisiimibwa mu maaso ge, ku bwa Yesu Kristo; aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Hebrews13:22 Naye mbabuulirira, ab'oluganda, mugumiikirizenga ekigambo eky'okubuulirirwa, kubanga mbawandiikidde mu bigambo bitono." 
Hebrews13:23 Mumanye nga ow'oluganda Timoseewo yateebwa; bw'alijja amangu, ndibalabira wamu naye." 
Hebrews13:24 Mulamuse abakulembeze bammwe bonna, n'abatukuvu bonna. Ab'omu Italiya babalamusizza." 
Hebrews13:25 Ekisa kibeerenga nammwe mwenna. Amiina. 
James1:1 Yakobo, omuddu wa Katonda era owa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, eri ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri (12) ebyasaasaana, mbalamusizza." 
James1:2 Mulowoozenga byonna okuba essanyu, ab'oluganda, bwe munaagwanga mu kukemebwa okutali kumu;" 
James1:3 nga mutegeera ng'okugezebwa kw'okukkiriza kwammwe kuleeta okugumiikiriza. 
James1:4 Era omulimu gw'okugumiikiriza gutuukirirenga, mulyoke mubeere abaatuukirira, abalina byonna, abataweebuuka mu kigambo kyonna." 
James1:5 Naye oba ng'omuntu yenna ku mmwe aweebuuka mu magezi, asabenga Katonda atamma awa bonna so takayuka; era galimuweebwa." 
James1:6 Naye asabenga mu kukkiriza, nga taliiko ky'abuusabuusa, kubanga abuusabuusa afaanana ng'ejjengo ery'ennyanja eritwalibwa empewo ne lisuukundibwa." 
James1:7 Kubanga omuntu oyo talowoozanga ng'aliweebwa ekintu kyonna okuva eri Mukama waffe; 
James1:8 omuntu ow'emyoyo ebiri, atanywera mu makubo ge gonna." 
James1:9 Naye ow'oluganda omwavu yeenyumirizenga olw'obukulu bwe; 
James1:10 era n'omugagga yeenyumirizenga olw'okutoowazibwa kwe, kubanga aliggwaawo ng'ekimuli ky'omuddo." 
James1:11 Kubanga enjuba evaayo n'omusana omungi n'ewotosa omuddo; n'ekimuli kyagwo ne kigwa n'obulungi bw'ekifaananyi kyagwo ne bubula, era n'omugagga bw'atyo bw'aliwotoka mu kutambula kwe." 
James1:12 Alina omukisa omuntu agumiikiriza okukemebwa, kubanga bw'alimala okusiimibwa aliweebwa engule ey'obulamu, Mukama waffe gye yasuubiza abamwagala." 
James1:13 Omuntu yenna bw'akemebwanga, tayogeranga nti Katonda ye ankema, kubanga Katonda takemebwa na bubi, era ye yennyini takema muntu yenna." 
James1:14 Naye buli muntu akemebwa, ng'awalulwa okwegomba kwe ye n'asendebwasendebwa." 
James1:15 Okwegomba okwo ne kulyoka kuba olubuto ne kuzaala okwonoona, n'okwonoona okwo, bwe kumala okukula, ne kuzaala okufa." 
James1:16 Temwerimbalimbanga, baganda bange abaagalwa." 
James1:17 Buli kirabo ekirungi, na buli kitone ekituukirivu kiva waggulu, nga kikka okuva eri Kitaffe ow'ebyaka, atayinza kuba na kufuukafuuka newakubadde ekisiikirize eky'okukyuka." 
James1:18 Olw'okuteesa kwe yatuzaala n'ekigambo eky'amazima, tulyoke tubeere ng'omwaka omubereberye ogw'ebitonde bye." 
James1:19 Mumanye kino, ab'oluganda abaagalwa, buli muntu abeerenga mwangu wa kuwulira, alwengawo okwogera, alwengawo okusunguwala." 
James1:20 Kubanga obusungu bw'omuntu tebukola butuukirivu bwa Katonda. 
James1:21 Kale muteekenga wala obugwagwa bwonna n'obubi obusukkiridde, mutoolenga n'obuwombeefu ekigambo ekisigibwa ekiyinza okulokola obulamu bwammwe." 
James1:22 Naye mubeerenga bakozi ba kigambo, so si bawulizi buwulizi, nga mwerimbalimba." 
James1:23 Kubanga omuntu yenna bw'aba omuwulizi w'ekigambo, so nga si mukozi, oyo afaanana ng'omuntu eyeeraba amaaso ag'obuzaaliranwa bwe mu ndabirwamu;" 
James1:24 kubanga yeeraba n'agenda, amangu ago ne yeerabira bw'afaananye." 
James1:25 Naye atunula mu mateeka amatuukirivu ag'eddembe n'aganyiikiriramu, nga si muwulizi eyeerabira naye mukozi akola, oyo anaaweebwanga omukisa mu kukola kwe." 
James1:26 Omuntu yenna bwe yeerowooza nga wa ddiini, bw'ataziyiza lulimi lwe, naye nga yeerimba omutima gwe, eddiini y'oyo teriiko kyegasa." 
James1:27 Eddiini ennongoofu eteriimu kko mu maaso ga Katonda Kitaffe ye eno, okulambulanga abafuuzi ne bannamwandu mu bunaku bwabwe, n'okwekuumanga obutaba na mabala ag'omu nsi." 
James2:1 Ab'oluganda, temubanga na kukkiriza kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo ow'ekitiibwa, ate ne muba n'okusosolanga mu bantu." 
James2:2 Kubanga bw'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyammwe omuntu alina empeta eya zaabu ayambadde eby'obuyonjo, era n'omwavu ayambadde enziina n'ayingira," 
James2:3 nammwe ne mwaniriza ayambadde ebyambalo eby'obuyonjo, ne mwogera nti, “Ggwe tuula wano awalungi,” era ne mugamba omwavu nti, “Ggwe yimirira eri,” oba “Tuula wansi awali ebigere byange;”" 
James2:4 nga temwawukanye mu mmwe mwekka, ne mufuuka abalamuzi ab'ebirowoozo ebibi?" 
James2:5 Muwulire, baganda bange abaagalwa; Katonda teyalonda abalina obwavu bw'omu nsi okubeeranga n'obugagga obw'okukkiriza, n'okusikira obwakabaka bwe yasuubiza abamwagala?" 
James2:6 Naye mmwe mwanyooma omwavu. Abagagga si be babajooga ne babawalula bennyini ne babatwala awasalirwa emisango? 
James2:7 Si beebo abavuma erinnya eddungi lye muyitibwa? 
James2:8 Naye bwe muba mutuukiriza etteeka lino eriri nga kabaka w'amateeka, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Oyagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala wekka,” mukola bulungi." 
James2:9 Naye bwe munaasosolanga mu bantu, nga mukoze kibi, ne musingibwa amateeka ng'aboonoonyi." 
James2:10 Kubanga omuntu yenna bw'aba akwata amateeka gonna, naye n'asobya mu limu, ng'azzizza omusango gwa gonna." 
James2:11 Kubanga oyo eyayogera nti, “Toyendanga,” ate yayogera nti, “Tottanga.” Kale bw'otoyenda naye n'otta, ng'ofuuse mwonoonyi w'amateeka." 
James2:12 Mwogerenga era mukolenga bwe mutyo ng'abagenda okusalirwa omusango n'amateeka ag'eddembe. 
James2:13 Kubanga omusango tegubaako kusaasirwa eri atasaasira, naye okusaasira kuwangula omusango." 
James2:14 Kigasa kitya, ab'oluganda, omuntu bw'ayogera ng'alina okukkiriza, naye n'ataba na bikolwa? Okukkiriza okwo kuyinza okumulokola?" 
James2:15 Bwe wabaawo ow'oluganda omusajja oba mukazi nga bali bwereere, ng'emmere eya buli lunaku tebamala," 
James2:16 era omu ku mmwe bw'abagamba nti, “Mugende n'emirembe mubugume, mukkute,” naye ne mutabawa omubiri bye gwetaaga; kigasa kitya?" 
James2:17 Era n'okukkiriza bwe kutyo, bwe kutabaako bikolwa, kwokka nga kufudde." 
James2:18 Naye omuntu alyogera nti, “Ggwe olina okukkiriza, nange nnina ebikolwa.” Ndaga okukkiriza kwo awatali bikolwa byo, nange olw'ebikolwa byange nnaakulaga okukkiriza kwange." 
James2:19 Okkiriza nga Katonda ali omu; okola bulungi, era ne badayimooni bakkiriza, ne bakankana." 
James2:20 Naye oyagala okutegeera, ggwe omuntu ataliimu, ng'okukkiriza awatali bikolwa tekuliiko kye kugasa?" 
James2:21 Ibulayimu jjajjaffe teyaweebwa butuukirivu lwa bikolwa, bwe yawaayo Isaaka omwana we ku kyoto?" 
James2:22 Olaba ng'okukkiriza kwakolera wamu n'ebikolwa bye, era okukkiriza kwe kwatuukirizibwa olw'ebikolwa bye." 
James2:23 Ekyawandiikibwa ne kituukirira ekyogera nti, “Ibulayimu n'akkiriza Katonda, ne kumubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu;” n'ayitibwa mukwano gwa Katonda." 
James2:24 Mulaba ng'omuntu aweebwa obutuukirivu lwa bikolwa, so si lwa kukkiriza kwokka." 
James2:25 Era ne Lakabu omwenzi bw'atyo teyaweebwa butuukirivu lwa bikolwa, kubanga yasembeza ababaka, n'abayisa mu kkubo eddala?" 
James2:26 Kuba ng'omubiri awatali mwoyo bwe guba nga gufudde, era n'okukkiriza bwe kutyo awatali bikolwa nga kufudde." 
James3:1 Temubeeranga bayigiriza bangi, baganda bange, nga mumanyi nga ffe abayigiriza tulisalirwa omusango ogusinga obunene." 
James3:2 Kubanga ffenna tusobya mu bingi. Omuntu yenna bw'atasobya mu kigambo, oyo ye muntu eyatuukirira, ayinza okuziyiza era n'omubiri gwe gwonna." 
James3:3 Naye bwe tuteeka ebyuma eby'embalaasi mu mimwa gyazo ziryoke zitugonderenga, tuyinza okufuga emibiri gyazo gyonna." 
James3:4 Laba, era n'emeeri, newakubadde nga nnene bwe zityo, era nga zitwalibwa empewo ez'amaanyi, enkasi entono ennyo ye zigoba yonna yonna omugoba gy'asiima mu kwagala kwe." 
James3:5 Era n'olulimi bwe lutyo kye kitundu ekitono, era lwenyumiriza nnyo. Laba, emiti emingi egyenkanidde awo okwokebwa akaliro akatono bwe katyo." 
James3:6 N'olulimi muliro, ensi ey'obubi mu bitundu byaffe lwe lulimi, olwonoona omubiri gwonna, era olukoleeza nnamuziga w'ebitonde byonna, era olukoleezebwa Ggeyeena." 
James3:7 Kubanga buli ngeri ey'ensolo n'ennyonyi n'ebyewalula n'ebyennyanja bifugika era byafugibwa dda abantu. 
James3:8 Naye olulimi tewali muntu ayinza kulufuga; bubi obutaziyizika, lujjudde obusagwa obutta." 
James3:9 Olwo lwe tutenderezesa Mukama waffe ye Kitaffe; era olwo lwe tukolimiza abantu abaakolerwa mu kifaananyi kya Katonda. 
James3:10 Mu kamwa ke kamu mwe muva okutendereza n'okukolima. Ab'oluganda, ebyo tekibigwanira kubeera bwe bityo." 
James3:11 Ensulo ekulukuta amazzi amalungi n'agakaawa mu liiso erimu? 
James3:12 Omutiini guyinza, ab'oluganda, okubala ezeyituuni, oba omuzabbibu okubala ettiini? So amazzi ag'omunnyo tegayinza kuvaamu malungi." 
James3:13 Ani alina amagezi n'okutegeera mu mmwe? Mu mpisa ennungi alagenga ebikolwa bye mu buwombeefu n'amagezi. 
James3:14 Naye bwe muba n'obuggya obukambwe, n'okuyomba mu mutima gwammwe, temwenyumirizanga so temulimbanga okuziyiza amazima." 
James3:15 Amagezi gano si ge gakka okuva waggulu, naye ga mu nsi, ga buzaaliranwa, ga Setaani." 
James3:16 Kubanga awaba obuggya n'okuyomba, we waba okutabuka na buli kikolwa ekibi." 
James3:17 Naye amagezi agava waggulu okusooka malongoofu, nate ga mirembe, mawombeefu, mawulize, agajjudde okusaasira n'ebibala ebirungi, agatalina kwawula, agatalina bunnanfuusi." 
James3:18 Era ekibala eky'obutuukirivu kisigibwa mu mirembe eri abo abaleeta emirembe. 
James4:1 Entalo ziva wa n'okulwana kuva wa mu mmwe? Si muno, mu kwegomba kwammwe okulwana mu bitundu byammwe?" 
James4:2 Mwegomba so temulina, mutta, era mwegomba, so temuyinza kufuna, mulwana era mutabaala; temulina kubanga temusaba." 
James4:3 Musaba ne mutaweebwa, kubanga musaba bubi, mulyoke mubikozese okwegomba kwammwe." 
James4:4 Mmwe abakazi abenzi temumanyi ng'omukwano gw'ensi bwe bulabe bwa Katonda? Kale, omuntu yenna bw'ayagala okubeera mukwano gw'ensi yeefuula mulabe wa Katonda." 
James4:5 Oba mulowooza ng'ekyawandiikibwa kyogerera bwereere nti, “Alina obuggya olw'Omwoyo gwe yatuuza mu ffe?”" 
James4:6 Naye yeeyongera okugaba ekisa. Kyekiva kyogera nti, “Katonda alwana n'ab'amalala, naye abawombeefu abawa ekisa.”" 
James4:7 Kale mujeemulukukirenga Katonda; naye mulwanenga ne Setaani, naye anaabaddukanga." 
James4:8 Musembererenga Katonda, naye anaabasembereranga mmwe. Munaabenga mu ngalo, abalina ebibi; era mutukuzenga emitima gyammwe, mmwe abalina emmeeme ebbiri." 
James4:9 Munakuwale, mukube ebiwoobe, mukaabe, okuseka kwammwe kufuuke ebiwoobe, n'essanyu lifuuke okunakuwala." 
James4:10 Mwetoowazenga mu maaso ga Mukama, naye alibagulumiza." 
James4:11 Temwogeraganangako bubi, ab'oluganda. Ayogera obubi ku w'oluganda, oba asalira omusango ow'oluganda, ayogera obubi ku mateeka, era asalira musango amateeka, naye bw'osalira omusango amateeka, nga toli mukozi wa mateeka, wabula omusazi w'omusango." 
James4:12 Eyateeka amateeka era omusazi w'omusango ali omu, oyo ayinza okulokola n'okuzikiriza. Naye ggwe ani asalira munno omusango?" 
James4:13 Kale nno mmwe aboogera nti, “Leero oba jjo tunaagenda mu kibuga gundi, tulimalayo omwaka gumu, tulitunda, tulifuna amagoba;”" 
James4:14 naye nga temutegeera bya nkya. Obulamu bwammwe buli nga ki? Muli lufu, olulabika akaseera akatono, ne lulyoka luggwaawo." 
James4:15 Mwandyogedde nti, “Mukama waffe bw'alyagala, tuliba balamu, era tulikola bwe tuti oba bwe tuti.”" 
James4:16 Naye kaakano mwenyumiriza mu kwekulumbaza kwammwe, okwenyumiriza kwonna okuli bwe kutyo kubi." 
James4:17 Kale amanya ekirungi eky'okukola n'atakikola, eri oyo kiba kibi." 
James5:1 Kale nno mwe abagagga, mukaabe mulire olw'ennaku ezijja ku mmwe." 
James5:2 Obugagga bwammwe buvunze, n'ebyambalo byammwe biriiriddwa ennyenje." 
James5:3 Ezaabu yammwe ne ffeeza zitalazze; n'obutalagge bwazo buliba mujulirwa gye muli, bulirya omubiri gwammwe ng'omuliro. Mwakuŋŋaanyiza ebintu mu nnaku ez'enkomerero." 
James5:4 Laba, empeera y'abakozi abaakungula ennimiro zammwe, gye mulyazaamaanya, ekaaba, n'ebiwoobe by'abo abakungula byayingira mu matu ga Mukama Ow'eggye." 
James5:5 Mwesanyusa ku nsi, ne muwoomerwa ebinyumu; mugezzezza emitima gyammwe ku lunaku olw'okuttibwa." 
James5:6 Mwasala omusango okusinga omutuukirivu, ne mumutta; naye n'atabawakanya." 
James5:7 Kale, ab'oluganda, mugumiikirizenga okutuusa okujja kwa Mukama waffe. Laba, omulimi alindirira ebibala eby'ensi eby'omuwendo omungi, abigumiikiriza, okutuusa enkuba eya ddumbi n'eya ttoggo." 
James5:8 Era nammwe mugumiikirizenga; munywezenga emitima gyammwe, kubanga okujja kwa Mukama waffe kuli kumpi." 
James5:9 Temwemulugunyanga, ab'oluganda, mwekka na mwekka, muleme okusalirwa omusango, laba, omusazi w'emisango ayimiridde ku luggi." 
James5:10 Mutwale ekyokulabirako, ab'oluganda, eky'okubonyaabonyezebwa n'okugumiikiriza, okwa bannabbi abaayogeranga mu linnya lya Mukama." 
James5:11 Laba, tubayita ba mukisa abaagumiikirizanga, mwawulira okugumiikiriza kwa Yobu, era mwalaba Mukama ku nkomerero bw'akola, nga Mukama wa kisa kingi n'okusaasira." 
James5:12 Naye okusinga byonna, ab'oluganda, temulayiranga newakubadde eggulu, newakubadde ensi, newakubadde ekirayiro ekirala kyonna, naye ekigambo kyammwe weewaawo kibeerenga weewaawo, n'ekigambo kyammwe si weewaawo kibeerenga si weewaawo; muleme okugwa mu musango." 
James5:13 Waliwo mu mmwe omuntu ali obubi? Asabenga. Waliwo asanyuka? Ayimbenga eby'okutendereza Katonda. 
James5:14 Waliwo mu mmwe omuntu alwadde? Ayitenga abakadde b'ekkanisa; bamusabirenga, nga bamusiigako amafuta mu linnya lya Mukama waffe," 
James5:15 n'okusaba kw'okukkiriza kulirokola omulwadde, ne Mukama waffe alimuyimusa; era oba nga yakola ebibi birimuggibwako." 
James5:16 Kale mwatuliraganenga ebibi byammwe mwekka na mwekka, musabiraganenga, mulyoke muwone. Okusaba kw'omuntu omutuukirivu kuyinza nnyo mu kukola kwakwo." 
James5:17 Eriya yali muntu eyakwatibwa byonna nga ffe, n'asaba nnyo enkuba ereme okutonnya; enkuba n'etatonnya ku nsi emyaka esatu n'emyezi mukaaga." 
James5:18 N'asaba nate; eggulu ne litonnyesa enkuba, ensi n'emeza ebibala byayo." 
James5:19 Ab'oluganda, omuntu yenna mu mmwe bw'akyamanga okuva mu mazima, omuntu n'amala amukyusa," 
James5:20 ategeerenga ng'akyusa omwonoonyi okuva mu kkubo ekyamu, alirokola obulamu bwe mu kufa, era alibikka ku bibi bingi." 
1Peter1:1 Peetero, omutume wa Yesu Kristo, eri abalonde abaasaasaana abatambuze ab'omu Ponto, Ggalatiya, Kapadokiya, Asiya ne Bisuniya," 
1Peter1:2 abaalondebwa okusinziira ku kutegeerwa Katonda Kitaffe, n'okutukuzibwa kw'Omwoyo, olw'okugondera Yesu Kristo n'okumansirwako omusaayi gwe, ekisa n'emirembe byeyongerenga gye muli." 
1Peter1:3 Yeebazibwe Katonda era Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, eyatuzaala omulundi ogwokubiri, ng'okusaasira kwe okungi bwe kuli, tubeerenga n'essuubi eddamu, olw'okuzuukira kwa Yesu Kristo mu bafu." 
1Peter1:4 Tuyingire mu busika obutaggwaawo, obutalina kko, obutawotoka, obwabaterekerwa mmwe mu ggulu," 
1Peter1:5 amaanyi ga Katonda be gakuuma olw'okukkiriza okufuna obulokozi obweteeseteese okubikkulibwa mu biro eby'enkomerero. 
1Peter1:6 Obwo bwe mujagulizaamu, newakubadde nga mwanakuwazibwa mu kukemebwa okutali kumu akaseera akatono kaakano, oba nga kibagwanira," 
1Peter1:7 okugezebwa kw'okukkiriza kwammwe okusinga omuwendo ezaabu eggwaawo, newakubadde ng'egezebwa mu muliro, kulyoke kulabike okuleeta ettendo n'ekitiibwa n'okugulumizibwa Yesu Kristo bw'alibikkulibwa." 
1Peter1:8 Newakubadde temumulabangako naye mu mwagala; gwe mutalaba kaakano naye mumukkiriza, ne mujaguza essanyu eritayogerekeka, eririna ekitiibwa." 
1Peter1:9 Bwe mutyo ne muweebwa ekyabakkirizisa, bwe bulokozi bw'obulamu bwammwe." 
1Peter1:10 Bannabbi abaategeezanga eby'ekisa ekyali kigenda okujja gye muli, baanoonyanga nnyo ne bakenneenyanga eby'obulokozi buno." 
1Peter1:11 Banoonya ebiro bwe biri oba bwe bifaanana Omwoyo wa Kristo eyali mu bo bye yalaga, ng'asooka okutegeeza ebibonoobono bya Kristo, n'ekitiibwa ekibigoberera." 
1Peter1:12 Nabo babikkulirwa nga si ku lwabwe bokka wabula ku lwammwe baaweereza ebyo bye mwakajja mubuulirwe kaakano abo abaababuulira enjiri mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu eyatumibwa okuva mu ggulu; bamalayika bye beegomba okulingiza. 
1Peter1:13 Kale musibenga ebimyu by'amagezi gammwe, mutamiirukukenga, musuubirirenga ddala ekisa ekiribaleeterwa Yesu Kristo bw'alibikkulibwa;" 
1Peter1:14 ng'abaana abagonda, nga temwefaananya okwegomba okw'edda okw'omu butamanya bwammwe." 
1Peter1:15 Naye ng'oyo eyabayita bw'ali omutukuvu era nammwe mubeerenga batukuvu mu mpisa zonna. 
1Peter1:16 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Munaabanga batukuvu; kubanga nze ndi mutukuvu.”" 
1Peter1:17 Era bwe mumuyitanga Kitammwe, asala omusango awatali kusaliriza ng'omulimu gwa buli muntu bwe guli, mutambulenga n'entiisa mu biro byammwe eby'okuba abayise." 
1Peter1:18 Mumanyi nga temwanunulibwa na bintu ebiggwaawo, ffeeza oba zaabu, mu mpisa zammwe ezitaliimu ze mwaweebwa bajjajjammwe;" 
1Peter1:19 wabula n'omusaayi ogw'omuwendo omungi ogwa Kristo, ogulinga ogw'omwana gw'endiga ogutaliiko bulema newakubadde ebbala." 
1Peter1:20 Oyo eyategeerebwa edda ensi nga tezinnatondebwa, naye n'alabisibwa ku nkomerero y'ebiro ku lwammwe." 
1Peter1:21 Okuyita mu ye, mulina obuvumu mu Katonda, eyamuzuukiza mu bafu n'amuwa ekitiibwa; okukkiriza kwammwe n'okusuubira biryoke bibeerenga mu Katonda." 
1Peter1:22 Kubanga mumaze okwetukuza obulamu bwammwe mu kugondera amazima olw'okwagalanga ab'oluganda okutaliimu bunnanfuusi, mwagalanenga mu mutima ogutuukiridde." 
1Peter1:23 Mwazaalibwa omulundi ogwokubiri, si na nsigo eggwaawo, wabula eteggwaawo, n'ekigambo kya Katonda ekiramu eky'olubeerera." 
1Peter1:24 Kubanga “Abantu bonna bali ng'omuddo, N'ekitiibwa kyabwe kyonna kiri ng'ekimuli ky'omuddo. Omuddo guwotoka ekimuli ne kigwa," 
1Peter1:25 naye ekigambo kya Mukama kibeerera emirembe n'emirembe.” Era ekyo kye kigambo eky'Enjiri eky'ababulirwa. 
1Peter2:1 Kale muteekenga wala obubi bwonna n'obukuusa bwonna n'obunnanfuusi n'obuggya n'okwogera obubi kwonna. 
1Peter2:2 Ng'abaana abawere abaakajja bazaalibwe, mwegombenga amata ag'omwoyo agataliimu bulimba, galyoke gabakuze okutuuka ku kulokoka." 
1Peter2:3 Kubanga mwalega ku bulungi bwa Mukama waffe. 
1Peter2:4 Mujje eri oyo ejjinja eddamu, eryagaanibwa abantu, naye eri Katonda ddonde, lya muwendo mungi," 
1Peter2:5 era nammwe ng'amayinja amalamu muzimbibwamu ennyumba ey'Omwoyo mubeerenga bakabona abatukuvu, okuwangayo ssaddaaka ez'Omwoyo, ezisiimibwa Katonda mu Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Kubanga waliwo mu kyawandiikibwa nti, “Laba, nteeka mu Sayuuni ejjinja ekkulu ery'oku nsonda, eddonde, ery'omuwendo omungi; Era amukkiriza talikwasibwa nsonyi.”" 
1Peter2:7 Kale eri mmwe abakkiriza omuwendo mungi, naye eri abatakkiriza, “Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, eryo lye lyafuuka omutwe ogw'oku nsonda;”" 
1Peter2:8 era “Ejjinja eryesittalwako, era olwazi olusuula.” Beesittala kubanga tebaagondera kigambo, nga bwe baali baateekeddwa okukola." 
1Peter2:9 Naye mmwe muli ggwanga ddonde, bakabona ba kabaka, kika kitukuvu, bantu ba nvuma, mulyoke mubuulirenga ebirungi by'oyo eyabayita okuva mu kizikiza okuyingira mu kitangaala kye eky'ekitalo." 
1Peter2:10 Edda abataali ggwanga, naye kaakano muli ggwanga lya Katonda; abaali batasaasirwa, naye kaakano musaasiddwa." 
1Peter2:11 Abaagalwa, mbeegayirira ng'abayise n'abatambuze, okwewalanga okwegomba kw'omubiri okulwana n'obulamu." 
1Peter2:12 Munywezenga empisa zammwe ennungi mu b'amawanga, nga bwe baboogerako ng'abakola obubi, olw'ebikolwa byammwe ebirungi bye balaba balyoke bagulumize Katonda ku lunaku lwalirabikirako." 
1Peter2:13 Mugonderenga buli kiragiro ky'abantu ku bwa Mukama waffe, oba kabaka nga ye asinga bonna;" 
1Peter2:14 oba abaamasaza, kubanga ye b'atuma olw'okukangavvulanga abakola obubi, n'olw'okusiimanga abakola obulungi." 
1Peter2:15 Kubanga Katonda bw'ayagala bw'atyo, mmwe okusirisanga obutamanya bw'abantu abasirusiru nga mukola obulungi." 
1Peter2:16 Mubeere ba ddembe, so si ng'abalina eddembe lyammwe olw'okukisa obubi, naye ng'abaddu ba Katonda." 
1Peter2:17 Mussengamu ekitiibwa abantu bonna. Mwagalenga ab'oluganda. Mutyenga Katonda. Mussengamu ekitiibwa kabaka. 
1Peter2:18 Abaweereza, mugonderenga bakama bammwe mu kutya kwonna, si balungi bokka n'abawombeefu, naye era n'abakambwe." 
1Peter2:19 Kubanga kino kye kisiimibwa, omuntu bw'agumiikiriza okulumwa olw'okujjukira Katonda, ng'abonyaabonyezebwa awatali nsonga." 
1Peter2:20 Kubanga bwe mukola obubi ne mukubibwa empi, bwe muligumiikiriza, ttendo ki? Naye bwe mukola obulungi ne mubonyaabonyezebwa, bwe muligumiikiriza, ekyo kye kisiimibwa eri Katonda." 
1Peter2:21 Kubanga ekyo kye mwayitirwa, kubanga era Kristo yabonyaabonyezebwa ku lwammwe, ng'abalekera ekyokulabirako, mulyoke mutambulirenga mu bigere bye." 
1Peter2:22 Ataakola kibi, newakubadde obukuusa tebwalabika mu kamwa ke." 
1Peter2:23 Bwe yavumibwa, ataavuma nate; bwe yabonyaabonyezebwa, ataakanga; naye yeewaayo eri oyo asala omusango ogw'ensonga." 
1Peter2:24 Ye yennyini yeetikka ebibi byaffe mu mubiri gwe ku muti, ffe nga tumaze okufa ku bibi, tulyoke tubeerenga abalamu eri obutuukirivu; okukubibwa kw'oyo kwe kwabawonya." 
1Peter2:25 Kubanga mwali mukyama ng'endiga; naye kaakano mukomyewo eri Omusumba era omulabirizi w'obulamu bwammwe. 
1Peter3:1 Bwe mutyo, abakazi, mugonderenga babbammwe bennyini; era bwe wabangawo abatakkiriza kigambo, balyoke bawaangulwenga si lwa bigambo naye olw'empisa z'abakazi baabwe;" 
1Peter3:2 kubanga bannalabanga empisa zammwe ennongoofu ez'okutya. 
1Peter3:3 Obuyonjo bwammwe tebubanga bwa kungulu, obw'okuluka enviiri n'okunaanika ezaabu n'okwambala engoye;" 
1Peter3:4 naye omuntu ow'Omwoyo atalabika, mu kyambalo ekitayonooneka, gwe mwoyo omuwombeefu omuteefu, gwe gw'omuwendo omungi mu maaso ga Katonda." 
1Peter3:5 Kubanga bwe batyo edda era n'abakazi abatukuvu, abaasuubiranga Katonda, bwe beeyonjanga, nga bagondera babbaabwe bennyini;" 
1Peter3:6 nga Saala bwe yagondera Ibulayimu, ng'amuyita omwami. Kale nammwe muli baana b'oyo, bwe mukola obulungi ne mutatiisibwa ntiisa yonna yonna." 
1Peter3:7 Bwe mutyo, abasajja, mubeerenga n'abakazi bammwe n'amagezi, nga mussangamu ekitiibwa omukazi ng'ekibya ekisinga obunafu, kubanga nabo basika bannammwe ab'ekisa eky'obulamu; okusaba kwammwe kulemenga okuziyizibwa." 
1Peter3:8 Eky'enkomerero, mwenna mubeerenga n'emmeeme emu, abasaasiragana, abaagala ab'oluganda, ab'ekisa, era abawombeefu." 
1Peter3:9 Temuwalananga kibi olw'ekibi, oba ekivume olw'ekivume; naye obutafaanana ng'ebyo, mubeere abasabira omukisa; kubanga ekyo kye mwayitirwa, mulyoke musikire omukisa." 
1Peter3:10 Kubanga, “Ayagala obulamu, N'okulaba ennaku ennungi, Aziyizenga olulimi lwe mu bubi, N'emimwa gye giremenga okwogera obukuusa." 
1Peter3:11 Era yeewalenga obubi, akolenga obulungi; Anoonyenga emirembe, agigobererenga." 
1Peter3:12 Kubanga amaaso ga Mukama gali ku batuukirivu, N'amatu ge gali eri okusaba kwabwe. Naye obwenyi bwa Mukama buli ku abo abakola obubi.”" 
1Peter3:13 Era ani anaabakolanga obubi, bwe munaanyiikiranga obulungi?" 
1Peter3:14 Naye newakubadde nga mubonyaabonyezebwa olw'obutuukirivu, mulina omukisa. Temutyanga kutiisa kwabwe, era temweraliikiriranga;" 
1Peter3:15 naye mutukuzenga Kristo mu mitima gyammwe okubeera Mukama wammwe, nga mweteekateeka bulijjo okuddamu buli muntu ababuuzanga ensonga ey'okusuubira okuli mu mmwe, naye n'obuwombeefu n'okutya." 
1Peter3:16 Mubeerenga n'omwoyo omulungi; bwe banabavumanga, abo ababoogerako obubi, olw'empisa zammwe ennungi mu Kristo balyoke bakwatibwenga ensonyi." 
1Peter3:17 Kubanga kye kisinga obulungi, okubonyaabonyezebwa olw'okukola obulungi, bwe kuba nga kwe kwagala kwa Katonda, okusinga okubonyaabonyezebwa olw'okukola obubi." 
1Peter3:18 Kubanga era ne Kristo yabonyaabonyezebwa olw'ebibi omulundi gumu, omutuukirivu olw'abatali batuukirivu, atuleete eri Katonda; bwe yattibwa omubiri, naye n'azuukizibwa omwoyo;" 
1Peter3:19 era gwe yagenderamu n'abuulira emyoyo egiri mu kkomera. 
1Peter3:20 Edda abataagonda, Katonda bwe yabagumiikiriza, mu nnaku za Nuuwa, eryato bwe lyali nga likyazimbibwa, amazzi mwe gaalokolera abantu si bangi, gye myoyo omunaana." 
1Peter3:21 Okubatiza okugerageranyizibwa n'amazzi gano kaakano ge gaabalokola mmwe mu kifaananyi eky'amazima, si kuggyawo mpitambi za mubiri, wabula okuddamu okw'Omwoyo omulungi eri Katonda, olw'okuzuukira kwa Yesu Kristo," 
1Peter3:22 ali ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda, bwe yamala okugenda mu ggulu; bamalayika n'abalina obuyinza n'abaamasaza bwe baateekebwa wansi we." 
1Peter4:1 Kale kubanga Kristo yabonyaabonyezebwa mubiri, nammwe mubeerengamu endowooza eyo; kubanga oyo yenna abonyaabonyezebwa omubiri ng'amaze okuleka ebibi;" 
1Peter4:2 mulyoke mumale ebiro byammwe ebisigaddeyo nga mukyali mu mubiri, si lwa kwegomba kw'abantu, naye olw'ebyo Katonda by'ayagala." 
1Peter4:3 Kubanga ebiro ebyayita byayinza okutumala okukolanga ab'amawanga bye baagala, n'okutambuliranga mu bwenzi, okwegomba, okwekamirira omwenge, ebinyumu, obutamiivu, n'okusinza ebifaananyi okw'omuzizo." 
1Peter4:4 Kaakano beewuunya kubanga temukyabeegattako mu bukaba obutalabwanga bwe butyo, era babavuma." 
1Peter4:5 Baliwoza ensonga eri oyo eyeeteeseteese okusala omusango gw'abalamu n'abafu. 
1Peter4:6 Eno ye nsonga Enjiri kyeyava ebuulirwa era n'abafu, balyoke basalirwe omusango ng'abantu bwe bali mu mubiri, naye babeere abalamu nga Katonda bw'ali mu mwoyo." 
1Peter4:7 Naye enkomerero ya byonna eri kumpi; kale mwegenderezenga mutamiirukukenga olw'okusaba. 
1Peter4:8 Okusinga byonna nga mulina okwagalananga okungi ennyo mwekka na mwekka, kubanga okwagala kubikka ku bibi bingi." 
1Peter4:9 Musembezeganyenga mwekka na mwekka awatali kwemulugunya. 
1Peter4:10 Buli muntu nga bwe yaweebwa ekirabo, mukikozesenga mwekka na mwekka bwe mutyo, ng'abawanika abalungi ab'ekisa kya Katonda ekitali kimu." 
1Peter4:11 Omuntu yenna bw'ayogeranga, ayogerenga ng'ebiragiro bya Katonda bwe biri; omuntu yenna bw'aweerezanga, aweerezenga ng'amaanyi Katonda g'amuwa bwe gali, mu byonna Katonda agulumizibwenga mu Yesu Kristo, alina ekitiibwa n'obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
1Peter4:12 Abaagalwa, temwewuunyanga olw'okwokebwa okuli mu mmwe, okujja gye muli olw'okubakema, ng'abalabye eky'ekitalo." 
1Peter4:13 Naye musanyukenga, kubanga mussa kimu mu bibonoobono bya Kristo, era nate mulyoke musanyukenga n'okujaguza ekitiibwa kye bwe kiribikkulibwa." 
1Peter4:14 Bwe muvumibwanga olw'erinnya lya Kristo, mulina omukisa; kubanga Omwoyo ogw'ekitiibwa era ogwa Katonda atuula ku mmwe." 
1Peter4:15 Kubanga omuntu yenna ku mmwe tabonyaabonyezebwanga nga mussi, oba mubbi, oba mukozi wa bubi, oba aketta ebya banne;" 
1Peter4:16 naye omuntu yenna bw'abonyaabonyezebwanga nga Omukristaayo, takwatibwanga nsonyi; naye atenderezanga Katonda mu linnya eryo." 
1Peter4:17 Kubanga obudde butuuse omusango gutandikirwe mu nnyumba ya Katonda; kale, oba nga gusoose gyetuli, enkomerero guliba gutya eri abo abatagondera njiri ya Katonda?" 
1Peter4:18 Era oba nga kizibu omutuukirivu okulokoka, atatya Katonda omwonoonyi alirabikira wa?" 
1Peter4:19 Kale n'abo ababonyaabonyezebwa nga Katonda bw'ayagala bamuteresenga Omutonzi omwesigwa, obulamu bwabwe olw'okukola obulungi." 
1Peter5:1 Kale mbuulirira abakadde abali mu mmwe nze mukadde munnammwe era omutegeeza w'ebibonoobono bya Kristo, era agabanira awamu ekitiibwa ekigenda okubikkulibwa." 
1Peter5:2 Mulundenga ekisibo kya Katonda ekiri mu mmwe, nga mukirabirira si lwa maanyi naye lwa kwagala, nga Katonda bw'ayagala; so si lwa kwegombanga amagoba mu bukuusa, naye lwa mwoyo ogwewaayo." 
1Peter5:3 Temwefuulanga bafuzi b'abo be mwateresebwa, naye mubeeranga byakulabirako eri ekisibo." 
1Peter5:4 Era Omusumba omukulu bw'alirabisibwa, muliweebwa engule ey'ekitiibwa etewotoka." 
1Peter5:5 Bwe mutyo, abavubuka, mugonderenga abakadde. Era mwenna mwesibenga obuwombeefu, okuweerezagananga mwekka na mwekka, kubanga Katonda aziyiza ab'amalala, naye abawombeefu abawa ekisa." 
1Peter5:6 Kale mwewombeekenga wansi w'omukono ogw'amaanyi ogwa Katonda, alyoke abagulumize ng'obudde butuuse." 
1Peter5:7 Musindiikiririzenga ku ye okweraliikirira kwammwe kwonna, kubanga ye ateeka ku mwoyo ebigambo byammwe." 
1Peter5:8 Mutamiirukukenga, mutunulenga; omulabe wammwe Setaani atambulatambula, ng'empologoma ewuluguma, ng'anoonya gw'anaalya." 
1Peter5:9 Oyo mumuziyizenga nga muli banywevu mu kukkiriza kwammwe, nga mumanyi ng'ebibonoobono ebyo bituukirira eri baganda bammwe abali mu nsi." 
1Peter5:10 Era Katonda ow'ekisa kyonna, eyabayitira ekitiibwa kye ekitaggwaawo mu Kristo, bwe mulimala okubonyaabonyezebwako akaseera akatono, ye yennyini alibatuukiriza, alibanyweza, alibawa amaanyi." 
1Peter5:11 Oyo aweebwenga obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
1Peter5:12 Mbaweerezza ebbaluwa mu mikono gya Sirwano ow'oluganda omwesigwa, nga bwe ndowooza, ey'ebigambo ebitono, nga mbabuulirira, ne mbategeeza ng'ekyo kye kisa eky'amazima ekya Katonda; mukinywererengamu." 
1Peter5:13 Omukyala ali mu Babbulooni mulonde munnammwe abalamusizza; ne Makko omwana wange. 
1Peter5:14 Mulamusagane n'okunywegera okw'okwagala. Emirembe gibeerenga nammwe mwenna abali mu Kristo. 
2Peter1:1 Simooni Peetero, omuddu era omutume wa Yesu Kristo, eri abo abaafuna okukkiriza okw'omuwendo omungi nga ffe bwe twakufuna mu butuukirivu bwa Katonda waffe era Omulokozi waffe Yesu Kristo;" 
2Peter1:2 ekisa n'emirembe byeyongerenga gye muli mu kutegeerera ddala Katonda ne Yesu Mukama waffe. 
2Peter1:3 Kubanga obuyinza bw'obwakatonda bwe bwatuwa byonna eby'obulamu n'eby'okutya Katonda, olw'okutegeerera ddala oyo eyatuyita olw'ekitiibwa n'obulungi bwe ye." 
2Peter1:4 Mu byo mweyatuweera ebisuubizo ebinene era eby'omuwendo omungi ennyo; olw'ebyo mulyoke muwone okuzikirira okuli mu nsi okuleetebwa okwegomba okubi, mulyoke mugabane ku bwa Katonda bwe." 
2Peter1:5 Olw'ensonga eno mufube okulaba nga, ku kukkiriza kwammwe mwongerako obulungi, era ne ku bulungi bwammwe mwongerako okutegeera;" 
2Peter1:6 era ne ku kutegeera kwammwe mwongerako okwegendereza; era ne ku kwegendereza kwammwe mwongerako okugumiikiriza; era ne ku kugumiikiriza kwammwe mwongerako okutya Katonda; 
2Peter1:7 era ne ku kutya kwammwe Katonda mwongerako okwagala ab'oluganda; era ne ku kwagala ab'oluganda kwammwe mwongerako okwagala. 
2Peter1:8 Kubanga bwe muba n'ebyo ne biba ebingi, bibafuula abatali bagayaavu n'ababala ebibala olw'okutegeerera ddala Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:9 Kubanga ataba n'ebyo ye muzibe w'amaaso awunawuna, bwe yeerabira okunaazibwako ebibi bye eby'edda." 
2Peter1:10 Kale, ab'oluganda, kyemunaavanga mweyongera obweyongezi okufubanga okunyweza okuyitibwa kwammwe n'okulondebwa, kubanga ebyo bwe munaabikolanga, temulyesittala n'akatono." 
2Peter1:11 Bwe mutyo mulyoke muyingizibwe mu bugagga obw'obwakabaka obutaggwaawo obwa Mukama waffe era Omulokozi waffe Yesu Kristo. 
2Peter1:12 Kyenaavanga njagala ennaku zonna okubajjukiza ebyo newakubadde nga mubimanyi ne munywerera mu mazima ge mulina. 
2Peter1:13 Era ndowooza nga kya nsonga, nga nkyali mu mubiri guno, okubakubirizanga nga mbajjukiza;" 
2Peter1:14 nga mmanyi nga nnaatera okuva mu mubiri guno, era nga Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo bwe yantegeeza." 
2Peter1:15 Kyenva nfuba ennyo okulaba nga ne bwendiba nga maze okufa, nga ebyo byonna musobola okubijjukira." 
2Peter1:16 Kubanga tetwagoberera ngero ezaagunjibwa n'amagezi bwe twabategeeza obuyinza n'okujja kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, naye twalaba n'amaaso gaffe obukulu bwe." 
2Peter1:17 Kubanga yaweebwa Katonda Kitaffe ettendo n'ekitiibwa, eddoboozi bwe lyava mu kitiibwa ekimasamasa ne lijja gy'ali bwe liti nti, “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa, gwe nsanyukira ennyo.”" 
2Peter1:18 Twawulira eddoboozi lino ery'ava mu ggulu, kubanga twali awamu naye ku lusozi olutukuvu." 
2Peter1:19 Era ekisinga obunywevu tulina ekigambo kya bannabbi; mukola bulungi okukiraba ekyo, ng'ettabaaza eyakira mu kifo eky'ekizikiza, okutuusa obudde bwe bulikya emmunyeenye ekeesa obudde n'eyaka mu mitima gyammwe." 
2Peter1:20 Okusookera ddala mutegeere kino, nti buli kigambo ekya bannabbi ekyawandiikibwa tekyajja nga kisinziira ku kunnyonnyola kwa nnabbi oyo." 
2Peter1:21 Kubanga tewali kigambo kya bunnabbi ekyali kireeteddwa mu kwagala kw'abantu, naye abantu baayogeranga ebyavanga eri Katonda, nga bakwatiddwa Omwoyo Omutukuvu." 
2Peter2:1 Naye era ne wabaawo ne bannabbi ab'obulimba mu ggwanga, era nga ne mu mmwe bwe waliba abayigiriza ab'obulimba, abaliyingiza mu nkiso obukyamu obuzikiriza, era nga beegaana ne Mukama waabwe eyabagula, nga beereetera okuzikirira okw'amangu." 
2Peter2:2 Era bangi abaligoberera obukaba bwabwe; balivumisa ekkubo ery'amazima. 
2Peter2:3 Era olw'omululu balibafunamu amagoba nga bakozesa ebigambo ebyagunjibwa, omusango gw'abo okuva edda tegulwa, n'okuzikirira kwabwe tekubongoota." 
2Peter2:4 Kuba oba nga Katonda teyasonyiwa bamalayika bwe baayonoona, naye n'abasuula mu lukonko n'abawaayo eri obunnya obw'ekizikiza, okubategekera omusango;" 
2Peter2:5 era n'atasonyiwa nsi ey'edda, naye n'awonya Nuuwa, omubuulizi w'obutuukirivu, ne banne omusanvu bokka, bwe yaleeta amataba ku nsi ey'abatatya Katonda." 
2Peter2:6 Yasirissa ebibuga Sodomu ne Ggomola n'abisalira omusango ng'abizikiriza n'okubifuula ekyokulabirako eri abo abatalitya Katonda; 
2Peter2:7 era n'alokola Lutti omutuukirivu, bwe yali nga yeeraliikirira nnyo olw'empisa ez'obukaba ez'ababi." 
2Peter2:8 Kubanga omuntu oyo omutuukirivu, bwe yatuulanga mu bo bulijjo bulijjo yanyolwanga mu mwoyo gwe omutuukirivu olw'ebikolwa byabwe eby'obujeemu." 
2Peter2:9 Mukama waffe amanyi okulokola abatya Katonda mu kukemebwa, n'okukuuma abatali batuukirivu nga babonerezebwa okutuusa ku lunaku olw'omusango;" 
2Peter2:10 naye okusinga bonna abatambula okugoberera omubiri mu kwegomba okw'obugwagwa ne banyooma okufugibwa. Abatatya, abakakanyavu, tebatya kuvuma ba kitiibwa," 
2Peter2:11 naye bamalayika, newakubadde nga be basinga amaanyi n'obuyinza, tebabaleetako musango gwa buvumi eri Mukama waffe." 
2Peter2:12 Naye abo, baliba ng'ensolo ezitalina magezi ezizaalibwa ensolo obusolo ez'okukwatibwanga n'okuzikirizibwanga, abavuma mu bigambo bye batategeera, balizikirizibwa mu kuzikirira kwe kumu ng'ensolo ezo," 
2Peter2:13 nga babonaabona olw'okwonoona kwabwe. Balowooza ebinyumu by'emisana nga lye ssanyu lyabwe. Balina amabala n'obwonoonefu, abatiguka mu mbaga zaabwe ez'okwagalana nga balya embaga awamu nammwe." 
2Peter2:14 Balina amaaso agajjudde obwenzi, agataleka kwonoona; nga basendasenda emyoyo egitali minywevu; nga balina omutima ogwamanyiira okwegomba; abaana ab'okukolimirwa!" 
2Peter2:15 Baleka ekkubo eggolokofu ne bakyama, nga bagoberera ekkubo lya Balamu omwana wa Beyoli, eyayagala empeera ey'obutali butuukirivu;" 
2Peter2:16 naye n'anenyezebwa olw'obujeemu bwe ye, endogoyi eteyogera bwe yayogera n'eddoboozi ly'omuntu yaziyiza eddalu lya nnabbi." 
2Peter2:17 Abo ze nzizi ezitaliimu mazzi, era lwe lufu olutwalibwa n'embuyaga, abakuumirwa ekizikiza ekikutte zigizigi." 
2Peter2:18 Kubanga, bwe boogera ebigambo ebikulu ennyo ebitaliimu, basendasenda mu kwegomba kw'omubiri, mu bukaba, abo abali okumpi n'okudduka abatambulira mu bukyamu." 
2Peter2:19 Babasuubiza okuweebwa eddembe, nga bo bennyini baddu ba kuzikirira; kubanga ekyo ekiwangula omuntu abeera muddu waakyo." 
2Peter2:20 Kuba bwe bamala okudduka okuva mu bugwagwa bw'ensi olw'okutegeerera ddala Mukama waffe era Omulokozi Yesu Kristo, naye ate ne beegombeza mu bwo omulundi ogwokubiri ne bawangulibwa, eby'oluvannyuma byabwe bisinga obubi eby'olubereberye." 
2Peter2:21 Kubanga kyandibadde kirungi gyebali singa tebaategeera kkubo lya butuukirivu, okusinga, bwe bamala okulitegeera, ate ne badda emabega okuleka ekiragiro ekitukuvu kye baaweebwa." 
2Peter2:22 Kibatuuseeko ng'olugero olw'amazima bwe luli nti, “Embwa eddidde ebisesemye byayo, n'embizzi enaazibbwa ezzeemu okwekulukuunya mu bitosi.”" 
2Peter3:1 Abaagalwa, kaakano eno ye bbaluwa eyokubiri gye mbawandiikira; mu ezo zombi mbakubiriza n'okubajjukiza amagezi gammwe gabeere agataliimu bukuusa;" 
2Peter3:2 okujjukiranga ebigambo ebyayogerwa edda bannabbi abatukuvu, n'ekiragiro ky'abatume bammwe ekya Mukama waffe era Omulokozi."

2Peter3:4 ne boogera nti, “Okusuubiza kw'okujja kwe kuli luuyi wa? Kubanga, bajjajjaffe kasookedde beebaka, byonna bibeera bwe bityo nga bwe byabanga okuva ku kutondebwa.”" 
2Peter3:5 Kubanga bagenderera okwerabira kino nga olw'ekigambo kya Katonda, eggulu lyaliwo dda, era n'ensi n'etondebwa okuva mu mazzi era n'ebeera wakati mu mazzi." 
2Peter3:6 Amazzi gano, ensi eyo ey'edda ge gagisaanyaawo n'ezikirira."

2Peter3:8 Naye kino kimu temukyerabiranga, abaagalwa, nga eri Mukama waffe olunaku olumu luli ng'emyaka olukumi (1,000), n'emyaka olukumi (1,000) giri ng'olunaku olumu." 
2Peter3:9 Mukama waffe talwisa kye yasuubiza, ng'abalala bwe balowooza okulwa; naye agumiikiriza gye muli, nga tayagala muntu yenna kubula, naye bonna batuuke ku kwenenya." 
2Peter3:10 Naye olunaku lwa Mukama waffe lulijja nga mubbi; eggulu lwe lirivaawo n'okuwuuma okunene n'ebintu eby'obuwangwa birisaanuuka olw'okwokebwa okungi, n'ensi n'ebikolwa ebigirimu birisirikka."

2Peter3:13 Naye nga bwe yasuubiza tusuubira eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya, obutuukirivu mwe butuula."

3John1:7 Kubanga baavaayo olw'Erinnya lye, nga tebakkiriza kuweebwa kintu kyonna okuva mu b'amawanga." 
3John1:7 Kubanga baavaayo olw'Erinnya lye, nga tebakkiriza kuweebwa kintu kyonna okuva mu b'amawanga." 
3John1:8 Kale kitugwanidde okusembezanga abali ng'abo tulyoke tukolenga omulimu gumu n'amazima.

3John1:9 Nnawandiikira ekkanisa ekigambo; naye Diyotuleefe ayagala okubeera omukulu waabwe tatukkiriza.

3John1:10 Bwe ndijja kyendiva njijukiza abantu ebikolwa bye by'akola ng'atwogerako ebigambo ebibi ebitaliimu. So n'ebyo tebimumala, naye era ye yennyini tasembeza ba luganda, era n'abaagala okubasembeza abaziyiza n'abagoba ne mu kkanisa."

3John1:11 Omwagalwa, togobereranga kibi, wabula ekirungi, akola obulungi ye wa Katonda, akola obubi nga talabanga Katonda." 
3John1:11 Omwagalwa, togobereranga kibi, wabula ekirungi, akola obulungi ye wa Katonda, akola obubi nga talabanga Katonda." 
3John1:12 Demeteriyo asiimibwa bonna, era n'amazima gennyini gaakikakasa, era naffe tukitegeeza; naawe omanyi ng'okutegeeza kwaffe kwa mazima."

3John1:13 Nnalina ebigambo bingi okukuwandiikira, naye saagala kukuwandiikira na bwino na kkalaamu."

3John1:15 Emirembe gibenga gy'oli. Mikwano gyo bakulamusizza. Lamusa n'abemikwano ng'amannya gaabwe bwe gali.
