Jude1:1 Yuda, omuddu wa Yesu Kristo, era muganda wa Yakobo, eri abo abayitibwa, abaagalwa mu Katonda Kitaffe, era abakuumirwa Yesu Kristo," 
Jude1:2 okusaasira n'emirembe n'okwagala byongerwengako gye muli. 
Jude1:3 Abaagalwa, bwe nnali nga nfuba okubawandiikira ku bulokozi bwaffe fenna, nnalaba nga nteekwa okubawandiikira nga mbakubiriza okulwanirira ennyo okukkiriza, abatukuvu kwe baaweebwa omulundi ogumu." 
Jude1:4 Kubanga waliwo abantu abayingira nga basensera abaawandiikirwa edda omusango guno, abatatya Katonda, abakyusa ekisa kya Katonda waffe, ne basinziira mu kyo okukola obukaba, ne beegaana Omukulu waffe omu yekka era Mukama waffe, Yesu Kristo." 
Jude1:5 Naye njagala okubajjukiza, newakubadde nga mwali mwabitegezebwa dda, nga Mukama, bwe yamala okulokola abantu mu nsi y'e Misiri, oluvannyuma n'azikiriza abatakkiriza." 
Jude1:6 Ne bamalayika abataakuuma bukulu bwabwe bo, naye ne baleka ekifo kyabwe, ya basiba n'enjegere ez'ennaku zonna, n'abassa eri ekizikiza ekikutte gye balindiririra okusalirwa omusango ku lunaku olukulu." 
Jude1:7 Nga Sodomu ne Ggomola n'ebibuga ebyali bibiriraanye, nabyo bwe byayendera ddala okwenkana nabo ne bikolanga eby'okwegomba okw'obuwemu, byafuuka kyakulabirako nga bibonerezebwa mu muliro ogutaggwaawo." 
Jude1:8 Mu ngeri y'emu abantu abo mu kulootaloota kwabwe boonoona omubiri gwabwe, bagaana obuyinza ne bavvoola ne bamalayika ab'ekitiibwa." 
Jude1:9 Olaba ne Mikaeri, malayika omukulu, bwe yali akaayana ne Setaani ku mubiri gwa Musa, teyayaŋŋaanga ku muvuma, naye yagamba nti, “ Mukama akunenye.”" 
Jude1:10 Naye abo bye byonna bye batategeera babivvoola, era ebyo bye bamanyi mu ngeri y'obutonde, okufaanana ng'ensolo, bibaleetedde okuzikirira." 
Jude1:11 Zibasanze! kubanga batambulira mu kkubo lya Kayini, olw'okwagala okufuna bakoze nga Balamu, bakuzikirira mu bujeemu nga Koola." 
Jude1:12 Abo baba nga amabala amabi ku mbaga zammwe ez'okwagalana, nga tebatya kwerigomba, nga beefaako bokka, nga bali ng'ebire ebitaliimu mazzi ebitwalibwa empewo; emiti egiwaatula, egitalina bibala, egyafa emirundi ebiri, egyakuuliibwa n'emirandira;" 
Jude1:13 bali ng'amayengo ag'ennyanja esiikuuse, bye bakola biswaza. Era balinga emmunyeenye eziva mu kkubo lyazo, eziterekeddwa ekizikiza ekikutte ennyo emirembe n'emirembe." 
Jude1:14 Era abo Enoka, eyaliwo ku mulembe ogw'omusanvu okuva ku Adamu, yaboogerako nti, “Laba, Mukama yajja n'abatukuvu be kakadde (1,000,000)," 
Jude1:15 okusalira bonna omusango, n'okusinza omusango bonna abatatya Katonda olw'ebikolwa byabwe byonna bye bakoledde mu butatya Katonda, n'olw'ebigambo byabwe byonna ebikakanyavu aboonoonyi abatatya Katonda bye bamwogeddeko.”" 
Jude1:16 Abo be beemulugunya, be banyiiga, abatambula ng'okwegomba kwabwe bwe kuli, era aboogerera waggulu ebigambo eby'okwewaana, era olaba bassaamu abantu ekitiibwa nga balina kye babagalako." 
Jude1:17 Naye mmwe, abaagalwa, mujjukirenga ebigambo ebyayogerwa edda abatume ba Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo;" 
Jude1:18 bwe baabagamba nti, “Mu biro eby'oluvannyuma walibaawo abantu abalibasekerera, nga batambulira mw'ebyo bye beegomba, era nga tebatya Katonda.”" 
Jude1:19 Abo be bavako okwawula, abantu ab'omubiri, abatalina Mwoyo." 
Jude1:20 Naye mmwe, abaagalwa, bwe mwezimba ku kukkiriza kwammwe okutukuvu ennyo, nga musaba mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu," 
Jude1:21 mwekuumirenga mu kwagala kwa Katonda, nga mulindirira okusaasira kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo olw'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Jude1:22 Ababuusabuusa mubasaasirenga; 
Jude1:23 era abalala mubalokolenga, nga mubakwakkula okubaggya mu muliro; era abalala mubasaasirenga mu kutya; nga mukyawa ekyambalo omubiri kye gwasiiga amabala." 
Jude1:24 Naye oyo ayinza okubakuuma obuteesittala, n'okubayimiriza mu maaso g'ekitiibwa kye nga temuliiko bulema mu kujaguza," 
Jude1:25 Katonda omu yekka Omulokozi waffe, ku bwa Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe, aweebwenga ekitiibwa, obukulu, amaanyi n'obuyinza, okuva mu mirembe gyonna egyayita, ne kaakano era ne mu emirembe egitaliggwaawo. Amiina." 
Revelation1:1 Okubikkulirwa kwa Yesu Kristo, Katonda kwe yamuwa okulaga abaddu be ebiteekwa okubaawo amangu, ate ye n'abiyisa mu malayika we gwe yatuma eri omuweereza we Yokaana," 
Revelation1:2 eyategeeza ekigambo kya Katonda n'obujulirwa bwa Yesu Kristo ku byonna bye yalaba. 
Revelation1:3 Alina omukisa oyo asoma, n'abo abawulira ebigambo by'obunnabbi buno, era n'abakwata ebiwandiikiddwa mu bwo: kubanga ekiseera kiri kumpi." 
Revelation1:4 Yokaana eri ekkanisa omusanvu ez'omu Asiya: Ekisa kibeerenga nammwe n'emirembe ebiva eri oyo abaawo era eyabaawo era ajja okubaawo; era ebiva eri emyoyo omusanvu egiri mu maaso g'entebe ye," 
Revelation1:5 era ebiva eri Yesu Kristo, omujulirwa omwesigwa, omubereberye w'abafu, era afuga bakabaka b'omu nsi. Atwagala, era eyatusumulula mu bibi byaffe olw'omusaayi gwe;" 
Revelation1:6 n'atufuula obwakabaka, bakabona eri Katonda Kitaawe; ekitiibwa n'obuyinza bibeerenga eri oyo emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Revelation1:7 Laba, ajja n'ebire, era buli liiso lirimulaba, n'abo abaamufumita; n'ebika byonna eby'omu nsi birimukubira ebiwoobe. Weewaawo, Amiina." 
Revelation1:8 “Nze Alufa ne Omega, Owolubereberye, era Owenkomerero” bw'ayogera Mukama Katonda, “abaawo era eyabaawo era ajja okubaawo, Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna.”" 
Revelation1:9 Nze Yokaana, muganda wammwe, abonaabonera awamu nammwe mu bwakabaka ne mu kugumiikiriza ebiri mu Yesu, nnali ku kizinga ekiyitibwa Patumo, olw'ekigambo kya Katonda era n'olw'okujulira ebya Yesu." 
Revelation1:10 Nnali mu Mwoyo ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe, ne mpulira emabega wange eddoboozi ddene, ng'ery'akagombe," 
Revelation1:11 ne ligamba nti, “ Nze Alufa ne Omega, Owolubereberye era Owenkomerero,Wandiika by'olaba mu kitabo, okiweereze ekkanisa omusanvu ez'omu Asiya: ey'omu Efeso, ey'omu Sumuna, ey'omu Perugamo, ey'omu Suwatira, ey'omu Saadi, ey'omu Firaderufiya, n'ey'omu Lawodikiya.”" 
Revelation1:12 Ne nkyuka okulaba eddoboozi eryayogera nange. Bwe n'akyuka, ne ndaba ebikondo by'ettaala musanvu ebya zaabu;" 
Revelation1:13 ne wakati w'ebikondo by'ettaala ne ndaba afaanana ng'omwana w'omuntu, ng'ayambadde okutuuka ku bigere, era ng'asibiddwa mu kifuba olukoba olwa zaabu." 
Revelation1:14 N'omutwe gwe n'enviiri ze byali byeru ng'ebyoya by'endiga era nga bitukula ng'omuzira, n'amaaso ge nga gali ng'ennimi z'omuliro," 
Revelation1:15 n'ebigere bye nga bifaanana ng'ekikomo ekizigule, ng'ekirongooseddwa mu muliro; n'eddoboozi lye nga liri ng'eddoboozi ly'amazzi amangi." 
Revelation1:16 Yali ng'akutte mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo emmunyeenye musanvu, ne mu kamwa ke ne muvaamu ekitala ekisala eky'obwogi obubiri, n'obwenyi bwe nga buli ng'enjuba bw'eyaka mu maanyi gaayo." 
Revelation1:17 Bwe nnamulaba, ne ngwa ku bigere ne mba ng'afudde. N'anteekako omukono gwe ogwa ddyo, ng'ayogera nti, “Totya, nze Owolubereberye era Owenkomerero," 
Revelation1:18 era Omulamu; nnali nfudde, era, laba, kati ndi mulamu emirembe n'emirembe, era nnina ebisumuluzo eby'okufa n'eby'Emagombe." 
Revelation1:19 Kati wandiika by'olabye, ebiriwo, n'ebigenda okubaawo oluvannyuma lw'ebyo." 
Revelation1:20 Ekyama ky'emmunyeenye omusanvu z'olabye mu mukono gwange ogwa ddyo n'ebikondo by'ettaala omusanvu ebya zaabu n'emmunyeenye omusanvu be bamalayika b'ekkanisa omusanvu n'ebikondo by'ettaala ze kkanisa omusanvu.” 
Revelation2:1 “Eri malayika ow'ekkanisa ey'omu Efeso wandiika nti, Bw'ati bw'ayogera oyo akwata emmunyeenye omusanvu mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, atambulira wakati w'ebikondo by'ettaala omusanvu eza zaabu," 
Revelation2:2 nti Mmanyi ebikolwa byo, n'okufuba kwo n'okugumiikiriza kwo, era nga toyinza kugumiikiriza babi, era wabakema abeeyita abatume so nga si bo, era wabalaba nga balimba;" 
Revelation2:3 mmanyi nga oli mugumiikiriza, era waguma olw'erinnya lyange, n'otokoowa." 
Revelation2:4 Naye nnina ensonga ku ggwe, kubanga waleka okwagala kwo okw'olubereberye." 
Revelation2:5 Kale jjukira gye wagwa, weenenye, okole ebikolwa bye wakolanga olubereberye. Bw'otolikola bw'otyo, ndijja gy'oli, ne nziggyawo ekikondo ky'ettaala yo mu kifo kyayo, okuggyako nga weenenyeza." 
Revelation2:6 Naye kino kye kirungi ky'olina, okyawa ebikolwa by'Abanikolayiti, nange bye nkyawa." 
Revelation2:7 Alina okutu awulire Omwoyo ky'agamba ekkanisa. Oyo awangula ndimuwa okulya ku muti ogw'obulamu, oguli wakati mu lusuku lwa Katonda.”" 
Revelation2:8 “Era eri malayika ow'ekkanisa ey'omu Sumuna wandiika nti, Bw'ati bw'ayogera ow'olubereberye era ow'enkomerero, eyali afudde ate n'aba omulamu" 
Revelation2:9 nti Mmanyi okubonaabona kwo n'obwavu bwo, naye ng'oli mugagga, n'okuvvoola kw'abo abeeyita Abayudaaya so nga si bo, naye kkuŋŋaaniro lya Setaani." 
Revelation2:10 Totya by'ogenda okubonaabona, laba, Setaani anaatera okusuula abamu mu mmwe mu kkomera okubagezesa, era mulibonaabonera ennaku kkumi (10). Beeranga mwesigwa okutuusa okufa, nange ndikuwa engule ey'obulamu." 
Revelation2:11 Alina okutu awulire Omwoyo ky'agamba ekkanisa. Awangula talirumwa n'akatono kufa kwa kubiri.” 
Revelation2:12 “Era eri malayika ow'ekkanisa ey'omu Perugamo wandiika nti, Bw'ati bw'ayogera oyo alina ekitala ekisala eky'obwogi obubiri," 
Revelation2:13 nti Mmanyi gy'otuula awali entebe ey'obwakabaka eya Setaani, kyokka ng'onywezeza erinnya lyange, era nga teweegaana kukkiriza kwange, ne mu biseera bya Antipa, omujulirwa wange omusajja wange omwesigwa, eyattirwa ewammwe, eyo Setaani gy'abeera." 
Revelation2:14 Naye nnina ensonga ntono ku ggwe, eyo olinayo abantu abagoberera okuyigiriza kwa Balamu, eyayigiriza Balaki okuteeka enkonge mu maaso g'abaana ba Isiraeri, n'abaliisa ebyaweebwa eri ebifaananyi n'okwenda." 
Revelation2:15 Era olinayo n'abakwata okuyigiriza kwa Banikolayiti. 
Revelation2:16 Kale weenenye; naye bw'otolyenenya, ndijja gy'oli mangu, ne nnwana nabo n'ekitala eky'omu kamwa kange." 
Revelation2:17 Alina okutu awulire Omwoyo ky'agamba ekkanisa. Awangula ndimuwa ku maanu eyakwekebwa, era ndimuwa ejjinja eryeru eriwandiikiddwako erinnya eriggya, eritamanyiddwa muntu mulala yenna wabula oyo aliweebwa.”" 
Revelation2:18 “Era eri malayika ow'ekkanisa ey'omu Suwatira wandiika nti, Bw'ati bw'ayogera Omwana wa Katonda, alina amaaso agali ng'ennimi z'omuliro, n'ebigere bye ebifaanana ng'ekikomo ekizigule," 
Revelation2:19 nti Mmanyi ebikolwa byo n'okwagala n'okukkiriza n'okuweereza n'okugumiikiriza kwo, n'ebikolwa byo eby'oluvannyuma nga bingi okusinga eby'olubereberye." 
Revelation2:20 Naye nnina ensonga ku ggwe, kubanga oleka omukazi Yezeberi, eyeeyita nnabbi, akyamya abaweereza bange mu bwenzi n'okulyanga ebiweebwa eri ebifaananyi." 
Revelation2:21 N'amuwa ebbanga okwenenya, n'agaana okwenenya obwenzi bwe." 
Revelation2:22 Laba ndi muteeka ku ndiri ne mulwaza, era mubonyebonye wamu ne be yayendanga n'abo, okuggyako nga beenenyezza ebikolwa byabwe." 
Revelation2:23 Era n'abaana be ndibatta n'olumbe, olwo ekkanisa zonna ziryoke zitegeere nga nze nzuuyo akebera emmeeme n'emitima, era nga ndisasula buli muntu ng'ebikolwa bye bwe biri." 
Revelation2:24 Naye mmwe mbagamba, abasigalawo ab'omu Suwatira, bonna abatalina kuyigiriza kuno, abatamanyi bya buziba bya Setaani, nga bwe boogera, sibateekako mmwe mugugu mulala." 
Revelation2:25 Wabula kye mulina mukikwatenga, okutuusa lwe ndijja." 
Revelation2:26 Oyo awangula n'akwatanga ebikolwa byange okutuusa ku nkomerero, ndimuwa obuyinza ku mawanga," 
Revelation2:27 era aligalunda n'omuggo ogw'ekyuma, n'agaasaayasa ng'ebibya ebibumbe bwe byatikayatika, nange nga bwe nnaweebwa Kitange." 
Revelation2:28 Era ndimuwa emmunyeenye ey'enkya. 
Revelation2:29 Alina okutu awulire Omwoyo ky'agamba ekkanisa.” 
Revelation3:1 “Era eri malayika ow'ekkanisa ey'omu Saadi wandiika nti, Bw'ati bw'ayogera oyo alina emyoyo omusanvu egya Katonda, n'emmunyeenye omusanvu, nti Mmanyi ebikolwa byo, ng'olina erinnya ery'okuba omulamu, era oli mufu." 
Revelation3:2 Tunula, onyweze ebisigaddeyo ebitannaba kufa, kubanga ssinnalaba mu bikolwa byo ebituukiridde maaso ga Katonda wange." 
Revelation3:3 Kale jjukira bye waweebwa ne bwe wawulira, obikwate era weenenye. Kale bw'ototunule, ndijja ng'omubbi, so tolimanya ssaawa gye ndijjiramu gy'oli." 
Revelation3:4 Naye olina amannya matono ag'abantu mu Saadi abatannayonoona ngoye zaabwe, balitambula nange mu ngoye njeru, kubanga basaanidde." 
Revelation3:5 Bw'atyo awangula alyambazibwa engoye enjeru, era sirisangula n'akatono linnya lye mu kitabo ky'obulamu, era ndyatula erinnya lye mu maaso ga Kitange, ne mu maaso ga bamalayika be." 
Revelation3:6 Alina okutu awulire Omwoyo ky'agamba ekkanisa.” 
Revelation3:7 “Era eri malayika ow'ekkanisa ey'omu Firaderufiya wandiika nti, Bw'ati bw'ayogera oyo omutukuvu, ow'amazima, alina ekisumuluzo kya Dawudi, aggulawo, ne wataba aggalawo, aggalawo, ne wataba aggulawo," 
Revelation3:8 nti Mmanyi ebikolwa byo. Laba, nkugguliddewo oluggi, omuntu yenna lw'atayinza kuggala; kubanga olina amaanyi matono, n'okwata ekigambo kyange, n'oteegaana linnya lyange." 
Revelation3:9 Laba, nga ab'omu kkuŋŋaaniro lya Setaani abeeyita Abayudaaya, so si bo, naye balimba; laba, ndibaleeta okujja okusinza mu maaso g'ebigere byo, era ndibamanyisa nga nnakwagala." 
Revelation3:10 Kubanga weekuuma ekigambo eky'okugumiikiriza kwange, era nange ndikukuuma obutayingira mu kiseera eky'okukemebwa, ekigenda okujja ku nsi zonna, okukema abo abatuula ku nsi." 
Revelation3:11 Njija mangu, nyweza ky'olina, omuntu yenna aleme okutwala engule yo." 
Revelation3:12 Awangula ndimufuula empagi mu Yeekaalu ya Katonda wange, so talifuluma nate bweru, nange ndiwandiika ku ye erinnya lya Katonda wange, n'erinnya ly'ekibuga kya Katonda wange, Yerusaalemi ekiggya, ekikka okuva mu ggulu eri Katonda wange, n'erinnya lyange eriggya." 
Revelation3:13 Alina okutu awulire Omwoyo ky'agamba ekkanisa.” 
Revelation3:14 “Era eri malayika ow'ekkanisa ey'omu Lawodikiya wandiika nti, Bw'ati bw'ayogera oyo Amiina, omujulirwa omwesigwa era ow'amazima, olubereberye lw'okutonda kwa Katonda," 
Revelation3:15 nti Mmanyi ebikolwa byo, nga tonnyogoga so tobuguma, waakiri obe ng'onnyogoga oba obuguma." 
Revelation3:16 Naye kubanga oli wa kibuguumirize, nga tonnyogoga so tobuguma, ndikuwandula okuva mu kamwa kange." 
Revelation3:17 Kubanga oyogera nti, Ndi mugagga, era ngaggawadde, so ssiriiko kye nneetaaga, so tomanyi ng'oli munaku ggwe era asaasirwa era omwavu era omuzibe w'amaaso era ali obwereere." 
Revelation3:18 Nkuwa amagezi okugula gye ndi ezaabu eyalongoosebwa mu muliro, olyoke ogaggawale, n'engoye enjeru, olyoke oyambale, era ensonyi ez'obwereere bwo zireme okulabika; era onguleko n'eddagala ery'okusiiga ku maaso go, olyoke olabe." 
Revelation3:19 Nze bonna be njagala mbanenya, era mbabuulirira, kale nyiikira weenenye." 
Revelation3:20 Laba, nnyimiridde ku luggi, nkonkona, omuntu yenna bw'awulira eddoboozi lyange, n'aggulawo oluggi, nnaayingira gy'ali, era nnaaliira wamu naye, naye nange." 
Revelation3:21 Awangula ndimuwa okutuula awamu nange ku ntebe yange ey'obwakabaka, era nga nange bwe nnawangula, ne ntuula wamu ne Kitange ku ntebe ye ey'obwakabaka." 
Revelation3:22 Alina okutu awulire Omwoyo ky'agamba ekkanisa.” 
Revelation4:1 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo ne ndaba, era, laba, oluggi olugguddwawo mu ggulu, ne mpulira eddoboozi ng'ery'akagombe lye nali nsoose okuwulira nga lyogera nange, ne liŋŋamba nti, “Linnya otuuke wano, nange nnaakulaga ebiteekwa okubaawo oluvannyuma lwa bino.”" 
Revelation4:2 Amangwago nga ndi mu Mwoyo, ne ndaba entebe ey'Obwakabaka eyali eteekeddwa mu ggulu, era nga waliwo eyali atudde ku ntebe eyo!" 
Revelation4:3 N'oyo eyali agituddeko yali afaanana ng'ejjinja erya yasepi n'erya sadiyo okuyakaayakaana, era ng'entebe eyo yeetooloddwa musoke ng'ayakaayakaana nga zumaliidi." 
Revelation4:4 Entebe ey'Obwakabaka yali yeetooloddwa entebe endala ez'Obwakabaka abiri mu nnya zituuliddwako abakadde abiri mu bana (24), nga bambadde engoye enjeru, era nga batikidde engule eza zaabu ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Revelation4:5 Ne mu ntebe eyo ne muvaamu okumyansa n'amaloboozi n'okubwatuuka. Mu maaso g'entebe waliwo ettaala ezaaka musanvu ez'omuliro, nga gy'emyoyo omusanvu egya Katonda." 
Revelation4:6 Ne mu maaso g'entebe waliwo ekiri ng'ennyanja ey'endabirwamu, nga kifaanana nga kulusitalo. Wakati w'entebe okugyetooloola, waliwo ebiramu bina ebijjudde amaaso mu bwenyi n'emabega." 
Revelation4:7 Ekiramu ekisooka kyali kifaanana ng'empologoma, eky'okubiri nga kifaanana ng'ennyana, eky'okusatu kyalina amaaso ng'ag'omuntu n'ekiramu ekyokuna kyali kifaanana ng'empungu ebuuka." 
Revelation4:8 Buli kimu ku biramu bino ebina, nga kirina ebiwaawaatiro mukaaga ebijjudde amaaso enjuyi zonna ne munda, era emisana n'ekiro awatali kuwummula byogera nti, “Omutukuvu, Omutukuvu, Omutukuvu, Mukama Katonda Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna, eyabaawo era abaawo era ajja okubaawo.”" 
Revelation4:9 Era ebiramu buli lwe byawanga ekitiibwa n'ettendo n'okwebaza oyo atudde ku ntebe, omulamu emirembe n'emirembe," 
Revelation4:10 abakadde abiri mw'abana (24) ne bavuunama mu maaso g'oyo atudde ku ntebe, era ne basinza oyo omulamu emirembe n'emirembe, era ne basuula engule zaabwe mu maaso g'entebe, nga boogera nti," 
Revelation4:11 “Osaanidde ggwe, Mukama waffe, Katonda waffe, okuweebwanga ekitiibwa n'ettendo n'obuyinza: kubanga ggwe wa bitonda byonna, era byabaawo lwa kusiima kwo, era byatondebwa.”" 
Revelation5:1 Ne ndaba mu mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'oyo eyali atudde ku ntebe omuzingo nga guwandiikiddwa munda ne kungulu, nga gusibiddwa nnyo n'envumbo musanvu." 
Revelation5:2 Ne ndaba malayika ow'amaanyi ng'abuuza mu eddoboozi ddene nti, “Ani asaanidde okubembula envumbo omusanvu n'okwanjuluza omuzingo?”" 
Revelation5:3 Ne watabaawo n'omu mu ggulu newakubadde ku nsi newakubadde wansi w'ensi, eyayinza okwanjuluza omuzingo wadde okugutunulamu." 
Revelation5:4 Awo nze ne nkaaba nnyo amaziga, kubanga tewaalabikawo eyasaanira okwanjuluza omuzingo newakubadde okugutunulamu." 
Revelation5:5 Awo omu ku bakadde n'aŋŋamba nti, “Tokaaba, laba, Empologoma ey'omu kika kya Yuda, ekikolo kya Dawudi, eyawangula, y'ayinza okwanjuluza omuzingo n'okubembula envumbo zaagwo omusanvu.”" 
Revelation5:6 Ne ndaba wakati w'entebe n'ebiramu ebina, ne wakati w'abakadde, Omwana gw'endiga ng'ayimiridde ng'afaanana ng'eyattibwa, ng'alina amayembe musanvu, n'amaaso musanvu, gye myoyo omusanvu egya Katonda, egitumibwa mu nsi zonna." 
Revelation5:7 N'agenda n'aggya omuzingo mu mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'oyo atudde ku ntebe. 
Revelation5:8 Bwe yakwata omuzingo, ebiramu ebina n'abakadde abiri mu bana (24) ne bavuunama mu maaso g'Omwana gw'endiga, buli muntu ng'alina ennanga n'ebibya ebya zaabu ebijjudde obubaane, kwe kusaba kw'abatukuvu." 
Revelation5:9 Ne bayimba oluyimba oluggya, nga bayimba nti, “Gwe osaanidde okutoola omuzingo n'okubembula envumbo zaagwo, kubanga wattibwa omusaayi gwo ne gununulira Katonda abantu okuva mu buli kika n'olulimi n'abantu n'eggwanga," 
Revelation5:10 n'obafuula obwakabaka ne bakabona ba Katonda, era be balifuga ku nsi.”" 
Revelation5:11 Awo ne ntunula, era ne mpulira eddoboozi lya bamalayika abangi bukadde na bukadde, nkumi na nkumi nga beetoolodde entebe wamu n'ebiramu n'abakadde," 
Revelation5:12 nga boogera mu ddoboozi ddene nti, “Asaanidde Omwana gw'endiga eyattibwa okuweebwa obuyinza n'obugagga n'amagezi n'amaanyi n'ettendo n'ekitiibwa n'omukisa.”" 
Revelation5:13 Awo ne ndyoka mpulira buli kitonde ekiri mu ggulu, ne ku nsi, ne wansi w'ensi, ne mu nnyanja n'ebirimu byonna nga bigamba nti, “Eri oyo atudde ku ntebe, n'eri Omwana gw'Endiga, omukisa n'ettendo, ekitiibwa n'amaanyi byabwe emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Revelation5:14 N'ebiramu ebina ne byogera nti, “Amiina.” N'abakadde ne bavuunama ne basinza." 
Revelation6:1 Awo ne ndaba Omwana gw'endiga nga abembula emu ku nvumbo omusanvu, ne mpulira ekimu ku biramu ebina nga kyogera n'eddoboozi ery'okubwatuka nti, “Jjangu.”" 
Revelation6:2 Ne ndaba, era, laba, embalaasi enjeru, n'oyo agituddeko ng'alina omutego, n'aweebwa engule, n'agenda ng'awangula, n'awangulira ddala." 
Revelation6:3 Bwe yabembula envumbo eyokubiri, ne mpulira ekiramu eky'okubiri nga kyogera nti, “Jjangu.”" 
Revelation6:4 N'evaayo embalaasi endala eya lukunyu, era oyo eyali agituddeko n'aweebwa ekitala ekinene n'obuyinza okuggyawo emirembe ku nsi, abantu battiŋŋane bokka na bokka." 
Revelation6:5 Bwe yabembula envumbo ey'okusatu ne mpulira ekiramu eky'okusatu nga kyogera nti, “Jjangu.” Ne ndaba, era, laba, embalaasi enzirugavu, n'eyali agituddeko ng'alina ekigera mu mukono gwe." 
Revelation6:6 Ne mpulira ng'eddoboozi wakati w'ebiramu ebina nga lyogera nti, “Ekiyi ky'eŋŋaano kya ddinaali, n'ebiyi bisatu ebya sayiri bya ddinaali, kyokka amafuta n'omwenge tobyonoona.”" 
Revelation6:7 Bwe yabembula envumbo ey'okuna, ne mpulira eddoboozi ly'ekiramu ekyokuna nga kyogera nti, “Jjangu.”" 
Revelation6:8 Ne ndaba, era, laba, embalaasi eya kyenvu, n'eyali agituddeko, erinnya lye Kufa, ne Magombe n'agenda naye. Ne baweebwa obuyinza ku kitundu ekyokuna eky'ensi, okutta n'ekitala n'enjala n'olumbe n'ensolo z'ensi." 
Revelation6:9 Bwe yabembula envumbo ey'okutaano, ne ndaba wansi w'ekyoto emyoyo gy'abo abattibwa olw'ekigambo kya Katonda, n'olw'obujulirwa bwe baalina," 
Revelation6:10 ne boogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene, nga boogera nti, “Olituusa wa, Mukama, omutukuvu era ow'amazima, obutasala musango n'obutawalana ggwanga olw'omusaayi gwaffe ku bo abatuula ku nsi?”" 
Revelation6:11 Ne baweebwa buli muntu ekyambalo ekyeru, ne bagambibwa okugira nga bawummula, okutuusa baweereza bannaabwe ne baganda baabwe lwe baliwera, abagenda okuttibwa, nga nabo bwe battibwa." 
Revelation6:12 Bwe yabembula envumbo ey'omukaaga, ne wabaawo ekikankano kinene, enjuba n'eddugala ng'olugoye olw'ebyoya, n'omwezi gwonna ne guba ng'omusaayi;" 
Revelation6:13 n'emmunyeenye ez'omu ggulu ne zigwa ku nsi, ng'omutiini bwe gukunkumula ebibala byagwo, nga gunyeenyezebwa empewo ennyingi." 
Revelation6:14 N'eggulu ne liggibwawo, ng'omuzingo gw'ekitabo bwe guzingibwa; na buli lusozi n'ekizinga ne biggibwawo mu bifo byabyo." 
Revelation6:15 ne bakabaka b'ensi, n'abalangira, n'abagabe, n'abagagga, n'ab'amaanyi, na buli muddu n'ow'eddembe ne beekweka mu mpuku ne mu mayinja ag'oku nsozi;" 
Revelation6:16 ne bagamba ensozi n'amayinja nti, “Mutugweko, mutukweke mu maaso g'oyo atudde ku ntebe, ne mu busungu bw'Omwana gw'endiga." 
Revelation6:17 Kubanga olunaku olukulu olw'obusungu bwabwe lutuuse, era ani ayinza okulugumira?”" 
Revelation7:1 Oluvannyuma ne ndaba bamalayika bana nga bayimiridde ku nsonda nnya ez'ensi, nga bakutte empewo nnya ez'ensi, empewo yonna ereme okukunta ku nsi, newakubadde ku nnyanja, newakubadde ku muti gwonna." 
Revelation7:2 Ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'alinnya okuva ebuvanjuba, ng'alina akabonero ka Katonda omulamu, n'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene ng'agamba bamalayika abana, abaaweebwa okwonoona ensi n'ennyanja," 
Revelation7:3 ng'ayogera nti, “Temwonoona nsi, newakubadde ennyanja, newakubadde emiti, okutuusa lwe tulimala okuteeka envumbo ku byenyi by'abaweereza ba Katonda waffe.”" 
Revelation7:4 Ne mpulira omuwendo gwabwe abaateekebwako envumbo, nga baali emitwalo kkumi n'ena mu enkumi nnya (144,000) okuva mu buli kika ky'abaana ba Isiraeri." 
Revelation7:5 Ab'omu kika kya Yuda abaateekebwako envumbo omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Lewubeeni omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Gaadi omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000)," 
Revelation7:6 Ab'omu kika kya Aseri omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Nafutaali omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Manase omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000)," 
Revelation7:7 Ab'omu kika kya Simyoni omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Leevi omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Isakaali omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000)," 
Revelation7:8 Ab'omu kika kya Zebbulooni omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Yusufu omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000), Ab'omu kika kya Benyamini abaateekebwako envumbo omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri (12,000)." 
Revelation7:9 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo ne ndaba, era laba, ekibiina kinene omuntu yenna ky'atayinza kubala, nga bava mu buli ggwanga, mu bika n'abantu n'ennimi, nga bayimiridde mu maaso g'entebe ne mu maaso g'Omwana gw'endiga, nga bambadde ebyambalo ebyeru, n'amatabi g'enkindu mu mikono gyabwe;" 
Revelation7:10 ne boogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene, nga boogera nti, “Obulokozi bwa Katonda waffe atudde ku ntebe n'Omwana gw'endiga.”" 
Revelation7:11 Ne bamalayika bonna baali bayimiridde nga beetoolodde entebe n'abakadde n'ebiramu ebina, ne bavuunama amaaso gaabwe mu maaso g'entebe, ne basinza Katonda," 
Revelation7:12 nga boogera nti, “Amiina, omukisa n'ekitiibwa n'amagezi n'okwebaza n'ettendo n'obuyinza n'amaanyi bibenga eri Katonda waffe emirembe n'emirembe, Amiina.”" 
Revelation7:13 Omu ku bakadde n'addamu, n'ambuuza nti, “Bano abambadde ebyambalo ebyo ebyeru, be baani, era bava wa?”" 
Revelation7:14 Ne mmugamba nti, “Mukama wange, gw'omanyi.” N'aŋŋamba nti, “Bano be baava mu kubonaabona kuli okungi, ne bayoza ebyambalo byabwe, ne babitukuza mu musaayi gw'Omwana gw'endiga.”" 
Revelation7:15 “Kyebavudde babeera mu maaso g'entebe ya Katonda; ne bamuweerezanga emisana n'ekiro mu Yeekaalu ye, n'oyo atudde ku ntebe alitimba eweema ye ku bo." 
Revelation7:16 Tebalirumwa njala nate, so tebalirumwa nnyonta nate, so omusana tegulibookya, newakubadde okwokya kwonna;" 
Revelation7:17 kubanga Omwana gw'endiga ali wakati w'entebe anaabalundanga, era alibaleeta eri enzizi ez'amazzi ag'obulamu, era Katonda alisangula buli zziga mu maaso gaabwe.”" 
Revelation8:1 Omwana gw'Endiga bwe yabembula envumbo ey'omusanvu, ne wabaawo akasiriikiriro mu ggulu okumala nga kitundu kya ssaawa." 
Revelation8:2 Ne ndaba bamalayika musanvu abaayimirira mu maaso ga Katonda ne baweebwa obugombe musanvu. 
Revelation8:3 Ne malayika omulala n'ajja ng'alina ekyoterezo ekya zaabu, n'ayimirira okuliraana ekyoto, n'aweebwa obubaane bungi, alyoke abuteeke mu kusaba kw'abatukuvu bonna ku kyoto ekya zaabu ekyali mu maaso g'entebe." 
Revelation8:4 N'omukka gw'obubaane ne gulinnya wamu n'okusaba kw'abatukuvu nga guva mu mukono gwa malayika mu maaso ga Katonda. 
Revelation8:5 Malayika n'atwala ekyoterezo, n'akijjuza omuliro ogw'omu kyoto, n'akisuula ku nsi, ne wabaawo okubwatuka n'amaloboozi n'okumyansa n'ekikankano." 
Revelation8:6 Awo ne bamalayika omusanvu abaalina obugombe omusanvu ne beeteekateeka okufuuwa. 
Revelation8:7 Malayika ow'olubereberye n'afuuwa, ne waba omuzira n'omuliro ebitabuddwa n'omusaayi, ne bisuulibwa ku nsi, n'ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'ensi ne kiggya, n'ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'emiti ne kiggya, na buli muddo omubisi ne guggya." 
Revelation8:8 Malayika ow'okubiri n'afuuwa, ekintu ekinene nga kifaanana ng'olusozi olunene olwaka omuliro ne kisuulibwa mu nnyanja, n'ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'ennyanja ne kifuuka musaayi;" 
Revelation8:9 n'ekimu eky'okusatu eky'ebitonde eby'omu nnyanja ne bifa, n'ekimu eky'okusatu eky'ebyombo ne kizikirira." 
Revelation8:10 Malayika ow'okusatu n'afuuwa, emmunyeenye ennene n'eva mu ggulu n'egwa ng'eyaka ng'omumuli, n'egwa ku kitundu eky'okusatu eky'emigga, ne ku nzizi z'amazzi." 
Revelation8:11 N'erinnya ly'emmunyeenye liyitibwa Abusinso, n'ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'amazzi ne kifuuka abusinso, n'abantu bangi ne bafa olw'amazzi, kubanga gaakaayizibwa." 
Revelation8:12 Malayika ow'okuna n'afuuwa, n'ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'enjuba ne kikubibwa, n'ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'omwezi, n'ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'emmunyeenye, ekitundu eky'okusatu ekyabyo kiryoke kizikizibwe, n'omusana guleme okwaka ekitundu kyagwo eky'okusatu, n'ekiro bwe kityo." 
Revelation8:13 Ne ndaba, ne mpulira empungu emu ng'ebuuka wakati w'eggulu, ng'eyogera n'eddoboozi ddene nti, “Zibasanze, zibasanze, zibasanze abatuula ku nsi, olw'amaloboozi agasigaddeyo ag'akagombe ka bamalayika abasatu abagenda okufuuwa!”" 
Revelation9:1 Malayika ow'okutaano n'afuuwa, ne ndaba emmunyeenye ng'eva mu ggulu ng'egwa ku nsi, n'aweebwa ekisumuluzo ky'obunnya obutakoma." 
Revelation9:2 N'asumulula obunnya obutakoma; n'omukka ne guva mu bunnya ne gulinnya ng'omukka gw'enkoomi ennene, n'enjuba n'ebbanga ne bibuna enzikiza olw'omukka ogwava mu bunnya." 
Revelation9:3 Ne mu mukka ne muvaamu enzige okujja ku nsi, ne ziweebwa obuyinza, ng'enjaba ez'obusagwa ez'omu nsi bwe zirina obuyinza." 
Revelation9:4 Ne zigambibwa obutayonoona muddo gwa nsi, newakubadde ekintu kyonna ekibisi newakubadde omuti gwonna, wabula abantu bokka abataliiko nvumbo ya Katonda ku byenyi byabwe." 
Revelation9:5 Ne ziweebwa obutabatta, wabula okubalumira emyezi etaano, n'okuluma kwazo kwali ng'okuluma kw'enjaba ey'obusagwa bw'eruma omuntu." 
Revelation9:6 Mu nnaku ezo abantu balinoonya okufa, so tebalikulaba n'akatono; era balyegomba okufa, era okufa nga kubadduka." 
Revelation9:7 Enzige zino mu ndabika zaali zifaanana ng'embalaasi ezitegekeddwa olutalo, ne ku mitwe gyazo nga kuli ng'okutikkiddwa engule eza zaabu, n'ebyenyi byazo nga biri ng'eby'abantu." 
Revelation9:8 Era obwoya bwazo nga buli ng'enviiri z'abakazi, n'amannyo gaazo gaali ng'ag'empologoma." 
Revelation9:9 Zaali zibikiddwako eby'omu kifuba nga biringa eby'ekyuma, n'eddoboozi ly'ebiwaawaatiro byazo nga liringa eddoboozi lya nnamuziga w'amagaali ag'embalaasi ennyingi nga zifubutuka okuyingira mu lutalo." 
Revelation9:10 Era zirina emikira egifaanana ng'enjaba ez'obusagwa nga giriko n'enkato, ne mu mikira gyazo nga mulimu obuyinza obw'okulumira abantu emyezi etaano." 
Revelation9:11 Zirina kabaka waazo malayika ow'obunnya obutakoma, erinnya mu Lwebbulaniya ye Abadoni, ne mu Luyonaani erinnya nga ye Apolwoni." 
Revelation9:12 Eky'entiisa ekisooka ne kiyita, naye ng'ekyaliyo bya mirundi ebiri ebijja!" 
Revelation9:13 Malayika ow'omukaaga n'afuuwa, ne mpulira eddoboozi nga lyogera okuva mu mayembe ana agali ku kyoto ekya zaabu ekiri mu maaso ga Katonda," 
Revelation9:14 ng'aligamba malayika ow'omukaaga eyalina akagombe nti, “Sumulula bamalayika abana abasibirwa ku mugga omunene Fulaati.”" 
Revelation9:15 Bamalayika abana ne basumululwa abaali bateegekeddwa essaawa n'olunaku n'omwezi n'omwaka, okutta ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'abantu." 
Revelation9:16 Ne mpulira omuwendo gw'eggye ery'abeebagala embalaasi gwali obukadde bibiri (200,000,000)." 
Revelation9:17 Era bwe nti bwe nnalaba embalaasi mu kwolesebwa kuno, n'abo abaali bazituddeko, nga bambadde eby'omu kifuba ng'eby'omuliro n'ebya kazigizigi n'eby'ekibiriiti: n'emitwe egy'embalaasi gyali gifaanana ng'emitwe gy'empologoma, ne mu bumwa bwazo ne muva omuliro n'omukka n'ekibiriiti." 
Revelation9:18 Mu bibonyoobonyo ebyo byonsatule, kwe kugamba nti omuliro n'omukka n'ekibiriiti ebyava mu bumwa bwazo, ne bitta ekitundu ekimu eky'okusatu eky'abantu." 
Revelation9:19 Kubanga obuyinza bw'embalaasi ezo bwali mu kamwa kaazo, ne mu mikira gyazo, kubanga emikira gyazo gyali gifaanana ng'emitwe gy'emisota, era nga gye zirumisa." 
Revelation9:20 N'abantu abaasigalawo, abatattibwa mu bibonyoobonyo ebyo, tebeenenya mu bikolwa by'emikono gyabwe, obutasinza balubaale, n'ebifaananyi ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza n'eby'ebikomo n'eby'amayinja n'eby'emiti, ebitayinza kulaba newakubadde okuwulira, newakubadde okutambula," 
Revelation9:21 ne bateenenya mu bussi bwabwe, newakubadde mu bulogo bwabwe, newakubadde mu bwenzi bwabwe, newakubadde mu bubbi bwabwe." 
Revelation10:1 Ne ndaba malayika omulala ow'amaanyi ng'akka okuva mu ggulu, ng'ayambadde ekire; ne musoke ng'ali ku mutwe gwe n'amaaso ge nga galinga enjuba, n'ebigere bye nga biringa empagi ez'omuliro." 
Revelation10:2 Yalina mu mukono gwe omuzingo omutono ng'agwanjuluzza, n'ateeka ekigere kye ekya ddyo ku nnyanja n'ekya kkono ku lukalu," 
Revelation10:3 n'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene ng'empologoma bw'ewuluguma. Bwe yayogerera waggulu ne wabaawo okubwatuka emirundi musanvu olw'eddoboozi eryo. 
Revelation10:4 Ebibwatuka omusanvu bwe byayogera amaloboozi gaabyo, nnali n'atera okuwandiika, ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu, nga lyogera nti, “Teeka envumbo ku ebyo ebibwatuka omusanvu bye byogedde, so tobiwandiika.”" 
Revelation10:5 Malayika gwe nnalaba ng'ayimiridde ku nnyanja ne ku lukalu n'ayimusa omukono gwe ogwa ddyo eri eggulu," 
Revelation10:6 n'alayira oli aba omulamu emirembe n'emirembe, eyatonda eggulu n'ebirimu, n'ensi n'ebirimu, n'ennyanja n'ebirimu, nti, tewaliba kulwa nate," 
Revelation10:7 naye mu nnaku z'eddoboozi lya malayika ow'omusanvu, bw'aliba anaatera okufuuwa, ekyama kya Katonda ne kiryoka kituukirira, ng'Enjiri bw'eri gye yabuulira abaddu be bannabbi." 
Revelation10:8 N'eddoboozi lye nnawulira nga liva mu ggulu, ne ndiwulira nate nga lyogera nange ne liŋŋamba nti, “Genda, otwale omuzingo nga mubikkule okuva mu mukono gwa malayika ayimiridde ku nnyanja ne ku lukalu.”" 
Revelation10:9 Ne ŋŋenda eri malayika, ne mugamba okumpa omuzingo. N'aŋŋamba nti, “Gutwale ogulye; gunaakaawa mu lubuto lwo, naye mu kamwa ko gunaaba guwoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki.”" 
Revelation10:10 Ne ntwala omuzingo omutono nga nguggya mu mukono gwa malayika, ne ngulya. Mu kamwa kange ne guwoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki, naye mu lubuto lwange ne gukaawa." 
Revelation10:11 Ne baŋŋamba nti, “Kikugwanidde okubuulira nate abantu bangi n'amawanga n'ennimi ne bakabaka.”" 
Revelation11:1 Ne mpeebwa olumuli olufaanana ng'omuggo, malayika n'aŋŋamba nti, “Golokoka, opime Yeekaalu ya Katonda, n'ekyoto, n'abasinzizaamu." 
Revelation11:2 Naye oluggya oluli ebweru wa Yeekaalu luleke tolupima, kubanga lwaweebwa ab'amawanga, balirinnyirira ekibuga ekitukuvu okumala emyezi ana mu ebiri." 
Revelation11:3 Nange ndibawa amaanyi abajulirwa bange babiri nga bambadde ebibukutu, okwogera obunnabbi okumala ennaku lukumi mu bibiri mu nkaaga (1,260).”" 
Revelation11:4 Abo gye mizeyituuni ebiri n'ettaala ebbiri eziyimirira mu maaso ga Mukama w'ensi. 
Revelation11:5 Era omuntu yenna bw'ayagala okubakola obubi, omuliro guva mu kamwa kaabwe, ne gwokya abalabe baabwe, era omuntu yenna bw'ayagala okubakola obubi, bwe kityo kigwana ye okuttibwa." 
Revelation11:6 Abo balina obuyinza okusiba eggulu, enkuba eremenga okutonnya mu nnaku ez'okutegeeza kwabwe, era balina obuyinza ku mazzi okugafuula omusaayi, era n'okubonyaabonya ensi n'ebibonyoobonyo byonna, emirundi emingi nga bwe baagala." 
Revelation11:7 Era bwe baliba nga bamaze okutegeeza kwabwe, ensolo eva mu bunnya obutakoma erirwana nabo, era eribawangula, era eribatta." 
Revelation11:8 Emirambo gyabwe girisigala mu nguudo z'ekibuga ekinene, ekiyitibwa mu mwoyo Sodomu ne Misiri, era Mukama waabwe mwe yakomererwa." 
Revelation11:9 Era okumala ennaku ssatu n'ekitundu emirambo gyabwe girirabibwa abantu n'ebika n'ennimi n'amawanga mu nguudo z'ekibuga, era emirambo gyabwe tegirikkirizibwa kuziikibwa mu ntaana." 
Revelation11:10 N'abo abatuula ku nsi balisanyuka ku lwabwe, ne bajaguza; era baliweerezagana ebirabo; kubanga bannabbi abo ababiri baabonyaabonya abatuula ku nsi." 
Revelation11:11 Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ziri essatu n'ekitundu, omwoyo gw'obulamu oguva eri Katonda ne guyingira mu bo, ne bayimirira ku bigere byabwe, okutya kungi ne kugwa ku bo abaabalaba." 
Revelation11:12 Ne bawulira eddoboozi ddene eriva mu ggulu, nga libagamba nti, “Mulinnye okutuuka wano.” Ne balinnya mu ggulu mu kire; n'abalabe baabwe ne ba balaba." 
Revelation11:13 Ne mu ssaawa eri ne wabaawo ekikankano ekinene, n'ekitundu eky'ekkumi eky'ekibuga ne kigwa; ne battibwa abantu kasanvu (7,000) mu kikankano: n'abo abaasigalawo ne bakwatibwa entiisa, ne bawa ekitiibwa Katonda ow'omu ggulu." 
Revelation11:14 Ekibonyoobonyo eky'okubiri kiyise, laba, ekibonyoobonyo eky'okusatu kijja mangu." 
Revelation11:15 Malayika ow'omusanvu n'afuuwa; ne wabaawo amaloboozi amanene mu ggulu, nga boogera nti, “Obwakabaka bw'ensi bufuuse bwa Mukama waffe, era bwa Kristo we, era anaafuganga emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Revelation11:16 N'abakadde abiri mu bana (24), abatuula mu maaso ga Katonda ku ntebe zaabwe ez'obwakabaka, ne bavuunama amaaso gaabwe, ne basinza Katonda," 
Revelation11:17 nga boogera nti, “Tukwebaza, ggwe Mukama Katonda, Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna, abaawo era eyabaawo, kubanga otutte amaanyi go amangi, n'ofuga." 
Revelation11:18 Amawanga ne gasunguwala, n'obusungu bwo ne bujja, n'entuuko ez'okusaliramu omusango gw'abafu, n'ez'okuweeramu empeera yaabwe abaddu bo bannabbi, n'abatukuvu, n'abatya erinnya lyo, abato n'abakulu; n'ez'okwonooneramu aboonoona ensi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Ne Yeekaalu ya Katonda ey'omu ggulu n'ebikkulwa; ne walabika mu Yeekaalu ye essanduuko y'endagaano ye; ne wabaawo okumyansa n'amaloboozi n'okubwatuka n'ekikankano n'omuzira mungi. 
Revelation12:1 N'akabonero akanene ne kalabika mu ggulu, omukazi ng'ayambadde enjuba, n'omwezi nga guli wansi w'ebigere bye, ne ku mutwe gwe nga kuliko engule ey'emmunyeenye kkumi na bbiri (12);" 
Revelation12:2 era ng'ali lubuto n'akaaba ng'alumwa era ng'abalagalwa okuzaala. 
Revelation12:3 Ne walabika akabonero akalala mu ggulu, era, laba, ogusota ogumyufu ogunene, ogulina emitwe omusanvu n'amayembe kkumi, ne ku mitwe gyagwo engule musanvu." 
Revelation12:4 N'omukira gwagwo ne guwalula ekitundu eky'okusatu eky'emmunyeenye ez'omu ggulu, ne guzisuula ku nsi. Ogusota ne guyimirira mu maaso g'omukazi, eyali agenda okuzaala, bw'alizaala, gulyoke guliire ddala omwana we." 
Revelation12:5 Omukazi n'azaala omwana ow'obulenzi, agenda okufuga amawanga gonna n'omuggo ogw'ekyuma, n'omwana we n'akwakulibwa n'atwalibwa eri Katonda, n'eri entebe ye ey'obwakabaka." 
Revelation12:6 N'omukazi n'adduka n'atuuka mu ddungu, gye yalina ekifo ekyateekebwateekebwa Katonda, balyoke bamuliisizenga eyo ennaku lukumi mu bibiri mu nkaaga (1,260)." 
Revelation12:7 Ne wabaawo olutalo mu ggulu, Mikaeri ne bamalayika be ne balwanagana n'ogusota; ogusota ne gulwana ne bamalayika baagwo;" 
Revelation12:8 Ogusota ne guwangulwa, gwo ne bamalayika baagwo ne batayinza kubeera nate mu ggulu." 
Revelation12:9 N'ogusota ogunene ne gusuulibwa, omusota ogw'edda, oguyitibwa Omulyolyomi era Setaani, omulimba w'ensi zonna; ne gusuulibwa ku nsi, ne bamalayika baagwo ne basuulibwa nagwo." 
Revelation12:10 Ne mpulira eddoboozi ddene mu ggulu, nga lyogera nti, “Kaakano obulokozi n'amaanyi n'obwakabaka bwa Katonda waffe, n'obuyinza bwa Kristo we buzze: kubanga aloopa baganda baffe, eri Katonda waffe emisana n'ekiro asuuliddwa wansi." 
Revelation12:11 Nabo baamuwangula olw'omusaayi gw'Omwana gw'endiga, n'olw'ekigambo eky'obujulirwa bwabwe, ne batayagala bulamu bwabwe okutuusa okufa." 
Revelation12:12 Kale musanyuke, eggulu n'abatuulamu. Zisanze ensi n'ennyanja: kubanga Omulyolyomi asse gye muli ng'alina obusungu bungi, ng'amanyi ng'alina akaseera katono.”" 
Revelation12:13 Ogusota bwe gwalaba nga gusuuliddwa ku nsi, ne guyigganya omukazi eyazaala omwana ow'obulenzi." 
Revelation12:14 Omukazi n'aweebwa ebiwaawaatiro bibiri ebinene ng'eby'empungu okubuuka okuva eri Ogusota okugenda mu ddungu mu kifo kye, gy'analiisizibwa ekiseera n'ebiseera n'ekitundu ky'ekiseera." 
Revelation12:15 N'omusota ne guwandula okuva mu kamwa kaagwo amazzi mangi nga ag'omugga, gagoberere omukazi gamutwale." 
Revelation12:16 Ensi n'eyamba omukazi, ensi n'eyasama akamwa kaayo, n'ennywa omugga ogusota gwe gwawandula okuva mu kamwa kaagwo." 
Revelation12:17 Ogusota ne gusunguwalira omukazi, ne gugenda okulwana n'ab'omu zzadde lye abaasigalawo abakwata ebiragiro bya Katonda, era abalina obujulirwa bwa Yesu." 
Revelation13:1 Ogusota ne guyimirira ku musenyu gw'ennyanja. Ne ndaba ekisolo nga kiva mu nnyanja, nga kirina amayembe kkumi n'emitwe musanvu, ne ku mayembe gaakyo nga kuliko engule kkumi, ne ku mitwe gyakyo amannya ag'obuvvoozi." 
Revelation13:2 N'ekisolo ekyo kye nnalaba kyali kifaanana ng'engo, n'ebigere byakyo nga biri ng'eby'eddubu, n'akamwa kaakyo nga kali ng'akamwa k'empologoma. Ogusota ne gukiwa amaanyi gaagwo, n'entebe yaagwo ey'obwakabaka, n'obuyinza bungi." 
Revelation13:3 Ne ndaba omutwe gumu ku mitwe gyakyo nga gufumitiddwa ekiwundu eky'okufa, n'ekiwundu eky'okufa ne kiwona. Ensi zonna ne zigoberera ekisolo ekyo nga zeewuunya." 
Revelation13:4 Ne basinza ogusota, kubanga gwawa ekisolo obuyinza bwagwo, ne kisolo ne bakisinza nga boogera nti, “Ani aliŋŋaanga ekisolo? Era ani ayinza okulwana nakyo?”" 
Revelation13:5 Awo ekisolo n'ekiweebwa akamwa akoogera ebikulu n'obuvvoozi era n'ekiweebwa n'obuyinza okumala emyezi ana mu ebiri (42). 
Revelation13:6 N'ekyasamya akamwa kaakyo okuvvoola Katonda, okuvvoola erinnya lye, n'eweema ye, n'abatuula mu ggulu." 
Revelation13:7 N'ekiweebwa okulwana n'abatukuvu, n'okubawangula, n'ekiweebwa obuyinza ku buli kika n'abantu n'olulimi n'eggwanga." 
Revelation13:8 Era bonna abatuula mu nsi abatawandiikiddwa mannya gaabwe mu kitabo ky'obulamu eky'Omwana gw'endiga eyattibwa okuva ku kutondebwa kw'ensi balikisinza. 
Revelation13:9 Omuntu yenna bw'aba n'okutu awulire. 
Revelation13:10 Omuntu yenna bwaba nga wa kunyagibwa, wakutwalibwa; Omuntu yenna bw'atta n'ekitala, wa kuttibwa na kitala. Awo we wali okugumiikiriza n'okukkiriza kw'abatukuvu." 
Revelation13:11 Ne ndaba ekisolo ekirala nga kiva mu ttaka, nga kirina amayembe abiri agafaanana ng'ag'omwana gw'endiga, nga kyogera ng'ogusota." 
Revelation13:12 N'ekikozesa obuyinza bwonna obwe kisolo kiri ekyasooka mu maaso gaakyo. N'ekisinzisa ensi n'abatuulamu ekisolo ekyasooka ekyalina ekiwundu eky'okufa ekyawonyezebwa. 
Revelation13:13 N'ekikola obubonero bunene, n'ekissa omuliro okuva mu ggulu ku nsi nga abantu balaba." 
Revelation13:14 N'ekirimba abatuula ku nsi olw'obubonero bwe kyaweebwa okukola mu maaso g'ekisolo; ne kigamba abatuula ku nsi, okukola ekifaananyi kye kisolo kiri ekyafumitibwa ekitala naye ne kitafa." 
Revelation13:15 Ekisolo ekyo n'ekiweebwa okufuuwa omukka mu kifaananyi eky'ekisolo kiri kyogere, era kittisse bonna abagaana okusinza ekifaananyi kye kisolo." 
Revelation13:16 Era n'ekiwaliriza bonna, abato n'abakulu, abagagga n'abaavu, ab'eddembe n'abaddu okuteekebwako akabonero ku mukono gwabwe ogwa ddyo oba ku byenyi byabwe;" 
Revelation13:17 olwo omuntu yenna aleme okugula oba okutunda, okuggyako ng'amaze okuteekebwako akabonero, lye linnya ly'ekisolo kiri oba omuwendo gw'erinnya lyakyo." 
Revelation13:18 Kino kyetaagisa amagezi. Alina okutegeera abalirire omuwendo gw'ekisolo; kubanga gwe muwendo gw'omuntu: n'omuwendo gwakyo guli Lukaaga mu nkaaga mu mukaaga (666). 
Revelation14:1 Ne ndaba, era, laba, Omwana gw'Endiga ng'ayimiridde ku lusozi Sayuuni, ng'ali n'abantu emitwalo kkumi n'ena mu enkumi nnya (144,000), nga erinnya lye n'erinnya lya Kitaawe nga gawandiikiddwa ku byenyi byabwe." 
Revelation14:2 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu, nga liringa ng'eddoboozi ly'amazzi amangi, era ng'eddoboozi ly'okubwatuka okunene. N'eddoboozi lye nnawulira nga liringa ery'abakubi b'ennanga nga bakuba ennanga zaabwe:" 
Revelation14:3 ne bayimba oluyimba oluggya mu maaso g'entebe ey'obwakabaka, ne mu maaso g'ebiramu ebina n'abakadde; so tewali muntu eyayinza okuyiga oluyimba olwo wabula abo emitwalo ekkumi n'ena mu enkumi ennya (144,000), abaanunulibwa okuva mu nsi." 
Revelation14:4 Abo be bateeyonoona eri abakazi; ne beekuuma. Abo be bagoberera Omwana gw'endiga buli gy'agenda. Abo baanunulibwa mu bantu okuba ebibala eby'olubereberye eri Katonda n'eri Omwana gw'Endiga. 
Revelation14:5 Tebayogeranga bya bulimba, nga tebaliiko kya kunenyezebwa." 
Revelation14:6 Ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'abuuka mu bbanga ery'omu ggulu ng'alina Enjiri ey'emirembe n'emirembe, okubuulira abatuula ku nsi, na buli ggwanga n'ekika n'olulimi n'abantu," 
Revelation14:7 ng'ayogera n'eddoboozi ddene nti, “Mutye Katonda, mumuwe ekitiibwa; kubanga ekiseera eky'omusango gwe kituuse, mumusinze eyakola eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja n'ensulo z'amazzi.”" 
Revelation14:8 Ne malayika omulala ow'okubiri n'agoberera, ng'ayogera nti, “Kigudde, kigudde Babbulooni ekinene ekyanywesa amawanga gonna ku mwenge gw'obusungu bw'obwenzi bwakyo.”" 
Revelation14:9 Ne malayika omulala ow'okusatu n'abagoberera, ng'ayogera n'eddoboozi ddene nti, “Omuntu yenna bw'asinza ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, era bw'akkiriza akabonero kaakyo ku kyenyi kye, oba ku mukono gwe," 
Revelation14:10 oyo naye alinywa ku mwenge ogw'obusungu bwa Katonda, ogufukibwa ogutatabulwamu mazzi mu kikompe eky'obusungu bwe; era alibonyaabonyezebwa mu muliro n'ekibiriiti mu maaso ga bamalayika abatukuvu ne mu maaso g'Omwana gw'endiga." 
Revelation14:11 N'omukka ogw'okubonyaabonyezebwa kwabwe gunyooka emirembe n'emirembe; so tebalina kuwummula emisana n'ekiro abasinza ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, na buli akkiriza akabonero, ly'erinnya lyakyo.”" 
Revelation14:12 Kino kikubiriza abatukuvu abakwata ebiragiro bya Katonda ne bakkiriza Yesu okuba abagumukiriza. 
Revelation14:13 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu nga lyogera nti, “Wandiika nti, Baweereddwa omukisa abafu abafiira mu Mukama waffe okuva kaakano.” “Weewaawo,” bw'ayogera Omwoyo, “balyoke bawummule mu kutegana kwabwe; kubanga ebikolwa byabwe bigenda nabo.”" 
Revelation14:14 Ne ndaba, era, laba, ekire ekyeru; ne ku kire ne ndaba atuddeko eyali afaanana ng'omwana w'omuntu, ng'alina ku mutwe gwe engule eya zaabu, ne mu mukono gwe ekiwabyo eky'obwogi." 
Revelation14:15 Ne malayika omulala n'ava mu Yeekaalu, ng'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene ng'agamba oyo atudde ku kire nti, “Teekako ekiwabyo kyo, okungule, kubanga ekiseera eky'okukunguliramu kituuse, kubanga ebikungulwa eby'ensi byengedde.”" 
Revelation14:16 N'oyo atudde ku kire n'asuula ekiwabyo kye ku nsi, n'ensi n'ekungulibwa." 
Revelation14:17 Ne malayika omulala n'ava mu Yeekaalu ey'omu ggulu, naye ng'alina ekiwabyo eky'obwogi." 
Revelation14:18 Ne malayika omulala n'ava ku kyoto, ye yalina obuyinza ku muliro; n'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene ng'agamba oyo alina ekiwabyo eky'obwogi, ng'ayogera nti, “Teekako ekiwabyo kyo eky'obwogi, onoge ebirimba by'omuzabbibu gw'ensi; kubanga ezabbibu zaagwo zengeredde ddala.”" 
Revelation14:19 Ne malayika n'asuula ekiwabyo kye ku nsi, n'anoga omuzabbibu gw'ensi, n'agusuula mu ssogolero eddene ery'obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Revelation14:20 N'egusogolerwa ebweru w'ekibuga, n'omusaayi ne guva mu ssogolero, obugulumivu bwagwo nga butuuka ku nkoba z'embalaasi, n'obugazi ekipimo kya mabanga lukumi mu lukaaga (1,600)." 
Revelation15:1 Ne ndaba akabonero akalala mu ggulu akanene ak'ekitalo, bamalayika musanvu nga balina ebibonyoobonyo musanvu eby'enkomerero, kubanga mu ebyo obusungu bwa Katonda mwe butuukiririra." 
Revelation15:2 Ne ndaba ekifaanana ng'ennyanja y'endabirwamu etabuddwamu omuliro, ne ndaba abo abaagana ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo n'omuwendo gw'erinnya lyakyo nga bawangudde, nga bayimiridde ku nnyanja y'endabirwamu, nga balina ennanga za Katonda." 
Revelation15:3 Ne bayimba oluyimba lwa Musa omuddu wa Katonda, n'oluyimba lw'Omwana gw'endiga, nga boogera nti, “Bikulu era bya kitalo ebikolwa byo, Mukama Katonda, Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna; ga butuukirivu era ga mazima amakubo go, ggwe Kabaka ow'emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation15:4 Ani atalitya, Mukama, n'ataliwa kitiibwa erinnya lyo? kubanga ggwe wekka ggwe mutukuvu; kubanga amawanga gonna galijja era galisinziza mu maaso go; kubanga ebikolwa byo eby'obutuukirivu birabise.”" 
Revelation15:5 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo ne ndaba, Yeekaalu eya weema ey'obujulirwa mu ggulu ng'egguddwawo," 
Revelation15:6 ne muva mu Yeekaalu bamalayika omusanvu abalina ebibonyoobonyo omusanvu nga bambadde amayinja, amalongoofu agamasamasa, era nga basibiddwa mu bifuba enkoba eza zaabu." 
Revelation15:7 Ekimu eky'oku biramu ebina ne kiwa bamalayika omusanvu ebibya musanvu ebya zaabu nga bijjudde obusungu bwa Katonda, aba omulamu emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation15:8 Ne Yeekaalu n'ejjula omukka oguva mu kitiibwa kya Katonda ne mu maanyi ge; so tewali muntu eyayinza okuyingira mu Yeekaalu, okutuusa ebibonyoobonyo omusanvu ebya bamalayika omusanvu lwe byatuukirira." 
Revelation16:1 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eddene eriva mu Yeekaalu, nga ligamba bamalayika omusanvu nti, “Mugende, muyiwe ebibya omusanvu eby'obusungu bwa Katonda ku nsi.”" 
Revelation16:2 Ow'olubereberye n'agenda, n'ayiwa ekibya kye ku nsi; awo amabwa amazibu ne gajja ku bantu abalina akabonero k'ensolo, era abasinza ekifaananyi kyayo." 
Revelation16:3 Ow'okubiri n'ayiwa ekibya kye mu nnyanja; ne wabaawo omusaayi ng'ogw'omufu, na buli kiramu kyonna ekyali mu nnyanja ne kifa." 
Revelation16:4 Ow'okusatu n'ayiwa ekibya kye mu migga ne mu nsulo z'amazzi, byonna ne bifuuka omusaayi." 
Revelation16:5 Ne mpulira malayika w'amazzi ng'ayogera nti, “Ggwe mutuukirivu, ggwe abaawo era eyabaawo, ggwe Mutukuvu, kubanga wasala omusango bw'otyo:" 
Revelation16:6 kubanga baayiwa omusaayi gw'abatukuvu n'ogwa bannabbi, ogwo gwe musaayi ggwe gw'obawadde okunywa, ekyo kibasaanidde.”" 
Revelation16:7 Ne mpulira ekyoto nga kyogera nti, “Weewaawo, Mukama Katonda, Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna, ensala yo ya bwenkanya era ya mazima.”" 
Revelation16:8 Ow'okuna n'ayiwa ekibya kye ku njuba; n'eweebwa okwokya abantu n'omuliro. 
Revelation16:9 Abantu ne bookebwa okwokya okunene: ne bavuma erinnya lya Katonda alina obuyinza ku bibonyoobonyo ebyo; ne bateenenya okumuwa ekitiibwa. 
Revelation16:10 Ow'okutaano n'ayiwa ekibya kye ku ntebe y'obwakabaka ey'ensolo; obwakabaka bwayo ne bubeera mu kizikiza, abantu ne beeruma ennimi zaabwe olw'obulumi," 
Revelation16:11 ne bavuma Katonda ow'omu ggulu olw'obulumi bwabwe n'olw'amabwa gaabwe, era tebeenenya mu bikolwa byabwe." 
Revelation16:12 Ow'omukaaga n'ayiwa ekibya kye ku mugga omunene Fulaati; n'amazzi gaagwo ne gakalira, ekkubo lya bakabaka abava ebuvanjuba liryoke liteekebweteekebwe." 
Revelation16:13 Ne ndaba nga giva mu kamwa k'ogusota, ne mu kamwa k'ensolo, ne mu kamwa ka nnabbi w'obulimba, emyoyo emibi esatu, nga giri ng'ebikere:" 
Revelation16:14 kubanga egyo gye myoyo gi dayimooni egikola obubonero; egigenda eri bakabaka b'ensi zonna, okubakuŋŋaanya olw'olutalo olw'oku lunaku olukulu olwa Katonda, Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna." 
Revelation16:15 “Laba, njija ng'omubbi. Aweereddwa omukisa atunula, n'akuuma ebyambalo bye, aleme okugenda obwereere, era baleme okulaba ensonyi ze.”" 
Revelation16:16 Ne gibakuŋŋaanyiza mu kifo ekiyitibwa mu Lwebbulaniya Kalu-Magedoni. 
Revelation16:17 Ow'omusanvu n'ayiwa ekibya kye mu bbanga; eddoboozi eddene ne liva mu Yeekaalu, mu ntebe y'obwakabaka, nga lyogera nti, “Kikoleddwa.”" 
Revelation16:18 Ne wabaawo okumyansa n'amaloboozi n'okubwatuka; ne wabaawo ekikankano ekinene, nga tekibangawo kasookedde abantu baba ku nsi, ekikankano ekinene, ekikulu bwe kityo." 
Revelation16:19 N'ekibuga ekinene ne kyawukanamu ebitundu bisatu, n'ebibuga eby'amawanga ne bigwa: ne Babbulooni ekinene ne kijjukirwa mu maaso ga Katonda, okukiwa okunywa ekikompe eky'obukambwe bw'obusungu bwe." 
Revelation16:20 Na buli kizinga ne kidduka, so n'ensozi tezaalabika." 
Revelation16:21 N'omuzira omunene ne gugwa okuva mu ggulu, buli mpeke ng'obuzito bwayo ttalanta ne gukuba abantu. Abantu ne bavvoola Katonda olw'ekibonyoobonyo eky'omuzira; kubanga ekibonyoobonyo kyagwo kinene nnyo." 
Revelation17:1 Awo omu ku bamalayika omusanvu abaalina ebibya omusanvu n'ajja n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti, “ Jjangu wano, nange nnaakulaga omusango gw'omwenzi omukulu atuula ku mazzi amangi;" 
Revelation17:2 bakabaka b'ensi gwe baayenda naye, n'abo abatuula ku nsi ne batamiira omwenge gw'obwenzi bwe.”" 
Revelation17:3 N'antwala mu ddungu mu Mwoyo: ne ndaba omukazi, ng'atudde ku nsolo emmyufu, ng'ejjudde amannya ag'obuvvoozi, ng'erina emitwe musanvu n'amayembe kkumi (10)." 
Revelation17:4 Omukazi ng'ayambadde olugoye olw'effulungu n'olumyufu, era n'ayonjebwa ne zaabu n'amayinja ag'omuwendo omungi ne luulu, ng'alina mu mukono gwe ekikompe ekya zaabu ekijjudde emizizo, bye bibi byonna eby'obwenzi bwe." 
Revelation17:5 Ku kyenyi kye kwali kuwandiikiddwako erinnya eryewuunyisa nti, “BABULOONI EKINENE, NNYINA W'ABENZI ERA OW'EMIZIZO GY'ENSI.”" 
Revelation17:6 Ne ndaba omukazi oyo ng'atamidde omusaayi gw'abatukuvu, n'omusaayi gw'abajulirwa abattibwa olwa Yesu. Bwe nnamulaba, ne nneewuunya nnyo nnyini." 
Revelation17:7 Malayika n'aŋŋamba nti, “ Kiki ekikwewuunyisa? Nze nnaakubuulira ekyama ky'omukazi, n'eky'ensolo emusitudde, erina emitwe omusanvu n'amayembe ekkumi." 
Revelation17:8 Ensolo gye walabye yaliwo era nga tekyaliwo era egenda okuva mu bunnya obutakoma n'okugenda mu kubula. N'abo abantu abali ku nsi amannya gaabwe nga tegawandiikiddwa mu kitabo eky'obulamu okuva ensi lwe yatondebwa balyewuunya, bwe baliraba ensolo nga yaliwo, ate ne tebeerawo, ate ne komawo nate." 
Revelation17:9 Kino kyetaaga omuntu alina amagezi n'okutegeera. Emitwe omusanvu ze nsozi omusanvu, omukazi z'atuddeko;" 
Revelation17:10 era be bakabaka omusanvu; abataano baagwa, omu w'ali, omulala tannaba kujja; era bw'alijja, kimugwanira okumalawo ekiseera kitono." 
Revelation17:11 N'ensolo eyaliwo era nga kaakano teriiwo, eyo ye y'omunaana, naye eringa ziri omusanvu, nayo yakubula." 
Revelation17:12 N'amayembe ekkumi (10) ge walabye be bakabaka ekkumi (10), abatannaba kuweebwa bwakabaka; naye baaweebwa obuyinza nga bakabaka, awamu n'ensolo, okumala essaawa emu." 
Revelation17:13 Abo balina okuteesa kumu, ne bawa ensolo amaanyi gaabwe n'obuyinza." 
Revelation17:14 Abo balirwana n'Omwana gw'endiga, n'Omwana gw'endiga alibawangula, kubanga ye Mukama w'abaami, era ye Kabaka wa bakabaka; era n'abo abali awamu naye, abayitibwa, abalonde, abeesigwa.”" 
Revelation17:15 N'aŋŋamba nti, “Amazzi ge walabye, omwenzi w'atudde, be bantu n'ebibiina n'amawanga n'ennimi." 
Revelation17:16 N'amayembe ekkumi ge walabye, n'ensolo, bano balikyawa omwenzi, balimulumba ne bamulwanyisa ne bamuleka ng'ali bwereere, balirya omubiri gwe, era balimwokera ddala omuliro." 
Revelation17:17 Kubanga Katonda yassa mu mitima gyabwe okukola kye yateesa, n'okuteesa awamu, n'okuwa ensolo obwakabaka bwabwe, okutuusa ebigambo bya Katonda lwe birituukirira." 
Revelation17:18 N'omukazi gwe walabye kye kibuga ekinene, ekifuga bakabaka bonna ab'oku nsi.”" 
Revelation18:1 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'akka okuva mu ggulu, ng'alina obuyinza bungi; n'ensi n'eyakaayakaana olw'ekitiibwa kye." 
Revelation18:2 N'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ery'amaanyi, ng'ayogera nti, “Kigudde, kigudde Babbulooni ekinene, ne kifuuka ekisulo kya balubaale, n'ekkomera erya buli dayimooni, n'ekkomera erya buli nnyonyi embi ekyayibwa." 
Revelation18:3 Kubanga olw'omwenge gw'obusungu bw'obwenzi bwe amawanga gonna gagudde; ne bakabaka b'ensi ne bayenda naye, n'abatunzi b'ensi ne bagaggawala olw'amaanyi g'obukaba bwe.”" 
Revelation18:4 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eddala eriva mu ggulu, nga lyogera nti, “Mukifulumemu, abantu bange, muleme okussa ekimu n'ebibi bye era muleme okuweebwa ku bibonyoobonyo bye:" 
Revelation18:5 kubanga ebibi bye bituuse mu ggulu, era Katonda ajjukidde ebyonoono bye." 
Revelation18:6 Mumusasule oyo nga naye bwe yasasula, era mumwongereko emirundi ebiri ng'ebikolwa bye bwe byali: mu kikompe kye yatabula mumutabulire emirundi ebiri." 
Revelation18:7 Nga bwe yeegulumiza n'akabawala, mumuwe bwe mutyo okubonaabona n'okunakuwala; kubanga ayogera mu mutima gwe nti, ‘Ntudde nga kabaka, so ssiri nnamwandu, so ssiriraba nnaku n'akatono.’" 
Revelation18:8 Kyebiriva bijja mu lunaku olumu ebibonyoobonyo bye, okufa, n'ennaku, n'enjala; era alyokerwa ddala omuliro; kubanga Mukama Katonda ow'amaanyi amusalidde omusango.”" 
Revelation18:9 Era bakabaka b'ensi, abayenda ne bakabawala naye, balikaaba balikuba ebiwoobe ku lulwe, bwe baliraba omukka ogw'okwokebwa kwe," 
Revelation18:10 baliyimirira wala olw'entiisa ey'okubonaabona kwe, nga boogera nti, “Zikisanze, zikisanze, ekibuga ekinene Babbulooni, ekibuga eky'amaanyi, kubanga mu ssaawa emu omusango gwo gutuuse.”" 
Revelation18:11 N'abatunzi ab'omu nsi bakaaba banakuwala ku lulwe kubanga tewali muntu akyagula bya maguzi byabwe. 
Revelation18:12 Ebya maguzi ebya zaabu, ne ffeeza, n'amayinja ag'omuwendo, ne luulu, ne bafuta ennungi, n'olugoye olw'effulungu, n'olw'aliiri, n'olugoye olumyufu; na buli muti ogw'omugavu, na buli kintu eky'essanga, na buli kintu eky'omuti ogw'omuwendo omungi ennyo, n'eky'ekikomo, n'eky'ekyuma, n'eky'ejjinja eddungi;" 
Revelation18:13 n'eky'akaloosa, n'ebinzaali, n'obubaane, n'omuzigo gw'omugavu, n'envumbo, n'omwenge, n'amafuta, n'obutta obulungi, n'eŋŋaano, n'ente n'endiga; n'obuguzi bw'embalaasi n'amagaali n'abaddu; n'emyoyo gy'abantu." 
Revelation18:14 “N'ebibala omwoyo gwo bye gwegomba bikuvuddeko, n'ebintu byonna ebiwooma n'ebirungi bikuvuddeko, so tebikyalabika nate.”" 
Revelation18:15 Abatunzi b'ebyo, be yagaggawaza, baliyimirira wala olw'entiisa y'okubonaabona kwe, nga bakaaba nga banakuwala;" 
Revelation18:16 “nga boogera nti Zikisanze, zikisanze, ekibuga ekinene, ekyayambazibwa bafuta ennungi n'olugoye olw'effulungu n'olumyufu, era n'ekiyonjebwa ne zaabu n'amayinja ag'omuwendo ne luulu!" 
Revelation18:17 kubanga mu ssaawa emu obugagga obungi nga buno buzikiridde.” Na buli mugoba na buli atambula wonna wonna mu lyato n'abalunnyanja ne bonna abakola emirimu egy'omu nnyanja, ne bayimirira wala," 
Revelation18:18 ne boogerera waggulu bwe baalaba omukka ogw'okwokebwa kwe, nga boogera nti, “Kiruwa ekifaanana ng'ekibuga ekinene?”" 
Revelation18:19 Ne bafuka enfuufu ku mitwe gyabwe, ne boogerera waggulu nga bakaaba nga banakuwala, nga boogera nti, “Zikisanze, zikisanze, ekibuga ekinene, bonna kye bagaggawaliramu abaalina ebyombo mu nnyanja olw'omuwendo gwe omungi, kubanga mu ssaawa emu gwazikirira." 
Revelation18:20 Mumusanyukire, eggulu nammwe abatukuvu nammwe abatume nammwe bannabbi; kubanga Katonda amusalidde omusango ku lwammwe.”" 
Revelation18:21 Malayika ow'amaanyi n'asitula ejjinja eddene ng'olubengo olunene, n'alisuula mu nnyanja, ng'ayogera nti, “Babbulooni, ekibuga ekinene, bwe kirisuulibwa bwe kityo n'okutandaggirwa okunene, so tekirirabika nate." 
Revelation18:22 Newakubadde eddoboozi ly'abakubi b'ennanga n'abalina ebivuga n'abafuuwa emirere n'abafuuwa amakkondeere teririwulirwa nate mu ggwe; newakubadde omugezi w'emirimu gyonna gyonna talirabika nate mu ggwe; newakubadde eddoboozi ly'olubengo teririwulirwa nate mu ggwe; 
Revelation18:23 newakubadde okutangaala kwe ttaala, tekulitangaala nate mu ggwe; newakubadde eddoboozi ly'awasa omugole n'ery'omugole teririwulirwa nate mu ggwe; kubanga abatunzi bo baali balangira ba nsi; kubanga mu bulogo bwo amawanga gonna gaalimbibwa." 
Revelation18:24 Era n'omusaayi gwa bannabbi n'abatukuvu n'ogwa bonna abattibwa ku nsi gwalabika mu ye.” 
Revelation19:1 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo ne mpulira ng'eddoboozi eddene ery'ekibiina ekinene mu ggulu, nga boogera nti, “Aleruuya; Obulokozi, n'ekitiibwa, n'obuyinza bye bya Katonda waffe:" 
Revelation19:2 kubanga ensala ye ey'emisango ya bwenkanya era ya mazima; kubanga asalidde omusango omwenzi omukulu, eyayonoona ensi n'obwenzi bwe, era awooledde eggwanga ku ye, lw'omusaayi gw'abaddu be”" 
Revelation19:3 Ate ne boogera nti, “Aleruuya. N'omukka gwe gunyooka emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Revelation19:4 N'abakadde abiri mu bana (24) n'ebiramu ebina ne bavuunama ne basinza Katonda atuula ku ntebe, nga boogera nti, “Amiina. Aleruuya.”" 
Revelation19:5 N'eddoboozi ne liva mu ntebe, nga lyogera nti, “Mutendereze Katonda waffe, mmwe mwenna abaddu be, abamutya, abato n'abakulu.”" 
Revelation19:6 Ne mpulira ng'eddoboozi ly'ekibiina ekinene, era ng'eddoboozi ly'amazzi amangi, era ng'eddoboozi ly'okubwatuka okw'amaanyi, nga byogera nti, “Aleruuya: kubanga Mukama Katonda waffe Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna afuga." 
Revelation19:7 Tusanyuke, tujaguze, tumuwe ekitiibwa ye: kubanga obugole bw'Omwana gw'endiga butuuse, ne mukazi we yeeteeseteese." 
Revelation19:8 N'aweebwa okwambala bafuta entukuvu ennungi,” kubanga bafuta eno bye bikolwa eby'obutuukirivu eby'abatukuvu." 
Revelation19:9 N'aŋŋamba nti Wandiika nti, “ Baweereddwa omukisa abo abayitibwa ku mbaga ey'obugole bw'Omwana gw'endiga.” N'aŋŋamba nti, “ Ebyo bye bigambo eby'amazima ebya Katonda.”" 
Revelation19:10 Ne nvuunama mu maaso g'ebigere bye okumusinza. N'aŋŋamba nti, “ Laba tokola bw'otyo: ndi muddu munno era ow'omu baganda bo abalina okutegeeza kwa Yesu: sinza Katonda.” Kubanga okutegeeza kwa Yesu gwe mwoyo gw'obunnabbi." 
Revelation19:11 Ne ndaba eggulu nga libikkuse; era, laba, embalaasi enjeru, n'eyali agituddeko, ayitibwa Mwesigwa era Ow'amazima; ne mu butuukirivu asala emisango era alwana." 
Revelation19:12 Era amaaso ge gwe muliro ogwaka, ne ku mutwe gwe engule nnyingi; era ng'alina erinnya eriwandiikiddwa, omuntu yenna ly'atamanyi wabula ye yekka." 
Revelation19:13 Era ng'ayambadde ekyambalo ekyamansirwako omusaayi: n'erinnya lye ne liyitibwa Kigambo kya Katonda. 
Revelation19:14 N'eggye ery'omu ggulu ne limugoberera ku mbalaasi enjeru, nga bambadde bafuta enjeru ennungi." 
Revelation19:15 Ne mu kamwa ke muvaamu ekitala eky'obwogi ateme amawanga nakyo: era alibafuga n'omuggo ogw'ekyuma: era alinnya essogolero ly'omwenge gw'obusungu bw'obukambwe bwa Katonda Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna. 
Revelation19:16 Era alina ku kyambalo kye ne ku kisambi kye erinnya eriwandiikiddwa nti, “KABAKA WA BAKABAKA, ERA MUKAMA W'ABAAMI.”" 
Revelation19:17 Ne ndaba malayika ng'ayimiridde mu njuba; n'ayogerera waggulu n'eddoboozi ddene, ng'agamba ennyonyi zonna ezibuuka mu bbanga nti, “ Mujje mukuŋŋaane ku mbaga enkulu eya Katonda;" 
Revelation19:18 mulyoke mulye ennyama ya bakabaka, n'ennyama ey'abagabe, n'ennyama ey'ab'amaanyi, n'ennyama ey'embalaasi n'ey'abo abazituulako, n'ennyama eya bonna ab'eddembe era n'abaddu, n'abato n'abakulu.”" 
Revelation19:19 Ne ndaba ensolo, ne bakabaka b'ensi, n'eggye lyabwe nga bakuŋŋaanye okulwana n'oyo eyali atudde ku mbalaasi n'eggye lye." 
Revelation19:20 Ensolo n'ekwatibwa era wamu nayo nnabbi ow'obulimba eyakola obubonero mu maaso gaayo bwe yalimbisa abo abakkiriza akabonero k'ensolo, n'abo abasinza ekifaananyi kyayo: bombi ne basuulibwa nga balamu mu nnyanja ey'omuliro eyaka n'ekibiriiti:" 
Revelation19:21 n'abaasigalawo ne battibwa n'ekitala ky'oyo eyali atudde ku mbalaasi, ekiva mu kamwa ke: n'ennyonyi zonna ne zikkutira ku nnyama yaabwe." 
Revelation20:1 Ne Ndaba malayika ng'akka okuva mu ggulu, ng'alina ekisumuluzo ky'obunnya obutakoma n'olujegere olunene mu mukono gwe." 
Revelation20:2 N'akwata ogusota, omusota ogw'edda, ye Mulyolyomi era Setaani, n'agusibira emyaka lukumi (1,000)," 
Revelation20:3 n'agusuula mu bunnya obutakoma n'aggalawo n'ateekako envumbo, gulemenga okulimba amawanga nate, okutuusa emyaka lukumi (1,000) lwe giriggwaako; oluvannyuma lwagyo kigugwanira okusumululwa okumala akaseera katono." 
Revelation20:4 Ne ndaba entebe ez'obwakabaka, nga kuliko abatuddeko, ne baweebwa okusala omusango; n'emyoyo gyabwe abaatemwako emitwe olw'okujuliranga Yesu n'olw'ekigambo kya Katonda, n'abo abatasinza nsolo newakubadde ekifaananyi kyayo, so tebakkiriza kabonero kaakyo ku byenyi byabwe ne ku mikono gyabwe ne baba balamu, ne bafugiranga wamu ne Kristo okumala emyaka lukumi (1,000)." 
Revelation20:5 Abafu abalala tebaaba balamu okutuusa ng'emyaka olukumi (1,000) giweddeko. Kuno kwe kuzuukira okw'olubereberye." 
Revelation20:6 Aweereddwa omukisa, era mutukuvu alizuukirira mu kuzuukira okusooka, kubanga okufa okw'okubiri tekulina buyinza ku bo, naye banaabeeranga bakabona ba Katonda era ba Kristo, era banaafugiranga wamu naye okumala emyaka lukumi (1,000)." 
Revelation20:7 Awo, emyaka egyo olukumi (1,000) bwe giriggwaako, Setaani n'alyoka asumululwa mu kkomera lye," 
Revelation20:8 era aligenda okulimba amawanga ag'omu nsonda ennya ez'ensi, Googi ne Magoogi, okubakuŋŋaanya ku lutalo: omuwendo gwabwe guliba ng'omusenyu gw'ennyanja." 
Revelation20:9 Ne batabaala ensi engazi, ne bazingiza olusiisira olw'abatukuvu n'ekibuga ekyagalwa, kyokka omuliro ne gukka okuva mu ggulu, ne gubookya ne gubamalawo." 
Revelation20:10 Ne Setaani eyabalimbanga n'asuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro ne salufa, era omuli ensolo ne nnabbi ow'obulimba; era banaabonyaabonyezebwanga emisana n'ekiro emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation20:11 Ne ndaba entebe ey'obwakabaka ennene enjeru, n'oyo eyali agituddeko, eggulu n'ensi ne bidduka mu maaso ge; era tebyazuulirwa na kifo." 
Revelation20:12 Ne ndaba abafu, ab'ekitiibwa n'abatali ba kitiibwa, nga bayimiridde mu maaso g'entebe; ebitabo ne bibikkulwa, n'ekitabo ekirala ne kibikkulwa, kye ky'obulamu: abafu ne basalirwa omusango okusinziira ku ebyo ebyali biwandiikiddwa mu bitabo, ng'ebikolwa byabwe bwe byali." 
Revelation20:13 N'ennyanja n'ereeta abafu abalimu, n'okufa n'Amagombe ne bireeta abafu abalimu: ne basalirwa omusango buli muntu ng'ebikolwa byabwe bwe byali." 
Revelation20:14 N'okufa n'Amagombe ne bisuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro. Kuno kwe kufa okw'okubiri, okwo mu nnyanja ey'omuliro." 
Revelation20:15 Era omuntu yenna eyasangibwa ng'erinnya lye teriwandiikiddwa mu kitabo eky'obulamu, n'asuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro." 
Revelation21:1 Awo ne ndaba eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya: kubanga eggulu ery'olubereberye n'ensi eyolubereberye nga bigenze nga n'ennyanja tekyaliwo. 
Revelation21:2 Ne ndaba ekibuga ekitukuvu, Yerusaalemi ekiggya, nga kikka okuva mu ggulu ewa Katonda, nga kitegekeddwa ng'omugole ayonjereddwa bba." 
Revelation21:3 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eddene eriva mu ntebe nga lyogera nti, “Laba, eweema ya Katonda eri awamu n'abantu, era anaatuulanga wamu nabo, nabo banaabeeranga bantu be, ne Katonda yennyini anaabeeranga wamu nabo, era anaabeeranga Katonda waabwe." 
Revelation21:4 Alisangula buli zziga mu maaso gaabwe, olwo nga tewakyali kufa, wadde ennaku, wadde okukaaba newakubadde okulumwa: kubanga ebyo byonna ebyaliwo nga biweddewo.”" 
Revelation21:5 N'oyo atuula ku ntebe n'ayogera nti, “ Laba, byonna mbizzizza buggya.” N'ayogera nti, “ Wandiika bino, kubanga ebigambo ebyo bya bwesigwa era bya mazima.”" 
Revelation21:6 N'aŋŋamba nti, “ Bituukiridde. Nze Alufa ne Omega, okusooka n'enkomerero. Ndimuwa buwa oyo alina ennyonta okunywa mu luzzi olw'amazzi ag'obulamu." 
Revelation21:7 Awangula alisikira ebyo, nange nnaabeeranga Katonda we, naye anaabanga mwana wange." 
Revelation21:8 Naye abati, n'abatakkiriza, n'abagwagwa, n'abassi, n'abenzi, n'abalogo, n'abasinza ebifaananyi, n'abalimba bonna, omugabo gwabwe gulibeera mu nnyanja eyaka n'omuliro ne salufa, okwo kwe kufa okwokubiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Awo omu ku bamalayika omusanvu abalina ebibya omusanvu, ebyalimu ebibonyoobonyo omusanvu eby'enkomerero najja n'ayogera nange, ng'agamba nti, “ Jjangu, nkulage omugole, omukyala w'Omwana gw'endiga.”" 
Revelation21:10 N'antwalira mu Mwoyo ku lusozi olunene oluwanvu, n'andaga ekibuga ekitukuvu Yerusaalemi nga kikka okuva mu ggulu ewa Katonda," 
Revelation21:11 nga kirina ekitiibwa kya Katonda: okumasamasa kwakyo nga kulinga okw'ejjinja ery'omuwendo omungi ennyo, erya yasepi, eritangalijja." 
Revelation21:12 Bbugwe waakyo yali mugazi era nga muwanvu, nga kirina emiryango kkumi n'ebiri (12), ne ku miryango nga kuliko bamalayika kkumi na babiri (12), n'amannya g'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri (12) eby'abaana ba Isiraeri nga gawandiikiddwa ku miryango gyakyo." 
Revelation21:13 Ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba kwaliko emiryango esatu ne ku luuyi olw'obukiikakkono kwaliko emiryango esatu ne ku luuyi olw'obukiikaddyo kwaliko emiryango esatu ne ebugwanjuba emiryango esatu. 
Revelation21:14 Ne bbugwe w'ekibuga yalina emisingi kkumi n'ebiri (12), nga kuwandiikiddwako amannya kkumi n'abiri (12) ag'abatume ekkumi n'ababiri ab'Omwana gw'endiga." 
Revelation21:15 Ne Malayika eyayogera nange yalina omuggo ogwa zaabu ogw'okupimisa ekibuga n'emiryango gyakyo, ne bbugwe waakyo." 
Revelation21:16 N'ekibuga kyali kyenkanankana enjuyi zonna, n'obuwanvu bwakyo nga bwenkana n'obugazi bwakyo. N'agera ekibuga n'omuggo, ekipimo kya mabanga omutwalo gumu mw'enkumi bbiri (12,000), obuwanvu n'obugazi n'obugulumivu bwakyo nga byenkanankana." 
Revelation21:17 Ate n'apima bbugwe waakyo, emikono kikumi mu ana mw'ena (144), ng'ekipimo ky'omuntu, n'ekya malayika bwe kiri." 
Revelation21:18 Bbugwe waakyo yali azimbiddwa n'amayinja aga yasepi, nga n'ekibuga kya zaabu omulungi, nga kitangalijja ng'endabirwamu ennungi." 
Revelation21:19 Emisingi gya bbugwe w'ekibuga gyayonjebwa na buli jjinja ery'omuwendo omungi. Omusingi ogusooka nga gwa yasepi, ogwokubiri gwa safiro, ogwokusatu gwa kalukedoni, ogwokuna gwa nnawandagala," 
Revelation21:20 ogw'okutaano gwa sadonukisi, ogw'omukaaga gwa sadiyo, ogw'omusanvu gwa kerusoliso, ogw'omunaana gwa berulo ogw'omwenda gwa topazi, ogw'ekkumi gwa kerusoperaso, ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu gwa kuwakinso n'ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri nga gwa mesusito." 
Revelation21:21 N'emiryango ekkumi n'ebiri nga gyakolebwa mu luulu kkumi na bbiri, nga buli gumu ku miryango gwali gwa luulu emu n'oluguudo olw'ekibuga lwa zaabu ennungi etangalijja ng'endabirwamu." 
Revelation21:22 Ssaalabamu Yeekaalu mu kyo, kubanga Mukama Katonda Omuyinza w'ebintu byonna, n'Omwana gw'endiga, ye Yeekaalu yaakyo." 
Revelation21:23 Era ekibuga nga tekyetaaga njuba wadde omwezi okukyakira, kubanga ekitiibwa kya Katonda kyakimulisa, era n'ettaala yaakyo nga ye Mwana gw'endiga." 
Revelation21:24 N'amawanga ganaatambuliranga mu kitangaala kyakyo, ne bakabaka b'ensi balireeta ekitiibwa kyabwe mu kyo." 
Revelation21:25 N'emiryango gyakyo tegiggalwenga emisana, era yo teribaayo kiro." 
Revelation21:26 Kirifuna ekitiibwa n'ettendo eby'amawanga. 
Revelation21:27 Temuliyingira mu kyo kintu kyonna ekitali kirongoofu, wadde oyo akola eky'omuzizo oba omulimba, wabula abo bokka abawandiikiddwa mu kitabo eky'obulamu eky'Omwana gw'Endiga." 
Revelation22:1 Awo Malayika n'andaga omugga ogw'amazzi ag'obulamu, ogumasamasa ng'endabirwamu, nga guva mu ntebe ya Katonda n'ey'Omwana gw'endiga," 
Revelation22:2 nga gukulukutira wakati w'oluguudo lw'ekibuga. Era ku buli ludda olw'omugga kwaliko omuti ogw'obulamu, nga buli gumu gubala ebibala kkumi na bibiri (12) eby'engeri endala buli mwezi, n'amakoola g'omuti nga gakuwonya amawanga." 
Revelation22:3 Mu kibuga ekyo teribaayo nate kikolimo. Entebe ya Katonda n'ey'Omwana gw'endiga eneebeeranga omwo, n'abaddu be banaamuweerezanga," 
Revelation22:4 era banaamulabanga amaaso ge; era n'erinnya lye linaabanga mu byenyi byabwe. 
Revelation22:5 So teebenga kiro nate; nga tebeetaaga kumulisa kwa ttaala n'omusana gw'enjuba, kubanga Mukama Katonda anaabeeranga omusana gwabwe, era banaafuganga emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation22:6 N'aŋŋamba nti, Ebigambo bino bya bwesigwa era bya mazima, era Mukama Katonda ow'emyoyo gya bannabbi, atumye malayika we okulaga abaddu be ebiteekwa okubaawo amangu" 
Revelation22:7 “ Era, laba, njija mangu. Aweereddwa omukisa akwata ebigambo eby'obunnabbi obw'ekitabo kino.”" 
Revelation22:8 Nze Yokaana, nze nnawulira ne ndaba bino. Bwe nnawulira ne ndaba, ne ngwa wansi ku bigere bya malayika oyo eyabindaga okumusinza." 
Revelation22:9 N'aŋŋamba nti, “Laba tokola bw'otyo: ndi muddu nga gwe era nga baganda bo bannabbi bwe bali, wamu n'abo bonna abakwata ebigambo eby'ekitabo kino. Ssinza Katonda.”" 
Revelation22:10 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti, “Tokuuma bigambo eby'obunnabbi obw'ekitabo kino nga bya kyama kubanga obudde buli kumpi." 
Revelation22:11 Leka ayonoona abeere ng'akyayonoona, era omugwagwa abeere ng'akyali mugwagwa, era n'omutuukirivu abeere ng'akyakola obutuukirivu, era n'omutukuvu, abeere ng'akyali mutukuvu.”" 
Revelation22:12 “Laba, njija mangu; n'empeera yange eri nange, okusasula buli muntu ng'omulimu gwe bwe guli." 
Revelation22:13 Nze Alufa ne Omega, Owolubereberye era Owenkomerero, okusooka n'enkomerero.”" 
Revelation22:14 Balina omukisa abo abayoza ebyambalo byabwe, balyoke babeere n'obuyinza ku muti ogw'obulamu, era balyoke bayingire mu kibuga nga bayita mu miryango." 
Revelation22:15 Ebweru ye eri embwa, n'abalogo, n'abenzi, n'abassi, n'abasinza ebifaananyi, n'abo bonna abaagala era abakola eby'obulimba." 
Revelation22:16 “Nze Yesu ntumye malayika wange okubategeeza mmwe ebyo olw'ekkanisa. Nze ndi kikolo era omuzukkulu wa Dawudi, emmunyeenye eyaka ey'enkya.”" 
Revelation22:17 Era Omwoyo n'omugole boogera nti, “ Jjangu.” Na buli awulira ayogere nti, “Jjangu.” Na buli alina ennyonta ajje, ayagala atwale amazzi ag'obulamu buwa." 
Revelation22:18 Ntegeeza buli muntu awulira ebigambo eby'obunnabbi obw'ekitabo kino nti Omuntu yenna bw'ayongerangako ku byo, Katonda alyongerako ku ye ebibonyoobonyo ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:19 Era omuntu yenna bw'aggyangamu mu bigambo eby'ekitabo eky'obunnabbi buno, Katonda alimuggyako omugabo gwe ku muti ogw'obulamu, ne mu kibuga ekitukuvu, ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:20 Oyo ategeeza bino ayogera nti, “Weewaawo nzija mangu.” Amiina, jjangu, Mukama waffe Yesu!"
